Matthew1:1 Are wuj wa' ri cutzijoj ri ija'lil ri xpe wi ri Jesucrist, ri rija'lil ri David, rija'lil ri Abraham." 
Matthew1:2 Ri u c'ojol ri Abraham are' ri Isaac. Ri u c'ojol ri Isaac are' ri Jacob. Ri u c'ojol ri Jacob are' ri Juda, xukuje' ri e rachalal." 
Matthew1:3 Ri e u c'ojol ri Juda are' ri Pares xukuje' ri Zar; ri qui nan are' ri Tamar. Ri u c'ojol ri Pares are' ri Esrom. Ri u c'ojol ri Esrom are' ri Aram. 
Matthew1:4 Ri u c'ojol ri Aram are' ri Aminadab. Ri u c'ojol ri Aminadab are' ri Naason. Ri u c'ojol ri Naason are' ri Salmon. 
Matthew1:5 Ri u c'ojol ri Salmon are' ri Booz; ri u nan ri Booz are' ri Rahab. Ri u c'ojol ri Booz are' ri Obed; ri u nan ri Obed are ri Rut. Ri u c'ojol ri Obed are' ri Isayi. 
Matthew1:6 Ri u c'ojol ri Isayi are' ri ajawinel David. Ri u c'ojol ri David are' ri Salomon; ri u nan ri Salomon are' ri rixokil canok ri Uriy. 
Matthew1:7 Ri u c'ojol ri Salomon are' ri Roboam. Ri u c'ojol ri Roboam are' ri Abiy. Ri u c'ojol ri Abiy are' ri As. 
Matthew1:8 Ri u c'ojol ri As are' ri Josapat. Ri u c'ojol ri Josapat are' ri Joram. Ri u c'ojol ri Joram are' ri Uziy. 
Matthew1:9 Ri u c'ojol ri Uziy are' ri Jotam. Ri u c'ojol ri Jotam are' ri Acaz. Ri u c'ojol ri Acaz are' ri Ezequiy. 
Matthew1:10 Ri u c'ojol ri Ezequiy are' ri Manases. Ri u c'ojol ri Manases are' ri Amon. Ri u c'ojol ri Amon are' ri Josiy. 
Matthew1:11 Ri e u c'ojol ri Josiy are' ri Jeconiy, xukuje' ri e rachalal, pa ri k'ijol aretak xebek'axex ri aj Israel pa Babilon." 
Matthew1:12 Aretak bantajinak chic ri k'axetajem pa Babilon, ri u c'ojol ri Jeconiy are' ri Salatiel. Ri u c'ojol ri Salatiel are' ri Zorobabel." 
Matthew1:13 Ri u c'ojol ri Zorobabel are' ri Abiud. Ri u c'ojol ri Abiud are' ri Eliaquim. Ri u c'ojol ri Eliaquim are' ri Azor. 
Matthew1:14 Ri u c'ojol ri Azor are' ri Sadoc. Ri u c'ojol ri Sadoc are' ri Aquim. Ri u c'ojol ri Aquim are' ri Eliud. 
Matthew1:15 Ri u c'ojol ri Eliud are' ri Eleazar. Ri u c'ojol ri Eleazar are' ri Matan. Ri u c'ojol ri Matan are' ri Jacob. 
Matthew1:16 Ri u c'ojol ri Jacob are' ri Jose, ri rachajil ri Mariy, are' wa' ri u nan ri Jesus, ri cakabij Crist che." 
Matthew1:17 Je c'u wa' conojel ri ija'lil ruc' ri Abraham c'ä ruc' ri David cajlajuj (14) ija'lil. Kas ruc' ri David c'ä pa ri k'axetajem pa Babilon cajlajuj (14) ija'lil. Kas ruc' ri k'axetajem pa Babilon c'ä ruc' ri Crist cajlajuj (14) ija'lil. 
Matthew1:18 Jewa' xc'ulmaxic aretak xalax ri Jesucrist: Ri Mariy, u nan ri Jesus, tz'onom chic che c'ulanem rumal ri Jose. Maja' c'u cäquirik quib aretak ri Mariy yawab winak chic rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios." 
Matthew1:19 Ri Jose ri rachajil are jun suc'alaj achi. Man xraj taj xresaj u q'uixbal ri Mariy chquiwäch conojel ri winak. Xuchomaj c'ut cuya' canok chi c'uyal. 
Matthew1:20 Aretak ri Jose cätajin cuchomaj wa', xpe jun tako'n aj caj re ri Ajawaxel, xuc'ut rib chuwäch pa ichic', xubij: “Jose, rija'l ri David, maxe'j awib che u c'amic ri Mariy che awixokil. Rumal rech chi ri ral ri cäc'oji' na are rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios." 
Matthew1:21 Ri Mariy cäc'oji' na jun ral ala. Jesus ri u bi' cacoj na. Jewa' ri u bi' rumal rech chi are cacolow na ri u tinimit ri c'o chupam ri qui mac.” 
Matthew1:22 Ronojel wa' xc'ulmaxic rech cäbantajic jas ri u tzijom can ri Ajawaxel rumal ri k'axal tzij, ri xubij:" 
Matthew1:23 “Ri k'apoj ali cux na yawab winak. Cäril na u wäch jun ral ala. Cucoj na Emanuel che u bi'.” Ri tzij Emanuel je quel cubij wa': “Ri Dios c'o kuc'.” 
Matthew1:24 Xc'astaj c'u ri Jose che ri waram, xubano jas ri xtak wi rumal ri tako'n aj caj re ri Ajawaxel. Xuc'am ri Mariy che rixokil." 
Matthew1:25 Ri Jose man xurik ta rib ruc' ri Mariy, c'ä xralaj na ri ral ala. Ri Jose xucoj “Jesus” che u bi'." 
Matthew2:1 Aretak xalax ri Jesus pa Belen re Judey, pa tak ri u k'ijol ri ajawinel ri Herod, xebopan pa Jerusalen jujun ajno'jab ri qui petic pa elebal k'ij." 
Matthew2:1 Aretak xalax ri Jesus pa Belen re Judey, pa tak ri u k'ijol ri ajawinel ri Herod, xebopan pa Jerusalen jujun ajno'jab ri qui petic pa elebal k'ij." 
Matthew2:2 Xquibij c'ut: “¿Jawije' c'o wi ri cajawinel ri aj judeyib ri xalaxic? Kilom ri u ch'imil pa ri elebal k'ij. Uj petinak c'u che u k'ijilaxic.” 
Matthew2:3 Aretak ri ajawinel Herod xuta' wa', xk'oxow ri ranima' e rachil conojel ri aj Jerusalen." 
Matthew2:4 Xebumulij conojel ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri quetijon ri winak che ri pixab. Xuc'ot qui chi': “¿Jawije' calax wi na ri Crist?” 
Matthew2:5 Ri e are' xquibij che: “Pa Belen re Judey. Je c'u ri' tz'ibam can rumal ri k'axal tzij: 
Matthew2:5 Ri e are' xquibij che: “Pa Belen re Judey. Je c'u ri' tz'ibam can rumal ri k'axal tzij: 
Matthew2:6 ‘Ri at, Belen, ulew re Judey, man at ta ch'utin na chquixo'l ri quetakan puwi' ri Judey. Rumal rech chi awuc' quel wi na ulok jun c'amal be ri cäyuk'un na ri nu tinimit Israel.’ ”" 
Matthew2:6 ‘Ri at, Belen, ulew re Judey, man at ta ch'utin na chquixo'l ri quetakan puwi' ri Judey. Rumal rech chi awuc' quel wi na ulok jun c'amal be ri cäyuk'un na ri nu tinimit Israel.’ ”" 
Matthew2:7 C'äte ri' ri Herod xebusiq'uij ri ajno'jab chi c'uyal, xuta' chque ruc' tz'akatil ri k'ij ri xc'utun ri ch'imil." 
Matthew2:8 Xebutak bic pa Belen, xubij: “Jix chila', utzalaj u ta'ic u tzijol ri ac'al chibana'. Aretak quiriko, chiliya' u tzijol chwe rech xukuje' ri in quinbe che u k'ijilaxic.”" 
Matthew2:9 Ri ajno'jab, aretak xquita' ri u tzij ri ajawinel, xebec. Ri ch'imil c'ut ri quilom ulok pa elebal k'ij xnabej chquiwäch, c'ä xopan na, xtaq'ui' puwi' ri c'o wi ri ac'al." 
Matthew2:10 Ri ajno'jab aretak xquil ri ch'imil, sibalaj xequicotic." 
Matthew2:11 Xeboc pa ri ja, xquil c'u ri ac'al c'o chunakaj ri Mariy ri u nan, xexuqui' chuwäch ri ac'al, xquik'ijilaj. Xquijak ri qui c'olbal, xquichi'j sipanic che k'an puak, c'oc'alaj k'ol, xukuje' ri cunabal mir." 
Matthew2:12 Ri achijab ri' xetak rumal ri Dios pa ichic' chi metzelej ruc' ri Herod, xebe c'u pa ri culew pa jun be chic." 
Matthew2:13 E benak chi c'u ri ajno'jab, jun tako'n aj caj re ri Ajawaxel xuc'ut rib chuwäch ri Jose pa ichic', xubij: “Chatwalijok. Chac'ama' bic ri ac'al xukuje' ri u nan. Chatanimajok. Jät pa Ejipt. Chatjekel chila' c'ä quinya' na u bixic chawe. Ri Herod cutzucuj na ri ac'al che u cämisaxic.”" 
Matthew2:14 Ri Jose xwalijic, chak'ab xuc'am bic ri ac'al xukuje' ri u nan, xebe pa Ejipt." 
Matthew2:15 Xec'oji' chila' c'ä xcäm na ri Herod. Jewa' xquibano rech catz'akatic jas ri u tzijom can ri Ajawaxel rumal ri k'axal tzij ri xubij: “Pa Ejipt xinsiq'uij wi ulok ri nu C'ojol.” 
Matthew2:16 Ri Herod aretak xrilo chi xetz'ebex u wäch cumal ri ajno'jab, sibalaj xpe royowal, xtakan che qui cämisaxic conojel ri ac'alab alabom ri e c'o pa Belen ri maja' cätz'akat cacab qui junab, xukuje' ri e c'o apan chunakaj ri tinimit, jas ri k'ij ri xretamaj cumal ri ajno'jab." 
Matthew2:17 Je c'u xbantajic jas ri u tzijom can ri Jeremiy ri k'axal tzij aretak xubij: 
Matthew2:18 “Xtataj jun ch'abal pa Rama, ok'ej ruc' nimalaj bis. Are ri Raquel querok'ej ri ral. Man xraj ta c'ut xcu'bisax ta u c'u'x, rumal rech chi xsach qui wäch ri ral.”" 
Matthew2:19 Cäminak chi c'u ri Herod, jun u tako'n aj caj ri Ajawaxel, xuc'ut rib pa ichic' chuwäch ri Jose pa Ejipt." 
Matthew2:20 Xubij: “Chatwalijok, chac'ama' bic ri ac'al xukuje' ri u nan. Jät pa ri ulew re Israel, rumal rech chi xecäm ri xquitzucuj ri ac'al che u cämisaxic.”" 
Matthew2:21 Xwalij c'u ri Jose, xuc'am bic ri ac'al xukuje' ri u nan, xebe pa ri ulew re Israel." 
Matthew2:22 Xuta' c'u ri Jose chi are ri Arquelao oquinak che ajawinel puwi' ri Judey che u q'uexwäch ri Herod ri u tat. Xuxe'j c'u rib, man xebe ta chila'. Xtak rumal ri Dios pa ichic', xebe pa ri ulew re Galiley." 
Matthew2:22 Xuta' c'u ri Jose chi are ri Arquelao oquinak che ajawinel puwi' ri Judey che u q'uexwäch ri Herod ri u tat. Xuxe'j c'u rib, man xebe ta chila'. Xtak rumal ri Dios pa ichic', xebe pa ri ulew re Galiley." 
Matthew2:23 Xebopanic, xec'oji' pa jun tinimit Nazaret u bi'. Jewa' xquibano rech je cäbantajic jas ri tzijom can cumal ri e k'axal tak tzij, chi ri Jesus cäbix na aj Nazaret che." 
Matthew3:1 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' xopan ri Xuan Bautist, pa Judey pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, cätzijon chila'." 
Matthew3:1 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' xopan ri Xuan Bautist, pa Judey pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, cätzijon chila'." 
Matthew3:2 Je c'u cubij wa': “Chiq'uexa' i c'u'x, rumal rech chi nakaj chic c'o wi' ri rajawibal ri Dios.”" 
Matthew3:3 Are wa' ri xutzijoj ri Isaiy ri k'axal tzij aretak xubij: “Jun ch'abal curak u chi' pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, ‘Chisuc'umaj ri u be ri Ajawaxel, chijicomisaj ri u be.’ ”" 
Matthew3:4 Ri Xuan rismal camey ri ratz'iak, tz'um ri ximibal u pam. Ri u wa ri cutijo are sac' xukuje' juyubal räx cab." 
Matthew3:5 Xebel c'u ulok ri aj Jerusalen, xebel ulok ri winak pa tak ri rulewal ri Juda xukuje' pa tak ri culewal ri e c'o chuchi' ri nima' Jordan. Xebopan ruc' ri Xuan." 
Matthew3:6 Xquik'alajisaj ri qui mac, xban ri qui bautism rumal ri Xuan pa ri nima' Jordan." 
Matthew3:7 Aretak xril ri Xuan chi e q'ui chque ri pariseyib xukuje' ri saduseyib xepetic rech cäban ri qui bautism. Aretak ri Xuan xerilo xubij chque: “¡Quija'l tak cumätz! ¿Jachin xbin chiwe chi chixanimaj chuwäch ri c'äjisabal wächaj ri cäpe na? 
Matthew3:8 Chebibana' ba wächinic ri takal che q'uexoj c'uxaj. 
Matthew3:9 Michomaj u bixic pa iwanima': ‘Ri Abraham are' ri ka mam.’ Quinbij c'u chiwe, chi ri Dios cäcuinic cuban rija'l ri Abraham chque tak we abaj ri'." 
Matthew3:10 Camic yo'm chic ri icäj che qui t'oyic bic ri che' c'ä chaquixe'. Ronojel che' ri man cuya' ta utzalaj u wächinic, cächoy na, cäq'uiak pa ri k'ak'." 
Matthew3:11 Ri in kastzij quinban i bautism pa ri ja', c'utbal wa' chi i q'uexom i c'u'x i yo'm c'u can ri i mac; are c'u ri jun ri petinak chwij, c'o na u cuinem chnuwäch. Man takal ta chwe quinwuc'aj bic ri u xajäb. Ri are' quixucoj na pa ri Ruxlabal ri Dios; o quixucoj na pa ri k'ak'." 
Matthew3:12 C'o ri u jopibal pa u k'ab, ri trico xukuje' cutas che ri pajo. Cuc'ol c'u na ri u trico pa ri u c'uja, cuporoj c'u na ri pajo pa ri k'ak' ri mawi jubik' cächupic.”" 
Matthew3:13 Xel ulok ri Jesus pa Galiley, xopan chuchi' ri nima' Jordan rech cäban ri u bautism rumal ri Xuan." 
Matthew3:14 Ri Xuan are ta xraj xuk'ilo, xubij c'u che ri Jesus: “In ta ri' ri rajawaxic cäban la ri nu bautism. ¿Are c'u ri lal cäpe la wuc'?”" 
Matthew3:15 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic che: “Chaya' c'olbal camic; takalic chi jewa' cakabano rech suc' u banic ronojel cakabano.” Xunimaj c'ut ri Xuan ri xubij che. 
Matthew3:16 Xuwi c'u xbantaj ri u bautism ri Jesus, xel ulok pa ri ja'. Chanim c'ut ri caj xjaktajic, xril c'u ri Jesus chi ri Ruxlabal ri Dios xkaj u ulok puwi' jacha' jun palomax." 
Matthew3:17 Xtataj c'u jun ch'abal chicaj ri xubij: “Are lok'alaj nu C'ojol wa' ri sibalaj quinquicot ruc'.” 
Matthew4:1 C'äte ri' ri Uxlabaxel xuc'am bic ri Jesus pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, rech cac'ambejex rumal ri itzel." 
Matthew4:2 Cawinak (40) k'ij cawinak ak'ab ri Jesus man xwa' taj, xpe c'u u numic." 
Matthew4:3 Xopan c'u ri itzel ruc' ri Jesus che u c'ambejexic. Xubij che: “We at u C'ojol ri Dios, chabana' chi we abaj tak ri' chebux caxlanwa.”" 
Matthew4:4 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Tz'ibatalic: Man xuwi ta rumal ri wa cäc'asi ri winak, xane' rumal ronojel tzij ri quebel ulok chuchi' ri Dios.”" 
Matthew4:5 Ri itzel xuc'am bic chupam ri tastalicalaj tinimit Jerusalen, xuc'am c'u bic puwi' ri tz'ukutz'ic ri naj elinak chicaj puwi' ri rachoch Dios." 
Matthew4:6 Xubij c'u che: “We at u C'ojol ri Dios, chaq'uiaka' bic awib iquim; rumal rech chi tz'ibatalic: ‘Chi quebutak ri e u tako'n aj caj rech catquichajij, catcuc'aj na bic pa qui k'ab, rech man cachak'ij ta ri awakan cho abaj.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Xukuje' tz'ibatalic: ‘Mac'ambejej ri Ajawaxel a Dios.’ ” 
Matthew4:8 Jumul chic ri itzel xuc'am bic puwi' jun juyub naj ak'aninak. Xebuc'ut conojel ri ajawibal ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew chuwäch ri Jesus, ruc' ri qui juluwem." 
Matthew4:9 Ri itzel xubij che: “Conojel wa' quebenya' chawe we catxuqui' chnuwäch, quinak'ijilaj c'ut.”" 
Matthew4:10 Xubij c'u ri Jesus che: “¡Jät, Satanas! Tz'ibatal c'ut: ‘Chak'ijilaj ri Ajawaxel a Dios, xak xuwi c'u ri are capatanij.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Xutas c'u rib ri itzel che ri Jesus, xebopan jujun tak tako'n aj caj che u patanixic." 
Matthew4:12 Aretak xuta' ri Jesus chi ri Xuan xcoj pa che', xtzelej pa Galiley." 
Matthew4:13 Xuya' can ri Nazaret, xbec xec'ol pa Capernaum, ri c'o chuchi' ri cho, chupam ri rulew ri Zabulon xukuje' ri Neptali." 
Matthew4:14 Xbantaj wa' rech catz'akat ri u tz'ibam ulok ri Isaiy ri k'axal tzij: 
Matthew4:15 “Ulew re Zabulon, ulew re Neptali ri c'o chuchi' ri plo, ri c'o ch'käp che ri nima' Jordan, Galiley quech ri man aj judeyib taj." 
Matthew4:16 Tinimit ri cäbin pa ri k'ekumalil, xril jun nimalaj chäj, jun chäj ri cajuluwic chque ri e jekel chupam ri u mu'jal ri cämical.”" 
Matthew4:17 Chi' c'ut ri Jesus xuchaplej tzijonic, xubij: “Chiq'uexa' i c'u'x, nakaj chi c'ut c'o wi ri rajawibal ri Dios.”" 
Matthew4:18 Ri Jesus cätajin cäbin chuchi' ri cho re Galiley, xeril quieb achijab cachalal quib. Ri jun are ri Simon ri xukuje' cäbix Lu' che, ri jun chic are ri Trix. Cätajin cäquiq'uiak ri qui c'at chapbal cär pa ri cho, e cäranelab c'ut." 
Matthew4:19 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Tisaj wuc', quinban c'u na chi quixux cäral tak winak.”" 
Matthew4:20 Chanim xequiya' canok ri qui c'at, xquiterenej." 
Matthew4:21 Xbin chi apan jubik' ri Jesus, xeril chi quieb cachalal quib: Ri Santiag ruc' ri Xuan, e u c'ojol ri Zebedey. E c'o chupam ri jucub ruc' ri Zebedey ri qui tat, cätajin quequic'ojoj tak ri qui c'at. Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij." 
Matthew4:22 Chanim xquiya' can ri jucub xukuje' ri qui tat, xquiterenej ri Jesus." 
Matthew4:23 Ri Jesus xusolij ronojel ri Galiley. Quebutijoj ri winak pa tak ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Quebucunaj c'u conojel ri winak che ronojel ri qui yabilal xukuje' tak ri qui k'oxomal. 
Matthew4:24 Xel c'u u tzijol ri Jesus pa ronojel ri Siriy; xec'am ulok conojel ri c'o itzel tak yabil chque, conojel ri qui rikom nimak tak c'ax, conojel ri c'o itzel tak uxlabal chque, conojel ri xak c'ätetal quetzakic, conojel ri cäminak qui cuerp. Ri Jesus xebucunaj." 
Matthew4:25 Q'ui winak re Galiley, que ri Lajuj Tinimit, re Jerusalen, re Judey, xukuje' e re ch'käp che ri Jordan, xeteri' chrij." 
Matthew4:25 Q'ui winak re Galiley, que ri Lajuj Tinimit, re Jerusalen, re Judey, xukuje' e re ch'käp che ri Jordan, xeteri' chrij." 
Matthew5:1 Aretak ri Jesus xeril ri q'uialaj winak, xpaki' pa ri juyub, xt'uyi' c'ut. Xekeb ri e u tijoxelab ruc'." 
Matthew5:2 Ri Jesus xuchaplej qui tijoxic, je xubij wa':" 
Matthew5:3 “Utz que ri cäquich'obo chi cajwataj ri Dios chque, caquechbej c'ut ri rajawibal ri Dios." 
Matthew5:4 Utz que ri quebok'ic, cacu'bisax c'ut qui c'u'x rumal ri Dios." 
Matthew5:5 Utz que ri caquimach' quib, cäquechbej c'u na ri ulew ri u chi'm ri Dios chque." 
Matthew5:6 Utz que ri quenumic ri cachak'ij qui chi' che u banic ri u takanic ri Dios, cuban c'ut ri are' chi catz'akat na ri caquirayij." 
Matthew5:7 Utz que ri quel qui c'u'x chque ri cajil quitz'akat, quel c'u na u c'u'x ri Dios chque." 
Matthew5:8 Utz que ri ch'ajch'oj canima', cäquil c'u na u wäch ri Dios." 
Matthew5:9 Utz que ri caquicoj qui chuk'ab rech cac'oji' jamaril, quebinax c'u na rumal ri Dios chi e ralc'ual." 
Matthew5:10 Utz que ri caquicoch' ri c'axc'olil ri caban amak'el chque rumal u banic ri u takanic ri Dios, ya'tal c'ut ri rajawibal ri Dios chque." 
Matthew5:11 Utz iwe ix aretak ri winak caquiyac iwoyowal, quixquiyok' c'ut, rumal c'u wech caquibij ronojel qui wäch banoj tak tzij chiwij." 
Matthew5:12 Chixquicot ruc' nimalaj quicotemal, chiquic'am c'u na jun nimalaj tojbal iwech pa ri caj; je c'u c'axc'olil wa' xban chque ri e k'axal tzij ri xepe can nabe chiwäch ix.”" 
Matthew5:13 “Ix ri' ri ratz'amil we uwächulew ri'. We c'u man c'o chic ri u tzayil ri atz'am, ¿jas ta c'u ri cubano cac'oji' ta chi u tzayil? Man c'o ta chic jas cupatanij. Xane' cäq'uiak apanok, cätac'alex c'u cumal ri winak." 
Matthew5:14 Ix ri' ri u chäj we uwächulew ri'. Jun tinimit ri c'o puwi' jun juyub man cäcuin taj cärawaj rib. 
Matthew5:15 Mawi catzij jun chäj rech caya' ta chuxe' jun bo'j, xane' caya' chicaj. Jeri' cuya' sakil chque conojel ri e c'o pa ja." 
Matthew5:16 Jewa' chtunun ri i chäj chquiwäch ri winak, rech quequil ri utzalaj tak i chac, cäquinimarisaj c'u u k'ij ri i Tat ri c'o pa ri caj.”" 
Matthew5:17 “Michomaj chi in petinak che u yubisaxic ri pixab, mawi ri qui tijonic ri e k'axal tak tzij. Man in petinak ta che qui yubisaxic, xane' che qui k'alajisaxic ri kas quel cubij." 
Matthew5:18 Kastzij quinbij chiwe, joropa' k'ij cac'oji' na ri caj xukuje' ri ulew, man c'o ta jun t'ik, mawi ri u wi' ri jun juch' ri quesax ta na che ri pixab c'ä conojel ri jastak quebantaj na." 
Matthew5:19 Je c'u ri' apachin ta ne ri man cunimaj ta jun chque ri pixab, pune' are ch'utin na, cubij c'u chque niq'uiaj winak chic chi man cäquinimaj taj, ri are cubinaj na sibalaj nitz' pa ri rajawibal ri Dios. Apachin c'u ri cunimaj ri pixab, cubij c'u chque niq'uiaj winak chic chi cäquinimaj, ri are cubinaj na nim pa ri rajawibal ri Dios." 
Matthew5:20 Quinbij c'u chiwe ix chi, we man are utz na ri i c'aslemal chquiwäch ri ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' ri pariseyib che u banic ri takaninak wi ri Dios, mawi jubik' quixoc na chupam ri rajawibal ri Dios.”" 
Matthew5:21 “I tom chi xbix chque ri ojer tak winak: ‘Matcämisanic. Apachin ri cäcämisanic, cäc'äjisax na u wäch.’" 
Matthew5:22 Ri in c'ut quinbij chiwe, chi ronojel jachin ri cäpe royowal che ri rachalal, takal che chi cäc'äjisax na u wäch. Apachin ri cuyok' ri rachalal, takal che chi cäc'äjisax na u wäch cumal ri tatayib ri cäquik'at tzij pa ri comon qui nimakil ri aj judeyib. Apachin ri cubij con che ri rachalal, takal che ri are' cäbe pa ri u k'ak'al ri xibalba." 
Matthew5:23 Rumal ri' we cac'am bic ri a sipanic puwi' ri porobal chila' c'ut cänataj wi chawe chi ri awachalal c'o cuna' chawij," 
Matthew5:24 chaya' can ri a sipanic chila' chuwäch ri porobal. Jät, chatutzir nabe ruc' ri awachalal. C'äte ri' cattzelej ruc' ri porobal che u ya'ic ri a sipanic." 
Matthew5:25 Chatutzir chanim ruc' ri a c'ulel, aretak c'ä at c'o ruc' pa ri be. We man catutziric, catujach na ri a c'ulel che ri k'atal tzij. Te c'u ri' ri k'atal tzij catujach na che ri chajinel. Ri chajinel c'ut catucoj na pa che'." 
Matthew5:26 Kastzij quinbij chawe, chi man catel ta na chila', c'ä catoj na ronojel ri a c'as.”" 
Matthew5:27 “I tom chi xbixic: ‘Matkaj pa mac ruc' jun winak chic.’ 
Matthew5:28 Ri in c'ut quinbij chiwe, chi ronojel jachin cuca'yej jun ixok che u rayixic u wäch, xkaj ri' pa mac ruc' pa ranima'." 
Matthew5:29 Rumal ri', we ri a bak'wäch re ri awiquiak'ab cattzakow pa ri mac, chawesaj, chaq'uiaka' apanok; are utz na chawe chi cäsach u wäch jun u tz'akatil ri a cuerp, chuwäch ri ronojel ri a cuerp cäq'uiak pa ri xibalba." 
Matthew5:30 We ri a k'ab re ri awiquiak'ab cattzakow pa ri mac, chak'ata', chaq'uiaka' apanok; are utz na chawe chi cäsach u wäch jun u tz'akatil ri a cuerp, chuwäch ri ronojel ri a cuerp cäq'uiak bic pa ri xibalba.”" 
Matthew5:31 “Xukuje' xbix canok: ‘Apachin ri cujach bic ri rixokil, chuya' bic jun wuj che ri cubij wi chi jachom.’" 
Matthew5:32 Ri in c'ut quinbij chiwe, chi ronojel jachin ri cujach bic ri rixokil, we man rumal ruc'axic rib ruc' jun achi che u banic macunic, are' cuban che ri ixok chi cäkaj chupam ri mac. Apachin c'ut ri cäc'uli' ruc' ri ixok ri jachom, xukuje' cux jun ri xkaj pa mac.”" 
Matthew5:33 “Xukuje' i tom chi ojer ulok xbix ulok chque ri winak chi ma ta xak lok' maquiban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na, xane' chequitojo' ri e qui chi'm che ri Ajawaxel." 
Matthew5:34 Are c'u ri in quinbij chiwe: Miban jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na pa u bi' apachique jasach. Micoj ri caj che u banic ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na, rumal rech chi are u tem ri Dios." 
Matthew5:35 Micoj ri u bi' ulew che u bixic kastzij, rumal rech chi are u tac'alibal ri Dios chque ri e rakan. Micoj ri u bi' ri Jerusalen che u bixic kastzij, rumal rech chi are u tinimit ri nimalaj Ajawinel." 
Matthew5:36 Micoj ri i jolom che u banic ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na, rumal rech chi man quixcuin taj quiban sak, mawi k'ek che jun wi'aj." 
Matthew5:37 Aretak quibij ‘je’, xak ‘je’ chi'x chokok; aretak quibij ‘jayi'’, xak ‘jayi'’ chixchokok. We c'o u wi' tzij cabixic, rech ri itzel wa'.”" 
Matthew5:38 “I tom chi xbixic: ‘Bak'wächaj che u q'uexwäch bak'wächaj. Wareyaj che u q'uexwäch wareyaj.’ 
Matthew5:39 Ri in c'ut quinbij chiwe: Mik'atij u wäch jun banal etzelal. Xane' we c'o jun catuch'ay che ri joperaj a palaj re ri awiquiak'ab, chatzolk'omij ri jun chic chuwäch." 
Matthew5:40 We c'o jun cäraj catusiq'uij pa k'atbal tzij che u majic ri a camixa', chaya' che xukuje' chi chuc'ama' bic ri a k'u'." 
Matthew5:41 We cäcoj chuk'ab chawe chi cac'am bic jun eka'n re niq'uiaj legua, chac'ama' bic jun legua." 
Matthew5:42 Apachin ta ne ri c'o cutz'onoj chawe, chaya' che; matzolk'omij awib chuwäch ri craj cakajan awuc'.”" 
Matthew5:43 “I tom chi xbixic: ‘Chalok'ok'ej ri awajil a tz'akat, chawetzelaj c'u u wäch ri a c'ulel.’" 
Matthew5:44 Are c'u ri in quinbij chiwe: Chebilok'ok'ej ri qui banom qui c'ulel chiwe, chibana' ch'awem ruc' Dios paquiwi' ri caquiban c'ax chiwe." 
Matthew5:45 We je quiban wa', quixux ralc'ual ri i Tat ri c'o pa ri caj. Are c'u quesan ulok ri k'ij paquiwi' ri winak chi e utz chi man e utz taj. Cuya' ri jäb paquiwi' ri winak chi e suc' chi man e suc' taj." 
Matthew5:46 We xak xuwi quebilok'ok'ej c'u ri quixlok'ok'enic, ¿jas ta c'u lo ri tojbal iwe c'olic? ¿La ma ta xukuje' junam cäquiban ri tok'il tak alcabal?" 
Matthew5:47 We xak xuwi ri e iwachalal quiya' rutzil qui wäch, ¿jas ta c'u lo ri utz quiban na chquiwäch ri niq'uiaj chic? ¿La ma ta xukuje' junam cäquiban ri man aj judeyib taj?" 
Matthew5:48 Chixux ba' tz'akat, je jas ri i Tat ri c'o chila' chicaj, are' tz'akat.”" 
Matthew6:1 “Chichajij iwib miban ri i suq'uil chquiwäch ri winak rech quixca'yex cumal. We je quiban wa', man c'o ta tojbal iwe ruc' ri i Tat ri c'o pa ri caj." 
Matthew6:2 Aretak c'ut caban tok'ob chque ri mebayib, mawesaj u tzijol ruc' trompet, je jas ri cäquiban ri quieb qui wäch xo'l tak ri be xukuje' pa tak ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab, rech cänimarisax qui k'ij cumal ri winak. Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi c'o chic ri tojbal quech." 
Matthew6:3 Ri at c'ut aretak caban tok'ob chque ri mebayib, märetamaj ri a mox k'ab jas ri cuban ri awiquiak'ab." 
Matthew6:4 Jeri' chabana' ri a tok'ob chi c'uyal. Ri a Tat c'ut ri quilow ri caban chi c'uyal, are cäyo'w na tojbal awech.”" 
Matthew6:5 “Aretak ri ix quiban ch'awem ruc' Dios, je mibano jas ri quieb qui wäch, utz cäquil ri e are' cäquitac'aba' quib pa tak ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab, cäquitac'aba' quib pa tak ri qui ch'u'c ri c'ayibal, rech quebil cumal ri winak. Kastzij quinbij chiwe chi c'o chic ri tojbal quech." 
Matthew6:6 Ri at c'ut, aretak caban ch'awem ruc' Dios, chatoc pa ri awachoch; chatz'apij ri uchi'ja, chabana' ch'awem ruc' ri a Tat ri c'o chic'uyal. Are c'u ri a Tat ri caril ri caban chi c'uyal, cuya' na ri tojbal awech." 
Matthew6:7 Aretak quiban ch'awem ruc' Dios, mibij q'ui tzij ri man c'o ta qui patan, je jas ri cäquiban ri e k'ijilal tak diosib. Ri e are cäquichomaj chi cumal ri qui bixic q'uialaj tak tzij ri man c'o ta qui patan quetatajic." 
Matthew6:8 Mijunamaj ba' iwib cuc'. Are c'u ri i Tat reta'm chic jachique tak ri jastak ri e rajawaxic chiwe c'ä majok chi tz'onoj che. 
Matthew6:9 Ri ix c'ut je ch'awem wa' chibana': ‘Ka Tat ri c'o la pa ri caj, chtastaj ri bi' la." 
Matthew6:10 Chpet ri ajawibal la. Chban ri rayibal la cho ri uwächulew, jacha' ri cäban chicaj." 
Matthew6:11 Ya' la ri ka wa re camic ri cajwataj chke. 
Matthew6:12 Checuyu' la ri e ketzelal jacha' xukuje' ri uj quekacuy ri etzelal ri e banom chke. 
Matthew6:13 Mujya' la chuwäch ri takchibal macaj, xane' chujto' la chujesaj la pa u k'ab ri banal etzelal.’" 
Matthew6:14 We ri ix quebicuy ri etzelal ri e banom chiwe, ri i Tat ri c'o pa ri caj quixucuy na ix." 
Matthew6:15 We man quebicuy ri winak, xukuje' ri i Tat man quebucuy ta na ri e iwetzelal ix.”" 
Matthew6:16 “Aretak man quitij ta i wa, mibisarisaj ri i palaj, jacha' caquiban ri quieb qui wäch. Ri e are' xak chubanic caquetzelaj ri qui palaj rech caquil ri winak chi man quewa' taj. Kastzij quinbij chiwe chi c'o chic ri tojbal quech." 
Matthew6:17 Ri at c'ut aretak man catij ta a wa, chabila' ri a jolom, chach'aja' ri a palaj utz c'u u suc'umaxic awib chabana'." 
Matthew6:18 Rech man caquil ta ri winak chi man a tijom ta a wa. Xane' xak xuwi ri a Tat ri quilowic ri c'o awuc' chi c'uyal. Ri are' c'ut cayo'w na ri tojbal awech.” 
Matthew6:19 “Mimulij i k'inomal waral cho ri uwächulew jawije' ri quechicopir wi, cuchuluj wi rib, jawije' ri queboc wi ri eläk'omab che reläk'axic bic." 
Matthew6:20 Xane' chimulij i k'inomal pa ri caj, ri man cächicopir ta wi, man cuchuluj ta wi rib, man queboc ta wi eläk'omab che reläk'axic bic." 
Matthew6:21 Jawije' c'ut ri c'o wi ri i k'inomal, chila' c'o wi ri iwanima'.”" 
Matthew6:22 “Ri u chäj ri cuerp are ri bak'wächaj. We c'u utz ri a bak'wäch, ronojel ri' ri a cuerp c'o u chäj." 
Matthew6:23 We man utz ri a bak'wäch, ronojel ri a cuerp ri' c'o pa ri k'eku'm. We c'u k'eku'm ri chaj ri c'o awuc', sibalaj ba nim na ri' we k'ekumalil ri'.”" 
Matthew6:24 “Man c'o ta jachin jun cäcuinic quebupatanij quieb ajawib, rumal rech chi cäretzelaj na u wäch ri jun, culok'ok'ej c'u na ri jun chic, o cäruc'aj rib ruc' ri jun, man nim ta c'u cäril wi ri jun chic. Man quixcuin taj quipatanij ri Dios xukuje' ri k'inomal.”" 
Matthew6:25 “Rumal ri' quinbij chiwe: Mixoc il che ri i c'aslemal, jas ri quitij na, o jas ri quiwuq'uiaj na; mawi che ri i cuerp, jas atz'iak ri quicojo' na. ¿La ma ta are nim na u k'ij ri c'aslemal chuwäch ri cätijic? ¿La ma ta are xukuje' nim na u k'ij ri cuerp chuwäch ri atz'iak?" 
Matthew6:26 Chiwilampe' ri chicop aj uwo caj ri e c'o qui xic'. Ri e are' man queticonij taj, man quek'atow taj, man quemulin ta pa c'uja. Ri i Tat c'ut ri c'o chila' chicaj quetzukuwic. ¿La ma ta are nim na i k'ij ix chquiwäch ri e are'?" 
Matthew6:27 Jachin ta jun chiwe pune' ta sibalaj coc il, ¿Jas ta lo ri cubano che u tikic niq'uiaj bara' che ri rakan?" 
Matthew6:28 Xukuje' ri atz'iak, ¿jasche quixoc il che? Chiwesaj i no'j chque ri juyubal tak cotz'i'j, jas ri cäquibano queq'uiyic: man quechacun taj, man quebatz'am taj." 
Matthew6:29 Quinbij c'u chiwe, chi mawi ri ajawinel Salomon je ta ratz'iak wa' xucojo, pune' sibalaj nim u k'ij." 
Matthew6:30 We ri k'ayes re ri juyub, ri c'o camic, chwek c'ut cäq'uiak pa k'ak', je ratz'iakixic wa' rumal ri Dios, ¡e ta c'u lo ri ix; ay ri ix, xa' jubik' i cojonic!" 
Matthew6:31 Mixoc il, mibij: ‘¿Jas cäkatijo, jas cäkuq'uiaj, jas katz'iak cäkacojo?’" 
Matthew6:32 Conojel we jastak ri' are sibalaj quequitzucuj ri man queta'm ta u wäch ri Dios; ri i Tat c'ut ri c'o chila' chicaj reta'm chi conojel we jastak ri' quebajwataj chiwe. 
Matthew6:33 Rumal c'u ri' are chicojo' i chuk'ab che u rikic ri rajawibal ri Dios chibana' c'ut ri cutok'ij ri Dios, quebic'am c'u na xukuje' conojel tak we jastak ri'." 
Matthew6:34 Je c'u ri', mixoc il che ri k'ij re chwek; ri k'ij c'ut re chwek cuc'am na ulok ri roquem il. Ri retzelal ri jun k'ij chubana' wa' che.”" 
Matthew7:1 “Mik'at tzij paquiwi' jule' chic, rech man cäk'at ta tzij piwi' ix." 
Matthew7:2 Je c'ut jas quiban ix che u k'atic tzij paquiwi' jule' chic, je cäban na chiwe ix, cak'at na tzij piwi', jas ri pajbal xicoj ix, je cäcoj na chiwe." 
Matthew7:3 ¿Jasche caca'yej ri mes ri c'o pa ri u bak'wäch ri awachalal, man cawil ta c'ut ri cuta'm ri c'o chupam ri a bak'wäch at?" 
Matthew7:4 We c'u ri at c'o jun cuta'm chupam ri kas a bak'wäch, ¿jas ta c'u ri cabano catcuinic cabij che ri awachalal: ‘Chaya' c'olbal chwe quinwesaj ri pajo ri c'o chupam ri a bak'wäch?’" 
Matthew7:5 ¡Quieb a wäch! Nabe chawesaj ri cuta'm ri c'o pa ri a bak'wäch. C'äte ri' kas catca'y che resaxic ri mes pa ri u bak'wäch ri awachalal. 
Matthew7:6 Mebiya' ri tastalicalaj tak jastak chque ri tz'i'. Mebiquiäk tak ri e i perl chquiwäch ri ak. Ri e are c'ut quequitac'alej, quetzelej c'u chiwij, cäquiban ch'akatak chiwe.”" 
Matthew7:7 “Chixtz'ononok, cäyataj c'u na chiwe; chixtzucunok, quixrikon c'u na; chixc'orc'ot chuchi' ri oquibal, cäjaktaj c'u na chiwäch." 
Matthew7:8 Ronojel ri catz'ononic, cac'amanic; xukuje' ri catzucunic cärikonic; ri cäc'orc'otic, cäjaktaj na chuwäch." 
Matthew7:9 ¿Jachin ta jun winak chiwe, we ri ralc'ual cuta' u wa che, cuya' ta jun abaj che?" 
Matthew7:10 ¿O la cuya' lo jun cumätz che, aretak cutz'onoj jun cär che?" 
Matthew7:11 We c'u ri ix, ri ix lawalo, iweta'm quebiya' utzalaj tak jastak chque ri e iwalc'ual, ¡e ta c'u lo ri i Tat ri c'o pa ri caj, quebuya' na utzalaj tak jastak chque ri caquitz'onoj che!" 
Matthew7:12 Je c'u ri', ronojel ri quiwaj chi cäquiban ri winak chiwe, jeri' xukuje' chibana' ix chque. Are c'u wa' ri cätakan wi ri pixab xukuje' ri xquitz'ibaj ri e k'axal tak tzij.”" 
Matthew7:13 “Chixoc chupam ri oquibal ri latz' u wäch. Nim c'u qui wäch xukuje' nim qui pam ri oquibal xukuje' ri be ri cäc'aman bic chupam ri sachbal wächaj, e q'ui c'ut ri queboc bic chupam." 
Matthew7:14 Latz' c'u u wäch ri oquibal, xukuje' alaj u wäch ri be ri quec'aman bic pa ri c'aslemal. Man e q'ui ta c'ut ri querikowic.”" 
Matthew7:15 “Chichajij iwib chquiwäch ri winak ri cäquijaluj quib chi e k'axal tak tzij. Ri e are quebul iwuc', je ta ne e chij, are c'u ri chquipam e tokinelab tak utiw." 
Matthew7:16 Cumal tak ri e qui wächinic quiwetamaj qui wäch, man c'u quech'up ta uva chque tak ri q'uix, mawi higo chque tak ri tzacam." 
Matthew7:17 Je c'u ri', ronojel utzalaj che' cuya' utzalaj u wächinic. Are c'u ri che' ri man utz taj, cuya' u wächinic ri man utz taj." 
Matthew7:18 Man cäcuin taj ri jun utzalaj che' cuya' wächinic ri man utz taj, mawi cäcuintaj ri jun che' ri man utz taj cuya' utzalaj u wächinic." 
Matthew7:19 Ronojel che' ri man cuya' ta utzalaj u wächinic, cächoy na bic, cäq'uiak pa k'ak'." 
Matthew7:20 Je c'u ri', rumal ri qui wächinic, quiwetamaj wi qui wäch.”" 
Matthew7:21 “Man ronojel taj ri cabin chwe: ‘Wajaw, Wajaw’, coc ta na pa ri rajawibal ri Dios, xane' xuwi ri quebanow ri u rayibal ri nu Tat ri c'o pa ri caj." 
Matthew7:22 E q'ui c'ut cäquibij na chwe pa ri k'ij ri': ‘Wajaw, Wajaw, ¿la ma ta xkak'axej ri tzij la chque ri winak pa ri bi' la? ¿La ma ta xekesaj itzel tak uxlabal pa ri bi' la? ¿La ma ta xkaban q'uialaj mayibal pa ri bi' la?’" 
Matthew7:23 Ri in c'ut quinbij na chque: ‘Mawi jumul xinch'ob i wäch. Chixel chnuwäch, ix banal tak etzelal.’ ”" 
Matthew7:24 “Ronojel jachin ri cutatabej we nu tzij ri', cunimaj c'ut, are' je jas jun achi utz u chomanic. Ri achi ri' xuyac jun rachoch puwi' jun nimalaj abaj." 
Matthew7:25 Xkaj ri jäb, xnimar ri nima', xpe nimalaj quiakik' chrij ri ja ri'. Man xtzak ta c'ut, rumal rech chi ri u tac'alibal c'o puwi' ri abaj." 
Matthew7:26 Ronojel ri cutatabej we nu tzij ri', man cunimaj ta c'ut, are' je jas jun conalaj achi ri xuyac jun rachoch puwi' ri sanyeb." 
Matthew7:27 Xkaj ri jäb, xnimar ri nima', xpe nimalaj quiakik' xuq'uiak rib chrij ri ja ri'. Xtzak c'ut. Sibalaj nim ri u tzakic." 
Matthew7:28 Aretak ri Jesus xuq'uis u bixic we tzij ri', conojel ri winak e mayinak che ri u tijonic." 
Matthew7:29 Rumal rech chi quebutijoj je jas ri jun c'o u takanic, man je ta c'ut e jacha' ri ajtijab re ri pixab.”" 
Matthew8:1 Aretak ri Jesus xkaj ulok puwi' ri juyub, sibalaj q'ui winak xeteri chrij." 
Matthew8:2 Xopan c'u jun achi c'o ch'a'c chrij. Xxuqui' chuwäch ri Jesus, xubij che: “Wajaw, we caj la, cäcuin la che nu josk'ixic.”" 
Matthew8:3 Ri Jesus c'ut xuyuk ri u k'ab, xuchap ocok, xubij che: “Quinwaj; chatjosk'itajok.” Chanim ri' xjosk'itaj ri achi che ri u ch'a'c." 
Matthew8:4 Xubij c'u ri Jesus che: “Chawilampe', c'o jun mabij wi, xane' jät, chac'utu' awib chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob. Chaya' ri sipanic ri xtakan wi ri Moises, che k'alajisanic chquiwäch ri winak chi at utz chic.”" 
Matthew8:5 Oquem re ri Jesus pa Capernaum, xpe jun aj Rom qui nimal ri jun sient ajch'ojab, xopan ruc' ri Jesus, xutz'onoj jun tok'ob che." 
Matthew8:6 Xubij: “Wajaw, ri ala ri pataninel wech cäminak u cuerp, c'o cho ja, c'o nimalaj c'ax che.”" 
Matthew8:7 Xubij c'u ri Jesus che: “Quinbe che u cunaxic.” 
Matthew8:8 Xubij c'u ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab: “Wajaw, man takal ta chwe chi coc la pa ri wachoch. Xane' xuwi chya' la ri takanic, ri ala cäcunataj c'u na." 
Matthew8:9 Ri in c'ut, in achi in c'o chuxe' takanic. E c'o c'u ajch'ojab pa nu k'ab. Quinbij che ri jun: ‘Jät,’ cäbe c'ut. Quinbij che jun chic: ‘Tasaj,’ cäpe c'ut. Quinbij che ri wajchac: ‘Chabana' wa',’ cuban c'ut.”" 
Matthew8:10 Aretak xuta' ri Jesus, xumay ri u tzij ri achi. Xubij chque ri e teren chrij: “Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi mawi ne pa Israel nu rikom ta we nimalaj cojonic ri'." 
Matthew8:11 Quinbij chiwe chi q'ui winak quepe na pa elebal k'ij, quepe na pa u kajebal k'ij, quet'uyi' na cuc' ri Abraham, ri Isaac xukuje' ri Jacob pa ri rajawibal ri Dios." 
Matthew8:12 E are tak c'ut ri takal ri ajawibal chque queq'uiak na naj pa ri k'ekumalil, ri quebok' wi na, caquikuch'uch'ej na ri qui ware.”" 
Matthew8:13 C'äte ri' ri Jesus xubij che ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab: “Jät. Je jas ri xacojo, je chban chawe. Xcunataj c'u ri ala pa ri jok'otaj ri'.”" 
Matthew8:14 Ri Jesus xopan cho rachoch ri Lu', xrilo chi ri u ji' chuchu' kajinak che k'ak'." 
Matthew8:15 Ri Jesus xuchap ri u k'ab, xel c'u ri k'ak' chrij ri chuchu'; xwalijic, xebupatanij c'ut." 
Matthew8:16 Aretak xk'ekal chic, q'ui ri c'o itzel tak uxlabal chque xec'am ulok chuwäch ri Jesus. Ri are' xeresaj ri itzel tak uxlabal ruc' jun tzij. Xebucunaj c'u conojel ri c'o yabil chque." 
Matthew8:17 Je xbantajic jas ri tzijom can rumal ri Isaiy ri k'axal tzij. Xubij: “Kas are xebuc'am bic ri ka tukaril, xerekaj c'u bic ri ka yabilal.”" 
Matthew8:18 Ri Jesus, aretak xeril ri q'uialaj winak chrij, xtakanic chi chek'ax ch'akäp che ri cho." 
Matthew8:19 Xpe c'u jun ajtij re ri pixab, xopan ruc' ri Jesus, xubij che: “Ajtij, quinteri chij la xa' apawije' ta ne ri cäbe wi la.”" 
Matthew8:20 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Ri yac c'o qui jul, ri chicop aj uwo caj c'o qui soc. Are c'u ri Rija'l winak, man c'o ta cuxlan wi ri u jolom.”" 
Matthew8:21 Jun chic chque ri u tijoxelab xubij che: “Wajaw, ya' la chwe chi nabe quinmuku' can ri nu tat.”" 
Matthew8:22 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Chinaterenej, chebaya' can ri cäminakib chi chequimuku' ri qui cäminakib.”" 
Matthew8:23 Xoc c'u ri Jesus pa ri jucub, ri u tijoxelab xquiterenej." 
Matthew8:24 C'äte ri' xpe jun nimalaj quiakik'. Jeri' chi ri jucub cäch'ukutaj cumal ri k'et ri cäpe puwi' ri cho; are c'u ri Jesus cäwaric. 
Matthew8:25 Ri u tijoxelab xekeb ruc', xquic'asuj, xquibij che: “Kajaw, chujto' la, cäsach na ka wäch.”" 
Matthew8:26 Xubij ri Jesus chque: “¿Jasche quixe'j iwib, ri ix xa' jubik' ri i cojonic?” Xwalij c'ut, xuyaj ri quiakik' xukuje' ri ja'. Chanim c'u xtänic. Xpe c'u nimalaj jamaril pa ri cho." 
Matthew8:27 E mayininak c'ut xquibij: “¿Jas u banic we achi ri', chi ri quiakik' xukuje' ri cho cäquinimaj ri u tzij?”" 
Matthew8:28 Aretak xk'ax ch'käp che ri cho, xopan pa jun ulew re Gadar. E c'o quieb winak c'o itzel tak uxlabal chque, xebel ulok chquixo'l ri mukubal, xekeb ruc' ri Jesus. Sibalaj xibibal qui wäch, jeri' chi man c'o ta jun cäcuinic coc'ow pa ri be ri'." 
Matthew8:29 Xquirak c'u qui chi', xquibij: “¿Jas awe chke, Jesus u C'ojol ri Dios? ¿La at petinak waral che u banic c'ax chke, c'ä majok curika' ri k'ijol?”" 
Matthew8:30 Naj c'u e c'o wi apan chque jumulaj ak ri cätajin queyuk'uxic. 
Matthew8:31 Ri itzel tak uxlabal xquibochi'j ri Jesus, xquibij che: “We cujawesaj bic, chujataka bic cuc' ri jumulaj ak.”" 
Matthew8:32 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Jix. Xebel bic chque ri winak xeboc chquipam ri ak; c'äte ri' conojel ri jumulaj ak xexulelic xekaj bic puwi' ri tanatic, xekaj pa ri cho, xejik' c'u pa ri ja'.”" 
Matthew8:33 Ri ajyuk'ab xebanimajic, xebe pa ri tinimit. Xequiya' u tzijol conojel ri jastak ri'. Xequiya' u tzijol ri xquic'ulmaj ri winak ri c'o itzel tak uxlabal chque." 
Matthew8:34 Conojel c'u ri e c'o pa ri tinimit xebel ulok che u rikic quib ruc' ri Jesus. Aretak xquilo, xquibochi'j chi chel bic pa ri qui c'olbal." 
Matthew9:1 Xoc ri Jesus chupam ri jucub, xk'ax ch'käp che ri cho. Xopan pa ri u tinimit." 
Matthew9:2 Xtelex c'u ulok jun cäminak u cuerp, k'oyol chuwäch jun pop. Ri Jesus aretak xril ri qui cojonic ri e c'amowinak ulok, xubij che ri cäminak u cuerp: “Chajiquiba a c'u'x, nu c'ojol, ri e a mac e sachtajinak.”" 
Matthew9:3 E c'o jujun chque ri ajtijab re ri pixab chila', xquichomaj: “We achi ri' cuc'ulelaj ri Dios.”" 
Matthew9:4 Xretamaj c'ut ri Jesus ri qui chomanic, xuc'ot qui chi': “¿Jasche sibalaj itzel ri qui chomaj?" 
Matthew9:5 ¿Jachique c'ut ri man c'ax ta u bixic: ‘Ri a mac e sachtajinak'’, o ri u bixic: ‘Chatwalijok, chatbinok’?" 
Matthew9:6 Rech c'ut quiwetamaj chi ri Rija'l winak c'o takanic pa u k'ab che qui sachic ri macaj cho ri uwächulew, xubij c'u che ri cäminak u cuerp: ‘Chatwalijok. Chawalijisaj bic ri a pop. Jät cho awachoch.’ ”" 
Matthew9:7 Xwalij c'ut, xbe cho rachoch." 
Matthew9:8 Ri q'uialaj winak aretak xquilo, xquimayo, xquinimarisaj u k'ij ri Dios, rumal rech chi are yowinak we takanic ri' pa qui k'ab ri winak." 
Matthew9:9 Cätajin coc'ow ri Jesus chila', xril jun achi t'uyul jawije' ri cätoj wi alcabal, Matey u bi'. Ri Jesus xubij che: “Chinaterenej.” Xwalij c'ut, xuterenej bic." 
Matthew9:10 Xc'ulmatajic chi ri Jesus c'o pa ri mexa cho rachoch ri Matey. E q'ui c'u tok'il tak alcabal xukuje' ajmaquib xet'uyi' pa ri mexa ruc' ri Jesus xukuje' cuc' ri u tijoxelab. 
Matthew9:11 Ri pariseyib aretak xquil wa', xquic'ot qui chi' ri u tijoxelab: “¿Jasche cäwa' ri iwajtij cuc' ri tok'il tak alcabal xukuje' cuc' ri ajmaquib?”" 
Matthew9:12 Ri Jesus c'ut aretak xuta' ri xquibij, xubij: “Ri winak ri e utz man rajawaxic ta cunal quech, xane' ri c'o yabil chque." 
Matthew9:13 Jix chiwetamaj ri quel cubij we tz'ibatalic ri': ‘Ri quinwaj are' chi quel i c'u'x, ma are ta ri qui chi'xic tabal tak tok'ob.’ Man in petinak taj che qui siq'uixic ri e suc', xane' ri ajmaquib, rech cäquiq'uex qui c'u'x.”" 
Matthew9:14 Xepe c'u ri u tijoxelab ri Xuan, xebopan ruc' ri Jesus, xquibij che: “¿Jasche ri uj xukuje' ri pariseyib c'o k'ij man cujwa' taj, are c'u ri tijoxelab la man je taj cäquibano?”" 
Matthew9:15 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La quebison puch ri ula' ri e c'o pa jun c'ulanem, joropa' k'ij cac'oji' ri achajilaxel cuc'? Copan c'u na jun k'ij aretak quesax ri achajilaxel chquixo'l. C'äte c'u ri' man quequitij ta qui wa." 
Matthew9:16 Man c'o ta jun cucoj jun c'ac' c'ojbal che jun k'e'l atz'iak. We ta jeri' ri c'ojbal cäresaj bic jubik' che ri atz'iak, cänimataj c'u ri u tek'tobic." 
Matthew9:17 Xukuje' man cäya' ta c'ac' u wa'l uva pa k'e'l tak tz'um. We ta jeri' quet'ubin ri' ri tz'um, cätix c'u ri' ri u wa'l uva, man c'o ta chi c'u qui patan ri tz'um. Xane' cäya' ri c'ac' u wa'l uva pa c'ac' tak tz'um. Jewa' cäquito' quib ri e quieb, man cäsach ta qui wäch.”" 
Matthew9:18 Aretak cätajin catzijon ri Jesus cuc', xopan c'u jun nim u k'ij, xxuqui' chuwäch ri Jesus, xubij che: “Ri nu mia'l c'äte jubik' ri' cäcämic. Saj ba' la. Chya' ri k'ab la puwi', cäc'asi c'u na.”" 
Matthew9:19 Ri Jesus xwalijic, xuterenej bic; xerachilaj bic ri u tijoxelab." 
Matthew9:20 C'äte ri' xpe jun chuchu' c'o chi cablajuj junab quel u quiq'uel. Ri are' xkeb chrij ri Jesus, xuchap ocok ri u chi' ri ratz'iak." 
Matthew9:21 Xubij c'u ri chuchu' pa ranima': “Xuwi ta ne quinchap ocok ri ratz'iak, quincunataj na.”" 
Matthew9:22 Ri Jesus xutzolk'omij rib che u ca'yexic ri chuchu', xubij che: “Chajiquiba a c'u'x, nu mia'l. Rumal ri a cojonic xatcunatajic.” Kas c'u pa ri jok'otaj ri' xcunatajic." 
Matthew9:23 Xopan c'u ri Jesus cho rachoch ri achi nim u k'ij; xeril ri e ok'esal tak su' xukuje' tak ri winak ri caquiq'uis quib che ok'ej. 
Matthew9:24 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chixel bic waral, ri ali man cäminak taj, xa' warinak.” Ri winak xquitze'j u wäch." 
Matthew9:25 Are c'u ri Jesus xuban chque chi xebel bic, xoc c'u bic xuchap ri ali che ri u k'ab, xwalij c'u ri ali." 
Matthew9:26 Xel u tzijol wa' chquixo'l conojel ri winak chila'. 
Matthew9:27 Aretak xel bic ri Jesus chila', xeteri bic quieb moyab chrij. Xquirak qui chi', xquibij: “Chel c'u'x la chke, Rija'l ri David.”" 
Matthew9:28 Aretak xopan cho ja, xekeb ri quieb moyab ruc'. Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La quicojo chi quincuin che u banic wa'?” Xquibij che: “Je', Kajaw.”" 
Matthew9:29 Ri Jesus xebuchap ocok ri qui bak'wäch, xubij: “Jas ri u beya'l ri i cojonic, je chban taj chiwe.”" 
Matthew9:30 Xejaktaj c'u ri qui bak'wäch. Ri Jesus sibalaj xebupixbej, xubij: “Chiwila', c'o jun metamanic.”" 
Matthew9:31 Xebel c'u bic, xquesaj u tzijol chque conojel ri winak chila'." 
Matthew9:32 Pa ri quelic c'u bic ri moyab, jujun winak xquic'am ulok chuwäch ri Jesus jun mem ri c'o itzel uxlabal che." 
Matthew9:33 Aretak esam chi bic ri itzel uxlabal, xtzijon ri mem. Ri winak xquimayo, xquibij: “Mawi jumul je banom wa' pa Israel.”" 
Matthew9:34 Are c'u ri pariseyib xquibij: “Rumal ri u cuinem ri qui nimal ri itzel tak uxlabal queresaj ri itzel tak uxlabal.” 
Matthew9:35 Ri Jesus xebusolij conojel ri tinimit xukuje' ri alaj tak tinimit. Quebutijoj ri winak pa tak ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Cutzijoj ri utzalaj tzijol re ri rajawibal ri Dios. Cucunaj ronojel yabil xukuje' ronojel k'oxowem. 
Matthew9:36 Aretak ri Jesus xeril ri q'uialaj winak, xel u c'u'x chque, rumal rech chi cäquirik c'ax e je jas ri chij ri man c'o ta cajyuk', e jabuninak." 
Matthew9:37 Xubij c'u chque ri u tijoxelab: “Kastzij ri k'atoj sibalaj nim, are c'u ri ajchaquib man e q'ui taj." 
Matthew9:38 Chitz'onoj ba che ri rajaw ri k'atoj, chi chebutaka' bic ajchaquib pa ri u k'atoj.”" 
Matthew10:1 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij c'u ri cablajuj u tijoxelab. Xuya' takanic pa qui k'ab paquiwi' ri itzel tak uxlabal, che quesaxic bic; xuya' takanic pa qui k'ab che u cunaxic ronojel yabil xukuje' ronojel k'oxowem." 
Matthew10:2 Ri cablajuj takomxenlab e are wa' ri qui bi': ri nabe Simon, ri cäbix Lu' che, ri Trix ri rachalal, ri Santiag u c'ojol ri Zebedey, ri Xuan ri rachalal," 
Matthew10:3 ri Pelip, ri Bartolome, ri Max, ri Matey ri tok'il alcabal, ri Santiag u c'ojol ri Alpey, ri Tadey," 
Matthew10:4 ri Simon que ri juk'at aj selot, xukuje' ri Judas Iscariot ri xjachow ri Jesus." 
Matthew10:5 E are cablajuj wa' ri xebutak bic ri Jesus, xebupixbej bic, xubij chque: “Mixbe cuc' ri man aj judeyib taj, xukuje' mixoc pa tak qui tinimit ri aj samarib;" 
Matthew10:6 xane' jix nabe cuc' ri chij re ri u tinimit ri Israel, ri e sachinak." 
Matthew10:7 Pa ri i binem chitzijoj chque ri winak: ‘Nakaj chic c'o wi ri rajawibal ri Dios.’ 
Matthew10:8 Chebicunaj yawabib, chebic'astajisaj cäminakib, chebicunaj ri c'o ch'a'c chquij, rech quebux ch'ajch'oj, chebiwesaj itzel tak uxlabal. Man c'o ta xiya' che ri xic'amo; chiya' c'u chque ri winak, man c'o ta jas quitok'ij chque." 
Matthew10:9 Mic'am bic k'an puak, mawi sak puak, mawi quiäk puak pa ri i pas." 
Matthew10:10 Mic'am bic iwatz'iak ri qui jalbej, mic'am bic i chi'm re be, mawi i xajäb, mawi i ch'imiy. Takal che ri ajchac ri tzukbal rech." 
Matthew10:11 Apachique tinimit o alaj tinimit ri quixoc wi, chich'obo' jachin ri c'o chila' ri takal wi, chixcanaj c'u can chila' c'ä quixel na bic." 
Matthew10:12 Aretak c'u quixoc pa jun ja, chiya' rutzil qui wäch ri ajchak'e ri ja." 
Matthew10:13 We takal chque ri ajchak'e ri ja, chcanaj ri i jamaril cuc'; we c'u man takal chque, man cacanaj ta ri i jamaril cuc'." 
Matthew10:14 Apachin ta ne ri man quixuc'ulaj taj, mawi cutatabej ri i tzij, chixel bic pa ri ja o ri tinimit ri'. Chitota' can ri ulew ri e c'o chque ri iwakan." 
Matthew10:15 Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi ri c'äjisabal qui wäch ri winak re ri tinimit ri' nim na chuwäch ri re ri Sodom xukuje' ri Gomor pa ri k'ij re ri k'atoj tzij.”" 
Matthew10:16 “Chiwilampe'. Quixintak bic je jas ri chij chquixo'l ri utiw. Chicojo' ri i chomabal chichajij iwib je jas ri caquiban ri cumätz. Chixux jacha' ri palomax ri man c'o ta c'ax cubano. 
Matthew10:17 Chichajij iwib chquiwäch ri winak; quixquijach c'u na pa qui k'ab ri k'atal tak tzij, quixquich'ay na pa tak ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab." 
Matthew10:18 Quixc'am na bic chquiwäch k'atal tak tzij xukuje' ajawinelab rumal wech in, jeri' quik'alajisaj na chquiwäch jas ri iwilom, xukuje' quik'alajisaj na chquiwäch ri man aj judeyib taj." 
Matthew10:19 Aretak c'ut quixquijach na pa qui k'ab ri k'atal tak tzij, mixoc il che ri quibij na o jas u bixic quibij na, aretak c'u copan ri jok'otaj che ri tzijonem, cäyataj na chiwe jas ri qui bij na." 
Matthew10:20 Man ix ta c'ut ri quixtzijon na, xane' are ri Uxlabaxel re ri i Tat cätzijon na chi i chi'." 
Matthew10:21 Ri achalaxel quebujach na ri rachalal pa cämic, ri tataxelab quebujach na ri ralc'ual. Ri alc'ualaxelab cäquiwalijisaj na quib chquij ri qui tat qui nan, quequicämisaj c'u na." 
Matthew10:22 Conojel ri winak caquetzelaj i wäch rumal wech in. Apachin c'u ri cuk'i' ri c'ax c'ä pa ri q'uistajic, are ri' quesäx na pa ri c'ax." 
Matthew10:23 Aretak quixokatax pa jun tinimit, chixanimajok, jix pa ri jun tinimit chic. Kastzij c'ut quinbij chiwe, chi c'ä maja' quebisolij conojel tak ri tinimit re Israel, aretak cäpe ri Rija'l winak." 
Matthew10:24 Ri tijoxel man are ta nim na u banic chuwäch ri rajtij. Ri ajchac man are ta nim na u banic chuwäch ri rajaw. 
Matthew10:25 Cubana' wa' che ri tijoxel chi cux jas ri rajtij, cubana' wa' che ri ajchac chi cux jas ri rajaw. We xbix Beelzebu che ri rajaw ja, ¡e ta c'u lo ri aj uwo rachoch!”" 
Matthew10:26 “Je c'u ri' mixe'j iwib chquiwäch ri winak, man c'o ta jun jasach ch'ukutalic ri ma ta quel na chisak, man c'o ta jun jasach c'utalic ri ma ta quetamax na." 
Matthew10:27 Ri quinbij in chiwe pa k'ekumal, chibij aretak canicow ri k'ij; ri quinbij chic'uyal, chiraka' i chi' che u bixic apanok paquiwi' tak ri ja." 
Matthew10:28 Mixe'j ba iwib chquiwäch ri cäquicämisaj ri cuerp, man quecuin ta c'ut cäquicämisaj ri c'aslibal. Are c'u chixe'j na iwib chuwäch ri jun ri cäcuin che u sachic u wäch ri cuerp xukuje' ri c'aslibal chupam ri xibalba." 
Matthew10:29 ¿La ma ta jun alaj puak quec'ayix wi quieb chiochi? Mawi c'u jun chque cätzak pa ulew, we ta ma ta are ri u rayibal ri i Tat." 
Matthew10:30 E ta c'u lo ri ix, conojel ri i wi' e ajilatalic." 
Matthew10:31 Je c'u ri' mixe'j iwib; are c'u ri ix c'o na iwajil chquiwäch q'ui chiochi.” 
Matthew10:32 “We c'o jachin quink'alajisan chquiwäch ri winak, ri in xukuje' quink'alajisaj chuwäch ri nu tat ri c'o pa ri caj." 
Matthew10:33 Ri man quinuk'alajisaj ta chquiwäch ri winak, xukuje' ri in man quink'alajisaj ta chuwäch ri nu Tat ri c'o pa ri caj.”" 
Matthew10:34 “Michomaj chi in petinak che u ya'ic jamaril chquixo'l ri winak cho ri uwächulew, man in petinak taj che u ya'ic jamaril, xane' ch'ich' re ch'o'j." 
Matthew10:35 In petinak c'ut che u tasic ri achi chrij ri u tat, ri ali chrij ri u nan, ri alibatz chrij ri ralib." 
Matthew10:36 Ri u c'ulel c'u ri winak e are ri aj uwo rachoch. 
Matthew10:37 Apachin ri are lok' na ri u tat o ri u nan chnuwäch in, man in takal ta che; apachin ri are lok' na ri u c'ojol o ri u mia'l chnuwäch in, man in takal ta che." 
Matthew10:38 Apachin ri man cuc'am ta ri u ripibal, ri man cäteri ta chwij, are ri' man in takal ta che." 
Matthew10:39 Apachin ri curik ri u c'aslemal, cutzak c'u na; apachin ri cutzak ri u c'aslemal rumal wech in, curik c'u na.”" 
Matthew10:40 “Apachin ri quixc'amowanic, in ri' in u c'amowam; apachin c'u ri quinc'amowanic, u c'amowam ri xintakow ulok." 
Matthew10:41 Apachin ri cuc'amowaj jun k'axal tzij rumal rech chi k'axal tzij, tojbal re k'axal tzij cuc'amowaj na. Apachin ri cuc'amowaj jun suc' winak rumal rech chi suc', tojbal re suc' winak cuc'amowaj na." 
Matthew10:42 Apachin ta ne ri cayo'w xak xuwi jun lak joron che jun chque we ch'utik ri' ri e nu tijoxelab, kastzij quinbij chiwe, man cutzak ta ri tojbal re.”" 
Matthew11:1 Ri Jesus, aretak xepixbetaj ri cablajuj u tijoxelab, xel bic chila' che u ya'ic tijonic pa tak q'ui tinimit." 
Matthew11:2 Ri Xuan, aretak c'o pa che', xuta' u tzijol ri u chac ri Crist; xebutak c'u bic ri u tijoxelab," 
Matthew11:3 che u bixic che ri Jesus: “¿La lal ri' ri cäpe na, o cäkeyej chi na jun?”" 
Matthew11:4 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Jix. Chiya' u tzijol che ri Xuan jas ri quito, jas ri quiwilo." 
Matthew11:5 Ri moyab, queca'yic chic. Ri ch'ocojib quebin chic. Ri c'o ch'a'c chquij quecunatajic. Ri man queta'm taj, queta'm chic. Ri cäminakib quec'astajic. Chque ri mebayib cätzijox wi ri utzalaj tzijol." 
Matthew11:6 Utz re ri man cuban ta quieb u c'u'x chwe.” 
Matthew11:7 Aretak e benak chic ri u tijoxelab ri Xuan, ri Jesus xutzijoj ri Xuan chque ri winak: “¿Jas ri xixel bic che rilic pa ri chaki'j uwo sak? ¿La xiwila' jun aj ri cäslabisax rumal ri quiakik'?" 
Matthew11:8 ¿Jas c'ut ri xixel bic che rilic? ¿La xiwila' jun winak ri u cojom ch'uch'ujalaj tak atz'iak? Are c'u ri cäquicoj ch'uch'ujalaj tak atz'iak, pa tak cachoch ri ajawinelab e c'o wi." 
Matthew11:9 ¿Jas c'u che xixel bic? ¿La xixbe che rilic jun k'axal tzij? Je, quincha chiwe, ri are nim na u banic chuwäch jun k'axal tzij." 
Matthew11:10 Chrij we Xuan ri' are wa' ri cubij ri tz'ibatalic: ‘Chawilampe'. Quintak bic ri nu tako'n chawäch. Ri are cusuc'umaj na ri a be chawäch.’ 
Matthew11:11 Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi man c'o ta jun ri alam rumal jun ixok ri nim ta u banic chuwäch ri Xuan Bautist. Are c'u ri sibalaj ch'utin pa ri rajawibal ri Dios, are ri nim na u banic chuwäch ri Xuan." 
Matthew11:12 Kas pa tak ri u k'ijol ri Xuan Bautist c'ä camic, cäcoj chuk'ab che ri rajawibal ri Dios. E are c'ut ri cäquicoj c'u qui chuk'ab, caquitokij." 
Matthew11:13 Conojel ri e k'axal tak tzij xukuje' ri pixab c'ä ruc' ri Xuan xquibij wi ri u tzij ri Dios chque ri winak. 
Matthew11:14 We quiwaj c'ut quic'amo, are Eliy wa', ri xbixic chi cäpe na." 
Matthew11:15 Apachin c'ut ri c'o u xiquin, chtatabenok." 
Matthew11:16 ¿Jas c'u ruc' quinjunamaj wi ri winak ri e c'o camic? E junam cuc' ri ac'alab ri e t'uyul pa tak ri c'ayibal, quequich'abej ri cachil:" 
Matthew11:17 ‘Xkok'esaj su' chiwäch, man xixxojow ta c'ut. Xkabixoj u k'ojom cäminak, man xixok' ta c'ut.’" 
Matthew11:18 Xpe ri Xuan, ri man cäwa' taj, man cuq'uian taj. Cäbix c'ut: ‘C'o itzel uxlabal che.’" 
Matthew11:19 Xpe ri Rija'l winak, ri cäwa'ic, ri cuq'uianic. Cäbixic: ‘Chiwilampe'. Are jun ajwij xukuje' uq'uianel. Cachil tok'il tak alcabal. Cachil ajmaquib.’ Are c'u ri no'j cäk'alajisax cumal ri e u chac chi suc'.”" 
Matthew11:20 C'äte ri' ri Jesus xuchaplej qui yajic ri e tinimit jawije' ri e u banom wi q'ui nimak tak mayibal, rumal rech chi ri tinimit ri' man xquiq'uex ta qui c'u'x." 
Matthew11:21 Ri Jesus xubij: “¡C'ax awe, tinimit Corazin! ¡C'ax awe, Betsaid! Ri nimak tak mayibal ri xinban iwuc' ix, we ta pa Tir, we ta pa Sidon xeban wi, ri e are ojer ta ri' xquiq'uex qui c'u'x. Rumal ri' xquicoj ta chaj xukuje' xquicoj ta wakwoj atz'iak ri' chquij." 
Matthew11:22 Rumal ri' quinbij chiwe, chi ri c'äjisabal i wäch ix pa ri k'ij re ri k'atoj tzij, are nim na chuwäch ri que ri Tir, xukuje' ri Sidon." 
Matthew11:23 Are c'u ri at, tinimit Capernaum, ¿Ri at walijisam c'ä pa ri caj? Chupam ri nimalaj siwan catrokix wi na, we ta c'u pa Sodom xeban tak wi ri mayibal ri xeban tak awuc' c'ä c'o ta ri' ri Sodom camic." 
Matthew11:24 Rumal ri' quinbij chiwe, chi ri c'äjisabal i wäch ix pa ri k'ij re k'atoj tzij, are nim na chuwäch ri re ri Sodom.”" 
Matthew11:25 Pa ri k'ij ri' xch'aw ri Jesus, xubij: “Quink'ijilan che la, Tat, Rajaw caj ulew, chi xebec'u' la we jastak ri' chquiwäch ri c'o qui no'j xukuje' ri c'o qui ch'obobal, xebec'utinisaj c'u la chquiwäch ri ac'alab." 
Matthew11:26 Je, Tat, je c'u wa' xkaj chwäch la." 
Matthew11:27 Conojel ri jastak xejachtaj chwe rumal ri nu Tat. Man c'o ta jun kas etamaninak u wäch ri C'ojolaxel, xane' xak xuwi ri Tataxel. Man c'o ta jun kas etamaninak u wäch ri Tataxel, xane' xak xuwi ri C'ojolaxel xukuje' jachin tak ri craj wi ri C'ojolaxel u ya'ic retamaxic chque." 
Matthew11:28 Tisaj wuc', iwonojel ri ix cosinak, iwonojel ri c'o iweka'n. Quinya' c'u na uxlanem chiwe." 
Matthew11:29 Chic'amowaj ri weka'bal ri quinya' chiwij, chiwetamaj iwe wuc', chi in coch'onel xukuje' mach'al ri wanima'; quirik c'u na uxlanem che ri iwanima'." 
Matthew11:30 Are c'u ri weka'bal ch'uch'uj, ri weka'n man al taj.”" 
Matthew12:1 Pa tak ri k'ij ri', xbe ri Jesus pa tak ri tico'n pa jun k'ij re uxlanem. Ri u tijoxelab xenumic, xquich'up ri u jolom trico, xquitijo." 
Matthew12:2 Xquil c'u ri pariseyib, xquibij che ri Jesus: “Chawilampe', ri a tijoxelab cäquiban ri awas u banic pa ri k'ij re uxlanem.”" 
Matthew12:3 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La ma ta i siq'uim jas xuban ri David aretak ri are' xukuje' ri e rachil xenumic? 
Matthew12:4 ¿La ma ta i siq'uim jas xubano, aretak xoc pa ri rachoch Dios, xutij c'u ri caxlanwa ri cojom cho ri Dios? Ri awas quitijic rumal xukuje' cumal ri e achilaninak. Xane' xak xuwi cumal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Matthew12:5 O ¿La ma ta i siq'uim pa ri pixab chi pa ri k'ij re uxlanem, ri e cojol tabal tak tok'ob man caquichajij ta ri k'ij re uxlanem man c'o ta c'u qui mac?" 
Matthew12:6 Ri in c'ut quinbij chiwe chi c'o jun waral ri nim na ri u banic chuwäch ri rachoch Dios. 
Matthew12:7 Man iweta'm taj jas quel cubij we tz'ibatalic ri': Ri quinwaj chi quel i c'u'x, che u q'uexwäch ri e qui chi'xic tabal tak tok'ob chwe. We ta i ch'obom ri quel cubij, ma ta xibij ri' chi c'o qui mac ri man c'o ta qui mac." 
Matthew12:8 Ri Rija'l winak c'o u takanic puwi' ri k'ij re uxlanem.” 
Matthew12:9 Xel c'u bic chila', xopan pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab." 
Matthew12:10 C'o jun achi chila' matz' u k'ab. Caquitzucuj c'ut jun jasach caquitzujubej rech ri Jesus, xquic'ot u chi': “¿La ya'tal u banic cunanic pa ri k'ij re uxlanem?”" 
Matthew12:11 Ri Jesus c'ut xubij chque: “¿Jachin ta jun chiwe, we c'o jun u chij, we cätzak pa jun jul pa ri k'ij re uxlanem, jachin ta jun ri ma ta cuchapo, cuwalijisaj ulok?" 
Matthew12:12 ¡Are c'u c'o na u k'ij jun winak chuwäch jun chij! Je c'u ri' cuya' cäban utzil pa ri k'ij re uxlanem.” 
Matthew12:13 C'äte ri' xubij che ri achi: “Chayuku' ri a k'ab.” Ri are' xuyuku, utz c'u xcanajic jas ri jun chic." 
Matthew12:14 Aretak e elinak chi bic ri pariseyib, xquichap u chomaxic jas cäquiban che u cämisaxic ri Jesus." 
Matthew12:15 Ri Jesus, aretak xretamaj xel bic chila'. Xeteri bic q'ui winak chrij, ri Jesus c'ut xebucunaj conojel ri yawabib." 
Matthew12:16 Sibalaj c'u xebupixbej chi mäquibij chque ri winak jachin ri are'," 
Matthew12:17 rech catz'akat ri tzijom can rumal ri Isaiy ri k'axal tzij aretak xubij: 
Matthew12:18 “Chiwilampe' ri pataninel we ri nu cha'om, ri lok' chnuwäch, sibalaj cäquicot ri wanima' ruc'. Quinya' na ri Wuxlabal che. Cuya' na u bixic ri takal chque tak ri nimak tak tinimit." 
Matthew12:19 Ri are' man cäch'ojin ta na, man curak ta na u chi'. Man c'o ta jun cäto'w ta na chi co cach'aw xo'l tak ri ja." 
Matthew12:20 Ri are' man cuk'aj ta ri aj ri wak'arinak man cuchup ta na ri u tza'm chäj ri cabukuwic, c'ä cäch'äcan na ri suq'uilal." 
Matthew12:21 E are tak c'ut ri nimak tak tinimit quebeyem na che.” 
Matthew12:22 Xc'am c'u ulok jun achi moy xukuje' mem chuwäch ri Jesus, c'o c'u itzel uxlabal che. Ri Jesus xuban che chi xca'yic xukuje' xch'awic." 
Matthew12:23 Conojel c'u ri winak xquimayo, xquixe'j quib. Xquibij: “¿La are lo wa' ri Rija'l ri David?”" 
Matthew12:24 Ri pariseyib, aretak xquito, xquibij: “We achi ri' queresaj ri itzel tak uxlabal xak xuwi rumal ri qui nimal ri itzel tak uxlabal ri Beelzebu u bi'.”" 
Matthew12:25 Ri Jesus reta'm ri cätajin caquichomaj, xubij chque: “Ronojel ajawibal ri quieb u banom caquic'ulela' c'u quib, cusachisaj u wäch chbil rib; xukuje' ronojel ulew o jun ja winak ri quieb u banom cäquic'ulelaj quib, man cuya' taj cajeki'c." 
Matthew12:26 We ri Satanas cäresaj bic ri Satanas, cuban ch'o'j ruc' chbil rib, ¿jas ta c'u lo cuban ri rajawibal rech cajeki'c?" 
Matthew12:27 We ri in rumal ri Beelzebu quebenwesaj ri itzel tak uxlabal, ri e iwalc'ual, ¿jachin rumal quequesaj? Rumal ri', ri e iwalc'ual cäquik'at na tzij piwi'." 
Matthew12:28 We c'u ri in rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios quebenwesaj ri itzel tak uxlabal, kastzij opaninak ri rajawibal ri Dios iwuc'." 
Matthew12:29 ¿Jas ta c'u lo cuban jun rech coc pa rachoch jun achi ri c'o na u chuk'ab, che queläk'axic ri jastak re? ¿La ma ta nabe cuyut na ri achi ri c'o na u chuk'ab? C'äte ri' quereläk'aj na bic ri jastak ri c'o pa ri rachoch." 
Matthew12:30 Apachin ri man c'o ta wuc', nu c'ulel ri'. Apachin ri man camulin ta wuc', catuquinic." 
Matthew12:31 Rumal ri' quinbij chiwe chi ri Dios cucuy na chque ri winak ronojel ri mac xukuje' ronojel ri etzelal ri caquibij, man quebucuy ta c'u na chi cuc' tak ri qui tzij queyok'on che ri Uxlabaxel." 
Matthew12:32 Apachin c'u ri cubij tzij chrij ri Rija'l winak, cäsachtaj na ri u mac. Apachin c'u ri cubij tzij chrij ri Ruxlabal ri Dios, man cäsachtaj ta u mac, man cäsachtaj ta pa we k'ij junab ri', mawi pa ri quepe na.”" 
Matthew12:33 “Chibana' chi utz ri che', xukuje' utz ri u wächinic, o chibana' chi man utz ta ri che', xukuje' man utz ta ri u wächinic. Quetamataj c'u qui wäch ri che' rumal ri qui wächinic." 
Matthew12:34 Ix quija'l cumätz. ¿La quixcuin lo quibij ta utzalaj tak tzij, ix itzel tak winak c'ut? Che c'u ri tz'ebenic ri c'o pa ri ranima' ri winak, are wa' quel ulok pa u chi'." 
Matthew12:35 Ri utzalaj winak chque ri utzalaj tak jastak ri c'o pa ranima' cäresaj wi ulok ri utz. Ri itzel winak chque ri itzel tak jastak ri c'o pa ranima' cäresaj wi ulok ri etzelal. 
Matthew12:36 Quinbij chiwe, chi ronojel tzij ri cäquibij ri winak, ri tzij ri man c'o ta qui patan, cäk'alajin na pa ri k'ij re ri k'atoj tzij." 
Matthew12:37 Cumal ri e a tzij cäk'alajin wi na we at suc'. Xukuje' cumal ri e a tzij cäc'äjisax na a wäch.” 
Matthew12:38 Xepe c'u jujun chque ri ajtz'ibab xukuje' jujun chque ri pariseyib, xquibij che ri Jesus: “Ajtij, cäkaj cäkil jun etal awumal.”" 
Matthew12:39 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic chque: “We e itzel tak winak ri' ri xukuje' man e jic taj caquitz'onoj jun mayibalalaj etal; niq'uiaj etal chic man cayataj ta chi chque xane' xak xuwi ri retal ri Jonas ri k'axal tzij. 
Matthew12:40 Je jas ri Jonas xc'oji' chupam ri nimalaj cär oxib k'ij oxib ak'ab, jeri' ri Rija'l winak cäc'oji' na pa ri ulew oxib k'ij oxib ak'ab." 
Matthew12:41 Ri achijab aj Ninibe quec'oji' na pa ri k'atoj tzij junam cuc' ri winak ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew camic. Ri aj Ninibe quequic'okoj na; rumal rech chi ri e are xquiq'uex qui c'u'x rumal ri u tzij ri Jonas. Chiwilampe', c'o jun waral ri nim na u banic chuwäch ri Jonas." 
Matthew12:42 Ri ixok ajawinel aj u mox ri elebal k'ij cäc'oji' na pa ri k'atoj tzij junam cuc' ri winak ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew camic. Ri are' quebuc'okoj na. Rumal rech chi ri are' xpe pa jun tinimit cho ri uwächulew ri sibalaj naj che u tatabexic ri u no'j ri Salomon. Chiwilampe', c'o jun waral ri nim na u banic chuwäch ri Salomon.”" 
Matthew12:43 “Aretak elinak chi bic ri itzel uxlabal che jun winak, coc'ow pa tak chaki'j tak c'olbal, cutzucuj jawije' cuxlan wi, man curik ta c'ut." 
Matthew12:44 Cubij c'u na: ‘Quintzelej cho wachoch ri xinel wi ulok.’ Aretak copanic, culurika' jamalic, mesom u pam, utz banom che." 
Matthew12:45 Cäbe c'u ri itzel uxlabal, quebuc'ama' chi ulok wukub uxlabal chic ruc'. Ri e lawalo na chuwäch ri are'. Conojel queboc bic pa ri winak, quec'oji' chila'. Ri q'uisbal u banic ri winak ri' canimataj na chuwäch ri nabe. Jeri' xukuje' cäban na chque ri itzel tak winak ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew camic.”" 
Matthew12:46 Ri Jesus c'ä cätajin quebutzijobej ri winak aretak xopan ri u nan e rachil ri rachalal ri Jesus, e tac'atoj apan cho ja, cäcaj cäquich'abej ri Jesus." 
Matthew12:47 Xbix c'u che: “Chawilampe'. Ri a nan ri e awachalal e tac'atoj cho ja. Cäcaj catquich'abej.” 
Matthew12:48 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic che ri xbin che: “¿Jachin ri nu nan? ¿E jachin tak ri wachalal?” 
Matthew12:49 Xebuc'ut ri u tijoxelab ruc' ri u k'ab, xubij: “Chebiwilampe' ri nu nan xukuje' ri e wachalal." 
Matthew12:50 Apachin ri cuban ri u rayibal ri nu Tat ri c'o pa ri caj, are wa' ri nu chak', ri wana'b, xukuje' ri nu nan.”" 
Matthew13:1 Pa ri k'ij ri' xel bic ri Jesus cho ja, xet'uyul chuchi' ri cho." 
Matthew13:2 Xquimulij quib e q'uia winak ruc'. Rumal ri' ri Jesus xoc bic pa jun jucub, xt'uyic; conojel c'u ri winak e tac'atoj chuchi' ri cho." 
Matthew13:3 Ri Jesus xutzijoj q'ui jastak chque ri winak cuc' c'ambal tak no'j, xubij: “Xbe jun ticol ija', xeticonijok." 
Matthew13:4 Aretak cäjopinic, niq'uiaj xekaj pa ri be; xepe c'u ri chicop aj uwo caj, xelquitija'." 
Matthew13:5 Niq'uiaj chic xekaj chuxo'l tak abaj, ri man c'o ta wi pimalaj ulew; chanim xel ulok, rumal rech chi man naj ta u pam ri ulew." 
Matthew13:6 Aretak c'ut xel ulok ri k'ij, xebuc'ato, xechaki'jaric, rumal rech chi man c'o ta ri u c'amal benak pa ri ulew." 
Matthew13:7 Niq'uiaj chic xekaj pa tak q'uix. Xebel c'u ulok ri q'uix, xquijik'isaj." 
Matthew13:8 Niq'uiaj chic xekaj pa utzalaj ulew, xquiya' qui wächinic. C'o xuya' jun sient u wäch. C'o xuya' oxc'al u wäch. C'o xuya' juwinak lajuj u wäch." 
Matthew13:9 Apachin ri c'o u xiquin chtatabenok.” 
Matthew13:10 Xekeb ri u tijoxelab ruc', xquita' che: “¿Jasche quebech'abej la ri winak pa tak c'ambal no'j?”" 
Matthew13:11 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chiwe ix yo'm wi u ch'obic ri jastak re ri rajawibal ri Dios, ri man etamatal taj nabe canok. Man yo'm ta c'u chque ri e are." 
Matthew13:12 Apachin c'u ri c'o jas c'o ruc', c'o na ri cäyataj na che, cäq'uiyir c'u na ri c'o ruc'. Apachin ri man c'o ta jas c'o ruc', xukuje' ne ri c'o ruc' quesax na che." 
Matthew13:13 Rumal ri' quebench'abej ri winak pa tak c'ambal no'j. Rumal rech chi queca'yic, man cäquil ta c'ut. Quetanic, man cäquita' ta c'ut, mawi quech'obonic." 
Matthew13:14 Chquij catz'akat wi ri xubij ri Isaiy ri k'axal tzij, xubij: ‘Quita' na ruc' ri i xiquin, man quich'ob ta c'ut. Quixca'y na ruc' ri i bak'wäch, man quiwil ta c'ut." 
Matthew13:15 Are c'u ri canima' we winak ri' xcowiric, man cäcaj taj quetan cuc' ri qui xiquin, xequitz'apij ri qui bak'wäch, rech man queca'y taj cuc' ri qui bak'wäch, rech man cäquita' taj cuc' ri qui xiquin, rech man cäquich'ob taj pa ri canima', man cäquitzolk'omij ta quib, man quebencunaj ta c'ut.’" 
Matthew13:16 Are c'u ri ix, utz que ri i bak'wäch, rumal rech chi queca'yic. Utz que ri i xiquin, rumal rech chi quetanic." 
Matthew13:17 Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi e q'ui k'axal tak tzij xukuje' e q'ui suc' tak winak sibalaj xquirayij quilic ri quiwil ix, man xquil ta c'ut. Xquirayij xquita' jas ri quita' ix, man xquita' ta c'ut.”" 
Matthew13:18 “Chita' ba' ix ri c'ambal no'j chrij ri ajticonijel. 
Matthew13:19 Ronojel jachin ri cuta' ri tijonic re ri rajawibal ri Dios, ri man cuch'ob taj, cäpe ri itzel, cutokij ri ticom canok pa ri ranima'. Are wa' ri quel cubij ri xekaj pa ri be." 
Matthew13:20 Ri xekaj chuxo'l tak abaj, are cubij ri winak ri cuta' ri tzij, chanim cucojo ruc' quicotemal." 
Matthew13:21 Man c'o ta c'u u c'amal benak pa ri ulew, chanim casach u wäch. Aretak c'ut curik c'ax o cokataxic rumal rech ri tzij, chanim cätzakic." 
Matthew13:22 Ri ija' ri ticom chquixo'l tak q'uix are cubij ri caquitatabej ri tijonic e aretak c'ut ri ch'äcoj re we uwächulew ri' cuya' sibalaj oquem il chque xukuje' ri qui lok'ok'exic ri k'inomal quebusubu. Ronojel wa cujik'isaj ri tijonic man cuya' ta c'u chque chi quewächinic. 
Matthew13:23 Ri xekaj pa ri utzalaj ulew, are cubij ri winak ri cuta' ri tzij, cuch'obo, cuya' c'u u wächinic. Ri jun ija' cuya' jun sient (100) u wächinic, jun chic cuya' oxc'al (60), ri jun chic cuya' juwinak lajuj (30).”" 
Matthew13:24 Ri Jesus xuya' jun c'ambal no'j chic chquiwäch, xubij: “Ri rajawibal ri Dios xak junam ruc' jun achi ri xutic utzalaj ija' pa rulew." 
Matthew13:25 Aretak c'u quewar ri winak, xpe ri u c'ulel, xuc'am ri itzel k'ayes u cawäch trico, xutic chuxo'l ri trico, xbe c'ut." 
Matthew13:26 Aretak xtux ri trico, xwächinic, xukuje' xc'utun ri itzel k'ayes." 
Matthew13:27 Xebopan ri pataninelab ruc' ri rajaw ri ulew, xquibij che: ‘Kajaw, ¿la ma ta utzalaj ija' ri xtic la pa ri ulew la? ¿Jawije' c'ut xpe wi ri itzel k'ayes?’" 
Matthew13:28 Ri are xubij chque: ‘Jun c'ulel xbanow wa' chwe'.’ Ri pataninelab xquibij che: ‘¿La caj la quekaboko ri itzel tak k'ayes?’ 
Matthew13:29 Ri are xubij chque: ‘Jayi', aretak quebibok ri itzel k'ayes mibok ne ri trico xukuje'." 
Matthew13:30 Chiya' canok chi queq'uiy na junam ri trico ruc' ri itzel k'ayes c'ä pa ri k'atoj. Aretak copan na ri k'atoj, quinbij na chque ri ajk'atolob; chebimolo nabe ri itzel tak k'ayes, chixima' u pam rech cäporoxic. Chimulij c'u ri trico pa ri nu c'uja.’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 Ri Jesus xuya' jun c'ambal no'j chic chquiwäch, xubij: “Ri rajawibal ri Dios xak junam ruc' jun ija' re moxtansa, ri xuc'am jun winak, xutic pa ri rulew." 
Matthew13:32 Ch'utin na chquiwäch conojel tak ri ija'; aretak c'ut cäq'uiyic, cux na jacha' juwi' che'. Jeri' chi quepe ri chicop aj uwo caj, cäquiban qui soc chupam tak ri u k'ab.”" 
Matthew13:33 Ri Jesus xubij jun c'ambal no'j chic chquiwäch, xubij: “Ri rajawibal ri Dios xak junam ruc' ri ch'am, ri xuc'am jun chuchu', xuya' ruc' oxib pajbal c'äj, c'ä xch'amar na ronojel.”" 
Matthew13:34 Conojel we jastak ri' xebutzijoj ri Jesus pa tak c'ambal no'j chque ri winak. Man c'o ta c'u jas xebutzijoj ri ma ta cuc' c'ambal tak no'j. 
Matthew13:35 Je xbantajic jas ri u tzijom can ri k'axal tzij, ri xubij: “Quintzijon na cuc' c'ambal tak no'j. Quinbij na ri jastak ri man etamatal taj aretak ri Dios xuban ri uwächulew.”" 
Matthew13:36 C'äte ri' ri Jesus xebuya' can ri q'uialaj winak, xbe cho ja. Ri u tijoxelab c'ut xekeb ruc', xquibij che: “Cäkaj chi cäbij la chke jas cubij ri c'ambal no'j chrij ri itzel k'ayes pa ri ulew.”" 
Matthew13:37 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ri jun ri cutic ri utzalaj ija', are ri Rija'l winak." 
Matthew13:38 Ri ticabal, are ri uwächulew. Ri utzalaj ija' are ri e ralc'ual ri rajawibal ri Dios. Ri itzel k'ayes are' ri e ralc'ual ri itzel." 
Matthew13:39 Ri u c'ulel ri rajaw ulew ri xutic ri itzel k'ayes are ri itzel. Ri k'atoj are ri u q'uisbalil ri uwächulew. Ri ajk'atolob are' ri e aj cajalaj tak tako'nib. 
Matthew13:40 Je jas ri cäban che u molic ri itzel k'ayes ri cäporox pa k'ak', je cac'ulmataj na aretak cäsach u wäch ri uwächulew." 
Matthew13:41 Ri Rija'l winak quebutak na ri aj cajalaj tak tako'nib che qui molic chupam ri rajawibal conojel ri quebanowic chi quemacun jule' chic, xukuje' ri qui nak'atisam quib che u banic ri etzelal." 
Matthew13:42 Quequiq'uiak na pa ri jorno re k'ak' ri quebok' wi na ri cakuch'uch' wi na ri qui ware. 
Matthew13:43 Are c'u ri winak ri e suc' quejuluw na je jas ri k'ij pa ri rajawibal ri qui Tat. Apachin ri c'o u xiquin, chutatabej wa'.”" 
Matthew13:44 “Ri rajawibal ri Dios jacha' ta ne jun k'inomal ri c'utal canok pa jun ulew, ri xurik jun winak, xuc'u' chi canok. Ri are c'o quicotemal ruc' rumal rech ri xuriko. Cäbe c'ut, quebuc'ayij conojel ri jastak ri c'o ruc', culok' c'u ri ulew ri'.”" 
Matthew13:45 “Xukuje' ri rajawibal ri Dios xa' junam ruc' jun ajc'ay, ri quebutzucuj je'lalaj tak perl ri quejuluwic." 
Matthew13:46 Aretak xurik jun perl sibalaj pakal rajil, xbec, xebuc'ayij conojel ri jastak ri e c'o ruc', xulok' c'u ri je'lalaj perl.”" 
Matthew13:47 “Xukuje' ri rajawibal ri Dios xa' junam ruc' jun c'at chapbal cär. Cäq'uiak pa ri plo, cumulij c'u ronojel qui wäch cär." 
Matthew13:48 Aretak nojinak chic ri c'at, ri winak cäquesaj ulok chuchi' ri ja', quet'uyic, quequiya' ri utzalaj tak cär pa tak ri e qui c'olbal. Are c'u ri man e utz taj quequiq'uiak apanok." 
Matthew13:49 Je c'u cac'ulmataj na pa ri u q'uistajic ri uwächulew. Quebel na ulok ri aj cajalaj tak tako'nib, quequitas c'u na ri itzel tak winak chquixo'l ri winak ri e suc'," 
Matthew13:50 quequiq'uiak na pa ri jorno ri canicowic; quebok' na chila', cäquikuch'uch'ej na ri qui ware.”" 
Matthew13:51 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque ri u tijoxelab: “¿La xebich'ob conojel we jastak ri'?” Ri e are' xquibij che: “Cäkach'obo, Kajaw.”" 
Matthew13:52 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Aretak jun ajtij re ri pixab u tijom rib che ri rajawibal ri Dios, cajunamataj ruc' jun achi rajaw ja, ri queresaj ulok chupam ri u k'inomal c'ac'alaj tak jastak xukuje' k'elalaj tak jastak.”" 
Matthew13:53 Ri Jesus aretak xebuq'uis qui tzijoxic we c'ambal tak no'j ri', xel bic chila'." 
Matthew13:54 Xopan pa ri kas u tinimit, quebutijoj c'u ri winak pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Ri winak e mayininak, xquibij: “¿Jawije' u c'amom wi wa' we no'j ri' xukuje' ri retamabal? ¿Jawije' u c'amom wi wa' ri u cuinem che u banic nimalaj tak mayibal?" 
Matthew13:55 ¿La ma ta are wa' ri u c'ojol ri ajanel? ¿La ma ta Mariy u bi' ri u nan? ¿La ma ta are rachalal ri Santiag, ri Jose, ri Simon, xukuje' ri Juds?" 
Matthew13:56 ¿La ma ta e c'o conojel ri e rana'b kuc'? ¿Jawije' c'ut u c'amom wi wa' ronojel ri cubij xukuje' ri cubano?” 
Matthew13:57 Xuban c'u quieb canima' che ri Jesus. Are c'u ri Jesus xubij chque: “Pa ronojel tinimit nim quil wi jun k'axal tzij; xak xuwi c'u pa ri kas u tinimit, xukuje' cho rachoch, man nim ta quil wi.”" 
Matthew13:58 Man xebuban ta c'u q'ui nimak tak mayibal chila', rumal rech chi ri winak man c'o ta qui cojonic che." 
Matthew14:1 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' ri Herod ri k'atal tzij xuta' u tzijol ri cuban ri Jesus. 
Matthew14:2 Xubij chque ri e c'o ruc': “Are wa' ri Xuan Bautist. Xc'astaj chquixo'l ri cäminakib. Rumal c'u ri', cäcuin che u banic nimak tak mayibal.”" 
Matthew14:3 Ri Herod c'ut u chapom can ri Xuan, u ximom, u cojom pa che'. Xuban c'u wa' u mac rech ri Herody, rixokil ri Pelip ri rachalal ri Herod." 
Matthew14:4 Rumal rech chi u bim ri Xuan che ri Herod: “Awas che la chi cäc'oji' ri Herody uc' la che ixokil la.” 
Matthew14:5 Ri Herod aretak xraj xucämisaj ri Xuan, xuxe'j c'u rib chquiwäch ri winak, rumal rech chi ri winak cäquicojo chi ri Xuan are jun k'axal tzij." 
Matthew14:6 Xopan ri nimak'ij re ri u junab ri Herod. Ri ral ali ri Herody xxojow chquiwäch ri winak ri e rula'm. Xkaj c'u chuwäch ri Herod. 
Matthew14:7 Jeri' chi xuchi'j, ruc' jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na, u ya'ic che ri ali apachique jasach ri cutz'onoj." 
Matthew14:8 Ri ali, cojom chi u c'u'x rumal ri u nan, xubij: “Chya' la chwe waral pa jun liq'uilic lak ri u jolom ri Xuan Bautist.”" 
Matthew14:9 Sibalaj xbison ri ajawinel. Xuya' takanic chi chyok ri xutz'onoj rumal c'u rech ri e u chi'nic ri kas cäban na, xukuje' rumal quech ri winak ri e t'uyul pa ri mexa ruc'." 
Matthew14:10 Xtakan c'u che resaxic ri u jolom ri Xuan pa che'. 
Matthew14:11 Xuc'a'x ulok ri u jolom pa jun liq'uilic lak, xya' che ri ali. Ri are' c'ut xruc'aj bic, xuya' che ri u nan." 
Matthew14:12 Xebopan c'ut ri u tijoxelab ri Xuan, xquic'am bic ri cäminak, xquimuku c'ut. Xebec, xquiya' u tzijol che ri Jesus." 
Matthew14:13 Xetamataj c'ut rumal ri Jesus ri xc'ulmatajic, xel bic chila' pa jun jucub man c'o ta jun xnabenic, xbe pa ri chaki'j uwo sak pa u tuquiel wi. Aretak xetamataj cumal ri winak, xebel ulok pa tak ri tinimit. Xquiterenej chicakan." 
Matthew14:14 Ri Jesus, aretak xel pa ri jucub, xeril sibalaj q'ui winak. Xel u c'u'x chque, xebucunaj ri qui yawabib." 
Matthew14:15 Xk'ekal chi c'ut, xekeb ri u tijoxelab ruc', xquibij: “Waral chaki'j uwo sak. Benak chi ri k'ij, che jacha' la bic ri winak, rech quebe pa tak tinimit che u lok'ic ri cäquitijo.”" 
Matthew14:16 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Man rajawaxic taj chi quebec; chiya' ix chque ri cäquitijo.” 
Matthew14:17 Xquibij c'u ri u tijoxelab che: “Man c'o ta c'o kuc' waral, xane' xa' job caxlanwa ruc' quieb cär.”" 
Matthew14:18 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chebic'ama' ulok.” 
Matthew14:19 Xebutak c'u ri winak chi quet'uyi' puwi' ri k'ayes. Xebuc'am ri job caxlanwa cuc' ri quieb cär, xca'y chicaj, xuya' maltioxinic che ri Dios. Xebupir ri caxlanwa, xebuya' chque ri u tijoxelab. Ri u tijoxelab c'ut xequiya' chque ri winak." 
Matthew14:20 Xewa' c'u conojel, xenojic; xebequiyac ri ch'akatak ri xeto'tajic e cablajuj (12) chicäch nojinak." 
Matthew14:21 Ri xewa'ic cäraj e c'o job mil achijab, man xebajilax ta c'ut ri ixokib mawi ri ac'alab." 
Matthew14:22 Ri Jesus xebucowij ri u tijoxelab chi cheboc pa ri jucub, chenabej chuwäch, chek'ax ch'käp che ri cho; are c'u ri are xcanaj na canok, xebujach na can ri winak." 
Matthew14:23 Aretak xebujach can ri winak, xpaki' puwi' jun juyub pa u tuquiel wi che u banic ch'awem ruc' Dios. Xk'ekal chic, c'o chila' u tuquiel." 
Matthew14:24 Ri jucub sibalaj naj chic c'o wi che ri ulew, cäban c'ax che cumal ri k'et ri cäpe puwi' ri cho. Chuwäch c'u petinak wi ri quiakik'." 
Matthew14:25 Pa ri u sakaribal c'ut ri ucab k'ij, ri Jesus xbe cuc', cäbin puwi' ri ja'." 
Matthew14:26 Ri u tijoxelab xquilo chi cätajin cäbin puwi' ri cho, xk'oxow ri canima', xquixe'j quib, xquirak qui chi', xquibij: “Jun xibinel wa'.”" 
Matthew14:27 Ri Jesus c'ut chanim xebuch'abej, xubij: “Chijiquiba i c'u'x. In wa'; mixe'j iwib.”" 
Matthew14:28 Ri Lu' xubij che: “Wajaw, we lal ri', chtakan ba la chi quinbe uc' la puwi' ri ja'.”" 
Matthew14:29 Ri Jesus xubij: “Tasaj.” Ri Lu' xkaj bic chrij ri jucub, xuchaplej binem, che u bic ruc' ri Jesus." 
Matthew14:30 Aretak c'ut xrilo ri quiakik', xuxe'j rib, xuchaplej bik'tajic. Xurak u chi', xubij: “¡Chincolo' la, Wajaw!”" 
Matthew14:31 Ri Jesus xuc'am che ri u k'ab, xuchapo, xubij che: “Ri at, xa' jubik' a cojonic, ¿jasche xuban quieb a c'u'x?”" 
Matthew14:32 Xuwi c'u xeboc bic pa ri jucub, xtäni' ri quiakik'." 
Matthew14:33 C'äte ri' ri e c'o pa ri jucub xquik'ijilaj ri Jesus, xquibij: “Kastzij lal ri' ri u C'ojol ri Dios.”" 
Matthew14:34 Xek'ax c'u ch'käp che ri cho, xebopan pa ri ulew Jenesaret." 
Matthew14:35 Ri achijab chila' xquich'ob c'u u wäch ri Jesus, xquesaj u tzijol chque conojel ri e c'o chila'. Xequic'am c'u ulok chuwäch ri Jesus conojel ri yawabib." 
Matthew14:36 Xquibochi'j chi xak xuwi ta ne cäquichap ocok ri u chi' ri ratz'iak cumal ri yawabib; joropa' c'ut ri quechapowic quecunatajic. 
Matthew15:1 Xepe c'u ri ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' ri pariseyib ri e petinak pa Jerusalen. Xebopan ruc' ri Jesus, xquibij che:" 
Matthew15:2 “Ri a tijoxelab, ¿jasche man cäquinimaj taj ri qui tijonic ulok ri nimak tak tatayib? Man quequijosk'ij ta c'u ri qui k'ab aretak cäquitij ri qui wa.”" 
Matthew15:3 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿Jasche ri ix quinimaj ri qui bim ulok ri ojer tak winak, man quinimaj ta c'ut ri u takanic ri Dios?" 
Matthew15:4 Ri Dios xtakanic, xubij: ‘Nim chawila' wi ri a nan a tat.’ Xukuje' xubij ri Dios: ‘Apachin ri cuc'ulelaj ri u tat o ri u nan, chcämok.’" 
Matthew15:5 Ri ix c'ut quibij apachin ri cubij che ri u tat o ri u nan: ‘Man quinya' ta chic ri rajawaxic che la, rumal rech chi ronojel nu chi'm che ri Dios.’" 
Matthew15:6 Man ya'tal ta chi che chi nim ta caril wi ri u tat o ri u nan. Jeri' man quiya' ta u k'ij ri u takanic ri Dios are c'u quiya' u k'ij ri i tijonic pa iwech wi. 
Matthew15:7 ¡Quieb i wäch! Utz u bixic ri xubij ri Isaiy chiwij, ri k'axal tzij, aretak xubij:" 
Matthew15:8 ‘We winak ri' xak chi qui chi' cäquinimarisaj nu k'ij. Are c'u ri canima' naj c'o wi chwe. 
Matthew15:9 Man c'o ta cupatanij chi caquiya' k'ijilanic chwe; ri e qui tijonic xak e qui takanic winak.’ ” 
Matthew15:10 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij c'u ri winak, xubij c'u chque: “Chixtatabenok, chixch'obon c'ut." 
Matthew15:11 Man are ta ri coc pa ri chi'aj cabanow tz'il che ri winak. Xane' ri quel ulok pa ri chi'aj, are wa' cabanow tz'il che ri winak.”" 
Matthew15:12 Xekeb c'u ri u tijoxelab ruc', xquibij che: “¿La ma ta eta'm la chi ri pariseyib man utz ta xquita' ri xbij la.?”" 
Matthew15:13 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ronojel tico'n ri man xtic ta rumal ri nu Tat ri c'o chila' chicaj, cäbok na." 
Matthew15:14 Chebiya' canok. E moyab cäquic'am c'u qui be niq'uiaj moyab chic. We ri moy cuc'am u be ri moy, ri e quieb quetzak pa jun jul.”" 
Matthew15:15 Ri Lu' xubij che ri Jesus: “Bij la chke jas quel cubij we c'ambal no'j ri'.” 
Matthew15:16 Ri Jesus xubij c'ut: “¿La xukuje' ri ix man quich'ob taj? 
Matthew15:17 ¿La c'ä maja' quich'obo, chi ronojel ri coc pa ri u chi' ri winak, coc'ow pa ri u pam, quel c'u canok aretak quechulunok?" 
Matthew15:18 Are c'u ri quel ulok pa ri u chi' ri winak, pa ri ranima' quel wi ulok. Are ri' ri cabanow tz'il che ri winak." 
Matthew15:19 Chupam c'ut ri anima' quebel wi ulok ri itzel tak chomanic, cäcämisanic, ri kajic pa mac ruc' jun winak chic, ri cuc'axic quib cuc' achijab ixokib che qui banic macunic, eläk'anic, jalum k'alajisanic, yok'onic." 
Matthew15:20 Are jastak wa' ri quebanow tz'il che ri winak. Are c'u ri jun ri cäwa'ic ri man quebuch'aj taj ri e u k'ab, man cutz'iloj ta rib.”" 
Matthew15:21 Xel bic ri Jesus chila', xbe pa tak c'olbal re Tir xukuje' Sidon." 
Matthew15:22 Jun ixok c'ut aj Canaan ri jekel pa tak ri ulew ri', xkeb ruc' ri Jesus xurak u chi': “Wajaw, Rija'l ri David, chel c'u'x la chwe. Ri wal ali c'o itzel uxlabal che, sibalaj curik c'ax rumal.”" 
Matthew15:23 Ri Jesus man c'o ta tzij xubij che. Xekeb c'u ri u tijoxelab ruc' ri Jesus, xquibochi'j, xquibij che: “Jacha' la bic ri ixok, rumal rech chi curak u chi' chkij.”" 
Matthew15:24 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque: “In takom ulok xak xuwi chque ri chij aj uwo rachoch ri Israel, ri e sachinak.”" 
Matthew15:25 Xpe c'u ri chuchu', xxuqui' chuwäch ri Jesus, xubij: “Wajaw, chinto' la.”" 
Matthew15:26 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Man utz taj we quesax ri qui wa ri alc'ualaxelab cäya' ta c'u chque ri tz'i'.” 
Matthew15:27 Ri ixok xubij: “Kastzij, Tat. Are c'u ri tz'i' cäquitij que ri u xer tak wa ri quetzak ulok puwi' ri qui mexa ri cajaw.”" 
Matthew15:28 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Nim ri a cojonic, chuchu'. Je c'u chban chawe jas ri cawaj. Xcunataj c'u ri ral pa ri jok'otaj ri'.”" 
Matthew15:29 Xel bic ri Jesus chila'. Xopan chuchi' ri cho re Galiley. Xpaki' pa ri juyub, xt'uyi' chila'." 
Matthew15:30 Xebopan q'uialaj winak ruc'. E cuc'am ulok ch'ocojib, cutucak, moyab, memab, xukuje' ri c'o niq'uiaj tak yabil chic chque. Xequiya' chuwäch ri Jesus. Ri are xebucunaj c'ut." 
Matthew15:31 Jeri' chi ri winak xquimayo. Xquilo chi quech'aw ri memab, chi ri e k'ajinak qui k'ab e utz chic, chi quebin ri ch'ocojib, chi queca'y chic ri moyab. Xquinimarisaj c'u u k'ij ri u Dios ri Israel." 
Matthew15:32 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij ri u tijoxelab, xubij chque: “Quel nu c'u'x chque ri winak. Oxib k'ij chi wa' e c'o wuc', man c'o ta c'u jas quitijom. Man quinwaj ta c'ut quebenjach bic pa numic, we ne quetukar pa ri be.”" 
Matthew15:33 Ri u tijoxelab c'ut xquibij c'u che: “¿Jawije' ta c'o wi sibalaj caxlanwa kuc' waral pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, cäkatzukubej que ri q'uialaj winak?”" 
Matthew15:34 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿Joropa' caxlanwa e c'o iwuc'?” Ri e are xquibij: “Wukub, xukuje' quieb oxib alaj tak cär.”" 
Matthew15:35 Ri Jesus xebutak ri winak chi chet'uyul cho ri ulew. 
Matthew15:36 Xebuc'am c'u ri wukub caxlanwa cuc' ri cär, xmaltioxinic, xebupiro, xebuya' chque ri u tijoxelab. Ri u tijoxelab c'ut xequiya' chque ri winak." 
Matthew15:37 Xewa' conojel, xenojic. Xequimulij ri ch'akatak caxlanwa ri man xq'uis ta qui tijic, e wukub chicäch nojinak." 
Matthew15:38 E quiejeb mil achijab ri xewa'ic. Man xebajilax ta c'u ri ixokib mawi ri ac'alab. 
Matthew15:39 Aretak e u jachom chi bic ri winak, ri Jesus xoc pa jun jucub, xbe pa ri ulew re Magadan." 
Matthew16:1 Xepe ri pariseyib xukuje' ri saduseyib, xebopan ruc' ri Jesus, cäcaj cäquic'am u pu chi'. Xquita' jun tok'ob che chi chc'utu' jun etal aj chicaj chquiwäch." 
Matthew16:2 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Aretak xk'ekal chic, quibij: ‘Man c'o ta jäb cäpetic, rumal rech chi quiäk u pam ri caj.’"
