Matthew16:3 Ak'ab c'ut quibij: ‘Cuban na k'ekal jäb camic, rumal rech chi quiäk u pam ri caj, cäk'ekumar c'ut.’ We ri ix iweta'm u ch'obic u wäch ri caj, ¿Jas c'u che man quixcuin ta che qui ch'obic tak ri etal quech tak we k'ij ri'?" 
Matthew16:4 We itzel tak winak ri' xukuje' man e jic taj caquitz'onoj jun etal; man cäyataj ta c'u etal chque xuwi ri etal re ri Jonas.” Xebuya' canok, xbec." 
Matthew16:5 Xek'ax ri tijoxelab ch'käp che ri cho. Ri are xsach pa qui jolom ri u c'amic bic ri qui caxlanwa. 
Matthew16:6 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chiwila', chichajij iwib chuwäch ri qui ch'am ri pariseyib xukuje' ri saduseyib.”" 
Matthew16:7 Ri u tijoxelab c'ut xquichap c'u u chomaxic, xquibij: “Rumal rech chi man xkac'am ta ulok ka caxlanwa.”" 
Matthew16:8 Xuch'ob ri Jesus jas ri cätajin cäquichomaj, xubij chque: “Ri ix, xak jubik' i cojonic, ¿jasche quichap u chomaxic chi man c'o ta i caxlanwa?" 
Matthew16:9 ¿La man quich'obo? ¿La man cänataj chiwe ri job caxlanwa ri xquitij ri job mil achijab? ¿La man cänataj chiwe joropa' chicäch ri caxlanwa xebiyico ri man xquiq'uis taj? 
Matthew16:10 ¿Mawi cänataj chiwe ri wukub wa ri xquitij ri quiejeb mil achijab? ¿La man cänataj chiwe joropa' chicäch ri caxlanwa xebiyico ri man xquiq'uis taj? 
Matthew16:11 ¿Jas c'u che man quich'ob taj chi man are ta ri caxlanwa ri xinbij chiwe? Chichajij ba' iwib chuwäch ri qui ch'am ri pariseyib xukuje' ri saduseyib.” 
Matthew16:12 C'äte ri' xquich'obo chi man are ta xubij chi cäquichajij quib chuwäch ri ch'am re ri caxlanwa. Xane' xubij chi cäquichajij quib chuwäch ri qui tijonic ri pariseyib xukuje' ri saduseyib. 
Matthew16:13 Aretak xopan ri Jesus pa ri rulewal ri Sesarey re Pilip, xuta' c'u ri Jesus chque ri u tijoxelab: “¿Jachin ri Rija'l winak cäquibij ri winak?”" 
Matthew16:14 Ri e are xquibij: “Niq'uiaj winak cäquibij chi are ri Xuan Bautist. Niq'uiaj chic cäquibij chi are ri Eliy. E c'o niq'uiaj chic cäquibij chi are ri Jeremiy o jun chque ri k'axal tak tzij.” 
Matthew16:15 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “E c'u ri ix, ¿jachin ri in quibij?”" 
Matthew16:16 Ri Simon Lu' xubij che: “Lal ri' ri Crist, ri u C'ojol ri c'aslic Dios.”" 
Matthew16:17 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Utz awe, Simon, u c'ojol ri Jonas. Man xc'ut ta wa' chawäch cumal ri winak, xane' xc'ut wa' chawäch rumal ri nu Tat ri c'o pa ri caj." 
Matthew16:18 In quinbij chawe, chi at Lu'. Puwi' c'u we nimalaj abaj ri' quinyac wi na ri nu comon cojonelab chi nimalaj conojel. Mawi c'u ne ri u cuinem ri cämical cäch'äcan ta na puwi'." 
Matthew16:19 Quebenya' c'u na ri e u laweyil ri rajawibal ri Dios chawe. Ri caxim cho ri uwächulew, cäximitaj na pa ri caj. Ri caquir cho ri uwächulew, cäquiritaj na pa ri caj.”" 
Matthew16:20 Ri Jesus xebupixbej c'u ri u tijoxelab chi c'o jun mäquibij wi chi are ri Crist. 
Matthew16:21 Kas chi' c'ut ri Jesucrist xuchaplej bic ri u k'alajisaxic chquiwäch ri u tijoxelab chi rajawaxic chi cäbe na pa Jerusalen, caban c'u na nimak tak c'ax che cumal ri nimak tak tatayib xukuje' ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tak tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri ajtijab re ri pixab. Rajawaxic c'ut chi cäcäm na, pa oxib k'ij c'ut cäc'astajisax na." 
Matthew16:22 Ri Lu' xuc'am bic ri Jesus, xuchaplej u pixbexic je xubij wa': “Ma ta chuya' ri Dios chi je cac'ulmaj la wa', Wajaw.”" 
Matthew16:23 Ri Jesus xutzolk'omij rib, xubij che ri Lu': “Chatel chnuwäch, Satanas. Quinaya' pa takchibal mac. Are c'u ri at man cachomaj ta ri e jastak re ri Dios, xane' ri jastak que ri winak.”" 
Matthew16:24 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque ri u tijoxelab: “We c'o jun cäraj cäpe wuc' in, rajawaxic chi are' muban ri u rayibal, xane' rajawaxic chi cutelej ulok ri u ripibal, chinuterenej c'ut." 
Matthew16:25 Apachin ta ne ri cäraj u colic ri u c'aslemal, cusachisaj na u wäch, apachin ta ne ri cusachisaj u wäch ri u c'aslemal rumal wech, curik na." 
Matthew16:26 ¿Jas ta c'u lo cärechbej na jun winak, we cuch'äc ronojel ri uwächulew, cutzak c'u ri ranima'? ¿Jas ta lo cuya' na ri winak che u q'uexwäch ri ranima'?" 
Matthew16:27 Ri Rija'l winak cäpe cuc' ri tako'nib aj caj, ruc' ri u juluwem ri u Tat, c'äte c'u ri' quebutoj na ri winak chquijujunal je jas ri qui chac ri qui banom." 
Matthew16:28 Kastzij quinbij chiwe: E c'o jujun chque ri e c'o waral, c'ä maja' quecämic cäquil na ri Rija'l winak petinak pa ri rajawibal.”" 
Matthew17:1 Oc'owinak chi wakib k'ij, ri Jesus xuc'am ri Lu', ri Santiag xukuje' ri Xuan ri rachalal ri Santiag. Xebuc'am bic pa qui tuquiel wi puwi' jun juyub naj elinak chicaj." 
Matthew17:2 Xq'uextaj c'u ri u wächbal ri Jesus chquiwäch; xjuluw ri u palaj je jas ri k'ij, ri ratz'iak xebux sakloloj je jas ri sakil." 
Matthew17:3 Xquil c'u ri Moises xukuje' ri Eliy, quetzijon ruc' ri Jesus." 
Matthew17:4 Ri Lu' xubij che ri Jesus: “Kajaw utz ri' chi chujcanaj can waral. We caj la, cäkaban oxib cäbal waral. Cäkaban jun ech la, jun re ri Moises, jun re ri Eliy.”" 
Matthew17:5 C'ä cätajin cätzijon ri Lu', xpe c'u jun sutz' ri cäjuluwic, xebuch'uku. Xtataj c'u jun ch'abal pa ri sutz' ri xubij: “Are lok'alaj nu C'ojol wa', ri cäkaj chnuwäch. Chitatabej ba ri u tzij.”" 
Matthew17:6 Ri u tijoxelab, aretak xquita' wa', xexuquic, xquiya' ri qui palaj cho ri ulew, sibalaj xquixe'j quib." 
Matthew17:7 Xkeb c'u ri Jesus cuc', xebuchap ocok, xubij chque: “Chixwalijok, mixe'j iwib.”" 
Matthew17:8 Xeca'yic, xquil ri Jesus xak u tuquiel chic, man c'o ta chi jun xquilo." 
Matthew17:9 Aretak cätajin quekaj ulok puwi' ri juyub, ri Jesus xebupixbej ri u tijoxelab, xubij: “Mibij ri xiwilo che e jachin jun, c'ä chc'astaj na ri Rija'l winak chquixo'l ri cäminakib.”" 
Matthew17:10 Ri u tijoxelab xquic'ot u chi' ri Jesus: “¿Jas c'u che cäquibij ri ajtijab re ri pixab chi rajawaxic nabe cäpe na ri Eliy?” 
Matthew17:11 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Kastzij ri Eliy cäpetic quebeluya' c'u na conojel ri jastak pa ri qui c'olbal. 
Matthew17:12 Ri in quinbij chiwe, chi xul ri Eliy. Ri winak c'ut man xquich'ob ta u wäch, xane' xquiban che ronojel ri xcaj xquibano. Je c'u ri' xukuje' ri Rija'l winak curik na c'ax cumal.”" 
Matthew17:13 C'äte ri' xquich'ob ri u tijoxelab chi are xubij ri Xuan Bautist. 
Matthew17:14 Aretak xebopanic jawije' e c'o wi ri winak, xpe c'u jun achi, xxuqui' chuwäch ri Jesus," 
Matthew17:15 xubij che: “Wajaw, chel c'u'x la che ri nu c'ojol. Rumal rech chi u rikom itzel yabil, curik sibalaj c'ax. Q'uialaj mul cätzak pa ri k'ak' xukuje' pa ri ja'." 
Matthew17:16 Xinc'am ulok chquiwäch ri tijoxelab la, e are' c'ut man xecuin ta che rutzirixic.”" 
Matthew17:17 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¡Pe xibano, jech'alaj tak winak man ix cojonelab taj! ¿C'ä joropa' k'ij quinc'oji' chi na iwuc'? ¿C'ä jampa' quintakej na i coch'ic? Chic'ama' ulok ri ala waral.”" 
Matthew17:18 Ri Jesus xuyaj ri itzel uxlabal. Ri uxlabal c'ut xel che ri ala, xutzir c'ut pa ri jok'otaj ri'." 
Matthew17:19 Xekeb c'u ri tijoxelab ruc' ri Jesus pa qui tuquiel wi, xquic'ot u chi': “¿Jas c'u che ri uj man xujcuin ta che resaxic ri itzel uxlabal?”" 
Matthew17:20 Xubij ri Jesus chque: “Rumal rech chi xa' jubik' ri i cojonic. Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi we ta c'o i cojonic je jas ri u nimal ri rija' ri moxtansa, quibij na ri' che we juyub ri': ‘Chatel bic waral, chatk'ax chila'’, cäk'ax c'u na. Ma ta c'o jun jasach ri' ri ma ta quixcuin che u banic.”" 
Matthew17:21  
Matthew17:22 Cätajin c'u quebin junam pa Galiley, ri Jesus xubij chque ri u tijoxelab: “Ri Rija'l winak cäjach na pa qui k'ab ri winak." 
Matthew17:23 Caquicämisaj na, pa oxib k'ij c'ut cac'astaj na.” Sibalaj xebison ri u tijoxelab." 
Matthew17:24 Aretak xebopan pa Capernaum, xepe ri tok'il tak alcabal re ri rachoch Dios, xebopan ruc' ri Lu', xquibij: “Ri iwajtij ¿la man cutoj ri alcabal che ri rachoch Dios?”" 
Matthew17:25 “Cutojo'”, xcha' ri Lu'. Aretak xoc ri Lu' pa ri ja, nabe xch'aw ri Jesus, xubij che: “¿Jas cachomaj at, Simon? Ri ajawinelab quech ri nimak tak tinimit ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew, ¿jachin chque cäquitok'ij wi ri alcabal o tojbal? ¿La chque ri e qui winakil o chque ri man e qui winakil taj?”" 
Matthew17:26 Ri Lu' xutzelej u bixic: “Chque ri man e qui winakil taj.” Ri Jesus xubij che: “Man ba' ya'tal ta chque ri alc'ualaxelab chi quetojonic. 
Matthew17:27 Man cäkaj ta c'ut chi cäquiban quieb qui c'u'x chkij. Jät ba'. Chaq'uiaka' ri chapbal cär pa ri cho. Ri nabe cär c'ut ri cäriko, chac'ama', chajaka' ri u chi', cärik c'u na jun puak. Chaya' ba chque ri tok'il tak alcabal, catojbej can re ri wech in xukuje' ri awech at.”" 
Matthew18:1 Pa ri jok'otaj ri' xekeb ri tijoxelab ruc' ri Jesus, xquibij: “¿Jachin ri nim na u k'ij pa ri rajawibal ri Dios?”" 
Matthew18:2 Ri Jesus c'ut xusiq'uij jun ac'al, xuya' chquiwäch." 
Matthew18:3 Xubij: “Kastzij quinbij chiwe: We man quiq'uex i c'u'x, we man quixux je jas ri ac'alab, man quixoc ta pa ri rajawibal ri Dios." 
Matthew18:4 Ri nim na u k'ij chupam ri rajawibal ri Dios, are ri cumach'irisaj rib cux c'u junam ruc' we ac'al ri'." 
Matthew18:5 Apachin c'u ri cuc'am jun ac'al jewa' pa ri nu bi', in ri' quinuc'amowaj.”" 
Matthew18:6 “Apachin c'u jun cubano chi camacun jun chque we ch'utik ri' cojoninak c'u chwe, are utz na ri' che chi catzayibax jun abaj quiebal chukul, caq'uiak ta c'u bic chupam ri u choil ri plo rech cäjik'ic." 
Matthew18:7 ¡C'ax c'u cäpe paquiwi' ri winak ri' ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew ri cumal quepe tak ri macaj!; rajawaxic c'ut chi quepe na ri takchibal tak macaj; ¡c'ax c'u cäpe puwi' ri winak ri' ri quebutakchi'j ri niq'uiaj pa ri macaj! 
Matthew18:8 Rumal c'u ri', we ri a k'ab o ri awakan catutzak pa ri mac, chak'ata' bic, chaq'uiaka' apanok. Are utz na chi at ch'oco'j o xa' jun ri a k'ab catoc pa ri c'aslemal, chuwäch ri c'o quieb a k'ab o quieb awakan catq'uiak c'u pa ri k'ak' ri man chupel taj." 
Matthew18:9 We ri a bak'wäch catutzak pa ri mac, chawesaj bic, chaq'uiaka' apanok. Are utz na chi xa' jun ri a bak'wäch catoc pa ri c'aslemal, chuwäch ri c'o quieb a bak'wäch catq'uiak pa ri k'ak' re ri xibalba.”" 
Matthew18:10 “Chiwila' c'o jun chque we ch'utik ri' miwetzelaj u wäch. Quinbij c'u chiwe, chi e c'o ri q'ui tako'nib pa ri caj ri amak'el cäquil u wäch ri nu Tat ri c'o pa ri caj." 
Matthew18:11  
Matthew18:12 ¿Jas quichomaj? We jun winak c'o jun sient (100) u chij, jun chque cäsach canok, ¿la ma ta quebuya' can ri jumuch' belejlajuj (99), cäbe pa tak ri juyub che u tzucuxic ri jun ri xsach canok?" 
Matthew18:13 Aretak c'u curika', kastzij quinbij chiwe, are sibalaj cäquicot na ri' ruc', chquiwäch ri jumuch' belejlajuj ri man xesach taj." 
Matthew18:14 Je c'u ri', ri i Tat ri c'o pa ri caj man cäraj taj chi cäsach u wäch jun chque we ch'utik ri'.”" 
Matthew18:15 “We ri awachalal cuban jun mac chawe, jät, chach'abej xak pa a tuquiel wi. We cutatabej ri a tzij, xarik utzil chixo'l ruc' ri awachalal." 
Matthew18:16 We c'u man cutatabej ri a tzij, chebac'ama' bic jun o quieb winak chic awuc'. Jeri' ix c'o ix quieb oxib ri iweta'm jas u banic ri c'ax c'o chixo'l ruc' ri awachalal, rech quejiquibax ri i tzij." 
Matthew18:17 We ri awachalal man cutatabej ta ri qui tzij, chabij chque ri comon cojonelab. We c'u man cutatabej ri qui tzij ri comon cojonelab chux ba' chawe jacha' jun man cojonel taj, chux je jas jun tok'il alcabal chawe." 
Matthew18:18 Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi ronojel ri quixim cho ri uwächulew, cäximitaj na pa ri caj. Ronojel c'ut ri quiquir cho ri uwächulew, cäquiritaj na pa ri caj." 
Matthew18:19 Xukuje' quinbij chiwe, chi we c'o quieb chiwe cho ri uwächulew curik rib ri i chomanic che u tz'onoxic jun jasach pa ch'awem ruc' Dios, cäyataj na chiwe rumal ri nu Tat ri c'o pa ri caj." 
Matthew18:20 Jawije' c'ut ri qui mulin wi quib quieb oxib winak pa ri nu bi', chila' in c'o wi chquixo'l.”" 
Matthew18:21 Xkeb c'u ri Lu' ruc' ri Jesus, xubij che: “Wajaw, ¿joropa' mul quinsach na u mac ri wachalal ri cuban jun mac chwe? ¿La c'ä wukub?”" 
Matthew18:22 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Man quinbij ta chawe chi c'ä wukub mul casach ri u mac, xane' c'ä wukub (7) mul chi oxc'al lajuj (70).”" 
Matthew18:23 “Rumal ri', ri rajawibal ri Dios xa' junam ruc' jun ajawinel, ri xraj xuban ajilanic cuc' ri rajchaquib che ri qui c'as." 
Matthew18:24 Aretak cuchaplej u banic ajilanic, xc'am ulok jun chuwäch ri c'o sibalaj nim u c'as ruc'." 
Matthew18:25 Rumal c'u rech chi man c'o ta cutojbej rech, xtakan ri rajaw che qui c'ayixic rachil ri rixokil xukuje' ri e ralc'ual. Xukuje' xtakan che qui c'ayixic conojel ri jastak ri c'o ruc', cutojbej c'u re ri u c'as." 
Matthew18:26 Are c'u ri pataninel xxuqui' chuwäch ri rajaw, xumej rib chuwäch, xubij: ‘Wajaw, cuyu' la ri nu mac, quintoj c'u na ronojel che la.’" 
Matthew18:27 Ri rajaw xel u c'u'x che ri u pataninel, xutzokopij bic, xubij che chi man cutoj ta chic ri u c'as." 
Matthew18:28 Xel c'u bic ri pataninel ri', xurika' jun rach pataninel ri c'o jubik' u c'as ruc'. Xuchap ri rach pataninel chukul che u jitz'axic, xubij c'u che: ‘Chatojo' ri a c'as.’" 
Matthew18:29 Xxuqui' c'u ri rach pataninel chuwäch, xubochi'j, xubij c'u che: ‘Cuyu' la ri nu mac. Quintoj c'u na ronojel che la.’" 
Matthew18:30 Ri pataninel c'ut man xraj taj. Xane' xbec, xucoj ri rach pataninel pa che' c'ä cutoj na ri u c'as." 
Matthew18:31 Ri e rach tak pataninelab, aretak xquil ri xbantajic, sibalaj xebisonic. Xebe c'ut, xequibij che ri cajaw ronojel ri xc'ulmatajic." 
Matthew18:32 Ri rajaw xusiq'uij c'u ri u pataninel, xubij che: ‘Itzel pataninel, ri in xinsach u tza'm ronojel we c'asaj ri', rumal rech chi xatz'onoj tok'ob chwe." 
Matthew18:33 ¿La ma ta xukuje' rajawaxic chi ri at quel a c'u'x che ri a wäch pataninel, je jas ri in xel nu c'u'x chawe?’" 
Matthew18:34 Xpe royowal ri rajaw, xujach c'u ri u pataninel pa qui k'ab ri e banal c'ax, c'ä cutoj na ronojel ri u c'as." 
Matthew18:35 Je c'u ri' xukuje' cuban na ri nu Tat chiwe we man quisach chijujunal ri u mac ri iwachalal ruc' ronojel iwanima'.” 
Matthew19:1 Ri Jesus, aretak xebuq'uis we tzij ri', xel bic pa Galiley. Xopan pa jun c'olbal re Judey ri c'o ch'käp che ri nima' Jordan." 
Matthew19:1 Ri Jesus, aretak xebuq'uis we tzij ri', xel bic pa Galiley. Xopan pa jun c'olbal re Judey ri c'o ch'käp che ri nima' Jordan." 
Matthew19:2 Sibalaj e q'ui winak xeteri bic chrij, xebucunaj c'u q'ui yawabib chila'." 
Matthew19:3 Xebopan ri pariseyib ruc' ri Jesus, xquic'am u pu chi', xquibij che: “¿La cuya' chi jun achi cujach bic ri rixokil rumal rech apachique jasach?”" 
Matthew19:4 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La ma ta i siq'uim ix chi ri xebanow ri winak aretak xtiquiritaj ri uwächulew, chi achi chi ixok xebubano?”" 
Matthew19:5 Xubij c'ut: “Rumal ri' ri achi cuya' can ri u nan u tat, curik na rib ruc' ri rixokil, ri quieb c'ut xa' e jun winak chic." 
Matthew19:6 Je c'u ri' man e quieb ta chic, xane' xa' e jun winak chic. Ri xutunuba' ri Dios, man ya'tal ta chque ri winak chi cäquitaso.”" 
Matthew19:7 Xquic'ot c'ut u chi': “¿Jas c'u che xtakan ri Moises che u ya'ic jun wuj che u jachic ri ixokilaxel quesax c'u bic?” 
Matthew19:8 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Rumal rech chi co ri iwanima', ri Moises xuya' chiwe chi quijach bic ri iwixokil; nabe man je ta wa'." 
Matthew19:9 Ri in c'ut quinbij chiwe, chi apachin ta ne cujach bic ri rixokil, we man rumal ruc'axic rib ri ixokil ruc' jun achi che u banic macunic, we cäc'uli' chi ruc' jun ixok chic, cäkaj pa mac. Ri achi c'ut ri cäc'uli' ruc' ri ixok ri jachom bic, xukuje' cäkaj pa mac.”" 
Matthew19:10 Ri tijoxelab xquibij che ri Jesus: “We jewa' ri u banic jun achi ruc' ri rixokil, man utz ta ba ri' we cäc'uli'c.”" 
Matthew19:11 Ri Jesus xubij c'u chque: “Man conojel taj cäquich'ob we jasach ri', xane' xak xuwi ri winak ri ya'tal chque caquic'amo." 
Matthew19:12 E c'o jujun man quecuin taj quec'uli'c rumal rech chi kas quech wi ulok pa ri calaxic, e c'o jujun ri xa' caban chque cumal ri winak, e c'o niq'uiaj chic man quec'uli' taj rumal rech ri rajawibal ri Dios. Apachin ri cäcuin che u c'amic we tijonic ri' chuc'amowaj.”" 
Matthew19:13 Xec'am ulok jujun ac'alab chuwäch ri Jesus, rech quebuya' ri u k'ab paquiwi', cuban c'u ch'awem ruc' Dios paquiwi'. E are c'u ri u tijoxelab xequiyaj ri winak ri xec'amow ulok." 
Matthew19:14 Ri Jesus xubij c'u chque: “Chiya' chi quepe ri ac'alab wuc', mebik'atij, quech c'ut ri rajawibal ri Dios ri e je tak wa'.”" 
Matthew19:15 Xuya' c'u ri u k'ab paquiwi' ri ac'alab xel c'u bic chila'. 
Matthew19:16 Xpe c'u jun c'ojol ala, xopan ruc' ri Jesus, xubij che: “Utzalaj Ajtij, ¿jas ri utz quinban na rech quinwechbej ri junalic c'aslemal?”" 
Matthew19:17 Ri Jesus xubij che: “¿Jasche cabij utz chwe? Xa' jun ri utz c'olic, are ri Dios. We c'u cawaj catoc pa ri c'aslemal, chebanimaj ri takomal.”" 
Matthew19:18 Ri c'ojol ala xubij che: “¿Jachique tak?” Ri Jesus xubij: “Matcämisanic; matkaj pa mac ruc' jun winak chic; mateläk'anic; mayac tzijtal chrij jun winak chic. 
Matthew19:19 Nim chebawila' wi ri a nan a tat. Chalok'ok'ej ri awajil a tz'akat je jas u lok'ok'exic awib chbil awib.” 
Matthew19:20 Xubij c'u ri c'ojol ala che: “Ronojel wa' nu banom ulok. ¿Jas chi c'ut ri rajawaxic quinbano?” 
Matthew19:21 Xubij ri Jesus che: “We cawaj catux tz'akat, jät, chac'ayij ri jastak awe, chajacha' chque ri mebayib rech cäc'oji' na a k'inomal pa ri caj. Tasaj c'ut, chinaterenej.”" 
Matthew19:22 Ri c'ojol ala, aretak xuta' we tzij ri', xbisonic, xbec, rumal rech chi e q'ui ri jastak rech e c'olic." 
Matthew19:23 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque ri u tijoxelab: “Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi ruc' sibalaj c'ax coc jun k'inom pa ri rajawibal ri Dios." 
Matthew19:24 Xubij chi c'u na chque, chi man c'ax taj che jun camey cäk'ax pa ri u julil jun bak, chuwäch jun k'inom coc ta pa ri rajawibal ri Dios.”" 
Matthew19:25 Ri u tijoxelab c'ut, aretak xquita' wa', sibalaj xquimayo, xquibij: “¿Jachin ta ba' lo ri cäcuinic cäcolotajic?”" 
Matthew19:26 Ri Jesus xca'y chque, xubij: “Ri winak man quecuin ta wa' che u banic, are c'u ri Dios cäcuin che u banic ronojel.”" 
Matthew19:27 Xubij c'u ri Lu' che: “Ri uj ka yo'm can ronojel, lal ka terenem. ¿Jas c'ut ri cäkarik na?”" 
Matthew19:28 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Kastzij quinbij chiwe: Aretak cac'ac'arisax ronojel, aretak cät'uyi' na ri Rija'l winak puwi' ri u tem, ri sibalaj nim u k'ij, xukuje' ri ix ri in i terenem quixt'uyi' na paquiwi' cablajuj tem che u k'atic tzij paquiwi' ri cablajuj amak' re Israel." 
Matthew19:29 Conojel ri qui yo'm can cachoch, o cachalal, o canab, conojel ri qui yo'm can qui nan qui tat, conojel ri qui yo'm can quixokil, o calc'ual, o culew, rumal rech ri nu bi', caquic'am na jun sient chi je tak wa' xukuje' cäquechbej na ri junalic c'aslemal." 
Matthew19:30 E q'ui ri e nabe quebux na q'uisbal; e are' c'u ri e q'uisbal quebux na nabe.” 
Matthew20:1 “Ri rajawibal ri Dios junam ruc' jun achi ajchak'e ulew, ri nimalaj ak'ab xel bic che qui tzucuxic ajchaquib che ri u chac pa ri tico'n re uva." 
Matthew20:2 Xchoman cuc' ri ajchaquib chi cutoj chque ri cuch'äc jun ajchac che ri jun k'ij chac. Xebutak c'u bic pa ri u tico'n. 
Matthew20:3 Ubelej jok'otaj chic re ak'abil, xel chi bic jumul, xeril chi niq'uiaj achijab e tac'atoj pa ri c'ayibal, ri man c'o ta qui chac." 
Matthew20:4 Xubij chque: ‘Xukuje' ri ix, jix pa ri nu tico'n re uva. Quinya' c'u na jas ri takal chiwe.’ Xebe c'u wa'." 
Matthew20:5 Ri ajchak'e ulew xel chi bic jumul aretak xurik ri tiq'uil k'ij, jumul chi c'ut xel bic pa ri urox jok'otaj benak k'ij, junam chi c'ut xubano." 
Matthew20:6 Uro' jok'otaj chi c'ut benak k'ij, xel chi bic jumul. Xeburika' chi niq'uiaj achijab e tac'atoj ri man c'o ta qui chac; xubij chque: ‘¿Jasche ix tac'atoj waral ronojel ri jun k'ij man quixchacuntaj?’" 
Matthew20:7 Xquibij che: ‘Rumal rech chi man c'o ta jachin jun cäbin chac chke.’ Xubij chque: ‘Xukuje' ri ix, jix pa ri nu tico'n re uva.’" 
Matthew20:8 Xk'ekal chic, ri rajaw ri tico'n re uva xubij che ri chajil que ri ajchaquib: ‘Chebasiq'uij ri ajchaquib, chajacha' ri tojbal que. Chebatojo' chachaplej cuc' ri xeboc chuq'uisbal.’" 
Matthew20:9 Xepe ri ajchaquib ri xeboc pa chac pa ri uro' jok'otaj, xquic'am c'u ri tojbal que re jun k'ij chquijujunal." 
Matthew20:10 Xepe c'u ri ajchaquib ri nabe xeboc pa chac. Are c'u pa qui c'u'x chi c'o na cäquic'am na ri e are chquiwäch ri niq'uiaj chic. Xukuje' c'ut ri e are xquic'am ri tojbal re jun k'ij chquijujunal. 
Matthew20:11 Aretak xquic'amo, xewixwitic, xquiyok' ri rajaw ri ulew," 
Matthew20:12 xquibij: ‘We ajchaquib ri' ri c'äte xeboc q'uisbal, xa' jun jok'otaj xechacunic. Xa' c'u junam qui tojic xban la jas ri uj ri xkak'i ri eka'n ronojel jun k'ij, xkak'i ri u k'ak'al ri k'ij.’" 
Matthew20:13 Ri are xubij che jun chque ri ajchaquib: ‘Wachil, man c'o ta jun jasach ri ma ta suc' quinban iwuc'. ¿La ma ta xkachomaj awuc' chi cach'äc jun k'ij tojbal awe?" 
Matthew20:14 Chac'ama' ba ri awe, jät. Quinwaj quinya' che we q'uisbal ri' jas ri xinya' chawe." 
Matthew20:15 ¿La ma ta cuya' quinbano jas ri quinwaj che ri jastak we? o ¿la itzel cawil wi at chi ri in in utz?’ 
Matthew20:16 Je c'u ri' ri e nabe quebux na q'uisbal. Are c'u ri e q'uisbal quebux na nabe.” 
Matthew20:17 Pakalem re ri Jesus pa Jerusalen, xebuc'am ri cablajuj u tijoxelab pa qui tuquiel wi, xebuch'abej pa ri be, xubij chque:" 
Matthew20:18 “Chiwilampe', cujpaki pa Jerusalen. Ri Rija'l winak cäjach na pa qui k'ab ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tak tabal tok'ob xukuje' pa qui k'ab ri ajtijab re ri pixab. Ri e are cäquik'at na tzij puwi' che u cämisaxic." 
Matthew20:19 Cäquijach c'u na pa qui k'ab ri man e aj judeyib taj rech cäquetz'bej na u wäch, cäquich'ay na, cäquirip na. Pa oxib k'ij c'ut cäc'astaj na.”" 
Matthew20:20 Xopan c'u ri qui nan ri e u c'ojol ri Zebedey ruc' ri Jesus, e rachil ri ral. Xxuqui' chuwäch ri Jesus, che u tz'onoxic jun tok'ob che." 
Matthew20:21 Ri Jesus xubij che: “¿Jas ri cawaj?” Ri chuchu' xutzelej u bixic: “Chya' la chque we quieb wal ri' chi quet'uyi' uc' la pa ri ajawibal la. Chya' la chque chi ri jun cät'uyi' ta pa ri iquiak'ab la, ri jun chic cät'uyi' ta pa ri mox k'ab la.”" 
Matthew20:22 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic: “Man iweta'm taj jas ri qui tz'onoj. ¿La quixcuin che u kumuxic iwe ri kumubal re c'ayil ri quinwuq'uiaj in?” Ri e are xquibij: “Cujcuinic.” 
Matthew20:23 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Kastzij quitij na iwe ri u pam ri nu kumubal ri quinkumuj na in. Are c'u ri i t'uyibaxic pa ri nu wiquiak'ab, xukuje' pa ri nu mox k'ab, man wech ta wa' ri u ya'ic. Xane' cäya' na chque ri suc'umam wi ulok rumal ri nu Tat.”" 
Matthew20:24 Ri lajuj, aretak xquito, xpe coyowal chquij ri quieb cachalal quib." 
Matthew20:25 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij, xubij chque: “Iweta'm chi ri qui nimakil ri tinimit ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew quetakan paquiwi' tak ri tinimit. Ri nimak qui k'ij c'o qui takanic paquiwi'." 
Matthew20:26 Man je ta c'u wa' chixo'l ix. Xane' apachin ta ne ri cäraj cux nim u k'ij chixo'l, rajawaxic quebupatanij ri niq'uiaj chic." 
Matthew20:27 Apachin ta ne ri cäraj cux nabe chixo'l, rajawaxic c'u'x i pataninel." 
Matthew20:28 Je jas ri Rija'l winak man xpe taj rech cäpatanixic, xane' rech quebupatanij niq'uiaj chic. Xpetic rech cuya' ri u c'aslemal che qui toric q'uialaj winak.”" 
Matthew20:29 Aretak xebel bic pa ri tinimit Jerico, sibalaj e q'ui winak xeteri bic chrij ri Jesus." 
Matthew20:30 E t'uyut'oj quieb moyab chuchi' ri be. Aretak xquito chi cätajin coc'ow ri Jesus, xquirak qui chi', xquibij: “Chel c'u'x la chke, Kajaw, Rija'l ri David.”" 
Matthew20:31 Ri winak xequiyajo rech man cäquirak ta chi qui chi'. Ri e are c'ut sibalaj xquirak na qui chi', xquibij: “Ajawaxel, chel c'u'x la chke, Rija'l ri David.”" 
Matthew20:32 Xtaq'ui' c'u ri Jesus, xebusiq'uij, xubij chque: “¿Jas ri quiwaj chi quinban chiwe?”" 
Matthew20:33 Xquibij c'u che: “Kajaw, cäkaj chi chejaktaj ri ka bak'wäch.”" 
Matthew20:34 Ri Jesus xel u c'u'x chque, xuchap ri qui bak'wäch. Chanim c'ut xeca'yic, xeteri c'u bic chrij ri Jesus." 
Matthew21:1 Aretak ri Jesus nakaj chic e c'o wi che ri Jerusalen, xebopan pa ri tinimit Betpaje, ri c'o chuxcut ri qui juyubal tak ri u Che'al Aseitun, ri Jesus c'ut xebutak bic quieb chque ri u tijoxelab," 
Matthew21:2 xubij chque: “Jix pa ri alaj tinimit ri c'o apan chiwäch. Chanim quirik na jun ati't bur ximatalic rachil jun alaj bur. Chebiquira', chebic'ama' ulok chwe." 
Matthew21:3 We c'o jun c'o jas cubij chiwe, chibij che: ‘Quebajwataj che ri Ajawaxel. Quebutak c'u na ulok chanim.’ ”" 
Matthew21:4 Ronojel c'u wa' xbanic, rech je cäbantajic jas ri tzijom can rumal ri k'axal tzij, ri xubij:" 
Matthew21:5 “Chibij che ri u mia'l ri Sion: ‘Chawilampe', ri awajawinel cäpe awuc', mach'alic, quiejeninak chrij jun bur, chrij jun alaj bur, ral jun awaj ajeka'n.’ ”" 
Matthew21:6 Ri e u tijoxelab ri Jesus xebe che u banic jas ri xetak wi bic rumal ri Jesus. 
Matthew21:7 Xquic'am ulok ri ati't bur rachil ri alaj bur. Xequiya' ri qui k'u' chquij. Xquiejen c'u ri Jesus. 
Matthew21:8 E q'ui ri winak xquilic' ri qui k'u' pa ri u be ri Jesus. Niq'uiaj winak chic xequik'up u k'ab tak che', xequiya' pa ri u be." 
Matthew21:9 Ri winak ri e benak chuwäch xukuje' ri e benak chrij xquirak qui chi', xquibij: “¡Nim u k'ij ri Rija'l ri David! ¡Tewichi'm ri petinak pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel! ¡Nim u k'ij chila' chicaj!”" 
Matthew21:10 Aretak ri Jesus xoc c'u bic pa Jerusalen, conojel ri winak pa ri tinimit xquimayo, xquibij: “¿Jachin wa'?”" 
Matthew21:11 Ri winak xquibij: “Are wa' ri Jesus ri k'axal tzij, ri aj Nazaret aj Galiley.”" 
Matthew21:12 Ri Jesus xoc chupam ri rachoch Dios, xeresaj bic conojel ri winak ri quec'ayinic xukuje' conojel ri quelok'omanic. Xebutzak ri qui mexa ri e q'uexel tak puak. Xebutzak ri qui tem ri ajc'ay tak palomax." 
Matthew21:13 Xubij chque: “Tz'ibatal c'ut: ‘Ri wachoch u binam ja re ch'awem ruc' Dios’. Ri ix c'ut qui jul eläk'omab i banom che.” 
Matthew21:14 Xebopan c'u ri moyab xukuje' ri ch'ocojib ruc' ri Jesus pa ri rachoch Dios. Ri are xebucunaj c'ut. 
Matthew21:15 Ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri ajtijab re ri pixab xquilo chi ri Jesus xuban tak ri mayibal. Xquito chi ri ac'alab cäquirak qui chi' pa ri rachoch Dios, cäquibij: “¡Nim u k'ij ri Rija'l ri David!” Xpe c'u coyowal," 
Matthew21:16 xquibij che ri Jesus: “¿La cäta' ri cäquibij wa'?” Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Quinto. ¿La mawi jumul i siq'uim pa tak ri Tz'ibatalic?: ‘Pa qui chi' ri ac'alab xukuje' ri quetu'nic suc'umam la wi ri bixonic.’ ” 
Matthew21:17 Ri Jesus xebuya' can ri qui nimakil ri cojol tak tabal tok'ob, xel bic pa ri tinimit, xbe pa Betan. Che roc'owisaxic ri ak'ab chila'." 
Matthew21:18 Chucab k'ij ak'abibal aretak cätajin catzelej ri Jesus chupam ri tinimit, xnumic." 
Matthew21:19 Xril jun u che'al higo chuchi' ri be. Xbe ruc'. Man c'o ta c'u xurik che ri che', xane' xak xuwi u xak. Xubij c'u che: “Mawi jumul chbe k'ij sak cäc'oji' na a wächinic.” Chanim xchaki'jar ri u che'al higo." 
Matthew21:20 Ri u tijoxelab, aretak xquilo, xquimayo, xquibij: “¿Jasche chanim xchaki'jar ri u che'al higo?”" 
Matthew21:21 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Kastzij quinbij chiwe, we ta c'o i cojonic, we ta ma ta cuban quieb i c'u'x, man xuwi ta wa' quiban na jas ri xinban in che ri u che'al higo, xane' we quibij che we juyub ri': ‘Chatwalijok, chaq'uiaka' awib pa ri cho’, cäbantaj na." 
Matthew21:22 Ronojel ri qui tz'onoj che ri Dios pa ch'awem ruc' Dios, ruc' cojonic, cäyataj na chiwe.”" 
Matthew21:23 Xopan ri Jesus pa ri rachoch Dios. Aretak cätajin catijon chila' xenakajin c'u ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tak tabal tok'ob ruc' xukuje' ri e nimak tak tatayib re ri tinimit. Xquic'ot u chi': “¿Ruc' jachique takanic quebaban we jastak ri'? ¿Jachin xyo'w wa' we takanic ri' pa a k'ab?” 
Matthew21:24 Ri Jesus xutzelej u wäch qui tzij: “Xukuje' ri in quinban jun c'otoj chi'aj chiwe, we quibij chwe: ¿Jachin xtakow ulok ri Xuan che u banic ri bautism, ri Dios o ri winak? We ri ix quitzelej u wäch ri nu tzij, ri in quinbij na chiwe ruc' jachique takanic quinban wa'.” Xquichaplej chomanic chquixo'l: “We cäkatzelej u bixic che chi are' ri Dios, cubij na chke: ‘¿Jas c'u che man xixcojon che?’" 
Matthew21:25  
Matthew21:26 Man cuya' ta c'ut cakabij chi e are ri qui takanic ri winak, cäkaxe'j kib chquiwäch ri q'uialaj winak rumal rech chi conojel ri winak quicojom chi ri Xuan are k'axal tzij.”" 
Matthew21:27 Xquibij c'u che ri Jesus: “Man keta'm taj.” Ri Jesus c'ut xubij chque: “Xukuje' ri in man quinbij ta chiwe ruc' jachique takanic quebenban wa'.” 
Matthew21:28 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿Jas c'u quichomaj ix? Jun achi c'o quieb u c'ojol. Xbe ruc' ri nabe, xubij che: ‘Nu c'ojol, jät camic, chatechacun pa ri tico'n re uva.’" 
Matthew21:29 Ri ala xubij che ri u tat: ‘Man quinwaj taj.’ C'äte c'ut xuq'uex ri u chomanic, xbec c'ut." 
Matthew21:30 Xbe chi ruc' ri ucab u c'ojol, xa' junam xubij che. Ri are xubij che ri u tat: ‘Quinbec, tat.’ Man xbe ta c'ut." 
Matthew21:31 ¿Jachin chque ri quieb alabom xbanow ri u rayibal ri u tat?” Xquibij: “Are ri nabe.” Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi ri e tok'il tak alcabal xukuje' ri ixokib que nim ch'utin quenabej na chiwäch pa ri rajawibal ri Dios." 
Matthew21:32 Ri Xuan xpe che u c'utic jun c'aslemal suc', man xicoj ta c'ut. Ri tok'il tak alcabal xukuje' ri ixokib que nim ch'utin xecojonic. Ri ix c'ut, pune' xiwil wa', man xiq'uex ta i c'u'x mawi xixcojon che.”" 
Matthew21:33 “Chitatabej jun c'ambal no'j chic: C'o jun achi rajaw ulew. Ri are' xusuc'umaj jun ticbal uva. Xuk'atij rij, xuc'ot jun pitz'bal uva chupam, xuyac jun tac'atic ja che u chajixic ronojel. Xuya' c'u can ri ulew pa kajomal chque niq'uiaj ajchaquib, xbe naj." 
Matthew21:34 Aretak xopan ri k'ijol che u yaquic ri u wächinic ri tico'n, ri rajaw xebutak ulok u tako'n cuc' ri ajchaquib che u c'amic ri u wächinic ri tico'n ri takal u ya'ic che." 
Matthew21:35 Ri ajchaquib c'ut xequichap ri tako'n, xquich'ay ri jun, xquicämisaj chi ri jun, ri jun chic xquibuc' che abaj." 
Matthew21:36 Jumul chic ri rajaw ri tico'n xebutak ulok niq'uiaj u tako'n chic, e q'ui na chquiwäch ri nabe. Xak c'u junam xquiban chi chque." 
Matthew21:37 Chuq'uisbalil xutak ulok ri u c'ojol. Xubij: ‘Nim cäquil wi na ri nu c'ojol.’ 
Matthew21:38 Ri ajchaquib c'ut, aretak xquil ri kas u c'ojol ri cajaw, xquibij: ‘Are wa' ri quechben na ri ulew; tisaj, chkacämisaj. Jeri' cujcanaj can ri uj puwi' ri rechbal.’" 
Matthew21:39 Xquichapo, xquesaj bic pa ri tico'n re uva, xquicämisaj." 
Matthew21:40 Aretak cäpe ri rajaw ri tico'n re uva, ¿jas cuban na chque ri ajchaquib ri'?”" 
Matthew21:41 Ri e are xquitzelej u bixic: “Quebucämisaj na we e itzel tak winak ri', man ruc' ta tok'obisam wächaj. Cuya' na ri tico'n re uva pa kajomal chque niq'uiaj ajchaquib chic, ri cäquiya' na ri u wächinic ri tico'n pa ri u k'ijol ri takal u ya'ic che.”" 
Matthew21:42 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La ma ta i siq'uim pa tak ri Tz'ibatalic?: ‘Ri abaj ri man xquicoj ta ri yacal tak ja, are abaj ri' xux na nim u k'ij. Are ri Kajaw xbanow wa'. Uj c'u mayininak.’" 
Matthew21:43 Rumal c'u ri' quinbij chiwe, chi ri rajawibal ri Dios quesax na chiwe, cäya' c'u na chque ri winak ri cäquiya' na ri u wächinic." 
Matthew21:44 Apachin c'u ri cätzak puwi' we abaj ri', cäk'aj na. Apachin c'u ri puwi' cätzak wi ri abaj, cäc'äjix na rumal.”" 
Matthew21:45 Aretak ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tak tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri pariseyib xequita' ri u c'ambal no'j ri Jesus, xquich'obo chi chquij ri e are cubij wi." 
Matthew21:46 Xquitzucuj jas cäquiban che u chapic ri Jesus, xquixe'j c'u quib chquiwäch ri winak, rumal rech chi ri winak quicojom chi ri Jesus are k'axal tzij." 
Matthew22:1 Ri Jesus xebutzijobej chi jumul, xebuch'abej ri winak pa c'ambal tak no'j, xubij chque:" 
Matthew22:2 “Ri rajawibal ri Dios xa' junam ruc' jun ajawinel, ri xuban nimak'ij che ri u c'ulanem ri u c'ojol." 
Matthew22:3 Xebutak bic ri u tako'n che qui siq'uixic ri winak ri bim chque chi quec'oji' pa ri c'ulanem. Man xcaj ta c'ut xepetic. 
Matthew22:4 Xebutak chi bic niq'uiaj tako'n, xubij chque: ‘Chibij chque ri winak: Xepilitaj ri ama' tak wacax, xepilitaj ri awaj ri e nu k'obisam, ri wa utzirinak chic ronojel ri ula'bal c'o chic. Tisaj pa ri c'ulanem.’" 
Matthew22:5 Ri winak c'ut man xeboc ta il, xebec. Ri jun xbe pa ri rulew. Ri jun chic xbe che u banic u c'ay." 
Matthew22:6 Niq'uiaj winak chic xequichap ri tako'n, xequiyok'o, xequicämisaj." 
Matthew22:7 Ri ajawinel, aretak xuto, xpe royowal. Xebutak bic ri rajch'ojab, xequicämisaj ri cämisanelab ri', xequiporoj ri qui tinimit." 
Matthew22:8 Xubij c'u ri ajawinel chque ri u tako'n: ‘Xutzir ronojel ri cäkacoj che ri c'ulanem. Ri winak c'ut ri e kula'm, man takal ta chque." 
Matthew22:9 Jix ba' chuchi' tak ri be, chebisiq'uij ulok pa ri c'ulanem conojel ri winak ri quebiriko.’" 
Matthew22:10 Xebel bic ri tako'n pa tak ri be. Xequimulij conojel ri winak ri xequiriko, chi e utz chi man e utz taj. Jeri' xnoj ri ja che winak." 
Matthew22:11 Xoc bic ri ajawinel che quilic ri winak ri e ulam. Xril jun winak chila' ri man u cojom ta atz'iak ri cacoj pa ri c'ulanem. 
Matthew22:12 Xubij che: ‘Wachil, ¿jas xabano xatoc ulok waral, man a cojom ta c'u atz'iak ri cacoj pa ri c'ulanem?’ Ri are' man xch'awtaj." 
Matthew22:13 C'äte ri' ri ajawinel xubij chque ri u tako'n: ‘Chebiyutu' ri rakan u k'ab, chiq'uiaka' apan pa ri k'eku'm jela'. Cok' c'u na chila', cukuch'uch'ej na ri u ware.’" 
Matthew22:14 E q'ui ri e siq'uim. Xak e quieb oxib c'ut ri e cha'om.” 
Matthew22:15 Aretak oc'owinak chi wa', ri pariseyib xebec xquijunaj qui wäch che u cojic jun c'amibal rech cakaj ri Jesus pa qui k'ab cumal ri kas e u tzij rech c'o caquitzujubej rech." 
Matthew22:16 Xequitak bic ri qui tijoxelab ruc' ri Jesus e cachil ri aj herodib, xquibij che: “Aj tij, keta'm chi ri lal cabij la ri kastzij. Keta'm chi ri lal quetijoj la ri winak ruc' kastzij che ri u be ri Dios, chi man coc ta la il chuwäch jachin jun, we nim u banic o man nim ta u banic, man are ta quil la qui wäch ri winak." 
Matthew22:17 Bij ba la chke, ¿jas cächomaj la? ¿La takalic cakatoj ri alcabal che ri nimalaj ajawinel Sesar, o man takal taj?”" 
Matthew22:18 Ri Jesus xuch'ob ri itzel qui chomanic, xubij chque: “¿Jasche quic'am u pa nu chi'? Ix xa' quieb i wäch." 
Matthew22:19 Chic'utu' ri puak re ri alcabal chnuwäch.” Xquic'am c'u ulok jun puak chuwäch. 
Matthew22:20 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque: “¿Jachin u ca'yebal ri c'o chuwäch xukuje' ri bi'aj ri tz'ibatalic?” 
Matthew22:21 Xquibij che: “Rech ri Sesar.” Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque: “Chiya' che ri Sesar ri rech ri Sesar; che ri Dios ri rech ri Dios.” 
Matthew22:22 Aretak xquito, xquimayo, xquiya' canok, xebel bic." 
Matthew22:23 Pa ri k'ij ri' xebopan ri saduseyib ruc' ri Jesus. Ri e are cäquibij chi man quec'astaj taj ri cäminakib. Xquita' c'u che ri Jesus: 
Matthew22:24 “Ajtij, ri Moises xubij: ‘We c'o jun achi cäcämic, we c'u man e c'o ta can ralc'ual ruc' ri rixokil, ri rachalal cäc'uli' na ruc' ri malca'n ixok. Jeri' ri e ralc'ual ri quec'oji' na ruc', cuban na chque chi e je ta ne e ralc'ual ri rachalal ri xcämic.’" 
Matthew22:25 E c'o c'u wukub achijab chkaxo'l, e cachalal quib. Xc'uli' ri nabeal, xcämic. Man c'u xc'oji' ta ralc'ual, xuya' c'u can ri rixokil che ri rachalal." 
Matthew22:26 Junam xukuje' ri ucab, ri urox, c'ä ruc' ri uwuk achalaxel." 
Matthew22:27 E cäminak chi conojel, xcäm bic ri ixok." 
Matthew22:28 Xux c'u na quixokil conojel, aretak quec'astaj ri cäminakib, ¿jachin c'u lo chque ri wukub achijab ri' cux na rachajil ri ixok?”" 
Matthew22:29 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ri ix ix sachinak rumal rech chi man iweta'm ta ri Tz'ibatalic, mawi ri u cuinem ri Dios." 
Matthew22:30 Aretak quec'astaj na ri cäminakib, man quec'uli' ta chic, mawi cäquiya' quib che c'ulanem, xane' je jas ri e tako'nib aj caj." 
Matthew22:31 Chrij ri qui c'astajic ri cäminakib: ¿La ma ta i siq'uim ri u bim ri Dios?: 
Matthew22:32 ‘In ri' ri u Dios ri Abraham, ri u Dios ri Isaac, xukuje' ri u Dios ri Jacob.’ Ri Dios c'ut man are ta qui Dios ri cäminakib, xane' are ri qui Dios ri e c'aslic.”" 
Matthew22:33 Aretak xquita' wa', ri winak xquimay ri u tijonic ri Jesus." 
Matthew22:34 Ri pariseyib, aretak xquetamaj chi xtz'apix u pa qui chi' ri saduseyib rumal ri Jesus, xquimulij quib." 
Matthew22:35 Jun chque, are ajtij re ri pixab, cäraj cuc'am u pu chi' ri Jesus, xuc'ot u chi':" 
Matthew22:36 “Ajtij, ¿jachique ri nimalaj takomal pa ri pixab?”" 
Matthew22:37 Ri Jesus xubij che: “ ‘Chalok'ok'ej ri Awajaw a Dios ruc' ronojel awanima', ruc' ronojel a c'aslibal, ruc' ronojel a chomanic.’" 
Matthew22:38 Are wa' ri nim na xukuje' nabe chque ri takomal. 
Matthew22:39 Ri ucab xa' junam ruc' wa': ‘Chalok'ok'ej ri awajil a tz'akat je jas ri u lok'ok'exic awib chbil awib.’ 
Matthew22:40 We quieb takomal ri' e are wa' ri e u nimal ronojel ri pixab, xukuje' ri e quech ri e qui tijonic ri e k'axal tak tzij.”" 
Matthew22:41 C'ä qui mulin quib ri pariseyib, ri Jesus xuc'ot qui chi':" 
Matthew22:42 “¿Jas quichomaj che ri Crist? ¿Rija'l jachinok?” Xquibij che: “Are Rija'l ri David.” 
Matthew22:43 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿Jas c'u che cäbix Wajaw che rumal ri David, rumal ri Uxlabaxel? Xubij c'ut ri David:" 
Matthew22:44 ‘Xubij ri Ajawaxel che ri Wajaw: Chatt'uyul pa ri nu wiquiak'ab, c'ä quebenya' na ri e a c'ulel chquixe' ri awakan.’" 
Matthew22:45 We ri Crist xbix ‘Wajaw’ che rumal ri David, ¿la rija'l ta c'ut?”" 
Matthew22:46 Man c'o ta jun xcuin che u tzelexic u wäch ri u tzij ri Jesus. Kas chi' c'ut pa ri k'ij ri', man c'o ta chi jun xucoj u chuk'ab che u c'otic u chi' ri Jesus." 
Matthew23:1 Ri Jesus xubij chque ri q'uialaj winak xukuje' chque ri e u tijoxelab: 
Matthew23:2 “Ri ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' ri pariseyib queta'm ri u pixab ri Moises. 
Matthew23:3 Je c'u ri', ronojel ri cäquibij chiwe chi rajawaxic quibano, chibana', chinimaj ri qui tzij. Miban c'u iwe jas ri cäquibano. Ri e are, cäquibij jun jasach, jun chi c'u wi ri caquibano." 
Matthew23:4 Quequixim eka'n sibalaj al, c'ax cuc'axic, cäquiya' puwi' ri qui teleb ri winak. Are c'u ri ajtijab re ri pixab cuc' ri pariseyib, mawi c'u ne ruc' ri u wi' qui k'ab cäcaj cäquinak ri eka'n." 
Matthew23:5 Cäquiban ronojel ri qui chac rech queca'yex cumal ri winak: cäquinimarisaj u wäch ri rabarak tak wuj ri cäquicoj chiquipalaj, xukuje' che ri qui k'ab; cäquinimarisaj ri u chiyichic ri u chi' catz'iak;" 
Matthew23:6 aretak queboc pa nimak tak wa'im, quequitzucuj ri c'olbal pa tak ri mexa ri nimak qui banic, xukuje' pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab, are quequitzucuj ri t'uyulibal ri nimak qui banic;" 
Matthew23:7 utz cäquito aretak ri winak cäquiya' rutzil qui wäch pa tak ri c'ayibal aretak ri winak cäquibij ‘ajtijab’ chque. 
Matthew23:8 Ri ix c'ut, miwaj chi cäbix ajtijab chiwe. Xa' jun ri Iwajtij, are ri Crist. Iwonojel c'ut iwachalal iwib." 
Matthew23:9 Mibij i tat che jachin jun cho ri uwächulew. Xa' c'u jun ri i Tat c'o chicaj. 
Matthew23:10 Xukuje' miwaj chi cäbix c'amal tak be chiwe. Rumal rech chi xa' jun ri C'amal i be, are ri Crist." 
Matthew23:11 Apachin c'u ri nim na u banic chixo'l, are' chux pataninel iwech." 
Matthew23:12 Apachin c'ut ri cunimarisaj u k'ij chbil rib camach'irisax na, apachin c'ut ri cumach'irisaj rib canimarisax na u k'ij." 
Matthew23:13 ¡C'ax iwech, ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' pariseyib! ¡Xa' quieb i wäch! Quitz'apij chquiwäch ri winak ri u chi' ri rajawibal ri Dios. Ri ix c'ut man quixoc taj, mawi quiya' chi queboc ri winak ri cäcaj queboquic." 
Matthew23:14  
Matthew23:15 ¡C'ax iwech ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' ri pariseyib, xa' quieb i wäch, ri quibinibej ri ulew xukuje' ri plo che u ch'äquic jun winak rech cacojon iwuc'! Aretak c'u ix cuininak che u banic, i banom che ri winak chi camul takal na ri xibalba che chiwäch ix." 
Matthew23:16 ¡C'ax iwech, ix moyab tak c'amal tak be! Ri ix quibij: ‘Apachin ri cucoj ri u bi' ri rachoch Dios che u banic jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na, man c'o ta cubij, apachin c'u ri cucoj ri u bi' ri kan puak ri c'o pa ri rachoch Dios che u banic jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na, rajawaxic cubano jas ri xubij.’" 
Matthew23:17 ¡Conab xukuje' moyab! ¿Jachique c'ut ri nim na u k'ij, la are ri k'an puak, o are ri rachoch Dios ri cäbanow tastalic che ri k'an puak?" 
Matthew23:18 Xukuje' quibij: ‘Apachin ri cucoj ri u bi' ri porobal che u banic jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na, man c'o ta cubij. Apachin c'u ri cucoj ri u bi' ri sipanic ri c'o puwi' ri porobal che u banic jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na, ri are rajawaxic cubano jas ri xubij.’" 
Matthew23:19 Conab xukuje' moyab. ¿Jachique c'u ri nim na u k'ij, la are ri sipanic, o are ri porobal ri cäbanow tastalic che ri sipanic?" 
Matthew23:20 Apachin c'u ri cucoj ri u bi' ri porobal che u banic jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na, cucoj ri porobal che u bixic kastzij xukuje' ronojel ri c'o puwi'." 
Matthew23:21 Apachin ri cucoj ri u bi' ri rachoch Dios che u banic ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na, xukuje' cucoj ronojel ri c'o chupam." 
Matthew23:22 Apachin ri cucoj ri u bi' ri caj che u banic jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na, cucoj ri u tem ri Dios, xukuje' cucoj ri u bi' ri t'uyul puwi'." 
Matthew23:23 ¡C'ax iwech, ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' pariseyib! ¡Xa' quieb i wäch! Quiya' ri u lajujil ri k'ebum, ri anix, ri comin. I yo'm c'u can ri nim na u banic ri c'o pa ri pixab ri rajawaxic na, ri suq'uil, ri elebal i c'u'x, ri cojonic. Rajawaxic qui banic we jastak ri', man quiya' ta c'u can ri u banic ri jun chic." 
Matthew23:24 ¡Ix moyalaj tak c'amal tak be! Quicha' ri us, quibik' c'u bic jun camey." 
Matthew23:25 ¡Tok'ob i wäch, ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' pariseyib! ¡Xa' quieb i wäch! Quich'aj ri rij ri mulul, quich'aj ri rij ri lak. Ri qui pam c'ut e nojinak che eläk'anic, xukuje' che ri itzel rayinic." 
Matthew23:26 ¡Moyalaj parisey! Nabe chach'aja' ri u pam we c'u je caban wa' ri mulul, cacanaj c'u can ch'ajch'oj ri rij xukuje'." 
Matthew23:27 ¡Tok'ob i wäch, ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' pariseyib! ¡Xa' quieb i wäch! Ri ix junam cuc' ri mukubal ri e chunam quij, je'l queca'yic. Ri qui pam c'ut e nojinak che qui bakil cäminakib, e nojinak che ronojel u wäch tz'ilol." 
Matthew23:28 Je c'u ri' xukuje' ri ix, ri winak cäquil ri iwij chi ix suc'. Ri ix xa quieb u wäch, ix nojinak c'u che etzelal." 
Matthew23:29 ¡C'ax iwech, ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' pariseyib! ¡Xa' quieb i wäch! Quiyac qui wi' ri e mukum wi ri k'axal tak tzij, quebiwik ri tz'ak ri e c'o paquiwi' ri e mukum wi ri suc'alaj tak winak." 
Matthew23:30 Quibij c'ut: ‘We ta uj c'o chic pa tak ri qui k'ij ri e ka mam, ma ta xujtoban ri' che qui cämisaxic ri e k'axal tak tzij.’" 
Matthew23:31 Je c'u ri', quik'alajisaj iwib chi ix quija'l ri xecämisan ri e k'axal tak tzij." 
Matthew23:32 ¡Chiq'uisa' ba' u banic ri xquichaplej ulok qui banic ri e i mam! 
Matthew23:33 ¡Ix je ta ne e cumätz! ¡Ix quija'l cumätz! ¿Jas lo ri quiban che u to'ic iwib chuwäch ri xibalba ri cac'äjisax wi i wäch? 
Matthew23:34 Rumal ri', chiwilampe'. Quebentak bic k'axal tak tzij iwuc', quebentak bic winak c'o qui no'j xukuje' ajtijab. Jujun chque wa' quebicämisaj na, quebirip na. Jujun chic quebich'ay na pa tak ri ja ri quitijoj wi iwib che ri pixab, quebic'axc'obisaj na pa tak tinimit chi tinimit." 
Matthew23:35 Jeri' piwi' cäkaj wi na ri qui quiq'uel conojel ri suc'alaj tak winak ri e cämisam cho ri uwächulew, turuwinak c'ut ri qui quiq'uel, conojel ri e cämisam ulok kas ruc' ri u quiq'uel ri Abel ri suc', c'ä ruc' ri u quiq'uel ri Zacariy ri u c'ojol ri Berequiy, ri xicämisaj chuxo'l ri k'ijilabal ruc' ri porobal." 
Matthew23:36 Kastzij quinbij chiwe chi ronojel wa' cäpe na paquiwi' ri winak ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew camic.” 
Matthew23:37 “¡Jerusalen, Jerusalen, ri quebacämisaj ri k'axal tak tzij, ri xebabuc' che abaj ri quetak ulok awuc'! ¡Q'ui mul xinwaj xebenmulij ri awal, je jas ri ec' quebumulij ri alaj tak ral chuxe' ri u xic', man xawaj ta c'ut!" 
Matthew23:38 Chiwilampe', ri iwachoch cäwonobax na canok." 
Matthew23:39 Quinbij chiwe chi man quiniwil ta chi na c'ä quibij na: ‘Tewichital ri petinak pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel.’ ” 
Matthew24:1 Elinak chi bic ri Jesus pa ri rachoch Dios, xbec. Xekeb ri u tijoxelab ruc', che qui c'utic tak ri ja chuwäch ri e u tz'akatil ri rachoch Dios." 
Matthew24:2 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La quiwil ronojel wa'? Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi waral man cäcanaj ta can jun abaj puwi' jun chic, ri ma ta cäwulix na.”" 
Matthew24:3 Ri Jesus t'uyul pa ri qui juyubal tak ri u Che'al Aseitun. Xebopan ri u tijoxelab ruc' pa qui tuquiel wi, che u ta'ic che: “Bij la chke, ¿Jampa' cäc'ulmax wa'? ¿Jas ri retal ri petbal la? ¿Jas ri retal ri u q'uisbalil ri uwächulew?”" 
Matthew24:4 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chichajij iwib, c'o jun mixsubuwic." 
Matthew24:5 E q'ui quepe na pa ri nu bi', cäquibij: ‘In ri' ri Crist.’ E q'ui c'ut ri quequisub na." 
Matthew24:6 Quita' na chi e c'o tak ch'o'j. Quita' na u tzijol tak ch'o'j. Chiwila' iwib mixsachic. Rajawaxic c'ut chi cäc'ulmax na wa'. C'ä majok c'u ri q'uisbalil. 
Matthew24:7 Cäwalij na jun nim tinimit chrij jun nim tinimit chic. Cäwalij na jun ajawibal chrij jun ajawibal chic. Pa jalajoj tak c'olbal quepe na wi'jal, xukuje' quebuban na cabrakan." 
Matthew24:8 Conojel we jastak ri' e chaplebal que k'oxowem. 
Matthew24:9 C'äte ri' quixjach na pa qui k'ab winak ri cäquiban c'ax chiwe, quixcämisax na. Quetzelax na i wäch cumal conojel ri winak rumal rech ri nu bi'." 
Matthew24:10 E q'ui c'ut quetukar na pa ri qui cojonic; cäquijachala' na quib, cäquetzelala' na qui wäch." 
Matthew24:11 Quewalij na q'ui ri cäquijaluj na quib chi e k'axal tak tzij. E q'ui ri winak ri quequisub na. 
Matthew24:12 Rumal ri u q'uiyiric ri etzelal, e q'uia winak cajarob na ri qui lok'obal c'u'x." 
Matthew24:13 Apachin c'ut ri co cataq'uic c'ä pa ri q'uisbalil, are quesäx na pa ri c'ax." 
Matthew24:14 We utzalaj tak tzij ri' re ri rajawibal ri Dios cätzijox na pa ronojel ri uwächulew. Jeri' cäk'alajisax ri utzalaj tak tzij chquiwäch conojel nimak tak tinimit ri c'o cho ronojel ri uwächulew. C'äte ri', cäpe ri q'uisbal." 
Matthew24:15 Ri Daniel ri k'axal tzij xutz'ibaj ri tz'ilalaj etzelal ri awas u banic pa ri k'ijilabal. Ri cäsiq'uinic ch'obonok: aretak ri ix quiwil ri xibibal tz'ilol pa ri k'ijilabal," 
Matthew24:16 c'äte ri', ri e c'o pa Judey, chebanimaj bic pa tak ri juyub." 
Matthew24:16 c'äte ri', ri e c'o pa Judey, chebanimaj bic pa tak ri juyub." 
Matthew24:17 Ri c'o puwi' ri ja, mäkaj ulok che u c'amic bic ri c'o pa ri rachoch, xane' chanimaj bic." 
Matthew24:18 Ri c'o pa ri juyub, mätzelej ulok che u c'amic bic ri u k'u'." 
Matthew24:19 ¡Tok'ob c'u qui wäch ri ixokib ri e yawab tak winak chic pa tak ri k'ijol ri'! ¡Tok'ob qui wäch ri ixokib ri e c'o cal ri quetu'nic! 
Matthew24:20 Chita' ba' che ri Dios chi ma ta quixanimaj bic pa ri sak'ij mawi pa jun k'ij re uxlanem. 
Matthew24:21 C'äte ri' cäpe na nimalaj c'axc'olil ri man ilom ta ulok kas aretak xtiquiritaj ulok ri uwächulew c'ä camic, mawi cäc'ulmax chi na." 
Matthew24:22 We ta ma ta queco'pix ri k'ij ri', ma ta c'o jun winak ri cäto'tajic. Rumal c'u quech ri e cha'om, queco'pix ri k'ij ri'." 
Matthew24:23 We c'o c'u jun cubij chiwe: ‘Chiwilampe', waral c'o wi ri Crist, o chila' c'o wi ri Crist’, micojo." 
Matthew24:24 Quepe c'u na winak ri cäquijaluj quib chi e Crist. Quepe na ri cäquijaluj quib chi e k'axal tak tzij. Quequiban na nimak tak etal xukuje' mayibal che qui subic we ta cäbantajic xukuje' ne ri e cha'om kas rumal ri Dios. 
Matthew24:25 Chiwilampe', nu bim chi can chiwe." 
Matthew24:26 We cäbix c'u chiwe: ‘Chiwilampe', c'o pa ri chaki'j uwo sak’, mixel bic. We cäbixic: ‘Chiwilampe', c'o pa tak ri ja’, micojo." 
Matthew24:27 Je c'ut jas ri caypa' ri quel ulok pa ri elebal k'ij, cäjuluw c'ä pa ri u kajebal k'ij, jeri' ri u petic ri Rija'l winak." 
Matthew24:28 Apawije' ta c'u ne c'o wi jun cäminak cuerp, chila' cäquimulij wi na quib ri c'uch.”" 
Matthew24:29 “Chanim c'ut, aretak oc'owinak chic ri k'ij ri' re ri c'axc'olil, ri k'ij cäk'ekumar na, ri ic' man cuya' ta chic ri u sakil, ri ch'imil ri e c'o chicaj quetzak na ulok, ri chuk'ab e aj caj queyicop na." 
Matthew24:30 C'äte ri' quil na chila' chicaj ri retal ri Rija'l winak. Ri winak c'ut ri e c'o pa tak conojel tinimit cho ri uwächulew cäquiq'uis na quib che ok'ej. Cäquil c'u na ri Rija'l winak petinak pa tak ri sutz' chicaj, petinak ruc' chuk'ab, nim u k'ij cäpetic." 
Matthew24:31 Quebutak na ri tako'nib aj chicaj ruc' nimalaj rok'ebal trompet. Quebumulij na ri e rech ri e u cha'om pa ri quiejeb u tza'm ri uwächulew, che ri jun u tza'm ri caj c'ä che ri jun chic." 
Matthew24:32 Chiwesaj i no'j chrij ri u che'al higo: Aretak quet'anar ri u k'ab, quebutuxisaj c'u u xak, iweta'm chi cäpe ri k'alaj." 
Matthew24:33 Jeri' xukuje' ri ix, aretak quiwil conojel we jastak ri', chich'obo' chi nakaj chic c'o wi ri q'uisbal, c'o chic chi' tak ri ja." 
Matthew24:34 Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi c'ä maja' casach qui wäch ri winak ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew camic, conojel we jastak ri' quec'ulmax na." 
Matthew24:35 Ri caj ulew casach na qui wäch. Are c'u ri nu tzij mawi jubik' casach u wäch. 
Matthew24:36 Are c'u we k'ij ri' xukuje' we jok'otaj ri', man c'o ta jun reta'm, mawi ri tako'nib ri e c'o chicaj, mawi ri C'ojolaxel; xak xuwi ri Tataxel reta'm." 
Matthew24:37 Je jas pa tak ri u k'ijol ri Noe, jeri' ri u petic ri Rija'l winak." 
Matthew24:38 Je jas pa tak ri k'ij ri', c'ä majok ri nimalaj k'ekal jäb, ri winak cätajin quewa'ic, cätajin quebuq'uianic, cätajin quec'uli'c, cätajin quequic'ulba' ri calc'ual, c'ä pa ri k'ij aretak ri Noe xoc pa ri nim jucub." 
Matthew24:39 Man quetam taj c'ä xpe na ri nimalaj k'ekal jäb, conojel c'ut xec'am bic rumal ri ja'. Jeri' xukuje' ri u petic ri Rija'l winak." 
Matthew24:40 E c'o c'u quieb pa ri juyub. Ri jun cäc'am na bic, ri jun chic cäya' canok." 
Matthew24:41 E quieb ixokib cätajin quequienic. Ri jun cäc'am bic, ri jun chic cäya' canok." 
Matthew24:42 Chixc'asc'at ba', rumal rech chi man iweta'm taj jachique k'ij ri cäpe na ri Iwajaw." 
Matthew24:43 Chich'obo' c'u wa', chi we ta ri rajaw ja cäretamaj jachique jok'otaj re ri waranic cäpe ri eläk'om, cäc'asc'at ta ri', ma ta cuya' ri' che ri e läk'om chi coc pa ri rachoch." 
Matthew24:44 Rumal ri', xukuje' ri ix chisuc'umaj iwib, rumal rech chi pa jun jok'otaj ri man quichomaj taj chi cäpetic, are chi' cäpe na ri Rija'l winak.”" 
Matthew24:45 “¿Jachin c'u ri jicalaj pataninel, utz u chomanic, ri xcoj rumal ri rajaw paquiwi' ri aj uwo rachoch che u ya'ic ri tzukbal quech pa ri qui k'ijol?" 
Matthew24:46 Utz re ri pataninel ri cäriktaj rumal ri rajaw aretak cäpetic, chi je cätajin cuban wa'." 
Matthew24:47 Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi ri rajaw cucoj na ri pataninel ri' paquiwi' conojel ri jastak re." 
Matthew24:48 We c'u ri itzel pataninel cuchomaj: ‘Ri wajaw cäbeytaj ri u petic.’ 
Matthew24:49 Cuchaplej c'u qui ch'ayic ri rach tak pataninelab, cäwa'ic, cuq'uian cuc' ri k'abarelab," 
Matthew24:50 cäpe na ri rajaw ri pataninel ri' pa jun k'ij ri man cäreyej taj. Cäpe pa jun jok'otaj ri man cuchomaj taj ri pataninel chi cäpetic. 
Matthew24:51 Ri rajaw cuc'äjisaj c'u na u wäch, cuya' na ri re cuc' ri xa' quieb qui wäch. Quebok' chila', cäquikuch'uch'ej ri qui ware.”" 
Matthew25:1 “Pa ri k'ij ri', ri rajawibal ri Dios cajunamataj na cuc' lajuj k'apojib ri quec'oji' pa jun c'ulanem. Xquic'am ri qui yabal k'ak', xebel bic che u c'ulaxic ri jiaxel." 
Matthew25:2 Job chque ri alitomab, utz qui chomanic. Ri e job chic man utz ta qui chomanic." 
Matthew25:3 Ri man utz ta qui chomanic xquic'am ri qui yabal k'ak', man xquic'am ta c'u bic niq'uiaj caseit chic." 
Matthew25:4 Are c'u ri utz qui chomanic xquic'am bic caseit chupam ri qui c'olbal k'ak' xukuje' niq'uiaj chic. 
Matthew25:5 Xbeytaj ri jiaxel. Xeyuxcat conojel, xewar c'ut." 
Matthew25:6 Pa niq'uiaj ak'ab, c'o jun winak xurak u chi': ‘Chiwilampe', petinak ri jiaxel. Chixel ulok che u c'ulaxic.’" 
Matthew25:7 Xewalij c'u conojel ri alitomab ri', xequisuc'umala' ri yabal qui c'olbal k'ak'." 
Matthew25:8 Ri man utz ta qui chomanic xquibij chque ri utz qui chomanic: ‘Chiya' ke ri iwaseit. Quechup c'u ri ka yabal k'ak'.’ 
Matthew25:9 Ri utz qui chomanic xquibij chque: ‘We ne man cubana' chke uj xukuje' chiwe ix. Are utz jix cuc' ri ajc'ayib, chilok'o' iwe.’" 
Matthew25:10 E benak c'u ri job alitomab che u lok'ic caseit aretak xpe can ri jiaxel. Are c'u ri qui suc'umam quib xeboc ruc' pa ri c'ulanem. Xtz'apix c'u ri uchi'ja. 
Matthew25:11 C'äte ri' xepe ri niq'uiaj alitomab chic, xquibij: ‘Kajaw, Kajaw, jaka' la ri uchi'ja chkawäch.’" 
Matthew25:12 Ri are xubij chque: Kastzij quinbij chiwe chi man weta'm ta i wäch. 
Matthew25:13 Chixc'asc'at ba', rumal rech chi man iweta'm taj jachique k'ij, mawi iweta'm jachique jok'otaj cäpe ri Rija'l winak.”" 
Matthew25:14 “Ri rajawibal ri Dios junam ruc' jun achi ri xbe naj, xebusiq'uij ri e pataninel rech, xujach can ri u rajil chquiwäch." 
Matthew25:15 Xuya' job rakan nimak tak puak che ri jun. Che ri jun chic xuya' quieb rakan nimak tak puak. Xuya' jun rakan nim puak che ri jun chic. Xuya' chque chquijujunal jas ri quecuin che u banic. Te c'u ri' xbe naj. 
Matthew25:16 Chanim c'ut ri xuc'am job rakan nimak tak puak xbec, xchacun chrij, xuch'äc chi job rakan nimak tak puak." 
Matthew25:17 Jewa' xukuje' ri xuc'am quieb rakan nimak tak puak, xuch'äc chi quieb." 
Matthew25:18 Are c'u ri xuc'am jun rakan nim puak, xel bic, xuc'ot jun jul pa ri ulew, xuc'u' ri u puak ri rajaw." 
Matthew25:19 E oc'owinak chic q'uialaj k'ij, xtzelej ulok ri cajaw ri pataninelab ri', xuban ajilanic cuc'." 
Matthew25:20 Ri xuc'am job rakan nimak tak puak xkeb ruc', xuc'am ulok job rakan nimak tak puak chic, xubij: ‘Wajaw, job rakan nimak tak puak xjach la chwe. Chilampe' la, job rakan nimak tak puak chic nu ch'äcom.’" 
Matthew25:21 Ri rajaw xubij che: ‘Utz, at utzalaj jicalaj pataninel. At jic ruc' ri jubik' ri xinya' can chawe. Nim na quinjach na pa a k'ab. Chatocok chatquicot c'u wuc'.’" 
Matthew25:22 Xukuje' ri xuc'am quieb rakan nimak tak puak xkeb ruc' ri rajaw, xubij: ‘Wajaw, quieb rakan nimak tak puak xjach la chwe. Chilampe' la, quieb rakan nimak tak puak chic nu ch'äcom.’" 
Matthew25:23 Ri rajaw xubij che: ‘Utz, at utzalaj jicalaj pataninel. At jic ruc' ri jubik' ri xinya' can chawe. Nim na quinjach na pa a k'ab. Chatocok chatquicot c'u wuc'.’" 
Matthew25:24 Ri xuc'am jun rakan nim puak xkeb ruc' ri rajaw, xubij: ‘Wajaw, quinch'ob wäch la, chi lal c'analaj achi. Weta'm chi cak'at la ri man xtic ta la. Weta'm chi camulij la ri man xjabuj ta la." 
Matthew25:25 Xinxe'j wib, xinbec, xinwawaj ri rajil la pa ri ulew. Chilampe' la, ri ech la ri'.’" 
Matthew25:26 Ri rajaw xubij che: ‘At itzel pataninel, sak'or. We aweta'm chi quink'at ri man xintic taj, chi quinmulij ri man xinjabuj taj," 
Matthew25:27 rumal ri' utz na xaya' ta ri nu puak chque ri c'olol tak puak, rech aretak xinpetic xinc'am ta ri' ri wech ruc' ral.’" 
Matthew25:28 Chiwesaj ba ri jun nim puak che, chiya' che ri c'o lajuj nimak tak puak ruc'." 
Matthew25:29 Ronojel c'u jachin ri c'o jas c'o ruc', c'o na ri cäyataj na che, cäq'uiyir na ri c'o ruc'. Ri man c'o ta jas c'o ruc', ri jubik' ri c'o ruc' quesax na che." 
Matthew25:30 Ri pataninel ri man c'o ta quechbex che, chiya' pa ri k'eku'm ri c'o apan jela'. Cok' na chila', cukuch'uch'ej na ri u ware.”" 
Matthew25:31 “Aretak cäpe ri Rija'l winak cuc' conojel ri e u tako'nib ri Dios, nim u k'ij cäpetic. C'äte ri' cät'uyi' na puwi' ri tem re ri u juluwem." 
Matthew25:32 Quemulix c'u na conojel ri nimak tak tinimit chuwäch. Quebutas na ri niq'uiaj chquixo'l ri jule' chic, je jas ri ajyuk' quebutas ri chij chquixo'l ri q'uisic'." 
Matthew25:33 Quebuya' na ri chij pa ri riquiak'ab. Are c'u ri q'uisic' quebuya' na pa ri u mox k'ab. 
Matthew25:34 Cubij c'u na ri Ajawinel chque ri e c'o pa ri riquiak'ab: ‘Tisaj, ix tewichi'm rumal ri nu Tat. Chiwechbej ri ajawibal ri suc'umam chiwe kas pa ri u tiquiritajic ri uwächulew." 
Matthew25:35 Rumal rech chi xinnumic, xiya' c'u jas xintijo. Xchaki'j nu chi', xiya' jas xinwuq'uiaj. Xinwonocatic, xinic'ulaj." 
Matthew25:36 Aretak in xint'unuwic, xinich'uku. Xinyawajic, xinisolij. Xinc'oji' pa che', xixopan wuc'.’" 
Matthew25:37 Ri e suc' cäquibij na che ri Ajawinel: ‘Kajaw, ¿jampa' ta xkil la chi xnum la, xkatzuk ta c'u la? ¿O xchaki'j ta chi' la, xkaya' ta c'ut jas xuq'uiaj la?" 
Matthew25:38 ¿Jampa' ta xkil la chi xwonocat la, xkacoj ta c'u la pa ja? ¿O xt'unuw ta la, xkach'uk ta c'u la?" 
Matthew25:39 ¿O jampa' ta xkil la chi xyawaj ta la, o xc'oji' ta la pa che', xujopan ta c'u che solixic la?’" 
Matthew25:40 Ri Ajawinel cubij na chque: ‘Kastzij quinbij chiwe chi ronojel ri xiban che jun chque we ch'utik tak wachalal ri', chwe in xiban wi.’" 
Matthew25:41 Ri Ajawinel cubij c'u na chque ri e c'o pa ri u mox k'ab: ‘Chixel chnuwäch, ix c'okom. Jix pa ri k'ak' ri man cächup taj ri suc'umam che ri itzel xukuje' ri e u tako'nib." 
Matthew25:42 Rumal rech chi xinnumic, man xiya' ta c'u jas xintijo. Xchaki'j nu chi', man xiya' taj jas xinwuq'uiaj." 
Matthew25:43 Xinwonocatic, man xinicoj ta c'ut pa ja. Xint'unuwic, man xinich'uk taj. Xinyawajic, xinc'oji' pa che', man xinisolij ta c'ut.’" 
Matthew25:44 Ri e are cäquibij na che ri Ajawinel: ‘Kajaw, ¿jampa' ta xkil la chi xnum la, o xchaki'j ta ri chi' la, o xwonocat ta la, o xt'unuw ta la, o xyawaj ta la, o xc'oji' ta la pa che', ma ta c'u xkapatanij la?’" 
Matthew25:45 Ri Ajawinel cubij na chque: ‘Kastzij quinbij chiwe chi ronojel ri man xiban ta che jun chque we ch'utik tak wachalal ri', chwe in ri' man xiban ta wi.’" 
Matthew25:46 Quebe c'u na wa' pa ri junalic c'äjisabal wäch. Are c'u ri e suc' quebe na pa ri junalic c'aslemal.” 
Matthew26:1 Ri Jesus, aretak xuq'uis ronojel we tzij ri', xubij chque ri u tijoxelab:" 
Matthew26:2 “Iweta'm chi pa quieb k'ij cäban ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem. Ri Rija'l winak cäjach c'u na rech cäripic.” 
Matthew26:3 Xepe c'u ri qui nimakil ri cojol tak tabal tok'ob e cachil ri nimak tak tatayib re ri tinimit. Xquimulij quib pa ri rachoch ri qui nimal ri cojol tak tabal tok'ob, ri Caipas." 
Matthew26:4 Xquiban chomanic ruc' subunic rech cäquichap ri Jesus che u cämisaxic. 
Matthew26:5 Xquibij: “Man pa ri nimak'ij taj, rech man quetuquin ta ri winak.”" 
Matthew26:6 C'o c'u ri Jesus pa Betan, cho rachoch ri Simon, ri xc'oji' ch'a'c chrij." 
Matthew26:7 Xopan jun ixok ruc', ri ruc'am jun lime't re je'lic abaj alabastr, c'o cunabal chupam c'oc' ruxlab, sibalaj pakal rajil. Xuk'ij pa ri u jolom ri Jesus aretak t'uyul pa ri mexa." 
Matthew26:8 Ri u tijoxelab, aretak xquilo, xpe coyowal, xquibij: “¿Jasche xsach u wäch wa'?" 
Matthew26:9 Xc'ayix ta ne wa' che nimalaj puak, xya' ta c'u chque ri mebayib.”" 
Matthew26:10 Xuta' c'u ri Jesus, xubij chque: “¿Jasche quiya' latz' che we ixok ri'? Utzil c'ut u banom chwe." 
Matthew26:11 Ronojel k'ij e c'o mebayib iwuc'. Ri in c'ut man ronojel k'ij taj in c'o iwuc'. 
Matthew26:12 Aretak c'ut xuya' we cunabal ri' chrij ri nu cuerp, che nu mukic u banom wi." 
Matthew26:13 Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi ronojel c'olbal ri cätzijox wi na we utzalaj tak tzij ri' cho ronojel ri uwächulew, chila' xukuje' cätzijox wi na jas ri xuban we ixok ri' chwe che natabal rech.”" 
Matthew26:14 Jun c'ut chque ri cablajuj, Judas Iscariot u bi', xbe cuc' ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tak tabal tok'ob." 
Matthew26:15 Xubij c'ut: “¿Joropa' cäya' alak chwe quinjach c'u ri Jesus pa k'ab alak?” Ri e are xquipaj juwinak lajuj (30) rakan sak puak che. 
Matthew26:16 Kas chi' c'u ri', ri Judas cutzucuj jun k'ij rech cujach ri Jesus pa qui k'ab." 
Matthew26:17 Pa ri nabe k'ij re ri u tijic ri caxlanwa ri man cäya' ta ch'am ruc', xekeb ri tijoxelab ruc' ri Jesus, xquibij che: “¿Jawije' caj wi la chi cakasuc'umaj wi ri u tijic ri wa'im re xk'ekal re ri oc'owem?”" 
Matthew26:18 Ri are xubij: “Jix pa ri tinimit ruc' jun achi ri quinbij chiwe. Chibij che: ‘Ri Kajtij cubij: Nakaj chic ri nu k'ijol. Cho awachoch quinwoc'owisaj wi na ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem cuc' ri e nu tijoxelab.’ ” 
Matthew26:19 Ri e u tijoxelab xquibano jas ri xetak wi rumal ri Jesus, xquisuc'umaj ri oc'owem." 
Matthew26:20 Xk'ekal chic, xt'uyi' ri Jesus pa ri mexa e rachil ri cablajuj." 
Matthew26:21 Cätajin quewa'ic, xubij: “Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi jun chiwe quinjachow na.”" 
Matthew26:22 Ri e are c'ut sibalaj quebisonic. Chquijujunal xquichaplej u ta'ic che: “¿La ma xa' in, Kajaw?”" 
Matthew26:23 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ri curub ri u wa wuc' pa ri lak, are ri' quinjachow na." 
Matthew26:24 Kastzij ri Rija'l winak cäbec, je jas ri tz'ibatal chrij. ¡Tok'ob c'u u wäch ri winak ri' ri cäjachowic! Are ta utz na che ri winak ri' we ta ma ta xalaxic.”" 
Matthew26:25 Xch'aw c'u ri Judas ri cäjachowic, xubij: “¿La ma xa' in, Ajtij?” Ri Jesus xubij che: “At atbininak.”" 
Matthew26:26 Aretak cätajin quewa'ic, ri Jesus xuc'am ri caxlanwa, xuya' maltioxinic che ri Dios, xupiro, xuya' que ri u tijoxelab, xubij: “Chic'ama', chitija'. Are nu cuerp wa'.”" 
Matthew26:27 Xukuje' xuc'am jun kumubal, xumaltioxij che ri Dios, xuya' que ri u tijoxelab, xubij chque: “Iwonojel chitija' iwe che." 
Matthew26:28 Are c'u nu quiq'uel wa' re ri c'ulwächinic. Ri nu quiq'uel cäturuw na rech cäsachtaj ri qui mac e q'ui winak. 
Matthew26:29 Quinbij chiwe, chi man quintij ta chiwe we u wa'l uva ri' c'ä pa ri k'ij aretak quintij chi na ri c'ac' iwuc' jumul chic pa ri rajawibal ri nu Tat.”" 
Matthew26:30 Aretak qui bixom chi jun bix, xebe pa ri qui juyubal tak ri u Che'al Aseitun." 
Matthew26:31 Xubij ri Jesus chque: “Pa we chak'abibal ri', iwonojel caquieblaj na i c'u'x chwij. Tz'ibatal c'ut: ‘Quinsoc na ri ajyuk', quetuquin c'u na ri jumulaj chij.’" 
Matthew26:32 Aretak in c'astajinak chic, quinnabej na chiwäch pa Galiley.”" 
Matthew26:33 Ri Lu' xubij che: “Pune' ta conojel cuban quieb qui c'u'x che la, ri in mawi ta jubik' cuban ta na quieb nu c'u'x che la.”" 
Matthew26:34 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Kastzij quinbij chawe chi pa we chak'ab ri', c'ä majok cok' ri ama' ec', oxmul cabij na chi man aweta'm ta nu wäch.”" 
Matthew26:35 Xubij ri Lu' che: “Pune' ta rajawaxic chi quincäm uc' la, mawi jubik' quinbij na chi man weta'm ta wäch la.” Junam xukuje' xquibij conojel ri tijoxelab." 
Matthew26:36 Ri Jesus e rachil ri u tijoxelab xebopan pa ri c'olbal Jetsemani u bi'. Xubij c'u chque: “Chixt'uyul can waral. Quinbe na apan jela' che ch'awem ruc' Dios.” 
Matthew26:37 Xuc'am bic ri Lu' xukuje' ri e quieb u c'ojol ri Zebedey. Ri Jesus xuchaplej nimalaj bis, xc'axc'ob ri ranima'." 
Matthew26:38 Xubij chque: “Sibalaj cäbison ri wanima' c'ä pa ri cämical. Chixcanaj can waral, chixc'asc'at wuc'.”" 
Matthew26:39 Ri Jesus xnabej apan jubik', xxuquic, xukasaj ri u palaj cho ri ulew. Xuban ch'awem ruc' Dios, xubij: “Nu Tat, we cuya'o, xak choc'ow we uq'uiabal re c'axc'olil ri' chwe. Man are ta c'ut jas ri quinwaj, xane' are jas ri caj la.”" 
Matthew26:40 Xopan c'u cuc' ri u tijoxelab, xeburika' cätajin quewaric. Xubij che ri Lu': “¿Jas wa'? ¿La ma ta xixcuinic xixc'asc'at ta jok'otaj wuc'?" 
Matthew26:41 Chixc'asc'atok, chibana' ch'awem ruc' Dios, rech man quixtzak taj aretak quixtakchi'x che mac. Ri iwanima' cäraj, are c'u ri i cuerp man c'o ta u chuk'ab.”" 
Matthew26:42 Ri Jesus chucamul xbec, xubana' chi jumul ch'awem ruc' Dios, xubij: “Nu tat, we man cuya' coc'ow we uq'uiabal re c'axc'olil ri', we rajawaxic quinwuq'uiaj, chban ba ri rayibal la.”" 
Matthew26:43 Xtzelej c'u cuc' ri u tijoxelab, cätajin quewar chi jumul. Quetz'apitaj c'u ri qui bak'wäch rumal ri qui waram." 
Matthew26:44 Ri Jesus xebuya' canok, xbe chi jumul, churoxmul xuban ch'awem ruc' Dios. Xa' junam ri tzij ri xubij." 
Matthew26:45 Xtzelej c'u cuc' ri u tijoxelab, xubij chque: “¿La c'ä cätajin quixwaric quixuxlan c'ut? Chiwilampe', chanim xurik ri jok'otaj. Ri Rija'l winak cäjach pa qui k'ab ajmaquib." 
Matthew26:46 ¡Chixwalijok! ¡Jo'! ¡Xpe ri jachal wech!” 
Matthew26:47 C'ä cätajin cäch'aw ri Jesus aretak xopan ri Judas, jun chque ri cablajuj. E rachil q'uialaj winak, cuc'am ch'ich', cuc'am che'. Ri e are e takom ulok cumal ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tak tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri nimak tak tatayib re ri tinimit." 
Matthew26:48 Ri jachal re u yo'm chi etal chque ri winak, xubij: “Jachin ri quintz'umaj, are ri'. Chichapa'.”" 
Matthew26:49 Chanim xkeb ruc' ri Jesus, xubij che: “Xoc ak'ab, Ajtij.” Xutz'umaj c'ut." 
Matthew26:50 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Wachil, chabana' ri at petinak che u banic.” Xekeb c'u ri winak ruc' ri Jesus, xquicoj qui k'ab chrij, xquichapo." 
Matthew26:51 Te c'u ri', jun chque ri e c'o ruc' ri Jesus xresaj ri u ch'ich', xusoc ri rajchac ri qui nimal ri cojol tak tabal tok'ob, xresaj ri u xiquin." 
Matthew26:52 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Chatzelej ri a ch'ich' pa ri c'olbal rech. Conojel c'ut ri cäquicoj ch'ich', che ch'ich' quecämisax wi." 
Matthew26:53 ¿La ma ta aweta'm chi quincuinic quinbochi'n che ri nu Tat, ri are c'ut chanim quebutak na ulok cablajuj nimak tak mulaj tako'nib aj chicaj che nu to'ic?" 
Matthew26:54 We ta c'u jewa', ¿jas ta cäban che u banic ri cubij ri Tz'ibatalic chi rajawaxic cäbantaj na?”" 
Matthew26:55 Pa ri jok'otaj ri', xubij ri Jesus chque ri winak: “¿La je ta ne chrij jun eläk'om ix elinak wi ulok, iwuc'am ch'ich', iwuc'am che', che nu chapic? Ronojel k'ij xint'uyi' iwuc', xintijon pa ri rachoch Dios, man xinichap ta c'ut." 
Matthew26:56 Ronojel c'u wa' cäbanic, rech cäbantajic jas ri tz'ibam can cumal ri e k'axal tak tzij.” C'äte ri', conojel ri u tijoxelab xquiya' canok, xebanimajic." 
Matthew26:57 E are c'ut ri xechapow ri Jesus, xquic'am bic chuwäch ri Caipas, ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob. Chila' qui mulin wi quib ri ajtijab re ri pixab cuc' ri nimak tak tatayib." 
Matthew26:58 Are c'u ri Lu' u terenem chi naj, c'ä xopan na cho rachoch ri qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob. Xoc bic, xt'uyi' cuc' ri pataninelab, che rilic ri cac'ulmataj na." 
Matthew26:59 Ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tak tabal tok'ob xukuje' conojel ri e comon re ri qui nimakil ri aj judeyib xequitzucuj winak che u bixic banoj tzij chrij ri Jesus, rech cäcämisaxic." 
Matthew26:60 Man c'o ta c'u u mac ri Jesus xquiriko, pune' e c'o q'uialaj winak ri xquibij banoj tzij chrij. Chuq'uisbalil xebopan quieb winak." 
Matthew26:61 Xquibij: “Xubij we achi ri': ‘Quincuin che u wulixic ri rachoch Dios, quincuin c'u che u yaquic pa oxib k'ij.’ ”" 
Matthew26:62 Xwalij ri qui nimal ri cojol tak tabal tok'ob, xubij che ri Jesus: “¿La ma ta c'o jas cabij che wa'? ¿Jas c'u wa' we k'alajisanic ri' ri cäquibij chawij?”" 
Matthew26:63 Ri Jesus c'ut man xch'aw taj. Ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xubij che: “Pa ri u bi' ri c'aslic Dios, rajawaxic cabij chke we at ri' ri Crist, ri u C'ojol ri Dios.”" 
Matthew26:64 Ri Jesus xubij che: “At atbininak. Quinbij c'u chawe, chi quiwil na ri Rija'l winak, t'uyul pa ri riquiak'ab ri Dios ri c'o ronojel u cuinem. Quiwil c'u na petinak pa ri sutz' chicaj.”" 
Matthew26:65 Are c'u ri qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob xujis ri ratz'iak, xubij: “¡We achi' cuc'ulelaj ri Dios! ¿La rajawaxic ta chic chi quepe niq'uiaj winak che u ya'ic k'alajisanic chrij? E i tom ri e u tzij ri quec'ulelanic." 
Matthew26:66 ¿Jas quichomaj?” Ri winak xquibij che: “C'o u mac. Takal che chi cäcämisaxic.” 
Matthew26:67 Xquichubaj c'u ri u palaj ri Jesus. Xquit'oc che k'ab. Niq'uiaj chic xquipak'ij k'ab chu palaj. 
Matthew26:68 Xquibij che: “Chabij chke Crist, jachin ri xatch'ayowic.”" 
Matthew26:69 Are c'u ri Lu' t'uyul apan cho ja. Xopan jun ali ruc' pataninel, xubij che: “Xukuje' ri at xatbin ruc' ri Jesus ri aj Galiley.”" 
Matthew26:70 Ri Lu' xresaj rib chupam chquiwäch conojel, xubij: “Man weta'm taj jas ri cabij.”" 
Matthew26:71 Aretak xel bic chuchi' ri ja, xilitaj chi rumal jun chic, ri xubij chque ri e c'o chila': “Xukuje' wa' xbin ruc' ri Jesus ri aj Nazaret.”" 
Matthew26:72 Jumul chic ri Lu' xresaj rib chupam, xuban jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na chi kastzij xcha: “Man weta'm ta u wäch ri achi.”" 
Matthew26:73 Oc'owinak chi jubik' ri e tac'atoj chila' xekeb ruc' ri Lu', xquibij che: “Kastzij xukuje' ri at at jun chque. Ri a ch'abal c'ut catk'alajisanic.”" 
Matthew26:74 Ri Lu' xuchaplej c'okonic, xuban jun chi'nic chi kastzij xcha': “Man weta'm ta u wäch we achi ri'.” Chanim ri ama' ec' xok'ic." 
Matthew26:75 Xnataj c'u che ri Lu' ri u tzij ri Jesus, ri xubij: “C'ä majok cok' ri ama' ec', oxmul cabij na chi man aweta'm ta nu wäch.” Xel c'u apanok ri Lu', xok' ruc' c'ayil." 
Matthew27:1 Aretak xsakaric, xepe conojel ri qui nimakil ri cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri nimak tak tatayib re ri tinimit. Xquichomala' jas cäquiban na che u cämisaxic ri Jesus." 
Matthew27:2 Xquiyut ri Jesus, xquic'am bic, xquijach pa u k'ab ri Pilat, ri k'atal tzij aj Rom." 
Matthew27:3 Are c'u ri Judas, ri xjachowic, xrilo chi xk'at tzij puwi' ri Jesus, xuq'uex c'u ri u chomanic, xutzelej ri juwinak lajuj rakan sak puak chque ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri nimak tak tatayib." 
Matthew27:4 Xubij: “C'o ri nu mac. Xinjach jun achi rech cäcämisaxic, ri man c'o ta u mac.” Ri e are c'ut xquibij: “¿Jas ke uj che? ¡At chatilowok!”" 
Matthew27:5 Ri Judas xuq'uiak can ri sak puak pa ri rachoch Dios. Xel bic, xbe che u jitz'axic rib." 
Matthew27:6 Ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xquic'am ri sak puak, xquibij: “Awas u ya'ic wa' pa ri c'olbal puak re ri rachoch Dios, rumal rech chi rajil quic'.”" 
Matthew27:7 Xquitala' c'u qui no'j chquibil tak quib. Xquicoj c'u ri puak che u lok'ic jun ulew ri rech ri banal bo'j, rech c'o jun ulew ri quemuk wi na ri man e aj chila' taj." 
Matthew27:8 Rumal ri' cäbix “Ulew re Quic'” che ri ulew ri' c'ä camic. 
Matthew27:9 Je xbantajic jas ri tzijom can rumal ri Jeremiy ri k'axal tzij aretak xubij: “Xquic'am ri juwinak lajuj rakan sak puak, ri rajil ri xk'at cumal ri aj israelib." 
Matthew27:10 Xquilok'obej re ri ulew ri rech ri banal bo'j, jas ri xinutak wi ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Matthew27:11 Ri Jesus xtaq'ui' chuwäch ri k'atal tzij. Ri k'atal tzij xuc'ot u chi': “¿La at ri' ri Cajawinel ri aj judeyib?” Ri Jesus xubij che: “Lal lal bininak.” 
Matthew27:12 Aretak ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri nimak tak tatayib xquitzujuj, ri Jesus man c'o ta jas xubij." 
Matthew27:13 Xubij c'u ri Pilat che: “¿La ma ta cata' conojel ri jastak ri cäquibij chawij?” 
Matthew27:14 Ri Jesus man xutzelej ta u wäch mawi jun tzujubal. Je c'u ri' ri k'atal tzij sibalaj xumayo. 
Matthew27:15 Pa ronojel nimak'ij ri k'atal tzij u nak'atisam u tzokopixic jun ajpache', ri caquicha' ri winak." 
Matthew27:16 C'o c'u jun ajpache' pa tak ri k'ij ri', ri etamatalic chi sibalaj itzel, Barabas u bi'." 
Matthew27:17 Aretak qui mulin quib ri winak, ri Pilat xubij chque: “¿Jachin ri quiwaj chi quintzokopij bic? ¿La are ri Barabas, o are ri Jesus ri cäbix Crist che?”" 
Matthew27:18 Reta'm c'u ri Pilat chi qui jachom ri Jesus xa' rumal rech quiäk rayinic. 
Matthew27:19 Aretak ri Pilat t'uyul puwi' ri tem jawije' cuk'at wi tzij, ri rixokil xtakan bic ruc' che u bixic che: “C'o jas maban che we suc'alaj achi ri'. Q'uialaj c'ax c'ut xinrik pa ichic' mier rumal rech ri are.”" 
Matthew27:20 Ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob cuc' ri nimak tak tatayib xquicoj qui c'u'x ri winak, rech cäquita' che ri Pilat chi are cätzokopix bic ri Barabas, cäcämisax c'u ri Jesus." 
Matthew27:21 Ri k'atal tzij xubij chi jumul chque ri winak: “¿Jachin chque ri quieb quiwaj chi quintzokopij bic chiwe?” Ri e are xquibij: “Ri Barabas.” 
Matthew27:22 Ri Pilat xubij chque: “¿Jas c'u quinban che ri Jesus ri cäbix Crist che?” Conojel xquibij: “¡Charipa'!” 
Matthew27:23 Xubij c'u ri Pilat: “¿Jas puch ri etzelal u banom?” Ri winak c'ut sibalaj xquirak qui chi', xquibij: “¡Charipa'!”" 
Matthew27:24 Ri Pilat aretak xrilo chi man c'o ta curechbej, xane' xban jun nimalaj tuquin ib. Xuc'am c'u ja', xuch'aj ri u k'ab chquiwäch ri winak, xubij: “Man quinweklej ta ri u quiq'uel we achi ri' ri man c'o ta u mac. Ix chixilowok.”" 
Matthew27:25 Conojel ri winak je xquibij wa': “¡Chkaj ri u quiq'uel pakawi' uj xukuje' paquiwi' ri kalc'ual!” 
Matthew27:26 Ri Pilat xutzokopij c'u bic ri Barabas, xuya' chque ri winak. Xtakan c'u che u ch'ayic ri Jesus. ¡Te c'u ri' xujach pa qui k'ab ri queripowic!" 
Matthew27:27 Ri e rajch'ojab c'ut ri k'atal tzij xquic'am bic ri Jesus pa ri ja re k'atbal tzij. Xquimulij ronojel ri juk'at ajch'ojab chrij ri Jesus. 
Matthew27:28 Xquesaj ri u k'u', xquicoj jun quiäk u k'u'." 
Matthew27:29 Xquipach'uj jun u corona re q'uix, xquiya' pa u jolom. Xquiya' jun aj pa u k'ab re ri u wiquiak'ab. Xexuqui' chuwäch, xquetz'bej u wäch, xquibij: “¡Nim u k'ij ri Cajawinel ri aj judeyib!”" 
Matthew27:30 Xquichubaj. Xquesaj c'u ri aj pa u k'ab xquik'osila' che ri u jolom. 
Matthew27:31 Aretak quetz'bem chi u wäch, xquesaj ri u k'u', xquicoj chi ri kas ratz'iak chrij. Xquic'am bic che u ripic." 
Matthew27:32 Aretak xebel bic, xquirik apan jun achi aj Siren, Simon u bi'. Xquicoj chuk'ab che rech cutelej bic ri u ripibal ri Jesus." 
Matthew27:33 Xebopan pa jun c'olbal Golgota u bi', ri cäbix “U Bakil Jolomaj” che." 
Matthew27:34 Te c'u ri', xquiya' u wa'l uva che yujam ruc' c'a. Ri Jesus xuna'o, man xraj ta c'ut xutijo." 
Matthew27:35 Aretak qui ripom chic, xiquijach ri ratz'iak chquiwäch ruc' taklebenic." 
Matthew27:36 C'äte ri' xet'uyic, xquichajij ri Jesus chila'." 
Matthew27:37 Cho ri ripibal puwi' ri u jolom tz'ibam wi jas rumal rech xcämisaxic: “Are wa' ri Jesus ri Cajawinel ri aj judeyib.” 
Matthew27:38 Xequirip c'u quieb eläk'omab ruc' ri Jesus. Xquirip jun pa ri u wiquiak'ab, xquirip ri jun chic pa ri u mox k'ab." 
Matthew27:39 Ri winak ri queboc'owic xquetz'bej u wäch. Caquisutisa' ri qui jolom. 
Matthew27:40 Xquibij: “At, ri cawulij ri rachoch Dios, pa oxib k'ij c'ut cayaco, chacolo awib. We at u C'ojol ri Dios, chatkaj ulok cho ri ripibal.”" 
Matthew27:41 Xukuje' ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, xukuje' ri ajtijab re ri pixab, cuc' ri nimak tak tatayib xquetz'bej u wäch." 
Matthew27:42 Xquibij: “Niq'uiaj winak chic xebucolo. Man cäcuin ta c'u che u colic rib. ¡Are c'ut ri Rajawinel ri Israel! Chkaj ulok camic cho ri ripibal, cujcojon c'u na che." 
Matthew27:43 Ri are u cu'bisam u c'u'x chrij ri Dios. Chesax rumal ri Dios camic cho ri ripibal, we utz ruc'. ‘In u C'ojol ri Dios’, xcha' c'ut.”" 
Matthew27:44 Xukuje' ri eläk'omab, ri e ripom ruc', xquiyok'o." 
Matthew27:45 Kas pa ri tiq'uil k'ij c'ä pa ri urox jok'otaj benak k'ij xk'ekumar ronojel ri uwächulew. 
Matthew27:46 Kas pa ri jok'otaj ri', ri Jesus xurak u chi' ruc' chuk'ab, xubij: “Eli, Eli, ¿lama sabactani?” Je quel cubij wa': “Nu Dios, nu Dios, ¿jasche xinya' la canok?”" 
Matthew27:47 Jujun chque ri e tac'atoj chila', xquito, xquibij: “Are cätajin cusiq'uij ri Eliy.”" 
Matthew27:48 Chanim jun chque aninak xbec, xuc'am jun wo's, xurub chupam ch'amalaj u wa'l uva, xuya' puwi' jun aj, xuya' ak'an che ri Jesus rech cutijo." 
Matthew27:49 Ri niq'uiaj chic xquibij: “Chaweyej na. Chkila' we cäpe ri Eliy che u colic.” 
Matthew27:50 Ri Jesus co xurak chi u chi' jumul, xcäm c'ut." 
Matthew27:51 Te c'u ri' ri tasbal u pam ri rachoch Dios xjixjobic. Ajsic xjixjob wi ulok, xkaj c'ä iquim quieb xubano. Xuban jun cabrakan. Ri nimak tak abaj xepak'inic." 
Matthew27:52 Ri mukubal xejaktajic. Xec'astaj c'u ri qui cuerp e q'ui tak winak aj Dios ri e cäminak chic. 
Matthew27:53 Xebel c'u bic jawije' ri e mukum wi aretak c'astajinak chic ri Jesus. Xeboc pa Jerusalen, ri tastalicalaj tinimit, xquic'utula' quib chquiwäch q'ui winak." 
Matthew27:54 Ri qui nimal ri jun sient ajch'ojab e rachil ri chajil tak re ri Jesus, aretak xquil ri cabrakan, aretak xquil ronojel ri xc'ulmaxic, sibalaj xquixe'j quib, xquibij: “Kastzij we achi ri' u C'ojol ri Dios.”" 
Matthew27:55 E c'o c'u chila' q'ui ixokib cätajin cäquica'yej chi naj, ri qui terenem ulok ri Jesus pa Galiley, qui patanim c'ut." 
Matthew27:56 C'o ri Mariy Magdalen chquixo'l. C'o ri Mariy qui nan ri Santiag xukuje' ri Jose. Xukuje' c'o ri qui nan ri u c'ojol ri Zebedey. 
Matthew27:57 Xk'ekal chic, xpe jun k'inom achi aj Arimatey, Jose u bi', are jun u tijoxel ri Jesus." 
Matthew27:58 Are wa' xopan ruc' ri Pilat, xutz'onoj c'ut ri u cuerp ri Jesus. Ri Pilat xtakan che u ya'ic che." 
Matthew27:59 Ri Jose xuc'am ri cuerp, xubolk'otij pa jun ch'ajch'ojalaj atz'iak." 
Matthew27:60 Ri Jose xuya' pa ri c'ac' u mukubal, ri u c'otom pa ri nimalaj abaj. Xuwolkotij can jun nimalaj abaj chuchi' ri mukubal, xbe c'ut." 
Matthew27:61 E c'o c'u chila' ri Mariy Magdalen rachil ri jun Mariy chic, e t'uyut'oj apan chuwäch ri mukubal." 
Matthew27:62 Chucab k'ij chic, oc'owinak chi ri k'ij aretak cäban u banic ronojel che ri k'ij re uxlanem, xepe ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob e cachil ri pariseyib. Xquimulij quib chuwäch ri Pilat." 
Matthew27:63 Xquibij che: “Tat, xnataj chke chi we subunel ri', aretak c'ä c'aslok, xubij: ‘E oc'owinak chi oxib k'ij quinc'astaj na chquixo'l ri cäminakib.’" 
Matthew27:64 Chatakan ba la che u chajixic ri mukum wi c'ä pa ri urox k'ij, rech man quepe ta ri u tijoxelab chak'ab, cäqueläk'aj bic ri u cuerp, cäquibij c'u chque ri winak: ‘Xc'astaj chquixo'l ri cäminakib.’ We jeri', ri q'uisbal subunic nim na chuwäch ri nabe.”" 
Matthew27:65 Ri Pilat xubij chque: “E c'o ajch'ojab chajinelab pa i k'ab. Jix. Utz chibana' che, jas ri utz quiwilo.”" 
Matthew27:66 Xebe c'ut. Utz xquiban che ri mukum wi: xquicoj retal ri abaj rech man c'o ta jun quesan bic xukuje' xecanaj canok ri ajch'ojab che u chajixic. 
Matthew28:1 Oc'owinak chic ri k'ij re uxlanem, aretak xsakaric pa ri nabe k'ij re ri uwuk k'ij, xebe ri Mariy Magdalen ruc' ri jun Mariy chic che rilic ri xmuk wi ri Jesus." 
Matthew28:2 Xak c'ätetal xuban jun nimalaj cabrakan, rumal rech chi jun tako'n re ri Ajawaxel xkaj ulok chicaj, xopanic, xresaj ri abaj chuchi' ri mukum wi ri Jesus, xt'uyi' c'u puwi'." 
Matthew28:3 Ri rilic je u banic jun caypa'. Sakloloj ri ratz'iak je jas ri sak tew. 
Matthew28:4 Ri ajch'ojab chajinelab xquixe'j quib chuwäch, xebirbitic, je ta ne ri xebux ta cäminakib." 
Matthew28:5 Xch'aw ri tako'n aj chicaj, xubij chque ri ixokib: “Mixe'j iwib. Weta'm chi are quitzucuj ri Jesus, ri xripic." 
Matthew28:6 Man c'o ta waral. C'astajinak chic je jas ri xubij. Tisaj. Chiliwila' ri c'olbal ri xya' wi ri Ajawaxel. 
Matthew28:7 Jix chanim. Chibij chque ri u tijoxelab chi xc'astaj chquixo'l ri cäminakib, canabej c'u na chiwäch pa Galiley. Chila' c'u quiwil wi na. Are wa ri rajawaxic u bixic chiwe.”" 
Matthew28:8 C'äte ri' ri ixokib xebel bic chuchi' ri mukubal, quixe'n quib xukuje' c'o nimalaj quicotemal pa canima'. Aninak xebe che u ya'ic u tzijol chque ri tijoxelab." 
Matthew28:9 Xuc'utuxtaj c'u rib ri Jesus chquiwäch, xuya' rutzil qui wäch. Ri ixokib xekeb ruc', xquichap ri rakan, xquik'ijilaj." 
Matthew28:10 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque: “Mixe'j iwib. Jix. Chiya' u tzijol chque ri wachalal, rech quebe pa Galiley. Chila' c'ut quinquil wi na.”" 
Matthew28:11 E benak chi c'u ri ixokib, jujun c'ut chque ri ajch'ojab chajinelab xebe pa ri tinimit. Xequiya' u tzijol chque ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ronojel ri jastak ri xc'ulmatajic." 
Matthew28:12 Ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xquimulij quib cuc' ri nimak tak tatayib, xebequitzijobej. Xequiya' c'u q'ui sak puak chque ri ajch'ojab." 
Matthew28:13 Xquibij chque: “Chibij: ‘Ri u tijoxelab xepe chak'ab, xqueläk'aj bic ri cäminak, aretak cätajin cujwaric.’" 
Matthew28:14 We cätataj c'u wa' rumal ri k'atal tzij, ri uj cakach'äc na. Jeri' mixe'j iwib, cäkabij na chi man c'o ta jas cäban chiwe.”" 
Matthew28:15 Ri ajch'ojab c'ut xquic'am ri sak puak, xquibano jas ri xbix chque. Are c'u we tzij ri' xesax u tzijol chquixo'l ri aj judeyib c'ä pa ri k'ij camic." 
Matthew28:16 Ri julajuj tijoxelab c'ut xebe pa Galiley, xebopan pa ri juyub ri xebutak wi ri Jesus." 
Matthew28:17 Aretak xquil ri Jesus, xquik'ijilaj. E c'o c'u jujun ri xuban quieb qui c'u'x." 
Matthew28:18 Xkeb ri Jesus cuc', xebuch'abej, xubij chque: “Ronojel takanic pa ri caj, ronojel takanic cho ri uwächulew yo'm pa nu k'ab." 
Matthew28:19 Rumal c'u ri', jix, chibana' tijoxelab chque ri winak pa conojel ri tinimit cho ri uwächulew. Chibana' qui bautism pa ri u bi' ri Tataxel, pa ri u bi' ri C'ojolaxel xukuje' pa ri u bi' ri Ruxlabal ri Dios." 
Matthew28:20 Chebitijoj che u nimaxic ronojel jas ri xixintak wi. Chiwilampe', in c'o iwuc' ronojel k'ij c'ä pa ri u q'uistajic ri uwächulew.”" 
Mark1:1 U tiquitajic ri utzalaj u tzijol ri Jesucrist, ri u C'ojol ri Dios." 
Mark1:2 Jas ri tz'ibam rumal ri Isaiy ri k'axal tzij: “Chawilampe', quintak bic ri nu tako'n chawäch, ri cusuc'umaj na ri a be."
