Mark1:3 C'o jun ch'abal ri curak u chi' pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, cubij: ‘Chisuc'umaj ri u be ri Ajawaxel, chisuc'umaj ri alaj tak u be.’ ”" 
Mark1:4 Xc'utun c'u ri Xuan pa ri chaki'j uwo sak xuya' k'alajisanic. Xubij chque ri winak chi chiquik'ila' quib quitanaba' qui banic tak ri macaj cheban ri qui bautism che u c'utic chi quiq'uexom qui c'u'x, quecuy c'u tak ri e qui mac rumal ri Dios." 
Mark1:5 E q'ui ri e aj Judey xukuje' e aj Jerusalen xebel ulok che u tatabexic. Quequik'alajisaj tak ri e qui mac, ri Xuan xebuban c'ut ri qui bautism pa ri nima' Jordan che u c'utic chi qui q'uexom qui c'u'x." 
Mark1:5 E q'ui ri e aj Judey xukuje' e aj Jerusalen xebel ulok che u tatabexic. Quequik'alajisaj tak ri e qui mac, ri Xuan xebuban c'ut ri qui bautism pa ri nima' Jordan che u c'utic chi qui q'uexom qui c'u'x." 
Mark1:6 Are c'u ri Xuan u cojom rismal camey che ratz'iak, räx tz'um ri u pas. Ri u wa ruq'uia' e sac' rachil juyubal räx cab." 
Mark1:7 Xtzijon c'ut, xubij: “C'o jun petinak chwij ri c'o na u cuinem chnuwäch in. Man takal ta chwe chi quinpachi che qui quiric ri e u c'amal ri u xajäb." 
Mark1:8 In quink'alajisaj chi xquiq'uex qui c'u'x aretak xebenban ri qui bautism pa ri ja'; ri cätajin cakepetic quebucoj na pa ri Ruxlabal ri Dios.” 
Mark1:9 Pa tak ri k'ij ri', ri Jesus xel ulok pa Nazaret re Galiley. Xban c'u ri u bautism pa ri nima' Jordan rumal ri Xuan." 
Mark1:10 Pa ri jok'otaj aretak xel ulok chupam ri ja', ri Jesus xrilo chi xejaktaj ri caj, ri Uxlabaxel xkaj ulok puwi', je ta ne u banic jun palomax." 
Mark1:11 Xtataj c'u jun ch'abal chicaj ri xubij: “At ri' ri lok'alaj nu C'ojol, sibalaj quinquicot awuc'.”" 
Mark1:12 Chanim ri Uxlabaxel xuc'am bic ri Jesus pa ri chaki'j uwo sak. 
Mark1:13 Xc'oji' cawinak k'ij pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, xtakchi'x che mac rumal ri Satanas. Xc'oji' cuc' ri juyubal tak awaj. Cäpatanix c'u cumal ri tako'nixelab aj caj." 
Mark1:14 Cojom c'u ri Xuan pa che', ri Jesus xbe pa Galiley, xutzijoj ri utzalaj tak u tzij ri Dios chque ri winak." 
Mark1:15 Xubij: “Xtz'akat ronojel, xopan ri k'ij. Nakaj chic c'o wi ri rajawibal ri Dios. Chiq'uexa' i c'u'x, chixcojon che ri utzalaj tak u tzij.”" 
Mark1:16 Xoc'ow c'u ri Jesus chuchi' ri cho re Galiley. Chila' xril wi ri Simon rachil ri Trix ri rachalal. Ri e are' cätajin cäquiq'uiak ri c'at chapbal cär pa ri cho, e chapal tak cär c'ut." 
Mark1:17 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chixteren chwij, quinban c'u na chi quixux chapal tak winak.”" 
Mark1:18 Chanim xequiya' can ri qui c'at, xquiterenej." 
Mark1:19 Oc'owinak chi c'u apan jubik', ri Jesus xril ri Santiag (u c'ojol ri Zebedey) rachil ri Xuan ri rachalal. E c'o pa jun jucub, quequic'ojoj ri qui c'at." 
Mark1:20 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij. Ri e are' xquiya' can ri qui tat, ri Zebedey, pa ri jucub e rachil ri rajchaquib, xebe ruc' ri Jesus." 
Mark1:21 Xebopan pa Capernaum. Pa ri k'ij re uxlanem, ri Jesus xoc pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab, cätijon c'u chila'." 
Mark1:22 Ri winak xquimay ri u tijonic, rumal rech chi quebutijoj ruc' takanic. Man junam ta ruc' ri cäquiban ri ajtijab re ri pixab." 
Mark1:23 C'o c'u apan pa ri ja ri caquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab, jun achi ri c'o jun itzel uxlabal che. Ri xurak u chi'," 
Mark1:24 xubij: “¿Jas awe chke, Jesus aj Nazaret? ¿La at petinak che u sachic ka wäch? In quinch'ob a wäch, weta'm c'ut chi at ri Tastalic rumal ri Dios.”" 
Mark1:25 Ri Jesus xuyaj ri itzel uxlabal, xubij: “Chatz'apij u pa chi'. Chatel che ri achi.”" 
Mark1:26 Ri itzel uxlabal xuyäcya' ri achi, xurakakej u chi', xel bic che." 
Mark1:27 Conojel xquimayo, xquixe'j quib. Jeri' chi xquic'otola' qui chi', xquibij: “¿Jas wa'? ¡Are' cuya' jun c'ac' tijonic, c'o takanic pa u k'ab! ¡Cätakan paquiwi' ri itzel tak uxlabal, queniman c'u che!”" 
Mark1:28 Chanim xel u tzijol ri Jesus pa ronojel c'olbal ri c'o chunakaj ri Galiley. 
Mark1:29 Chanim xebel bic ri Jesus pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Xopan cho cachoch ri Simon xukuje' ri Trix, e rachilam c'u ri Santiag xukuje' ri Xuan." 
Mark1:30 Ri u ji' chuchu' ri Simon kajinak pa ch'at, c'o nimalaj k'ak' chrij. Chanim c'ut xquitzijoj ri yawab che ri Jesus." 
Mark1:31 Ri Jesus xkeb ocok ruc' ri chuchu', xuchap che ri u k'ab, xuwalijisaj. Chanim xtäni' ri k'ak' chrij, xuchaplej c'u qui patanixic." 
Mark1:32 Aretak xk'ekal chic, kajem cuban ri k'ij, xec'am ulok chuwäch ri Jesus conojel ri yawabib xukuje' ri winak ri c'o itzel tak uxlabal chque." 
Mark1:33 Conojel ri aj tinimit xquimulij quib chuchi' ri ja. 
Mark1:34 Ri Jesus xebucunaj q'ui yawabib ri e c'o q'ui qui wäch yabilal chque. Xeresaj bic e q'ui itzel tak uxlabal. Man cuya' ta c'u chque ri itzel tak uxlabal chi quech'awic, rumal rech chi queta'm u wäch." 
Mark1:35 Sibalaj ak'ab ri Jesus xwalijic, c'ä majok cäsakaric. Xel bic, xbe pa jun c'olbal cätz'inowic, xuban ch'awem ruc' Dios chila'." 
Mark1:36 Ri Simon cuc' ri rachil xequitzucuj ri Jesus. 
Mark1:37 Xequirika', xquibij che: “Cätzucux la cumal conojel ri winak.”" 
Mark1:38 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Jo' pa jule' tak c'olbal chic ri c'o nakaj, che u ya'ic we tijonic ri' chque ri winak ri e c'o chila'. Che c'u wa' in petinak wi.”" 
Mark1:39 Xbin pa ronojel Galiley, xtzijon pa tak ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab, xeresaj itzel tak uxlabal chque ri winak." 
Mark1:40 Xpe jun achi c'o ch'a'c chrij, xopan ruc' ri Jesus. Xxuqui' chuwäch, xubochi'j, xubij che: “We caj la, cäcuin la che nu cunaxic rech quinux ch'ajch'oj.”" 
Mark1:41 Ri Jesus xel u c'u'x che, xuyuk ri u k'ab, xuchap ocok, xubij: “Quinwaj, chatux ch'ajch'oj.”" 
Mark1:42 Chanim xel ri ch'a'c che, xux ch'ajch'oj." 
Mark1:43 Ri Jesus sibalaj xupixbej ri achi, xutak bic," 
Mark1:44 xubij che: “Chawila' c'o jas mabij che jachin jun. Xane' jät, chac'utu' awib chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob. Chaya' ri sipanic ri xtakan wi ri Moises che k'alajisanic chquiwäch chi at ch'ajch'oj chic.”" 
Mark1:45 Aretak elinak chi bic ri achi, sibalaj xutzijoj ri xbanic. Je c'u ri' ri Jesus man cäcuin ta chic coc bic chi sakil pa tak ri tinimit, xane' cacanaj can chquij tak ri tinimit pa tak c'olbal ri man e c'o ta wi winak. Xebel c'u ulok ri winak pa conojel tak tinimit, che rilic." 
Mark2:1 E oc'owinak chic quieb oxib k'ij, ri Jesus xopan chic pa Capernaum. Xak xuwi' c'u xetamatajic chi c'o cho jun ja." 
Mark2:2 Chanim xquimulij quib q'ui winak, jeri' chi man c'o ta chi c'olbal chque, mawi ne chuchi' ri ja. Ri Jesus cutzijoj c'u ri u tzij ri Dios chque." 
Mark2:3 Xepe c'u quiejeb achijab, qui telem ulok jun cäminak u cuerp chuwäch ri Jesus, e quiejeb ri e teleninak ulok." 
Mark2:4 Man xecuin ta c'ut xekeb chuwäch ri Jesus, rumal rech chi e q'ui ri winak e c'olic. Xquesaj apan jubik' u wi' ri ja ri c'o wi, xquiban jun jul, xquikasaj bic ri yawab ri c'o pa jun ch'atum che'." 
Mark2:5 Xril c'u ri Jesus ri qui cojonic, xubij che ri achi ri cäminak u cuerp: “Nu c'ojol, ri a mac e cuyutajinak.”" 
Mark2:6 E t'uyut'oj c'u chila' jujun chque ri ajtijab re ri pixab. Ri e are' xechoman pa canima': 
Mark2:7 “¿Jasche je cätzijon wa'? Cuc'ulelaj ri Dios. ¿Jachin ta lo ri cäcuinic cuya' sachbal mac, xane' xak xuwi ri Dios?”" 
Mark2:8 Xretamaj c'u ri Jesus pa ri ruxlabal ri qui chomanic ri ajtijab pa canima', xubij chque: “¿Jasche je quichomaj wa' pa iwanima'?" 
Mark2:9 ¿Jachique ri man c'ax taj, ri u bixic che ri cäminak u cuerp: ‘Ri a mac e sachtajinak,’ o ri u bixic: ‘Chatwalijok, chawalijisaj ri a pop, chatbinok?’" 
Mark2:10 Rech ba' quiwetamaj chi ri Rija'l Winak c'o takanic pa u k'ab che u sachic qui mac ri winak cho ri uwächulew, xubij c'u che ri achi ri cäminak u cuerp:" 
Mark2:11 ‘Quinbij chawe: Chatwalijok, chawalijisaj bic ri a pop, jät cho awachoch.’ ”" 
Mark2:12 Chanim c'ut xwalijic, xuwalijisaj ri u pop, xel bic chquiwäch conojel. Jeri' chi conojel xquimayo, xquixe'j quib. Xquinimarisaj u k'ij ri Dios xquibij: “Mawi jumul je kilom wa'.”" 
Mark2:13 Ri Jesus xbe chi jumul chuchi' ri cho. Xenakajin q'uialaj winak ruc' xuchaplej c'u qui tijoxic. 
Mark2:14 Oc'owem cubano, xril ri Levi (u c'ojol ri Alpey) t'uyul jawije' ri cätoj wi alcabal. Ri Jesus xubij che: “Chinaterenej.” Xwalij c'u ri Levi, xuterenej." 
Mark2:15 Xc'ulmataj c'ut chi ri Jesus c'o pa wa'im pa ri rachoch ri Levi. E q'ui tok'il tak alcabal xukuje' e jule' tak ajmaquib chic e c'o ruc' ri Jesus pa ri mexa e rachil ri e u tijoxelab. E q'ui c'ut ri qui terenem ri Jesus. 
Mark2:16 Ri ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' ri pariseyib, aretak xquilo chi ri Jesus cäwa' cuc' “aj maquib” xukuje' tok'il tak alcabal, xquibij chque ri u tijoxelab: “¿Jasche cäwa' ri Jesus cuc' tok'il tak alcabal xukuje' ‘aj maquib’?”" 
Mark2:17 Ri Jesus aretak xuta' wa, xubij chque: “Ri winak ri e utz man rajawaxic ta ajcun chque, xane' ri c'o yabil chque. Man in petinak taj che qui siq'uixic ri e suc', xane' in petinak che qui siq'uixic ajmaquib.”" 
Mark2:18 Ri u tijoxelab ri Xuan Bautist xukuje' ri qui tijoxelab ri pariseyib man cätajin ta cäquitij qui wa. Xebopan c'u jujun winak ruc' ri Jesus, xquibij che: “Ri u tijoxelab ri Xuan xukuje' ri qui tijoxelab ri pariseyib man cäquitij ta qui wa. ¿Jas c'u che ri tijoxelab la man je ta cäquibano?”" 
Mark2:19 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La cuya' puch man cäquitij ta qui wa ri e siq'uim pa jun c'ulanem? Aretak c'o ri achajilaxel, man cuya' taj quewa'ic ri e rula'." 
Mark2:20 “Copan c'u na jun k'ij aretak quesax ri achajilaxel chquixo'l, c'äte ri' pa ri k'ij ri' man cätijow ta wa." 
Mark2:21 Man c'o ta jun cut'is jun c'ac' c'ojbal che jun k'e'l atz'iak. We ta jeri', ri c'ac' c'ojbal cäresaj bic jubik' che ri k'e'l atz'iak, cänimar c'u ri u tek'tobic." 
Mark2:22 Man c'o ta jun ri cuya' c'ac' u wa'l uva pa k'e'l tak tz'um. We ta jeri', ri c'ac' u wa'l uva quebut'ubij ri' ri k'el tak tz'um, cäsach c'u na u wäch ri' ri u wa'l uva, xukuje' tak ri tz'um. Xane' cäya' ri c'ac' u wa'l uva pa c'ac' tak tz'um.”" 
Mark2:23 Pa jun k'ij re uxlanem, xoc'ow ri Jesus pa tak ri tico'n. Ri u tijoxelab c'ut xquichaplej qui ch'upic u jolom trico." 
Mark2:24 Ri pariseyib xquibij c'u che ri Jesus: “Chawilampe', ¿jasche cäquiban ri awas u banic pa ri k'ij re uxlanem?”" 
Mark2:25 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La mawi jumul i siq'uim jas xuban ri David ojer aretak xeq'uetetic, xnumic xukuje' ri e rachil?" 
Mark2:26 Xoc ri David pa ri rachoch Dios aretak ri Abiatar are qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob, xutij ri caxlanwa ri yo'm chuwäch ri Dios, xuya' c'u quech ri e rachil. Ri awas cäquitijo, rumal rech chi xak xuwi chque ri cojol tak tabal tok'ob ya'tal wi u tijic.”" 
Mark2:27 Xukuje' xubij chque: “Ri k'ij re uxlanem xban rumal quech ri winak. Man are ta xeban ri winak che ri k'ij re uxlanem. 
Mark2:28 Jeri' ri Rija'l Winak c'o xukuje' u takanic puwi' ri k'ij re uxlanem.” 
Mark3:1 Ri Jesus xoc chi bic jumul pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. C'o c'u jun achi chila' chaki'jarinak jun u k'ab. 
Mark3:2 Cäquil c'ut ri cuban na ri Jesus, we cucunaj ri achi pa ri k'ij re uxlanem. We jeri', c'o caquitzujubej rech." 
Mark3:3 Ri Jesus xubij che ri achi ri chaki'j u k'ab: “Chatwalijok. Chatc'ol pa ka niq'uiajil.” 
Mark3:4 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque ri winak: “¿La cuya' cäban utzil pa ri k'ij re uxlanem o cäban etzelal? ¿La utz ri cäcol ri u c'aslemal jun winak o cäcämisaxic?” Ri e are' c'ut man xech'aw taj. 
Mark3:5 Xpe royowal ri Jesus chque, xebuca'yej ri winak ri e c'o pa tak u xcut. Xk'oxow ri ranima', rumal rech chi sibalaj co ri canima'. Xubij che ri achi: “Chayuku' ri a k'ab.” Ri achi xuyuku, ri u k'ab c'ut xcunatajic." 
Mark3:6 Chanim xebel bic ri pariseyib, xquichomaj cuc' ri aj herodianib jas cäquiban che u cämisaxic ri Jesus." 
Mark3:7 Are c'u ri Jesus xbe apan chuchi' ri cho e rachilam ri e u tijoxelab. 
Mark3:8 Terenetal c'u cumal q'uialaj winak kas pa Galiley, aj Judey, aj Jerusalen xukuje' aj Idumey. E petinak ch'käp che ri nima' Jordan, e petinak chquinakaj tak ri tinimit Tir xukuje' Sidon. Sibalaj e q'ui ri winak, qui tom ronojel jas ri cuban ri Jesus, xebopan c'u ruc'." 
Mark3:8 Terenetal c'u cumal q'uialaj winak kas pa Galiley, aj Judey, aj Jerusalen xukuje' aj Idumey. E petinak ch'käp che ri nima' Jordan, e petinak chquinakaj tak ri tinimit Tir xukuje' Sidon. Sibalaj e q'ui ri winak, qui tom ronojel jas ri cuban ri Jesus, xebopan c'u ruc'." 
Mark3:9 Xubij chque ri u tijoxelab chi xak chc'ol jun jucub che, rech man cäpitz' ta cumal ri q'uialaj winak." 
Mark3:10 Xebucunaj e q'ui winak, jeri' chi conojel ri yawabib caquich'iquimila' quib che u chapic ri Jesus." 
Mark3:11 Ri itzel tak uxlabal, aretak xquil ri Jesus, xexuqui' chuwäch, xquirak qui chi', xquibij: “At ri' ri u C'ojol ri Dios.”" 
Mark3:12 Ri Jesus c'ut xebutako chi mäquik'alajisaj chquiwäch ri winak jachin ri are'. 
Mark3:13 Ri Jesus xpaki' cho ri juyub, xebusiq'uij jachin tak ri xraj, xebopan c'u ruc'." 
Mark3:14 Xebucha' cablajuj takomxenlab, rech quec'oji' ruc', quebutak bic che u tzijoxic ri u tzij chque ri winak, ri xucoj takomxenlab che qui bi'," 
Mark3:15 rech cuya' takanic pa qui k'ab che quesaxic itzel tak uxlabal. 
Mark3:16 Are' c'u wa' ri cablajuj ri xebucha'o. Ri Simon ri xucoj Lu' che ucab u bi'; 
Mark3:17 ri Santiag u c'ojol ri Zebedey, ri Xuan ri rachalal, ri Jesus xucoj Boanerjes che ucab qui bi', (quel cubij wa' chi e je jas ri cakulja);" 
Mark3:18 ri Trix, ri Pelip, ri Bartolome, ri Matey, ri Max, ri Santiag u c'ojol ri Alpey, ri Tadey, ri Simon re ri juk'at cananeyib," 
Mark3:19 xukuje' ri Judas Iscariot ri jachal re ri Jesus. 
Mark3:20 Xoc c'ut ri Jesus cho jun ja e rachil ri u tijoxelab. Jumul chic xquimulij quib q'uialaj winak cuc', jeri' chi mawi ne quecuin che u tijic qui wa." 
Mark3:21 Aretak xquita' ri rachalal ri Jesus, xebe ruc' che u chapic, cäquibij c'ut: “Are' ch'ujirinak.”" 
Mark3:22 Ri ajtijab re ri pixab ri e kajinak ulok pa Jerusalen, cäquibij chi c'o ri Beelzebu ruc'. Cäquibij chi queresaj itzel tak uxlabal rumal ri qui nimal ri itzel tak uxlabal." 
Mark3:23 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij, xubij chque pa c'ambal tak no'j: “¿La cuya' lo chi ri Satanas cäresaj bic ri Satanas?" 
Mark3:24 We c'o jun ajawibal quieb u banom cuc'ulela' c'u rib we ajawibal ri', man cäcuin ta ri' cajeki'c." 
Mark3:25 We c'o jun ja winak quieb u banom cuc'ulela' c'u rib, man cäcuin ta ri' cajeki'c." 
Mark3:26 We ta u tasom rib ri Satanas, cäch'ojin ta c'u ri' chrij chbil rib, ma ta cäcuin ri' cäjekic, xane' cäsach ta u wäch ri'." 
Mark3:27 Man cäcuin ta jun coc pa rachoch jun achi ri c'o u chuk'ab, quebutokij ri jastak rech, we ta ma ta nabe cuyut na ri achi ri c'o u chuk'ab. C'äte ri' cutokij ri jastak ri c'o pa rachoch." 
Mark3:28 Quinjiquiba' u bixic chiwe chi ri Dios cuya' na ri sachbal macaj chque ri winak chque conojel ri qui mac xukuje' ronojel ri lawaloyil ri caquibij; 
Mark3:29 are' c'ut ri cuyok' ri Ruxlabal re ri Dios mawi jumul cusach na u mac, cacanaj ajchak'mac chbe k'ij sak.”" 
Mark3:30 Ri Jesus xubij wa' rumal rech chi ri e are' caquijiquiba' u bixic chi c'o jun tz'ilalaj uxlabal ruc'. 
Mark3:31 Xepe c'u ri rachalal xukuje' ri u nan ri Jesus, e tac'atoj apan cho ja. Xetakan che u siq'uixic." 
Mark3:32 Ri Jesus sutim rij cumal ri q'uialaj winak ri e t'uyut'oj, xbix c'u che: “Chawilampe', ri a nan e rachil ri awachalal e c'o apan cho ja, catquitzucuj.”" 
Mark3:33 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿Jachin ri nu nan? ¿Jachin tak ri wachalal?” 
Mark3:34 Xebuca'yej ri winak ri e t'uyut'oj pa tak u xcut, xubij: “Chebiwilampe' ri nu nan xukuje' ri e wachalal." 
Mark3:35 Apachin ri cuban ri u rayibal ri Dios, are ri' ri wachalal, ri wana'b, xukuje' ri nu nan.”" 
Mark4:1 Jumul chic ri Jesus xuchaplej tijonic chuchi' ri cho. Xquimulij quib q'uialaj winak ruc'. Jeri' chi xoc bic pa jun jucub puwi' ri cho, xt'uyi' c'u chupam. Conojel c'u ri winak e c'o cho ri ulew chuchi' ri cho." 
Mark4:2 Xebutijoj che q'ui jastak pa c'ambal tak no'j. Xubij chque pa ri u tijonic: 
Mark4:3 “Chitatabej ri nu tzij. Chiwilampe', xel bic jun ticol ija', xeticonijok." 
Mark4:4 Aretak cätajin cäjopinic, jubik' che ri ija' xkaj pa ri be. Xepe c'u ri chicop ri c'o qui xic', xelquitija'." 
Mark4:5 Jubik' chic xkaj chuxo'l tak ri abaj, ri man c'o ta wi q'ui ulew. Chanim xq'uiy ri ija' ri', man pim ta c'ut ri ulew." 
Mark4:6 Aretak c'u xel ulok ri k'ij, xc'atic, xbayuk'aric, rumal rech chi man c'o ta u c'amal benak pa ri ulew." 
Mark4:7 Jubik' chi ija' xkaj pa tak q'uix. Xebel ulok ri q'uix, xquijik'isaj ri ija', man xwächin ta c'ut." 
Mark4:8 Jubik' chi ija' xkaj pa utzalaj ulew. Xel ulok, xq'uiyic, xwächinic. E c'o jujun ija' ri xquiya' juwinak lajuj (30) qui wäch, jujun xquiya' oxc'al (60) qui wäch, jujun chic xquiya' jun sient (100) qui wäch.”" 
Mark4:9 Xubij c'ut ri Jesus: “Apachin ri c'o u xiquin, chutatabej wa'.”" 
Mark4:10 Aretak c'u ri Jesus xcanaj u tuquiel cuc' ri cablajuj xukuje' jujun cachil chic, ri e are' xquic'ot u chi' chrij ri c'ambal no'j." 
Mark4:11 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Yo'm chiwe ix ri qui ch'obic ri jastak re ri rajawibal ri Dios ri man etamatal taj nabe canok. Chque c'u ri niq'uiaj winak chic, ronojel cäbix chque pa c'ambal tak no'j," 
Mark4:12 rech aretak queca'yic, man cäquil taj, aretak quetanic, cäquita', man cäquich'ob taj, rech man cäquitzolk'omij ta quib; man cäsachtaj ta c'u ri qui mac.”" 
Mark4:13 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La ma ta quich'ob we c'ambal no'j ri'? ¿Jas c'u quiban che qui ch'obic conojel ri c'ambal tak no'j? 
Mark4:14 Ri ticol ija' are cubij ri winak ri cäquitzijoj ri tzij. 
Mark4:15 Ri ija' ri xekaj pa ri be, are cubij ri winak ri cäquitatabej ri tzij. Aretak qui tom chic, cäpe ri Satanas che resaxic ri tzij ri xtic pa canima'." 
Mark4:16 Junam xukuje' ri ija' ri xkaj pa tak abaj. Ri e are', aretak qui tom chic ri tzij, cäquicoj ruc' quicotemal." 
Mark4:17 Man c'o ta c'u qui c'amal benak pa ri ulew, xane' xa quieb oxib k'ij cäquich'ijo. Aretak c'ut cäquirik c'ax o quebokatax rumal rech ri tzij, chanim quetzakic." 
Mark4:18 Niq'uiaj ija' chic ri xkaj pa tak ri q'uix, are cubij ri winak ri cäquitatabej ri tzij," 
Mark4:19 are c'u queboc il chque ri jastak aj uwächulew, quesub rumal ri k'inomal, cäquirayij q'ui jastak chic, benak c'u qui c'u'x cuc'. Cäjik'isax ri tzij rumal ronojel wa', man quewächin taj." 
Mark4:20 Ri ija' ri xkaj pa utzalaj ulew, are cubij ri winak ri cäquitatabej ri tzij, cäquicojo, cäquiya' qui wächinic. E c'o jujun ri cäquiya' juwinak lajuj (30) qui wäch. Jujun chic cäquiya' oxc'al (60) qui wäch. Niq'uiaj chic cäquiya' jun sient (100) qui wäch.”" 
Mark4:21 Te c'u ri' xubij chque: “¿La cätzij jun chäj rech cäya' chuxe' jun t'uy, o chuxe' ri ch'at? ¿La ma ta cätzij ri chäj rech cäya' chicaj?" 
Mark4:22 Ronojel ri c'u'talic cäk'alajisax na; ronojel ri awatalic quel na chi sak. 
Mark4:23 We c'o jun ri c'o u xiquin, chutatabej wa'.”" 
Mark4:24 Xukuje' xubij chque: “Chicojo' retal jas ri quito: Jas ri pajbal xicoj ix cuc' niq'uiaj winak chic, je cäcoj na chiwe. Cäya' c'u na jubik' u wi' chiwe ix ri quitatabej ri nu tzij." 
Mark4:25 Apachin ri c'o jas c'o ruc', cäyataj chi na niq'uiaj che. Apachin ri man c'o ta c'o ruc', c'ä quesax c'u ne na che ri jubik' ri c'o ruc'.”" 
Mark4:26 Xukuje' xubij ri Jesus: “Jewa' ri rajawibal ri Dios, je jas jun winak ri cujopij ija' pa ri rulew." 
Mark4:27 Cäwar c'u chak'ab, xukuje' cäwalij pa k'ij, je cubano ronojel k'ij. Cätux c'u ri ija', cäq'uiyic. Ri winak c'ut man cuch'ob taj jas cubano cäq'uiyic." 
Mark4:28 Pa re wi cäwächin ri ulew: nabe quel ulok ri tuxaj, te c'u ri' ri äj, c'äte ri' ri jolomaj quechomakir c'ut ri u wäch ri jolomaj." 
Mark4:29 Aretak c'o chi ri u wächinic, chanim ri winak cucoj jos che, xopan c'u ri u k'ijol ri k'atoj.”" 
Mark4:30 Xukuje' ri Jesus xubij: “¿Jas ruc' cäkajunamaj wi ri rajawibal ri Dios? ¿Ruc' jachique c'ambal no'j cäkaya' wi chi sakil? 
Mark4:31 Are je jas jun u wäch moxtansa. Aretak cätic pa ri ulew, are ch'utin na chquiwäch conojel ri ija' ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew." 
Mark4:32 Aretak tictajinak chic, quel ulok, cux na nim chquiwäch conojel ri ichaj; quenimakir tak ri e u k'ab, jeri' chi ri chicop ri c'o qui xic' quepa'nic, quemujan chupam.”" 
Mark4:33 Cumal q'ui c'ambal no'j je tak wa' ri Jesus cutzijoj ri tzij chque, jas ri quecuin che u ch'obic." 
Mark4:34 Man xebutzijobej taj ri ma ta cuc' c'ambal tak no'j. Cuk'alajisaj c'u ronojel chquiwäch ri e u tijoxelab pa qui tuquiel wi. 
Mark4:35 Pa ri k'ij ri', aretak xk'ekal chic ri Jesus xubij chque ri u tijoxelab: “Chujk'ax ch'käp che ri cho.”" 
Mark4:36 Ri u tijoxelab xequiya' can ri winak, xquic'am bic ri Jesus pa ri jucub ri t'uyul wi. E cachilam niq'uiaj tak jucub chic." 
Mark4:37 Xpe jun nimalaj quiakik'. Xeboc ri k'et re ri ja' pa ri jucub, jeri' chi cätajin cänojic." 
Mark4:38 C'o c'u ri Jesus chutza'm ri jucub, cäwar puwi' jun ch'äcataj. Xquic'asuj, xquibij che: “Kajtij, ¿la ma ta c'o cubij c'u'x la chi cujcämic?”" 
Mark4:39 Xc'astaj c'u ri Jesus, xuyaj ri quiakik', xubij che ri cho: “Chattanalok, xa jun chatc'ol wi.” Xtäni' c'u ri quiakik', xlilob ronojel." 
Mark4:40 Xubij chque ri u tijoxelab: “¿Jasche quixe'j iwib? ¿Jasche man c'o ta i cojonic?” 
Mark4:41 Ri e are' sibalaj xquixe'j quib. Xquibila' chquibil tak quib: “¿Jachin wa', chi ri quiakik' xukuje' ri cho queniman che?”" 
Mark5:1 Xebopan ch'käp che ri cho, pa ri culew ri aj Jeras." 
Mark5:2 Elinak chi bic ri Jesus pa ri jucub, chanim xel ulok jun achi chquixo'l ri mukubal, ri c'o jun itzel uxlabal che." 
Mark5:3 Chila' c'u jekel wi chquixo'l ri mukubal. Man c'o ta jun cäcuin che u ximic, mawi ne cuc' tikom ch'ich'." 
Mark5:4 Q'ui mul ximom ri e rakan xukuje' ri e u k'ab cuc' tikom tak ch'ich', quebuc'äjij c'u ri tikom tak ch'ich'. Man c'o ta c'u jun cäcuinic cätakan puwi'." 
Mark5:5 Ronojel k'ij, chi chak'ab chi pa k'ij cäc'oji' ri achi chquixo'l ri mukubal, pa tak ri juyub. Curak u chi', cusoc rib che abaj." 
Mark5:6 Aretak xril apan ri Jesus chi naj, aninak xbec, xxuqui' chuwäch." 
Mark5:7 Xurak u chi' ruc' chuk'ab, xubij: “¿Jas awe chwe, Jesus, u C'ojol ri Dios ri sibalaj aj chicaj? Catinbochi'j chuwäch ri Dios, maban c'ax chwe.”" 
Mark5:8 Rumal rech chi u bim ri Jesus che: “Itzelalaj uxlabal, chatel che ri achi.”" 
Mark5:9 Ri Jesus xucot u chi': “¿Jas a bi'?” Ri are' xutzelej u bixic: “ ‘Sibalaj uj Q'ui’ ri nu bi', rumal rech chi uj q'ui.”" 
Mark5:10 Sibalaj xubochi'j ri Jesus chi mätakanic chi chebel bic pa ri c'olbal ri'. 
Mark5:11 E c'o c'u apan nimalaj jumulaj ak chunakaj ri juyub ri queyuk'uxic. 
Mark5:12 Ri itzel tak uxlabal xquibochi'j ri Jesus, xquibij: “Chujataka bic cuc' ri ak, rech cujoc chquipam.”" 
Mark5:13 Ri Jesus xuya' c'u chque. Xebel bic ri itzel tak uxlabal che ri achi, xeboc bic chquipam ri ak. Ri cäraj e quieb mil (2000) ri ak xquiq'uiak biquib tza'm ri juyub c'ä xejik' pa ri cho." 
Mark5:14 Are c'u ri e yuk'ul tak ak xebanimajic. Xequiya' u tzijol pa ri tinimit pa tak ri juyub. Xepe c'u ri winak che rilic jas ri xc'ulmaxic. 
Mark5:15 Xebopan ruc' ri Jesus. Xquil ri achi ri xec'oji' q'ui itzel tak uxlabal che, t'uyulic chi c'ut u cojom chic ratz'iak, utz chic ri u chomanic. Xquixe'j c'u quib ri winak." 
Mark5:16 Are c'u ri winak ri xquil ri xc'ulmatajic, xquitzijoj chque ri niq'uiaj chic jas ri xuc'ulmaj ri achi ri xc'oji' ri itzel uxlabal che xukuje' jas ri xquic'ulmaj ri ak." 
Mark5:17 Xquichaplej c'u u bochi'xic ri Jesus chi chel bic pa ri culew. 
Mark5:18 Aretak xoc ri Jesus pa ri jucub, ri achi ri xc'oji' ri itzel uxlabal che xubochi'j chi cäbe ruc'." 
Mark5:19 Ri Jesus man xuya' ta che, xane' xubij che: “Jät cho awachoch cuc' ri e awachalaxic. Chaya' u tzijoxic chque ronojel ri u banom ri Ajawaxel chawe, jas xubano xel u c'u'x chawe.”" 
Mark5:20 Xel bic ri achi, xuchaplej u tzijoxic pa tak ri Lajuj Tinimit ronojel ri u banom ri Jesus che. Conojel c'ut xquimayo." 
Mark5:21 Xoc ri Jesus pa ri jucub, xk'ax chi jumul ch'käp che ri cho. Aretak xopan chila', xquimulij quib q'uialaj winak ruc'. Xcanaj c'u chuchi' ri cho." 
Mark5:22 Xpe jun achi, Jair u bi', are qui nimal ri e c'o pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Aretak xril ri Jesus, xumej rib chuwäch." 
Mark5:23 Sibalaj xubochi'j, xubij: “Ri nu mia'l cämic cubano. Saj la, cheya' ri k'ab la puwi' rech cutziric, cäc'asi c'ut.”" 
Mark5:24 Ri Jesus xbe ruc', e q'ui winak xeteri bic chrij, cäquipitz' c'ut." 
Mark5:25 C'o jun ixok chquixo'l, c'o chi cablajuj junab xak quel u quiq'uel." 
Mark5:26 Sibalaj u rikom c'ax cumal q'ui tak cunanelab. U sachom ronojel ri c'o ruc', man c'o ta c'u rechbem, xane' catajin cänimatajic." 
Mark5:27 Aretak xuta' u tzijol ri Jesus, xopan chrij chquixo'l ri q'uialaj winak, xuchap ocok ri u k'u'." 
Mark5:28 Xuchomaj: “Xuwi ta ne quinchap ocok ri u k'u', quinutzir c'u na.”" 
Mark5:29 Chanim xtäni' ri u quiq'uel ri quelic. Xuna' pa ri u cuerp chi xcunataj che ri yabil. 
Mark5:30 Ri Jesus xuna' chi c'o chuk'ab xel che. Xutzolk'omij rib chquixo'l ri q'uialaj winak, xubij: “¿Jachin xchapow ri watz'iak?”" 
Mark5:31 Xquibij ri u tijoxelab che: “Quil la chi ri q'uialaj winak capitz' la cumal. Jas c'u che cabij la: ‘¿Jachin xchapow ri watz'iak?’ ” 
Mark5:32 Ri Jesus c'ut xca'y chque conojel che rilic jachin ri xbanow wa'. 
Mark5:33 Xuxe'j c'u rib ri ixok, cäbirbitic, xuna' c'ut chi xcunatajic. Xpetic, xumej rib chuwäch ri Jesus, xubij ronojel ri kastzij ri xc'ulmataj ruc'." 
Mark5:34 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Nu mia'l, rumal ri a cojonic xatcunatajic. Jät pa jamaril, xatcunataj c'u che ri a yab.”" 
Mark5:35 C'ä cätajin catzijon ri Jesus aretak xebopan jujun aj uwo rachoch ri Jair, ri cätakan pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Xquibij che: “Ri a mia'l xcämic. ¿Jasche c'ä caya' latz' che ri Ajtij?”" 
Mark5:36 Ri Jesus xuta' ri qui tzij, xubij che ri Jair: “Maxe'j awib, xuwi chatcojonok.”" 
Mark5:37 Man xuya' ta c'u ri Jesus chi c'o jun cäteri bic chrij, xane' xuwi ri Lu', ri Santiag, ri Xuan ri rachalal ri Santiag." 
Mark5:38 Xebopan cho rachoch ri achi ri nim u banic. Xril ri Jesus chi ri winak qui tuquin quib, sibalaj quebok'ic, sibalaj cäquirak qui chi'." 
Mark5:39 Xoc pa ja, xubij chque: “¿Jasche quituquij iwib, quixok'ic? Ri ac'al man cäminak taj, xa' cäwaric.”" 
Mark5:40 Ri winak cäquitze'j u wäch. Ri Jesus xeresaj bic conojel, xebuc'am ri u tat u nan ri ac'al xukuje' ri e c'o ruc', xeboc bic jawije' ri tutz'ul wi ri ac'al." 
Mark5:41 Xuchap c'u ri u k'ab ri ac'al, xubij che: “Tabit cum.” Je quel cubij wa' pa ri ka ch'abal: “Ali, quinbij chawe, chatwalijok.”" 
Mark5:42 Chanim xwalij ri ali, xbinic. Cablajuj chi c'u u junab. Ri winak xquimayo, xsach qui c'u'x." 
Mark5:43 Ri Jesus sibalaj xebupixbej chi mäquetamaj wa' ri niq'uiaj winak chic. Xubij chque chi chquiya' u wa ri ali. 
Mark6:1 Ri Jesus xel bic chila', xopan pa ri rulew. Ri e u tijoxelab xquiterenej." 
Mark6:2 Pa ri k'ij re uxlanem, xuchaplej tijonic pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. E q'ui winak xquita' ri u tzij. Xquimayo, xquibij: “¿Jawije' xretamaj wi ri are' we jastak ri'? ¿Jas ri no'j ri yo'm che, chi cuban nimak tak mayibal?" 
Mark6:3 ¿La ma ta are wa' ri ajanel, ri ral ri Mariy, cachalal ri Santiag, ri Jose, ri Juds xukuje' ri Simon? ¿La ma ta e c'o xukuje' ri e rana'b kuc', waral? Cuban c'u quieb qui c'u'x chrij.”" 
Mark6:4 Ri Jesus c'ut xubij chque: “Xuwi pa ri u tinimit, chquixo'l ri rachalaxic, cho rachoch, man nim ta quil wi jun k'axal tzij.”" 
Mark6:5 Man xcuin ta c'u che u banic jun nimalaj mayibal chila'. Xuwi xebuya' ri u k'ab paquiwi' quieb oxib yawabib, xebucunaj c'ut." 
Mark6:6 Xumayo rumal rech chi man c'o ta qui cojonic. Xebusolij ri alaj tak tinimit catijon c'ut. 
Mark6:7 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij ri cablajuj, xebutak bic pa cacabil. Xuya' takanic pa qui k'ab paquiwi' ri itzel tak uxlabal." 
Mark6:8 Xebutako chi c'o jas mäquic'am bic che ri qui binem, mawi qui wa, mawi qui chi'm, mawi qui rajil pa ri c'olbal re, xane' xuwi ri qui ch'amiy." 
Mark6:9 Xtakan chque chi chquicojo' bic qui xajäb, mäquicoj c'u bic quieb catz'iak." 
Mark6:10 Xubij chque: “Apawije' ri quixoc wi pa jun ja, chixcanaj can chila' c'ä quixel na bic pa ri tinimit ri'." 
Mark6:11 Apachique c'olbal ri man quixc'ulax ta wi, ri man cäquitatabej ta wi ri i tzij, aretak quixel bic chila', chitota' can ri puc'uc' ulew ri c'o pa iwakan. Jeri' quik'alajisaj chquiwäch chi man utz taj qui banom.”" 
Mark6:12 Xebel c'u bic ri tijoxelab che u bixic chque ri winak, chi chetzelej ruc' ri Dios." 
Mark6:13 Xequesaj q'ui itzel tak uxlabal chque ri winak. Xequibil q'ui yawabib ruc' aseit, xequicunaj c'ut." 
Mark6:14 Ri ajawinel Herod xuta' u tzijol ri Jesus, ri elinak u tzijol pa conojel c'olbal. E c'o jujun caquibij: “Are ri Xuan Bautist xc'astaj chquixo'l ri cäminakib. Rumal ri' c'o u chuk'ab che u banic nimak tak mayibal.”" 
Mark6:15 Ri niq'uiaj chic xquibij: “Are ri Eliy.” Ri e jule' chic xquibij: “Are jun k'axal tzij, je jas jun chque ri e k'axal tak tzij ojer.”" 
Mark6:16 Aretak xuta' ri Herod, xubij: “Ri Xuan, ri xinwesaj u jolom, are wa' xc'astaj ulok chquixo'l ri cäminakib.”" 
Mark6:17 Are c'u ri Herod xtakan che u cojic ri Xuan pa che'; je xuban ri Herod wa' u mac rech chi ri Herody (ri rixokil ri Pelip, ri rachalal). Ri Herod xuc'am ri Herody che rixokil." 
Mark6:18 Ri Xuan xubij che ri Herod: “Awas che la chi cac'oji' ri rixokil ri achalal la uc' la.” 
Mark6:19 Ri Herody xpe royowal chrij ri Xuan, are ta xraj xucämisaj; man xcuin ta c'ut." 
Mark6:20 Ri Herod nim c'u xril wi ri Xuan. Reta'm chi are' suc', xukuje' achi tastalic. Xuchajij pa che' rech man cäpe ta c'ax chrij. Aretak c'u cutatabej ri u tzij ri Xuan, man curik taj jas cubano. Pune' ta ne jeri', sibalaj cäkaj chuwäch ri Herod cutatabej ri cubij." 
Mark6:21 Xopan jun k'ij aretak xya' che ri Herody chi cuban jas ri cäraj. Xurik ri nimak'ij re u tz'akatisaxic u junab ri Herod. Xuban c'u jun nimalaj wa'im chque ri nimak qui k'ij ri e c'o ruc', chque ri qui nimakil ri ajch'ojab xukuje' chque ri nimak qui k'ij pa Galiley." 
Mark6:22 Ri ral ali ri Herody xoc bic, cäxojowic. Xkaj c'u chquiwäch ri Herod xukuje' ri e c'o ruc'. Ri ajawinel xubij che ri ali: “Chata' chwe ri cawaj, quinya' c'u na chawe.”" 
Mark6:23 Xuban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na ruc': “Apachique ta ne ri cata' chwe, quinya' na chawe, pune' ta ne pa niq'uiaj che ri wajawibal.”" 
Mark6:24 Xel bic ri ali, xubij che ri u nan: “¿Jas ri quinta' che?” Ri are' xubij: “Chata' ri u jolom ri Xuan Bautist.”" 
Mark6:25 Te c'u ri', ri ali aninak xoc bic chuwäch ri ajawinel, xuta' tok'ob che, xubij: “Quinwaj chi caya' la chwe chanim pa jun liq'uilic lak ri u jolom ri Xuan Bautist.”" 
Mark6:26 Ri ajawinel sibalaj xbisonic, rumal c'u ri e u chi'nic ri kas queban na chquiwäch ri e c'o ruc' pa ri mexa, man xuya' ta c'ut xuk'il ta rib che ri xtz'onox che." 
Mark6:27 Ri ajawinel chanim xutak bic jun chque ri ajch'ojab che u c'amic ulok ri u jolom ri Xuan Bautist. 
Mark6:28 Xbe c'ut ri ajch'o'j pa ri che' xeresaj ulok ri u jolom ri Xuan, xuya' pa jun liq'uilic lak. Xuya' che ri ali, ri ali c'ut xuya' che ri u nan." 
Mark6:29 Ri e u tijoxelab ri Xuan, aretak xquito, xepetic, xequic'am ulok ri u cuerp, xquiya' pa jun mukubal." 
Mark6:30 Xetzelej c'u ulok ri takomxenlab che u rikic quib ruc' ri Jesus, xquitzijoj che ronojel ri xquibano xukuje' ronojel ri tijonic ri xquiya' chque ri winak." 
Mark6:31 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Tisaj ix pa i tuquiel wi pa jun c'olbal cätz'inowic, chixuxlan jubik'.” Rumal rech chi e q'ui ri winak ri queboquic quebelic mawi c'u ne cuya' quewa'ic." 
Mark6:32 Xebe pa jun jucub qui tuquiel, xebe pa jun c'olbal cätz'inowic." 
Mark6:33 Q'ui c'ut ri xebilowic, xquich'ob qui wäch. Xebel ulok q'ui winak pa conojel ri tinimit, xebe q'ui winak chila' chi cakan, nabe xebopan chquiwäch." 
Mark6:34 Aretak xel ulok ri Jesus pa ri jucub, xeril q'uialaj winak. Xel u c'u'x chque, rumal rech chi e je ta ne e chij ri man c'o ta cajyuk'. Xuchaplej qui tijoxic chque q'ui jastak." 
Mark6:35 Benak chi c'u ri k'ij, ri tijoxelab xekeb ruc' ri Jesus, xquibij: “Tz'inowel ri c'olbal, benak chi ri k'ij." 
Mark6:36 Chejacha' la bic ri winak rech quebe pa tak ri juyub xukuje' pa ri alaj tak tinimit ri e c'o apanok, che u lok'ic ri cäquitijo.”" 
Mark6:37 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chiya' ix chque ri cäquitijo.” Xquibij che: “¿La cujbe ta che u lok'ic quieb sient chicäch caxlanwa rech caquitijo?” 
Mark6:38 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿Joropa' caxlanwa e c'o iwuc'? Jiwilampe'.” Aretak xquetamaj, xquibij: “E c'o job caxlanwa xukuje' quieb cär.”" 
Mark6:39 Ri Jesus xtakanic chi conojel ri winak chet'uyul pa tak mulaj puwi' ri räx k'ayes. 
Mark6:40 Xet'uyi' pa tak mulaj: pa tak sient, pa niq'uiaj tak sient." 
Mark6:41 Ri Jesus xebuc'am ri job caxlanwa xukuje' ri quieb cär, xca'y chicaj, xumaltioxij che ri Dios, xebupir ri caxlanwa. Xebuya' chque ri u tijoxelab, rech quequiya' chquiwäch ri winak. Xukuje' ri quieb cär xebujach chquiwäch conojel." 
Mark6:42 Conojel xewa'ic, xenojic." 
Mark6:43 Te c'u ri' xquiyac ri ch'akatak caxlanwa ri ch'akatak cär ri man xequiq'uis taj, are cablajuj chicäch nojinak." 
Mark6:44 E job mil (5,000) c'ut ri achijab ri xquitij que ri wa." 
Mark6:45 Te c'u ri' ri Jesus xebutak ri u tijoxelab chi cheboc pa ri jucub, chi chenabej chuwäch ch'käp che ri cho pa Betsaid. Ri are' c'ut xcanaj can jok'otaj che qui jachic can ri winak." 
Mark6:46 Aretak e u jachom chi bic, xbe pa ri juyub che u banic ch'awem ruc' Dios." 
Mark6:47 Aretak xk'ekal chic, ri jucub c'o pa u niq'uiajil ri cho. Ri Jesus u tuquiel c'o can cho ri ulew." 
Mark6:48 Xrilo chi ri u tijoxelab cäquirik c'ax che u binebisaxic ri jucub, rumal rech chi ri quiakik' petinak chquiwäch. C'olacraj cäpe ri sakaric, xpe c'u ri Jesus, cäbin puwi' ri cho, raj xoc'ow chquiwäch." 
Mark6:49 Aretak xquilo chi cäbin puwi' ri cho, xquichomaj chi xibinel, xquirak qui chi'." 
Mark6:50 Conojel c'ut xquilo, xquixe'j quib. Chanim ri are' c'ut xebuch'abej, xubij chque: “Chijiquiba' i c'u'x. In wa', mixe'j iwib.”" 
Mark6:51 Xoc cuc' pa ri jucub, xtäni' c'u ri quiakik'. E are c'u ri u tijoxelab sibalaj c'u xemayinic." 
Mark6:52 Man qui ch'obom ta c'u ri mayibal ri xuban ri Jesus ruc' ri caxlanwa, xane' co ri canima'." 
Mark6:53 E k'axenak chi c'ut, puwi' ri cho xebopan chuchi' ri ulew pa jun c'olbal Jenesaret u bi', ri xquixim wi ri jucub chuchi' ri cho." 
Mark6:54 Xuwi c'u xebel pa ri jucub, ri winak xquich'oboxtaj u wäch ri Jesus." 
Mark6:55 Xquibinibej c'u ronojel ri Jenesaret. Ri winak xequic'am ulok ri yawabib cho ch'atum tak che', xebopan pa ronojel tak c'olbal ri xquito chi c'o wi ri Jesus." 
Mark6:56 Apawije' c'ut ri copan wi ri Jesus, pa ri alaj tak tinimit, pa tak ri tinimit, o pa tak ri juyub, ri winak quequiya' ulok ri yawabib cho tak ri c'ayibal. Xquibochi'j ri Jesus chi xuwi ta ne cäquichap ocok ri u chi' ri u k'u'. Conojel c'ut ri xechapowic, xecunatajic." 
Mark7:1 Ri pariseyib xukuje' jujun chque ri ajtijab re ri pixab, e petinak c'ä pa Jerusalen, xquimulij quib ruc' ri Jesus." 
Mark7:2 Ri e are' c'ut xequil jujun chque ri u tijoxelab ri Jesus, chi cäquitij qui wa, man quequich'aj taj ri qui k'ab, e tz'il c'ut." 
Mark7:3 (Ri pariseyib xukuje' conojel ri aj judeyib cäquinimaj ri qui tijonic ulok ri nimak tak tatayib. We man na'l quequich'aj ri qui k'ab, man quewa' taj." 
Mark7:4 Aretak quetzelej ulok pa ri c'ayibal, we man cäquijosk'ij quib jas ri cubij ri tijonic, man quewa' taj. Xukuje' xequiban q'ui jastak chic rech cäquinimaj ri qui tijonic ri nimak tak tatayib. Quequich'aj tak ri uq'uiabal, ri t'uy, ri lak re k'an ch'ich'.)" 
Mark7:5 Je c'u ri' ri pariseyib e cachil ri ajtz'ibab re ri pixab xquic'ot u chi' ri Jesus: “¿Jasche ri a tijoxelab man cäquiban taj jas ri cubij ri qui tijonic ri nimak tak tatayib, xane' cäquitij ri qui wa, man caquich'aj taj ri qui k'ab, e tz'il c'ut?”" 
Mark7:6 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ri ix xa quieb i wäch. Ri Isaiy, ri k'axal tzij, kastzij ri xuya' k'alajisanic chiwij: We winak ri' xak ruc' ri qui chi' cäquinimarisaj nu k'ij, are c'u ri canima' naj c'o wi chwe." 
Mark7:7 Xak lok' quinquik'ijilaj. Ri e qui tijonic xa' e qui takanic winak. 
Mark7:8 I yo'm can ri u takanic ri Dios, quinimaj c'u ri qui tijonic ri winak.”" 
Mark7:9 Xukuje' xubij chque: “Sibalaj man quinimaj ta ri u takanic ri Dios, are c'u quiban ri i nak'atisabal ix." 
Mark7:10 U bim c'u can ri Moises ojer: ‘Nim chebawila' wi ri a tat a nan.’ Xukuje' xubij: ‘Apachin ri cuyok' u tat u nan, cäcämisax na.’" 
Mark7:11 Ri ix c'ut quibij we cubij jun winak che ri u tat u nan: ‘Man quinya' ta chic ri rajawaxic chawe, rumal rech chi nu sipam wa' che ri Dios.’ Quibij ‘Corban’. (‘Corban’ cäbix che ‘jun sipanic che ri Dios’.)" 
Mark7:12 We je cubij, ri ix man quiya' ta che jun chi cuban jun utzil che ri u tat u nan." 
Mark7:13 Man quinimaj ta chic ri u tzij ri Dios, xa rumal rech ri nak'atisabal ri c'o chixo'l, ri xak yo'm chiwe cumal ri e i mam. Xukuje' q'ui jastak je tak wa' quibano.”" 
Mark7:14 Xebusiq'uij chi jumulaj q'uialaj winak, xubij chque: “Chinitatabej, iwonojel. Chich'obo' jas ri quinbij." 
Mark7:15 Man c'o ta jun jasach ri cätijic ri cutz'iloj ta ri winak. Xane' e are ri itzel tak jastak ri quebel ulok pa chi'aj, are ri' catz'ilon ri winak.”" 
Mark7:16  
Mark7:17 Aretak ri Jesus xebuya' can ri winak, xoc bic cho ja. Ri u tijoxelab xquic'ot u chi' chrij we c'ambal no'j ri'." 
Mark7:18 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque: “¿La xukuje' ri ix man quich'ob taj? ¿La ma ta quich'obo chi ronojel jastak ri quetijic, we cutij jun winak, man cäcuin ta che u tz'iloxic?" 
Mark7:19 Man coc ta c'ut pa ri ranima', xane' pa ri u pam, quel c'u canok aretak cäban ri chulaj.” Xubij wa' rech cäquich'obo chi ronojel ri catijic ch'ajch'oj." 
Mark7:20 Xubij c'ut: “Ri etzelal ri quel ulok pa u chi' ri winak, are ri' ri cätz'ilon ri winak." 
Mark7:21 Jeri' rumal rech chi pa canima' ri winak, quebelwilok ri itzel tak chomanic, ri cuc'axic quib cuc' achijab ixokib che qui banic macunic, ri eläk'anic, ri cämisanic," 
Mark7:22 ri kajic pa mac ruc' jun winak chic, ri curayij ri jastak ri quech niq'uiaj winak chic, ri cuban tak etzelal, ri cäsubunic, ri cuban ri itzel u rayinic ri ti'j, ri cäpe royowal aretak jun chic curik utzil, ri cäyok'onic, ri cunimarisaj rib, xukuje' ri man cuchomaj taj jas cubano." 
Mark7:23 Conojel wa' we itzel tak jastak ri' quebel ulok pa ri canima' ri winak, quetz'ilotaj c'u cumal tak we mac ri'.”" 
Mark7:24 Ri Jesus xel bic chila', xbe chunakaj ri Tir. Xoc pa jun ja, are ta xraj chi ri winak man cäquetamaj taj chi c'o chila'. Man xcuin ta c'ut che u c'u'ic rib." 
Mark7:25 Chanim c'ut xretamaj jun ixok chi ri Jesus c'o chila'. Ri ixok ri c'o jun alaj ral ali ri c'o jun itzelalaj uxlabal che. Xopan c'u ruc' ri Jesus, xxuqui' chuwäch." 
Mark7:26 Ri ixok are jun aj Gres, are aj Siropenis. Xubochi'j ri Jesus chi cäresaj ri itzel uxlabal che ri ral." 
Mark7:27 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Chaweyej na, are nabe quewa' ri alc'ualaxelab, rech quenojic. Man utz taj we cäc'am ri qui wa ri alc'ualaxelab, cäq'uiak ta c'u chquiwäch ri tz'i'.”" 
Mark7:28 Ri ixok xubij che: “Je Tat. Xukuje' c'u ne ri tz'i' ri e c'o chuxe' ri mexa cäquitij que ri u xer tak qui wa ri ac'alab.” 
Mark7:29 Xubij c'u ri Jesus che: “Rumal we a tzij ri', chattzelejok. Ri itzel uxlabal elinak chic che ri awal.”" 
Mark7:30 Aretak ri ixok xopan cho rachoch, xurika' ri ac'al kajinak pa ch'at, elinak chic ri itzel uxlabal che." 
Mark7:31 Xel chi bic ri Jesus chunakaj ri Tir, xoc'ow pa Sidon xukuje' pa ri Lajuj Tinimit, xopan chuchi' ri cho aj Galiley." 
Mark7:32 Xc'am ulok chuwäch ri Jesus jun winak mem xukuje' man cätan taj. Ri xec'amow ulok xquibochi'j ri Jesus chi cuya' ri u k'ab puwi'. 
Mark7:33 Ri Jesus xuc'am bic ri yawab jela' chque ri winak pa u tuquiel wi. Xebunim ri u wi' tak u k'ab pa tak u xiquin, xchubanic, xunak ocok ri rak' ri yawab." 
Mark7:34 Xca'y chicaj, xbik'bitic, xubij che ri yawab: “Epata.” (Je quel cubij wa': “Chatjaktajok.”)" 
Mark7:35 Chanim xejaktaj ri u xiquin, xcuin c'u che u cojic ri rak' che tzijonic, utz chic cätzijonic." 
Mark7:36 Ri Jesus xebupixbej ri winak chi c'o jun mäquibij wi jas ri u banom aretak c'u sibalaj quebupixbej, xane' sibalaj caquesaj na u tzijol." 
Mark7:37 Xquimayo, xquixe'j quib, xquibij c'ut: “Utz u banom che ronojel. Cubano chi ri man quetan taj quetanic, cubano chi ri memab quech'awic.”" 
Mark8:1 Pa tak ri k'ij ri', jumul chic e c'o sibalaj q'ui winak, man c'o ta c'u jas cäquitijo. Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij ri u tijoxelab ruc', xubij chque:" 
Mark8:2 “Quel nu c'u'x chque ri winak. Oxib k'ij chi wa' e c'o wuc', man c'o ta c'u jas cäquitijo." 
Mark8:3 We quebenjach bic pa numic, quetukar na pa ri be. Jujun c'ut chque naj e petinak wi.”" 
Mark8:4 Ri u tijoxelab xquibij che: “¿Jawije' ta c'u lo cäcuin wi jun che u rikic caxlanwa che qui tzukic ri q'ui winak? Waral are pa jun chaki'j uwo sak.” 
Mark8:5 Ri Jesus xuta' chque: “¿E joropa' caxlanwa e c'o iwuc'?” Ri e are' xquibij: “E c'o wukub.” 
Mark8:6 Ri Jesus xebutak ri winak chi chet'uyul cho ri ulew. Xebuc'am c'u ri wukub caxlanwa, xmaltioxin c'u che ri Dios, xebupiro, xebuya' chque ri u tijoxelab, rech quequijach chquiwäch ri winak. Ri tijoxelab c'ut xequijach chquiwäch ri winak." 
Mark8:7 Xukuje' c'o cuc' quieb oxib alaj tak cär. Ri Jesus xmaltioxin c'u che ri Dios, xukuje xubij chi chejachok." 
Mark8:8 Ri winak xewa'ic, xenojic. Xequiyac c'u ri ch'akatak ri man xquiq'uis taj, are wukub chicäch." 
Mark8:9 Cäraj ne e c'o quiejeb mil (4000) winak ri xewa'ic, xebujach c'u bic ri Jesus." 
Mark8:10 Xoc c'ut ri Jesus pa ri jucub cuc' ri u tijoxelab, xopan pa ri c'olbal Dalmanut." 
Mark8:11 Xebopan ri pariseyib ruc' ri Jesus, xquichaplej chomanic ruc'. Xquita' che ri Jesus chi chubana' jun etal aj chicaj chquiwäch, xa che rilic we cubano o man cuban taj." 
Mark8:12 Sibalaj xk'oxow ri ranima' ri Jesus, xubij: “¿Jasche cutz'onoj etal we ija'lil ri'? Kastzij quinbij chiwe chi man cäyataj ta etal chque we winak ri'.”" 
Mark8:13 Xebuya' canok, xoc chi jumul pa ri jucub, xbe ch'käp che ri cho." 
Mark8:14 Xsach c'u pa qui jolom ri u c'amic bic wa, xuwi jun caxlanwa c'o cuc' pa ri jucub." 
Mark8:15 Ri Jesus xebupixbej, xubij: “Chiwila', chichajij iwib chuwäch ri qui ch'am ri pariseyib xukuje' ri u ch'am ri Herod.”" 
Mark8:16 Quechomalan c'u chquixo'l; Je cubij wa' rumal rech chi man c'o ta ka caxlanwa. 
Mark8:17 Ri Jesus xretamaj ri qui chomanic, xubij chque: “¿Jasche quichomaj chixo'l chi man c'o ta i caxlanwa? ¿La ma ta quich'obo? ¿La ma ta iweta'm? ¿La co na ri iwanima'?" 
Mark8:18 ¿La ma ta quixca'y ruc' ri i bak'wäch? ¿La ma ta quita' ruc' ri i xiquin? ¿La ma ta cänataj chiwe? 
Mark8:19 Aretak xebenpir ri job caxlanwa chquiwäch ri job mil (5000) winak, ¿joropa' chicäch nojinak chque ch'akatak xebiyico?” Xquibij che: “Cablajuj.”" 
Mark8:20 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Xukuje' aretak xebenpir ri wukub caxlanwa chquiwäch ri quiejeb mil (4000), ¿joropa' chicäch nojinak chque ch'akatak xebiyico?” “Wukub,” xecha'." 
Mark8:21 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La c'ä maja' quich'obo?” 
Mark8:22 Ri Jesus xopan pa Betsaid. Jujun winak xquic'am ulok jun moy, xquiya' chuwäch ri Jesus, xquibochi'j chi chunaka'." 
Mark8:23 Ri Jesus xuc'am ri man cäca'y taj che ri u k'ab, xresaj bic pa ri tinimit. Xuya' ri u chub pa tak ri u bak'wäch, xebuya' ri u k'ab puwi', xuta' che: “¿La c'o jas cawilo?”" 
Mark8:24 Ri moy xca'yic, xubij: “Quebenwil ri winak, e je ta ne che' quinwilo chi quebinic.”" 
Mark8:25 Ri Jesus xebuya' chi jumul ri u k'ab chquij ri u bak'wäch. C'äte ri' kas xca'yic, xutziric, kas xebuca'yej conojel ri jastak." 
Mark8:26 Ri Jesus xutak bic cho rachoch, xubij che: “Matoc pa ri tinimit che u bixic che jachin jun chila'.”" 
Mark8:27 Oc'owinak chi c'u wa' ri Jesus e rachil ri e u tijoxelab xebe pa ri alaj tak tinimit re Sesarey re Pilip. Xuc'ot qui chi' ri u tijoxelab pa ri be, xubij chque: “¿Jachin ri in cäquibij ri winak?”" 
Mark8:28 Ri e are' xquibij che: “E c'o jujun cäquibij chi lal ri' ri Xuan Bautist. Niq'uiaj chic cäquibij chi lal ri' ri Eliy. Ri jule' chic cäquibij chi lal jun chque ri e k'axal tak tzij.” 
Mark8:29 Ri Jesus xuc'ot qui chi': “E c'u ri ix, ¿jachin ri in quibij?” Ri Lu' xubij che: “Lal ri' ri Crist.”" 
Mark8:30 Ri Jesus xebupixbej chi c'o jun mäquitzijoj wi. 
Mark8:31 Xuchaplej u bixic chque ri e u tijoxelab chi rajawaxic chi ri Rija'l Winak curik na sibalaj c'ax, chi cäxutux na cumal ri qui nimakil ri tatayib, ri qui nimakil ri cojol tabal tok'ob, xukuje' ri ajtijab re ri pixab, chi cäcäm na, chi cäc'astaj na churox k'ij." 
Mark8:32 Utz u k'alajisaxic wa' xuban ri Jesus rech cäquich'obo. Are c'u ri Lu' xuc'am bic ri Jesus, xuchaplej u yajic." 
Mark8:33 Ri Jesus xutzolk'omij rib, xca'y chque ri u tijoxelab, xuyaj ri Lu', xubij: “Chatel chnuwäch, Satanas. Man cach'ob ta ri u chomanic ri Dios, xane' xuwi ri qui chomanic ri winak.”" 
Mark8:34 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij ri q'uialaj winak xukuje' ri u tijoxelab, xubij chque: “We c'o jun cäraj cäpe wuc' in, muban ri u rayibal ri are'. Rajawaxic chi cutelej ulok ri u ripibal, quinuterenej." 
Mark8:35 Apachin ri cäraj cuto' rib rech man cäpe ta c'ax chrij, cutzak na ri u c'aslemal. Apachin c'u ri cutzak ri u c'aslemal rumal wech in xukuje' rumal rech ri utzalaj tak tzij, ri are' cucol na ri u c'aslemal." 
Mark8:36 ¿Jas ta c'u lo cärechbej ri winak, we ta cuch'äc ronojel ri uwächulew, cutzak ta c'u ri u c'aslibal?" 
Mark8:37 ¿Jas ta c'u lo cuya' na ri winak che u q'uexwäch ri u c'aslibal? 
Mark8:38 We c'o jachin jun caq'uix chwe xukuje' che ri nu tijonic chquiwäch we winak ri' ri man e jic taj xukuje' e ajmaquib, xukuje' ri Rija'l Winak caq'uix na che aretak chpetic rachil ri u juluwem ri u Tat xukuje' e rachil ri tastalic tak tako'nib aj caj.”" 
Mark9:1 Ri Jesus xukuje' cubij chque; “Kastzij quinbij chiwe chi e c'o jujun chque ri e c'o waral, chi man quecäm ta na c'ä cäquil na ri rajawibal ri Dios petinak ruc' cuinem.”" 
Mark9:2 E oc'owinak chi wakib k'ij ri Jesus xebuc'am bic ri Lu', ri Santiag xukuje' ri Xuan. Xebuc'am bic pa qui tuquiel wi puwi' jun juyub naj elinak chicaj. Xq'uextaj c'u ri u wächbal ri Jesus chquiwäch." 
Mark9:3 Ri ratz'iak sibalaj xjuluwic, sibalaj sakloloj, jeri' chi man c'o ta jun ch'ajomanel cho ri uwächulew ri je ta qui sakarisaxic wa' cubano." 
Mark9:4 Xquil ri Eliy xukuje' ri Moises, cätajin quetzijon ruc' ri Jesus." 
Mark9:5 Xch'aw ri Lu', xubij che ri Jesus: “Kajtij, sibalaj utz chi cujc'oji' can waral. Quekabana' oxib cäbal: jun ech la, jun rech ri Moises, jun chic rech ri Eliy.”" 
Mark9:6 Je xubij wa' rumal rech chi man curik taj jas cubij. Sibalaj c'u xquixe'j quib ri tijoxelab. 
Mark9:7 Xpe jun sutz' paquiwi', xech'ukutaj c'ut. Xquita' jun ch'abal pa ri sutz', ri xubij: “Are wa' ri lok'alaj nu C'ojol. Chitatabej ri u tzij.”" 
Mark9:8 Chanim xeca'ylobic, man c'o ta chi jun xquilo, xane' xak xuwi c'o chi ri Jesus cuc'." 
Mark9:9 Kajem ulok que pa ri juyub, ri Jesus xebupixbej chi c'o jun mäquitzijoj wi ri xquilo, xane' aretak cäc'astaj na chquixo'l ri cäminakib ri Rija'l Winak." 
Mark9:10 Rumal ri' xquic'ol ri awatalic chquixo'l, pune' c'u xquic'otola' qui chi chquixo'l jas ri' ri c'astajic." 
Mark9:11 Xquic'ot u chi' ri Jesus, xquibij: “¿Jasche c'u che cäquibij ri ajtijab re ri pixab chi rajawaxic chi nabe cäpe na ri Eliy?”" 
Mark9:12 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ri Eliy kastzij cäpe na nabe, cusuc'umaj na ronojel. ¿Jas c'u ri tz'ibatal chrij ri Rija'l Winak, chi sibalaj curik na c'ax, quetzelax na u wäch?" 
Mark9:13 Quinbij c'u chiwe chi ri Eliy xpetic, ri winak xquiban che ronojel ri xcaj xquibano, je jas ri tz'ibatal chrij.”" 
Mark9:14 Aretak xebopan cuc' ri niq'uiaj tijoxelab chic, xequil q'uialaj winak pa tak qui xcut. E c'o c'u ajtijab re ri pixab ri cätajin quechoman cuc'." 
Mark9:15 Chanim conojel ri winak, aretak xquil ri Jesus, sibalaj xemayinic, aninak xekeb ruc', xquiya' rutzil u wäch." 
Mark9:16 Ri are' xuc'ot qui chi': “¿Jas ri' ri cätajin quichomaj cuc'?” 
Mark9:17 Xch'aw jun chque ri winak, xubij che: “Aj tij, xinc'am ulok ri nu c'ojol chwäch la. C'o itzel uxlabal che, ri u banom mem che." 
Mark9:18 Xa apawije' c'olbal ri uxlabal cuchap ri ala, cuq'uiak pa ulew. Cäpuluw u pu chi', cukuch'uch'ej ri u ware. Cäbakir c'ut. Xinbij chque ri tijoxelab la chi chquesaj bic ri itzel uxlabal, man xecuin ta c'ut.”" 
Mark9:19 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¡Ay, winak ri man quixcojon taj! ¿C'ä jampa' lo ri ma ta quinc'oji' chi iwuc'? ¿C'ä jampa' lo ri ma ta quixincuy chic? Chic'ama' ulok ri ala waral.”" 
Mark9:20 Xc'am c'u ulok chuwäch. Aretak ri uxlabal xril ri Jesus, chanim xubak'atila' ri ala. Ri ala xtzak pa ulew, xuwolkotij rib, xpuluw u pu chi'." 
Mark9:21 Ri Jesus xuta' che ri u tat ri ala: “¿Joropa' k'ij chic u rikom wa'?” Ri are' xubij: “Kas pa ri u ch'utinal ulok. 
Mark9:22 Q'ui mul ri uxlabal cuq'uiak pa k'ak', cuq'uiak pa ja' che u cämisaxic. We c'u c'o jas cäcuin la che u banic, chujto' la, chel c'u'x la chke.”" 
Mark9:23 Ri Jesus xubij che: “We catcuinic catcojonic, ronojel c'ut cuya' cäbantajic che ri jun ri cäcojonic.”" 
Mark9:24 Chanim ri u tat ri ala xurak u chi', xubij: “Quincojo. Chinto' la rech quintakej cojonic.”" 
Mark9:25 Ri Jesus, aretak xrilo chi q'ui winak aninak cätajin cäquimulij quib, xuyaj ri itzel uxlabal, xubij che: “Memalaj uxlabal xukuje' t'oy, catintako chi chatel bic che ri ala, matoc chi jumul che.”" 
Mark9:26 Ri uxlabal xurak u chi', sibalaj xubak'atij ri ala, xel bic. Xcanaj can ri ala je ta ne cäminak chic. Jeri' e q'ui xquibij chi xcämic." 
Mark9:27 Ri Jesus xuchap che ri u k'ab, xuwalijisaj. Xwalij c'ut." 
Mark9:28 Aretak xeboc pa ri ja, ri u tijoxelab xquic'ot u chi' ri Jesus pa qui tuquiel wi: “¿Jas c'u che ri uj man xujcuin ta che resaxic ri itzel uxlabal?”" 
Mark9:29 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Jun itzel uxlabal je jas ri jun ri', quesax bic xak xuwi rumal ri u banic ch'awem ruc' Dios.”" 
Mark9:30 E elinak chi bic chila', xeboc'ow pa Galiley. Man xraj ta c'u ri Jesus chi c'o jun quetamanic chi ri are' c'o chila'." 
Mark9:31 Xebutijoj c'u ri u tijoxelab, xubij chque: “Ri Rija'l Winak cäjach na pa qui k'ab winak, cäquicämisaj na. C'äte c'u ri', cäc'astaj na churox k'ij.”" 
Mark9:32 Ri u tijoxelab man xquich'ob ta we tzij ri'. Xquixe'j c'u quib che u c'otic u chi'. 
Mark9:33 Xebopan c'u pa Capernaum. Aretak e c'o chi cho ja, ri Jesus xuc'ot qui chi' ri u tijoxelab: “¿Jas ri xichomaj chixo'l pa ri be aretak man cuc'ul ta rib ri i tzij?”" 
Mark9:34 Ri e are' c'ut man xech'aw taj. Rumal rech chi xquichomaj chquixo'l pa ri be chi jachin ri' ri nim na u banic chque. 
Mark9:35 Ri Jesus xt'uyic, xebusiq'uij ri cablajuj, xubij chque: “We c'o jun cäraj cux nabe chixo'l, rajawaxic cux na q'uisbal que conojel, cux na pataninel que conojel.”" 
Mark9:36 Xuc'am jun ac'al, xutac'aba' pa qui niq'uiajil, xuk'aluj c'ut. Xubij chque ri u tijoxelab:" 
Mark9:37 “Apachin ri cuc'amowaj jun chque ri ac'alab ri je u banic jewa' pa ri nu bi', in ri' quinuc'amowaj. Apachin c'u ri quinc'amowanic, man in ta ri quinuc'amowaj, xane' are cuc'amowaj ri xintakow ulok.”" 
Mark9:38 Ri Xuan xubij che: “Ajtij, kilom jun winak ri queresaj itzel tak uxlabal pa ri bi' la, ri man cujuterenej taj. Xkak'il c'ut, rumal rech chi man cujuterenej taj.”" 
Mark9:39 Ri Jesus xubij: “Mik'atij. We c'o c'u jun ri quebuban tak mayibal pa ri nu bi', quinuyok' ta c'ut." 
Mark9:40 Apachin c'u ri man cujuc'ulelaj taj, are jun ri' kuc'." 
Mark9:41 Apachin ri cuya' jun lak ja' chiwe pa ri nu bi', rumal rech chi ix rech ri Crist, kastzij quinbij chiwe chi ri are' curik na ri tojbal rech.”" 
Mark9:42 “Apachin c'u ri cätakchi'n che mac jun chque we ch'utik ri' ri quecojon chwe in, are ta utz na ri' che, we ta cätzayibax jun ca' chukul, caq'uiak ta pa ri plo." 
Mark9:43 We ri a k'ab cattzakow pa mac, chawesaj apanok. Are utz na chi xa jun ri a k'ab catoc pa ri c'aslemal, chuwäch ri c'o quieb a k'ab catbe pa ri xibalba, pa ri k'ak' ri man cächuptaj taj." 
Mark9:44  
Mark9:45 We ri awakan cattzakow pa mac, chawesaj apanok. Are utz na chi xa jun awakan catoc pa ri c'aslemal, chuwäch ri c'o quieb awakan catq'uiak pa ri xibalba." 
Mark9:46  
Mark9:47 We ri a bak'wäch cattzakow pa mac, chawesaj apanok. Are utz na chi xa jun a bak'wäch catoc pa ri rajawibal ri Dios, chuwäch ri c'o quieb a bak'wäch catq'uiak pa ri xibalba." 
Mark9:48 Chila' c'ut ri man quecäm ta wi ri xjut, ri man cächup ta wi ri k'ak'." 
Mark9:49 Rumal rech chi ronojel catz'amix na ruc' k'ak'. 
Mark9:50 Utz ri atz'am. We c'u man c'o chic u tzayil ri atz'am, ¿jas ta c'u lo quicoj che u tzayixic? Chc'ol iwatz'amil chixjekel c'ut pa jamaril ri jujun cuc' ri niq'uiaj chic.”" 
Mark10:1 Ri Jesus xwalij bic chila' pa Capernaum, xbe pa ri ulew re Judey, xbe ch'käp che ri nima' Jordan. Xebopan chi jumul ri q'uialaj winak ruc'. Xebutijoj chi jumul jas ri nak'atal wi." 
Mark10:1 Ri Jesus xwalij bic chila' pa Capernaum, xbe pa ri ulew re Judey, xbe ch'käp che ri nima' Jordan. Xebopan chi jumul ri q'uialaj winak ruc'. Xebutijoj chi jumul jas ri nak'atal wi." 
Mark10:2 Xebopan jujun pariseyib ruc' ri Jesus. Xquic'ot u chi' xa che u ta'ic jas cubij. Xquita' che we ya'tal che jun achi cujach bic ri rixokil. 
Mark10:3 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿Jas ri xixutak wi ri Moises?” 
Mark10:4 Ri e are' xquibij: “Ri Moises xuya' chi cätz'ibax jun wuj re jachow ib, cäjach c'u bic ri ixok.”" 
Mark10:5 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ri Moises xutz'ibaj we takanic ri' chiwe rumal rech chi co ri iwanima'. 
Mark10:6 Aretak c'u ri Dios xuchaplej u banic ronojel, aretak xebuban ri winak, ‘chi achi chi ixok xebubano." 
Mark10:7 Rumal ri' ri achi cuya' can ri u tat xukuje' u nan, cätuni' c'u na ruc' ri rixokil." 
Mark10:8 Ri e quieb quebux na xa jun winak.’ Je c'u ri' man e quieb ta chic, xane' xa' e jun chic." 
Mark10:9 Ri xutunuba' ri Dios, man ya'tal ta che ri winak chi cujacho.”" 
Mark10:10 Aretak e c'o cho ja, ri tijoxelab xquic'ot u chi' ri Jesus jumul chic chrij wa'." 
Mark10:11 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Apachin ri cujach bic ri rixokil, we cäc'uli' chi ruc' jun ixok, cäkaj ri' pa mac chrij ri rixokil." 
Mark10:12 We are' ri ixok cujach can ri rachajil, we cäc'uli' chi ruc' jun achi, cäkaj ri' pa mac chrij ri rachajil.”" 
Mark10:13 Ri winak xequic'am ulok ac'alab cho ri Jesus rech cuya' ri u k'ab paquiwi'. Ri tijoxelab c'ut xequiyaj ri winak. 
Mark10:14 Aretak xril ri Jesus, xyojtajic, xubij chque: “Chiya' chque ri ac'alab chi quepe wuc', mebik'atij. Ri rajawibal ri Dios quech ri e je tak wa'." 
Mark10:15 Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi apachin ri man cuc'am ta ri rajawibal ri Dios jacha' ri jun ac'al ch'utin, man coc ta na chupam.”" 
Mark10:16 Xebuk'aluj c'u ri ac'alab, xebuya' ri u k'ab paquiwi', xebutewichi'j." 
Mark10:17 Aretak benam re ri Jesus, xpe jun achi cäxiq'uinic, xxuqui' chuwäch, xuta' che: “Utzalaj Ajtij, ¿jas quinban che rechbexic ri junalic c'aslemal?”" 
Mark10:18 Ri Jesus xubij che: “¿Jasche cabij utz chwe? Man c'o ta jun utz, xane' xuwi jun, are ri Dios." 
Mark10:19 E aweta'm ri takomal:” “Matcämisanic. Matkaj pa mac ruc' jun winak chic. Mateläk'anic. Maban tzijtal chquij niq'uiaj winak chic. Mawesaj can jutak bik' che ri jastak que ri winak. Nim chebawila' wi ri a tat a nan.” 
Mark10:20 Xubij c'u ri achi che: “Aj tij, ronojel wa' nu nimam kas pa nu ch'utinal.”" 
Mark10:21 Ri Jesus xuca'yej, xulok'ok'ej, xubij che: “C'o jun jasach ri c'ä cäraj na chawe: jät, chac'ayij ronojel ri jastak awe, chaya' ri rajil chque ri mebayib. Jeri' cäc'oji' na a k'inomal chicaj. Tasaj c'ut, chinaterenej.”" 
Mark10:22 Xq'uextaj ri u palaj ri achi rumal we tzij ri'. Cäbisonic xbec. Rumal rech chi e q'ui ri jastak rech e c'olic. 
Mark10:23 Xca'y ri Jesus pa tak u xcut, xubij chque ri u tijoxelab: “¡Ruc' sibalaj c'ax queboc ri k'inomab pa ri rajawibal ri Dios!”" 
Mark10:24 Ri tijoxelab xquimay ri u tzij. Xch'aw chi ri Jesus, xubij chque: “Alc'ualaxelab, ri winak ri cu'l qui c'u'x chrij ri k'inomal, ¡sibalaj c'ax chi queboc pa ri rajawibal ri Dios!" 
Mark10:25 Are man c'ax ta roc'owisaxic jun camey pa ri u julil jun bak re t'ison, chuwäch ri roquic jun k'inom pa ri rajawibal ri Dios.”" 
Mark10:26 Sibalaj xquimay ri u tzij, xquibila' chquibil quib: “¿Jachin ta ba lo ri cäcuinic cäcolotajic?”" 
Mark10:27 Ri Jesus xca'y chque, xubij che ri winak man bantajel taj: “Man je ta c'u wa' che ri Dios; che c'ut ri are' man c'o ta ri mat bantajel.”" 
Mark10:28 Xuchaplej u bixic ri Lu' che: “Chilampe' la, ri uj ka yo'm can ronojel, lal ka terenem c'ut.”" 
Mark10:29 Xubij c'u ri Jesus: “Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi conojel ri qui yo'm can cachoch, cachalal, qui nan, qui tat, quixokil, calc'ual o culew rumal wech in xukuje' rumal quech ri utzalaj tak tzij," 
Mark10:30 ri e are' cäquic'am na jun sient je tak wa' pa tak we k'ij ri': cachoch, cachalal, qui nan, calc'ual, culew, pune' ruc' rikoj c'ax. Chupam c'ut ri c'ac' uwächulew, cäquirik na ri junalic c'aslemal." 
Mark10:31 E q'ui ri e nabe quebux na q'uisbal. Are c'u ri e q'uisbal quebux na nabe.” 
Mark10:32 E benak c'u pa ri be cätajin quepaki' pa Jerusalen, nabe c'u ri Jesus chquiwäch ri u tijoxelab. Ri e are' xemayinic, are' c'ut ri e teren chquij quixe'n quib. Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij chi jumul ri cablajuj, xuchaplej u bixic chque jas ri cuc'ulmaj na ri are'." 
Mark10:33 “Chiwilampe', cujpaki pa Jerusalen. Ri Rija'l Winak cäjach na pa qui k'ab ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri ajtijab re ri pixab. Cäquic'okoj c'u na che cämical, cäquijach na pa qui k'ab ri man e qui winakil taj." 
Mark10:34 Cäquetz'bej na u wäch, cäquichubaj na u wäch, cäquich'ay na, cäquicämisaj na. Churox k'ij c'ut cäc'astaj na.”" 
Mark10:35 Xekeb c'u ri e u c'ojol ri Zebedey ruc' ri Jesus, ri Santiag xukuje' ri Xuan. Xquibij che: “Ajtij, cäkaj chi caban la chke jas ri cakatz'onoj che la.”" 
Mark10:36 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿Jas ri quiwaj quinban chiwe?” 
Mark10:37 Xquibij che: “Ya' la chke chi cujet'uyul uc' la aretak cänimarisax na k'ij la, ri jun pa ri iquiak'ab la, ri jun chic pa ri moxk'ab la.”" 
Mark10:38 Xubij ri Jesus chque: “Man iweta'm taj jas ri quitz'onoj. ¿La quixcuinic quitij iwech ri c'o chupam ri uq'uiabal ri quintij na in? ¿La quix cuinic quixoc'ow chupam ri quinc'ulmaj na?” 
Mark10:39 Xquibij che: “Cujcuinic.” Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Kastzij quitij na iwe ri u pam ri uq'uiabal ri quintij na in. Ix quixoc'ow na chupam ri quinc'ulmaj na. 
Mark10:40 Are c'u ri t'uyulem pa ri nu wiquiak'ab o pa ri nu moxk'ab, man pa nu k'ab ta c'o wi, xane' cäya'taj na chque ri e suc'umam chi quebet'uyul na chila'.”" 
Mark10:41 Ri lajuj, aretak xquito, xpe coyowal chque ri Santiag xukuje' ri Xuan." 
Mark10:42 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij, xubij chque: “i weta'm chi ri winak ri ya'tal chque chi e qui nimakil tak ri tinimit, quetakan paquiwi', xukuje' ri nimak qui k'ij chquixo'l, c'o qui takanic paquiwi'." 
Mark10:43 Man je ta c'u wa' chixo'l ix. Xane' apachin ri cäraj cux nim u k'ij chixo'l, rajawaxic chi cux pataninel iwech." 
Mark10:44 Apachin chiwe ri cäraj cux nabe, rajawaxic chi cux pataninel iwe iwonojel." 
Mark10:45 Xukuje' ne ri Rija'l Winak man xpe taj rech cäpatanixic, xane' rech cäpataninic. Xpe che u ya'ic ri u c'aslemal che qui tzokopixic q'ui winak.”" 
Mark10:46 Xebopan pa Jerico. Elem bic rech ri Jesus pa Jerico e rachilam ri u tijoxelab cuc' q'uialaj winak. C'o chila' jun achi Bartimey u bi', u c'ojol ri Timey, are' moy, xukuje' molonel, t'uyul chuchi' ri be." 
Mark10:47 Aretak xuto chi are ri Jesus aj Nazaret coc'owic, xuchaplej u rakic u chi', xubij: “¡Jesus, lal Rija'l ri David, chel c'u'x la chwe!”" 
Mark10:48 E q'ui c'u ri winak xquiyajo, rech man cäch'aw taj. Ri are' sibalaj xurak na u chi': “¡Lal Rija'l ri David, chel c'u'x la chwe!”" 
Mark10:49 Xtaq'ui' c'u ri Jesus, xubij: “Chisiq'uij ulok.” Xsiq'uix c'u ri moy, xbix che: “Chajiquiba a c'u'x, chatwalijok. Ri Jesus catusiq'uij.”" 
Mark10:50 Ri Bartimey xurokij can ri u k'u', aninak xwalijic, xbe ruc' ri Jesus." 
Mark10:51 Xch'aw ri Jesus, xubij che: “¿Jas ri cawaj quinban chawe?” Ri moy xubij che: “Ajtij, quinwaj chi quinca'yic.”" 
Mark10:52 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Jät, xatcunataj rumal ri a cojonic.” Chanim xca'yic, xteri' c'u chrij ri Jesus." 
Mark11:1 Aretak xenakajin che ri Jerusalen, xebopan c'u pa Betpaje xukuje' Betan, chuwäch ri qui juyubal tak ri u Che'al Aseitun. Ri Jesus xebutak bic quieb u tijoxelab," 
Mark11:2 xubij chque: “Jix pa ri alaj tinimit ri c'o apan chiwäch. Chanim, aretak quixopanic, quirika' na jun alaj bur yukulic, ri mawi jun winak t'uyulinak chrij. Chiquira', chic'ama' ulok." 
Mark11:3 We c'o jun cubij chiwe: ‘¿Jasche je quiban wa'?’, chibij: ‘Rajawaxic che ri Ajawaxel, cutzelextaj c'u na.’ ”" 
Mark11:4 Xebec, xequirika' ri alaj bur yukul chuchi' ri ja chi ri be, xquiquir c'ut." 
Mark11:5 Jujun chque ri e c'o chila' xquibij chque: “¿Jas ri quibano xiquir ri alaj bur?” 
Mark11:6 Ri tijoxelab xquibij chque jas ri u bim ri Jesus, xeya' c'u can cumal." 
Mark11:7 Xquic'am ulok ri alaj bur che ri Jesus. Xequiya' ri qui k'u' chrij, xt'uyi' c'u ri Jesus chrij." 
Mark11:8 E q'ui c'ut xquilic' ri qui k'u' pa ri u be. Niq'uiaj chic xequich'upu' ulok alaj tak u k'ab che' pa tak ri juyub xequijabuj pa ri u be. 
Mark11:9 Ri winak ri e nabejinak chuwäch ri Jesus cuc' ri e teretoj chrij xquirak qui chi', xquibij: “¡Nim u k'ij! ¡Tewichi'm ri Jun ri petinak pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel!" 
Mark11:10 ¡Tewichi'm ri rajawinic ri ka mam David ri petinak! ¡Sibalaj nim u k'ij ri Dios aj chicaj!” 
Mark11:11 Xoc c'u ri Jesus pa Jerusalen pa ri rachoch Dios. Xca'y pa conojel ri c'olbal. Xebe c'ut pa Betan e rachil ri cablajuj u tijoxelab benak chi c'ut ri k'ij. 
Mark11:12 Chucab k'ij chic, aretak xebel ulok pa Betan, ri Jesus xnumic." 
Mark11:13 Xril apan chi naj jun u che'al higo, c'o u xak. Xbe che rilic we ne c'o u wäch curika'. Aretak c'u xopan ruc', man c'o ta xuriko, xane' xuwi ri u xak, c'ä majok c'u u k'ijol ri higo." 
Mark11:14 Xch'aw ri Jesus, xubij che ri che'; “C'o jun mätijow chi a wäch mawi jumul chbe k'ij sak.” Xquita' c'u ri e u tijoxelab." 
Mark11:15 Xopan pa Jerusalen, xoc pa ri rachoch Dios. Xuchaplej quesaxic bic ri winak ri quec'ayinic xukuje' ri quelok'oman pa ri rachoch Dios. Xebutzak ri qui mexa ri q'uexal tak puak. Xebutzak ri qui tem ri c'ayil tak palomax." 
Mark11:16 Man xuya' ta c'olbal che jun chi rekam u c'ay copan pa ri rachoch Dios. 
Mark11:17 Xebutijoj, xubij chque: “¿La ma ta tz'ibatalic: ‘Ri wachoch cäbix na ja re ch'awem ruc' Dios che cumal conojel ri nimak tak tinimit?’ Ri ix c'ut i banom qui c'olbal eläk'omab che.”" 
Mark11:18 Xquita' ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri ajtijab re ri pixab. Cäquitzucuj c'ut jas ri cäquiban che u cämisaxic ri Jesus. Cäquixe'j c'u quib chuwäch, rumal rech chi q'uialaj winak cäquimay ri u tijonic." 
Mark11:19 Aretak xk'ekal chic, xel bic pa ri tinimit." 
Mark11:20 Ak'ab c'ut aretak xeboc'ow pa ri be, xquil ri u che'al higo chaki'jarinak chic c'ä chuxe'." 
Mark11:21 Xnataj c'u che ri Lu', xubij che ri Jesus: “Ajtij, chilampe la. Ri u che'al higo ri xc'okoj la, chaki'jaric chic.”" 
Mark11:22 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Chc'ol i cojonic che ri Dios. 
Mark11:23 Kastzij quinbij chiwe chi apachin ri cubij che we juyub ri': ‘Chatel chi', chaq'uiaka' awib pa ri plo,’ we je cubij man cuban ta quieb u c'u'x, xane' cäcojonic chi cäbantaj na ri cubij, je cäbantaj na." 
Mark11:24 Rumal c'u ri', quinbij chiwe chi ronojel ri quita' pa ch'awem ruc' Dios, chicojo' chi quic'am na jas ri quito, cäbantaj c'u na chiwe." 
Mark11:25 Aretak ix c'o pa ch'awem ruc' Dios, we c'o jas quina' chrij jun winak chic, chi sacha' u mac, rech ri i Tat ri c'o chila' chicaj xukuje' cusach na ri i mac ix.”" 
Mark11:26  
Mark11:27 Bitajinak chi c'u wa' xetzelej pa Jerusalen. Aretak c'u cätajin cawacat ri Jesus pa ri rachoch Dios. Xepe ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob e cachil ri ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' ri nimak tak tatayib, xebopan ruc'." 
Mark11:28 Xquic'ot u chi': “¿Ruc' jachique takanic caban ronojel wa'? ¿Jachin c'u yowinak we takanic ri' pa a k'ab che qui banic we jastak ri'?” 
Mark11:29 Xubij ri Jesus chque: “Xukuje' ri in quinta' jun tzij chiwe, chibij ba' chwe. Te c'u ri' quinbij na chiwe jachin yowinak we takanic ri' pa nu k'ab che qui banic we jastak ri':" 
Mark11:30 Ri bautism rumal ri Xuan, ¿la aj chicaj? o ¿la quech winak?”" 
Mark11:31 Ri e are' xquichomala' chquixo'l, xquibij: “We cäkabij, ‘re ri Dios’, ri are' cubij na: ‘¿Jas c'u che man xicoj ri cubij?’" 
Mark11:32 We cäkabij chi ‘quech winak’, elinak c'u chi sak chquiwäch conojel ri winak chi ri Xuan are jun k'axal tzij. Cäquixe'j c'u quib chquiwäch ri winak.”" 
Mark11:33 Xquitzelej c'u u wäch ri u tzij ri Jesus, xquibij: “Man keta'm taj.” Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Mawi ri in quinbij chiwe jachin yowinak takanic pa nu k'ab che qui banic we jastak ri'.”" 
Mark12:1 Ri Jesus xuchaplej qui ch'abexic ri winak cuc' c'ambal tak no'j, xubij: “C'o jun achi xuban jun ticbal uva, xuk'atij c'u rij, xuc'ot jun pitz'bal uva, xuyac jun tac'atic ja. Te c'u ri' xuya' can pa kajomal chque ajchaquib, xbe naj." 
Mark12:2 Aretak xurik ri u k'ijol ri uva, ri achi xutak ulok jun pataninel cuc' ri ajchaquib che u c'amic re ri u wächinic ri uva." 
Mark12:3 Ri ajchaquib c'ut xquichapo, xquich'ayo xcokataj bic. Man c'o ta xquiya' bic che." 
Mark12:4 Ri achi xutak chi ulok jun pataninel cuc' ri ajchaquib. Ri e are' c'ut xquiq'uiak ri pataninel che abaj, xquisoc chujolom, xquiyok'o." 
Mark12:5 Ri achi xutak chi ulok jun chi u pataninel. Ri ajchaquib c'ut xquicämisaj. Xukuje' xebutak ulok niq'uiaj u pataninelab chic. Ri ajchaquib xequich'ay niq'uiaj chque, xequicämisaj niq'uiaj chic." 
Mark12:6 C'ä c'o na jun ruc' ri achi, are wa' ri lok'alaj u c'ojol. Chuq'uisbalil xutak ulok ri are' cuc' ri ajchaquib. Xuchomaj: ‘Nim cäquil wi na ri nu c'ojol.’" 
Mark12:7 Ri ajchaquib je xquibila' wa' chquixo'l: ‘Are wa' ri echbenel. Tisaj, chkacämisaj. Cujcanaj c'u can uj puwi' ri rechbal.’" 
Mark12:8 Xquichapo, xquicämisaj, xquesaj bic pa ri ticbal uva.”" 
Mark12:9 Ri Jesus xubij: “¿Jas c'u cuban na ri rajaw ri ticbal uva? Cäpe na che qui cämisaxic ri ajchaquib. Cuya' c'u na ri u ticbal uva pa kajomal chque niq'uiaj chic. 
Mark12:10 ¿La ma ta i siq'uim we Tz'ibatalic ri'?: ‘Ri abaj ri xq'uiak can cumal ri yacal tak ja, are abaj wa' ri xux na ri nim u patan." 
Mark12:11 Rumal ri Ajawaxel xban wa', mayibal c'u wa chquiwäch ri ka bak'wäch’.”" 
Mark12:12 Are ta c'u xcaj xquiyut ta bic ri Jesus, xquich'ob c'ut chi xucoj we c'ambal no'j ri' che qui c'ulelaxic. Rumal c'u rech chi caquixe'j quib chquiwäch ri winak, xquiya' canok xebec." 
Mark12:13 Xetak ulok jujun chque ri pariseyib xukuje' jujun chque ri aj herodianib ruc' ri Jesus, rech cubij jun tzij ri caquitzujubej rech." 
Mark12:14 Xebopan ruc' ri Jesus, xquibij che: “Aj tij, keta'm chi lal cäbij la ri kastzij, chi man coc ta la il chuwäch jachin jun; man are ta c'u caca'yej la ri qui wäch ri winak, xane' catijon la ruc' kastzij chrij ri u be ri Dios. ¿La ya'talic cakatoj tojbal che ri nimalaj k'atal tzij Sesar, o man ya'tal taj?”" 
Mark12:15 Ri Jesus reta'm chi xa quieb qui wäch, xubij chque: “¿Jasche quic'am u pa nu chi'? Chic'ama' ulok jun puak, rech quinwilo.”" 
Mark12:16 Aretak xquic'am ulok, xubij chque: “¿Jachin u palaj wa' ri c'o chuwäch ri puak xukuje' ri bi'aj ri tz'ibatalic?” Xquibij che: “Rech ri Sesar.”" 
Mark12:17 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque: “Chiya' che ri Sesar ri rech ri Sesar. Xukuje' chiya' che ri Dios ri rech ri Dios.” Xquimay c'u ri xubij chque. 
Mark12:18 Xebopan jujun saduseyib ruc' ri Jesus. Ri e are' cäquibij chi man quec'astaj taj ri cäminakib. Xquic'ot u chi' ri Jesus, xquibij:" 
Mark12:19 “Aj tij, ri Moises xutz'ibaj can chke, chi we c'o jun achi cäcämic, cuya' can rixokil, we c'u man e c'o ta can ralc'ual ruc', rajawaxic chi ri rachalal cäc'uli' na ruc' ri malca'n ixok. Jeri' ri e ralc'ual ri quec'oji' na ruc', cuban na chque chi je ta ne e ralc'ual ri rachalal ri xcämic." 
Mark12:20 E c'o c'u wukub achijab cachalal quib. Ri nabeal xc'uli'c, xcäm c'ut, man c'o ta ralc'ual xuya' canok." 
Mark12:21 Ri ucab xc'uli' ruc' ri malca'n, xcäm c'ut, man c'o ta ralc'ual xuya' canok. Jeri' ri urox xukuje'." 
Mark12:22 Ri wukub xec'uli' ruc' ri ixok, man c'o ta c'u calc'ual xquiya' canok. Aretak xecäm bic conojel, xukuje' ri ixok xcäm bic." 
Mark12:23 Ri ixok ri' xux c'u na quixokil ri wukub, aretak quec'astaj na ri cäminakib, ¿jachin c'u lo chque ri wukub achijab cuban na rixokil che ri ixok?”" 
Mark12:24 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ix subutajinak, rumal rech chi man iweta'm ta ri Tz'ibatalic, mawi ri u cuinem ri Dios." 
Mark12:25 Aretak c'u quec'astaj na ri cäminakib, man quec'uli' ta chic, mawi cäquiya' quib che c'ulanem, xane' e je jas ri tako'nib ri e c'o chila' chicaj." 
Mark12:26 C'o chi jun tzij quinbij chquij ri cäminakib, chi quec'astaj na: ¿La ma ta i siq'uim pa ri u wuj ri Moises jawije' tz'ibatal wi aretak ri Dios xuch'abej ri Moises pa ri juwi' q'uix?, xubij: ‘In ri' ri u Dios ri Abraham, ri u Dios ri Isaac, ri u Dios ri Jacob.’" 
Mark12:27 Ri Dios, man are ta qui Dios cäminakib, xane' are qui Dios ri e c'aslic. Ri ix sibalaj ix sachinak.”" 
Mark12:28 Aretak xril ri achi chi ri Jesus utz u wäch u tzelexic ri u tzij jun chque ri ajtijab re ri pixab xubano, xuta' ri xquitzijoj ri achijab ruc' ri Jesus. Reta'm c'ut chi ri Jesus utz u tzelexic ri qui tzij xubano. Xopan ruc' ri Jesus, xubij che: “¿Jachique ri takomal ri nim na u banic chquiwäch conojel?”" 
Mark12:29 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Ri nabe takanic are wa' ronojel: ‘Chatatabej, Israel, ri Ajawaxel ri ka Dios, are wa' xa jun chi Ajawaxel. Chalok'ok'ej ba ri Ajawaxel a Dios ruc' ronojel awanima', ruc' ronojel a c'aslibal, ruc' ronojel a chomanic xukuje' ruc' ronojel a chuk'ab.’" 
Mark12:30  
Mark12:31 Ri ucab cäjunamataj ruc' wa': ‘Chalok'ok'ej ri awajil a tz'akat jas ri at calok'ok'ej awib.’ Man c'o ta chi jun takomal ri nim ta na u k'ij chquixo'l we quieb ri'.” 
Mark12:32 Xubij c'u ri ajtij che: “Utz, Ajtij. Kastzij ri bim la chi xuwi jun ri Dios, man c'o ta c'u jun chic chuwäch." 
Mark12:33 Kastzij ri bim la, chi we jun culok'ok'ej ri Dios ruc' ronojel ri ranima', ruc' ronojel ri retamanic, xukuje' ruc' ronojel ri u chuk'ab, xukuje' culok'ok'ej ri rajil u tz'akat je jas jun culok'ok'ej rib, are nim na qui k'ij chquiwäch conojel ri sipanic ri queporox che tabal tok'ob puwi ri porobal.”" 
Mark12:34 Ri Jesus, aretak xuta' ri u tzij ri ajtij, xrilo chi c'o u no'j, xubij che: “Man naj ta at c'o wi che ri rajawibal ri Dios.” Man c'o ta chi jun xuc'ot u chi' ri Jesus, conojel cäquixe'j chi quib che u c'otic u chi'." 
Mark12:35 Ri Jesus cätajin quebutijoj ri winak pa ri rachoch Dios, xubij chque: “¿Jasche cäquibij ri ajtijab re ri pixab chi ri Crist are u c'ojol ri David?" 
Mark12:36 Kas are c'u ri David xubij can rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios: Xubij ri Ajawaxel che ri Wajaw: ‘Chatt'uyul pa nu wiquiak'ab, c'ä quebencoj na ri a c'ulel che qui tac'alibal ri e awakan.’" 
Mark12:37 We c'u kas are' ri David xbinic chi Rajaw, ¿jas c'u che cäbixic chi u c'ojol?” Ri winak c'ut, sibalaj e q'ui chic qui mulin quib, cäquicot canima' chutatabexic ri u tzij ri Jesus." 
Mark12:38 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque pa ri u tijonic: “Chichajij iwib chquiwäch ri ajtijab re ri pixab. Ri e are' utz cäquina'o quebinicatic qui cojom chorachak tak catz'iak. Utz cäquilo chi ri winak cäquiya' rutzil qui wäch pa tak ri c'ayibal. 
Mark12:39 Caquit'uyuba quib pa tak ri c'olbal ri nimak na qui k'ij pa tak ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab, cäquitzucuj ri t'uyulibal ri nimak qui k'ij pa ri ula'nic." 
Mark12:40 Cäquitokij cachoch ri ixokib malca'nib. Cäquiyuk rakan ri qui ch'awem ruc' Dios xa rech utz quebil cumal ri winak. Rumal c'u wa' nim na ri c'äjisabal qui wäch cäquirik na ri ajtijab re ri pixab.” 
Mark12:41 T'uyul c'u ri Jesus chuwäch ri c'olbal ri cäya' wi ri cuchuj. Cärilo jas ri cäquiban ri winak cäquiya' ri puak chupam ri c'olbal cuchuj. Xepe q'ui k'inomab, xquiya' nimak tak qui cuchuj." 
Mark12:42 Xopan c'u jun mebalaj chuchu' malca'n, xebuya' quieb alaj tak puak re quiäk ch'ich', ri xa jubik' cajil." 
Mark12:43 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij ri u tijoxelab, xubij chque: “Kastzij quinbij chiwe chi we mebalaj chuchu' malca'n ri' are nim na ri xuya' chquiwäch conojel ri qui yo'm qui cuchuj chupam ri c'olbal cuchuj." 
Mark12:44 Conojel are qui yo'm jubik' che ri to'tajinak can cuc'. Are c'u we chuchu' malca'n ri', pune' c'o rajawaxic che, xuya' ronojel ri c'o ruc', ronojel ri tzukbal rech.”" 
Mark13:1 Aretak xel ulok ri Jesus pa ri rachoch Dios, jun chque ri u tijoxelab xubij che: “¡Ajtij, chilampe la tak we abaj ri' xukuje' nimak tak ja ri'!”" 
Mark13:2 Ri Jesus xubij che: “¿La quebawil we nimak tak ja ri'? Copan na jun k'ij aretak man cäcanaj ta can jun abaj puwi' ri jun chic, xane' ronojel cäwulix na.”" 
Mark13:3 Aretak xt'uyi' ri Jesus chupam ri qui juyubal tak ri u Che'al Aseitun, chuwäch apan ri rachoch Dios, ri Lu', ri Santiag, ri Xuan xukuje' ri Trix xquita' che xa pa u tuquiel wi." 
Mark13:4 Bij la chke: “¿Jampa' quebantaj we jastak ri'? ¿Jas c'u ri etal aretak majok chebantaj ronojel wa'?” 
Mark13:5 Ri Jesus xuchaplej u bixic chque: “Chichajij iwib c'o jun mixsubuwic. 
Mark13:6 E q'ui quepe na, pa ri nu bi' cäquibij: ‘In ri' ri Crist’. Quequisub na q'ui winak." 
Mark13:7 Aretak chito chi e c'o ch'o'j, aretak quita' na u tzijol tak ch'o'j, mixsachic. Rajawaxic c'ut chi je cäc'ulmax na wa'; c'ä majok c'u ri q'uistajic." 
Mark13:8 Cäwalij na jun nim tinimit chrij jun nim tinimit chic, cäwalij na jun ajawibal chrij jun ajawibal chic. Cuban na cabrakan pa jalajoj tak c'olbal, quepe na wi'jal. Chaplebal c'u wa' que k'oxowem." 
Mark13:9 Ri ix c'ut chichajij iwib. Quixjach c'u na pa tak qui k'ab ri k'atal tak tzij. Quixch'ay na pa tak ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Quixc'am na bic chquiwäch ri c'o takanic pa qui k'ab xukuje' chquiwäch ajawinelab rumal wech in. Jeri' cuya' quixk'alajisan na chwij chquiwäch ri e are'. 
Mark13:10 Rajawaxic chi nabe cätzijox na ri tzij re colobal ib pa tak conojel nimak tak tinimit. 
Mark13:11 Aretak quixc'am na bic chquiwäch ri k'atal tak tzij, mixe'j iwib, michomaj bic jas ri quibij na. Xane' chitzijoj jas ri cäya' na chiwe pa ri jok'otaj ri'. Man ix ta c'ut ri quixtzijonic, xane' are ri Ruxlabal ri Dios." 
Mark13:12 E c'o winak quequijach na ri cachalal pa cämisaxic, xukuje' c'o tatayib quequijach na ri calc'ual. E c'o alc'ualaxelab ri cäquiwalijisaj na quib chquij ri qui tat qui nan, quequicämisaj na." 
Mark13:13 Quetzelax na i wäch cumal conojel rumal rech ri nu bi'. Apachin c'u ri cuk'i' ri c'ax c'ä pa ri q'uistajic, are' ri' cacolotaj na." 
Mark13:14 Aretak c'u quiwil ri tz'ilalaj jasach pa ri c'olbal ri man takal ta wi che chi cac'oji' chila', (ri jun ri cusiq'uij we tzij ri', chuch'obo'), c'äte ri' ri e c'o pa Judey chebanimaj bic pa tak ri juyub." 
Mark13:14 Aretak c'u quiwil ri tz'ilalaj jasach pa ri c'olbal ri man takal ta wi che chi cac'oji' chila', (ri jun ri cusiq'uij we tzij ri', chuch'obo'), c'äte ri' ri e c'o pa Judey chebanimaj bic pa tak ri juyub." 
Mark13:15 Ri c'o puwi' ri ja, mäkaj ulok moc pa ri ja che u c'amic bic jun jasach." 
Mark13:16 Ri c'o pa ri juyub, mätzelej ulok che u c'amic bic ri u k'u'." 
Mark13:17 ¡Tok'ob c'u qui wäch ri ixokib yawab tak winak chic! ¡Tok'ob qui wäch ri ixokib ri quetu'bisanic! 
Mark13:18 Chitz'onoj che ri Dios chi mäc'ulmax wa' pa ri u k'ijol ri sakloloj tew. 
Mark13:19 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' quepe na c'axc'olil ri man ilom ta ulok kas pa ri u tiquiritajic ri uwächulew c'ä camic ri xuban ri Dios, mawi cäc'ulmax na." 
Mark13:20 We ta ma ta queco'pix we k'ij ri' rumal ri Ajawaxel, ma ta c'o jun ri cac'asi' ta canok. Rumal c'u quech ri winak ri e u cha'om, cuco'pisaj ri k'ij ri'." 
Mark13:21 We c'o c'u jun cubij chiwe: ‘Chiwilampe', waral c'o wi ri Crist’, o ‘Chiwilampe', jela' c'o wi’, micoj ri cubij." 
Mark13:22 Quewalij na winak ri cäquijaluj quib chi e crist, cäquijaluj quib chi e k'axal tak tzij. Quequiban na etal xukuje' mayibal che qui subic we quecuin chque xukuje' ne ri e cha'talic." 
Mark13:23 Ri ix c'ut chiwila'. Nu bim chi c'u apan ronojel wa' chiwe.” 
Mark13:24 “Pa tak c'ut ri k'ij ri', ri cac'ow ri k'ijol rech ri c'axc'olil, ri k'ij cäk'ekumar na, ri ic' man cuya' ta na ri u sakil." 
Mark13:25 Ri ch'imil ri e c'o chicaj quetzak na ulok, ri chuk'ab ri e c'o chicaj queyicopisax na." 
Mark13:26 C'äte ri' quil na ri Rija'l Winak petinak pa tak ri sutz' ruc' nimalaj cuinem, nim u k'ij cäpetic." 
Mark13:27 C'äte ri' quebutak c'u na ri e u tako'nib aj caj, quebumulij na ri e u cha'om, pa ri elebal k'ij, pa ri u kajebal k'ij, ri e c'o pa u moxk'ab xukuje' u wiquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij, c'ä naj che ri uwächulew, ri c'ä naj che ri caj." 
Mark13:28 Chich'obo' ri c'ambal no'j chrij ri u che'al higo: Aretak queräxar ri u k'ab, quetux c'u ri u xak, iweta'm chi petinak chic ri k'aläj." 
Mark13:29 Jeri' xukuje' ri ix, aretak quiwilo chi quebantaj we jastak ri', chich'obo' chi ri Rija'l Winak c'o chic, chi' tak ri ja." 
Mark13:30 Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi c'ä maja' quecäm ri winak ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew camic, aretak quec'ulmax na conojel we jastak ri'." 
Mark13:31 Queboc'ow na ri caj ulew. Are c'u ri nu tzij man queboc'ow taj. 
Mark13:32 Man c'o ta jun reta'm jachique jok'otaj, mawi jachique k'ij cäbantaj na wa'. Man queta'm ta ri tako'nib aj caj, mawi ne ri C'ojolaxel. Xuwi ri Tataxel reta'm." 
Mark13:33 Chiwila', chixc'asc'atok; man iweta'm ta c'u ri k'ij." 
Mark13:34 Are je jas jun achi ri xbe naj, xuya' can ri rachoch, xuya' can takanic pa qui k'ab ri rajchaquib, xuya' can qui chac chquijujunal. Xtakan che ri chajil uchi'ja chi rajawaxic cäc'asc'atic." 
Mark13:35 Chixc'asc'at ba'. Man iweta'm ta c'ut jampa' cäpe ri rajaw ja, we pa xk'ekal, we pa niq'uiaj ak'ab, we aretak cok' ri ama' ec', we aretak cäsakaric." 
Mark13:36 Chixc'asc'at ba', rech we xa' c'ätetal cäpetic, mixlurika' cätajin quixwaric." 
Mark13:37 Ri quinbij chiwe, quinbij c'u chque conojel: Chixc'asc'atok.”" 
Mark14:1 Xa' quieb k'ij cäraj che ri nimak'ij re ri oc'owem, aretak catij ri caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am ruc'. Ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob cuc' ri ajtijab re ri pixab cäquitzucuj jas cäquiban na che u chapic ri Jesus ruc' subunic rech cäquicämisaj." 
Mark14:2 Xquibij c'ut: “¡Machap pa ri nimak'ij, rech metuquin ri winak!”" 
Mark14:3 C'o c'u ri Jesus pa Betan cho rachoch ri Simon, ri xc'oji' ch'a'c chrij. Ri Jesus c'o pa ri mexa. Xopan jun ixok, ruc'am jun lime't re abaj alabastr. C'o c'oc'alaj cunabal re nard chupam, man yujtal ta ruc' jun jasach chic, sibalaj pakal rajil. Xuwotz'ij ri lime't, xuk'ij ri c'oc'alaj cunabal pa u jolom ri Jesus." 
Mark14:4 E c'o c'u jujun ri xeyojtaj pa canima', xquibij: “¿Jasche xsach u wäch we c'oc'alaj cunabal ri'?" 
Mark14:5 Utz na we ta xc'ayix we c'oc'alaj cunabal ri' ri cuch'äc jun ajchac pa jujun junab chac pa tak ri k'ij ri', xya' ta c'u chque ri mebayib.” Xewixwit c'u chrij ri ixok." 
Mark14:6 Ri Jesus c'ut xubij: “Chiya' canok. ¿Jasche quiya' latz' che? Utzalaj chac xuban chwe. 
Mark14:7 Ronojel k'ij e c'o mebayib iwuc'. Aretak c'u quiwaj, quixcuinic quiban utzil chque. Are c'u ri in man ronojel ta k'ij in c'o iwuc'." 
Mark14:8 We ixok ri' xubano jas ri xcuin che u banic. Xubil bic ri nu cuerp c'ä majok chincämok. 
Mark14:9 Kastzij quinbij chiwe chi apawije' ta ne ri cätzijox wi na ri tzij re colobal ib cho ronojel ri uwächulew, chila' xukuje' cätzijox wi na jas ri xuban we ixok ri' chwe. Are natabal re wa'.”" 
Mark14:10 C'äte ri' xel bic ri Judas Iscariot, jun chque ri cablajuj. Xbe cuc' ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob che u jachic ri Jesus pa qui k'ab." 
Mark14:11 Aretak ri e are' xquita' ri u tzij ri Judas, xequicotic, xquichi'j puak che. Cutzucuj c'u ri Judas jun k'ij rech cujach ri Jesus pa qui k'ab." 
Mark14:12 Pa ri nabe k'ij re ri tijbal caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am ruc', aretak cäcämisax ri chij re ri oc'owem, ri u tijoxelab xquibij che ri Jesus: “¿Jawije' caj wi la cäkasuc'umaj wi ri wa'im re ri oc'owem rech cätij la?”" 
Mark14:13 Ri Jesus xebutak bic quieb chque ri u tijoxelab, xubij chque: “Jix pa ri tinimit. Quirika' na jun achi ri ruc'am jun k'ebal ja'. Chiterenej bic." 
Mark14:14 Jawije' c'u ri coc wi ri achi, chibij che ri rajaw ja: ‘Ri Ajtij cubij: ¿Jawije' c'o wi ri c'olbal ri quintij wi na ri wa'im re ri oc'owem cuc' ri nu tijoxelab?’" 
Mark14:15 Ri are' cuc'ut na jun nimalaj c'olbal chiwäch pa ri cawik ja. Suc'umam chic ri c'olbal. Chisuc'umaj ri wa'im re ri oc'owem chke chila'.” 
Mark14:16 Xebel c'u bic ri u tijoxelab, xebopan pa ri tinimit, je xquiriko jas ri u bim bic ri Jesus chque. Xquisuc'umaj c'u ri wa'im re ri oc'owem chila'." 
Mark14:17 Xk'ekal chic, xopan ri Jesus e rachilam ri cablajuj."
