Mark14:18 Aretak xeboc pa ri mexa, cätajin quewa'ic, xubij ri Jesus: “Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi c'o jun chiwe, ri cäwa' wuc', quinujacha' na.”" 
Mark14:19 Ri tijoxelab xquichaplej bisonic, chquijujunal xquibij che: “¿La in lo?”" 
Mark14:20 Ri are' xubij chque: “Jun chque ri cablajuj, ri curub ri u caxlanwa wuc' pa ri lak." 
Mark14:21 Kastzij ri Rija'l Winak cäbec, jas ri tz'ibatal chrij. ¡C'ax c'u curik na ri achi ri cäjachow ri Rija'l Winak! Are ta utz ri' che ri winak ri', we ta ma ta xalaxic.”" 
Mark14:22 Aretak cätajin quewa'ic, ri Jesus xuc'am ri caxlanwa, xutewichi'j, xupiro, xuya' chque, xubij: “Chic'ama', are wa' ri nu cuerp.”" 
Mark14:23 Xukuje' xuc'am ri uq'uiabal, xumaltioxij c'u wa' che ri Dios, xuya' chque. Conojel c'ut xquitij que." 
Mark14:24 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Are' nu quiq'uel wa', ri rumal cajiquibax ri c'ac' c'ulwächinic, ri cätix na che qui to'ic q'uialaj winak." 
Mark14:25 Kastzij quinbij chiwe chi man quintij ta chi na we ri u wa'l uva, c'ä pa ri k'ij aretak quintij chi na jumul pa ri rajawibal ri Dios.”" 
Mark14:26 Aretak qui bixom chi jun bix, xebe pa ri qui Juyubal tak ri u Che'al Aseitun." 
Mark14:27 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Iwonojel quitzak na ri cu'lbal i c'u'x chwij, jas ri tz'ibatalic: ‘Quincämisaj na ri ajyuk', quejabun c'u na ri chij.’" 
Mark14:28 Aretak c'u chinc'astaj chquixo'l ri cäminakib, nabe quinbe na pa Galiley chiwäch.”" 
Mark14:29 Are c'u ri Lu' xubij che: “Pune' conojel caquitzak na, ri cu'lbal qui c'u'x man in je taj ri in.”" 
Mark14:30 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Kastzij quinbij chawe chi camic pa we ak'ab ri', c'ä majok camul cok' ri ama' ec', oxmul cabij na chi man aweta'm ta nu wäch.”" 
Mark14:31 Are c'u ri Lu' xucoj u chuk'ab che u bixic che ri Jesus: “Pune' rajawaxic quincäm junam uc' la, mawi jumul quinbij na chi man weta'm ta wäch la.” Jewa' xukuje' xquibij conojel ri tijoxelab." 
Mark14:32 Xebopan pa ri c'olbal Jetsemani u bi'. Xubij ri Jesus chque ri u tijoxelab: “Chixt'uyul can waral, quinban na ch'awem ruc' Dios.”" 
Mark14:33 Xebuc'am bic ri Lu', ri Santiag, ri Xuan che rachil. Ri Jesus xuchaplej nimalaj bis, xc'axc'ob ri ranima'." 
Mark14:34 Xubij chque: “Sibalaj cäbison ri wanima'. Chixcanaj can waral, chixc'asc'atok.”" 
Mark14:35 Xnabej apan jubik', xutzak rib pa ulew, xutz'onoj che ri Dios chi we bantajel ma ta copan we jok'otaj ri'." 
Mark14:36 Xubij: “Nu Tat, ri lal cäcuin la che u banic ronojel. Chesaj la we kumubal re c'axc'olil ri' chnuwäch. Bana' ba la jas ri caj la, man are ta ri quinwaj in.”" 
Mark14:37 Xtzelej c'ut jawije' ri e c'o wi canok, xebulurika' quewaric. Xubij che ri Lu': “Simon, ¿la catwaric? ¿La ma ta xatcuinic xatc'asc'at ta jun jok'otaj wuc'?" 
Mark14:38 Chixc'asc'atok, chibana' ch'awem ruc' Dios, rech man quixtzak taj aretak quixtakchi'x che mac. Ri iwanima' cäraj, are c'u ri i cuerp man c'o ta u chuk'ab.”" 
Mark14:39 Ri Jesus xbe chi jumul, xuban ch'awem ruc' Dios. Je xubij jas ri xubij nabe." 
Mark14:40 Xtzelej chi ulok, xebulurika' ri u tijoxelab cätajin quewaric, rumal rech chi c'o qui waram. Man cäquirik ta c'ut jas cäquibij che ri Jesus." 
Mark14:41 Xbe ri Jesus churox mul, xubij chque: “Chixwar ba', chixuxlanok. Ruc' wa', xopan ri jok'otaj. Chiwilampe', ri Rija'l Winak cäjach na pa qui k'ab ajmaquib." 
Mark14:42 Chixwalijok, jo'. Chiwilampe', petinak ri jachal wech.”" 
Mark14:43 Aretak c'ä cätajin cäch'aw ri Jesus, chanim xpe ri Judas, jun chque ri cablajuj, e rachil q'ui winak. Cuc'am ch'ich', cuc'am che'. E takom ulok cumal ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, ri ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' ri nimak tak tatayib re ri tinimit." 
Mark14:44 Ri jachal re ri Jesus u yo'm chi etal chque, xubij: “Ri jun ri quintz'umaj, are ri'. Chichapa', kas utz u c'amic bic chibana'.”" 
Mark14:45 Aretak xpe ri Judas, chanim xkeb ruc' ri Jesus, xubij che: “¡Ajtij!” C'äte c'u ri', xutz'umaj." 
Mark14:46 C'äte ri' ri winak xquichap ri Jesus, xquiyutu." 
Mark14:47 Jun chque ri e tac'atoj chila' xresaj ri u ch'ich', xusoc ri u pataninel rech ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, xresaj apan ri u xiquin." 
Mark14:48 Xch'aw ri Jesus, xubij chque: “¿La je ta ne chrij jun eläk'om ix elinak wi ulok cuc' ch'ich' cuc' che' che nu chapic?" 
Mark14:49 Ronojel k'ij xinc'oji' iwuc', xebench'abej ri winak pa ri rachoch Dios, man xinichap ta c'ut. Je c'u cäban wa' chwe rech cäbantajic jas cubij ri Tz'ibatalic.”" 
Mark14:50 C'äte ri' conojel ri tijoxelab xquiya' can ri Jesus, xebanimajic." 
Mark14:51 Terenetal c'ut rumal jun ala ri xa' jun atz'iak re waram u q'uiakom chrij, xchap c'u cumal ri winak." 
Mark14:52 Ri are' c'ut xutzokopij can ri atz'iak, ch'analic xanimajic." 
Mark14:53 Xc'am bic ri Jesus chuwäch ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob. Conojel c'u ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob e cachil ri nimak tak tatayib re ri tinimit xukuje' ri ajtijab re ri pixab xquimulij quib chrij. 
Mark14:54 Are c'u ri Lu' xuterenej bic ri Jesus chi naj c'ä cho ri rachoch ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob. Xt'uyi' can cuc' ri chajinelab, cätajin cumik' rib chrij ri k'ak'." 
Mark14:55 Ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' conojel ri tatayib ri cäquik'at tzij paquiwi' ri aj judeyib, quequitzucuj winak ri cäquik'alajisaj tak mac chrij ri Jesus rech cäcämisaxic. Man quequirik ta c'ut." 
Mark14:56 E q'ui xquiban tzijtal chrij, man xak ta c'u junam xebel ri e qui k'alajisanic." 
Mark14:57 Xewalij jujun, xquiban tzijtal chrij, xquibij:" 
Mark14:58 “Ri uj xkata' we achi ri' aretak xubij: ‘In quinwulij na we rachoch Dios ri' ri banom cumal qui k'ab ri winak, pa oxib k'ij c'ut quinyac chi na jun ri man banom ta cumal winak.’ ”" 
Mark14:59 Mawi ruc' wa' junam xebel wi ri qui k'alajisanic. 
Mark14:60 Xwalij c'u ri qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob pa qui niq'uiajil ri winak, xuc'ot u chi' ri Jesus, xubij: “¿La man c'o jas catzelej u bixic? ¿Jas wa' ri cäquibij chawij?”" 
Mark14:61 Ri Jesus man xch'aw taj, man c'o ta jun tzij xutzelej u wäch. Ri e qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xuc'ot chi jumul u chi', xubij che: “¿La at ri' ri Crist, u C'ojol ri Tewichimalaj Dios?”" 
Mark14:62 Ri Jesus xubij che: “In ri'. Quiwil c'u na ri Rija'l Winak t'uyul pa ri u wiquiak'ab ri c'o ronojel u cuinem, petinak pa tak ri sutz' cho ri caj.”" 
Mark14:63 Are c'u ri e qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xujis ri ratz'iak, xubij: “¿Jas ta chic qui patan niq'uiaj k'alajisanelab chke?" 
Mark14:64 I tom chic chi cuc'ulelaj ri Dios. ¿Jas quichomaj?” Conojel xquik'at tzij puwi' chi takal u cämisaxic. 
Mark14:65 Jujun chque xquichaplej u chubaxic chu palaj, xquich'uk ri u palaj, xquit'oc che k'ab, xquibij che: “¡Chach'obo' jachin xatch'ayowic!” Ri chajinelab xquipak'ij k'ab che ri u palaj." 
Mark14:66 C'o c'u ri Lu' cho ri uwo ja iquim. Xpe jun ali, are jun chque ri pataninelab re ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Mark14:67 Xrilo chi cumik' rib ri Lu', xuca'yej, xubij che: “Ri at xukuje' xatc'oji' ruc' ri Jesus ri aj Nazaret.”" 
Mark14:68 Ri are' c'ut xresaj rib chupam, xubij: “Man weta'm taj u wäch, mawi quinch'ob ri cabij.” Xel c'u apan chuchi' ri ja. Xok' c'u ri ama' ec'." 
Mark14:69 Ri ali xril chi jumul ri Lu', xuchaplej u bixic chque ri e c'o chila': “Are' jun wa' chque.”" 
Mark14:70 Ri Lu' jumul chic xresaj rib chupam. Xa' nim jubik' chic, ri e c'o chila' xquibij chi jumul che ri Lu': “Kastzij ri at at jun chque; keta'm chi at aj Galiley.”" 
Mark14:71 Ri Lu' xuchaplej u c'okoxic rib xuban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na pa ri u bi' ri Dios, xubij: “Man weta'm ta u wäch we achi ri' ri quitzijoj.”" 
Mark14:72 Chanim ri ama' ec' xok' chucamul. Xnataj c'u che ri Lu' ri tzij ri u bim can ri Jesus che: “C'ä majok cok' camul ri ama' ec', oxmul a bim chic chi man aweta'm ta nu wäch.” Aretak ri Lu' xnataj wa' che, xk'utut ri ranima', xok'ic." 
Mark15:1 Sibalaj ak'ab ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob cuc' ri nimak tak tatayib re ri tinimit, ri ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' ri qui nimakil ri aj judeyib xquitala' qui no'j. Xquiyut ri Jesus, xquic'am bic, xquijach che ri Pilat." 
Mark15:2 Ri Pilat xuta' che: “¿La at ri' ri Cajawinel ri aj judeyib?” Ri Jesus xubij che: “Lal lal bininak.” 
Mark15:3 Ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob q'ui julum k'abam xquibij chrij. 
Mark15:4 Ri Pilat xuc'ot chi u chi' jumul, xubij: “¿La ma ta c'o catzelej u bixic? Chawila' joropa' ri jastak re ri julum k'abam caquibij chawij.”" 
Mark15:5 Ri Jesus mawi c'o jun tzij xubij. Je c'u ri' ri Pilat sibalaj xumayo. 
Mark15:6 Pa ronojel c'u nimak'ij ri Pilat cutzokopij bic jun chque ri e tz'apitz'oj pa che', apachin ta ne ri cäquita' ri winak che." 
Mark15:7 C'o c'u jun achi, Barabas u bi' tz'apim pa che' junam cuc' ri e rachil qui banom jun cämic pa jun walijisam ib." 
Mark15:8 Xquimulij c'u quib ri winak chuwäch ri Pilat, xquita' che chi chubana' jas ri qui nak'atisabal, chi cutzokopij bic jun chque ri e c'o pa che'." 
Mark15:9 Ri Pilat xuta' chque: “¿La quiwaj chi quintzokopij bic ri Cajawinel ri aj judeyib?” 
Mark15:10 Reta'm c'ut chi ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob qui jachom ri Jesus che, xa rumal rech chi c'ax cäquina' che." 
Mark15:11 Ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xquicoj qui c'u'x ri winak, chi are sibalaj utz cätzokopix bic ri Barabas chuq'uexwäch ri Jesus." 
Mark15:12 Ri Pilat xubij chque: “¿Jas c'u quiwaj quinban che we jun ri quibij chi are Cajawinel ri aj judeyib?” 
Mark15:13 Ri e are' xquirak qui chi' jumul chic, xquibij: “¡Chripa' la cho jun ripibal!”" 
Mark15:14 Ri Pilat xubij chque: “¿Jas etzelal u banom?” Ri winak c'ut sibalaj co xquirak qui chi': “¡Chripa' la cho jun ripibal!” 
Mark15:15 Ri Pilat are cäraj cubano jas ri qui rayibal ri winak. Xutzokopij bic ri Barabas chquiwäch. Xtakan c'u che u rapuxic ri Jesus. Xujach c'u bic chque ri winak rech caquiripo. 
Mark15:16 Ri ajch'ojab xquic'am bic ri Jesus cho ri ja re k'atbal tzij, xequisiq'uij conojel ri ajch'ojab ri e c'o chila'." 
Mark15:17 Xquicoj jun ratz'iak re morato. Xquicoj jun corona chu jolom, re quemom q'uix." 
Mark15:18 Te c'u ri' xquirak qui chi', xquibij: “¡Nim u k'ij, ri Cajawinel ri aj judeyib!”" 
Mark15:19 Xquik'osij jun aj che ri u jolom xquichubaj, xexuqui' chuwäch, xquik'ijilaj." 
Mark15:20 Aretak quetz'bem chi u wäch, xquesaj ri ratz'iak re morato, xquicoj ri kas ratz'iak chrij. Te c'u ri' xquesaj bic che u ripic." 
Mark15:21 C'o c'u jun achi Simon u bi', aj Siren, qui tat ri Alejandr xukuje' ri Rup. Ri Simon cätajin coc'owic, petem re pa juyub. Ri ajch'ojab xquicoj chuk'ab che rech cutelej bic ri u ripibal ri Jesus." 
Mark15:22 Xquic'am bic ri Jesus pa ri c'olbal Golgota, ri quel cubij u Bakil Jolomaj." 
Mark15:23 Xquiya' u wa'l uva yujtal ruc' mir (re cunabal che resaxic ri k'oxom), che ri Jesus rech cutijo. Man xuc'am ta c'ut." 
Mark15:24 Aretak qui ripom chic xquijach ri ratz'iak, chquiwäch ruc' taklebenic, che rilic jas ri cäquic'am bic chquijujunal." 
Mark15:25 Pa ri ubelej jok'otaj re ak'abil aretak xrip cho ri ripibal. 
Mark15:26 Ri u mac ri tz'ibax puwi', are wa': Ri Cajawinel ri aj Judeyib." 
Mark15:26 Ri u mac ri tz'ibax puwi', are wa': Ri Cajawinel ri aj Judeyib." 
Mark15:27 Xukuje' xerip quieb eläk'omab ruc', jun pa ri u wiquiak'ab, jun chic pa u mox k'ab." 
Mark15:28  
Mark15:29 Ri winak ri queboc'owic xquiyok'o, xquisutusa' ri qui jolom, xquibij: “¡Pa at ri cawulij ri rachoch Dios!, pa oxib k'ij c'ut cayac chi na," 
Mark15:30 chacolo awib chbil awib, chatkaj ulok cho ri ripibal.”" 
Mark15:31 Junam xukuje' ri qui nimakil ri cojol tak tabal tok'ob cuc' ri ajtijab re ri pixab xquetz'bej u wäch, xquibila' chquixo'l: “Xebucol niq'uiaj winak, man cäcuin ta c'u che u colic rib chbil rib." 
Mark15:32 Chkaj ulok ri Crist, Rajawinel Israel, cho ri ripibal, rech cäkilo, cujcojon c'ut.” Xukuje' c'u ne ri e ripom junam ruc' xeyok'on che." 
Mark15:33 Aretak xurik ri tiquil k'ij, xk'ekumar ronojel ri uwächulew c'ä pa ri oxib rajilabal ri benak k'ij." 
Mark15:34 Pa ri urox rajilabal ri benak k'ij ri Jesus xurak u chi' ruc' chuk'ab, xubij: “Eloi, Eloi, ¿lama sabactani?” Quel cubij wa: “Nu Dios, Nu Dios, ¿jasche xinya' la can nu tuquiel?”" 
Mark15:35 Jujun chque ri e c'o chila' aretak xquito, xquibij: “Chitampe', cusiq'uij ri Eliy.”" 
Mark15:36 Aninak xpe jun, xurub jun potzopic pa ch'amalaj u wa'l uva, xuya' puwi' jun aj, xuya' ak'an che ri Jesus rech cutz'ubu, xubij: “Chiweyej na, chkila' we cäpe ri Eliy che u kasaxic cho ri ripibal.”" 
Mark15:37 Ri Jesus co xurak u chi', xcämic." 
Mark15:38 Ri tasbal u pam ri rachoch Dios xjixjobic, quieb xubano, xchapletaj ulok ajsic c'ä iquim." 
Mark15:39 Ri qui nimal ri jun sient ajch'ojab tac'al chuwäch ri Jesus. Aretak xrilo chi je xuban wa' ri Jesus, aretak xcämic xubij: “Kastzij we achi ri' are' u C'ojol ri Dios.”" 
Mark15:40 E c'o ixokib ri cätajin cäquil ulok chi naj. Chquixo'l c'u ri ixokib ri' e c'o ri Mariy Magdalen; xukuje' ri Mariy qui nan ri Santiag ri chak'axel xukuje' ri Jose; xukuje' ri Salome. 
Mark15:41 We ixokib ri' quiterenem ulok ri Jesus, kas pa Galiley. Xquipatanij c'ut xukuje' niq'uiaj chic ri xepaki' ulok ruc' pa Jerusalen." 
Mark15:42 Xk'ekal chic c'ut casuc'umax ri cajwataj che ri ucab k'ij ri are' k'ij rech uxlanem," 
Mark15:43 xpe c'u ri Jose aj Arimatey. Ri are' jun chque ri qui nimakil ri k'atal tak tzij, nim quil wi. Ri are' reyem ri rajawibal ri Dios. Ri Jose man cuxe'j ta rib, xoc bic chuwäch ri Pilat, xutz'onoj ri u cuerp ri Jesus che." 
Mark15:44 Ri Pilat xumayo chi chanim xcäm ri Jesus. Xusiq'uij ri qui nimal ri jun sient ajch'ojab, cuta' che we cäminak chic." 
Mark15:45 Aretak xubij ri qui nimal jun sient ajch'ojab che chi cäminak chic, xujach ri u cuerp che ri Jose." 
Mark15:46 Ri Jose xulok' jun sak atz'iak, xukasaj ri u cuerp ri Jesus, xupis pa ri sak atz'iak, xuc'am bic pa jun mukubal ri c'otom chupam jun nimalaj abaj. Xuchuk c'u can u chi' ri mukubal ruc' jun abaj." 
Mark15:47 Ri Mariy Magdalen ruc' ri Mariy u nan ri Jose xquilo jawije' ri xya' wi ri u cuerp ri Jesus. 
Mark16:1 Aretak xoc'ow ri k'ij re uxlanem, ri Mariy Magdalen, ri Mariy u nan ri Santiag, xukuje' ri Salome xequilok' c'oc'alaj tak cunabal che u bilic chrij ri u cuerp ri Jesus." 
Mark16:2 Sibalaj ak'ab pa ri nabe k'ij re ri seman, xebe chuchi' ri mukubal. Elinak chi ulok ri k'ij aretak xebopanic." 
Mark16:3 Xquibij c'u chbil tak quib: “¿Jachin ta ri quesan ri abaj chuchi' ri mukubal?” 
Mark16:4 Aretak xeca'y apanok, xquil ri nimalaj abaj esam chic." 
Mark16:5 Aretak xeboc bic pa ri mukubal, xquil jun c'ojol ala t'uyul pa ri riquiak'ab ri mukubal, ri u cojom jun charachic atz'iak ri sibalaj sak. Ri ixokib c'ut xquimayo, xquixe'j quib." 
Mark16:6 Ri c'ojol ala xubij chque: “Mixe'j iwib. Ri ix quitzucuj ri Jesus aj Nazaret, ri xrip cho ri ripibal. Xc'astaj c'u bic ri are'. Man c'o ta chi waral. Chiwilampe' ri c'olbal ri xya' wi." 
Mark16:7 Jix ba', chibij chque ri u tijoxelab xukuje' che ri Lu': ‘Nabe cabe chiwäch pa Galiley. Chila' quiwil wi na u wäch, jas ri xubij chiwe.’ ”" 
Mark16:8 Ri ixokib xebec, xebanimaj bic chuchi' ri mukubal. Quebirbitic, cäquimayo. Man c'o ta xquibij che jachin jun, rumal rech chi quixe'n quib." 
Mark16:9 Aretak c'astajinak chic ri Jesus sibalaj ak'ab pa ri nabe k'ij re ri uwuk k'ij, nabe xuc'ut rib chuwäch ri Mariy Magdalen ri xeresaj wukub itzel tak uxlabal che. “Pa quieb oxib tzij, ri ixokib xquitzijoj che ri Lu' xukuje' chque ri e rachil ronojel ri u bim ri tako'n aj caj chque." 
Mark16:10 Ri Mariy xbec, xuya' u tzijol chque ri xec'oji' can ruc' ri Jesus. Ri sibalaj quebisonic, cätajin quebok'ic. Aretak oc'owinak chi wa', kas are' ri Jesus, cumal ri e u tijoxelab, xutak pa elebal k'ij pa u kajebal k'ij ri tastalicalaj tijonic ri man pukel taj ri cuk'alajisaj ri junalic colobal ib. Je chbanok”." 
Mark16:11 Ri e are', aretak xquito chi xc'astaj ri Jesus, chi xilitaj rumal ri Mariy, man xquicoj taj." 
Mark16:12 Chwi chi c'u wa' ri Jesus jalan chi wi u c'utic rib xuban chquiwäch quieb chque aretak e benak pa ri juyub. 
Mark16:13 Ri e are' xebec, xequiya' u tzijol chque ri niq'uiaj chic. Mawi c'u ne xquicoj ri xquibij wa'." 
Mark16:14 Chu q'uisbalil ri Jesus xuc'ut rib chquiwäch ri julajuj u tijoxelab, aretak e c'o pa ri mexa. Xebuyajo rumal rech chi co ri canima', man xecojon taj. Je qui yajic wa' xubano rumal rech chi man xquicoj ta ri qui tzij ri xeilowic chi xc'astajic." 
Mark16:15 Xubij chque: Jix cho ronojel ri uwächulew. Chebitzijoj ri utzalaj tak tzij chque conojel ri winak. 
Mark16:16 Apachin ri cäcojonic, cäban c'u ri u bautism, cäcolotaj na. Apachin c'u ri man cäcojon taj, cac'okox na." 
Mark16:17 Ri quecojonic quequiban na we etal ri': Quequesaj na itzel tak uxlabal pa ri nu bi', quetzijon na pa c'ac' tak ch'abal," 
Mark16:18 quequich'elej tak na cumätz. We ne quequikumuj jastak ri quecämisanic man cuban ta na c'ax chque. Quequiya' na ri qui k'ab paquiwi' ri yawabib, quecunataj c'u wa'." 
Mark16:19 Ri Ajawaxel Jesus, aretak xuq'uis qui tzijobexic ri e u tijoxelab, xc'am xpaki' chicaj, xet'uyul pa ri riquiak'ab ri Dios." 
Mark16:20 Ri u tijoxelab xebel bic, xquitzijoj chque ri winak pa tak ronojel c'olbal jas u banom ri Jesus. Ri Ajawaxel xebuto'o xukuje' xubano chi xquibana etal che u k'alajisaxic chi rech ri Dios ri tzij ri cäquibij. Je chbanok." 
Luke1:1 E q'ui ri winak ri xcaj xquitz'ibaj pa cholaj ri u tzijobelil ri kas xc'ulmataj chkaxo'l. 
Luke1:2 Ri xbantajic are je jas ri xc'ut chkawäch cumal ri xeilow ruc' ri qui bak'wäch kas pa ri u chaplebal, e pataninelab c'u wa' che ri Tzij." 
Luke1:3 Ri in xukuje' nojim xinwetamaj ronojel kas pa ri u chapletajic rech quintz'ibaj wa' che la, lok'alaj kachalal Teopilo." 
Luke1:4 Jeri' quetamaj na la ri kastzij chrij ri tijonic ri yo'm che la. 
Luke1:5 Pa tak ri k'ij aretak ri Herod are' ajawinel re Judey, xc'oji' jun cojol tabal tok'ob, Zacariy u bi', ri c'o pa ri juk'at aj Abiy. Elisabet u bi' ri rixokil, jun chque ri e rija'l ri Aaron." 
Luke1:5 Pa tak ri k'ij aretak ri Herod are' ajawinel re Judey, xc'oji' jun cojol tabal tok'ob, Zacariy u bi', ri c'o pa ri juk'at aj Abiy. Elisabet u bi' ri rixokil, jun chque ri e rija'l ri Aaron." 
Luke1:6 Ri Zacariy ruc' ri Elisabet e suc' chuwäch ri Dios. Cäquinimaj ronojel ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel. Cäquinimaj ronojel ri pixab. Man c'o ta etzelal xriktaj chquij. 
Luke1:7 Man e c'olinak ta calc'ual. Man alc'ualanel ta c'u ri Elisabet. Ri e quieb e nimak tak winak chic. 
Luke1:8 Jun k'ij ri Zacariy c'o che u cojic tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Dios jas ri u cholajil ri u juk'at. 
Luke1:9 Je jas ri nak'atisam u banic chquixo'l ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, ri Zacariy are' xtakleben ri oquem chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel che u poroxic ri c'oc' k'ol." 
Luke1:10 Conojel c'u ri e q'uia winak e c'o apan cho ja, cätajin quech'aw ruc' Dios pa ri jok'otaj re ri u poroxic ri c'oc' k'ol." 
Luke1:11 Ri tako'n aj caj re ri Ajawaxel xuc'ut rib chuwäch ri Zacariy, tac'al pa ri u wiquiak'ab ri porobal c'oc' k'ol." 
Luke1:12 Ri Zacariy aretak xrilo, man xurik ta chic jas xubano, sibalaj xuxe'j rib." 
Luke1:13 Ri tako'n aj caj xubij che: “Zacariy, maxe'j awib. Ri a bochi'nic xtatajic. Ri awixokil Elisabet cäralaj na jun a c'ojol. Xuan ri u bi' cacoj na." 
Luke1:14 Cäc'oji' na nimalaj a quicotemal, e q'ui ri winak quequicot na aretak calaxic." 
Luke1:15 Cux c'u na nim u k'ij chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. Man c'o ta u wa'l uva, man c'o ta tzam cutij na. Ri Ruxlabal ri Dios canojisan na c'ä majok chalaxok." 
Luke1:16 Rumal ri are' e q'ui chque ri aj israelib quecojon na che ri Ajawaxel, ri qui Dios." 
Luke1:17 Ri Xuan cänabej na chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, c'o ri Uxlabaxel xukuje' chuk'ab ruc' jas ri xc'oji' ruc' ri Eliy. Cuban na chi ri tat nan quec'oji' na pa utzil cuc' ri calc'ual. Cuban na chi ri canima' ri man e nimanelab taj quetzelej na ruc' ri utzalaj qui chomanic ri e suc'alaj tak winak. Je cuban wa' che qui suc'umaxic ri winak che u c'amowaxic ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Luke1:18 Xubij ri Zacariy che ri tako'n aj caj: “¿Jas quinban che retamaxic chi kastzij wa'? Ri in, in nim winak chic, xukuje' ri wixokil.”" 
Luke1:19 Ri tako'n aj caj xubij che: “In Gabriel, in tac'al chuwäch ri Dios. In takom ulok che a ch'abexic, che u tzijoxic we utzalaj tak tzij ri' chawe." 
Luke1:20 Chawilampe', catmemar na, man catcuin ta na cattzijonic, c'ä pa ri k'ij ri quebantaj na wa', rumal rech chi man xacoj ta ri nu tzij. Aretak cäpe ri k'ij, cäbantaj na jas ri xinbij chawe.”" 
Luke1:21 Ri winak queyem ri Zacariy, xquimayo rumal rech chi xbeytaj chupam ri rachoch Dios." 
Luke1:22 Aretak xel ulok, man xcuin ta che qui ch'abexic ri winak. Xquich'obo chi aretak c'o pa ri rachoch Dios, xril jun c'utwächinic. Ri are' xak ruc' ri u k'ab xebuch'abej, xmemar c'u canok." 
Luke1:23 Xtz'akat c'u can ri k'ij ri cäpatanin ri Zacariy che cojol tabal tok'ob, xbe cho rachoch." 
Luke1:24 E oc'owinak chi c'u we k'ij ri', ri Elisabet ri rixokil xux yawab winak, xuc'ol rib job ic' cho rachoch." 
Luke1:25 Xubij: “Je u banom ri Ajawaxel wa' chwe, xel u c'u'x chwe pa tak we k'ij ri', rech man quinyok' ta chic cumal ri winak.”" 
Luke1:26 Chuwak ic' chi c'ut, ri tako'n aj caj Gabriel xtak ulok rumal ri Dios pa jun tinimit re Galiley, Nazaret u bi'." 
Luke1:27 Xopan ruc' jun k'apoj ali ri tz'onom chic rumal jun achi Jose u bi'. Are jun chque ri e rija'l ri David. Mariy u bi' ri ali ri'. 
Luke1:28 Xoc bic ri tako'n aj caj jawije' ri c'o wi ri Mariy, xubij che: “¡Quinya' rutzil a wäch, tok'obisam a wäch rumal ri Dios! Ri Ajawaxel c'o awuc'.”" 
Luke1:29 Ri Mariy c'ut, xumay ri u tzij, xuchomaj jas quel wa', chi je u ya'ic rutzil nu wäch wa' rumal." 
Luke1:30 C'äte c'u ri' ri tako'n aj caj xubij che: “Mariy, maxe'j awib. Ri at a rikom ri u tok'ob ri Dios." 
Luke1:31 Chawilampe', catux na yawab winak, cawalaj na jun awal, JESUS ri u bi' cacoj na." 
Luke1:32 Ri are' cux na nim u k'ij, cäbix na u C'ojol ri Dios aj chicaj che. Ri Ajawaxel Dios cuya' na ri u tem ri ajawinel David ri u mam che." 
Luke1:33 Cätakan na puwi' ri nim tinimit Israel chbe k'ij sak. Ri u takanic c'ut man c'o ta u q'uistajic.” 
Luke1:34 Xubij c'u ri Mariy che ri tako'n aj caj: “¿Jas lo wa'? Man in c'olinak ta ruc' achi.” 
Luke1:35 Ri tako'n xubij che: “Ri Ruxlabal ri Dios cäpe na pawi'. Ri u chuk'ab ri Dios aj chicaj cäpe na pawi' jas jun sutz'. Rumal ri' ri ac'al ri calax na, cäbix na ‘Tastalic’ xukuje' ‘U C'ojol ri Dios’ che." 
Luke1:36 Chawilampe', ri Elisabet, ri awachalaxic, xukuje' ri are' yawab winak chic, pune' ri'j chic. Uwak ic' chi wa' che ri Elisabet, ri xbix canok chi man alc'ualanel taj." 
Luke1:37 Man c'o ta c'u jun jasach ri ma ta cäcuin ri Dios che u banic.” 
Luke1:38 Xubij c'u ri Mariy: “Ri in in pataninel re ri Ajawaxel. Ri Dios chubana' chwe jas ri bim la chwe.” Ri tako'n aj caj xel c'u bic chuwäch. 
Luke1:39 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' xel bic ri Mariy, aninak xbe pa jun tinimit re Judey ri c'o pa tak juyub." 
Luke1:39 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' xel bic ri Mariy, aninak xbe pa jun tinimit re Judey ri c'o pa tak juyub." 
Luke1:40 Xoc bic pa ri rachoch ri Zacariy, xuya' rutzil u wäch ri Elisabet." 
Luke1:41 Aretak ri Elisabet xuta' ri rutzil u wäch rumal ri Mariy, ri ac'al xch'oplin pa ri u c'u'x. Xnojisax c'u ri ranima' ri Elisabet che ri Ruxlabal ri Dios." 
Luke1:42 Co xurak u chi', xubij che ri Mariy: “At tewichi'm na chquiwäch conojel ri ixokib, tewichi'm ri awal pa ri a c'u'x." 
Luke1:43 ¿Jachin ri in, chi ri u nan ri Wajaw cäpe wuc'?" 
Luke1:44 Chawilampe', aretak xinta' ri rutzil nu wäch awumal, xch'oplin ri wal ruc' nimalaj quicotemal pa ri nu c'u'x." 
Luke1:45 Utz awe ri xatcojonic, rumal rech chi cäbantaj na jas ri xbix chawe rumal ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Luke1:46 Xubij c'u ri Mariy: “Ri wanima' cunimarisaj u k'ij ri Ajawaxel. 
Luke1:47 C'o nimalaj quicotemal pa ri wanima' che ri Dios nu Colonel. 
Luke1:48 Rumal rech chi xel u c'u'x che ri u pataninel ri man nim ta quil wi. Chilampe' la, kas camic conojel ri winak cäquibij na chi utz we." 
Luke1:49 Rumal rech chi ri Dios ri c'o u cuinem u banom nimak tak jastak chwe, nim u k'ij c'u ri u bi'." 
Luke1:50 Ri are' quel u c'u'x chbe k'ij sak chque conojel ri winak ri cäquixe'j quib chuwäch. 
Luke1:51 Xuban nimak tak jastak ruc' ri u chuk'ab ri u k'ab. Xebujabuj ri winak ri cäquiban nimal pa ri qui chomanic. 
Luke1:52 Xebukasaj ri ajawinelab ri c'o qui cuinem paquiwi' ri e qui tem ajawinelab, xebuwalijisaj c'u ri winak ri man nim ta qui k'ij." 
Luke1:53 Q'ui ri utzil xuban chque ri winak ri quenumic, xeresaj c'u bic ri k'inomab, man c'o ta xuya' bic chque." 
Luke1:54 Xuto' ri pataninel re, are c'u wa' ri Israel, xnataj che chi quel u c'u'x chque," 
Luke1:55 jas ri u bim ulok chque ri e ka mam chi cuban na, ri u bim ulok che ri Abraham xukuje' chque ri e rija'l re amak'el chbe k'ij sak.”" 
Luke1:56 Cäraj oxib ic' xcanaj can ri Mariy ruc' ri Elisabet. C'äte ri', xtzelej bic, xbe cho rachoch." 
Luke1:57 Xopan ri k'ij rech cutzir ri Elisabet, xil c'u u wäch jun ral ala." 
Luke1:58 Ri e u c'ul tak ja xukuje' ri e rachalaxic xquito chi ri Ajawaxel u banom nimalaj utzil che ri Elisabet, xel u c'u'x che. Ri e are' xequicot ruc'." 
Luke1:59 Xc'ulmatajic chi chuwajxak k'ij xebe che u kopixic ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri ala wi ri ac'al che retal. Zacariy ri u bi' raj xquicojo, jas ri u tat." 
Luke1:60 Xch'aw ri u nan, xubij: “Man je taj, xane' Xuan u bi'.”" 
Luke1:61 Xquibij che: “Man c'o ta jun chque ri awachalal ri je ta u bi' wa'.” 
Luke1:62 Xa' pa memal xquich'abej ri u tat, xquita' che jas ri u bi' cäraj cucojo." 
Luke1:63 Ri Zacariy xuta' jun alaj tz'alam, xtz'ibanic je xubij wa': “Xuan ri u bi' xucojo.” Conojel c'ut xquimayo." 
Luke1:64 Chanim xtzelej ri u ch'abal ri Zacariy, xcuinic xch'awic. Xtzijonic, xunimarisaj u k'ij ri Dios." 
Luke1:65 Sibalaj xquimayij conojel ri e qui c'ul tak ja. Xtzijox c'u ronojel ri xc'ulmatajic chque ri winak pa ronojel tak ri juyub re Judey. 
Luke1:65 Sibalaj xquimayij conojel ri e qui c'ul tak ja. Xtzijox c'u ronojel ri xc'ulmatajic chque ri winak pa ronojel tak ri juyub re Judey. 
Luke1:66 Conojel ri xquito, xquichomaj pa qui c'u'x, xquibij: “¿Jachin c'u wa' we ac'al ri'?” C'o c'u ri u k'ab ri Ajawaxel ruc'." 
Luke1:67 Ri Zacariy, ri u tat ri Xuan, nojinak che ri Ruxlabal ri Dios, xubij chque ri winak ri xbix che rumal ri Dios:" 
Luke1:68 “Chnimarisax u k'ij ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios ri aj Israel, rumal rech chi xebulusolij ri u winak, xebucolo." 
Luke1:69 Xuya' jun Colol kech ri sibalaj c'o u cuinem, are' rija'l ri David, ri pataninel rech ri Dios." 
Luke1:70 Are je u bim ulok ojer cumal ri tastalic k'axal tak u tzij ri Dios chi cuya' na: 
Luke1:71 Jeri' cujuto' chquiwäch ri ka c'ulel, cujuto' pa qui k'ab conojel ri winak ri cäquetzelaj ka wäch." 
Luke1:72 Quel ta c'u na u c'u'x chque ri e ka mam, man casach ta c'u na pa u jolom ri tastalic u c'ulwächinic." 
Luke1:73 Are wa' ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na ri kas xubij u bixic che ri Abraham ri ka mam," 
Luke1:74 chi cujresaj na pa qui k'ab ri ka c'ulel, rech cujpatanin che, man ruc' ta xe'n ib," 
Luke1:75 cujc'oji' c'u chuwäch pa suq'uilal pa tastaliquil, conojel ri e u k'ij ri ka c'aslemal." 
Luke1:76 Are c'u ri at alaj nu c'ojol, k'axal u tzij ri Dios aj chicaj catuchix na. Rumal rech chi catnabej na chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, che qui suc'umaxic ri u be." 
Luke1:77 Quebatijoj na ri winak rech cäquetamaj chi quecolotaj na, chi quecuyutaj na ri qui mac." 
Luke1:78 Je cuban ri ka Dios rumal rech chi sibalaj quel u c'u'x chke, rumal wa' cäpe na Jun chicaj je jas ri k'ij ri quel ulok nim a k'ab." 
Luke1:79 Ri are' cuc'ut na rib chquiwäch ri winak ri e c'o pa k'eku'm, pa ri u mu'jal ri cämical, cuc'am ka be rech cäc'oji' utzil chkaxo'l.”" 
Luke1:80 Ri alaj ac'al caq'uiyic xukuje' cacowir pa uxlabal. Xc'oji' c'ut pa ri chaki'j uwo sak c'ä pa ri k'ij aretak xuc'ut rib chquiwäch ri aj israelib. 
Luke2:1 Xc'ulmataj pa tak ri k'ij ri' chi ri nimalaj k'atal tzij August Sesar xuya' takanic chi conojel ri winak cäquitz'ibaj ri qui bi'. 
Luke2:2 Aretak ri Sireniy are k'atal tzij re ri Siriy, xbantaj we nabe tz'ibam bi'aj ri'." 
Luke2:3 Xebe c'u conojel che u tz'ibaxic qui bi', chquijujunal pa ri qui tinimit." 
Luke2:4 Xel c'u ulok ri Jose pa ri tinimit Nazaret re Galiley, xbe pa ri u tinimit ri David pa Judey, Belen u bi'. Ri Jose are jun chque ri e rija'l ri David." 
Luke2:4 Xel c'u ulok ri Jose pa ri tinimit Nazaret re Galiley, xbe pa ri u tinimit ri David pa Judey, Belen u bi'. Ri Jose are jun chque ri e rija'l ri David." 
Luke2:5 Ri Jose xbe pa Belen che u tz'ibaxic ri u bi' junam ruc' ri Mariy, ri u tz'onom chic. Ri Mariy yawab winak chic." 
Luke2:6 Xc'ulmatajic chi, aretak e c'o chila', xopan ri k'ij ri rutziric ri Mariy." 
Luke2:7 Xralaj ri u nabeal, ala c'ut. Xubotz' pa tak ruk ac'al, xuk'oyoba' pa jun echa'bal. Man c'o ta jun c'olbal chque pa tak ri ja re warabal." 
Luke2:8 E c'o c'u ajyuk'ab pa ri c'olbal ri', ri quec'oji' pa tak ri juyub. Chak'ab cätajin quequichajij ri jumulaj qui chij." 
Luke2:9 Jun tako'n aj caj re ri Ajawaxel xtaq'ui' chquiwäch, ri u juluwem ri Dios xjuluw chquij, sibalaj xquixe'j quib." 
Luke2:10 Ri tako'n aj caj xubij chque: “Mixe'j iwib. Chiwilampe', quintzijoj ri utzalaj tak tzij re nimalaj quicotemal chiwe, ri cäyataj na chque conojel ri winak." 
Luke2:11 Camic xil u wäch chiwe pa ri u tinimit ri David jun Colonel. Ri are wa' ri CRIST, ri Ajawaxel." 
Luke2:12 Are c'u etal wa' chiwe: quirik na ri alaj ne', pistal pa tak ruk ac'al, k'oyobam pa jun echa'bal.”" 
Luke2:13 Xak c'ätetal e c'o chi ruc' ri tako'n aj caj q'uialaj tako'nixelab aj caj. Cäquibixoj ri Dios, cäquibij:" 
Luke2:14 “¡Juluwem che ri Dios ri c'o sibalaj sibalaj chicaj! ¡Jamaril cho ri uwächulew chquixo'l ri winak ri e rech ri utzalaj u rayibal!” 
Luke2:15 Ri tako'nib aj caj aretak xetzelej chicaj, ri ajyuk'ab xquichaplej u bilaxic chabil tak quib: “Jo' ba pa Belen, jekila we jasach ri' ri xc'ulmaxic, ri tzijom chke rumal ri Ajawaxel.”" 
Luke2:16 Aninak xebec. Xequirika' c'u ri Mariy rachil ri Jose xukuje' ri ne' k'oyol chupam jun echa'bal. 
Luke2:17 Aretak xquilo, xquitzijoj ri xubij ri tako'n aj caj chque chrij ri ac'al." 
Luke2:18 Conojel ri xeto'w ri qui tzij ri ajyuk'ab xquimay ri xtzijox chque cumal. 
Luke2:19 Are c'u ri Mariy xuc'ol conojel we tzij ri' pa ranima', cächoman c'u chrij." 
Luke2:20 Xetzelej ri ajyuk'ab. Cäquiya' juluwem xukuje' k'ijilanic che ri Dios rumal ri quilom xukuje' ri qui tom, ronojel c'ut je xc'ulmatajic jacha' ri bim chque." 
Luke2:21 Aretak xetz'akat ri wajxakib k'ij xkopix ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri ala wi che retal, c'utbal quech ri aj judeyib, Jesus ri u bi' xcojic, je jas ri xubij ri tako'n aj caj aretak c'ä majok chäwinikar pa u c'u'x ri Mariy." 
Luke2:22 Aretak xetz'akat ri k'ij ri rajawaxic che ri u josk'ixic quib, jas ri cubij ri u pixab ri Moises, xquic'am bic ri alaj ne' pa Jerusalen che u jachic pa u k'ab ri Ajawaxel." 
Luke2:23 Je xquiban wa' rumal rech chi chupam ri u pixab ri Ajawaxel tz'ibatal wi: “Ronojel nabeal ala cäjach pa u k'ab ri Ajawaxel.” 
Luke2:24 Xebe c'ut, che u chi'xic ri tabal tok'ob ri cätakan wi ri u pixab ri Ajawaxel: juc'ulaj tucumux o juc'ulaj alaj tak ut." 
Luke2:25 C'o c'u jun achi pa Jerusalen, Simeon u bi'. We achi ri' suc', nimanel che ri Dios. Reyem c'ut ri u to'tajisaxic ri Israel. C'o c'ut ri Ruxlabal ri Dios ruc' ri Simeon." 
Luke2:26 Bim chi can che ri Simeon rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios, chi man cäcäm ta na, c'ä cäril na ri u Crist ri Ajawaxel." 
Luke2:27 Ri Simeon xc'am c'u ulok rumal ri Uxlabaxel chupam ri rachoch Dios. Aretak c'u xcojbic ri alaj Jesus chupam ri rachoch Dios cumal ri Jose ri Mariy che u banic che ri nak'atisabal u banic che ri cubij ri pixab," 
Luke2:28 ri Simeon xuc'am c'ut ri ac'al, xuk'aluj, xunimarisaj u k'ij ri Dios, xubij:" 
Luke2:29 “Wajaw, camic jacha' la bic we pataninel ech la pa jamaril, xtz'akat c'ut ri chi'm la ulok." 
Luke2:30 Wilom c'u cuc' ri nu bak'wäch ri Colonel. 
Luke2:31 Are ri yo'm la chquiwäch conojel ri e winak. 
Luke2:32 Are je jas jun chäj che u k'alajisaxic ri tzij la chquiwäch ri man aj judeyib taj. Rumal c'u ri are' cänimarisax na qui k'ij ri winak aj israelib.” 
Luke2:33 Ri Jose ri Mariy xquimay ri tzij ri xubij ri Simeon chrij ri Jesus. 
Luke2:34 Ri Simeon xebutewichi'j, xubij c'u che ri Mariy ri u nan ri Jesus: “Chawilampe', we ne' ri' q'uiakom chrij chi cubana' chi e q'ui pa Israel quetzakic o quewalijic. Ri are' cux na jun etal ri e q'ui quexutun na," 
Luke2:35 jeri' cäk'alajin ri u chomanic ri canima' e q'ui winak. Ronojel c'u wa' cux na chawe jacha' jun ch'ich' re ch'o'j ri cuk'ok'ej na ri kas a c'aslibal.” 
Luke2:36 Chila' c'oc'owi jun ixok, Na' u bi', k'axal tzij. Are' u mia'l ri Panuel, rija'l ri Aser. Ri Na' nim winak chi c'ut. Sibalaj k'apoj c'ut aretak xc'uli'c ruc' ri rachajil. Xa' wukub junab c'ut xjujayir ruc' ri rachajil." 
Luke2:37 Malca'n c'u wa' jumuch' ruc' quiejeb u junab chic. Mawi jubik' quel bic chupam ri rachoch Dios, xane' cäpatanin che ri Ajawaxel Dios chi pa k'ij chi chak'ab man cäwa' taj xukuje' cuban ch'awem ruc' Dios." 
Luke2:38 Ri Na' xutac'abaxtaj rib kas pa ri jok'otaj ri', xuchaplej c'u u ya'ic maltioxinic che ri Dios xukuje' xuchaplej c'u u tzijoxic ri alaj Jesus chque conojel ri queyem ri u to'tajisaxic ri Jerusalen." 
Luke2:39 Aretak xebantaj conojel ri jastak jas ri cubij ri u pixab ri Ajawaxel, xetzelej pa Galiley, xebe pa Nazaret ri qui tinimit." 
Luke2:40 Ri ac'al caq'uiyic, cacowiric, caq'uiy pa ri no'j. Are c'u ri u tok'ob ri Dios c'o puwi'." 
Luke2:41 Quebe c'u ri Jose ri Mariy ronojel junab pa Jerusalen pa ri nimak'ij re ri oc'owem. 
Luke2:42 Cablajuj chi u junab ri Jesus, xepaki' pa Jerusalen jas ri nak'atisam u banic pa ri nimak'ij." 
Luke2:43 Aretak c'u xeboc'ow we k'ij ri', xetzelej pa ri qui tinimit, xcanaj c'u can ri alaj Jesus pa Jerusalen, man c'o ta c'u xquinabej ri u nan ri Mariy xukuje' ri Jose." 
Luke2:44 Are pa qui c'u'x chi c'o chquixo'l ri cachil, xquiban jun k'ij be. Te c'u ri' xquitzucuj chquixo'l ri cachalal xukuje' chquixo'l ri e cachil." 
Luke2:45 Aretak man xquirik taj, xetzelej pa Jerusalen che u tzucuxic." 
Luke2:46 Oc'owinak chi oxib k'ij, xequirika' ri Jesus pa ri rachoch Dios, t'uyul pa qui niq'uiajil ri ajtijab. Quebutatabej, cuc'ot qui chi'." 
Luke2:47 Conojel ri xquita' ri u tzij xquimayo, rumal rech chi nim ri u no'j ri ala, reta'm jas cubij chque ri ajtijab aretak cäquic'ot u chi'." 
Luke2:48 Aretak ri Jose ri Mariy xquilo, xquimayo. Xubij ri u nan che: “Wal, ¿jasche je a banom wa' chke? Chawilampe', ri in ruc' ri a tat uj elinak ch'u'j che a tzucuxic.”" 
Luke2:49 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿Jasche quintzucuj alak? ¿La ma ta eta'm alak chi rajawaxic quinc'oji' chupam ri rachoch ri nu Tat che u banic ri u rayibal?” 
Luke2:50 Man xquich'ob ta ri tzij ri xubij chque. 
Luke2:51 Ri Jesus xtzelej bic cuc', c'ä xebopan pa Nazaret, u yo'm rib pa takic chque. Ri u nan cuc'ol ronojel wa' pa ranima'." 
Luke2:52 Xq'uiy ri Jesus, xnimar ri u no'j, xcowiric. Utz quil wi rumal ri Dios xukuje' cumal ri winak." 
Luke3:1 Pa ri ro'lajuj u junab ri u takanic ri nimalaj k'atal tzij Tiber Sesar ri nim u takanic, are c'u ri Pons Pilat are' k'atal tzij pa Judey, ri Herod are k'atal tzij pa Galiley, ri Pelip ri rachalal are k'atal tzij pa Iturey xukuje' que tak ri ulew ri e c'o pa Traconit, ri Lisaniy are k'atal tzij pa Abilin." 
Luke3:1 Pa ri ro'lajuj u junab ri u takanic ri nimalaj k'atal tzij Tiber Sesar ri nim u takanic, are c'u ri Pons Pilat are' k'atal tzij pa Judey, ri Herod are k'atal tzij pa Galiley, ri Pelip ri rachalal are k'atal tzij pa Iturey xukuje' que tak ri ulew ri e c'o pa Traconit, ri Lisaniy are k'atal tzij pa Abilin." 
Luke3:2 Chi', aretak xec'oji' ri Anas xukuje' ri Caipas che qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, xuya' c'u ri u tzij ri Dios che ri Xuan, u c'ojol ri Zacariy, pa ri chaki'j uwo sak." 
Luke3:3 Ri Xuan xopan pa conojel c'olbal ri e c'o chunakaj ri nima' Jordan. Xubij chque ri winak chi cheban ri qui bautism, jun c'utbal wa' chi quiq'uexom qui c'u'x, e sachtajinak c'u ri qui mac rumal ri Dios." 
Luke3:4 Jacha' ri tz'ibatal rumal ri Isaiy ri k'axal tzij, ri xubij: “Jun chabebal curak u chi' pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, cubij: ‘Chisuc'umaj ri u be ri Ajawaxel, chibana' colom che ri alaj tak u be." 
Luke3:5 Quenojisax na conojel ri siwan, quelilobisax na conojel ri juyub, ri nimak xukuje' ri ch'utik. Ri be ri e cotocak quejicomisax na, ri be ri sibalaj e julujak quecolomisax na." 
Luke3:6 Ronojel winak caril na ri colobal ib ri cuya' ri Dios.’ ” 
Luke3:7 Ri Xuan xubij chque ri q'uialaj winak ri quebel ulok rech cäban ri qui bautism rumal: “¡Ix calc'ual tak cumätz! ¿Jachin xc'utuw chiwäch chi quixanimaj chuwäch ri royowal ri Dios ri cäpe na piwi'? 
Luke3:8 Chibana' wächinic ri takal che q'uexoj c'uxaj. Michaplej c'u u bixic pa iwanima': ‘C'o ri Abraham che ka tat.’ Quinbij c'u chiwe, chi ri Dios cäcuinic quebuban rija'l ri Abraham chque tak we abaj ri'." 
Luke3:9 Camic yo'm chic ri icäj chquixe' tak ri che'. Ronojel c'u che' ri man cuya' ta utzalaj u wächinic, cächoy bic, cäq'uiak pa k'ak'.”" 
Luke3:10 Ri winak xquita' che ri Xuan, xquibij: “¿Jas c'u ri cäkabano?”" 
Luke3:11 Ri Xuan xubij chque: “Jachin ri c'o cac'ulaj ratz'iak, chuya' jun rech ri man c'o ta rech. Jachin ri c'o cutijo, chuya' rech ri man c'o ta cutijo.”" 
Luke3:12 Xukuje' xepe ri tok'il tak alcabal rech cäban ri qui bautism, xquibij che ri Xuan: “Aj tij, ¿jas ri rajawaxic cakaban uj?”" 
Luke3:13 Ri Xuan xubij chque: “Mitok'ij u wi' ri alcabal, xane' xuwi ri ix takom wi.”" 
Luke3:14 Xukuje' ri ajch'ojab xquita' che, xquibij: “E c'u ri uj, ¿jas cäkaban na?” Ri Xuan xutzelej u bix chque: “Miban c'ax che jachin jun. Micoj xe'n ib che reläk'axic qui rajil ri winak. Mibij jalum k'abam chquij. Chixquicot ruc' ri tojbal iwe.”" 
Luke3:15 Queyem ri winak, cäcaj cäquetamaj jachin ri Xuan, cäquichomaj pa canima', we ne' are wa' ri Crist." 
Luke3:16 Xch'aw ri Xuan, xubij chque conojel: “In kastzij quinban ri i bautism pa ri ja'. Petinak c'u jun chwij ri c'o na u cuinem chnuwäch. Man takal ta chwe chi quinquir ri u c'amal ri u xajäb. Ri are' quixucoj na pa ri Ruxlabal ri Dios; o quixucoj na pa ri k'ak'." 
Luke3:17 C'o ri u jopibal pa u k'ab, cujosk'ij na ri rera, cumulij na ri u trico pa ri u c'uja, cuporoj na ri pajo pa k'ak' ri man chupel taj.”" 
Luke3:18 Jeri' ri Xuan xebuch'abej ri winak cuc' q'uialaj niq'uiaj pixbenic chic, cutzijoj ri utzalaj tak tzijol chque." 
Luke3:19 Are c'u ri k'atal tzij Herod xyaj rumal ri Xuan rumal rech chi u c'amom ri Herody che rixokil, are' c'u ri rixokil ri Pelip ri rachalal. Xukuje' xyaj rumal ri Xuan rumal quech conojel ri itzel tak jastak ri u banom ri Herod." 
Luke3:20 Xutik c'u ne wa' puwi' ronojel chi xutz'apij ri Xuan pa che'. 
Luke3:21 Xc'ulmatajic chi aretak ri Xuan xuban ri qui bautism conojel ri winak ri xebopanic, ri Jesus xukuje' xban ri u bautism rumal ri Xuan. Aretak c'u cätajin cäch'aw ruc' Dios, ri caj xjaktajic." 
Luke3:22 Xkaj ulok ri Ruxlabal ri Dios puwi' ri Jesus, ri cajunamataj ruc' jun palomax. Xtataj jun ch'abal chicaj ri xubij: “¡At ri' ri lok'alaj nu C'ojol, ri quinquicot awumal!”" 
Luke3:23 Ri Jesus juwinak lajuj u junab chic aretak xuchaplej u tzijoxic ri utzalaj tak tzij. Are c'u pa qui c'u'x ri winak chi u c'ojol ri Jose. Ri u tat ri Jose are' ri Eli. 
Luke3:24 Ri u tat ri Eli are' ri Matat, ri u tat ri Matat are' ri Levi, ri u tat ri Levi are' ri Melqui, ri u tat ri Melqui are' ri Jana, ri u tat ri Jana are' ri Jose," 
Luke3:25 ri u tat ri Jose are' ri Matatiy, ri u tat ri Matatiy are' ri Amos, ri u tat ri Amos are' ri Nahum, ri u tat ri Nahum are' ri Esli, ri u tat ri Esli are' ri Nagay," 
Luke3:26 ri u tat ri Nagay are' ri Maat, ri u tat ri Maat are' ri Matatiy, ri u tat ri Matatiy are' ri Semey, ri u tat ri Semey are' ri Jose, ri u tat ri Jose are' ri Juda," 
Luke3:27 ri ri tat ri Juda are' ri Joanan, ri u tat ri Joanan are' ri Res, ri u tat ri Res are' ri Zorobabel, ri u tat ri Zorobabel are' ri Salatiel, ri u tat ri Salatiel are' ri Ner," 
Luke3:28 ri u tat ri Ner are' ri Melqui, ri u tat ri Melqui are' ri Adi, ri u tat ri Adi are' ri Cosam, ri u tat ri Cosam are' ri Elmadam, ri u tat ri Elmadam are' ri Er," 
Luke3:29 ri u tat ri Er are' ri Josue, ri u tat ri Josue are' ri Eliezer, ri u tat ri Eliezer are' ri Jorim, ri u tat ri Jorim are' ri Matat," 
Luke3:30 ri u tat ri Matat are' ri Levi, ri u tat ri Levi are' ri Simeon, ri u tat ri Simeon are' ri Juda, ri u tat ri Juda are' ri Jose, ri u tat ri Jose are' ri Jonam, ri u tat ri Jonam are' ri Eliaquim," 
Luke3:31 ri u tat ri Eliaquim are' ri Meley, ri u tat ri Meley are' ri Men, ri u tat ri Men are' ri Matata, ri u tat ri Matata are' ri Natan," 
Luke3:32 ri u tat ri Natan are' ri David, ri u tat ri David are' ri Isayi, ri u tat ri Isayi are' ri Obed, ri u tat ri Obed are' ri Booz, ri u tat ri Booz are' ri Salmon, ri u tat ri Salmon are' ri Naason," 
Luke3:33 ri u tat ri Naason are' ri Aminadab, ri u tat ri Aminadab are' ri Aram, ri u tat ri Aram are' ri Esrom, ri u tat ri Esrom are' ri Pares, ri u tat ri Pares are' ri Juda," 
Luke3:34 ri u tat ri Juda are' Jacob, ri u tat ri Jacob are' ri Isaac, ri u tat ri Isaac are' ri Abraham, ri u tat ri Abraham are' ri Tare, ri u tat ri Tare are' ri Nacor," 
Luke3:35 ri u tat ri Nacor are' ri Serug, ri u tat ri Serug are' ri Ragaw, ri u tat ri Ragaw are' ri Peleg, ri u tat ri Peleg are' ri Heber, ri u tat ri Heber are' ri Sala," 
Luke3:36 ri u tat ri Sala are' ri Cainan, ri u tat ri Cainan are' ri Arpaxad, ri u tat ri Arpaxad are' ri Sem, ri u tat ri Sem are' ri Noe, ri u tat ri Noe are' ri Lamec," 
Luke3:37 ri u tat ri Lamec are' ri Matusalen, ri u tat ri Matusalen are ri Enoc, ri u tat ri Enoc are' ri Jared, ri u tat ri Jared are' ri Mahalaleel, ri u tat ri Mahalaleel are' ri Cainan," 
Luke3:38 ri u tat ri Cainan are' ri Enos, ri u tat ri Enos are' ri Set, ri u tat ri Set are' ri Adan, ri u tat ri Adan are' ri Dios." 
Luke4:1 Ri Jesus, nojinak che ri Ruxlabal ri Dios, xel bic pa ri nima' Jordan, xtzelejic. Xc'am bic rumal ri Uxlabaxel pa ri chaki'j uwo sak." 
Luke4:2 Cawinak k'ij xc'oji' chila', xtakchi'x c'u che mac rumal ri itzel. Man xwitaj pa tak ri k'ij ri'. Xpe c'ut u numic." 
Luke4:3 Xubij ri itzel che: “We at u C'ojol ri Dios, chabij che we abaj ri' chi chux caxlanwa.”" 
Luke4:4 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Tz'ibatalic: ‘Man xuwi ta rumal ri wa cac'asi' ri winak, xane' rumal ronojel ri u tzij ri Dios.’ ”" 
Luke4:5 Xc'am c'u bic puwi' jun nimalaj juyub rumal ri itzel. Ri itzel xa' pa jok'otaj xebuc'ut conojel ri ajawibal chuwäch ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew. 
Luke4:6 Xubij c'u ri itzel che: “Quebenya' conojel ri takanic pa a k'ab, quinya' ronojel ri qui juluwem chawe. E jachom chwe in, quebenya' che jachin ri quinwaj quinya' wi.”" 
Luke4:7 We c'u quinak'ijilaj, quinya' ronojel chawe." 
Luke4:8 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Chatel chnuwäch, Satanas. Tz'ibatal c'ut: ‘Are cak'ijilaj na ri Ajawaxel a Dios. Xuwi capatanij ri are'.’ ”" 
Luke4:9 Ri itzel xuc'am bic ri Jesus pa Jerusalen, xutac'aba' puwi' ri kas u chicajil ri rachoch Dios, xubij che: “We at u C'ojol ri Dios, chaq'uiaka' bic awib waral c'ä iquim." 
Luke4:10 Tz'ibatal c'ut: ‘Cuya' na takanic chque ri e u tako'nib aj caj chawij, che a chajixic." 
Luke4:11 Catcuc'aj c'u na bic pa qui k'ab, rech man cachak'ij taj ri awakan cho abaj.’ ”" 
Luke4:12 Ri Jesus cubij che: “Tz'ibatalic: ‘Mac'ambejej ri Ajawaxel a Dios.’ ” 
Luke4:13 Ri itzel, aretak xutz'akatisaj ronojel ri takchibal mac, xuya' can ri Jesus quieb oxib k'ij." 
Luke4:14 Ri Jesus xtzelej pa Galiley, c'o ri u cuinem ri Uxlabaxel ruc'. Xel u tzijol pa tak conojel ri ulew ri e c'o chila'." 
Luke4:15 Ri Jesus xebutijoj ri winak pa tak ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Conojel ri winak xquinimarisaj u k'ij. 
Luke4:16 Ri Jesus xopan pa Nazaret, are ri tinimit jawije' xq'uiyisax wi. Pa ri k'ij re uxlanem, xoc bic pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab, jas ri u nak'atisabal. Xtaq'ui' c'ut che u siq'uixic ri wuj." 
Luke4:17 Xya' ri u wuj ri Isaiy che, ri k'axal tzij. Aretak xujako xurik ri c'olbal ri tz'ibatal wi we tzij ri':" 
Luke4:18 “Ri Ruxlabal ri Ajawaxel c'o panuwi'. Rumal rech chi in u tasom che qui tzijoxic ri utzalaj tak tzij chque ri mebayib; che qui tzijoxic chque ri winak ri e tz'apim pa che'; che qui jakic ri qui bak'wäch ri moyab che quitzokopixic, ri qui rikom c'ax pa qui k'ab ri qui c'ulel." 
Luke4:19 In takom ulok che u tzijoxic ri utzalaj tak k'ij re ri Ajawaxel.” 
Luke4:20 Xubot c'u ri wuj, xuya' che ri xyo'w che, xt'uyic. Conojel ri winak ri e c'o pa ri ja, queca'y che." 
Luke4:21 Ri Jesus xuchaplej u bixic chque: “Camic xbantaj chiwäch jas ri cubij we Tz'ibatalic ri' ri xito.” 
Luke4:22 Conojel ri winak xquiya' utzalaj k'alajisanic chrij ri Jesus. Xquimay c'u ri tzij re tok'ob ri xubij ri Jesus, xquiban c'otojchi'aj: “¿La ma ta are wa' ri u c'ojol ri Jose?”" 
Luke4:23 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Kastzij quibij na we tzij ri' chwe: ‘¡Aj cun, chacunaj awib! Conojel jastak ri e ka tom ri xeban pa Capernaum, chabana' xukuje' waral pa we awulew ri'.’ ”" 
Luke4:24 Xch'awic xubij: “Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi man c'o ta jun k'axal tzij utz ta u c'ulaxic cäban rumal ri kas rulew." 
Luke4:25 Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi e q'ui chuchuyib malca'nib xec'oji' pa Israel pa tak ri u k'ij ri Eliy, aretak xtz'apitaj ri caj oxib junab ruc' wakib ic', xc'oji' c'u jun nimalaj wi'jal pa ronojel ri ulew." 
Luke4:26 Man xtak ta c'u bic ri Eliy ruc' jun chque ri malca'nib aj Israel, xane' xtak bic ruc' jun chuchu' malca'n pa Sarepta re Sidon." 
Luke4:27 Xukuje' e q'ui c'o ch'a'c chquij pa Israel pa tak ri u k'ijol ri Elisey ri k'axal tzij. Man c'o ta c'u jun chque ri e are' xcunax ta rumal ri Elisey, xane' are' xcunax ri Naaman ri aj Siriy.”" 
Luke4:28 C'äte ri' conojel ri e c'o pa ri ja sibalaj xpe coyowal che ri Jesus, aretak xquita' we jastak ri'." 
Luke4:29 Xewalijic, xquesaj bic pa ri tinimit, xquic'am bic c'ä tza'm ri juyub ri yacom wi ri qui tinimit, are ta xcaj xquiq'uiak bic chupam ri siwan." 
Luke4:30 Xoc'ow c'u ri Jesus pa qui niq'uiajil, xbec." 
Luke4:31 Ri Jesus xkaj bic pa Capernaum, tinimit re Galiley. Quebutijoj ri winak pa tak ri k'ij re uxlanem." 
Luke4:32 Xquimay ri u tijonic, rumal rech chi c'o u cuinem ri u tzij." 
Luke4:33 Chila' pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab, c'o jun achi ri c'o itzel uxlabal che. Ri are' xurak u chi' ruc' chuk'ab," 
Luke4:34 xubij: “¡E! ¿Jas awe chke, Jesus aj Nazaret? ¿La at petinak che u sachic ka wäch? Weta'm jachin ri at, at ri' ri at u tasom ri Dios.”" 
Luke4:35 Ri Jesus xuyajo, xubij: “Chatz'apij u pa chi', chatel che we achi ri'.” C'äte ri' ri itzel uxlabal xuq'uiak ri achi pa qui niq'uiajil ri winak, xel bic che, man c'o ta c'ax xuban can che." 
Luke4:36 Conojel xquimayo, xquixe'j quib. Xquitzijobela' quib, xquibij: “¿Jas wa' we tzij ri', chi ruc' takanic, ruc' cuinem quebutak ri itzel tak uxlabal, quebel c'u bic?”" 
Luke4:37 Xel c'u u tzijol ri Jesus pa ronojel c'olbal chunakaj ri ulew ri'. 
Luke4:38 Ri Jesus xel bic pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Xoc pa rachoch ri Simon. Ri u ji' chuchu' ri Simon kajinak che jun nimalaj k'ak'. Xquibochi'j c'u ri Jesus puwi' ri chuchu'. 
Luke4:39 Ri Jesus xket ruc' ri chuchu', xtaq'ui' cok che rilic. Xuyaj ri nimalaj k'ak', xtäni' c'u ri k'ak' che. Chanim xwalij ri chuchu', xebupatanij." 
Luke4:40 Aretak xkaj ri k'ij, conojel ri c'o yawabib cuc' re ronojel u wäch yabil, xequic'am ulok chuwäch ri Jesus. Ri are' xuya' ri u k'ab paquiwi' chquijujunal, xebucunaj." 
Luke4:41 Xukuje' xebel itzel tak uxlabal chque q'ui, cäquirak qui chi', cäquibij: “At ri' ri u C'ojol ri Dios.” Xeyaj c'ut rumal ri Jesus, man xuya' ta chque chi quetzijonic, rumal rech chi queta'm chi ri Jesus are' ri Crist." 
Luke4:42 Aretak xsakaric, ri Jesus xel bic, xbe pa jun c'olbal pa ri chaki'j uwo sak. Ri winak sibalaj xquitzucuj. Aretak xquiriko, xquik'atij c'ut rech man quel ta bic chquixo'l." 
Luke4:43 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Rajawaxic chi xukuje' quinbe pa tak niq'uiaj tinimit chic, quintzijoj ri utzalaj tak tzij re ri rajawibal ri Dios chque ri winak chila', che c'u wa' in takom wi ulok.”" 
Luke4:44 Xbe ri Jesus pa tak ri qui tinimit ri aj judeyib. Xtzijon c'ut pa tak ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. 
Luke5:1 Aretak ri Jesus tac'al chuchi' ri cho re Galiley, xebopan q'ui winak ruc', cäpitz' c'u cumal ri q'uialaj winak che u tatabexic ri u tzij ri Dios." 
Luke5:2 Ri Jesus xeril quieb jucub ri e c'o chuchi' ri cho. Ebelinak ulok ri chapal tak cär pa ri jucub che u ch'ajic tak ri qui c'at. 
Luke5:3 Xoc c'u ri Jesus pa jun chque ri jucub, ri rech ri Simon. Xubochi'j chi chukebisaj jubik' che ri ulew. Xt'uyic, xebutijoj ulok ri winak pa ri jucub." 
Luke5:4 Aretak xutanaba' ri u tzijonic, xubij che ri Simon: “Chakebisaj ri jucub pa ri u choil cho, chikasaj ri i c'at che qui chapic cär.”" 
Luke5:5 Ri Simon xubij che: “Kajtij, xujchacun ronojel ri jun ak'ab, man c'o ta c'u ka chapom. We c'u jeri' cäbij la, pa ri tzij ba' la quinkasaj ri c'at.”" 
Luke5:6 Aretak xquiban wa', sibalaj e q'ui ri cär xeboc chupam ri qui c'at, chi quet'okopitaj ri c'at." 
Luke5:7 Xequisiq'uij apan ri cachil ri e c'o pa ri jun jucub chic, rech quebopan che qui to'ic. Xepetic, xequinojisaj ri quieb jucub, jeri' chi xa' jubik' man quebik'tajic." 
Luke5:8 Ri Simon Lu', aretak xrilo, xutzak rib cho ri ulew chuwäch ri Jesus, xubij: “Tasa' ib la chwe, Wajaw, in c'u ajmac.”" 
Luke5:9 Xumay c'u ri Lu' xukuje' conojel ri e rachil, xquixe'j quib, rumal rech ri jumulaj cär ri xequichapo." 
Luke5:10 Xukuje' xumay ri Santiag xukuje' ri Xuan ri e u c'ojol ri Zebedey, ri e rachil ri Simon. Ri Jesus xubij che ri Simon: “Maxe'j awib. Kas camic cachaplej qui cäraxic winak.”" 
Luke5:11 Aretak xesataj ulok ri jucub cho ri ulew, xquiya' can ronojel, xquiterenej ri Jesus." 
Luke5:12 Aretak c'o ri Jesus pa jun chque ri tinimit, c'o c'u jun achi chila', sibalaj yawab che ch'a'c. Aretak ri are' xril ri Jesus, xxuquic, xukasaj ri u palaj cho ri ulew. Xubochi'j ri Jesus, xubij che: “Ajawaxel, we caj la, cäcuin la che nu josk'ixic.”" 
Luke5:13 Ri Jesus xuyuk ri u k'ab, xunak ocok, xubij: “Quinwaj, chatjosk'itajok.” Chanim c'ut xel ri ch'a'c che." 
Luke5:14 Ri Jesus xuya' takanic che ri achi: “C'o jun mabij wi xcha' che. Xubij che. Jät, chac'utu' awib chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob. Chaya' ri sipanic ri xtakan wi ri Moises che k'alajisanic chquiwäch chi at sak chic.”" 
Luke5:15 Xesax c'u u tzijoxic ri Jesus pa ronojel c'olbal. Rumal ri' cäquimulij quib q'uialaj winak che u tatabexic ri u tzij xukuje' che qui cunaxic chque tak ri qui yab. 
Luke5:16 Are c'u ri Jesus cäbe pa tak c'olbal pa ri chaki'j uwo sak che u banic ch'awem ruc' Dios jawije' man c'o ta wi winak. 
Luke5:17 Pa jun k'ij, aretak ri Jesus cätajin quebutijoj ri winak, e t'uyut'oj c'u ri pariseyib chila' xukuje' ajtijab re ri pixab, ri e petinak pa conojel alaj tak tinimit re Galiley, re Judey xukuje' pa Jerusalen. Are c'u ri u cuinem ri Ajawaxel c'o ruc' ri Jesus che cunanic." 
Luke5:17 Pa jun k'ij, aretak ri Jesus cätajin quebutijoj ri winak, e t'uyut'oj c'u ri pariseyib chila' xukuje' ajtijab re ri pixab, ri e petinak pa conojel alaj tak tinimit re Galiley, re Judey xukuje' pa Jerusalen. Are c'u ri u cuinem ri Ajawaxel c'o ruc' ri Jesus che cunanic." 
Luke5:18 Xepe c'u jujun achijab cuc'am jun achi cäminak u cuerp, k'oyol cho jun pop. Ri achijab cäquitzucuj u cojic bic ri achi chuwäch ri Jesus chupam ri ja." 
Luke5:19 Man xquirik ta c'ut jawije' cäquicoj wi bic, rumal rech chi e q'ui ri winak e c'olic. Xepaki' c'u puwi' ri ja, xquikasaj bic puwi' ri u xotil ri ja ruc' ri pop pa qui niq'uiajil conojel, chuwäch ri Jesus." 
Luke5:20 Aretak ri Jesus xrilo ri qui cojonic ri achijab, xubij: “Achi, ri a mac quesachtajic.”" 
Luke5:21 C'äte c'u ri' ri ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' ri pariseyib xquichaplej chomanic pa canima', xquibij: “¿Jachin wa', ri cuc'ulelaj ri Dios? ¿Jachin ta ri cäcuin che u sachic mac, xane' xuwi ri Dios?”" 
Luke5:22 Ri Jesus reta'm ri qui chomanic, xubij chque: “¿Jasche je quichomaj wa' pa ri iwanima'?" 
Luke5:23 ¿Jachique c'ut ri man c'ax ta u bixic: ‘Ri a mac quesachtajic’, o ri u bixic: ‘Chatwalijok, chatbinok’?" 
Luke5:24 Quinc'ut c'u na chiwäch chi ri Rija'l Winak c'o takanic pa u k'ab che u sachic qui mac ri winak cho ri uwächulew.” Xubij c'u che ri cäminak u cuerp: “Quinbij chawe, chatwalijok, chawalijisaj ri a pop, jät cho awachoch.”" 
Luke5:25 Chanim xwalij ri achi chquiwäch, xuwalijisaj ri u pop ri k'oyol wi, xbe cho rachoch, xunimarisaj u k'ij ri Dios." 
Luke5:26 Conojel xquimayo, xquinimarisaj u k'ij ri Dios. Xenoj che xe'n ib, xquibij: “Camic kilom mayibal tak jastak.”" 
Luke5:27 E bantajinak chi c'u wa', xel bic ri Jesus, xril jun tok'il alcabal, Levi u bi', t'uyul jawije' cätoj wi ri alcabal. Ri Jesus xubij che: “Chinaterenej.”" 
Luke5:28 Ri Levi xuya' can ronojel, xwalijic, xuterenej bic ri Jesus." 
Luke5:29 Ri Levi xuban jun nimalaj ula'nic che ri Jesus cho rachoch. E c'o q'ui tok'il tak alcabal xukuje' niq'uiaj winak chic ri e c'o pa ri mexa cuc'. 
Luke5:30 Ri pariseyib cuc' ri ajtijab re ri pixab xech'ach'at chquij ri u tijoxelab ri Jesus, xequichaplej qui c'ulelaxic, xquibij chque: “¿Jasche quixwa'ic, quixuq'uian cuc' tok'il tak alcabal xukuje' cuc' ajmaquib?”" 
Luke5:31 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ri man e yawabib taj, man rajawaxic ta cunal quech, xane' ri c'o yabil chque." 
Luke5:32 Man in petinak ta che qui siq'uixic suc'alaj tak winak. Xane' in petinak che qui siq'uixic ajmaquib, rech cäquiq'uex qui c'u'x.”" 
Luke5:33 Xquibij c'u che: “Ri u tijoxelab ri Xuan xukuje' ri quech ri pariseyib q'ui mul man cäquitij ta qui wa xukuje' q'ui mul cäquiban ch'awem ruc' Dios. E are c'u ri a tijoxelab quewa'ic, quebuq'uian amak'el.”" 
Luke5:34 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ri winak ri e c'o pa c'ulanem, ¿la cuya' man quewa' taj aretak c'ä c'o ri achajilaxel cuc'?" 
Luke5:35 Quepe c'u na k'ij aretak quesax ri achajilaxel chquixo'l. C'äte c'u ri' man quewa' ta na.” 
Luke5:36 Xukuje' xubij jun c'ambal no'j chque: “Man c'o ta jun cucoj jun c'ac' atz'iak che u c'ojoxic jun k'e'l atz'iak. We jeri', ri c'ac' cutek'tobisaj ri' ri k'e'l. Xukuje' ri c'ojbal ri esam che ri c'ac' atz'iak, man cuc'ulajij ta ri' ri k'e'l." 
Luke5:37 Xukuje' man c'o ta jun cuya' c'ac' u wa'l uva pa k'e'l tak tz'um. We ta jeri', ri c'ac' u wa'l uva quebut'ubij ri' ri tz'um, cätix c'u ri' ri u wa'l uva, quebetzeletaj ri' ri tz'um." 
Luke5:38 Are ri c'ac' u wa'l uva rajawaxic cäya' pa c'ac' tak tz'um. 
Luke5:39 Man c'o ta jun cäraj ri c'ac' u wa'l uva aretak u tijom chi re ri u wa'l uva ri k'obisam. Cubij c'ut: ‘Are utz na ri k'obisam u wa'l uva.’ ” 
Luke6:1 Pa jun k'ij re uxlanem, oc'owem re ri Jesus e rachil ri u tijoxelab pa tak ri tico'n. Ri tijoxelab cäquich'up ri u jolom trico, cäquik'ich pa tak qui k'ab, cäquitijo." 
Luke6:2 Jujun chque ri pariseyib xquibij chque: “¿Jasche quiban ri awas u banic pa k'ij re uxlanem?” 
Luke6:3 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La ma ta i siq'uim jas xuban ri David aretak xenumic xukuje' ri e rachil? 
Luke6:4 Xoc pa ri rachoch Dios, xutij c'u ri wa ri cojom cho ri Dios, xuya' que ri e rachil. Xuwi c'u ne ya'tal u tijic we wa' ri' cumal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob.”" 
Luke6:5 Ri Jesus xubij c'u chque: “Ri Rija'l Winak are' Rajaw ri k'ij re uxlanem.” 
Luke6:6 Pa jun k'ij chic re uxlanem, ri Jesus xoc pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab, xebutijoj ri winak chila'. C'o c'u chila' jun achi ri chaki'j ri u k'ab re u wiquiak'ab." 
Luke6:7 Ri ajtijab re ri pixab cuc' ri pariseyib qui c'ac'alem ri Jesus, we cucunaj ri achi pa ri k'ij re uxlanem, rech cäquirik jun mac ri catzujubej rech." 
Luke6:8 Ri Jesus reta'm ri qui chomanic, xubij che ri achi ri chaki'j u k'ab: “Chatwalijok, chattac'al pa ka niq'uiajil.” Ri are' xwalijic, xtaq'ui'c." 
Luke6:9 C'äte ri' ri Jesus xubij chque ri winak: “Quinc'ot na i chi': ¿Jachique ri ya'tal u banic pa ri k'ij re uxlanem, ri utzil, o ri lawaloyil? ¿U colic ri c'aslemal o u sachisaxic u wäch?”" 
Luke6:10 Xebuca'yej conojel ri winak ri e c'o pa tak u xc'ut, xubij che ri achi: “Chayuku' ri a k'ab.” Ri achi je xubano. Xutzir c'u ri u k'ab." 
Luke6:11 Xenoj c'ut ri e are' che oyowal; xquich'obala' c'u chquixo'l ri caquiban na che ri Jesus. 
Luke6:12 Pa tak ri k'ij ri', ri Jesus xubana' ch'awem ruc' Dios pa ri juyub. Xroc'owisaj ri chak'abil pa ch'awem ruc' Dios." 
Luke6:13 Aretak xsakaric, xebusiq'uij ri u tijoxelab, xebucha' cablajuj chquixo'l, ri xquibinaj takom rumal." 
Luke6:14 E are tak wa': ri Simon (ri xukuje' xubinaj Lu' rumal), ri Trix rachalal ri Lu', ri Santiag, ri Xuan, ri Pelip, ri Bartolome," 
Luke6:15 ri Matey, ri Max, ri Santiag u c'ojol ri Alpey, ri Simon re ri juk'at aj cananib," 
Luke6:16 ri Juds rachalal ri Santiag, xukuje' ri Judas Iscariot ri xjachow ri Jesus." 
Luke6:17 E rachilam c'ut xkaj bic, xtaq'ui' pa jun c'olbal lianic cuc' ri u tijoxelab xukuje' q'ui winak ri xepe pa ronojel Judey, pa Jerusalen, pa tak ri tak'aj re Tir, re Sidon, ri e petinak che u tatabexic ri Jesus, xukuje' rech quecunax bic che ri qui yab." 
Luke6:17 E rachilam c'ut xkaj bic, xtaq'ui' pa jun c'olbal lianic cuc' ri u tijoxelab xukuje' q'ui winak ri xepe pa ronojel Judey, pa Jerusalen, pa tak ri tak'aj re Tir, re Sidon, ri e petinak che u tatabexic ri Jesus, xukuje' rech quecunax bic che ri qui yab." 
Luke6:18 Ri quequirik c'ax cumal itzel tak uxlabal, xecunatajic." 
Luke6:19 Conojel ri winak cäquitzucuj u nakic ri Jesus, rumal rech ri cuinem ri c'o ruc' che qui cunaxic conojel." 
Luke6:20 Ri Jesus xca'y chque ri u tijoxelab, xubij: “Utz iwe ri ix mebayib, rumal rech chi iwech ri rajawibal ri Dios." 
Luke6:21 Utz iwe ri quixnum camic, rumal rech chi quixnojisax na. Utz iwe ri quixok' camic, rumal rech chi quixtze'n na." 
Luke6:22 Utz iwe aretak quetzelax i wäch cumal ri winak, aretak quixquitas apanok, quixquiyok'o, cäquibij chi ix itzel tak winak, ronojel wa' cäquiban chiwe rumal rech ri Rija'l Winak." 
Luke6:23 Chixquicot pa ri k'ij ri', chixch'oplin ruc' quicotemal. Chiwilampe', nim na ri tojbal iwe pa ri caj. Je c'u c'ax wa' xquiban ri qui mam we winak ri' chque ri e k'axal tak tzij." 
Luke6:24 ¡C'ax iwe, ri ix k'inomab, rumal rech chi xcu'bisax i c'u'x!" 
Luke6:25 ¡C'ax iwe, ri ix nojinak rumal rech chi quixnum na! ¡C'ax iwe ix ri quixtze'n camic, rumal rech chi quixok' na rumal bis!" 
Luke6:26 ¡C'ax iwe aretak utz i tzijol cumal conojel ri winak, je c'u wa' xquiban ri qui mam we winak ri' cuc' ri subunelab tak k'axal tak tzij!”" 
Luke6:27 “Quinbij c'u chiwe ix ri quitatabej ri nu tzij: Chebilok'ok'ej ri quixc'ulelanic. Chibana' utzil chque ri cäquetzelaj i wäch. 
Luke6:28 Chebitewichi'j ri quixc'okonic. Chixch'aw ruc' Dios paquiwi' ri quixquiyok'o. 
Luke6:29 We c'o jun catuch'ay che ri juperaj a palaj, chaya' chi ri juperaj chuwäch. We c'o jun cutokij ri a k'u', chaya' che chi xukuje' ri cuc'am bic ri awatz'iak." 
Luke6:30 Jachin ri cuta' jun jasach chawe, chaya' che. We c'o jun cuc'am bic ri jastak awe, c'o mabij che." 
Luke6:31 Jas ri quiwaj chi cäquiban ri winak chiwe, je xukuje' chibana' ix chque." 
Luke6:32 We c'u xak xuwi quebilok'ok'ej ri quixlok'ok'enic, ¿jas ta c'u lo u wi' ri' quibano? Xukuje' ne ri ajmaquib quequilok'ok'ej ri quelok'ok'enic." 
Luke6:33 We xak xuwi quiban utzil chque ri winak ri quebanow utzil chiwe, ¿jas ta c'u lo u wi' ri'? Xukuje' ne ri ajmaquib xak junam cäquibano." 
Luke6:34 We xuwi quiya' qui jolomal ri cu'l wi i c'u'x chi cäquitzelej chi na, ¿jas ta c'u lo u wi' ri jun utzil i banom? Xukuje' ne ri ajmaquib cäquiya' qui jolomal ri ajmaquib ri cu'l wi qui c'u'x chi cäquitzelej chi na." 
Luke6:35 Chebilok'ok'ej ba' ri cäquiban qui c'ulel chiwe. Chibana' utzil, chiya' jolomal, micu'ba' i c'u'x chrij chi cätzelex chi na. Nim c'u ri tojbal iwe, quixux na ralc'ual ri Dios aj chicajil, rumal rech chi ri are' ch'uch'uj chque ri man quemaltioxin taj xukuje' chque ri itzel tak winak." 
Luke6:36 Chixtok'obisan ba' wächaj, je jas ri i Tat tok'obisal wächaj.”" 
Luke6:37 “Mik'at tzij paquiwi' niq'uiaj chic, rech man cäk'at ta tzij piwi' ix. Mebic'okoj niq'uiaj chic, rech man quixc'okox ta na ix. Chisacha' qui mac niq'uiaj winak chic, cäsach c'u na i mac ix." 
Luke6:38 Chixyanok, cayan c'u na ri Dios chiwe, ruc' utzalaj pajbal, t'icom, slabesam, cächemowisax ri i c'olbal. Jas ri pajbal quicoj ix cuc' niq'uiaj chic, je cäcoj na chiwe." 
Luke6:39 Xubij c'u jun c'ambal no'j chque: ¿La cäcuin lo ri moy che u c'amic u be jun moy chic? ¿La ma ta quetzak ri' ri e quieb pa jun jul? 
Luke6:40 Ri tijoxel man coc'ow ta na ri retamanic chuwäch ri rajtij. Ri tijoxel, aretak cutz'akatisaj ri retamanic, cux na junam ruc' ri rajtij." 
Luke6:41 ¿Jasche caca'yej ri mes ri c'o pa ri u bak'wäch ri awachalal, are c'u ri cuta'm ri c'o pa ri a bak'wäch at, man cawil taj?" 
Luke6:42 ¿La cuya' lo cabij che ri awachalal: ‘Wachalal, chaya' chi quinwesaj na ri mes ri c'o pa ri a bak'wäch’, man cawil ta c'u ri cuta'm ri c'o pa ri a bak'wäch at? Xa' quieb a wäch, nabe chawesaj ri cuta'm pa ri a bak'wäch at. C'äte ri' kas catca'y che resaxic ri mes pa ri u bak'wäch ri awachalal.”" 
Luke6:43 “Man c'o ta jun utzalaj che' ri cuya' ta u wächinic ri man utz taj. Mawi c'o jun che' ri man utz taj ri cuya' ta utzalaj u wächinic. 
Luke6:44 Ri juwi' tak che' xa' rumal ri qui wächinic quetamataj qui wäch. Man quech'up ta c'u higo chquij ri q'uix, mawi quech'up uva chquij ri juwi' tak q'uix." 
Luke6:45 Ri utzalaj winak che ri utzalaj tak jastak ri c'o pa ranima', cäresaj wi ulok ri utz. Are c'u ri itzel winak che ri itzel tak jastak ri c'o pa ranima', cäresaj wi ulok ri etzelal. Che ri q'uiyal ri c'o pa ri ranima' quel wi ulok ri cubij ri u chi'.”" 
Luke6:46 “¿Jasche quibij ‘Ajawaxel, Ajawaxel’ chwe, man quiban ta c'ut jas ri quinbij chiwe?" 
Luke6:47 Apachin ta ne ri cäpe wuc', quebutatabej c'ut ri e nu tzij, quebuban c'ut, quinc'ut na chiwäch jacha' ruc' cajunamataj wi:" 
Luke6:48 Are' junam ruc' jun winak ri xuyac jun ja, ri xuc'ot ri u c'olbal, naj xukasaj, xucoj ri u tac'alibal puwi' abaj. Aretak xpe jun nimalaj jäb, xnimar ri nima', xupujij rib chrij ri ja ri', man xcuin ta c'u che u yicopisaxic, rumal rech chi kas utz u yaquic banom." 
Luke6:49 Are c'u ri jun ri cutatabej ri nu tzij, man cunimaj ta c'ut, junam ruc' jun winak ri xuyac rachoch puwi' ri ulew, man xucoj ta c'ut u tac'alibal. Ri nima' xupujij rib chrij, chanim xtzak ri ja, nim c'ut ri u yojyobic.”" 
Luke7:1 Aretak xto'taj che u tzijoxic ronojel wa' chque ri winak ri quetatabenic, xbe ri Jesus pa Capernaum." 
Luke7:2 C'o jun qui nimal jun sient ajch'ojab sibalaj yawab ri pataninel re, cämic cubano, sibalaj lok' c'u chuwäch." 
Luke7:3 Ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab, aretak xuta' u tzijol ri Jesus, xebutak bic nimak tak tatayib aj judeyib ruc', rech cäquibochi'j chi cäpe che u cunaxic ri pataninel re." 
Luke7:4 Ri nimak tak tatayib xebopan ruc' ri Jesus, sibalaj xquibochi'j, xquibij che: “Takal che ri tata' ri' chi cäban la jun utzil che." 
Luke7:5 Culok'ok'ej c'u ri ka nim tinimit, are xyacow ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab.”" 
Luke7:6 Ri Jesus xerachilaj bic. Aretak nakaj chi c'o wi che ri rachoch, ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab xebutak bic jujun rachil che u bixic che: “Ajawaxel, mäcos ib la, rumal rech chi man takal ta chwe chi coc ta la chupam ri wachoch." 
Luke7:7 Rumal ri' mawi ne xinchajij ta anima' che nu bic chwinakil che tzucuxic la. Xuwi ya' la ri takanic, rech cacunataj ri nu pataninel." 
Luke7:8 Rumal rech chi ri in chuxe' ri nu takanic, e c'o c'u xukuje' ajch'ojab xukuje'. Quinbij che ri jun: ‘Jät’, cäbe c'ut; che ri jun chic: ‘Tasaj’, cäpe c'ut. Quintak ri pataninel we: ‘Chabana' wa'’, cuban c'ut.”" 
Luke7:9 Ri Jesus, aretak xuta' wa', xumayo. Xutzolk'omij rib, xubij chque ri e q'uialaj winak ri e teretoj chrij: “Quinbij chiwe chi mawi ne pa Israel nu rikom jun winak ri c'o nimalaj u cojonic je jas we achi ri'.”" 
Luke7:10 Ri e takom bic, aretak xetzelej cho ja, xequirika' ri pataninel utzirinak chic." 
Luke7:11 Chucab k'ij chic, opanem re ri Jesus pa ri tinimit Nain, e rachilam ri u tijoxelab xukuje' sibalaj q'ui winak." 
Luke7:12 Aretak xebopan chunakaj ri tinimit, xrilo chi telem bic jun cäminak che u mukic. Ri cäminak xa' jun chi ala, ral jun nanaxel malca'n. Achilam c'u cumal q'uialaj winak re ri tinimit." 
Luke7:13 Ri Ajawaxel, aretak xrilo, xel u c'u'x che, xubij: “Matok' chic.”" 
Luke7:14 Xkeb ruc' ri cäminak, xuchap ocok ri telem wi. Ri e teleninak xetaq'ui'c. Ri Jesus xubij: “Ala, quinbij chawe, chatwalijok.”" 
Luke7:15 Xt'uyi' c'u ri xcäm na, xuchaplej tzijonic. Ri Jesus xujach can che ri u nan." 
Luke7:16 Conojel xquimayij, xquinimarisaj u k'ij ri Dios, xquibij: “C'o jun k'axal tzij chkaxo'l ri nim u banic. Ri Dios xulusolij ri u winak.”" 
Luke7:17 Xel u tzijol ri Jesus pa ronojel Judey, pa ronojel c'olbal ri e c'o chunakaj." 
Luke7:17 Xel u tzijol ri Jesus pa ronojel Judey, pa ronojel c'olbal ri e c'o chunakaj." 
Luke7:18 Ri u tijoxelab ri Xuan xquitzijoj conojel we jastak ri' che. Are c'u ri Xuan xebusiq'uij quieb chque ri u tijoxelab. Xebutak bic ruc' ri Ajawaxel che u bixic che: “¿La lal ri' ri bim chi cäpe na, o cäkeyej chi na jun?”" 
Luke7:19  
Luke7:20 Aretak xebopan ri achijab ruc' ri Jesus, xquibij: “Ri Xuan Bautist xujutak ulok uc' la, cubij: ‘¿La lal ri' ri bim chi cäpe na, o cäkeyej chi na jun?’ ”" 
Luke7:21 Kas pa ri jok'otaj ri', ri Jesus xebucunaj q'ui winak che ri qui yab, xebucunaj ri winak ri c'o c'axalaj tak yabil chque. Xeresaj itzel tak uxlabal chque ri winak. E q'ui ri moyab, xebujak ri qui bak'wäch." 
Luke7:22 Ri Jesus xubij chque ri e u tijoxelab ri Xuan: “Jix, chiya' u tzijoxic che ri Xuan jas ri xiwilo, ri xito. Chibij che chi ri moyab queca'yic, ri ch'ocojib quebinic, ri c'o ch'a'c chquij quejosk'itajic. Ri man quetan taj, cäjaktaj ri qui xiquin, ri cäminakib quec'astajisaxic, chque ri mebayib cätzijox wi ri tzij re colobal ib." 
Luke7:23 Tewichital ri man caquieblaj ta u c'u'x chwij.” 
Luke7:24 Aretak xebel bic ri u tako'n ri Xuan, ri Jesus xuchaplej u tzijoxic ri Xuan chque ri winak: “¿Jas ri xixel bic che rilic pa ri chaki'j uwo sak? ¿La jun aj ri cäslabesax rumal ri quiakik'?" 
Luke7:25 ¿Jas c'u xixel bic che rilic? ¿La jun winak u cojom ch'uch'ujalaj tak atz'iak? Iweta'm chi ri cäquicoj je'lalaj tak atz'iak, ri c'o qui k'inomal, pa cachoch ri ajawinelab e c'o wi." 
Luke7:26 ¿Jas c'u xixel bic che rilic? ¿La jun k'axal tzij? Je, kastzij ri are' nim na u banic chuwäch jun k'axal tzij." 
Luke7:27 Are Xuan wa' ri cubij ri tz'ibatalic: ‘Chawilampe', quintak bic ri nu tako'n chawäch, ri cusuc'umaj na ri a be chawäch.’" 
Luke7:28 Quinbij chiwe chi chquixo'l conojel ri achijab man c'o ta jun ri nim ta u banic chuwäch ri Xuan Bautist. Are c'u ri sibalaj ch'utin pa ri rajawibal ri Dios, nim na u banic chuwäch ri are'.”" 
Luke7:29 Conojel c'ut ri xquita' ri xubij ri Xuan xukuje' ne ri e tok'il tak alcabal, xban qui bautism rumal ri Xuan, xquik'alajisaj c'ut chi suc' ri Dios." 
Luke7:30 Ri pariseyib c'ut xukuje' ri ajtijab re ri pixab, man nim ta xquil wi ri u rayibal ri Dios, man xban ta c'u qui bautism rumal." 
Luke7:31 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel: “¿Jachique c'ambal no'j quinbij chiwe che u c'utic jas qui banic ri winak cho ri uwächulew camic? ¿Jas ruc' e junam wi? 
Luke7:32 Xa' e junam cuc' ri ac'alab ri e c'o pa tak ri c'ayibal, ri cäquich'abela' quib, cäquibij: ‘Xkok'esaj ri su' chiwe, man xixxojow ta c'ut. Xkaban u k'ojom cäminak, man xixok' ta c'ut.’" 
Luke7:33 Xpe ri Xuan Bautist, ri man tijol ta wa, mawi u q'uial u wa'l uva. Quibij c'ut chi c'o itzel uxlabal che." 
Luke7:34 Xpe ri Rija'l Winak, ri cäwa'ic, ri cuq'uianic. Quibij c'ut: ‘Chiwilampe', jun achi ajwij, u q'uial u wa'l uva, cachil tok'il tak alcabal xukuje' ajmaquib.’" 
Luke7:35 Ri u no'j ri Dios cäk'alajisaxic chi suc', cumal conojel ri e ralc'ual.”" 
Luke7:36 Jun chque ri pariseyib xubochi'j ri Jesus chi cäwa' ruc'. Xoc c'u bic pa ri ja, xt'uyi' pa ri mexa." 
Luke7:37 C'o c'u jun ajmacalaj ixok pa ri tinimit. Aretak xuto chi c'o ri Jesus pa ri mexa pa rachoch ri parisey, xuc'am ulok jun lime't re ri je'licalaj abaj alabastr u bi', nojinak c'oc'al chupam." 
Luke7:38 Xkeb pa rakan ri Jesus, cok'ic. Xuchaplej qui ja'xic ri rakan ruc' ri u wa'l u wäch, quebusu' ruc' ri u wi'. Xebutz'umaj ri rakan, xukuje' xutix ri c'oc'al chquij." 
Luke7:39 Ri parisey ri xula'nic, aretak xril wa', xuchomaj pa ranima', xubij: “We achi ri', we ta kas jun k'axal tzij, cuch'ob ta wa' jachin ri ixok ri cänakowic, cuch'ob ta wa' chi ajmac.”" 
Luke7:40 Xch'aw c'u ri Jesus, xubij che ri parisey: “Simon, c'o jas quinbij na chawe.” Ri are' xubij: “Bij la, Ajtij.”" 
Luke7:41 Ri Jesus xubij che: “E c'o quieb winak c'o qui c'as ruc' jun ya'l jolomal. Ri jun job sient k'ij ri u c'as re puak, ri jun chic are' cawinak lajuj k'ij." 
Luke7:42 Man c'o ta c'u qui rajil che u tojic ri qui c'as. Ri ya'l jolomal xubij c'u chque ri e quieb chi man rajawaxic ta chic cäquitoj ri qui c'as. ¿Jachin c'u chque ri quieb ajc'asib ri' sibalaj culok'ok'ej na ri ya'l jolomal?” 
Luke7:43 Ri Simon xubij che: “Quinbij in chi are ri nim na u c'as xcuyic.” Ri Jesus xubij che: “Utz ri a chomanic.” 
Luke7:44 Xca'y che ri ixok, xubij che ri Simon: “¿La cawil we ixok ri'? Xinoc pa awachoch, man xaya' ta c'u ch'ajbal wakan. Are c'u we ixok ri' u jam ri wakan ruc' u wa'l u wäch, xebusu' ruc' ri u wi'." 
Luke7:45 Ri at man xinatz'umaj taj. Are c'u we ixok ri', kas aretak xinoc ulok, man u tanabam ta qui tz'umaxic ri wakan." 
Luke7:46 Man xacoj ta aseit pa nu jolom. Are c'u we ixok u tixom ri c'oc'al chquij ri wakan. 
Luke7:47 Rumal ri' quinbij chawe chi ri q'uialaj tak u mac ri ixok xesachtajic, rumal ri' sibalaj xinulok'ok'ej. Apachin c'u ri xa' jubik' u mac cäsachic, xa' jubik' cälok'ok'enic.”" 
Luke7:48 Xubij c'u che ri ixok: “Ri a mac xesachtajic.” 
Luke7:49 Ri winak ri junam e t'uyul ruc' pa ri mexa, xquichaplej u bixic pa canima': “¿Jachin wa' chi quebusach ne tak ri macaj?”" 
Luke7:50 Xubij c'u ri Jesus che ri ixok: “Rumal ri a cojonic, at colotajinak. Jät pa jamaril.”" 
Luke8:1 Aretak bantajinak chi wa', ri Jesus quebusolij conojel ri tinimit xukuje' ri alaj tak tinimit. Cutzijoj xukuje' cuk'alajisaj ri utzalaj tzij re ri rajawibal ri Dios, e rachilam c'u ri cablajuj." 
Luke8:2 Xukuje' e rachilam jujun chuchuyib ri e utzirisam chque ri itzel tak uxlabal, chque ri qui yab. E are' ri Mariy Magdalen, ri esam wukub itzel tak uxlabal che," 
Luke8:3 ri Xua'n rixokil ri Cuz, ri cätakan paquiwi' ri jastak rech ri Herod, ri Susan, cuc' niq'uiaj ixokib chic ri cäquicoj ri jastak quech che u patanixic ri Jesus xukuje' ri u tijoxelab." 
Luke8:4 Xquimulij quib sibalaj q'ui winak. Xebel ulok pa tak ri tinimit, xebopan ruc' ri Jesus. Ri Jesus xebutzijobej pa jun c'ambal no'j:" 
Luke8:5 “Jun ticonijel xel bic che u tiquic rija'. Aretak xjopinic, xkaj jubik' ri ija' pa ri be, xtac'alexic. Xepe c'u ri chicop aj uwo caj, xquitij bic." 
Luke8:6 Jubik' chic xkaj pa tak abaj. Xel ulok, xbayuk'ar c'ut, rumal rech chi man c'o ta u räxil ri ulew." 
Luke8:7 Jubik' chic ija' xkaj chquixo'l ri q'uix. Xel ulok junam cuc' ri q'uix, xjik'isax c'u cumal." 
Luke8:8 Jubik' chic xkaj pa ri utzalaj ulew. Xq'uiyic, chquijujunal c'ut xquiya' jujun tak sient qui wächinic.” Aretak xbitaj wa' rumal, co xch'awic, xubij: “apachin ri c'o u xiquin che u tatabexic, chutatabej.”" 
Luke8:9 Ri e u tijoxelab xquic'ot u chi' ri Jesus jas quel cubij we c'ambal no'j ri'. 
Luke8:10 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Yo'm chiwe ix ri u ch'obic ri jastak re ri rajawibal ri Dios ri man e betamatal ta can nabe. Cäbix c'u we jastak ri' chque ri niq'uiaj winak chic pa c'ambal tak no'j, rech pune' ta ne queca'yic, man queilon taj, pune' ta ne quetanic, man quech'obon taj.”" 
Luke8:11 “Are c'u wa' ri quel cubij ri c'ambal no'j: Ri ija' are cuq'uexwächij ri tijonic ri cuya' ri Dios. 
Luke8:12 Ri ija' ri xkaj pa ri be, are cuq'uexwächij ri winak ri cäquita' ri tzij, cäpe c'u ri itzel che resaxic ri tzij pa canima', rech man quecojon taj, man quecolotaj ta c'ut." 
Luke8:13 Ri ija' ri xkaj pa tak ri abaj, are cuq'uexwächij ri winak ri cäquita' ri tzij, cäquic'am ruc' quicotemal. Man c'o ta c'u qui c'amal benak pa ulew, xa' quieb oxib k'ij quecojonic. Aretak cäpe c'ambejebal, quetzelej chquij." 
Luke8:14 Ri ija' ri xkaj pa tak ri q'uix, are wa' ri winak ri cäquita' ri tzij. Are c'u queboc na il chque ri jastak aj uwächulew, benak qui c'u'x ruc' ri k'inomal xukuje' ri quicotemal aj uwächulew, quejik'isax c'u cumal. Man c'u quewächin taj." 
Luke8:15 Ri ija' ri xkaj pa ri utzalaj ulew, are cuq'uexwächij ri winak ri cäquita' ri tzij, cäquicoj ruc' ronojel canima'. Ri e are' cäquik'i ronojel u wäch c'ax, quewächin ruc' coch'onic.”" 
Luke8:16 “Man c'o ta jun ri cutzij jun chäj, cuch'uk ta c'u ruc' jun subal o cuya' ta chuxe' ri ch'at. Xane' cuya' puwi' jun tzuc'ulibal, rech quilitaj ri u sakil cumal ri winak ri queboc pa ri ja." 
Luke8:17 Conojel ri jastak ri e c'utalic, quek'alajisax na. Conojel ri jastak ri e awatalic, quebel na chi sak rech quetamaxic." 
Luke8:18 Chiwila' ba' jas ri quiban che u tatabexic ri nu tzij. Apachin ri c'o jas c'o ruc', cäya' chi na niq'uiaj che. Apachin c'u ri man c'o ta c'o ruc', xukuje' ne ri cuchomaj chi c'o jas c'o ruc', quesax na che.”" 
Luke8:19 Xopan ri u nan ri Jesus xukuje' ri e rachalal jawije' ri c'o wi. Man quecuin ta c'ut quekeb ruc', rumal rech chi e q'ui ri winak e c'olic." 
Luke8:20 Xbix c'u che ri Jesus: “Ri a nan e rachil ri e awachalal e tac'atoj apan cho ja, cäcaj caquil a wäch.”" 
Luke8:21 Ri are' xubij chque: “Ri nu nan xukuje' ri e wachalal e are ri' ri cäquita' ri u tzij ri Dios, caquiban c'ut ri cubij.”" 
Luke8:22 Pa jun chque ri k'ij, ri Jesus xoc pa jun jucub e rachilam ri u tijoxelab, xubij chque: “Chujk'ax ch'akäp che ri cho.” Xebel c'u bic." 
Luke8:23 Aretak e benak puwi' ri cho, ri Jesus xc'amtaj che waram. Xpe jun nimalaj quiakik' puwi' ri cho, xnoj ri jucub che ja', xak quieb cubij chi paquiwi'." 
Luke8:24 Xekeb ruc' ri Jesus, xquic'asuj, xquibij: “¡Kajtij, Kajtij, cäsach ka wäch!” Aretak xc'astajic, xuyaj ri quiakik', xuyaj ri u k'et ri ja'. Xetänic, ri c'ax xelilobic c'ut." 
Luke8:25 Xubij chque ri u tijoxelab: “¿Jawije' c'o wi ri i cojonic? Xquixe'j quib, xquimayo, xquibila' chquixo'l: ¿Jachin lo wa', chi cutak ri quiakik', ri ja', cäquinimaj c'u ri u tzij?”" 
Luke8:26 Aretak xek'ax ch'käp che ri cho, xebopan pa ri culew ri aj Jeras, ri c'o apan chuwäch ri Galiley." 
Luke8:27 Aretak ri Jesus xel pa ri jucub, xel ulok pa ri tinimit jun achi che u c'ulaxic, ri e c'o itzel tak uxlabal che. Q'ui junab chic e c'o ri itzel tak uxlabal che, man cucoj ta ratz'iak, mawi cäjeki' cho rachoch, xane' chquixo'l ri mukubal cäc'oji' wi." 
Luke8:28 Ri achi, aretak xril apan ri Jesus, xurak u chi', xutzak rib cho ri ulew chuwäch, xubij ruc' nimalaj chuk'ab: “¿Jas awe chwe, Jesus, u C'ojol ri Dios aj chicaj? Catinbochi'j chi maban c'ax chwe.”" 
Luke8:29 Xubij wa' rumal rech chi ri Jesus xutak ri itzel uxlabal chi chel bic che ri achi. Q'ui mul c'ut c'o ri u cuinem ri itzel uxlabal puwi' ri achi. Pune' cäxim cuc' tikom tak ch'ich', ruc' chapbal akanaj, ri achi quebut'okopij wa', quel bic, cäc'am bic rumal ri itzel uxlabal pa tak chaki'j uwo sak." 
Luke8:30 Ri Jesus xuta' che, xubij: “¿Jas ri a bi'?” Ri are' xubij: “Sibalaj Uj Q'ui ri nu bi'.” Xubij wa' rumal rech chi e q'ui ri itzel tak uxlabal e c'o che." 
Luke8:31 Ri itzel tak uxlabal xquibochi'j ri Jesus chi mebutak bic pa ri k'ekumalaj c'olbal. 
Luke8:32 C'o c'u jumulaj ak chila', cätajin queyuk'ux pa ri juyub, e q'ui c'ut. Ri itzel tak uxlabal xquibochi'j ri Jesus rech cuya' c'olbal chque chi queboc chquipam tak ri ak. Xuya' c'u chque." 
Luke8:33 Xebel c'u bic ri itzel tak uxlabal che ri achi, xeboc chquipam tak ri ak. Ri jumulaj ak xquiq'uiak bic quib tza'm tak ri tanatak, xetzak bic pa ri cho, xejik'ic." 
Luke8:34 Ri ajyuk'ab, aretak xquil ri xc'ulmatajic, xebanimajic, xequiya' u tzijoxic pa ri tinimit xukuje' pa tak ri juyub." 
Luke8:35 Xebel ulok ri winak che rilic ri xc'ulmaxic. Xebopan ruc' ri Jesus. Xequirika' ri achi ri xebel wi ri itzel tak uxlabal, u cojom chi ratz'iak, utz chi u chomanic, t'uyul chuwäch ri Jesus. Aretak xquilo, xquixe'j quib." 
Luke8:36 Ri winak ri xquil ri xbantajic, xquiya' u tzijol chque ri niq'uiaj chic, jas xuban ri achi ri xec'oji' ri itzel tak uxlabal che, xto'tajic." 
Luke8:37 Are c'u ri q'ui winak ri e jekel chrij ri culew ri aj Jeras, xquibochi'j ri Jesus rech quel bic chquixo'l, rumal rech chi sibalaj xquixe'j quib. Xoc c'u ri Jesus pa jun jucub, xtzelejic." 
Luke8:38 Ri achi ri xebel wi ri itzel tak uxlabal, xubochi'j ri Jesus chi cuya' che chi cäbe ruc'. Ri Jesus c'ut xujach bic, xubij:" 
Luke8:39 “Chattzelej cho awachoch, chatzijoj ronojel ri xuban ri Dios chawe.” Ri are' xel bic, xresaj u tzijoxic pa ronojel ri tinimit, ronojel ri xuban ri Jesus che." 
Luke8:40 Aretak xtzelej bic ri Jesus, xc'ulax ruc' quicotemal cumal q'ui winak, conojel c'ut queyem." 
Luke8:41 Te c'u ri' xpe jun achi Jair u bi', are qui nimal ri winak pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Ri are' xxuqui' chuwäch ri Jesus, xubochi'j chi chopan pa ri rachoch." 
Luke8:42 Xa' c'u jun u mia'l c'olic, cäraj cablajuj u junab, xa' jubik' man quel ranima'. Benak c'u ri Jesus, cäpitz' cumal ri q'uialaj winak." 
Luke8:43 Xpe c'u jun ixok, c'o chi cablajuj junab xak quel u quiq'uel. Man c'o ta jun cuininak ta che u cunaxic." 
Luke8:44 Ri are' xkeb chrij ri Jesus, xunak ocok ri u chi' ri u k'u'. Chanim xtäni' ri u quiq'uel ri quelic." 
Luke8:45 Xubij c'u ri Jesus: “¿Jachin ri' ri xinnakowic?” Conojel c'ut xquibij chi man quinakomtaj. Xubij ri Lu' xukuje' ri e rachil: “Kajtij, ri q'uialaj winak ri quepitz'on la, quepakchi'n la pa ronojel c'olbal.”" 
Luke8:46 Ri Jesus xubij: “C'o jun ri xinunako. Xinna' c'ut chi xel chuk'ab chwe.” 
Luke8:47 C'äte ri' ri ixok, aretak xrilo chi xetamatajic, xpetic cäbirbitic, xutzak rib cho ri ulew chuwäch ri Jesus. Xuk'alajisaj chquiwäch conojel ri winak jasche xunak ocok ri Jesus, xubij chi rumal ri' chanim xcunatajic." 
Luke8:48 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Nu mia'l, xatto'taj rumal ri a cojonic. Jät ruc' jamaril.”" 
Luke8:49 C'ä cätajin cätzijonic, xpe jun aj uwo rachoch ri Jair, ri cätakan pa ri ja ri caquitijo wi' quib ri aj judeyib. Ri jun aj uwo rachoch ri Jair xubij che: “Ri mia'l la xcämic. Maya' chi la latz' che ri Ajtij.”" 
Luke8:50 Aretak xuta' wa' ri Jesus, xch'awic, xubij che ri Jair: “Maxe'j awib. Xuwi chatcojonok. Ri a mia'l cäto'taj c'u na.”" 
Luke8:51 Aretak xoc pa ja, man xraj ta ri Jesus chi c'o jun chic coc bic ruc', xane' xuwi ri Lu', ri Santiag, ri Xuan xukuje' ri u tat u nan ri ali." 
Luke8:52 Conojel ri e c'o chila' cäquiq'uis quib che ok'ej. Ri Jesus xubij: “Mixok' chic. Ri ali man cäminak taj, xa' cäwaric.”" 
Luke8:53 Ri winak xquitze'j u wäch. Queta'm c'ut chi cäminak chic. 
Luke8:54 Ri Jesus xuc'am ri u k'ab ri ali, co xubij: “Ali, chatwalijok.”" 
Luke8:55 C'äte ri' xtzelej ulok ri ranima'. Chanim xwalijic. Ri Jesus xtakan c'u che u ya'ic u wa ri ali. 
Luke8:56 Ri u tat u nan ri ali xquimayo. Ri Jesus c'ut xebutako chi c'o mäquibij wi jas ri xc'ulmaxic. 
Luke9:1 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij ri cablajuj u tijoxelab, xuya' qui cuinem, xuya' takanic pa qui k'ab paquiwi' conojel ri itzel tak uxlabal, xukuje' che qui cunaxic tak ri yawabib." 
Luke9:2 Xebutak bic che u tzijoxic ri rajawibal ri Dios, che cunanic." 
Luke9:3 Xubij chque: “C'o mic'am bic che re i be, mawi ch'imiy, mawi chi'm, mawi wa, mawi puak. Mawi iwatz'iak ri qui jalbej." 
Luke9:4 Apachique ja ri quixoc wi, chixcanaj can chila', c'ä quixel na bic." 
Luke9:5 Conojel ri winak ri man quixquic'ulaj taj, aretak quixel bic pa ri qui tinimit, chitota' can ri ulew ri c'o chque ri iwakan. Jeri' quik'alajisaj chquij chi man utz ta ri qui banom.”" 
Luke9:6 Xebel c'u bic ri u tijoxelab, xequisolij ri alaj tak tinimit. Xquitzijoj ri tzij re colobal ib, xequicunaj yawabib pa ronojel c'olbal." 
Luke9:7 Ri Herod ri k'atal tzij xuta ronojel jas ri xc'ulmaxic. Xsach u c'u'x rumal rech chi e c'o jujun cäquibij: “Ri Xuan xc'astaj chquixo'l ri cäminakib.” 
Luke9:8 Niq'uiaj chic cäquibij: “Xuc'ut rib ri Eliy.” Jule' chic cäquibij: “Jun chque ri k'axal tak tzij xc'astajic.” 
Luke9:9 Ri Herod xubij: “Xinwesaj ya' u jolom ri' ri Xuan. ¿Jachin c'u ri', ri je tak nu tom wa' chrij?” Cutzucuj c'u rilic ri Jesus." 
Luke9:10 Aretak xetzelej ulok ri takomxenlab, xquitzijoj che ri Jesus ronojel jas ri xquibano. Ri Jesus xebuc'am bic pa qui tuquiel wi, pa jun c'olbal chunakaj ri tinimit Betsaid."
