Luke21:30 Aretak quiwilo chi quetuxan chi ri qui xak, quich'ob pa iwe wi chi nakaj chic ri k'alaj." 
Luke21:31 Jeri' xukuje' ri ix, aretak quiwilo chi quebantaj we jastak ri', chich'obo' chi ri rajawibal ri Dios nakaj chic c'o wi." 
Luke21:32 Kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi maja' coc'ow we ija'lil ri' aretak quebantaj na conojel ri jastak." 
Luke21:33 Cäsach na u wäch ri caj ulew, are c'u ri nu tzij man cäsach ta u wäch." 
Luke21:34 Chichajij iwib, miwalobisaj ri iwanima' chupam ri munil, mixk'abaric, mixoc il che ri jastak re we c'aslemal ri', xak c'ätetal ne mäpe ri k'ij ri' chiwij" 
Luke21:35 jacha' jun chapbal. Cäpe c'u na ri k'ij ri' paquiwi' conojel ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew. 
Luke21:36 Xakba' chixc'ol suc'umatalic, chibana' ch'awem ruc' Dios ronojel jok'otaj, rech quixcuinic quixto'tajic man quebikajbej ta c'ut we jastak ri' ri quec'ulmataj na quixcuin c'u ri' quitac'aba' iwib chuwäch ri Rija'l Winak.”" 
Luke21:37 Ri Jesus quebutijoj ri winak pa k'ij pa ri rachoch Dios, chak'ab quel bic, cäroc'owisaj ri ak'ab pa ri qui juyubal tak ri u Che'al Aseitun." 
Luke21:38 Ak'abibal conojel ri winak quelequitatabej pa ri rachoch Dios. 
Luke22:1 Nakaj chic ri nimak'ij re ri caxlanwa ri man cäya' ta ch'am ruc'. Ri cäbix Oc'owem che. 
Luke22:2 Ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri ajtijab re ri pixab cäquitzucuj jas cäquiban na che u cämisaxic ri Jesus. Cäquixe'j c'u quib chquiwäch ri winak. 
Luke22:3 Xoc c'u ri Satanas pa ranima' ri Judas, ri cäbix Iscariot che, are jun chque ri cablajuj tijoxelab." 
Luke22:4 Ri are' xel bic, xech'aw cuc' ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri qui nimakil ri e chajinel re ri rachoch Dios, chi jas cuban na che u jachic ri Jesus pa qui k'ab." 
Luke22:5 Ri e are' c'ut xequicotic, xquichomaj chi cäquiya' puak che." 
Luke22:6 Ri Judas xuya' rib chuxe' che u banic wa'. Cutzucuj c'u jun jok'otaj che u jachic ri Jesus pa qui k'ab aretak man e c'o ta winak. 
Luke22:7 Xopan c'u ri k'ij re ri caxlanwa ri man cäya' ta ch'am ruc', aretak rajawaxic u cämisaxic ri alaj chij re ri Oc'owem." 
Luke22:8 Ri Jesus xebutak c'u bic ri Lu' xukuje' ri Xuan, xubij chque: “Jix, chisuc'umaj ri wa'im re ri Oc'owem, rech cäkatijo.”" 
Luke22:9 Xquibij c'u che: “¿Jawije' ri caj wi la chi cakasuc'umaj wi?” 
Luke22:10 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chiwilampe', aretak quixopan pa ri tinimit, quixuc'ulaj na jun achi, ri ruc'am jun k'ebal ja'. Chiterenej bic c'ä cho ri ja ri coc wi." 
Luke22:11 Chibij che ri rajaw ja: ‘Ri Kajtij cubij chawe: ¿Jawije' c'o wi ri c'olbal ri cäkatij wi na ri wa'im re ri Oc'owem cuc' ri nu tijoxelab?’ 
Luke22:12 Ri are' cuc'ut na chiwäch jun nimalaj c'olbal suc'umatal chic pa ri cawik ja. Chisuc'umaj ri wa'im re ri Oc'owem chila'.” 
Luke22:13 Xebe c'u ri u tijoxelab, je xequirika' jas ri xubij bic chque. Xquisuc'umaj c'u ri wa'im re ri Oc'owem." 
Luke22:14 Aretak xopan ri jok'otaj, ri Jesus e rachil ri takomxenlab xet'uyi' pa ri mexa." 
Luke22:15 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Sibalaj nu rayim u tijic we wa'im ri' re ri Oc'owem iwuc' c'ä majok quinrik c'ax. 
Luke22:16 Quinbij c'u chiwe, chi mawi jumul quintij ta chi we, c'ä cätz'akat na pa ri rajawibal ri Dios.”" 
Luke22:17 Xuc'am c'ut jun kumubal, xumaltioxij che ri Dios, xubij chque ri u tijoxelab: “Chic'ama' wa', chijacha chiwäch." 
Luke22:18 Quinbij c'u chiwe, chi kas camic man quintij ta chi we ri u wa'l uva, c'ä cäpe na ri rajawibal ri Dios.”" 
Luke22:19 Xuc'am ri wa, xumaltioxij che ri Dios, xupiro, xuya' chque ri u tijoxelab, xubij: “Are nu cuerp wa', ri jachom u mac iwech. Chitija' wa' che natabal wech.”" 
Luke22:20 Aretak e wokinak chic, xuc'am xukuje' ri kumubal, xubij: “We kumubal ri' are' ri c'ac' c'ulwächinic pa ri nu quiq'uel, ri xch'etow u mac iwech." 
Luke22:21 Chiwilampe', ri jachal wech cätajin cäwa' wuc' pa ri mexa." 
Luke22:22 Kastzij ri Rija'l Winak cäbec, jas ri chomam ulok. ¡Tok'ob c'u u wäch ri achi ri' ri cäjachowic!”" 
Luke22:23 C'äte ri' xquichaplej u c'otic qui chi' chbil quib, chi jachin lo chque ri cäbanow na wa'." 
Luke22:24 Xwalij c'u jun ch'obonic chquixo'l ri tijoxelab che retamaxic jachin lo ri nim na u k'ij chquixo'l. 
Luke22:25 Ri Jesus c'ut xubij chque: “Ri cajawinelab ri man aj judeyib taj quetakan paquiwi'. Ri c'o qui takanic paquiwi' ri winak, caquibij quib chi e banal tak utzil." 
Luke22:26 Are c'u ri ix, man je ta wa'. Xane' ri nabeal chixo'l chux je ta ne ri sibalaj ac'al na. Ri cätakanic chux pataninel iwech." 
Luke22:27 ¿Jachin c'u ri nim na u banic, a are' ri cät'uyi' pa ri mexa, o are ri cäpataninic? ¿La ma ta are' ri cät'uyi' pa ri mexa? Are c'u ri in chixo'l, in je jas ri cäpataninic." 
Luke22:28 Ix c'u ri' ri xixc'oji' wuc' pa tak ri nu rikoj c'ax. 
Luke22:29 Ri in c'ut quinya' chiwe jun iwajawibal jas ri xuya' ri nu Tat chwe," 
Luke22:30 rech quixwa'ic, quixuq'uian pa ri nu mexa pa ri wajawibal, rech quixt'uyi' paquiwi' tak tem che u k'atic tzij paquiwi' ri cablajuj ramak' ri Israel.”" 
Luke22:31 Xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel: “Simon, Simon, chawilampe', ri Satanas xixuto rech quixya' che, rech quixuyicopisaj je jas cäban che ri trico." 
Luke22:32 Xinbochi'n c'u pawi', rech man caya' ta can ri a cojonic. Ri at c'ut, aretak chaq'uex chi na a c'u'x, chaya' qui chuk'ab ri awachalal.”" 
Luke22:33 Ri Lu' c'ut xubij che: “Wajaw, in c'olic rech quinbe uc' la, pune' pa che', pune' pa cämical.”" 
Luke22:34 Xubij c'u ri Jesus: “Lu', quinbij chawe chi c'ä maja' cok' ri ama' ec' camic, cabij na oxmul chi man aweta'm ta nu wäch.”" 
Luke22:35 Te c'u ri' xubij ri Jesus chque ri u tijoxelab: “Aretak xixintak bic man ruc' ta u c'abal i puak, mawi i chi'm, mawi i xajäb, ¿la c'o jas xajwataj chiwe?” Xquibij c'ut: “Man c'o taj.”" 
Luke22:36 Xubij c'u chque: “Camic c'ut apachin ri c'o u c'abal u puak, chuc'ama', junam xukuje' ri u chi'm. Are' c'ut ri man c'o ta u ch'ich' re ch'o'j, chuc'ayij ri u k'u' che u lok'ic." 
Luke22:37 Quinbij c'u chiwe chi rajawaxic cäbantaj na chwe we tz'ibatalic ri': ‘Xajilax c'u chquixo'l ri e banal tak etzelal.’ Are c'u ri tz'ibatal chwij, cäbantaj na.”" 
Luke22:38 Ri e are' xquibij che: “Kajaw, chilampe' la, c'o quieb ch'ich' re ch'o'j waral.” Xubij chque: “Ruc' wa'.”" 
Luke22:39 Ri Jesus xel bic, xbe pa ri qui Juyubal tak ri u Che'al Aseitun, jas ri u nak'atisam wi rib. Xukuje' ri u tijoxelab xquiterenej bic." 
Luke22:40 Aretak xebopan chila', ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chibana' ch'awem ruc' Dios, rech man quixtzak taj aretak quixtakchi'x che mac.”" 
Luke22:41 Ri are' c'ut xutas apan rib chquij jas ri u najil ri quetakal wi jun abaj. Xxuquic, xuban ch'awem ruc' Dios," 
Luke22:42 xubij: “Tat, we are' ri rayibal la, najtajisaj la we kumubal ri' chwe; are c'u mabanataj ri nu rayibal xane' are' ri rayibal la.”" 
Luke22:43 Jun tako'n c'ut aj chicaj xuc'ut rib chuwäch, xuya' u chuk'ab." 
Luke22:44 Aretak xel ch'u'j ri ranima', sibalaj xbochi'n che ri Dios. Are ri u c'atanal je jas ri ju tak tz'uj quic' ri cäkaj cho ri ulew." 
Luke22:45 Xwalij c'u che ri ch'awem ruc' Dios, xopan cuc' ri u tijoxelab, xeburika' quewar rumal ri bis." 
Luke22:46 Xubij chque; “¿Jasche quixwaric? Chixwalijok, chibana' ch'awem ruc' Dios, rech man quixtzak taj aretak quixtakchi'x che mac.”" 
Luke22:47 C'ä cätajin cach'aw ri Jesus, aretak xebopan q'ui winak. Ri u binam Judas ri are jun chque ri cablajuj tijoxelab, are' c'amowinak qui be. Wa' xnakajin che u tz'umaxic ri Jesus." 
Luke22:48 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Judas, ¿la ruc' tz'umanic cajach ri Rija'l Winak?”" 
Luke22:49 Ri e c'o ruc' ri Jesus, aretak xquilo jas ri cäc'ulmax na, xquibij che: “Kajaw, ¿la quekasoc ruc' ch'ich' re ch'o'j?”" 
Luke22:50 Jun chque xusoc jun pataninel re ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, xresaj ri u xiquin re u wiquiak'ab." 
Luke22:51 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Ruc' wa'. Chebiya' canok.” Xuchap ocok ri u xiquin ri pataninel, xucunaj." 
Luke22:52 Ri Jesus xubij chque ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, ri e qui nimakil ri e chajil re ri rachoch Dios, xukuje' ri nimak tak tatayib ri e petinak chrij che u chapic: “¿La jas ta ne chrij jun eläk'om ix elinak wi ulok ruc' ch'ich' re ch'o'j, ruc' che'?" 
Luke22:53 In c'olinak iwuc' ronojel k'ij pa ri rachoch Dios, man xinichap ta c'ut. Are c'u wa' ri jok'otaj chiwe, c'o ri u cuinem ri k'eku'm iwuc'.”" 
Luke22:54 Ri winak xquichap ri Jesus, xquic'am ulok pa ri rachoch ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob. Ri Lu' u terenem chi naj." 
Luke22:55 Nuc'um chi c'u k'ak' pa ri u niq'uiajil ri uwo ja, conojel junam xet'uyic. Xukuje' ri Lu' xt'uyi' chquixo'l." 
Luke22:56 Xilitaj rumal jun ali pataninel chi t'uyul chrij ri k'ak', naj u wi' che, xubij: “Xukuje' we achi ri' xc'oji' ruc' ri Jesus.”" 
Luke22:57 Ri Lu' xresaj rib chupam, xubij: “Ixok, man weta'm ta u wäch.”" 
Luke22:58 Man naj ta chi c'ut, ri Lu' xilitaj chi rumal jun, ri xubij: “Xukuje' ri at at jun chque.” Ri Lu' xubij: “Tat, man in taj.”" 
Luke22:59 Oc'owinak chi jok'otaj, jun chic xucoj u chuk'ab che u bixic, xubij: “Kastzij we achi ri' xc'oji' ruc', aj Galiley c'ut ri are'.”" 
Luke22:60 Ri Lu' xubij: “Tat, man weta'm taj jas ri cabij.” C'ä cätajin cätzijonic, chanim xok' ri ama' ec'." 
Luke22:61 C'äte ri' ri Ajawaxel xutzolk'omij rib, xuca'yej ri Lu'. Are c'u ri Lu' xnataj ri u tzij ri Rajaw che, jas ri xubij che: “C'ä maja' cok' ri ama' ec', oxmul cabij na chi man aweta'm ta nu wäch.”" 
Luke22:62 Xel c'u apan ri Lu', xok' ruc' c'axc'olil." 
Luke22:63 Are c'u ri achijab ri e c'o chunakaj ri Jesus, xquetz'bej u wäch, xquich'ayo." 
Luke22:64 Xquich'uk ri u bak'wäch, xquita' c'u che: “Chach'obo' jachin xatch'ayowic.”" 
Luke22:65 Xukuje' niq'uiaj q'ui jastak chic xquibij che, xquiyok'o." 
Luke22:66 Aretak xsakaric, xquimulij quib ri nimak tak tatayib aj judeyib, ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri ajtijab re ri pixab, xquic'am bic ri Jesus chquiwäch ri comon re ri qui nimakil ri aj judeyib ri cäquik'at tzij." 
Luke22:67 Xquibij: “We at ri' ri Crist, chabij chke.” Ri Jesus c'ut xubij chque: “We ta quinbij chiwe, man quicoj ta ri'." 
Luke22:68 Xukuje' we ta c'o jas quinta' chiwe, man quitzelej ta u wäch ri' ri nu tzij." 
Luke22:69 Kas camic c'ut ri Rija'l Winak cät'uyi' na pa ri u wiquiak'ab ri Dios ri c'o u cuinem.” 
Luke22:70 Xquibij c'u conojel: “¿La at ba' u C'ojol ri Dios?” Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Je' wa', jacha' ri i bim.”" 
Luke22:71 Xquibij c'ut: “¿Jas ta chi qui patan k'alajisanelab chke? Kas uj xujto'w pu chi'.” 
Luke23:1 Xewalij c'u conojel ri winak, xquic'am bic ri Jesus chuwäch ri Pilat." 
Luke23:2 Xquichaplej u tzujuxic xquibij: “Ka rikom we achi ri' chi cätajin cujech'eba' ri ka nim tinimit, quebutijoj ri winak chi man cäquiya' ta alcabal che ri nimalaj k'atal tzij Sesar. Cubij c'ut chi ri are' are ri Crist, jun ajawinel.”" 
Luke23:3 Xuta c'u ri Pilat che, xubij: “¿La at ri' ri Cajawinel ri aj judeyib?” Ri Jesus xubij che: “At catbinic.”" 
Luke23:4 Ri Pilat xubij chque ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' chque ri winak: “Man c'o ta jun etzelal quinrik chrij we achi ri'.” 
Luke23:5 Ri e are' c'ut xquicoj qui chuk'ab che u bixic: “Quebutuquij ri winak, quebutijoj ri winak pa ronojel Judey. Xuchaplej ulok pa Galiley, ulinak c'ä waral.”" 
Luke23:5 Ri e are' c'ut xquicoj qui chuk'ab che u bixic: “Quebutuquij ri winak, quebutijoj ri winak pa ronojel Judey. Xuchaplej ulok pa Galiley, ulinak c'ä waral.”" 
Luke23:6 Ri Pilat, aretak xuta' wa', xuto we aj Galiley we achi ri'." 
Luke23:7 Aretak xretamaj chi jela' quel wi ri Jesus jawije' cätakan wi ri k'atal tzij Herod, xutak bic ruc' ri Herod, ri c'o pa Jerusalen pa tak ri k'ij ri'." 
Luke23:8 Ri Herod, aretak xril ri Jesus, sibalaj xquicotic. Q'ui k'ij chic u rayim rilic u wäch, rumal rech chi u tom q'ui jastak chrij. Cäraj c'ut cäril jun etal rumal." 
Luke23:9 Xebuban q'ui c'otoj chi'aj che, ri Jesus man c'o ta c'u xutzelej u bixic che." 
Luke23:10 E tac'atoj xukuje' ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri ajtijab re ri pixab, xquitij qui chuk'ab che u banic tzujunic chrij ri Jesus." 
Luke23:11 Are' c'u ri Herod xukuje' ri e rajch'ojab xquetzelaj u wäch, che c'u retz'bexic u wäch xequicoj atz'iak chrij ri quejuluwic, jacha' re jun ajawinel. Xtakaxtax c'u bic rumal ri Herod xutzelej chuwäch ri Pilat." 
Luke23:12 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri Pilat xukuje' ri Herod xquich'abej quib, qui c'ulel c'u ne quib nabe." 
Luke23:13 Ri Pilat xebumulij ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, ri e k'atal tak tzij, xukuje' ri winak." 
Luke23:14 Xubij chque: “Ix i c'amom ulok we achi ri' chnuwäch, xibij chi cujech'obisaj qui be ri winak. Chiwilampe', xinc'ot u chi' chiwäch, man c'o ta jun etzelal xinrik chrij we achi ri' chque ri tzij ri quebibij chrij." 
Luke23:15 Xukuje' ri Herod man c'o ta xurik chrij, xutak chi c'u ulok kuc'. Chiwilampe', man c'o ta jun jasach u banom rech takal che chi cäcämisaxic." 
Luke23:16 Quinc'äjisaj ba' u wäch, quintzokopij bic.”" 
Luke23:17  
Luke23:18 Conojel c'u ri winak xa' junam xquirak qui chi', xquibij: “¡Sacha' la u wäch we achi ri'! ¡Are chatzokopij ri Barabas chkawäch!”" 
Luke23:19 We Barabas ri' cojom pa che' rumal rech chi u banom chi xquiwalijisaj quib ri winak chrij ri k'atal tzij pa ri tinimit, xukuje' rumal cämisanic." 
Luke23:20 Ri Pilat xebuch'abej chi jumul ri winak, are ta xraj xutzokopij ri Jesus." 
Luke23:21 Ri winak c'ut xquirak qui chi', xquibij: “¡Chripa' la cho jun ripibal! ¡Chripa' la cho jun ripibal!”" 
Luke23:22 Churoxmul ri Pilat xubij chque: “¿Jas etzelal u banom wa'? Man c'o ta jun mac rikom chrij rech takal che chi cäcämisaxic. Quinc'äjisaj ba' u wäch, quintzokopij bic.”" 
Luke23:23 Ri winak c'ut xquicoj qui chuk'ab, sibalaj xquirak qui chi', xquitz'onoj chi chripok ri Jesus cho jun ripibal. Xch'äcan c'u ri qui tzij, rumal rech chi sibalaj xquirak qui chi'." 
Luke23:24 C'äte ri' ri Pilat xuchomaj chi cäbantaj na jas ri cäquita' che. 
Luke23:25 Xutzokopij bic ri jun ri xquita' che, are ri cojom pa che' rumal rech chi u banom chi xquiwalijisaj quib ri winak chrij ri k'atal tzij, e u cämisam winak. Xujach c'u ri Jesus pa qui k'ab rech cäquiban che jas ri cäcaj." 
Luke23:26 Aretak qui c'amom chi bic ri Jesus che u ripic, xquichap apan jun achi aj Siren, Simon u bi', ri petinak pa ri juyub. Xquiya' ri ripibal chrij, rech cutelej bic chrij ri Jesus." 
Luke23:27 Xeteri bic sibalaj q'ui winak. E c'o q'ui ixokib chquixo'l ri cäquiq'uis quib che ok'ej, cäcok'ej u wäch ri Jesus." 
Luke23:28 Ri Jesus c'ut xutzolk'omij rib cuc', xubij: “Ixokib aj Jerusalen, miniwok'ej chic. Are chiwok'ej iwib, chebiwok'ej ri e iwalc'ual." 
Luke23:29 Chitampe', quepe na k'ij aretak cäbix na: ‘Utz que ri ixokib ri man quebalc'ualan taj, utz que ri ixokib ri man quecuin ta ri qui c'u'x che alc'ualanic, utz que ri ixokib ri man xetubisan taj.’" 
Luke23:30 Ri winak cäquichaplej c'u na u bixic chque ri nimak tak juyub: ‘Chixtzak ulok pakawi'’. Cäquibij na chque ri alaj tak juyub: ‘Chujich'uku'’. 
Luke23:31 We queban we jastak ri' che ri räx che', ¿jas ta c'u lo ri ma ta caban na che ri chaki'j che'?”" 
Luke23:32 Xukuje' xequic'am bic quieb banal etzelal ruc' ri Jesus, rech quecämisaxic." 
Luke23:33 Aretak xebopan pa ri c'olbal ri u Bakil Jolomaj u bi', chila' xquirip wi ri Jesus. Xukuje' xequirip ri e banal etzelal, ri jun pa u wiquiak'ab ri Jesus, ri jun chic pa u mox k'ab." 
Luke23:34 Ri Jesus xubij: “Tat, sacha' la qui mac, man queta'm ta c'ut jas ri cäquibano.” Xquikasaj taklebenic chrij ri ratz'iak ri Jesus, rech cäquilo jas ri cäquic'am bic chquijujunal." 
Luke23:35 E tac'atoj c'u ri winak, cätajin queca'y che ri Jesus. Ri nimak qui banic xquetz'bej u wäch, xquibij: “Ri are' xebucol niq'uiaj winak chic. Chucolo c'u rib chbil rib, we are wa' ri Crist, ri cha'om rumal ri Dios.”" 
Luke23:36 Xukuje' ri ajch'ojab xquetz'bej u wäch. Xekeb ruc' ri Jesus, xquichi'j ch'amalaj u wa'l uva che." 
Luke23:37 Xquibij: “We at Cajawinel ri aj judeyib, chacolo awib chbil awib.”" 
Luke23:38 C'o c'u jun tz'ibatalic puwi' ri Jesus, cubij: Are Cajawinel ri aj Judeyib wa'." 
Luke23:38 C'o c'u jun tz'ibatalic puwi' ri Jesus, cubij: Are Cajawinel ri aj Judeyib wa'." 
Luke23:39 Jun chque ri banal tak etzelal ri e tzayebam ruc' ri Jesus, xuyok'o, xubij: “¿We at ri' ri Crist? Chacolo awib chbil awib, xukuje' chujacolo' ri uj.”" 
Luke23:40 Xch'aw ri jun chic banal etzelal, xuyaj ri rachil, xubij che: “¿La mawi ne ri at caxe'j awib chuwäch ri Dios, at ri at c'o chuxe' ri junam c'äjisabal wächaj?" 
Luke23:41 Ri ke ri uj kastzij takal chke chi cäc'äjisax ka wäch, rumal rech ri ka banom. Are c'u we achi ri' man c'o ta etzelal u banom.”" 
Luke23:42 Te c'u ri xubij: “Jesus, chinnataj che la aretak lal c'o chic pa ri ajawibal la.”" 
Luke23:43 Ri Jesus xubij c'u che: “Kastzij quinbij chawe, chi camic catc'oji' na wuc' pa ri je'lalaj c'olbal pa ri caj.”" 
Luke23:44 Kas pa ri tiq'uil k'ij c'ä pa ri oxib rajilabal ri benak k'ij, ronojel ri uwächulew xcanaj pa k'ekumalil." 
Luke23:45 Ri k'ij xk'ekumaric. Ri tasbal u pam ri rachoch Dios xjixjobic pa u niq'uiajil. 
Luke23:46 C'äte ri' ri Jesus co xurak u chi', xubij: “Tat, quinjach ri wuxlabal pa k'ab la.” Aretak xbitaj wa' rumal, xcämic." 
Luke23:47 Aretak ri qui nimal ri jun sient ajch'ojab xril ri xc'ulmaxic, xunimarisaj u k'ij ri Dios, xubij: “Kastzij ba' we achi ri' kas suc'.”" 
Luke23:48 Conojel ri winak xquimulij quib che rilic. Aretak xquil ri xbantajic, xetzelejic. Cäquit'oc ri uwo qui c'u'x ruc' nimalaj bis aretak xebec." 
Luke23:49 Conojel c'u ri etamaninak u wäch ri Jesus xukuje' ri ixokib ri xquiterenej ulok pa Galiley, e tac'atoj chi naj che rilic jas ri cäbantajic." 
Luke23:50 C'o jun achi Jose u bi', aj Arimatey re Judey, are jun chque ri qui nimakil ri winak. Are utzalaj achi, suc'. Ri are' man utz taj xril wi ri qui chomanic xukuje' ri qui banom ri niq'uiaj winak che ri Jesus. Ri are' reyem ri rajawibal ri Dios." 
Luke23:50 C'o jun achi Jose u bi', aj Arimatey re Judey, are jun chque ri qui nimakil ri winak. Are utzalaj achi, suc'. Ri are' man utz taj xril wi ri qui chomanic xukuje' ri qui banom ri niq'uiaj winak che ri Jesus. Ri are' reyem ri rajawibal ri Dios." 
Luke23:51  
Luke23:52 Ri Jose xopan chuwäch ri Pilat che u ta'ic ri u cuerp ri Jesus. 
Luke23:53 Aretak xkastaj ri u cuerp ri Jesus rumal cho ri ripibal, xubolk'otij pa jun sak atz'iak, xuya' pa jun mukubal c'otom pa ri abaj, ri man c'o ta jun winak yo'm chupam." 
Luke23:54 Are k'ij wa' aretak cäban u banic ronojel che ri k'ij re uxlanem. Xa jubik' chic cäraj man cächaplex ri k'ij re uxlanem. 
Luke23:55 Ri ixokib ri e petinak ulok ruc' ri Jesus pa Galiley, xquiterenej bic. Xquil ri mukubal, xquilo jas ri xban che u ya'ic ri u cuerp chupam." 
Luke23:56 Aretak xetzelej ulok, xequisuc'umaj tak c'oc'al xukuje' c'oc'alaj tak cunabal. Xebuxlan c'u pa ri k'ij re uxlanem, jas ri cubij ri pixab." 
Luke24:1 Pa ri nabe k'ij re ri uwuk k'ij, sibalaj ak'ab xebe ri ixokib chuchi' ri mukubal. Xequic'am bic ri c'oc'al ri qui suc'umam." 
Luke24:2 Xequirika' ri abaj wolkotim chi apan jela' che ri mukubal. 
Luke24:3 Xeboc bic, man xquirik ta ri u cuerp ri Ajawaxel Jesus." 
Luke24:4 Xsach qui c'u'x ri ixokib rumal wa'. Xak c'u c'ätetal xequil quieb achijab xetaq'ui' chquixcut, cärepc'un ri catz'iak." 
Luke24:5 Ri ixokib xquixe'j quib, xquipachba' quib, xquikasaj ri qui palaj cho ri ulew. Xquibij c'u ri achijab chque: “¿Jasche quitzucuj ri c'aslic chquixo'l ri cäminakib?" 
Luke24:6 Man c'o ta waral, xane' xc'astaj bic. Chnataj chiwe jas ri xutzijoj can chiwe aretak c'ä c'o pa Galiley:" 
Luke24:7 Rajawaxic chi ri Rija'l Winak cäjach na pa qui k'ab winak ajmaquib, cärip na cho ri ripibal, cäc'astaj c'u na churox k'ij.”" 
Luke24:8 C'äte ri' xnataj ri u tzij ri Jesus chque. 
Luke24:9 Xebel bic chuchi' ri mukubal, xetzelej bic, xquiya' u tzijoxic conojel we jastak ri' chque ri e julajuj takom xukuje' chque ri niq'uiaj chic." 
Luke24:10 Ri xec'amow bic ri tzijol chque ri e takom e are' ri Mariy Magdalen, ri Xua'n, ri Mariy ri u nan ri Santiag, xukuje' niq'uiaj ixokib chic." 
Luke24:11 We tzij ri' je ta ne xa' conalaj tak tzij chquiwäch ri e takom, man xquicoj ta c'ut." 
Luke24:12 Xwalij c'u ri Lu', xxiq'uinic xbe chuchi' ri mukubal. Xpachi'c, xca'y ocok chupam. Xuwi ri sak atz'iak xrilo. Xumay c'u ri xc'ulmaxic, xbe cho ja." 
Luke24:13 Pa ri k'ij ri', quieb chque e benak pa jun alaj tinimit Emaus u bi'. Cäraj oxib legua u xo'l ruc' ri Jerusalen." 
Luke24:14 Cätajin cäquitzijobela' quib chrij ronojel ri xc'ulmaxic. 
Luke24:15 Aretak cäquitzijobela' quib cäquic'otala tak qui chi', kas are ri Jesus xkebic, xurik bic rib cuc', xerachilaj bic." 
Luke24:16 Pune' c'u caquilo c'o c'u ri xbanowic chi man cäquich'ob ta u wäch. 
Luke24:17 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿Jas we tzij ri' ri quitzijobela' wi iwib pa ri be?” Xetaq'ui' c'ut, cäbison ri qui palaj." 
Luke24:18 Ri jun, ri Cleops u bi', xubij che ri Jesus: “¿La xuwi ri lal xak lal oc'owel pa Jerusalen chi man eta'm ta la jas ri xbantaj chila' pa tak we k'ij ri'?”" 
Luke24:19 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿Jas ri' ri xbantajic?” Xquibij che: “Are ri xban che ri Jesus aj Nazaret. Are achi wa' k'axal tzij, c'o u chuk'ab ri u tzij, c'o u chuk'ab che qui banic mayibal chuwäch ri Dios xukuje' chquiwäch conojel ri winak." 
Luke24:20 Ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri e ka k'atal tzij xquijach ri achi ri' rech cak'at tzij puwi' che u cämisaxic, xrip c'u cho jun ripibal." 
Luke24:21 Are c'u ri uj cu'l ka c'u'x chi are ri' ri queresaj ta na ri aj Israel pa qui k'ab ri qui c'ulel. Xane' ruc' ronojel wa', urox k'ij chic camic ri xc'ulmataj ronojel wa'." 
Luke24:22 Xkamay c'u ri xquitzijoj jujun ixokib chkaxo'l. Ri e are' nimalaj ak'ab xebe chuchi' ri mukubal," 
Luke24:23 man xquirik ta c'u ri u cuerp. Xepetic, cäquitzijoj c'ut chi jujun e tako'n aj caj xquic'ut quib chquiwäch quibim c'u chque chi c'aslic." 
Luke24:24 Jujun c'ut chque ri kachil xebe chuchi' ri mukubal, xequirika' c'ut je jas ri xbix cumal ri ixokib. Man xquil ta c'u u wäch ri Jesus.”" 
Luke24:25 C'äte ri' ri Jesus xubij chque: “¡Ay, ri ix man quixchoman taj; man quicoj ta pa ri iwanima' ronojel ri qui tzijom ri k'axal tak tzij!" 
Luke24:26 ¿La ma ta are wa' ri c'ax ri rajawaxic curik na ri Crist, te c'u ri' cänimarisax na u k'ij?”" 
Luke24:27 Xuchaplej c'u ulok ruc' ri u Tzij ri Moises xukuje' ri qui Tzij conojel ri e k'axal tak tzij. Xuk'alajisaj chquiwäch ri Tzij ri qui bim can chrij ri are' pa conojel ri Tz'ibatalic. 
Luke24:28 Nakaj chic e c'o wi che ri alaj tinimit ri e benak wi. Ri Jesus xubano chi je ta ne naj cäbe wi na. 
Luke24:29 Ri e are' c'ut xquicoj chuk'ab che, xquibij: “Chatcanaj can kuc'. Kajem cuban ri k'ij, coc c'u na ri ak'ab.” Xoc c'u bic ri Jesus, che canajem cuc'." 
Luke24:30 Aretak ri Jesus c'o cuc' pa ri mexa, xuc'am ri wa, xumaltioxij che ri Dios, xuya' chquiwäch." 
Luke24:31 C'äte ri' xya' chque chi xecuinic xquich'ob u wäch. C'äte ri' xsach c'u ri Jesus chquiwäch. 
Luke24:32 Xquibila' c'u chbil quib: “¿La ma ta xnicow ri kanima' aretak xtzijon kuc' pa ri be, aretak xuk'alajisaj ri Tz'ibatalic chkawäch?”" 
Luke24:33 Pa ri jok'otaj ri' xewalijic, xetzelej chanim pa Jerusalen, xebequirika' ri julajuj takom qui mulin quib xukuje' ri e c'o cuc'." 
Luke24:34 Cätajin cäquibij: “Kastzij xc'astaj ri Kajaw. Xuc'ut rib chuwäch ri Simon.” 
Luke24:35 Xukuje' ri e are' xquitzijoj jas ri xquic'ulmaj pa ri be. Xquibij chi xquich'ob u wäch ri Jesus aretak xupir ri wa. 
Luke24:36 C'ä cätajin cäquitzijoj wa', kas are ri Jesus xtaq'ui' pa qui niq'uiajil, xubij chque: “Jamaril chiwe.”" 
Luke24:37 Sibalaj xquixe'j quib, xquichomaj chi cätajin cäquil jun uxlabal." 
Luke24:38 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque: “¿Jasche cäk'oxow ri iwanima'? ¿Jasche ixeniwib? ¿Jasche c'o quieblan c'uxaj pa ri iwanima'? 
Luke24:39 Chebiwila' ri wakan, ri nu k'ab, chi kas in ri'. Chinichapa'. Chiwila'. Jun uxlabal c'ut man c'o ta u ti'jal mawi u bakil je jas ri wech in ri quiwilo.”" 
Luke24:40 Cätajin cubij wa', xebuc'ut ri rakan ri u k'ab chquiwäch." 
Luke24:41 C'ä maja' c'u kas quecojonic, rumal rech ri qui quicotemal, xukuje' ri qui mayinic. Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La c'o jas catijow iwuc'?”" 
Luke24:42 Xquiya' c'u jun ch'akap bolom cär che. 
Luke24:43 Ri Jesus xuc'amo, xutij chquiwäch." 
Luke24:44 Xubij chque: “Are tzij wa' ri xinbij chiwe aretak c'ä in c'o iwuc': chi rajawaxic chi cätz'akatisax na ronojel ri tz'ibatal chwij pa ri u pixab ri Moises, pa tak ri qui wuj ri k'axal tak tzij, xukuje' pa tak ri Salm.”" 
Luke24:45 C'äte ri' xuban chque chi cäquich'ob ri Tz'ibatalic. 
Luke24:46 Xubij chque: “Je xtz'ibax can wa' chi ri Crist curik na c'ax, chi cäcäm na, chi cäc'astaj na chquixo'l ri cäminakib churox k'ij." 
Luke24:47 Xukuje' xtz'ibax canok chi cätzijox na chque conojel ri winak, pa conojel nimak tak tinimit chi cäquiq'uex qui c'u'x pa ri u bi' ri Crist rech cäsachtaj ri qui mac, chi cächapletaj bic u tzijoxic wa' pa Jerusalen." 
Luke24:48 Ix c'ut ix k'alajisanelab che wa'. 
Luke24:49 Chiwilampe', quintak na ulok chiwe ri u bim ulok ri nu Tat chi cuya' na. Are c'u ri ix chixcanaj can pa ri tinimit Jerusalen c'ä qui c'am na ri cuinem aj chicaj.”" 
Luke24:50 Ri Jesus xebuc'am bic c'ä pa Betan. Xebuwalijisaj ri u k'ab, xebutewichi'j." 
Luke24:51 Aretak cätajin quebutewichi'j, xbe chicaj chquiwäch." 
Luke24:52 Xetzelej c'u pa Jerusalen ruc' nimalaj quicotemal. 
Luke24:53 Amak'el c'ut e c'o pa ri rachoch Dios, cäquik'ijilaj ri Dios." 
John1:1 Pa ri chapletajic c'o ri Tzij, ri Tzij c'o ruc' ri Dios, xukuje' ri Tzij are' Dios." 
John1:2 Ri are' c'o pa ri chapletajic ruc' ri Dios. 
John1:3 Conojel ri jastak rumal are' xebanic. Man c'o ta jun chque ri jastak ri e banom, ri ma ta xban rumal are'." 
John1:4 Pa ri are' c'o wi ri c'aslemal, ri c'aslemal are ri u chäj ri winak." 
John1:5 Ri chäj cäjuluw pa ri k'eku'm, ri k'eku'm man xuchup taj." 
John1:6 Xc'oji' jun achi takom ulok rumal ri Dios, Xuan u bi'." 
John1:7 Are' xpe che u ya'ic k'alajisanic rech cuk'alajisaj ri chäj, rech conojel winak quecojon rumal are'." 
John1:8 Ri are' man are ta ri chäj, xane' c'o che u k'alajisaxic ri chäj." 
John1:9 Ri kas chäj, ri cätunun paquiwi' conojel ri winak, ulinak c'u cho ri uwächulew." 
John1:10 Cho ri uwächulew c'o wi, ri uwächulew xban rumal. Ri winak c'ut ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew man xquich'ob ta u wäch." 
John1:11 Xul cho ri rulew, ri e rech man xquic'amowaj taj." 
John1:12 Conojel c'ut ri xec'amowic, ri quecojon che ri u bi', xuya' ri c'olbal chque chi quebux ralc'ual ri Dios." 
John1:13 Ri e are' man e alc'ualam ta rumal quic', mawi rumal qui rayibal ri ti'jal, mawi rumal u rayibal jun achi, xane' e alc'ualam rumal ri Dios." 
John1:14 Ri Tzij xuc'am ri qui banic winak, xc'oji' chkaxo'l. Xkil ri u juluwem, jacha' ri u juluwem ri xa jun chi C'ojolaxel ri elinak ulok ruc' ri Tataxel, nojinak che tok'ob xukuje' kastzij." 
John1:15 Ri Xuan are' xuk'alajisaj chrij ri C'ojolaxel, co xch'awic, xubij: “Are wa' ri xintzijoj aretak xinbij: ‘Ri jun ri petinak chwij, nim na u k'ij chnuwäch. Are' c'u nabe can chnuwäch.’ ”" 
John1:16 Konojel uj kac'amom ke ri u nojiquil, xukuje' tewichibal puwi' tewichibal." 
John1:17 Ri pixab xya' rumal ri Moises, are c'u ri tok'ob xukuje' ri kastzij rumal ri Jesucrist." 
John1:18 Mawi jubik' c'o ta jun ilowinak ta u wäch ri Dios; are' c'u ri xa' jun chi C'ojolaxel, ri c'o pa uxcut ri Tataxel, are' ri xk'alajisanic." 
John1:19 Are' wa' ri u k'alajisanic ri Xuan, aretak ri aj judeyib ri e c'o pa Jerusalen xequitak bic e cojol tabal tak tok'ob cuc' ri aj levitib che u ta'ic che: “¿Jachin c'u ri at?”" 
John1:20 Ri Xuan xuk'alajisaj, man xresaj ta rib chupam, xk'alajisan c'ut, xubij: “Man in taj ri Crist.”" 
John1:21 Ri e are' xquic'ot u chi': “¿Jachin c'u ri at? ¿La at ri Eliy?” Xubij: “Man in taj.” “¿La at ri K'axal Tzij?” Xubij chque: “Jayi'.” 
John1:22 Xquibij chi c'ut che: “¿Jachin c'u ri at? rech quekabij chque ri xujquitak ulok. ¿Jas cabij at chbil awib?” 
John1:23 Ri Xuan xubij: “In ri' ri ch'abal ri curak u chi' chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak, ri cubij: ‘Chicolomaj ri u be ri Ajawaxel’, jas ri xubij ri Isaiy ri k'axal tzij.”" 
John1:24 Ri e takom ulok e are jujun chque ri pariseyib. 
John1:25 Xquic'ot u chi': “¿Jas c'u che cäban ri qui bautism ri winak, we man at ri' ri Crist, mawi ri Eliy, mawi ri K'axal Tzij?”" 
John1:26 Ri Xuan xutzelej u bixic chque, xubij: “Ri in quinban ri bautism pa ri ja'. C'o c'u jun tac'al chxo'l alak, ri man eta'm ta alak u wäch." 
John1:27 Are c'u wa' ri petinak chwij. Man takal ta chwe chi quinquir ri ximibal re ri u xajäb.” 
John1:28 Are we jastak ri' xeban pa Betan, ch'käp che ri nima' Jordan, jawije' ri xuban wi ri qui bautism ri winak ri Xuan." 
John1:29 Chucab k'ij chic ri Xuan xril ri Jesus cätajin cäpe ruc', xubij “Chiwilampe', ri Alaj u Chij ri Dios, ri cäresaj ri qui mac ri winak." 
John1:30 Are' wa' ri xintzijoj aretak xinbij: ‘Petinak jun achi chwij ri nim na u k'ij chnuwäch, rumal rech chi are' nabe can chnuwäch.’" 
John1:31 Ri in nabe man weta'm ta u wäch. Rech cäc'utunisax chquiwäch ri aj israelib, xinpe c'ut, xinban ri qui bautism ri winak pa ri ja'.”" 
John1:32 Ri Xuan xk'alajisanic, xubij: “Xinwil ri Uxlabaxel cätajin cäkaj ulok pa ri caj je ta ne ri u banic jun palomax, xc'oji' puwi'." 
John1:33 Ri in man weta'm ta u wäch, are' c'ut ri xintakowic chi quinban ri bautism pa ri ja', wa' xubij chwe: ‘Jachin puwi' cawil wi chi cäkaj wi ri Uxlabaxel cabeytaj c'u puwi', are' wa' ri cäcojow ri winak pa ri Ruxlabal ri Dios.’" 
John1:34 In wilom, xukuje' nu k'alajisam, chi are' wa' ri u C'ojol ri Dios.”" 
John1:35 Chucab k'ij c'o chi jumul ri Xuan chi' e rachil quieb chque ri u tijoxelab. 
John1:36 Xca'y c'u apan che ri Jesus cätajin cäbin apanok, xubij: “Chiwilampe' ri Alaj u Chij ri Dios.”" 
John1:37 Aretak ri quieb u tijoxelab ri Xuan xquita' ri xubij, xquiterenej bic ri Jesus." 
John1:38 Ri Jesus xutzolk'omij rib, xerilo chi e terenic, xubij chque: “¿Jas quitzucuj?” Xquibij che: “Rabi” (je quel wa' pa ri ka ch'abal: Ajtij), “¿jawije' ri jekel wi la?”" 
John1:39 Xubij chque: “Tisaj, chiliwila'.” Xebec c'ut, xquilo jawije' ri jekel wi, xecanaj can ruc' pa ri k'ij ri'. Chunakaj c'ut ri ucaj rajilabal ri benak k'ij." 
John1:40 Ri Trix, rachalal ri Simon Lu', are' jun chque ri quieb ri qui tom jas ri xubij ri Xuan xukuje' ri xeteri bic chrij ri Jesus." 
John1:41 Ri are' nabe xurik apan ri Simon ri rachalal, xubij che: “Xkarik ri Mesiy” (je quel wa' pa ka ch'abal: ri Crist.)" 
John1:42 Chanim ri Trix xuc'am ulok ri Simon ruc' ri Jesus. Ri Jesus xrilo, xubij che: “At ri' ri Simon, u c'ojol ri Xuan. Cäbix c'u na Seps chawe.” (“Seps” je quel wa' “jun abaj”)." 
John1:43 Chucab k'ij ri Jesus xuchomaj xbe pa Galiley. Xurik c'u ri Pelip, xubij che: “Chinaterenej.”" 
John1:44 Ri Pelip are' aj Betsaid, qui tinimit ri Trix xukuje' ri Lu'." 
John1:45 Ri Pelip xurik ri Natanael, xubij che: “Xkarik ri jun ri xtz'ibam ri Moises chrij chquipam ri wuj re ri pixab, ri xukuje' xetz'ibam ri e k'axal tak tzij chrij. Are' ri Jesus, u c'ojol ri Jose aj Nazaret.”" 
John1:46 Xubij ri Natanael che: “¿La cuya' ta c'u lo quel ulok jun utzalaj jasach pa Nazaret?” Xubij ri Pelip che: “Tasaj, chalawilampe'.”" 
John1:47 Aretak ri Jesus xril ri Natanael cätajin copan ruc', jewa' xubij chrij: “Chiwilampe' jun kas aj israel, ri man c'o ta wi subunic.”" 
John1:48 Xubij ri Natanael che: “¿Jawije' xetamaj wi la nu wäch?” Ri Jesus xubij che: “C'ä majok chatusiq'uij ulok ri Pelip, aretak at c'o chuxe' ri u che'al higo, xatinwilo.”" 
John1:49 Ri Natanael xubij che: “Ajtij, lal ri' ri u C'ojol ri Dios. Lal ri' ri Rajawinel ri Israel.”" 
John1:50 Ri Jesus xubij che: “¿La catcojonic rumal rech chi xinbij chawe chi xatinwil chuxe' ri u che'al higo? Quebawil na jastak ri sibalaj e nimak na chuwäch wa'.” 
John1:51 Ri Jesus xubij c'u che: “Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chiwe: Quiwil na ri caj jakalic, xukuje' ri e tako'n aj caj re ri Dios quexuli ulok, quepaki' bic puwi' ri Rija'l Winak.”" 
John2:1 Churox k'ij xban jun c'ulanem pa Cana, jun tinimit re Galiley. C'o c'u ri u nan ri Jesus chila'." 
John2:2 Xula'x c'ut ri Jesus xukuje' ri u tijoxelab pa ri c'ulanem. 
John2:3 Xq'uis c'u ri u wa'l uva. Ri u nan ri Jesus xubij che: “Man c'o ta chic u wa'l uva caquicojo.” 
John2:4 Xubij ri Jesus che: “Chuchu', ¿jasche je cäbij la wa' chwe? Ri nu jok'otaj maja' copanic.”" 
John2:5 Xubij ri u nan chque ri pataninelab: “Apachique ta ne ri cubij chiwe, chibana'.”" 
John2:6 E c'o wakib nimak tak k'ebal re abaj chila' c'olbal joron. Are wa' cäquicoj ri aj judeyib che ch'ajanic. Jujun k'ebal cuk'i' quiejeb job k'ebal joron. 
John2:7 Xubij ri Jesus chque: “Chebinojisaj tak ri k'ebal che joron. Xequinojisaj c'ä chquichi'.” 
John2:8 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque: “Chiwesaj c'u jubik', chic'ama' c'u bic che ri c'amal be re ri nimak'ij.” Xcuc'aj bic chuwäch." 
John2:9 Are c'u ri c'amal be re ri nimak'ij xuna' ri joron ri xux u wa'l uva. Man xretamaj taj jawije' xpe wi, are c'u queta'm ri pataninelab ri xebesan ri joron. Ri c'amal be re ri nimak'ij xusiq'uij ri ala ri quec'ulanok," 
John2:10 xubij che: “Conojel ri winak are cäquiya' nabe ri utzalaj u wa'l uva. Aretak c'u ri e ula' e uq'uianinak chic, c'äte ri' cuya' ri man kas ta utz. Ri at c'ut a c'olom can ri utzalaj u wa'l uva c'ä che ri u q'uisbalil.”" 
John2:11 Are nabe etal wa' ri xuban ri Jesus pa Cana re Galiley, xuc'ut ri u juluwem. Xecojon c'u ri u tijoxelab che." 
John2:12 Bantajinak chi c'u wa', ri Jesus xbe pa Capernaum achilatal rumal ri u nan, ri e rachalal xukuje' ri u tijoxelab. Man q'ui k'ij taj xecanaj can chila'." 
John2:13 Petinak chi c'u ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem, qui nimak'ij ri aj judeyib, ri Jesus xpaki' pa Jerusalen." 
John2:14 Xeburik c'ut chupam ri rachoch Dios ri ajc'ayib tak wacax, chij, palomax, xukuje' ri e t'uyut'oj pa tak ri c'olbal ri queq'uex wi ri puak." 
John2:15 Aretak xril ri Jesus, xuc'am jun colob, xuban jun rapubal, conojel c'ut xeresaj bic chupam ri rachoch Dios, chi e chij, chi e wacax, xutix ri qui rajil ri e q'uexel tak puak, xebuq'uiakala' tak ri mexa." 
John2:16 Xubij chque ri ajc'ay tak palomax: “Chiwesaj bic wa' waral. Miban c'u ja re c'ayibal che ri rachoch ri nu Tat.” 
John2:17 Chi' c'ut xnataj chque ri u tijoxelab chi tz'ibam canok: “Quinubik' ri rilixic ri achoch la.” 
John2:18 Ri aj judeyib xech'awic, xquibij che: “¿Jachique mayibal cac'ut chkawäch che u c'utic chi c'o a takanic che qui banic we jastak ri'?”" 
John2:19 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic chque: “Chituquij we rachoch Dios ri', pa oxib k'ij c'ut quinyac na.”" 
John2:20 Xquibij c'u ri aj judeyib: “Pa cawinak wakib (46) junab xyac we rachoch Dios ri'. Are' c'u ri at, ¿la pa oxib k'ij cayaca'?”" 
John2:21 Aretak xutzijoj ri rachoch Dios, are' xutzijoj ri cuc'ulmaj na ri u cuerp." 
John2:22 Aretak xc'astaj chquixo'l ri cäminakib, xnataj chque ri e u tijoxelab ri u bim canok. Xquicoj c'u ri Tz'ibatalic xukuje' ri tzij ri u bim can ri Jesus." 
John2:23 Aretak ri Jesus c'o pa Jerusalen pa nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem, pa ri nimak'ij, e q'ui xecojon che ri u bi' aretak xequil tak ri etal ri xebubano." 
John2:24 Are c'u ri Jesus man xcu'bi ta u c'u'x chquij, rumal rech chi cuch'ob qui wäch conojel ri winak." 
John2:25 Man rajawaxic ta che chi c'o jun cuk'alajisaj ta chuwäch jas qui banic ri winak. Rumal rech chi ri are' reta'm jas c'o pa canima' ri winak. 
John3:1 C'o jun achi chque ri pariseyib, Nicodem u bi', are' jun qui nimal ri aj judeyib." 
John3:2 Ri are' xopan ruc' ri Jesus chak'ab, xubij che: “Ajtij, keta'm chi lal jun ajtij ri elinak ulok ruc' ri Dios. Man c'o ta c'u jun ri cäcuin che u banic tak we etal ri' ri caban la, we ta ma ta c'o ri Dios ruc'.”" 
John3:3 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chawe, apachin ri man calax ta chi na jumul, man cäcuin ta che rilic ri rajawibal ri Dios.”" 
John3:4 Ri Nicodem xubij che: “¿Jas ta ri cuban ri winak ri ri'j chic cäcuinic calax chi na jumul? ¿La cäcuin lo coc chucamul pa ri u c'u'x ri u nan, rech calax ta chi na?”" 
John3:5 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chawe, apachin ri man calax ta rumal ri ja' xukuje' rumal ri Uxlabaxel, man cäcuin taj coc pa ri rajawibal ri Dios." 
John3:6 Ri alc'ualam cumal ri winak, winak ri'. Ri alc'ualam rumal ri Uxlabaxel, uxlabal ri'." 
John3:7 Mamay ba' ri xinbij chawe: Rajawaxic chi catalax chi na jumul. 
John3:8 Ri quiakik' cäbe xa apawije' cäraj cäbe wi, cätataj ri u jininem. Man aweta'm ta c'ut jawije' cäpe wi, mawi jawije' cäbe wi. Jewa' xukuje' conojel ri e alc'ualam rumal ri Uxlabaxel.”" 
John3:9 Ri Nicodem xubij che: “¿Jas ta c'u lo u banic wa'?” 
John3:10 Ri Jesus xubij che: “At ajtij re Israel, ¿la ma ta c'u aweta'm wa'?" 
John3:11 Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chawe, chi ri uj cäkatzijoj jas ri keta'm, cäkak'alajisaj jas ri kilom. Ri ix c'ut man quic'am ta ri ka k'alajisanic." 
John3:12 We e nu bim jastak aj uwächulew chiwe, man quicoj ta c'u ne, ¿jas ta quiban ri' quixcojonic we ta quintzijoj jastak aj chicaj chiwe?" 
John3:13 Man c'o ta jun benak chicaj, xuwi ri jun ri xkaj ulok pa ri caj, ri Rija'l Winak." 
John3:14 Je jas xuban ri Moises pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, xuwalijisaj ri cumätz, xukuje' jeri' rajawaxic chi ri Rija'l Winak cäwalijisax na." 
John3:15 Rech conojel ri quecojon che ri are', quec'oji' junalic qui c'aslemal.”" 
John3:16 “Chi' cäkil wi chi ri Dios sibalaj quebulok'ok'ej ri winak cho ri uwächulew, xuya' c'ut ri u C'ojol, ri xa' jun c'olic, rech conojel ri quecojon che, man cäsach ta qui wäch, xane' cäc'oji' na junalic qui c'aslemal." 
John3:17 Are c'u ri Dios man xutak ta ulok ri u C'ojol cho ri uwächulew che u k'atic tzij paquiwi' ri winak, xane' rech quecolotaj ri winak rumal." 
John3:18 Ri cäcojon che are', man cäk'at ta tzij puwi. Are c'u ri man cäcojon taj, k'atom chi tzij puwi', rumal rech chi man xcojon ta che ri u bi' ri u C'ojol ri Dios, ri xa jun c'olic." 
John3:19 Are c'u wa' ri k'atoj tzij: chi xul ri chäj cho ri uwächulew, ri winak c'ut are xquilok'ok'ej na ri k'eku'm chuwäch ri chäj, rumal rech chi e itzel tak jastak ri quequibano." 
John3:20 Conojel c'ut ri cäquiban etzelal, cäquetzelaj u wäch ri chäj. Xukuje' man quepe ta cho ri chäj, rech man cäk'alajisax ta ri cäquibano." 
John3:21 Apachin c'u ri cuban ri kastzij, cäpe cho ri chäj, rech quek'alajisaxic ri cubano cäjunamataj ruc' ri u rayibal ri Dios.”" 
John3:22 Oc'owinak chi c'u wa', xbe ri Jesus pa ri ulew ri e c'o pa Judey, e rachilam ri u tijoxelab. Xcanaj can chila' cuc', xuban c'ut ri qui bautism ri winak." 
John3:22 Oc'owinak chi c'u wa', xbe ri Jesus pa ri ulew ri e c'o pa Judey, e rachilam ri u tijoxelab. Xcanaj can chila' cuc', xuban c'ut ri qui bautism ri winak." 
John3:23 Xukuje' ri Xuan xuban ri qui bautism ri winak pa Enon chunakaj ri Salim, e c'o c'u q'ui ja' chila'. Xebopan c'u ri winak rech xeban ri qui bautism." 
John3:24 C'ä maja' c'u cäya' ri Xuan pa che'. 
John3:25 Xyactaj c'u jun chomanic chquixo'l ri u tijoxelab ri Xuan ruc' ri jun aj judey, chrij josk'inic." 
John3:26 Xebopan ruc' ri Xuan, xquibij che: “Ajtij, ri jun ri xc'oji' can awuc' ch'käp che ri Jordan, ri xaya' k'alajisanic chrij jas ri u banic, chawilampe', ri are' cuban ri qui bautism ri winak, conojel c'ut quebopan ruc'.”" 
John3:27 Ri Xuan xubij chque: “Man cäcuin ta jun winak c'o cuc'amo, we ta ma ta cäyataj che chicaj." 
John3:28 Ix ri' quixk'alajisan chwij xinbij: ‘Man in taj ri Crist, xane' xintak ulok chuwäch ri are'.’" 
John3:29 Pa jun c'ulanem, ri uc'aninak ri alibatz are' ri achajilaxel. Are c'u ri rachil ri achajilaxel ri tac'al ruc', sibalaj cäquicotic aretak cuta' ri u ch'abal ri achajilaxel. Je c'u wa' tz'akat ri nu quicotemal ri'." 
John3:30 Ri are' rajawaxic cänimarisax u k'ij; ri in c'ut rajawaxic cäkasax nu k'ij.” 
John3:31 Ri elinak ulok chicaj c'o paquiwi' conojel. Ri aj uwächulew, aj uwächulew, cach'aw c'ut jacha' ri aj uwächulew. Are c'u ri elinak ulok chicaj, are c'o paquiwi' conojel." 
John3:32 Cuk'alajisaj jas ri rilom, jas ri u tom. Man c'o ta c'u jun cäc'amow ri u k'alajisanic." 
John3:33 Ri cäc'amow ri u k'alajisanic, cujiquiba' ruc' wa' chi ri Dios man c'o ta jubik' banoj tzij ruc'." 
John3:34 Are' c'ut ri takom ulok rumal ri Dios, ri e u tzij ri Dios quebutzijoj; man cupaj ta c'ut ri Uxlabaxel ri cuyao." 
John3:35 Ri Tataxel culok'ok'ej ri C'ojolaxel, conojel ri jastak e u yo'm pa u k'ab." 
John3:36 Ri cäcojon che ri C'ojolaxel, c'o junalic u c'aslemal. Ri man cäcojon ta che ri C'ojolaxel, man c'o ta u c'aslemal, xane' ri royowal ri Dios cakaj na puwi'." 
John4:1 Ri Ajawaxel, aretak xretamaj chi ri pariseyib qui tom chi ri Jesus e q'ui na ri xeboc che u tijoxelab chuwäch ri Xuan, cuban c'u ri qui bautism," 
John4:2 (pune' man are' ta ri Jesus cäbanow ri qui bautism, xane' e are' ri e u tijoxelab)," 
John4:3 ri Jesus xuya' can ri Judey, xbe chi jumul pa Galiley." 
John4:3 ri Jesus xuya' can ri Judey, xbe chi jumul pa Galiley." 
John4:4 Rajawaxic c'ut chi coc'ow pa Samar. 
John4:5 Xopan c'u pa jun tinimit ri c'o pa Samar, Sicar u bi'. C'o chunakaj ri ch'akap ulew ri xuya' ri Jacob che ri Jose ri u c'ojol." 
John4:6 Chila' c'o wi ri u c'ua' ri Jacob. Cosinak ri Jesus che ri be, rumal wa' xt'uyi' chuchi' ri c'ua'. Chunakaj ri tiquil k'ij." 
John4:7 Xpe jun ixok aj Samar che resaxic u joron. Ri Jesus xubij che: “Chaya' we ri joron.” 
John4:8 E benak c'u ri u tijoxelab pa ri tinimit che u lok'ic ri cäquitijo. 
John4:9 Ri ixok aj Samar xubij che: “Ri lal lal aj judey. ¿Jasche cata' joron la chwe, ri in c'ut in ixok aj Samar?” Are c'u ri aj judeyib man cäquich'abej ta quib cuc' ri aj Samar." 
John4:10 Ri Jesus xubij che: “We ta aweta'm ri cusipaj ri Dios, we ta aweta'm jachin ri' ri cubij chawe: ‘Chaya' nu joron’, at ta ri' cata' awe che, ri in c'ut quinya' ta awe ri' ri c'aslic joron.”" 
John4:11 Xubij ri ixok che: “Tat, ri lal man c'o ta quesabej la rech, ri c'ua' naj u pam. ¿Jawije' quec'ama' wi la ri c'aslic joron?" 
John4:12 ¿La are lo nim na k'ij la chuwäch ri ka mam Jacob, ri xuya' can ri c'ua' chke, ri xuq'uian che, xukuje' ri e u c'ojol xukuje' ri e rawaj?”" 
John4:13 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Conojel ri cäcuq'uiaj que we joron ri', cächaki'j chi na qui chi'." 
John4:14 Apachin c'u ri cäruq'uiaj re ri joron ri quinya' che, mawi jumul chbe k'ij sak cächaki'j ta chi na u chi'. Xane' ri joron ri quinya' che, cux na jun u q'uiyibal ja' che, ri cäpixc'on che junalic c'aslemal.”" 
John4:15 Ri ixok xubij che: “Tat, ya' la we ri joron ri', rech man cächaki'j ta chi nu chi', mawi quinpe chi waral che resaxic joron.”" 
John4:16 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Jät, chasiq'uij ulok ri awachajil, tasaj c'u waral.”" 
John4:17 Ri ixok xubij che: “Man c'o ta wachajil.” Xubij ri Jesus che: “Utz ri a bim: ‘Man c'o ta wachajil’. 
John4:18 Job c'u achijab e c'olinak awuc'; ri c'o awuc' camic man awachajil taj. Kas c'u tzij wa' ri xabij.” 
John4:19 Xubij ri ixok che: “Tat, in quinwilo chi lal jun k'axal tzij." 
John4:20 Ri e ka mam xek'ijilan pa we juyub ri'. Ri alak c'ut cabij alak chi pa Jerusalen c'o wi ri c'olbal ri rajawaxic cäban wi ri k'ijilanic.” 
John4:21 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Ixok, chacojo' ri quinbij, cäpe na ri jok'otaj, aretak mawi pa we juyub ri', mawi pa Jerusalen quik'ijilaj wi na ri Tataxel." 
John4:22 Ri ix man iweta'm taj ri quik'ijilaj. Ri uj keta'm ri cäkak'ijilaj. Rumal rech chi cuc' ri aj judeyib quel wi na ulok ri colobal ib. 
John4:23 Cäpe na ri k'ij, camic c'ut, aretak ri kas e k'ijilanelab, cäquik'ijilaj na ri Tataxel pa uxlabal xukuje' pa ri kastzij. Ri Tataxel quebutzucuj ri winak ri je quek'ijilan wa' rech cäquik'ijilaj ri are'." 
John4:24 Ri Dios uxlabal, ri quek'ijilan che rajawaxic quek'ijilan pa uxlabal xukuje' pa kastzij.”" 
John4:25 Xubij ri ixok che: “Weta'm chi cäpe na ri Mesiy, ri cäbix Crist che. Aretak cäpe ri are', quebulutzijoj na conojel ri jastak chke.”" 
John4:26 Xubij ri Jesus che: “In ri', ri quintzijon awuc'.”" 
John4:27 Chi' c'ut xepe ri u tijoxelab, xquimayo chi cätzijon ruc' jun ixok. Man c'o ta c'u jun xubij ta che: “¿Jas catzacuj la? o ¿Jas catzijoj la ruc'?”" 
John4:28 C'äte ri' ri ixok xuya' can ri u k'ebal, xbe pa ri tinimit, xubij chque ri winak:" 
John4:29 “Tisaj, chiliwilampe' jun achi ri xubij chwe ronojel ri nu banom. ¿La man are lo wa' ri Crist?”" 
John4:30 Xebel c'u ulok pa ri tinimit, xepe c'u ruc' ri Jesus." 
John4:31 C'ä maja' quebopan ri winak, ri u tijoxelab xquibochi'j apanok, xquibij che: “Ajtij, tija' ri wa la.”" 
John4:32 Ri are' xubij chque: “C'o jun nu wa ri quintijo, ri man iweta'm ta ix.”" 
John4:33 Ri tijoxelab xquibila' chbil tak quib: “¿La c'o ta c'u lo jachin xc'amow ulok ri xutijo?” 
John4:34 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ri nu wa are wa' chi quinban ri u rayibal ri xintakow ulok, xukuje' chi quintz'akatisaj ri u chac." 
John4:35 Quibij ix: ‘C'ä c'o na quiejeb ic', c'äte ri' cäpe ri k'atoj.’ Chiwilampe' quinbij chiwe: Chijaka' ri i bak'wäch, chebica'yej ri tico'n, e sak chi c'u che ri k'atoj." 
John4:36 Ri cuban k'atoj cuc'am ri tojbal rech, cumulij ri wächinic che junalic c'aslemal. Jeri' ri jun ri cäticonijic ruc' ri jun ri cäk'atowic junam quequicotic." 
John4:37 Ruc' c'u wa' kastzij ri cäbixic: Jun wi ri cäticonijic, jun chi wi ri cäk'atinic." 
John4:38 In xixintak che u k'atic jun tico'n ri man xichacuj ta ix. Niq'uiaj winak chic xechacunic, ri ix c'ut c'o xiwechbej che ri qui chac.”" 
John4:39 E q'ui chque ri aj samarib re ri tinimit ri' xecojon che ri Jesus rumal ri u tzij ri ixok, aretak xubij chque: “Xubij chwe conojel ri jastak ri e nu banom.”" 
John4:40 Xebopan c'u ri aj samarib ruc' ri Jesus, xquibochi'j chi chcanaj can cuc'. Xcanaj c'u can quieb k'ij cuc'." 
John4:41 Sibalaj e q'ui c'ut xecojon rumal ri u tzij. 
John4:42 Xquibij che ri ixok: “Camic man xuwi ta cakacoj chic ri xabij chke. Uj c'ut pa kech wi ka tom, xketamaj chi kas are wa' ri Colol quech ri winak aj uwächulew.”" 
John4:43 Aretak e oc'owinak chi ri quieb k'ij, xel bic chila', xbe pa Galiley." 
John4:44 Ri Jesus c'ut xuk'alajisaj chi jun k'axal tzij man nim ta quil wi pa ri kas rulew. 
John4:45 Aretak c'u xopan pa Galiley, ri aj chila' utz u c'ulaxic xquibano, rumal rech chi xquil ronojel ri xuban pa Jerusalen pa ri nimak'ij. Xukuje' c'u ri e are' xepe pa ri nimak'ij." 
John4:46 Xopan chi jumul ri Jesus pa Cana re Galiley, jawije' ri xuban wi u wa'l uva che ri joron. C'o c'u pa Capernaum jun achi ri yo'm takanic pa u k'ab rumal ri ajawinel. Yawab jun u c'ojol ri achi ri'." 
John4:47 Ri are' xuto chi ri Jesus elinak bic pa Judey, opanem cuban pa Galiley. Xel ulok che u c'ulaxic, xubochi'j chi chkaj bic che u cunaxic ri u c'ojol, xa jubik' man cäcämic." 
John4:47 Ri are' xuto chi ri Jesus elinak bic pa Judey, opanem cuban pa Galiley. Xel ulok che u c'ulaxic, xubochi'j chi chkaj bic che u cunaxic ri u c'ojol, xa jubik' man cäcämic." 
John4:48 Ri Jesus xubij che: “We man quebiwil tak etal xukuje' tak mayibal, man quixcojon taj.”" 
John4:49 Ri achi ri yo'm takanic pa u k'ab xubij che: “Jo' chanim tat c'ä majok chcäm ri nu c'ojol.” 
John4:50 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Jät, cäc'asi' ri a c'ojol.” Ri achi xucoj ri tzij ri xbix che rumal ri Jesus, xbec." 
John4:51 Pa ri u tzelejic c'ut cho rachoch, ri e pataninel tak rech ri achi xebel ulok che u c'ulaxic, xquibij chi cäc'asi' ri u c'ojol." 
John4:52 Xuta' c'u chque jas jok'otaj xutziric. Xquibij che: “Iwir pa ri nabe jok'otaj benak k'ij xel ri k'ak' chrij.” 
John4:53 Chi' c'ut xnataj che ri u tat chi are jok'otaj ri' aretak xubij ri Jesus che: “Cäc'asi' ri a c'ojol.” Xcojon c'u che ri Jesus cuc' conojel ri e aj uwo rachoch. 
John4:54 Are ucab etal wa' xuban ri Jesus, aretak xtzelej ulok pa Judey, xopan pa Galiley." 
John4:54 Are ucab etal wa' xuban ri Jesus, aretak xtzelej ulok pa Judey, xopan pa Galiley." 
John5:1 Aretak bantajinak we jastak ri', petinak jun qui nimak'ij ri aj judeyib. Xpaki' c'u ri Jesus pa Jerusalen." 
John5:2 C'o pa Jerusalen jun atinibal chunakaj ri Oquibal que ri Chij, ri cäbix Betzat che pa ri ch'abal hebrey. C'o job u pam rakan ja che." 
John5:3 Pa tak ri rakan ja e k'oyok'oj wi e q'ui yawabib, moyab, ch'ocojib xukuje' chaki'jab qui cuerp." 
John5:4  
John5:5 C'o c'u jun achi chila', ri juwinak wajxaklajuj (38) junab yawab." 
John5:6 Ri Jesus xrilo chi ri are' k'oyol chila'. Aretak xretamaj chi q'ui k'ij chic c'o chila', xubij che: “¿La cawaj catutziric?”" 
John5:7 Ri yawab xubij che: “Tat, man c'o ta jun winak wuc' ri quinnimow pa ri atinibal aretak cäslabesax ri ja'. Aretak c'ä in benak, jun chic cäkaj bic nabe chnuwäch.”" 
John5:8 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Chatwalijok, chawalijisaj ri a pop, chatbinok.”" 
John5:9 Chanim ri achi xutziric, xuwalijisaj ri u pop, xbin c'ut. Ri k'ij ri' are k'ij re uxlanem." 
John5:10 Ri aj judeyib xquibij che ri achi ri xcunatajic: “K'ij wa' re uxlanem, rumal wa' awas chawe rekaxic ri a pop.”" 
John5:11 Ri achi xutzelej u bixic chque: “Ri xinutzirisanic, are' xbin chwe: ‘Chawalijisaj bic ri a pop, chatbinok.’ ”" 
John5:12 Xquita' c'u che: “¿Jachin ri xbin chawe: ‘Chawalijisaj bic ri a pop, chatbinok’?”" 
John5:13 Ri achi ri xcunaxic man reta'm taj jachinok, rumal rech chi elinak chi bic ri Jesus chquixo'l ri q'ui winak ri e c'o pa ri c'olbal ri'." 
John5:14 Xbantaj chi c'u wa', ri Jesus xurik ri achi pa ri rachoch Dios, xubij che: “Chawilampe', xatutziric. Matmacun chic, rech man cäpe ta chi jun jasach chawij ri sibalaj c'ax na.”" 
John5:15 Xel bic ri achi, xubij chque ri aj judeyib chi are' ri Jesus xutzirisanic." 
John5:16 Rumal c'u wa' ri aj judeyib xcokataj ri Jesus, rumal rech chi xuban we jastak ri' pa ri k'ij re uxlanem." 
John5:17 Xch'aw ri Jesus, xubij chque: “Ri nu Tat c'ä cächacun camic, xukuje' c'u ri in quinchacunic.”" 
John5:18 Rumal c'u wa' ri aj judeyib sibalaj xquitzucuj u cämisaxic, rumal rech chi man xuwi ta xuban ri man ya'tal ta u banic pa ri k'ij re uxlanem, xane' xukuje' xubij chi ri Dios are' ri u Tat, xujunamaj rib ruc' ri Dios." 
John5:19 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic, xubij chque: “Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chiwe: Ri C'ojolaxel man c'o ta jas cäcuin che u banic pa re wi, xane' xuwi cubano jas ri cärilo chi cuban ri Tataxel. Ronojel ri cuban ri Tataxel, xukuje' cuban ri C'ojolaxel." 
John5:20 Ri Tataxel culok'ok'ej ri C'ojolaxel. Conojel c'u ri jastak ri cubano, cuc'ut chuwäch. Nimak tak chac chuwäch wa' cuc'ut na chuwäch, rech quixmayinic." 
John5:21 Jas ri Tataxel quebuc'astajisaj ri cäminakib, cuya' qui c'aslemal, jeri' xukuje' ri C'ojolaxel cuya' qui c'aslemal jachin tak ri cäraj." 
John5:22 Man c'o ta jun cäk'at tzij puwi' rumal ri Tataxel, xane' che ri C'ojolaxel xuya' wi ronojel ri k'atoj tzij," 
John5:23 rech conojel nim cäquil wi ri C'ojolaxel jas ri nim cäquil wi ri Tataxel. Apachin ri man nim ta cäril wi ri C'ojolaxel, xukuje' man nim ta cäril wi ri' ri Tataxel ri xtakow ulok." 
John5:24 Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chiwe: Apachin ri cutatabej ri nu tzij, ri cäcojon che ri xintakow ulok, c'o junalic u c'aslemal. Man cäc'äjisax ta u wäch, xane' xel pa cämical, xk'ax pa c'aslemal." 
John5:25 Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chiwe: Cäpe na ri jok'otaj, are c'u jok'otaj wa', aretak ri cäminakib cäquita' na ri u ch'abal ri u C'ojol ri Dios. Apachin tak c'u ri cäquitatabej, quec'asi' na." 
John5:26 Je c'ut jacha' ri Tataxel c'o u c'aslemal pa re wi, jeri' xukuje' u banom chi ri C'ojolaxel c'o u c'aslemal pa re wi," 
John5:27 xuya' c'u takanic pa u k'ab che u k'atic tzij, rumal rech chi Rija'l Winak." 
John5:28 Mimay wa', cäpe c'u na ri jok'otaj, aretak conojel ri cäminakib cäquita' na ri u ch'abal," 
John5:29 quebel na ulok pa tak ri mukubal. Ri winak ri xquiban ri utz quec'astaj na rech cäc'oji' na qui c'aslemal; e are c'ut ri winak ri xquiban etzelal, quec'astaj na che c'okotajem.”" 
John5:30 “Man c'o ta jas quincuin che u banic pa we wi. Jas ri quinto, je quink'atow tzij. Are ri nu k'atoj tzij suc'. Man quintzucuj ta c'u ri nu rayibal, xane' quintzucuj ri u rayibal ri Tataxel ri xintakow ulok." 
John5:31 We quinya' k'alajisanic chwij chbil wib, ri nu k'alajisanic man c'o ta u patan ri'." 
John5:32 C'o c'u jun chic ri cuk'alajisaj jas ri nu banic. Weta'm c'ut chi ri u k'alajisanic ri cubij chwij, are kastzij." 
John5:33 Ri ix xixtakan che u ta'ic che ri Xuan. Ri xuk'alajisaj c'u ri Xuan are kastzij. 
John5:34 Ri in man c'o ta cubij ri u k'alajisanic ri winak chwe; quebenbij c'ut we jastak ri, rech quixcolotajic." 
John5:35 Ri Xuan are' jun chäj ri xnicowic, xukuje' xjuluwic. Ri ix c'ut xiwaj xixquicot quieb oxib k'ij pa ri u sakil." 
John5:36 Are c'u ri in c'o jun k'alajisanic wuc' ri c'o na chuwäch ri yo'm che ri Xuan; ri chac ri xebuya' ri Tataxel chwe che qui tz'akatisaxic, we chac tak ri' ri quebenbano e are' queyo'w k'alajisanic chwij, chi are' ri Tataxel in takowinak ulok." 
John5:37 Xukuje' ri Tataxel, ri xintakow ulok, are k'alajisaninak chwij. Man c'o ta jumul i tom ri u ch'abal, mawi iwilom ri u ca'yebal," 
John5:38 mawi jekel ri u tzij pa iwanima'. Rumal rech chi ri xtak ulok rumal are', man quixcojon ta che." 
John5:39 Chebisiq'uij ri e Tz'ibatalic, quichomaj c'ut chi chquipam wa' quirik wi ri junalic i c'aslemal. E are c'u wa' ri queyo'w k'alajisanic chwij." 
John5:40 Man quiwaj ta c'ut quixpe wuc' in, rech cäc'oji' i c'aslemal." 
John5:41 Ri in man quebenc'amowaj taj ri e u nimarisaxic nu k'ij cumal ri winak. 
John5:42 Weta'm c'u i wäch chi man qui lok'ok'ej taj ri Dios. 
John5:43 In in petinak pa ri u bi' ri nu Tat, man quinic'amowaj ta c'ut. We ta c'u cäpe chi jun pa ri kas u bi' are' ri' quic'amowaj." 
John5:44 ¿Jas ta ri quibano quixcojonic, xuwi quic'amala c'u u nimarisalaxic i k'ij, man are ta quixoc il che u tzucuxic nimarisabal k'ij ri xuwi ruc' ri Dios cäpe wi?" 
John5:45 Michomaj chi quixintzujuj na chuwäch ri Tataxel. C'o jun ri' ri quixtzujunic, are' ri Moises, ri c'ul i c'u'x chrij." 
John5:46 We ta quixcojon che ri xubij ri Moises, quixcojon ta ri' chwe in; chwij c'u in xtz'ibam wi can ri Moises." 
John5:47 We man quicoj ri xutz'ibaj ri are', ¿jas ta c'u quibano quicoj ri nu tzij?”" 
John6:1 E oc'owinak chic we jastak ri', xk'ax ri Jesus ch'käp che ri cho re Galiley, o Tibers." 
John6:2 Sibalaj q'ui winak xeteri chrij, rumal rech chi xequil ri etal ri xebubano aretak xebucunaj ri yawabib." 
John6:3 Xpaki' ri Jesus puwi' ri juyub, chila' xt'uyi' wi cuc' ri u tijoxelab." 
John6:4 Petinak chic ri Oc'owem, qui nimak'ij ri aj judeyib." 
John6:5 Ri Jesus xca'yic, xrilo chi sibalaj q'ui winak e petinak ruc', xubij che ri Pelip: “¿Jawije' cäkalok' wi caxlanwa chque conojel we winak ri'?”" 
John6:6 Xubij wa' che u c'ambejexic, reta'm c'ut ri cubana' na." 
John6:7 Ri Pelip xutzelej u bixic che, “We ta cachacun jun winak wajxakib ic', man cäcuin ta ri' che u ch'äquic ri calok'obex caxlanwa rech chquijujunal caquic'am ta jutak bik' quech.”" 
John6:8 Jun chque ri u tijoxelab, ri Trix rachalal ri Simon Lu', xubij che:" 
John6:9 “C'o jun ac'al waral ri e ruc'am job caxlanwa re sebad xukuje' quieb cär.” 
John6:10 Ri Jesus xubij: “Chibij chque ri winak chi quet'uyic.” C'o c'u sibalaj k'ayes pa ri c'olbal ri'. Xet'uyi' c'u ri achijab cäraj e job mil (5000). 
John6:11 Ri Jesus xebuc'am ri caxlanwa, xmaltioxin che ri Dios. Xjach chquiwäch ri e t'uyut'oj. Jeri' xukuje' xuya' que ri cär, joropa' ri xcaj." 
John6:12 Aretak xenojic, xubij ri Jesus chque ri u tijoxelab: “Chimulij ri ch'akatak caxlanwa ri xeto'tajic, rech man c'o ta cätzakic.”" 
John6:13 Xequimulij c'ut, xequinojisaj cablajuj chicäch che ri qui ch'akapil tak ri job caxlanwa re sebad, ri man xequiq'uis ta ri winak." 
John6:14 Are c'u ri winak, aretak xquil ri etal ri xuban ri Jesus, xquibij: “Kastzij are wa' ri k'axal tzij ri petinak cho ri uwächulew.”" 
John6:15 Reta'm ri Jesus chi quepe na che u chapic, che u banic ajawinel che. Xpaki' chi jumul pa ri juyub, xak u tuquiel." 
John6:16 Aretak xk'ekal chic, xekaj bic ri e u tijoxelab chuchi' ri cho." 
John6:17 Xeboc pa ri jucub, xebe ch'käp che ri cho pa Capernaum. K'eku'm chic, c'ä maja' c'u copan ri Jesus cuc'." 
John6:18 Xpe jun nimalaj quiakik', xuwalijisaj u wäch ri cho." 
John6:19 Aretak e c'amom chi bic jun legua o jun legua ruc' niq'uiaj, xquil ri Jesus chi cäbin puwi' ri cho, cätajin c'u cäkeb chuxcut ri jucub, xquixe'j c'u quib." 
John6:20 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “In wa', mixe'j iwib.”" 
John6:21 Xquiya' c'u c'olbal che chupam ri jucub. Chanim xopan ri jucub pa ri ulew ri benam wi que. 
John6:22 Chucab k'ij, ri q'ui winak ri e c'o can ch'käp che ri cho, xquilo chi xa jun jucub c'o chila', man c'o ta jun jucub chic ri c'o chila'. Xquilo chi ri Jesus man xoc ta cuc' ri u tijoxelab pa ri jucub, xane' xebel bic ri u tijoxelab xa' qui tuquiel." 
John6:23 Xebopan c'u niq'uiaj jucub chic aj Tibers, xebopan chunakaj ri c'olbal ri xquitij wi caxlanwa ri winak aretak ri Ajawaxel xmaltioxin che ri Dios." 
John6:24 Ri q'ui winak, aretak xquilo chi ri Jesus man c'o ta chila', mawi ri u tijoxelab, xeboc bic pa tak ri jucub, xebe pa Capernaum che u tzucuxic ri Jesus." 
John6:25 Xequirika' ch'käp che ri cho, xquibij che: “Ajtij, ¿jampa' xul la waral?”" 
John6:26 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi quinitzucuj, man rumal ta rech chi quebiwil ri etal, xane' rumal rech chi xitij iwe ri caxlanwa, xixnoj c'ut." 
John6:27 Mixoc il che u rikic ri wa ri cäsach u wäch, xane' che u rikic ri wa ri cäjekic ri cuya' junalic c'aslemal chiwe, are wa ri cuya' ri Rija'l Winak chiwe, rumal rech chi ri Dios Tataxel u cojom ri u t'ikbal che.”" 
John6:28 Xquibij c'u ri winak che: “¿Jas cäkabano rech cäkaban ri u chac ri Dios?” 
John6:29 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic chque: “Are wa' ri u chac ri Dios, chi chixcojon che ri jun ri takom ulok rumal.”" 
John6:30 Xquibij c'u che: “¿Jas ri etal caban la rech cäkilo, cujcojon c'u che la? ¿Jas chac caban la?" 
John6:31 Ri e ka mam xquitij ri jaswa' chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak, jas ri cubij ri tz'ibatalic: ‘Xuya' wa chque pa tijic ri petinak chicaj.’ ”" 
John6:32 Xubij ri Jesus chque: “Kastzij, kastzij, quinbij chiwe chi man are' ta ri Moises xyo'w ri wa aj caj chiwe. Are c'u ri nu Tat ri cuya' ri kas wa aj caj chiwe." 
John6:33 Ri wa c'ut aj Dios, are ri' ri kajinak ulok chicaj, ri cuya' c'aslemal chque ri winak ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew.”" 
John6:34 Xquibij che: “Kajaw, ya' la we wa ri chke amak'el.”" 
John6:35 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “In ri' ri wa re c'aslemal. Apachin ri cäpe wuc' in, man cänum ta chi na. Apachin ri cäcojon chwe in, mawi jumul cächaki'j ta chic u chi'." 
John6:36 Nu bim chic chiwe, pune' in iwilom, man quixcojon taj." 
John6:37 Conojel ri quebuya' ri Tataxel chwe, quepe na wuc'. Apachin ri cäpe wuc', kastzij man quinwesaj ta bic." 
John6:38 In kajinak c'u ulok pa ri caj, man che ta u banic ri nu rayibal, xane' che u banic ri u rayibal ri nu Tat ri xinutak ulok." 
John6:39 Are c'u wa' ri u rayibal ri xintakow ulok, chi conojel ri e u yo'm chwe, man c'o ta jun quinsach chque, xane' quinc'astajisaj na pa ri q'uisbal k'ij." 
John6:40 Are c'u wa' ri u rayibal ri nu Tat, chi conojel ri queca'y che ri C'ojolaxel, quecojon c'u che ri are', cäc'oji' junalic qui c'aslemal, ri in quebenc'astajisaj na pa ri q'uisbal k'ij.”" 
John6:41 Xewixwit c'u ri aj judeyib chrij, rumal ri u bim: “In ri' ri wa ri kajinak ulok pa ri caj.”" 
John6:42 Xquibij: “¿La ma ta are wa' ri Jesus, ri u c'ojol ri Jose, ri keta'm u wäch ri u tat xukuje' ri u nan? ¿Jas c'u che cubij camic: ‘Pa ri caj in kajinak wi ulok?’ ”" 
John6:43 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Mixwixwit chixo'l. 
John6:44 Man c'o ta jun cäcuinic cäpe wuc' in, xuwi ri cac'am ulok rumal ri Tataxel ri xinutak ulok. Ri in c'ut quebenc'astajisaj na pa ri q'uisbal k'ij." 
John6:45 Tz'ibatal can pa tak ri qui wuj ri k'axal tak tzij: Conojel quetijox na rumal ri Dios. Conojel ri cäquitatabej ri Tataxel, cäquetamaj que ruc', e are ri' quepe wuc' in." 
John6:46 Man c'o ta c'u jun ilowinak ri Tataxel, xane' xuwi ri elinak ulok ruc' ri Dios, are wa' ilowinak ri Tataxel." 
John6:47 Kastzij, kastzij, quinbij chiwe, ri cacojon chwe in, c'o junalic u c'aslemal." 
John6:48 In ri' ri wa re c'aslemal. 
John6:49 Ri e i mam xquitij ri jaswa' pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, xecäm c'ut." 
John6:50 Ri wa' re c'aslemal are wa' ri kajinak ulok chicaj, rech apachin ri cutij re che, man cäcäm taj." 
John6:51 In ri' ri c'aslic wa ri kajinak ulok pa ri caj. We c'o jun cutij re we wa ri', cäc'asi na amak'el chbe k'ij sak. Ri wa ri quinya' na in, are' ri nu cuerp, ri quinya' na rumal rech ri qui c'aslemal ri winak cho ri uwächulew.”" 
John6:52 Are c'u ri aj judeyib xquic'ulela' quib, xquibij: “¿Jas ri cuban wa' cäcuinic cuya' ri u cuerp chke pa tijic?”" 
John6:53 Ri Jesus xubij c'u chque: “Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chiwe: We man quitij iwech ri u cuerp ri Rija'l Winak, we man quiwuq'uiaj iwech ri u quiq'uel, man c'o ta i c'aslemal." 
John6:54 Ri cutij ri nu cuerp, ri cuq'uian ri nu quiq'uel, are ri' c'o junalic u c'aslemal; quinc'astajisaj c'u na pa ri q'uisbal k'ij." 
John6:55 Ri nu cuerp are kas wa, ri nu quiq'uel are kas uq'uia'." 
John6:56 Apachin ri cutij ri nu cuerp xukuje' caruq'uiaj ri nu quiq'uel, cäjeki' wuc', xukuje' ri in quinjeki' ruc'." 
John6:57 Jacha' ri c'aslic Tataxel ri xintakow ulok xukuje' ri in in c'asal rumal ri Tataxel; je xukuje' ri quintijowic, cac'asi' na wumal." 
John6:58 Are wa' ri wa ri kajinak ulok pa ri caj. Man je taj jas ri jaswa' ri xquitij ri e i mam, xecäm c'ut. Ri cutij we wa ri', cäc'asi na amak'el chbe k'ij sak.”" 
John6:59 Ri Jesus xebutzijoj we jastak ri' chupam ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab pa Capernaum. 
John6:60 E q'ui chque ri u tijoxelab ri Jesus, aretak xquita' ri u tzij, xquibij: “C'axalaj tzij wa'. ¿Jachin ta lo ri cäcuin che u tatbexic wa'?”" 
John6:61 Reta'm ri Jesus pa ranima' chi ri u tijoxelab quewixwit chrij ri u tzij, xubij chque: “¿La cuban quieb i c'u'x rumal wa'?" 
John6:62 ¿Jas c'u lo ri cäc'ulmataj na we quiwilo cäpaki' bic ri Rija'l Winak jawije' ri c'o wi nabe? 
John6:63 Are ri uxlabal cäyo'w c'aslemal. Ri cuerp man c'o ta carechbej. Ri tzij ri nu tzijom chiwe, e uxlabal, e c'aslemal." 
John6:64 E c'o c'u jujun chiwe ri man quecojon taj.” Reta'm c'ut ri Jesus kas pa ri tiquiritajic jachin tak ri man quecojon taj, reta'm jachin ri cäjachow na." 
John6:65 Xubij c'ut: “Rumal ri' nu bim chiwe, chi man c'o ta jun cäcuinic cäpe wuc', we ta ma ta cäyataj che rumal ri Tataxel.”" 
John6:66 Kas chi' c'u wa', e q'ui chque ri e u tijoxelab ri Jesus xquiya' canok, man xebin ta chi ruc'." 
John6:67 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque ri cablajuj; “¿La quiwaj ix xukuje' quixbec?” 
John6:68 Ri Simon Lu' xubij che: “Kajaw, ¿jachin ta ne ruc' cujbe wi? Uc' la c'o wi ri tzij re junalic c'aslemal." 
John6:69 Ri uj ka cojom, xukuje' keta'm chi lal ri' ri Jun ri Tastalic rech ri Dios.”" 
John6:70 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic chque: “¿La ma ta ix cablajuj xixincha'o? Jun c'ut chiwe are jun itzel.” 
John6:71 Are xutzijoj ri Judas, u c'ojol ri Simon Iscariot. Ri Judas are c'u wa' ri cäjachow na, are jun chque ri cablajuj u tijoxelab." 
John7:1 E oc'owinak chi c'u we jastak ri', cäbinicat ri Jesus pa Galiley. Man cäraj taj cäbinicat pa Judey, rumal rech chi ri aj judeyib cäquitzucuj u cämisaxic." 
John7:1 E oc'owinak chi c'u we jastak ri', cäbinicat ri Jesus pa Galiley. Man cäraj taj cäbinicat pa Judey, rumal rech chi ri aj judeyib cäquitzucuj u cämisaxic." 
John7:2 Nakajininak chi c'ut ri qui nimak'ij ri aj judeyib, quech ri cäbal." 
John7:3 Xquibij c'u ri rachalal che: “Chatel bic waral, jät pa Judey, rech xukuje' ri a tijoxelab cäquil tak ri chac ri cabano." 
John7:3 Xquibij c'u ri rachalal che: “Chatel bic waral, jät pa Judey, rech xukuje' ri a tijoxelab cäquil tak ri chac ri cabano." 
John7:4 We jun cäraj chi queilitaj ri jastak ri quebubano, man cuban ta chi c'uyal. We caban we jastak ri', chac'utu' awib chquiwäch conojel ri winak.”" 
John7:5 Mawi c'u ne ri rachalal xecojon che ri are'. 
John7:6 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque: “C'ä maja' copan ri k'ijol. Are c'u ri chiwe ix, apachique k'ijol utz chiwe." 
John7:7 Ri e aj uwächulew man quecuin taj cäquetzelaj i wäch ix. Cäquetzelaj c'u nu wäch in, rumal rech chi quink'alajisaj jas ri qui banic, chi cäquiban etzelal." 
John7:8 Jix ix pa ri nimak'ij; ri in man quinbe taj iwuc', c'ä maja' c'u cätz'akat ri nu k'ijol.”" 
John7:9 Aretak xbitaj wa rumal, xcanaj can pa Galiley." 
John7:10 Aretak e benak chic ri rachalal pa ri nimak'ij, c'äte ri' xukuje' ri Jesus xbec, man chi sakil taj, xane' chi c'uyal." 
John7:11 Xquitzucuj c'u ri aj judeyib pa ri nimak'ij, xquibij: “¿Jawije' c'o wi ri achi ri'?”" 
John7:12 C'o nimalaj wixwitem chrij chquixo'l ri q'ui winak; jujun caquibij: “Jun utzalaj winak wa'.” Jujun chic c'ut caquibij: “Man utz taj, xane' quebusub ri winak.”" 
John7:13 Man c'o ta jun cätzijon chrij chi sakil, rumal rech chi caquixe'j quib chquiwäch ri aj judeyib." 
John7:14 Pa ri u niq'uiajiric ri nimak'ij xpaki' ri Jesus pa ri rachoch Dios, cätijon c'ut." 
John7:15 Xquimay ri aj judeyib, xquibij: “¿Jasche wa' c'o retamabal ri are', man u tijom ta c'u rib?”" 
John7:16 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ri nu tijonic man wech taj, xane' rech ri xintakow ulok." 
John7:17 We c'o jachin cäraj cuban ri u rayibal ri xintakow ulok, cäretamaj na we ri nu tijonic cäpe ruc' ri Dios, we xak quintzijoj pa we wi." 
John7:18 Ri' ri cätzijon pa re wi, cutzucuj ri u juluwem ri are' chbil rib. Ri cutzucuj ri u juluwem ri xtakow ulok, are wa' aj kastzij, man c'o ta c'u etzelal ruc'." 
John7:19 ¿La ma ta xuya' ri Moises ri pixab chiwe? Man c'o ta c'u jun chiwe cunimaj ri pixab. ¿Jas che quitzucuj nu cämisaxic?” 
John7:20 Ri winak xquitzelej u bixic che: “C'o itzel uxlabal chawe. ¿Jachin cätajin cätzucun a cämisaxic?” 
John7:21 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Jun chac xinbano, iwonojel c'ut quimayo." 
John7:22 Ri Moises xuya' chiwe chi quikopij ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri ix achijab wi che iwetal, (man ruc' ta c'u ri Moises xtiquitaj wi, xane' cuc' ri e i mam). Pa ri k'ij c'ut re uxlanem quikopij ri qui tz'umal ri alabom ruc' ch'ich' che quetal." 
John7:23 We pa ri k'ij re uxlanem cäkopix ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri ala wi che retal, che u nimaxic ri u pixab ri Moises, ¿jasche cäpe iwoyowal chwij aretak pa k'ij re uxlanem xinwutzirisaj ronojel ri jun winak?" 
John7:24 Mik'at tzij rumal ri xak quiwilo. Xane' chik'ata' tzij ruc' ri suc'alaj k'atoj tzij.” 
John7:25 Xquibij c'u jujun e aj Jerusalen: “¿La ma ta are wa' ri cätzucux u cämisaxic?” 
John7:26 “Chiwilampe', cätzijon chi sakil, man c'o ta c'u jas cäbix che. ¿La xa lo kas queta'm ri nimak qui banic chi are wa' ri Crist?" 
John7:27 Ri uj keta'm aj jawije'. Aretak c'u cäpe ri Crist, man c'o ta jun reta'm aj jawije'.”" 
John7:28 C'äte c'u ri' ri Jesus co xch'awic aretak quebutijoj ri winak pa ri rachoch Dios, xubij: “Ri ix iweta'm nu wäch, xukuje' iweta'm jawije' quinpe wi. Ri in man in petinak ta pa wech wi. Are c'u ri xinutak ulok, are' kastzij, ri ix man iweta'm ta u wäch." 
John7:29 Ri in weta'm u wäch, ruc' c'u ri are' in elinak wi ulok, ri are' xintakow ulok.”" 
John7:30 Xquitzucuj c'u u chapic. Man c'o ta jun xucoj ta u k'ab chrij, rumal rech chi c'ä maja' copan ri u jok'otaj." 
John7:31 E q'ui chque ri winak xecojon che, xquibij: “Aretak cäpe ri Crist, ¿la quebuban ta c'u na lo e q'uia tak etal chquiwäch ri e u banom we achi ri'?”" 
John7:32 Ri pariseyib xquita' ri jastak ri caquibij ri q'ui winak chrij ri Jesus; ri e are' xukuje' ri e quinimakil ri e cojol tabal tak tok'ob xequitak bic jujun chajinelab rech ri rachoch Dios che u chapic ulok. 
John7:33 Xubij ri Jesus: “Xa jubik' chic quinc'oji' iwuc', c'äte ri' quinbe ruc' ri xinutak ulok." 
John7:34 Quinitzucuj na, man quinirik ta c'ut. Jawije' ri in c'o wi, man quixcuin taj quixbe chila'.”" 
John7:35 Xquitzijobela' c'u quib ri aj judeyib: “¿Jawije' ta lo cäbe wi, ri ma ta cäkarik na? ¿La cäbe ta lo cuc' ri ka winakil ri e jabuninak chquixo'l ri aj Gres? ¿La cäbe cuc' ri aj Gres che qui tijoxic?" 
John7:36 ¿Jas u banic we tzij ri' ri xubij?: ‘Quinitzucuj na, man quinirik ta c'ut; jawije' c'ut ri in c'o wi, man quixcuin taj quixbe chila'.’ ”" 
John7:37 Pa ri q'uisbal k'ij, are c'u k'ij wa' ri nim na u banic re ri nimak'ij, ri Jesus xtaq'ui'c, co xch'awic, xubij: “We c'o jachin cächaki'j u chi', chpet wuc', chuq'uianok." 
John7:38 Ri cäcojon chwe in, jas ri cubij ri Tz'ibatalic: ‘nima' re c'aslic ja' quebel na ulok pa ri ranima'.’ ”" 
John7:39 Xubij wa' chrij ri Uxlabaxel ri cäquic'am na ri winak ri quecojon che ri are'. C'ä maja' c'u ne cäpe ri Uxlabaxel, rumal rech chi c'ä maja' cajuluwirisax ri Jesus." 
John7:40 Jujun c'ut chque ri winak, aretak xquita' we tzij ri', xquibij: “Kastzij are wa' ri K'axal Tzij.”" 
John7:41 Jujun chic xquibij: “Are wa' ri Crist.” Ri niq'uiaj chic xquibij: “¿La pa Galiley ta lo cäpe wi ri Crist? 
John7:42 ¿La ma ta cubij ri Tz'ibatalic chi ri Crist are rija'l ri David, cäpe na pa Belen, ri alaj tinimit ri xpe wi ri David?”" 
John7:43 E q'ui c'u ri winak xquitas quib chquij ri niq'uiaj chic rumal rech ri Jesus. 
John7:44 E c'o jujun chque are ta xcaj xquichap bic. Man c'o ta c'u jun xucoj u k'ab chrij. 
John7:45 Xepe ri chajinelab re ri rachoch Dios cuc' ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' cuc' ri pariseyib, xquibij c'u wa' chque ri chajinelab: “¿Jasche man xic'am ta ulok?”" 
John7:46 Ri e chajinelab xquitzelej u bixic chque: “Mawi jumul c'o jun winak tzijoninak jas ri cätzijon we achi ri'.” 
John7:47 Ri pariseyib xquibij chque: “¿La xukuje' ba' ri ix xixsubutajic? 
John7:48 ¿La c'o lo jun chque ri nimak qui banic, o chque ri pariseyib, ri e cojoninak che ri are'?" 
John7:49 Are c'u we q'uialaj winak ri', ri man queta'm ta ri pixab, e c'okotajinak wa'.”" 
John7:50 Ri Nicodem, ri xopan can nabe ruc' ri Jesus, are' jun chque ri pariseyib, xubij chque:" 
John7:51 “¿La cubij lo ri ka pixab chi cäc'okox jun winak, we ma ta nabe cätatabex na ri u tzij, quetamax na jas ri u banom?”" 
John7:52 Xquibij c'u che: “¿La at lo xukuje' aj Galiley? Chatzucuj pa ri Tz'ibatalic, chawila' chi man c'o ta jun k'axal tzij cäwalij pa Galiley.”" 
John7:53 Chquijujunal c'ut xebe cho cachoch. 
John8:1 Ri Jesus xbe pa ri qui juyubal tak ri u Che'al Aseitun. 
John8:2 Sibalaj ak'ab xopan chi jumul pa ri rachoch Dios. Conojel ri winak xebopan ruc'. Xt'uyi' c'ut, xebutijoj." 
John8:3 Ri ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' ri pariseyib xquic'am ulok jun ixok chuwäch. Quirikom chi cätajin camacunic ruc' jun achi chic. Xquitac'aba' pa qui niq'uiajil ri winak. 
John8:4 Xquibij che ri Jesus: “Ajtij, we ixok ri' xriktajic chi cätajin cäkaj pa mac ruc' jun achi chic." 
John8:5 Ri u pixab ri Moises cujutako chi abaj cacämisabex quech ri ixokib ri je caquiban wa'. E c'u ri at, ¿jas ri cabij?”" 
John8:6 Xquibij c'u wa' che u c'amic u pu chi', rech c'o jas caquitzujubej rech. Ri Jesus xpachi'c, xtz'ibam cho ri ulew ruc' ri u wi' u k'ab." 
John8:7 Quitakem c'ut u c'otic u chi', xtaq'ui' c'u ri Jesus, xubij chque: “Apachin chiwe ri man c'o ta u mac, chuq'uiaka' ri nabe abaj che.”" 
John8:8 Xpachi' chi jumul, xtz'ibam cho ulew." 
John8:9 Aretak xquita' wa', pa jujunal xquichaplej quelic bic, nabe xebel bic tak ri ri'jab, xcanaj c'u can u tuquiel ri Jesus xukuje' ri ixok, ri c'ä tac'al chila'." 
John8:10 Xtaq'ui' ri Jesus, xubij: “Ixok, ¿jawije' e c'o wi ri e are'? ¿La ma ta c'o jun xk'atow tzij pawi'?”" 
John8:11 Ri are' xubij: “Ajawaxel, mawi jun.” Ri Jesus xubij che: “Mawi ri in quink'at tzij pawi'. Jät, matmacun chi c'ut.”" 
John8:12 Ri Jesus xebutzijobej chi jumul ri winak, xubij: “In ri' ri u chäj ri uwächulew. Apachin ri quinuterenej, man cäbin ta pa k'eku'm, xane' cäc'oji' na ri chäj re c'aslemal ruc'.”" 
John8:13 Xquibij ri pariseyib che: “At cak'alajisaj awib chbil awib. Ri a k'alajisanic c'ut man kastzij taj.” 
John8:14 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic chque: “Pune' ta ri in quink'alajisaj wib chbil wib, ri nu k'alajisanic c'ut are kastzij. Rumal rech chi weta'm jawije' in elinak wi ulok, xukuje' weta'm jawije' quinbe wi. Are' c'u ri ix man iweta'm taj jawije' xinel wi ulok, mawi iweta'm jawije' quinbe wi." 
John8:15 Ix quik'at tzij jas ri u beya'l ri winak. Ri in man c'o ta jun quink'at tzij puwi'. 
John8:16 We c'u quink'atow tzij, ri nu k'atoj tzij cajunamataj ruc' ri kastzij. Man xa ta c'u nu tuquiel, in c'olic are' jun ri Tataxel wuc'." 
John8:17 Xukuje' pa ri i pixab tz'ibatal wi chi kastzij ri qui k'alajisanic quieb winak. 
John8:18 Ri in quink'alajisaj wib chbil wib ri jun chic ri cuya' k'alajisanic chwij are' ri xintakow ulok, ri Tataxel.”" 
John8:19 Ri e are' c'ut xquibij che: “¿Jawije' c'o wi ri a Tat?” Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ix man quich'ob ta nu wäch, mawi quich'ob u wäch ri nu Tat. We ta quich'ob nu wäch in, xukuje' quich'ob ta u wäch ri' ri nu Tat.”" 
John8:20 We tzij ri' xutzijoj ri Jesus jawije' cäya' wi ri cuchuj, aretak quebutijoj ri winak pa ri rachoch Dios. Man c'o ta jun xchapowic, maja' c'u copan ri u jok'otaj." 
John8:21 Ri Jesus xubij chi jumul chque: “In quinbec. Ri ix quinitzucuj na, pa ri i mac c'ut quixcäm wi na. Jawije' ri quinbe wi, ri ix man quixcuin taj quixbe chila'.”" 
John8:22 Xquibij ri aj judeyib: “¿La cucämisaj ta c'u rib, chi cubij: ‘Jawije' ri quinbe wi, ri ix man quixcuin taj quixbe chila'?’”" 
John8:23 Ri are' xubij chque: “Ix ix aj waral ix aj iquim, in in aj chicaj. Ix ix rech we uwächulew ri', in man in ta rech we uwächulew ri'." 
John8:24 Rumal ri' xinbij chiwe chi quixcäm na pa ri i mac. We c'u man quicojo chi in ri', quixcäm na pa ri i mac.”" 
John8:25 Xquibij che: “¿Jachin ri' ri at?” Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Nu bim chi ulok chiwe kas pa ri chaplebal. 
John8:26 E q'ui ri jastak quebenbij na che u k'atic tzij piwi'; are' c'ut ri xintakow ulok are kas aj tzij, are c'ut ri nu tom ulok ruc' are wa' ri quintzijoj chque conojel ri winak.”" 
John8:27 Ri e are' man xquich'ob taj chi are' cutzijoj ri Tataxel chque. 
John8:28 Ri Jesus c'ut xubij chque: “Aretak quiwalijisaj na ri Rija'l Winak, c'äte ri' quiwetamaj na chi in ri in, chi man c'o ta jas quinban pa we wi; xane' jas ri xinutijoj wi ri Tataxel, are wa' quintzijoj." 
John8:29 Are' c'ut ri xintakow ulok, are c'o wuc'. Ri Tataxel man in u yo'm ta can nu tuquiel. Amak'el c'ut quinban ri cäkaj chuwäch.”" 
John8:30 Aretak cätajin quebutzijoj we jastak ri', e q'ui xecojon che." 
John8:31 Xubij ri Jesus chque ri aj judeyib ri xecojon che: “We quixjeki' pa ri nu tzij, kas ix nu tijoxelab ri'." 
John8:32 Quiwetamaj c'u na ri kastzij, are' c'u ri kastzij quixtzokopin na.”" 
John8:33 Xquibij che: “Ri uj uj rija'l ri Abraham. Man c'o ta jumul uj uxinak ta lok'om pataninelab che jun. ¿Jas c'u che cabij: ‘Quixtzokopitaj na’?” 
John8:34 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi conojel ri quemacunic, e c'o pa u k'ab ri macaj." 
John8:35 Ri lok'om pataninel man amak'el taj cäjeki' cho ja; are c'u ri c'ojolaxel are cäjeki' can amak'el. 
John8:36 Je c'u ri', we are' ri C'ojolaxel quixtzokopinic, ri ix kas quixux na tzokopitalic." 
John8:37 Weta'm chi ri ix ix rija'lil ri Abraham. Ri ix c'ut quitzucuj nu cämisaxic, rumal rech chi man quic'am ta ri nu tzij." 
John8:38 In quintzijoj jas ri wilom ruc' ri Tataxel. Ri ix quiban ri i tom ruc' ri i tat.” 
John8:39 Ri e are' xquibij che: “Ri ka tat are ri Abraham.” Ri Jesus xubij chque: “We ta kastzij ix ralc'ual ri Abraham, quiban ta c'u iwe ri' jas ri xuban ri Abraham." 
John8:40 Ri ix c'ut camic quitzucuj nu cämisaxic. Nu bim c'u ri kastzij chiwe, ri nu tom ruc' ri Dios; ¡man je ta wa' xuban ri Abraham!" 
John8:41 Ri ix are quiban iwe ri cuban ri i tat.” Xquibij c'u che: “Ri uj man uj ta calc'ual man queta'm ta u wäch qui tat. Jun ka Tat c'olic, are ri Dios.”" 
John8:42 Ri Jesus xubij c'u chque: “We ta are' i Tat ri Dios, quinilok'ok'ej ta ri'. In elinak c'u ulok ruc' ri Dios, in petinak c'ut. Man xinpe ta pa we wi, xane' are' ri Dios xintakow ulok." 
John8:43 ¿Jasche man quich'ob ta ri nu ch'abal? Rumal rech chi man quixcuin taj che u tatabexic ri nu tzij. 
John8:44 Ri ix ix rech ri i tat ri itzel. Ri u rayinic ri i tat quiwaj quibano. Ri itzel cämisanel kas pa ri tiquiritajic. Man jekelinak ta pa ri kastzij, rumal rech chi man c'o ta ri kastzij ruc'. Aretak cubij banoj tzij, are cutzijoj ri jastak rech, rumal rech chi ri are' banal tzij, xukuje' ri are' u tat ri banoj tzij." 
John8:45 Are c'u ri in, rumal rech chi quinbij ri kastzij, man quinicoj taj." 
John8:46 ¿Jachin chiwe cäc'utuw chnuwäch chi c'o nu mac? We quinbij ri kastzij, ¿jas c'u che man quicoj taj?" 
John8:47 Jachin c'ut ri rech ri Dios, quebutatabej ri e u tzij ri Dios; rumal c'u rech chi man ix ta rech ri Dios, man quiwaj taj quebitatabej.”" 
John8:48 Ri aj judeyib xquibij che: “¿La ma ta cäkabij ri kastzij chi at aj Samar, xukuje' chi c'o itzel uxlabal chawe?”" 
John8:49 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Man c'o ta itzel uxlabal chwe. Xane' ri in nim quinwil wi ri nu Tat. Are c'u ri ix man nim ta quiniwil wi. 
John8:50 Ri in man quintzucuj ta ri nu juluwem; c'o Jun ri cätzucunic, are' c'ut ri k'atal tzij." 
John8:51 Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi jachin ri cunimaj ri nu tzij, mawi jumul cäril na ri cämical chbe k'ij sak.”" 
John8:52 Xquibij ri aj judeyib che: “Camic keta'm chi c'o itzel uxlabal chawe. Ri Abraham xcämic, xukuje' ri e k'axal tak tzij xecämic. At c'ut cabij: ‘Jachin ri cunimaj ri nu tzij, man cäcäm ta chbe k'ij sak.’" 
John8:53 ¿La nim ta c'u na a k'ij chuwäch ri ka mam Abraham, ri are' xcämic? Xukuje' ri e k'axal tak tzij xecämic. ¿Jachin ri at caban awib chbil awib?”" 
John8:54 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic chque: “We ta quinjuluwirisaj wib, ri nu juluwem man c'o ta u banic ri'. Ri nu Tat, ri quibij ix: Chi are' i Dios, are ri quinjuluwisanic." 
John8:55 Man quich'ob ta c'u u wäch ri are'. Ri in quinch'ob u wäch. We ta quinbij chi man quinch'ob ta u wäch, in junam ta ri' iwuc', in ta banal tzij ri'. Ri in c'ut quinch'ob u wäch, quinnimaj c'ut ri u tzij." 
John8:56 Ri Abraham ri i mam sibalaj xquicotic chi cäril na ri nu k'ij. Xril c'ut, xquicotic.”" 
John8:57 C'äte ri' ri aj judeyib xquibij che: “C'ä maja' c'o cawinak lajuj (50) a junab. ¿La xawil c'u lo u wäch ri Abraham?” 
John8:58 Xubij ri Jesus chque: “Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chiwe: C'ä majok calax ri Abraham, in c'o chic.”" 
John8:59 C'äte ri' xequic'am abaj che u q'uiakic che. Chic'uyal c'ut xel ubic ri Jesus pa ri rachoch Dios. 
John9:1 Oc'owem re ri Jesus, xril jun achi ri moy pa ri ralaxic." 
John9:2 Ri e u tijoxelab ri Jesus xquita' che, xquibij: “Ajtij, ¿jachin ri xmacunic, a are' we achi ri', o e are' ri e u tat u nan, chi moy xalaxic?”" 
John9:3 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Mawi xmacun ri are', mawi ri e u tat u nan, xane' rech cäc'ut taj ri u chac ri Dios pa ri are'." 
John9:4 Rajawaxic chi quinban ri u chac ri xintakow ulok, c'ä c'o ri k'ij. Cäpe ri ak'ab aretak man c'o ta jun cäcuinic cächacunic." 
John9:5 Aretak c'ä in c'o cho ri uwächulew, in chäj chque ri winak cho ri uwächulew.”" 
John9:6 Xbitaj c'u wa', xchuban pa ulew, xuban xok'ol ruc' ri u chub. Xubil ri xok'ol chquij ri u bak'wäch ri moy." 
John9:7 Xubij che: “Jät, chach'aja' awib pa ri atinibal Siloe” (ri quel cubij: “Takom”). Xel c'u bic, xuch'aja' rib. Xpetic, cäca'y chic." 
John9:8 E are' c'ut ri c'ul tak ja xukuje' ri e ilowinak canok chi cutz'onoj u cochinic, xquibij: “¿La ma ta are wa' ri cät'uyic cutz'onoj u cochinic?”" 
John9:9 Jujun xquibij: “Are wa'.” Ri jule' chic xquibij: “Man are taj, je c'u ne ri quejunamataj ruc'.” Ri achi xubij: “In ri'.”" 
John9:10 C'äte ri' xquibij che: “¿Jas xjakbex quech ri a bak'wäch?” 
John9:11 Ri are' xubij chque: “Are' ri achi, ri Jesus u bi', xuban xok'ol, xubil chque ri nu bak'wäch, xubij c'u chwe: ‘Jät pa ri Siloe, chach'aja' c'ut awib.’ Xinbe c'ut. Aretak xinch'aj wib, xinca'yic.”" 
John9:12 Xquibij c'u che: “¿Jawije' c'o wi ri achi ri'?” Xubij: “Man weta'm taj.” 
John9:13 Xquic'am bic ri moy can nabe, cuc' ri pariseyib." 
John9:14 K'ij c'ut re uxlanem aretak ri Jesus xuban ri xok'ol, xebujak ri u bak'wäch ri moy." 
John9:15 Ri pariseyib xquita' chi jumul che jas ri xbantajic chi caca'y chic. Ri are' xubij chque: “Xuya' xok'ol chquij ri nu bak'wäch, xinch'aj wib, quinca'y chi c'ut.”" 
John9:16 Jujun c'ut chque ri pariseyib xquibij: “We achi ri' man rech ta ri Dios, rumal rech chi man nim ta cäril wi ri k'ij re uxlanem.” Jule' chic xquibij: “We ta ri are' jun winak ajmac, ¿jas ta c'u che cäcuin che u banic etal je tak wa'?” Man junam ta c'u ri qui chomanic." 
John9:17 C'äte ri' xquibij chi jumul che ri moy can nabe: “E c'u ri at, ¿jas cabij chrij ri achi ri xebujak ri a bak'wäch?” Ri are' xubij: “Are' jun k'axal tzij.”" 
John9:18 Ri aj judeyib man xquicoj taj chi ri achi moy canok, cäca'y chi c'ut, c'ä xebequisiq'uij na ulok ri u tat u nan ri achi ri cäca'y chic." 
John9:19 Xquita' chque, xquibij: “¿La are wa' ri iwalc'ual, ri quibij chi moy xalaxic? ¿Jas c'u che cäca'y camic?”"
