John9:20 Ri u tat u nan xquibij chque: “Keta'm chi are kalc'ual wa', keta'm chi moy xalaxic." 
John9:21 Man keta'm ta c'ut jasche cäca'y camic. Man keta'm taj jachin ri xejakow ri u bak'wäch. Q'ui chic u junab. Ta alak che. Kas are' cutzijoj na jas u banom.” 
John9:22 Ri u tat u nan xquibij wa' rumal rech chi xquixe'j quib chquiwäch ri aj judeyib. Are c'u ri aj judeyib qui banom chomanic, chi we c'o jachin jun cubij chi ri Jesus are ri Crist, quesax bic pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab." 
John9:23 Rumal rech wa', xquibij ri u tat u nan: “Are' q'ui chic ri u junab, chita' che are'.”" 
John9:24 C'äte ri' xquisiq'uij chic chucamul ri achi ri moy canok, xquibij che: “Chanimarisaj ba' u k'ij ri Dios. Uj keta'm chi we achi ri' ajmac.”" 
John9:25 Ri are' c'ut xubij chque: “We ajmac, man weta'm taj. Xuwi jun jasach weta'm, chi in moy canok, camic c'ut quinca'y chic.”" 
John9:26 Xquibij c'u che: “¿Jas xuban chawe? ¿Jas xubano xebujak ri a bak'wäch?” 
John9:27 Ri achi xubij chque: “Nu bim chic chech alak, man xintatabej ta c'u alak. ¿Jasche cata' chi alak jumul? ¿La caj alak cux alak u tijoxelab?”" 
John9:28 Xquiyok'o, xquibij c'u che: “At ri' ri at u tijoxel. Ri uj uj u tijoxelab ri Moises." 
John9:29 Uj keta'm chi ri Dios xtzijon ruc' ri Moises. Are c'u ri achi ri', man keta'm taj aj jawije'.”" 
John9:30 Ri achi xubij chque: “Are wa' ri quinmay in chi man eta'm ta alak aj jawije', xebujak c'u ri nu bak'wäch." 
John9:31 Keta'm chi ri Dios man quebutatabej ta ri ajmaquib. We c'u c'o jachin ri cuya' u k'ij ri Dios, ri cuban ri u rayibal, are wa' cätatabex rumal." 
John9:32 Kas aretak xtiquiritaj ri uwächulew, man c'o ta jumul qui tom ri winak chi c'o jachin quejakow ri u bak'wäch jun ri moy ulok pa ri ralaxic." 
John9:33 We ta ma ta elinak ulok ruc' ri Dios, ma ta c'o jas cäcuin ri' che u banic.”" 
John9:34 Ri aj judeyib xquibij che: “Ri at at nojinak che ri mac xatalaxic. ¿La at ta c'ut cujatijoj?” Xquesaj c'u bic. 
John9:35 Ri Jesus xuto' chi xesax bic ri moy. Xurik c'ut, xubij che: “E c'u ri at, ¿la catcojon che ri Rija'l Winak?”" 
John9:36 Ri achi xubij che: “¿Jachin ri' rech quincojon che, Wajaw?”" 
John9:37 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Awilom c'ut, ri cätzijon awuc', are wa'.”" 
John9:38 Ri achi xubij: “Quincojonic, Wajaw.” Xuk'ijilaj c'ut." 
John9:39 Xubij ri Jesus: “In petinak cho we uwächulew ri' che u banic k'atoj tzij, rech ri man queca'y taj, queca'yic; rech xukuje' ri queca'yic, quemoyiric.”" 
John9:40 Jujun chque ri pariseyib ri e c'o ruc', aretak xquita' wa', xquibij che: “¿La uj ta c'u moyab xukuje'?”" 
John9:41 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “We ta ix moyab, ma ta c'o i mac ri'. Camic c'ut quibij: ‘Cujca'yic’. Rumal ri', jekelinak ri i mac.”" 
John10:1 “Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chiwe: Ri jun ri man coc ta chupam ri roquibal ri quewar wi ri chij, xane' pa jun chi wi ri cäpaki' wi, eläk'om ri', xukuje' ch'ayanel eläk'om." 
John10:2 Are' c'ut ri coc pa ri oquibal, cajyuk' ri chij wa'." 
John10:3 Ri chajinel cujak ri oquibal chuwäch ri are'. Ri chij cäquita' ri u ch'abal. Ri are' quebusiq'uij ri u chij che ri qui bi', queresaj c'u bic." 
John10:4 Aretak e resam chi bic conojel ri e rech, cänabej na chquiwäch. Ri chij queteri chrij, rumal rech chi queta'm ri u ch'abal." 
John10:5 Man c'u queteri ta chrij ri jun chiwi ri man cäquich'ob ta u wäch, xane' quebanimaj chuwäch. Man queta'm ta c'u ri qui ch'abal ri e jule' chi wi.”" 
John10:6 Ri Jesus xubij we c'ambal no'j ri' chque. Ri e are' c'ut man xquich'ob taj jas ri xutzijoj chque. 
John10:7 Xubij chi c'u ri Jesus jumul: “Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chiwe: In ri' ri oquibal ri quek'ax wi ri chij." 
John10:8 Conojel ri xepe can nabe chnuwäch in, e eläk'omab, xukuje' ech'ayanelab tak eläk'omab. Man xetatabex ta c'u cumal ri chij." 
John10:9 In ri' ri oquibal. We c'o jachin coc pa ri in, cäcolotaj na. Coc na ulok, quel na bic, curik na recha'." 
John10:10 Ri eläk'om xuwi cäpetic che eläk'anic, che cämisanic, xukuje' che sachan wächaj. Ri in in petinak rech cäc'oji' qui c'aslemal, c'aslemal ri sibalaj q'ui." 
John10:11 In ri' ri utzalaj ajyuk'. Ri utzalaj ajyuk' cuya' ri u c'aslemal rumal quech ri u e chij. 
John10:12 Are c'u ri xa' tojom, ri man are' ta cajyuk', ri man e rech ta ri chij, xak cäca'y ri' che ri utiw cäpetic, quebuya' can ri chij, canimaj c'ut. Ri utiw quebuchap ri chij, quebutuquij c'ut." 
John10:13 Je c'u ri' ri xa' tojom canimajic, rumal rech chi xa' tojom, man querilij ta ri chij." 
John10:14 In ri' ri utzalaj ajyuk'. Quinch'ob c'u qui wäch ri nu chij, ri e wech cäquich'ob nu wäch, jacha' ri nu Tat cuch'ob nu wäch in, xukuje' jacha' ri in quinch'ob u wäch ri Tataxel. Quinya' c'u ri nu c'aslemal rumal quech ri chij." 
John10:15  
John10:16 E c'o chi c'u niq'uiaj nu chij, ri man e rech ta we warabal ri'. E are c'u ri' xukuje' rajawaxic quebenc'ama' na ulok. Cäquitatabej na ri nu ch'abal. Cäc'oji' na xa' jumulaj chij, xukuje' xa' jun ajyuk'." 
John10:17 Rumal rech wa' quinulok'ok'ej ri Tataxel, chi ri in quinya' ri nu c'aslemal, che u c'amic chic." 
John10:18 Man c'o ta jun quesan chwe, xane' in quinyo'w pa we wi. C'o pa nu k'ab ri u ya'ic ri nu c'aslemal, xukuje' c'o pa nu k'ab ri u c'amic chic. We takanic ri' xinc'am che ri nu Tat.”" 
John10:19 Jumul chic, aretak ri aj judeyib xquita' we tzij ri', man junam ta ri qui chomanic che." 
John10:20 E q'ui chque xquibij: “Itzel uxlabal c'o che, ch'ujarinak. ¿Jasche quitatabej?”" 
John10:21 Niq'uiaj chic xquibij: “We tzij ri' man e rech ta jun ri c'o itzel uxlabal che. ¿La cäcuin lo jun itzel uxlabal che qui jakic ri qui bak'wäch ri moyab?” 
John10:22 Chi' c'ut coc'owisax ri nimak'ij pa Jerusalen che u nataxic ri u yaquic ri rachoch Dios. Pa ri k'ij re ri tew c'u ri'. 
John10:23 Ri Jesus cäbin pa ri rachoch Dios, pa ri u rakan ja ri Salomon." 
John10:24 Ri aj judeyib c'ut xquisutij rij, xquibij che: “¿C'ä jampa' xak cuban quieb ka c'u'x chawe? We at ri' ri Crist, chabij chke ruc' sakil.”" 
John10:25 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic chque: “Nu bim chic chiwe, man quicoj ta c'ut. Ri chac ri quinban pa ri u bi' ri nu Tat, e are wa' quek'alajisan ri nu banic." 
John10:26 Are c'u ri ix man quicoj taj, rumal rech chi man ix ta jujun chque ri nu chij." 
John10:27 Ri e nu chij cäquitatabej ri nu ch'abal. Ri in quinch'ob qui wäch, ri e are' queteri chwij." 
John10:28 In quinya' junalic c'aslemal chque. Mawi jumul cäsach na qui wäch chbe k'ij sak. Man c'o ta jun quetokin na pa nu k'ab. 
John10:29 Ri nu Tat, ri xebuya' chwe, nim na chquiwäch conojel. Man c'o ta c'u jun cäcuin che qui tokixic pa u k'ab ri Tataxel." 
John10:30 Ri in ruc' ri Tataxel xa uj jun.” 
John10:31 Jumul chic ri aj judeyib xquic'am abaj che u cämisaxic. 
John10:32 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Q'ui utzalaj tak u chac ri Tataxel xebenc'ut chiwäch; ¿Jas rumal ri nu chac quinicämisaj che abaj?” 
John10:33 Ri aj judeyib xquibij che: “Man rumal ta rech jun utzalaj chac catkacämisaj che abaj, xane' rumal rech chi cawetz'bej u wäch ri Dios, xukuje' rumal rech chi ri at, at winak, cajaluj awib chi at Dios.”" 
John10:34 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La ma ta tz'ibatal pa ri i pixab: ‘In xinbij: Ri ix ix diosib?’ 
John10:35 Are ri Tz'ibatalic man cuya' taj catuquixic, cubij c'u diosib chque ri winak ri xopan wi ri u tzij ri Dios," 
John10:36 we ri Tataxel xinutaso in, xinutak ulok cho we uwächulew ri', ¿Jas c'u che quinitzujuj chi quinban wib chi in Dios rumal rech ri xinbij chi in u C'ojol ri Dios?" 
John10:37 We man quinban ri u chac ri nu Tat, mixcojon chwe." 
John10:38 We c'u quinbano, pune' man quixcojon chwe in, chixcojon chque ri nu chac, rech quiwetamaj xukuje' quich'obo chi ri Tataxel c'o pa ri in are c'u ri in in c'o pa ri Tataxel.”" 
John10:39 C'äte ri', jumul chic xquitzucuj u chapic ri Jesus. Xel c'u bic pa qui k'ab." 
John10:40 Xbec, xopan chi jumul ch'käp che ri nima' Jordan, pa ri c'olbal ri xc'oji' wi ri Xuan nabe pa ri chaplebal cuban ri qui bautism ri winak, xcanaj can chila'." 
John10:41 E q'ui xebopan ruc', xquibij: “Pune' ri Xuan man c'o ta jun etal xubano, ronojel ri xubij chrij we achi ri', are kastzij.”" 
John10:42 E q'ui c'u ri xecojon che ri Jesus chila'. 
John11:1 C'o c'u jun achi yawab, Lazaro u bi' aj Betan, ri qui tinimit ri Mariy xukuje' ri Mart ri rachalal." 
John11:2 Are Mariy wa' ri xjamin jun c'oc'al chquij ri rakan ri Ajawaxel, ri xebusu' ri rakan ruc' ri u wi'. Ri Lazaro, ri u xibal, yawab." 
John11:3 Ri e rana'b xetakan che u bixic che ri Jesus: “Kajaw, yawab ri jun ri lok' chwäch la.”" 
John11:4 Ri Jesus aretak xuto xubij: “We yabil ri' man re ta cämical, xane' che u c'utic ri u juluwem ri Dios, rech cänimarisax u k'ij ri u C'ojol ri Dios rumal ri yabilal.”" 
John11:5 Ri Jesus c'ut quebulok'ok'ej ri Mart ruc' ri rachalal xukuje' ri Lazaro. 
John11:6 Aretak xretamaj chi yawab ri Lazaro, ri Jesus xcanaj chi na can quieb k'ij pa ri c'olbal ri c'o wi." 
John11:7 Aretak c'u xeboc'ow wa', xubij chque ri u tijoxelab: “Jo' chi jumul pa Judey.”" 
John11:7 Aretak c'u xeboc'ow wa', xubij chque ri u tijoxelab: “Jo' chi jumul pa Judey.”" 
John11:8 Xquibij ri u tijoxelab che: “Ajtij, ri aj judeyib c'ä maja' naj xquitzucuj buq'uic la che abaj. ¿La cabe chi c'u na la jumul chila'?”" 
John11:9 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La ma ta cablajuj jok'otaj u pam ri k'ij? We cäbin jun pa k'ij, man cätzak taj, rumal rech chi cäril ri u chäj we uwächulew ri'." 
John11:10 We c'u cäbin chak'ab, cätzakic, rumal rech chi man c'o ta chäj ruc'.”" 
John11:11 Xebitaj c'u we jastak ri' rumal, c'äte ri' xubij chque: “Ri kachil Lazaro cäwaric. Quinbe ba che u c'asuxic che ri u waram.”" 
John11:12 Xquibij c'u ri u tijoxelab: “Kajaw, we cäwaric, cutzir ba ri'.”" 
John11:13 Ri Jesus are xutzijoj ri u cämical. Ri e u tijoxelab c'ut xquichomaj chi are cutzijoj ri uxlanem re ri waram. 
John11:14 C'äte ri' ri Jesus xubij chque chi sakil: “Ri Lazaro cäminak chic. 
John11:15 In quinquicot rumal iwech chi man in c'o ta chila' rech quixcojonic. Jo' ba.” 
John11:16 Are' c'u ri Max ri cäbix Yo'x che, xubij chque ri rach tak tijoxelab: “Jo' uj xukuje', rech cujecäm ruc'.”" 
John11:17 Aretak xopan ri Jesus, xretamaj chi quiejeb k'ij chic mukutalic." 
John11:18 Ri Betan c'o chunakaj ri Jerusalen, cäraj c'o niq'uiaj legua." 
John11:19 E q'ui chque ri aj judeyib e petinak cuc' ri Mart xukuje' ri Mariy, che u cu'bisaxic qui c'u'x rumal ri u cämical ri qui xibal." 
John11:20 Are' c'u ri Mart, aretak xuto chi petinak ri Jesus, xel bic che u c'ulaxic. Ri Mariy xt'uyi' can cho ja." 
John11:21 Ri Mart xubij che ri Jesus: “Wajaw, we ta lal c'o waral, ma ta xcäm ri' ri nu xibal." 
John11:22 Weta'm c'u camic, chi apachique jasach ri cätz'onoj la che ri Dios, ri Dios cuya' na che la.”" 
John11:23 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Cäc'astaj na ri a xibal.” 
John11:24 Ri Mart xubij che: “In weta'm chi cäc'astaj na pa ri c'astajibal pa ri q'uisbal k'ij.” 
John11:25 Ri Jesus xubij che: “In ri' ri c'astajibal xukuje' ri c'aslemal. Jachin ri cäcojon chwe in, pune' cacämic, cäc'asi na." 
John11:26 Conojel ri e c'aslic, ri quecojon chwe in, man quecäm ta chbe k'ij sak. ¿La cacoj wa'?”" 
John11:27 Xubij che: “Quincojo, Wajaw. In cojoninak chi lal ri' ri Crist, ri u C'ojol ri Dios, ri xpe cho ri uwächulew.”" 
John11:28 Xbitaj wa', xbe ri Mart, xusiq'uij ri Mariy ri rachalal chi c'uyal, xubij che: “Ri Ajtij c'o waral, catusiq'uij.”" 
John11:29 Aretak xuto, xwalij aninak, ri Mariy xopan ruc'." 
John11:30 Ri Jesus c'ä maja' copan pa ri tinimit, xane' c'ä c'o pa ri c'olbal ri xrik wi rumal ri Mart." 
John11:31 Are c'u ri aj judeyib ri e c'o ruc' cho rachoch, ri cätajin cäquicu'bisaj u c'u'x, aretak xquilo chi ri Mariy aninak xwalijic xel bic, xquiterenej bic. Are pa qui c'u'x chi cäbec jawije' ri mukutal wi, che ok'ej chila'." 
John11:32 Aretak ri Mariy xopanic jawije' ri c'o wi ri Jesus, xuxucuba' rib chuwäch, je xubij wa' che: “Wajaw, we ta lal c'o waral, ma ta xcäm ri' ri nu xibal.”" 
John11:33 Ri Jesus, aretak xrilo chi cätajin cok' ri Mariy, xukuje' ri aj judeyib ri xebopan ruc', xk'oxow ri ranima', xt'ujuwic." 
John11:34 Xubij c'ut: “¿Jawije' xiya' wi?” Xquibij che: “Kajaw, saj la, chila la.”" 
John11:35 Xok' ri Jesus. 
John11:36 Xquibij c'u ri aj judeyib: “Chiwila', sibalaj lok' chuwäch.”" 
John11:37 Jujun chque xquibij: “Are wa' ri xejakow ri u bak'wäch ri moy, ¿La ma ta xcuin che u banic chi ma ta xcäm ri Lazaro?”" 
John11:38 Ri Jesus xk'oxow chi jumul ri ranima', xopan chuchi' ri mukutal wi. Jun pec c'u ri', queteban c'u can jun abaj chuchi'." 
John11:39 Xubij ri Jesus: “Chiwesaj ri abaj.” Ri Mart, rana'b ri cäminak, xubij che: “Wajaw, c'o chic ruxlab wa', quiejeb k'ij chi wa' cäminak.”" 
John11:40 Ri Jesus xubij che: “¿La ma ta nu bim chawe chi, we catcojonic, cawil na ri' ri u juluwem ri Dios?”" 
John11:41 C'äte ri' xquesaj ri abaj. Ri Jesus xca'y chicaj, xubij: “Tat, quinmaltioxin che la chi xintatabej la." 
John11:42 Ri in weta'm chi amak'el quintatabej la. Xinbij c'u wa' rumal quech ri e q'ui winak ri e c'o chwij, rech cäquicojo chi ri lal xintakow la ulok.”" 
John11:43 Xebitaj we jastak ri', xurak u chi' ruc' chuk'ab, xubij: “Lazaro, chatel ulok.”" 
John11:44 Xel ulok ri cäminak canok, yutuyoj ri rakan u k'ab che botz'obal, ri u palaj pisom pa jun su't. Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chiquira', chitzokopij bic.”" 
John11:45 E q'ui chque ri aj judeyib ri e opaninak ruc' ri Mariy, aretak xquilo jas ri xuban ri Jesus, xecojon che." 
John11:46 Xebel bic niq'uiaj chque, xebe cuc' ri pariseyib, xequitzijoj chque jas ri xebantaj rumal ri Jesus." 
John11:47 Are c'u ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob cuc' ri pariseyib xequimulij ri comon qui nimakil ri aj judeyib, xquibij: “¿Jas cakabano xecha'? We achi ri' quebuban q'ui etal." 
John11:48 We cäkaya' can chi jeri', conojel quecojon na che. Quepe na ri aj romab, cäquesaj na ri ka c'olbal xukuje' ri nim ka tinimit.”" 
John11:49 Ri Caipas jun chque ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob pa ri junab ri', xubij chque: “Ri ix man c'o ta jas iweta'm." 
John11:50 Man c'o ta ri i chomanic, chi are c'o cäkechbej na, chi jun winak cäcäm che qui q'uexwäch conojel ri winak, rech man are ta ronojel ri nim tinimit cäsach u wäch.”" 
John11:51 Man xubij ta wa' pa re wi. Xane' xuk'axej ri u tzij ri Dios chque, chi ri Jesus cäcäm na che u q'uexwäch ri nim tinimit. Jewa' xubij rumal rech chi are' qui nimal ri cojol tak tabal tok'ob pa ri junab ri'." 
John11:52 Man xuwi' ta c'u cäcäm na che u q'uexwäch ri nim tinimit, xane' xukuje' rech quebumulij na pa jun ri e ralc'ual ri Dios ri e jabuninak." 
John11:53 Chi' c'ut, pa ri k'ij ri' xquichomaj u cämisaxic." 
John11:54 Je c'u ri', ri Jesus man cäbin ta chic chi sakil chquixo'l ri aj judeyib. Xane' xel bic chila', xbe cho ri ulew chunakaj ri chaki'j uwo sak pa jun tinimit ri u binam Eprain. Xcanaj can chila' cuc' ri u tijoxelab." 
John11:55 Petinak chi ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem, ri qui nimak'ij ri aj judeyib. E q'ui xebel bic pa ri c'olbal ri', xebe pa Jerusalen, c'ä maja' ri Oc'owem, che qui josk'ixic quib." 
John11:56 Xquitzucuj ri Jesus, xquibila' chbil tak quib, aretak e tac'atoj pa ri rachoch Dios: “¿Jas quichomaj ix, a man cäpe lo pa ri nimak'ij?”" 
John11:57 Ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri pariseyib qui yo'm chi takanic, chi we c'o jachin reta'm jawije' ri c'o wi, chuya' u bixic chque, rech quequichapa' ulok." 
John12:1 Wakib k'ij cäraj na ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem, ri Jesus xopan pa Betan, jawije' ri jekel wi ri Lazaro, ri xc'astajisax chquixo'l ri cäminakib rumal ri Jesus." 
John12:2 Xban chila' jun wa'im re xk'ekal che ri Jesus. Ri Mart are' ri cäpatanin che u k'axexic ri wa pa ri mexa. Are c'u ri Lazaro are jun chque ri winak ri e c'o pa ri mexa cawi' ruc' ri Jesus. 
John12:3 Are c'u ri Mariy xuc'am jun libra c'oc'alaj cunabal re nard, ri man yujtal ta u pam, ri sibalaj pakal rajil. Xubil chque ri rakan ri Jesus, xebusu' c'ut ruc' ri u wi'. Xnoj ri ja che ri u c'oc'al ri cunabal." 
John12:4 Xubij c'u jun chque ri u tijoxelab, ri Judas Iscariot, ri cujach na ri Jesus:" 
John12:5 “¿Jasche man xc'ayix we c'oc'alaj cunabal ri' che jun nimalaj puak jacha' ri cuch'äc jun winak che jun junab chac, xya' ta c'u che qui to'ic ri mebayib?”" 
John12:6 Xubij wa', man rumal ta rech chi coc il chque ri mebayib, xane' rumal rech chi eläk'om. Ruc' c'u ri are' c'o wi ri c'olbal puak, nak'atal c'ut cäreläk'aj ri cäya' chupam." 
John12:7 Xubij c'u ri Jesus che: “Chaya' canok; che ri k'ij re ri nu mukic u c'olom wi wa'. 
John12:8 Ri mebayib amak'el e c'o iwuc'. Ri in, man amak'el taj in c'o iwuc'.”" 
John12:9 E q'ui chque ri aj judeyib xquetamaj chi ri Jesus c'o chila'. Xepetic man xuwi ta che rilic ri Jesus, xane' xukuje' che rilic ri Lazaro, ri xc'astajisax chquixo'l ri cäminakib rumal ri Jesus." 
John12:10 Ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xquichomaj u cämisaxic xukuje' ri Lazaro. 
John12:11 Rumal rech chi, e q'ui chque ri aj judeyib cätajin quebe ruc', xecojon che ri Jesus rumal rech ri are'." 
John12:12 Chucab k'ij chic, ri q'uialaj winak ri xebopan pa ri nimak'ij, aretak xquito chi oquem cuban ri Jesus pa Jerusalen," 
John12:13 xequic'am c'u u xak tak tut, xebel bic che u c'ulaxic. Xquirak qui chi', xquibij: “¡Chujcolo' la! ¡Tewichitalic ri petinak pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel, ri Rajawinel ri Israel!”" 
John12:14 Ri Jesus xurik jun alaj bur, xquiejen c'u chrij, jas ri tz'ibatalic:" 
John12:15 “Maxe'j awib, u mia'l ri Sion; Chawilampe', ri Awajawinel petinak, quiejeninak chrij jun alaj bur.”" 
John12:16 We jastak ri' man xquich'ob ta ri e u tijoxelab chanim. Xane' aretak juluwirisam chic ri Jesus, c'äte ri' xnataj chque chi are jastak wa' e tz'ibam chrij, chi xeban we jastak ri' che." 
John12:17 Ri winak ri e c'o ruc' caquiya' k'alajisanic aretak xusiq'uij ri Lazaro chupam ri mukubal, xuc'astajisaj c'u chquixo'l ri cäminakib." 
John12:18 Rumal rech wa', ri q'uialaj winak xebel bic che u c'ulaxic, rumal rech chi xquita' chi are' xbanow we etal ri'." 
John12:19 Are c'u ri pariseyib xquibila' chquibil quib, xquibij: “Quiwilo chi man c'o ta jas cujcuin che u banic. ¡Chiwilampe', conojel ri winak quebe ruc'!”" 
John12:20 E c'o c'u jujun aj gresib chquixo'l, ri xebopan che k'ijilanic pa ri nimak'ij." 
John12:21 E are' c'u wa' xebopan ruc' ri Pelip, ri aj Betsaid re Galiley. Xquibochi'j, xquibij: “Tat, cäkaj cäkil ri Jesus.”" 
John12:22 Xpe ri Pelip, xubij che ri Trix. Xbe c'u ri Trix rachil ri Pelip, xequibij che ri Jesus." 
John12:23 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Petinak chic ri jok'otaj aretak cajuluwirisax ri Rija'l Winak. 
John12:24 Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chiwe, we man cätzak ri jun u bak'wäch trico pa ri ulew xukuje' cäcämic, cäcanaj can u tuquiel. We cäcäm c'ut, q'ui wächinic cuya'." 
John12:25 Apachin ta ne ri culok'ok'ej ri u c'aslemal cusach na u wäch; apachin ta ne ri caretzelaj u wäch ri u c'aslemal chupam we uwächulew ri', cuchajij na che ri junalic c'aslemal." 
John12:26 We c'o jachin quinupatanij, chinuterenej. Jawije' ri quinc'oji' wi, chila' xukuje' cäc'oji' wi na ri pataninel wech. We c'o jachin quinupatanij, nim quil wi na rumal ri nu Tat.”" 
John12:27 “Camic cäk'oxow ri wanima'. ¿Jas c'u quinbij na? ¿La quinbij ta na: ‘Tat, chinesaj la chuwäch we c'axc'ol ri'?’ Kas c'u ne che wa' in petinak wi." 
John12:28 Tat, chnimarisaj u k'ij ri bi' la.” C'äte ri' xpe jun ch'abal pa ri caj, xubij: “Nu nimarisam chic, quinnimarisaj chi c'u na jumul.”" 
John12:29 Ri q'ui winak ri e c'o chila', aretak xquito, xquibij chi xuban cakulja. Niq'uiaj chic xquibij: “jun tako'n aj caj xtzijon ruc'.”" 
John12:30 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Man rumal ta wech petinak we ch'abal ri', xane' rumal iwech ix." 
John12:31 Camic ri k'ijol ri cäban ri k'atoj tzij puwi' we uwächulew ri'. Camic quesax na bic ri c'o u takanic puwi' we uwächulew ri'. 
John12:32 In, aretak quinwalijisax bic cho ri uwächulew, conojel quebenjic' na ulok wuc'.”" 
John12:33 Xubij wa' che u k'alajisaxic jas ri cämical ri curik na. 
John12:34 Ri winak xquibij che: “Uj ka tom pa ri pixab, chi ri Crist cäjeki' na chbe k'ij sak. ¿Jas c'u che cabij at chi rajawaxic chi ri Rija'l Winak cäwalijisax na? ¿Jachin wa' ri Rija'l Winak?”" 
John12:35 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Xa jubik' chic c'o ri chäj chixo'l. Chixbinok utz c'ä c'o ri chäj chixo'l, mixcanaj c'u can pa k'eku'm. Jachin ri cäbin pa k'eku'm man reta'm taj jawije' cäbe wi." 
John12:36 C'ä c'o ri chäj iwuc', chixcojon che ri chäj, rech quixux ralc'ual ri chäj.” E are jastak wa' xutzijoj ri Jesus, xel c'u bic, xuc'u' rib chquiwäch." 
John12:37 Pune' e q'ui etal xuban ri Jesus chquiwäch, man xecojon ta che," 
John12:38 chutz'akatisaxic ri tzij ri xubij ri Isaiy ri k'axal tzij, aretak xubij: “Ajawaxel, ¿jachin cojowinak ri ka yo'm u bixic? ¿Jachin chuwäch u k'alajisam wi ri u cuinem ri Ajawaxel?”" 
John12:39 Jeri' chi man xecuin taj xecojonic, xubij c'ut ri Isaiy xukuje':" 
John12:40 “Ri Dios xumoyirisaj ri qui bak'wäch, xuban co che ri canima' rech man cäquil ta ruc' ri qui bak'wäch, rech man cäquich'ob ta pa ri canima', mawi quetzelej ta wuc', mebencunaj c'ut.”" 
John12:41 Are wa' xubij ri Isaiy rumal rech chi xril ri u juluwem ri Jesus, xutzijoj c'ut ri are'." 
John12:42 Pune' c'u je xbix wa', e q'ui na chque ri winak nimak qui banic xecojon che ri Jesus. Rumal c'u quech ri pariseyib, man xquik'alajisaj taj, rech man quebesax ta pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab." 
John12:43 Ri e are' c'ut xquilok'ok'ej na ri qui juluwem ri winak chuwäch ri u juluwem ri Dios. 
John12:44 Ri Jesus co xch'awic, xubij: “Jachin ri cäcojon chwe in, man xuwi ta chwe in cäcojon wi, xane' che ri xinutak ulok." 
John12:45 Ri quinilowic in, caril ri Jun ri xintakow ulok." 
John12:46 In chäj, in ulinak cho ri uwächulew, rech conojel ri quecojon chwe, man quec'oji' ta pa ri k'eku'm." 
John12:47 We c'o jachin cuta' ri nu tzij, man cunimaj ta c'u ne, ri in man quink'at ta tzij puwi'. Man in petinak ta che u k'atic tzij paquiwi' ri winak, xane' che qui colic ri winak." 
John12:48 Jachin ri man nim ta quinril wi, ri man cäc'amow ta ri nu tzij, c'o jachin cäk'atow tzij puwi'. Ri tzij ri nu tzijom canok, are ri' cäk'atow na tzij puwi' pa ri q'uisbal k'ij." 
John12:49 Man in tzijoninak ta c'u pa we wi. Xane' ri Tataxel ri xinutak ulok, are' xyo'w takanic chwe jas ri quinbij na, jas ri quintzijoj na." 
John12:50 Weta'm c'ut chi ri u takomal ri nu tat cuya' junalic c'aslemal. Je c'u ri', ri quinbij in, jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Tataxel chwe.”" 
John13:1 C'ä maja' ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem, ri Jesus reta'm chi xopan ri jok'otaj chi ri are' cuya' can ri uwächulew, cäbe ruc' ri Tataxel. Ri Jesus e u lok'ok'em ri e rech ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew, xebulok'ok'ej c'ä pa ri q'uistajic." 
John13:2 Cätajin c'u cäquitij qui wa re xk'ekal. Ri itzel u yo'm chic pa ranima' ri Judas, u c'ojol ri Simon Iscariot, ri u jachic ri Jesus." 
John13:3 Reta'm ri Jesus chi ri Tataxel e u yo'm chi conojel ri jastak pa u k'ab. Reta'm chi ri are' ruc' ri Dios elinak wi ulok, chi xukuje' cäbe na ruc' ri Dios." 
John13:4 Aretak ri Jesus c'o pa ri mexa che u tijic ri wa, xwalij pa ri wa'im, xresaj ri u k'u', xuc'am jun su't, xuxim xe' u pam." 
John13:5 Xuya' ja' pa jun tzima', xuchaplej qui ch'ajic ri cakan ri u tijoxelab, xebusu' che ri su't ri xuxim xe' u pam." 
John13:6 Xopan c'u ruc' ri Simon Lu'. Ri Lu' xubij che: “Wajaw, ¿la che ri lal quebech'aj la ri wakan?”" 
John13:7 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Camic man aweta'm taj jas ri quinbano. C'äte cach'ob na.” 
John13:8 Xubij ri Lu' che: “Mawi jubik' quech'aj la ri wakan.” Xutzelej u bixic ri Jesus: “We man catinch'ajo, man c'o ta awech wuc'.”" 
John13:9 Ri Simon Lu' xubij che: “Wajaw, man xuwi ta ba' ri wakan, xane' ch'aja' la xukuje' ri e nu k'ab xukuje' ri nu jolom.”" 
John13:10 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Ri jun ri ch'ajom chic, man rajawaxic ta chic chi cäch'ajic, xane' xuwi ri rakan rajawaxic cäch'ajic, ronojel c'ut ch'ajch'oj chic. Ri ix ix ch'ajch'oj chic, man iwonojel ta c'ut.”" 
John13:11 Ri Jesus reta'm jachin ri cäjachow na. Rumal ri' xubij: “Man iwonojel taj ix ch'ajch'oj chic.” 
John13:12 Aretak u ch'ajom chi ri cakan, xuc'am chi ri u k'u', xt'uyi' chi jumul pa ri mexa. Xubij chque ri u tijoxelab: “¿La quich'obo jas ri xinban chiwe?" 
John13:13 Ri ix quibij ‘Kajtij’ chwe, quibij ‘Kajaw’ chwe. Utz ri quibij, in c'u ri'." 
John13:14 We c'u ri in ri in Iwajaw xukuje' Iwajtij xebench'aj ri e iwakan, rajawaxic chi xukuje' ri ix quebich'ajala' tak ri e iwakan, chibil iwib." 
John13:15 Nu yo'm c'u jun c'utbal chiwäch, rech je jas ri nu banom chiwe, je chibana' ix xukuje'." 
John13:16 Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chiwe: Ri pataninel man are ta nim u k'ij chuwäch ri rajaw. Mawi ri takom are ta nim u k'ij chuwäch ri xtakowic." 
John13:17 We iweta'm we jastak ri', ix tewichitalic we quibano." 
John13:18 Man iwonojel taj quixinbij; in weta'm e jachin tak ri e nu cha'om. Cabantaj c'u wa' rech quebe tz'akat ri e tz'ibatalic: ‘Ri cutij rech ri nu caxlanwa, xuwalijisaj rib chwij.’" 
John13:19 Quinbij apan camic chiwe c'ä maja' cäbanic, rech aretak cäbanic, quicoj na chi in." 
John13:20 Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chiwe: Jachin ri cac'amowan ri quintak bic, quinuc'amowaj in; jachin c'u ri quinuc'amowaj in, cuc'amowaj ri xintakow ulok.”" 
John13:21 Aretak xbitaj wa' rumal ri Jesus, xk'oxow ri ranima', xuk'alajisaj, xubij: “Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi jun chiwe quinujach na.”" 
John13:22 E are c'u ri e u tijoxelab xquica'yela' quib, xsach qui c'u'x jachin chrij xbix wi wa'." 
John13:23 Jun chque ri u tijoxelab, ri lok'ok'em rumal ri Jesus, cätajin cawa' pa ri mexa chuxcut ri Jesus." 
John13:24 Ri Simon Lu' xubij che pa etal chi chuta' che jachin ri cubij. 
John13:25 Ri are' xtzali' c'u ocok chuwäch u c'u'x ri Jesus, xuc'ot u chi': “Kajaw, ¿jachinok?”" 
John13:26 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic: “Are' ri' ri quinya' wi ri ch'akap caxlanwa ri quenrubu' chupam ri lak.” Xurub c'u ri ch'akap caxlanwa, xuya' che ri Judas, ri u c'ojol ri Simon Iscariot." 
John13:27 Xuwi c'u xc'amtaj ri caxlanwa rumal ri Judas, ri Satanas xoc bic pa ri ranima'. Are c'u ri Jesus xubij che: “Ri cabano, chabana' chanim.”" 
John13:28 Man c'o ta jun chque ri e c'o pa ri mexa xch'obowic jasche je xubij wa' che. 
John13:29 Rumal rech chi ruc' ri Judas c'o wi ri c'olbal puak, jujun chque xquichomaj chi ri Jesus xubij chi c'o chulok'o' che ri nimak'ij o chque ri mebayib." 
John13:30 Xc'amtaj c'u ri ch'akap caxlanwa rumal ri Judas, chanim xel bic, chak'ab chic." 
John13:31 Aretak c'u elinak chi bic ri Judas, ri Jesus xubij: “Chanim ri' cajuluwirisax na ri Rija'l Winak, xukuje' cajuluwirisax ri Dios rumal ri are'." 
John13:32 We c'u ri Rija'l Winak cuc'ut ri u juluwem ri Dios, xukuje' ri Dios cuc'ut na ri u juluwem ri are'; cuban c'u na chanim." 
John13:33 Alaj tak walc'ual, xa jubik' chic quinc'oji' iwuc'. Quinitzucuj na, jas c'u ri xinbij chque ri aj judeyib: Jawije' ri quinbe wi, ri ix man quixcuin taj quixbe chila'. Je xukuje' quinbij chiwe camic." 
John13:34 Jun c'ac' takomal quinya' chiwe: Chilok'ok'ela' iwib. Je jas ri in ix nu lok'ok'em, xukuje' ri ix chilok'ok'ela' iwib." 
John13:35 Rumal c'u wa' conojel cäquetamaj na chi ix nu tijoxelab, we quilok'ok'ela' iwib.”" 
John13:36 Ri Simon Lu' xubij che: “Kajaw, ¿jawije' cäbe wi la?” Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic: “Ri quinbe wi, man catcuin taj quinaterenej bic camic, c'äte c'u quinaterenej na.”" 
John13:37 Xubij ri Lu' che: “Wajaw, ¿jasche man quincuin ta che ternexic la camic? Quinya' na ri nu c'aslemal rumal ech la.”" 
John13:38 Ri Jesus xubij che: “¿La caya' ta c'u na ri a c'aslemal rumal wech in? Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chawe: C'ä majok cok' ri ama' ec', aretak oxmul cabij na chi man cach'ob ta nu wäch.”" 
John14:1 “Masach ri i c'u'x. Chixcojon che ri Dios, xukuje' chixcojon chwe in." 
John14:2 Cho rachoch ri nu Tat e c'o q'uialaj c'olbal ri quixc'oji' wi. We ta ma ta jeri', nu bim ta ri' chiwe. Quinbe c'ut che u suc'umaxic c'olbal chiwe." 
John14:3 We c'u quinbe che u suc'umaxic c'olbal chiwe, quinpe chi na, quixinc'am c'u na bic wuc', rech jawije' ri quinc'oji' wi, xukuje' ri ix chila' quixc'oji' wi na." 
John14:4 Ri quinbe wi, iweta'm ri be.”" 
John14:5 Xubij ri Max che: “Kajaw, man keta'm taj jawije' ri cabe wi la. ¿Jas ta c'u cäkabano cäketamaj ri be?”" 
John14:6 Ri Jesus xubij che: “In ri' ri be, ri kastzij, ri c'aslemal. Man c'o ta jun copan ruc' ri Tataxel, we ta ma ta wumal in." 
John14:7 We ri ix quich'ob nu wäch in, xukuje' quich'ob na u wäch ri' ri nu Tat. Kas camic quich'ob u wäch ri are', iwilom c'u u wäch.”" 
John14:8 Xubij ri Pelip che: “Kajaw, c'utu' la ri Tataxel chkawäch, cuban c'u wa' chke.”" 
John14:9 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Q'ui k'ij chic in c'o iwuc'. ¿La ma ta a ch'obom nu wäch, Pelip? Jachin ri rilom nu wäch in, rilom u wäch ri Tataxel. ¿Jas c'u che cabij at: ‘C'utu' la ri Tataxel chkawäch?’" 
John14:10 ¿La ma ta cacojo chi ri in xa' in jun ruc' ri Tataxel, xukuje' ri Tataxel xa jun wuc'? Ri tzij ri quinbij chiwe, man quebenbij taj pa we wi. Ri Tataxel ri jekel pa ri in, are' cäbanow ri e u chac." 
John14:11 Chinicojo' chi ri in xa in jun ruc' ri Tataxel xukuje' ri Tataxel xa jun wuc'. We man quixcojonic jeri', chinicojo' rumal ri chac ri quinbano." 
John14:12 Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chiwe: Ri jun ri cäcojon chwe in, are ri' cäbanow na ri chac ri quinban in, cuban c'u na nimak tak jastak chuwäch ri quinban in, rumal rech chi ri in quinbe ruc' ri Tataxel." 
John14:13 Ronojel c'ut ri qui tz'onoj pa ri nu bi', in quinban na, rech rumal ri C'ojolaxel cac'utun ri u juluwem ri Tataxel." 
John14:14 We c'o jas quita' pa ri nu bi', ri in quinban na.”" 
John14:15 “We quinilok'ok'ej, quebinimaj na ri' ri e nu takomal." 
John14:16 In quinbochi'j na ri Tataxel, ri are' cuya' na jun cu'bisal c'uxaj chic chiwe, rech cäc'oji' na iwuc' amak'el." 
John14:17 Are wa' ri Uxlabaxel re ri kastzij. Ri e aj uwächulew man quecuintaj caquic'amowaj, rumal rech chi man cäquil taj mawi queta'm u wäch; are c'u ri ix iweta'm u wäch. Ri are' jekel c'u iwuc', cäc'oji' na pa iwanima'." 
John14:18 Man quixinwonoba' ta canok; Quinpe chi na iwuc'. 
John14:19 Xa jubik' chic, ri winak aj uwächulew man quinquil ta chic. Are c'u ri ix kas quiniwil wi. Rumal rech chi in c'aslic, ri ix xukuje' quixc'asi' na." 
John14:20 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri ix qui ch'ob na chi ri in in c'o pa ri nu Tat; are c'u ri ix, pa ri in; xukuje' c'u ri in pa ri ix." 
John14:21 Jachin ri c'o ri nu takomal ruc', ri u nimam c'ut, are ri' ri quinulok'ok'ej. Jachin c'ut ri quinulok'ok'ej, ri are' cälok'ok'ex na rumal ri nu Tat, ri in quinlok'ok'ej c'u na, quinc'ut c'u na wib chuwäch.”" 
John14:22 Xubij ri Juds che, man are ta ri Iscariot: “Kajaw, ¿Jas c'u che cäc'ut na ib la chkawäch uj, man chquiwäch ta c'u conojel ri winak?”" 
John14:23 Ri Jesus xubij che: “We c'o jachin quinulok'ok'ej, cunimaj ri nu tzij; cälok'ok'ex c'u na rumal ri nu Tat, cujpe c'u na ruc', cujjeki' na ruc'." 
John14:24 Ri man quinulok'ok'ej taj, are jun ri' ri man cunimaj taj ri nu tzij. Ri tzij ri i tom, man wech ta in, xane' rech ri Tataxel ri xinutak ulok." 
John14:25 We jastak ri' nu tzijom chiwe, aretak c'ä in c'o iwuc'." 
John14:26 Ri cucu'bisaj c'uxaj, are' ri Ruxlabal ri Dios, ri cutak na ulok ri Tataxel pa ri nu bi', are ri' quixutijoj na chque conojel ri jastak, cunataj na chiwe ronojel ri nu bim chiwe." 
John14:27 Ri jamaril quinya' can chiwe. Ri nu jamaril quinya' chiwe. Man je ta c'u u ya'ic quinya' chiwe jacha' ri u ya'ic ri caquiya' ri e aj uwächulew. Mäk'oxow ri iwanima', mawi muxe'j rib." 
John14:28 I tom jas ri xinbij chiwe: Quinbec, quinpe c'u iwuc'. We ta quinilok'ok'ej, xixquicot ta ri' chi quinbe ruc' ri Tataxel, rumal rech chi ri Tataxel nim na u k'ij chnuwäch." 
John14:29 Nu bim apan chiwe camic, aretak c'ä majok cäbanic, rech aretak chbanic, quicoj na." 
John14:30 Man quintzijon ta chi na q'ui k'ijol iwuc'. Cätajin c'u copan ri u nimal we uwächulew ri'. Man c'o ta c'u u takanic panuwi' in. 
John14:31 Xane' rech cäquetamaj ri winak aj uwächulew chi ri in quinlok'ok'ej ri Tataxel, jacha' c'u ri takanic ri xuya' ri Tataxel chwe, jeri' quinbano. Chixwalijok, chujel bic waral.”" 
John15:1 “In ri' ri kas juwi' uva, ri nu Tat are' ri josk'inel." 
John15:2 Conojel ri nu k'ab ri man quewächin taj, ri are' queresaj na. Conojel ri nu k'ab ri quewächinic, ri are' quebujosk'ij rech cutakej wächinic." 
John15:3 Ri ix ix josk'im chic rumal ri tzij ri nu tzijom chiwe. 
John15:4 Chitakej u tikic iwib wuc', xukuje' ri in quintakej u tikic wib iwuc'. Jacha' ri jun u k'ab ri juwi' uva man cäcuin taj cäwächin pa rech wi we man tikil che ri u nimal, jeri' xukuje' ri ix man quixcuin taj quixwächinic we man ix tikil chwe." 
John15:5 In ri' ri juwi' uva, ix c'ut ri ix u k'ab. Jachin ri tikil chwe, xukuje' c'u ri in in tikil che, cuya' na q'ui u wächinic. We ta c'u ma ta wumal in ri ix man c'o ta jas quixcuin che u banic." 
John15:6 Jachin ri man tikil ta chwe, are ri' quesax apanok jas jun u k'ab che', cächaki'jar c'u na. Are wa' quemulix c'u na, queq'uiak c'u na pa ri k'ak', ri cänicowic." 
John15:7 We ri ix quixjeki' wuc' rech xa ix jun wuc' xukuje' ri nu tzij cäjeki' pa ri iwanima', chita' apachique ta ne jasach ri quiwaj, cäyataj na chiwe." 
John15:8 We sibalaj quiya' wächinic xukuje' quixux na nu tijoxelab, jeri' ri nu Tat cänimarisax u k'ij." 
John15:9 Jacha' ri Tataxel quinulok'ok'ej, jeri' in xukuje' quixinlok'ok'ej. Chixjekel pa ri lok'ok'ebal nu c'u'x." 
John15:10 We quinimaj ri e nu takomal, quixjeki' na pa ri lok'ok'ebal nu c'u'x, jas ri in xukuje' e nu nimam ri e u takomal ri nu Tat, in jekel pa ri lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x." 
John15:11 We jastak ri' nu tzijom chiwe, rech ri nu quicotemal cäc'oji' na pa ri iwanima', rech ri i quicotemal cätz'akatic." 
John15:12 Are wa' ri nu takomal: Chi chilok'ok'ela' iwib, jacha' ri in ix nu lok'ok'em." 
John15:13 Man c'o ta jun nim na u lok'ok'ebal c'u'x chuwäch wa', chi cuya' ri u c'aslemal che qui q'uexwäch ri rachil." 
John15:14 Ix ri' ri ix wachil, we quibano jas ri quixintak wi." 
John15:15 Man quinbij ta chi pataninel tak wech chiwe. Are c'u ri pataninel man reta'm taj jas ri cuban ri rajaw. Xane' quinbij wachil chiwe. Conojel c'u ri jastak ri nu tom ruc' ri nu Tat nu bim chiwe rech quiwetamaj. 
John15:16 Ri ix man xinicha' taj, xane' ri in xixincha', xixincojo rech quixbec, quiya' wächinic, cäjeki' c'u ri i wächinic, rech ronojel ri qui tz'onoj che ri Tataxel pa ri nu bi', cuya' na chiwe." 
John15:17 Are c'u wa', ri quixintak wi: Chi chilok'ok'ela' iwib.”" 
John15:18 We ri winak aj uwächulew cäquetzelaj i wäch, chiwetamaj chi nabe xquetzelaj nu wäch in." 
John15:19 “We ta ix aj uwächulew, ri winak aj uwächulew queraj ta ri' ri e rech. Man ix ta c'u aj uwächulew, xane' ix nu cha'om chquixo'l ri aj uwächulew. Rumal ri' ri winak re ri uwächulew cäquetzelaj i wäch." 
John15:20 Chnataj chiwe ri tzij ri nu bim chiwe: Ri pataninel man are ta nim u k'ij chuwäch ri rajaw. We ri in xban c'ax chwe, xukuje' ri ix cäban na c'ax chiwe. We inimam ri nu tzij, xukuje' cäquinimaj ri i tzij ix." 
John15:21 Conojel c'u we jastak ri' queban na chiwe rumal rech ri nu bi', rumal rech chi man queta'm ta u wäch ri' ri xinutak ulok." 
John15:22 We ta ma ta xinpetic, we ta ma ta xintzijon cuc', ma ta c'o qui mac ri'. Camic c'ut man c'o ta esbal quib pa ri qui mac." 
John15:23 Jachin ri caquetzelaj nu wäch in, xukuje' cäquetzelaj u wäch ri nu Tat." 
John15:24 We ta ma ta e nu banom tak ri chac chquixo'l ri man c'o ta jun chic banowinak, ma ta c'o qui mac ri'. Camic c'ut quilom chic ri nu chac, xukuje' cäquetzelaj nu wäch xukuje' cäquetzelaj u wäch ri nu Tat." 
John15:25 Cabantaj c'u wa' rech quetz'akatisax na ri tzij ri tz'ibatal chupam ri qui pixab: Xquetzelaj nu wäch, man c'o ta jasche." 
John15:26 Aretak c'u cäpe ri cucu'bisaj c'uxaj, ri quintak na ulok chiwe, ri aj nu Tat, ri Uxlabaxel aj kastzij ri quel ulok ruc' ri nu Tat, are' ri' cuk'alajisaj na chwij." 
John15:27 Xukuje' ri ix quixk'alajisan na, rumal rech chi ix c'olinak c'u wuc' kas pa ri tiquiritajic.”" 
John16:1 “We jastak ri' nu tzijom chiwe, rech man quixtzak taj." 
John16:2 Quixesax na bic pa tak ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Cäpe c'u na ri k'ij, aretak apachin ri quixquicämisaj, cäquichomaj wa' chi patanijic wa' che ri Dios." 
John16:3 We jastak ri' quequiban na, rumal rech chi man cäquich'ob ta u wäch ri Tataxel, mawi cäquich'ob nu wäch in." 
John16:4 Are c'u we jastak ri' nu tzijom chiwe, rech aretak copan we k'ijol, cänataj na chiwe chi nu bim chi ulok chiwe. We jastak ri' man xinbij ta chiwe kas pa ri tiquiritajic, rumal rech chi c'ä in c'o iwuc'.”" 
John16:5 “Chanim ri' quinbe ruc' ri' ri xinutak ulok. Man c'o ta c'u jun chiwe cäc'otow nu chi': ‘¿Jawije' ri cabe wi la?’ 
John16:6 Xane' rumal rech chi nu tzijom we jastak ri' chiwe, xnojisax ri iwanima' che bis." 
John16:7 Ri in c'ut quinbij ri kastzij chiwe: Are c'o quiwechbej na chi quinbec. We ta c'u ma ta quinbec, ri Cucu'bisaj i C'u'x man cäpe ta ri' iwuc'. We c'u quinbec, quentaka ulok ri are' iwuc'." 
John16:8 Aretak cäpe ri are', culuc'utu' na chquiwäch ri winak re e aj uwächulew ri qui mac, ri suq'uilal xukuje' ri k'atan tzij." 
John16:9 Ri macaj cac'utun na rumal rech chi man quecojon ta chwe in; 
John16:10 ri suq'uilal, chiquinbe ruc' ri Tataxel, man quiniwil ta chi c'ut," 
John16:11 ri k'atan tzij, chi c'okotajinak chic ri catakan puwi' we uwächulew ri'." 
John16:12 C'ä c'o q'ui jastak wuc' che u bixic chiwe. Camic c'ut man quixcuin taj che qui ch'ijtajic. 
John16:13 Aretak c'ut cäpe ri Uxlabaxel ri kastzij, are quelc'amow na i be pa ronojel ri kastzij. Man queltzijon ta c'u na pa re wi, xane' culutzijoj na ri cutatabej, quebulutzijoj na chiwe ri jastak ri quepe na." 
John16:14 Ri are' cunimarisaj na nu k'ij, rumal rech chi cuc'am c'u na ulok rech ri wech in, culutzijoj na chiwe." 
John16:15 Ronojel ri c'o ruc' ri Tataxel, wech in. Rumal c'u wa' xinbij chiwe chi cuc'am na ulok rech ri wech in, culutzijoj na chiwe.”" 
John16:16 Xa' jubik' cäraj man quiniwil ta chic, coc'ow c'u na jubik' quiniwil chi na.”" 
John16:17 Jujun c'ut chque ri u tijoxelab xquibila' chbil quib: “¿Jas wa' ri cubij chke?: ‘Xa' jubik' cäraj, man quiniwil ta chic, coc'ow c'u na jubik', quiniwil chi na.’ ¿Jas wa' ri cubij?: ‘Quinbe ruc' ri Tataxel.’ ”" 
John16:18 Xquibij: “¿Jas wa' ri cubij: ‘Ri xa jubik'’? Man keta'm taj jas ri cutzijoj.” 
John16:19 Reta'm ri Jesus chi cäcaj quequita' jujun jastak che, xubij c'u chque: “¿La cätajin quichomaj rij chixo'l ri xinbij?: ‘Xa' jubik' cäraj man quiniwil ta chic’, jumul chic, ‘coc'ow c'u na pa jubik' quiniwil chi na’." 
John16:20 Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi quixok' na, quiban na ok'ej, e are c'ut ri winak aj uwächulew quequicot na. Pune' c'u ri ix ix c'o pa bis, ri i bis caq'uextaj na pa quicotemal." 
John16:21 Aretak jun ixok quealc'ualanok, c'o u bis, petinak c'u ri u k'ijol. Aretak ralam chi c'u ri ac'al, ri u c'axc'olil man cänataj ta chi che, rumal rech ri u quicotemal chi xalax jun ac'al cho ri uwächulew." 
John16:22 Xukuje' ri ix camic c'o i bis. Quinwil chi c'u na i wäch jumul, cäquicot c'u na ri iwanima', ri man c'o ta c'u jun quesan ta na chiwe." 
John16:23 Pa ri k'ij ri' man c'o ta chi quic'ot wi na nu chi'. Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chiwe, chi ronojel ri quitz'onoj che ri Tataxel pa ri nu bi', cuya' na chiwe." 
John16:24 C'ä camic man c'o ta jas i tz'onom che pa ri nu bi'. Chixtz'ononok, quic'am c'u na rech cätz'akatisax ri i quicotemal.”" 
John16:25 “Are c'u we jastak ri' nu tzijom chiwe pa tak c'ambal no'j. Cäpe ri k'ij aretak man quixinch'abej ta chic pa tak c'ambal no'j, xane' chi sakil quintzijoj na ri Tataxel chiwe." 
John16:26 Pa ri k'ij ri' quixtz'onom na pa ri nu bi' man quinbij ta chiwe, chi ri in quinbochi'j na ri Tataxel piwi'," 
John16:27 kas are' c'u ri Tataxel quixulok'ok'ej, rumal rech chi inilok'ok'em i cojom c'ut chi xinel ulok ruc' ri Dios." 
John16:28 Xinel ulok ruc' ri Tataxel, xinul cho ri uwächulew. Xukuje' quinya' can ri uwächulew, quinbe ruc' ri nu Tat.”" 
John16:29 Xquibij c'ut ri u tijoxelab che: “Chilampe la, camic kas catzijon la chi sakil, man c'o ta jun c'ambal no'j cäbij la." 
John16:30 Camic cakach'obo chi eta'm la conojel ri jastak. Chi man cajwataj taj chi c'o jachin cuban c'otoj chi'aj che la. Rumal wa' cäkacojo chi lal elinak ulok ruc' ri Dios.” 
John16:31 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic chque: “¿La je ba ri' chi quixcojon camic? 
John16:32 Chiwilampe', cäpe ri jok'otaj, opaninak c'ut, aretak ri ix quituquij na iwib, chijujunal quixbe pa tak ri i c'olbal, quiniya' na can nu tuquiel. Man xa' ta c'u nu tuquiel in c'olic, c'o ri Tataxel wuc'." 
John16:33 We jastak ri' nu tzijom chiwe, rech quirik jamaril chupam ri u junaxic iwib wuc'. Pa ri uwächulew quirik na c'axc'olil. Chijiquiba' ba' i c'u'x, ri in in ch'äcaninak puwi' ri uwächulew.”" 
John17:1 Aretak ri Jesus u bim chi we jastak ri', xca'y chicaj, xubij: “Tat, petinak chic ri jok'otaj. Chnimarisaj la u k'ij ri C'ojol la, rech xukuje' ri C'ojol la cunimarisaj na ri k'ij la." 
John17:2 Je jacha' ri yo'm la takanic pa u k'ab puwi' conojel winak, rech cuya' junalic c'aslemal chque conojel ri e yo'm la che." 
John17:3 Are c'u wa' ri junalic c'aslemal: Chi cäquich'ob wäch la, xuwi ri lal kas Dios, xukuje' cäquich'ob u wäch ri Jesucrist, ri takom la ulok." 
John17:4 Ri in xinnimarisaj ri k'ij la cho ri uwächulew. Xintz'akatisaj ri chac ri xya' la chwe rech quinbano. 
John17:5 Camic c'ut, Tat, chnimarisaj la nu k'ij chxcut la ruc' ri juluwem ri xc'oji' wuc', aretak c'ä majok ri uwächulew." 
John17:6 Nu k'alajisam ri bi' la chquiwäch ri winak ri e cha'om la chquixo'l ri winak ri e aj uwächulew che quiya'ic chwe. E ech la nabe, xeya' c'u la chwe, quinimam c'ut ri tzij la." 
John17:7 Camic queta'm chi ronojel ri yo'm la chwe, uc' la elinak wi ulok," 
John17:8 ri tzij ri yo'm la chwe, ri in nu yo'm chque. Qui c'amom c'ut, kastzij queta'm chi uc' la xinel wi ulok, qui cojom chi ri lal xintak la ulok." 
John17:9 Ri in quinbochi'n che la paquiwi'. Man quinbochi'n ta paquiwi' ri winak re ri uwächulew, xane' quinbochi'n paquiwi' ri e yo'm la chwe, rumal rech chi e ech la." 
John17:10 Ronojel ri wech, ech la; xukuje' ri ech la, wech; ri nu juluwem cäc'utun cumal quech." 
John17:11 In man quinbeytaj ta chic cho ri uwächulew. Ri e are' quebeytaj na cho ri uwächulew, ri in quinbe uc' la. Suc'alaj nu Tat, chec'olo' la ri e are' pa ri bi' la ri e yo'm la chwe, rech quebux xa' e jun, e jacha' ri uj xa' uj jun." 
John17:12 Aretak xinc'oji' cuc', xebenchajij pa ri bi' la ri xeya' la chwe, xebenbechajij. Man c'o ta jun chque xsach qui wäch, xane' xuwi ri ralc'ual sachbal wäch, rech cäbantajic jas ri cubij ri Tz'ibatalic." 
John17:13 Chanim quinbe uc' la. Quintzijoj we jastak ri' cho ri uwächulew, rech cäc'oji' ri nu quicotemal cuc' ri e are', cätz'akatisax ri nu quicotemal pa ri canima'." 
John17:14 Ri in nu yo'm ri tzij la chque. Ri winak aj uwächulew xquetzelaj qui wäch, rumal rech chi man e aj uwächulew taj, jas ri in xukuje' man in aj uwächulew taj." 
John17:15 Man quinbochi'n ta che la chi quebesaj la cho ri uwächulew, xane' quinbochi'n che la chi quechajij la chuwäch ri etzelal." 
John17:16 Man e aj uwächulew taj, jas ri in xukuje' man in aj uwächulew taj." 
John17:17 Chetasa' che la rumal ri kastzij. Ri tzij la are ri kastzij. 
John17:18 Jacha' ri nu takic ulok umal la cho ri uwächulew, ri in xukuje' xebentak bic chquixo'l ri e aj uwächulew." 
John17:19 Rumal quech ri e are' nu tasom wib chbil wib, rech xukuje' ri e are' quetastaj rumal ri kastzij." 
John17:20 Man xuwi ta quinbochi'n che la paquiwi' ri e are', xane' xukuje' quinbochi'n paquiwi' ri quecojon na chwe rumal ri qui tzij ri e are'," 
John17:21 rech conojel xa' e jun. Jas ri lal, Tat, ri lal c'o la wuc' in, xukuje' ri in in c'o uc' la, rech xukuje' ri e are' e c'o kuc' uj, rech ri winak aj uwächulew cäquicojo chi ri lal xintakow la ulok." 
John17:22 Ri in nu yo'm chque e are' ri juluwem ri yo'm la chwe, rech ri e are' xa' e jun, je jas ri uj xa' uj jun." 
John17:23 Ri in in c'o cuc' are', xukuje' ri lal lal c'o wuc' in, rech kas quebux xa' e jun, rech ri winak aj uwächulew cäquetamaj chi lal xintakow la ulok, cäquetamaj chi e lok'ok'em la je jas ri nu lok'ok'exic umal la." 
John17:24 Tat, lal xeyo'w la chwe, quinwaj c'ut chi quec'oji' wuc' jawije' ri quinec'ola wi, rech cäquil ri nu juluwem ri yo'm la. In lok'ok'em c'u la aretak c'ä majok ri u tiquiritajic ri uwächulew." 
John17:25 Suc'alaj Tataxel, ri winak aj uwächulew man cäquich'ob ta wäch la. Ri in c'ut quinch'ob wäch la. We winak ri' queta'm chi ri lal xintakow la ulok." 
John17:26 Ri in nu yo'm retamaxic ri bi' la chque, quinbij chi c'u na chque, rech ri lok'ok'ebal c'u'x la chwe cäc'oji' na cuc' are' xukuje' rech quinc'oji' in cuc' are'.”" 
John18:1 Aretak xebitaj we jastak ri' rumal ri Jesus, xel bic xerachilaj bic ri u tijoxelab. Xebe ch'käp che ri alaj nima' Sedron, chila' c'o wi jun ticonijibal. Chila' xeboc wi ri Jesus e rachil ri e u tijoxelab." 
John18:2 Ri Judas ri cäjachow na, reta'm we c'olbal ri'. Q'ui mul c'ut ri Jesus curika' rib cuc' ri u tijoxelab chila'." 
John18:3 Are c'u ri Judas xebuc'am ulok jumulaj ajch'ojab xukuje' jujun pataninelab ri e takom ulok cumal ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri pariseyib. Xebopan chila', cuc'am chäj, c'olbal tak k'ak', xukuje' tak ch'ojibal." 
John18:4 Ri Jesus reta'm chic conojel ri jastak ri petinak chrij, xel apan chquiwäch ri winak, xubij chque: “¿Jachin quitzucuj?”" 
John18:5 Xquibij che: “Cäkatzucuj ri Jesus aj Nazaret.” Ri Jesus xubij chque: “In ri'.” Ri Judas, ri jachal re, tac'al cuc' ri winak." 
John18:6 Aretak xubij chque, “In ri',” xquijic' quib chquij, xetzak pa ulew." 
John18:7 Ri Jesus xuta' chi jumul chque: “¿Jachin quitzucuj?” Ri e are' xquibij: “Ri Jesus aj Nazaret.” 
John18:8 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Xinbij chiwe chi in ri'. We in c'ut quinitzucuj, chiya' chque we niq'uiaj ri' chi cheboj.”" 
John18:9 Je xubij rech catz'akat na ri tzij ri u bim canok: “Ri winak ri xeya' la chwe, man c'o ta jun xintzak chque.”" 
John18:10 Are c'u ri Simon Lu' c'o jun u ch'ich'. Xujusij chupam ri rij, xuch'ay ri pataninel rech ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, xuquet apan ri u xiquin re ri u wiquiak'ab. Ri pataninel ri' Malc u bi'." 
John18:11 Xubij ri Jesus che ri Lu': “Chanima' ri a ch'ich' chupam ri rij. Ri kumubal re c'axc'olil ri u yo'm ri Tataxel chwe, ¿la ma ta quinkumuj na?”" 
John18:12 E are' c'u ri juk'at ajch'ojab, ri qui nimal, xukuje' ri e pataninel que ri aj judeyib xquichap ri Jesus, xquiyutu." 
John18:13 Nabe xquic'am bic chuwäch ri Anas, rumal rech chi are u ji' ri Caipas, ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob pa ri junab ri'." 
John18:14 Are c'u ri Caipas yowinak qui no'j ri aj judeyib, chi are c'o quechbex na chi jun winak cäcämic che qui q'uexwäch conojel ri winak." 
John18:15 Ri Simon Lu' xukuje' jun tijoxel chic xuterenej ri Jesus. Are c'u ri tijoxel ri' etamatal u wäch rumal ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob. Xoc c'u bic cho ri uwo rachoch ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ruc' ri Jesus. 
John18:16 Are c'u ri Lu' xtaq'ui' can chuchi' ri u chi' be. Xel c'u ulok ri tijoxel ri etamatal u wäch rumal ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, xuch'abej ri ali ri chajil u chi' be, xroquisaj bic ri Lu'." 
John18:17 C'äte ri' ri ali ri chajil u chi' be xubij che ri Lu': “¿La ma ta xukuje' ri at at jun chque ri u tijoxelab we achi ri'?” Ri Lu' xubij: “Man in taj.” 
John18:18 Ri e lok'om pataninelab xukuje' ri e to'banelab qui banom chi jun k'ak', e tac'atoj chila'. Cätajin cäquimik' quib, rumal rech chi c'ax tew. Xukuje' ri Lu' tac'al cuc', cumik' rib." 
John18:19 Ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xuc'ot u chi' ri Jesus chquij ri u tijoxelab xukuje' chrij ri u tijonic. 
John18:20 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Ri in xebentijoj conojel ri winak chi sakil. Amak'el xebentijoj chupam ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab xukuje' pa ri rachoch Dios, jawije' cäquimulij wi quib conojel ri aj judeyib. Man c'o ta c'u jas nu tzijom chi c'uyal." 
John18:21 ¿Jasche cäc'ot la nu chi' in? Are c'ato' la qui chi' ri winak ri qui tom ri nu tzij, jas ri nu tzijom chque. Ri e are' queta'm jas ri nu bim.”" 
John18:22 Aretak xbitaj wa' rumal, jun chque ri pataninelab, ri tac'alic, xupak'ij jun k'ab che ri u palaj ri Jesus, xubij: “¿La je catzelej u bixic wa' che ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob?”" 
John18:23 Ri Jesus xubij che: “We c'o itzel tzij xinbij, chak'alajisaj ba' ri etzelal. We c'u kastzij ri xinbij, ¿jasche quinach'ayo?”" 
John18:24 Yutum c'u ri Jesus, ri Anas xutak bic chuwäch ri Caipas, ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob." 
John18:25 Ri Simon Lu' tac'alic cumik' rib. Xbix c'u che: “¿La ma ta xukuje' ri at at jun chque ri u tijoxelab?” Ri are' xresaj rib chupam, xubij: “Man in taj.”" 
John18:26 Jun chque ri e pataninel rech ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, ralaxic ri xquet apan u xiquin rumal ri Lu', xubij che: “¿La ma ta xatinwil ruc' chupam ri ticonijibal?”" 
John18:27 Jumul chic ri Lu' xresaj rib chupam. Chanim ri ama' ec' xok'ic. 
John18:28 Xquesaj c'u bic ri Jesus chuwäch ri Caipas, xquic'am bic pa ri nim ja re k'atbal tzij, sakarem c'u cubano. Ri e are' man xeboc ta chupam ri nim ja re k'atbal tzij rech man cäquitz'ilobisaj ta quib. Rech cuya' caquitij ri Oc'owem." 
John18:29 Xel c'u ulok ri Pilat chquiwäch, xubij: “¿Jas ri qui tzujuj wi we achi ri'?”" 
John18:30 Xquitzelej u bixic che: “We ta ma ta jun banal etzelal we achi ri', ma ta ka jachom wa che la.”" 
John18:31 Xubij c'u ri Pilat chque: “Chic'ama' bic ix, chik'ata' tzij puwi' jas ri cubij ri i pixab.” Are c'u ri aj judeyib xquibij che: “Awas chke uj we cäkacämisaj jachin jun.”" 
John18:32 Jewa' xtz'akat ri u bim ri Jesus, ri u bim che u k'alajisaxic jas ri u wäch ri cämical curik na." 
John18:33 C'äte ri' ri Pilat xoc chi bic pa ri nim ja re k'atbal tzij, xusiq'uij ulok ri Jesus, xubij che: “¿La at ri Cajawinel ri aj judeyib?”" 
John18:34 Ri Jesus xubij che: “¿La cäbij la wa' pa ech wi la, o e jule' chic quibim wa' che la?”" 
John18:35 Ri Pilat xutzelej u bixic che: “¿La in pu aj judey? Ri e a winak re ri nim a tinimit xukuje' ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xatquijach pa nu k'ab. ¿Jas c'ut ri a banom?” 
John18:36 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Ri wajawibal man aj uwächulew taj. We ta aj uwächulew ri wajawibal, ri e pataninel wech quech'ojin ta ri' che u k'atixic chi ma ta quinquiyut ri aj judeyib. Are c'u ri wajawibal man aj waral taj.”" 
John18:37 Xubij c'u ri Pilat che: “¡At ba' ajawinel!” Ri Jesus xubij che: “Lal cabin la chi in ajawinel. Che wa' xinalax wi, che wa' in ulinak wi cho ri uwächulew, rech quink'alajisaj ri kastzij. Conojel ri e aj kastzij cäquita' ri nu ch'abal.”" 
John18:38 Xubij ri Pilat che: “¿Jas ri' ri kastzij?” Xuwi xbitaj wa' rumal, ri Pilat xel chi bic jumul chquiwäch ri aj judeyib, xubij chque: “Ri in man c'o ta jun etzelal quinrik chrij." 
John18:39 Ri ix ix nak'atalic chi pa ri nimak'ij rech ri Oc'owem quintzokopij bic jun ajpache' chiwe. ¿La quiwaj c'ut chi quintzokopij bic ri Cajawinel ri aj judeyib?” 
John18:40 Xquirak chi qui chi' jumul, xquibij: “Man are' ta wa', xane' are ri Barabas.” Ri Barabas c'ut are' jun nimalaj banal eläk'." 
John19:1 Ri Pilat xuc'am ri Jesus, xtakan che u rapuxic." 
John19:2 Ri ajch'ojab xquiban jun corona re q'uix, xquicoj chujolom. Xquicoj jun morato atz'iak chrij." 
John19:3 Xekeb chuwäch, xquibij: “¡Nim u k'ij ri Cajawinel ri aj judeyib!” Xquipak'ij k'ab che ri u palaj." 
John19:4 Ri Pilat xel chi bic jumul, xubij chque: “Chiwilampe', quinc'am ulok chiwäch, rech quiwetamaj chi man c'o ta jun etzelal quinrik chrij.”" 
John19:5 C'äte ri' xel ulok ri Jesus, u cojom chi ri corona re q'uix xukuje' ri morato atz'iak chrij. Ri Pilat xubij chque: “¡Chiwilampe' ri achi!”" 
John19:6 Aretak ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri e pataninelab xquilo, xquirak qui chi', xquibij: “¡Charipa' la! ¡Charipa' la!” Ri Pilat xubij chque: “Chic'ama' bic ix, chiripa'. Are c'u ri in man c'o ta jun etzelal quinrik chrij.”" 
John19:7 Ri aj judeyib xquibij che: “Ri uj c'o ka pixab. Cubij c'u ri ka pixab chi rajawaxic cäcämic, rumal rech chi xuban rib chi u C'ojol ri Dios.”" 
John19:8 Ri Pilat, aretak xuta' we tzij ri', sibalaj xuxe'j chi na rib chuwäch ri nabe." 
John19:9 Xoc chi bic jumul pa ri nim ja re k'atbal tzij, xubij che ri Jesus: “¿At aj jawije'?” Ri Jesus man c'o ta xutzelej u bixic che." 
John19:10 Are c'u ri Pilat xubij che: “¿La man c'o ta catzelej u bixic chwe? ¿La ma ta c'o nu takanic che a tzokopixic, xukuje' c'o nu takanic che ri a ripic?”" 
John19:11 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic che: “Ma ta c'o takanic la ri' panuwi', we ta ma ta cäyataj che la rumal ri Dios. Rumal ri', c'o na nim u mac ri jun ri xinujach pa k'ab la.”" 
John19:12 Kas chi' c'ut, ri Pilat cutzucuj u tzokopixic. Ri aj judeyib xquirak qui chi', xquibij: “We catzokopij la we achi ri', man junam ta wäch la ruc' ri ajawinel Sesar. ¡Conojel ri cäquiban quib chi e ajawinelab, e are ri' caquiban qui c'ulel che ri Sesar!”" 
John19:13 Ri Pilat, aretak xuta' we tzij ri', xuc'am bic ri Jesus, xt'uyi' puwi' ri cäk'at wi tzij chupam ri c'olbal ri u binam Lajom Abaj che (pa ri ch'abal hebrey: “Gabat”)." 
John19:14 Are c'u ri k'ij wa' aretak cäsuc'umax ronojel che ri nimak'ij Oc'owem, chunakaj ri niq'uiaj k'ij. Ri Pilat xubij chque ri aj judeyib: “¡Chiwilampe' ri iwajawinel!”" 
John19:15 Ri e are' xquirak qui chi': “¡Chc'ama' la bic! ¡Chc'ama' la bic! ¡Chripa' la cho jun ripibal!” Ri Pilat xubij chque: “¿La quinrip ta c'ut ri iwajawinel?” Ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xquibij che: “Man c'o ta kajawinel, xuwi' ri Sesar.”" 
John19:16 C'äte ri' ri Pilat xujach ri Jesus pa qui k'ab che u ripic. Xquic'am c'u bic ri Jesus. 
John19:17 Ri are' xutelej bic ri u ripibal, xel bic. Xebe pa ri c'olbal ri cäbix “U C'olbal ri u Bakil Jolomaj” che; ri pa hebrey cäbix “Golgota” che." 
John19:18 Chila' xquirip wi, xukuje' e quieb chic ruc': jujun pa jujun u xcut, ri Jesus pa qui niq'uiajil." 
John19:19 Ri Pilat xtakan che u tz'ibaxic jun bi'aj ri xcoj puwi' ri je cubij wa': “Jesus aj Nazaret, Cajawinel ri aj judeyib.”" 
John19:20 E q'ui chque ri aj judeyib xquisiq'uij ri tz'ibatalic ri', rumal rech chi chunakaj ri tinimit c'o wi ri c'olbal ri xrip wi ri Jesus. Tz'ibatal c'ut pa ri ch'abal hebrey, pa latin, xukuje' pa grieg." 
John19:21 Ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri aj judeyib xquibij che ri Pilat: “Matz'ibaj la ‘Cajawinel ri aj judeyib’, xane' tz'ibaj la chi ‘Are' xbinic: In cajawinel ri aj judeyib’.”" 
John19:22 Ri Pilat xubij chque: “Ri nu tz'ibam, ri tz'ibatalic cacanajic.”" 
John19:23 Ri ajch'ojab, aretak qui ripom chic ri Jesus, xequic'am ri ratz'iak, quiejeb xquiban wi, jujun que ri ajch'ojab. Xquic'am xukuje' ri u pam ratz'iak. Are c'u ri u pam ratz'iak man c'o ta u t'isel, xa jun u quemic banom ajsic c'ä iquim." 
John19:24 Ri ajch'ojab xquibila' c'ut chquibil tak quib: “Mäkajixo, xane' chujtaklebenok, rech cäkilo jachin quechbenic.” Jewa' ri u tz'akatisaxic ri Tz'ibatalic ri je cubij wa': “Xquijach ri watz'iak chquiwäch, xquitaklebej c'u rij ri u pam watz'iak.” Are wa' ri xquiban ri ajch'ojab." 
John19:25 Chunakaj c'ut ri u ripibal ri Jesus tac'al wi ri u nan, xukuje' ri rachalal ri u nan, ri Mariy rixokil ri Cleops, xukuje' ri Mariy Magdalen." 
John19:26 Ri Jesus, aretak xril ri u nan xukuje' ri tijoxel ri sibalaj lok' chuwäch chi tac'al chunakaj, xubij che ri u nan: “Chuchu', chawilampe' ri awal.”" 
John19:27 Chanim xubij chi che ri u tijoxel: “Chawilampe' ri a nan.” Kas pa ri jok'otaj ri' ri tijoxel xuc'am bic cho rachoch. 
John19:28 Oc'owinak chi c'u wa', reta'm ri Jesus chi ronojel tz'akatinak chic, rech c'u catz'akat ri Tz'ibatalic, xubij: “Cächaki'j nu chi'.”" 
John19:29 C'o c'u jun lak chila' nojinak che ch'amalaj u wa'l uva. Xquimu' jun wo's pa ri ch'amalaj u wa'l uva, xquiya' chrij jun u k'ab ri k'ayes re hisop, xquiya' ak'an chuchi'." 
John19:30 Aretak xutz'ub ri ch'amalaj u wa'l uva, ri Jesus xubij: “Xtz'akatic.” Xupachba' ri u jolom, xcämic." 
John19:31 Ri aj judeyib xquibochi'j ri Pilat chi chek'ajisax ri qui ch'ec ri e c'o cho tak ri ripibal, chebesax c'ut. Je xquibij wa' rumal rech chi are' ri k'ij aretak cäsuc'umax ronojel che ri nimak'ij Oc'owem, man cäcaj ta c'ut chi quecanaj ta can ri cuerp cho tak ri ripibal pa ri k'ij re uxlanem, nimalaj k'ij c'u ri k'ij re uxlanem ri'." 
John19:32 Xepe c'u ri ajch'ojab, xequik'ajisaj ri e u ch'ec ri nabe, xukuje' xequik'ajisaj ri e u ch'ec ri jun chic ri xerip ruc' ri Jesus." 
John19:33 Aretak xebopan c'u ruc' ri Jesus, xquilo chi cäminak chic, man xequik'ajisaj ta ri e u ch'ec." 
John19:34 Jun c'ut chque ri ajch'ojab xujut bic ri u tz'imaj ch'ich' pa ri u c'alc'a'x, chanim xel ulok quic' ruc' ja'." 
John19:35 Ri xilowic are cäk'alajisanic, kastzij ri u k'alajisanic. Reta'm c'u ri are' chi cubij ri kastzij, rech xukuje' ri ix quixcojonic." 
John19:36 Xebantaj c'u we jastak ri' rech cätz'akatisax ri Tz'ibatalic: “Man c'o ta bak cäk'ajisax na che.” 
John19:37 Xukuje' cubij chi jun Tz'ibatalic: “Cäquil na ri xquijulupij.” 
John19:38 E oc'owinak chi c'u we jastak ri', xpe ri Jose aj Arimatey. Ri are' u tijoxel ri Jesus, xa' chi c'uyal rumal rech chi cuxe'j rib chquiwäch ri aj judeyib. Ri Jose xubochi'j ri Pilat chi cuya' che chi cäresaj bic ri u cuerp ri Jesus. Xuya' c'u ri Pilat che. C'äte ri' xbe ri Jose, xresaj ri u cuerp ri Jesus." 
John19:39 Xukuje' xbe ri Nicodem, ri nabe xpe can ruc' ri Jesus chak'ab. Ri are' ruc'am ulok jun cunabal, are mir yujum ruc' aloe, cäraj c'o jun quintal." 
John19:40 Xquic'am c'u ri u cuerp ri Jesus, xquibotz' pa sak tak atz'iak cuc' ri c'oc'alaj tak cunabal, jas ri qui nak'atisabal ri aj judeyib che ri mukunajic." 
John19:41 Pa ri c'olbal ri' ri xrip wi ri Jesus, c'o jun ticonijibal. Pa ri ticonijibal c'o jun c'ac' mukubal, ri c'ä maja' c'o jachin yo'm chupam." 
John19:42 Chila' c'u xquiya' wi ri Jesus, rumal rech chi are' ri k'ij aretak ri aj judeyib quisuc'umaj ronojel che ri nimak'ij Oc'owem. Nakaj c'u c'o wi ri mukubal ri'." 
John20:1 Pa ri nabe k'ij re ri seman, ri Mariy Magdalen sibalaj ak'ab xbe chuchi' ri mukubal aretak c'ä maja' cäsakaric. Xrilo chi esam chic ri abaj chuchi' ri mukubal." 
John20:2 C'äte ri' xbe c'u aninak, xopan cuc' ri Simon Lu' xukuje' ri jun tijoxel chic, ri lok' chuwäch ri Jesus, xubij chque: “C'amom bic ri Kajaw xesax bic chupam ri jul, man keta'm taj jawije' yo'm wi.”" 
John20:3 Xebel ulok ri Lu' ruc' ri jun tijoxel chic, xebe chuchi' ri mukubal." 
John20:4 Ri e quieb junam cätajin quexiq'uinic. Are c'u ri jun tijoxel chic aninak xxiq'uin na chuwäch ri Lu', nabe xopan chuchi' ri mukubal." 
John20:5 Xpachi' che rilic, xeril ri sak tak atz'iak ri e yo'm can chila'. Man xoc ta c'u bic." 
John20:6 Chanim xopan ri Simon Lu' u terenem, xoc bic chupam ri mukubal, xeril ri sak atz'iak ri e yo'm can chila'." 
John20:7 Ri su't, ri xc'oji' chujolom, man c'o ta can cuc' ri sak tak atz'iak, xane' botz'talic yo'm can pa jun c'olbal chic." 
John20:8 C'äte ri' xoc bic xukuje' ri jun tijoxel chic, ri nabe xopan chuchi' ri mukubal, xrilo, xcojonic." 
John20:9 C'ä maja' c'u cäquich'ob ri Tz'ibatalic, chi rajawaxic chi ri Jesus cäc'astaj na chquixo'l ri cäminakib." 
John20:10 C'äte ri' ri tijoxelab xebel bic, xetzelej chi jumul cho ja." 
John20:11 Are c'u ri Mariy tac'al chunakaj ri mukubal, cok'ic. Cätajin cok'ic, xpachi' che rilic ri u pam ri mukubal." 
John20:12 Xeril quieb tako'n aj caj, sibalaj sak ri catz'iak, e t'uyut'oj, jun pa u jolom, jun pa rakan ri xc'oji' wi ri u cuerp ri Jesus." 
John20:13 Ri e are' xquibij che: “Chuchu', ¿jasche catok'ic?” Ri Mariy xubij chque: “Xc'am bic ri Wajaw; man weta'm ta c'ut jawije' yo'm wi.”" 
John20:14 Xbitaj wa' rumal, xutzolk'omij rib chrij, xril ri Jesus tac'alic. Man reta'm ta c'ut chi are' ri Jesus." 
John20:15 Xubij ri Jesus che: “Chuchu', ¿jasche cok' la? ¿Jachin ri catzucuj la?” Ri Mariy xuchomaj chi are' ri chajinel re ri ticonijibal, xubij c'u che: “Tat, we lal xc'amow la bic, bij la chwe jawije' yo'm wi la, quinc'am c'u bic.”" 
John20:16 Xubij ri Jesus che: “¡Mariy!” Ri are' xutzolk'omij rib, xubij che pa hebrey: “¡Raboni!” ri je quel cubij wa', “¡Ajtij!”" 
John20:17 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Minachapo, c'ä maja' c'u quinpaki' ruc' ri Tataxel. Jät cuc' ri wachalal, chabij chque: ‘Quinpaki' ruc' ri nu Tat, xukuje' i Tat, ruc' ri nu Dios, xukuje' i Dios.’ ”" 
John20:18 Xbe ri Mariy Magdalen, xuya' u bixic chque ri tijoxelab chi xril ri Ajawaxel, chi are' xbin we jastak ri' che." 
John20:19 Pa ri xk'ekal re ri k'ij ri', ri nabe k'ij re ri seman, qui mulin quib ri tijoxelab. E tz'apitz'oj ri e u chi' tak ja rumal rech chi cäquixe'j quib chquiwäch ri aj judeyib. Te c'u ri' xpe ri Jesus, xtaq'ui' pa qui niq'uiajil, xubij chque: “Chc'ol ri jamaril iwuc'.”" 
John20:20 Xbitaj wa' rumal, xebuc'ut ri u k'ab chquiwäch, xuc'ut ri u c'alc'a'x chquiwäch. Ri tijoxelab xequicotic aretak xquil ri Cajaw." 
John20:21 Xubij chi c'u jumul ri Jesus chque: “Chc'ol ri jamaril iwuc'. Jacha' ri Tataxel xinutak ulok in, je xukuje' ri in quixintak bic ix.”" 
John20:22 Xbitaj wa' rumal, xwupinic, xubij chque: “Chic'ama' ri Ruxlabal ri Dios." 
John20:23 Jachin tak ri quebicuy ri qui mac, quecuyatajic; jachin tak c'ut ri man quebicuy ta wi, man quecuyutaj taj.”" 
John20:24 Are c'u ri Max, jun chque ri cablajuj, ri cäbix “Yo'x” che, man c'o ta apan cuc' aretak xopan ri Jesus." 
John20:25 Ri niq'uiaj tijoxelab xquibij che: “Kilom ri Kajaw.” Xubij c'u ri Max chque: “We man quebenwil ri quetal ri clawux chque ri u k'ab, we man quinnim ri u wi' nu k'ab pa ri qui c'olbal ri clawux, we man quinnim ri nu k'ab pa ri u c'alc'a'x, man quincoj taj.”" 
John20:26 Oc'owinak chic wajxakib k'ij, jumul chic e c'o ri u tijoxelab pa ri ja, xukuje' ri Max c'o cuc'. Pune' e tz'apitz'oj ri e u chi' ri ja, xopan ri Jesus, xtaq'ui' pa qui niq'uiajil, xubij: “Chc'ol jamaril iwuc'.”" 
John20:27 Xubij c'u che ri Max: “Tasaj, chacojo ri u wi' a k'ab waral, chebawila' ri nu k'ab. Tasaj, chanima' ri a k'ab pa ri nu c'alc'a'x. Maquieblaj a c'u'x. Chatcojonok.”" 
John20:28 Ri Max xubij che: “¡Wajaw, xukuje' nu Dios!”" 
John20:29 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Max, ¿la rumal rech chi xinawilo, xatcojonic? E tewichital ri man caquil taj, quecojon c'ut.”" 
John20:30 Chquiwäch ri u tijoxelab, ri Jesus xukuje' xuban niq'uiaj q'ui mayibal chic, q'ui etal xubano, ri man e tz'ibam ta chupam we wuj ri'." 
John20:31 E tz'ibam c'u wa' rech quicojo chi ri Jesus are' ri Crist, u C'ojol ri Dios, rech aretak quicojo, cäc'oji' i c'aslemal pa ri u bi'." 
John21:1 Bantajinak chi c'u wa', ri Jesus jumul chic xuc'ut rib chquiwäch ri u tijoxelab chuchi' ri cho aj Tibers. Je c'u u c'utic rib wa' xubano:" 
John21:2 E c'o ri Simon Lu', ri Max ri cäbix “Yo'x” che, ri Natanael ri aj Cana re Galiley, xukuje' ri e u c'ojol ri Zebedey, e cachil quieb tijoxelab chic. Conojel junam e c'olic." 
John21:3 Xubij ri Simon Lu' chque: “Quinbe che qui chapic cär.” Xquibij ri rachil che: “Xukuje' ri uj cujbe awuc'.” Xebel bic, xeboc bic chupam ri jucub. Pa ri chak'ab ri', man e c'o ta cär xequichapo." 
John21:4 Pa ri u sakaric xuc'ut rib ri Jesus chuchi' ri cho. Are c'u ri e u tijoxelab man queta'm taj chi are' ri Jesus. 
John21:5 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Alabom, ¿la man c'o ta e i cärim?” Ri e are' xquibij che: “Man c'o taj.”" 
John21:6 Ri are' xubij apan chque: “Chiq'uiaka' ri c'at pa ri u wiquiak'ab ri jucub, c'o c'u quirik na.” Xquiq'uiak c'ut, man xecuin ta chic che u juruxic, rumal quech ri q'uialaj cär." 
John21:7 Are c'u ri tijoxel, ri lok'ok'em rumal ri Jesus, xubij che ri Lu': “¡Are' ri Kajaw!” Ri Simon Lu', aretak xuto chi are' ri Ajawaxel, xucoj ri ratz'iak, rumal rech chi ch'analic, xuq'uiak rib pa ri cho." 
John21:8 Are c'u ri niq'uiaj tijoxelab chic xepe pa ri alaj jucub, cäquijuruj c'u ri jun c'at cär. Man naj ta c'u e c'o wi che ri ulew, cäraj xa' quiejeb o job c'am." 
John21:9 Aretak c'u xebopan pa ulew, xquil jun k'ak', yo'm cär puwi' ruc' caxlanwa." 
John21:10 Xubij ri Jesus chque: “Chebic'ama' ulok niq'uiaj chque ri cär ri xechaptaj iwumal camic.” 
John21:11 Xpaki' bic ri Simon Lu', xujuruj ri c'at cho ri ulew, nojinak che cär nimak, jun sient cawinak oxlajuj (153). Pune' sibalaj e q'ui, man xt'okopitaj taj ri c'at." 
John21:12 Xubij ri Jesus chque: “Tisaj, chixwok.” Man c'o ta jun chque ri e u tijoxelab ri xuchajij ta anima' xuc'ot ta u chi': “¿Jachin ri lal?” Queta'm c'ut chi are' ri Ajawaxel." 
John21:13 Xpe c'u ri Jesus, xuc'am ri caxlanwa, xuya' que, xukuje' xuya' que ri cär." 
John21:14 Are' wa' ri urox mul u c'utic rib ri Jesus chquiwäch ri u tijoxelab, aretak c'astajinak chic chquixo'l ri cäminakib." 
John21:15 Tijtajinak chi ri qui wa, ri Jesus xubij che ri Simon Lu': “Simon, u c'ojol ri Jonas, ¿la sibalaj quinalok'ok'ej na chquiwäch wa'?” Ri Lu' xubij che: “Je', Wajaw, eta'm la chi lal quinlok'ok'ej.” Ri Jesus xubij che: “Chebayuk'uj ri alaj tak nu chij.”" 
John21:16 Ri Jesus xubij chi che chucamul: “Simon, u c'ojol ri Jonas, ¿la sibalaj quinalok'ok'ej?” Ri Lu' xubij che: “Je', Wajaw, eta'm la chi calok'ok'ex la wumal.” Ri Jesus xubij che: “Chebayuk'uj ri nu chij.”" 
John21:17 Ri Jesus xubij chi che churoxmul: “Simon, u c'ojol ri Jonas: ¿la quinalok'ok'ej?” Xbison ri Lu' rumal rech chi xubij che churoxmul: “¿La quinalok'ok'ej?” Xubij c'u che ri Jesus: “Wajaw, lal eta'm la conojel, eta'm la chi lal quinlok'ok'ej.” Ri Jesus xubij che: “Chebayuk'uj ri nu chij." 
John21:18 “Kastzij, kastzij quinbij chawe: Aretak c'ä at jun ala, cacoj ri awatz'iak, caxim ri a pas chbil awib, catbinic jawije' ri cawaj wi. Aretak c'u catri'jobic, quebayuk na ri a k'ab, jun chic catatziakin na, catuc'am na bic jawije' ri man cawaj ta wi.”" 
John21:19 Aretak ri Jesus xubij wa', xuya' retamaxic jas ri cämical ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Lu' che u juluwirisaxic ri Dios. Aretak xbitaj wa', xubij chi na che: “¡Chinaterenej!.”" 
John21:20 Aretak xutzolk'omij rib ri Lu', xril ri tijoxel ri lok'ok'em rumal ri Jesus chi teren ulok. Are ri tijoxel ri t'uyul chuxcut ri Jesus pa ri wa'im re xk'ekal, ri xbin che: “Kajaw, ¿jachin c'u ri' ri cajachow na la?”" 
John21:21 Ri Lu', aretak xril ri are', xubij che ri Jesus: “Ajawaxel, ¿e c'u wa' jas ri cuc'ulmaj na?”" 
John21:22 Ri Jesus xubij che: “We quinwaj chi ri are' cäc'asi na canok c'ä quinpe na, ¿jas awe at che? Chinaterenej at.”" 
John21:23 Xel we tzij ri' chquixo'l ri achalaxelab, chi ri tijoxel ri' man cäcäm taj. Ri Jesus c'ut man xubij ta che chi man cäcäm taj. Xane' xubij: “We quinwaj chi ri are' cäc'asi na canok c'ä quinpe na, ¿jas awe at che?”" 
John21:24 Are wa' ri tijoxel ri xek'alajisan we jastak ri', ri xetz'ibam we jastak ri'. Keta'm c'ut chi ri u k'alajisanic are kastzij." 
John21:25 Xukuje' e c'o q'ui niq'uiaj jastak chic ri xebuban ri Jesus. We ta quetz'ibax chquijujunal, quinchomaj chi ronojel ri uwächulew man cubana' ta che c'olbal que ri wuj ri quetz'ibax ta wi na." 
Acts1:1 Tat Teopilo, chupam ri nabe nu wuj ri xintz'ibaj wi ronojel ri xuban ri Jesus xukuje' ri tijonic ri xuya'o pa ri chapletajic." 
Acts1:2 C'ä pa ri k'ij c'ut ri xpaki' chicaj. Aretak xbec, u yo'm chi can takanic, rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios, chque ri e u takomxenlab ri e u cha'om, jas ri rajawaxic cäquibano." 
Acts1:3 Aretak elinak chi chupam ri c'ax ri xuriko, c'aslic xutac'aba' rib chquiwäch. Q'ui jastak xuban cuc' rech cäquetamaj chi kastzij c'aslic. Cawinak (40) k'ij xuc'utula' rib chquiwäch, xutzijola' ri rajawibal ri Dios chque." 
Acts1:4 Aretak c'ä c'o cuc' ri takomxenlab, ri Jesus xuya' u bixic chque chi mebel bic pa Jerusalen. Xubij chque: “Chiweyej na chi catz'akat na ri chi'nic ri xuban ri nu Tat chiwe ri nu yo'm u bixic chiwe." 
Acts1:5 Kastzij chi ri Xuan xebuban qui bautism ri winak pa ri ja'. Are' c'u ri ix quixcoj na pa ri Ruxlabal ri Dios pa quieb oxib k'ij.” 
Acts1:6 Aretak qui mulin quib, ri tijoxelab xquita' che ri Jesus: “Kajaw, ¿la cäya'c chi na la ri ajawibal che ri Israel pa tak we k'ij ri'?”" 
Acts1:7 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Man ya'tal ta chiwe ix quiwetamaj jampa' mawi jachique k'ij quebuban na ri Tataxel ri jastak, xuwi ri are' c'o u takanic che qui banic." 
Acts1:8 Aretak c'u chpe ri Ruxlabal ri Dios piwi', quic'am na cuinem quixel c'u na bic che u ya'ic k'alajisanic chwij, pa Jerusalen pa ronojel ri ulew re Judey xukuje' pa Samar, xukuje' c'u pa tak ri tinimit ri sibalaj naj e c'o wi cho ronojel ri uwächulew.”" 
Acts1:8 Aretak c'u chpe ri Ruxlabal ri Dios piwi', quic'am na cuinem quixel c'u na bic che u ya'ic k'alajisanic chwij, pa Jerusalen pa ronojel ri ulew re Judey xukuje' pa Samar, xukuje' c'u pa tak ri tinimit ri sibalaj naj e c'o wi cho ronojel ri uwächulew.”" 
Acts1:9 Xbitaj c'u wa' rumal, aretak ri e u tijoxelab cätajin queca'y che, c'äte xquilo xwalijisax ri Jesus. Xc'am bic rumal jun sutz', xsach bic chquiwäch pa ri caj." 
Acts1:10 Naj c'u qui wi' che ri u bic ri Jesus chicaj. Quieb c'u achijab xetac'atob chquiwäch, sakloloj ri catz'iak qui cojom." 
Acts1:11 Xquibij c'u chque: “Achijab aj galileyib, ¿jasche cätajin quixca'y chicaj? We Jesus ri' ri xc'am bic ajsic chiwäch pa ri caj, je jas ri xiwilo xbe chicaj, je cuban na wa' aretak cäpe chi na.”" 
Acts1:12 Ri takomxenlab xebel bic chupam ri qui juyubal tak ri u Che'al Aseitun, xetzelej bic pa Jerusalen. Ri qui juyubal tak ri u Che'al Aseitun nakaj c'o wi che ri Jerusalen, be ri cäban pa jun k'ij re uxlanem ri cuya' ri pixab." 
Acts1:13 Aretak xeboc bic, xepaki' pa ri cawik ja jawije' ri e c'olinak wi. E are' wa ri Lu', ri Xuan, ri Santiag, ri Trix, ri Pelip, ri Max, ri Bartolome, ri Matey, ri Santiag u c'ojol ri Alpey, ri Simon re ri Juk'at Selotib, xukuje' ri Juds rachalal ri Santiag." 
Acts1:14 Conojel c'u wa' xa' jun qui chomanic, amak'el cäquiban ch'awem ruc' Dios, cäquibochi'j. E cachil ri ixokib ruc' ri Mariy u nan ri Jesus xukuje' ri e rachalal." 
Acts1:15 E c'o q'ui cojonelab qui mulin quib, cäraj ne jun sient ruc' juwinak (120). Pa tak ri k'ij ri' xtaq'ui' ri Lu' chquixo'l ri achalaxelab, xubij chque:" 
Acts1:16 “Kachalal, rajawaxic cäbantaj na jas cubij ri Tz'ibatalic, ri xubij can ri Ruxlabal ri Dios pa u chi' ri David, chrij ri Judas ri xc'amow qui be ri xeyutuw ri Jesus." 
Acts1:17 Ri Judas are' kachil canok, xya' che chi cuban we chac ri'." 
Acts1:18 Ri xtojbex rech ri retzelal are xlok'obex jun ch'akap ulew. Ch'iquilic xkajic, xt'okopij pa u niq'uiajil, xel ulok ronojel ri rixco'l." 
Acts1:19 Conojel ri e aj Jerusalen xquetamaj wa'. Jeri' chi ri ch'akap ulew ri' ‘Aseldama’ u bi', pa ri qui ch'abal. Je quel cubij wa', ‘Ulew re Quic'’." 
Acts1:20 Tz'ibatal c'u chupam ri wuj que ri Salm: ‘Chi ri rachoch chjamajob canok, c'o c'u jun mäc'oji' chupam.’ Cubij c'ut xukuje': ‘Jun chi c'ut chcanaj chupam ri u c'olbal.’" 
Acts1:21 Waral e c'o achijab kuc' ri xec'oji' kuc' pa conojel tak ri jok'otaj ri xc'oji' ri Ajawaxel Jesus chkaxo'l," 
Acts1:22 e kachil kas aretak xc'utun ri Jesus aretak xban ri u bautism rumal ri Xuan c'ä xpaki' na chicaj. Rajawaxic c'ut chi jun chque wa' cujunamaj rib kuc' che u bixic chque ri winak chi kastzij xc'astaj ri Jesus.” 
Acts1:23 Xequitac'aba' quieb achijab chquiwäch: ri Jose ri cäbix Barsabas che (ri xukuje' cäbix Just che), xukuje' ri Matiys." 
Acts1:24 Xquiban ch'awem ruc' Dios, xquibij: “Lal, Kajaw, ri eta'm la ri canima' conojel, c'utu' la chkawäch jachin chque we quieb ri' cächa' la," 
Acts1:25 rech cuban we chac ri', rech coc che takom. Rumal rech chi ri Judas xuban itzel chac, xuya' can we chac ri', rech cäbe pa ri u c'olbal.”" 
Acts1:26 Xquiq'uiak c'u taklebenic, puwi' c'ut ri Matiys xkaj wi ri taklebenic. Xujunamaj c'u rib cuc' ri e julajuj takomxenlab." 
Acts2:1 Aretak xopan ri nimak'ij re Cawinak Lajuj K'ij, conojel ri cojonelab junam qui wäch, qui mulin quib kas xa' pa jun c'olbal." 
Acts2:2 Xak c'ätetal, xtataj jun nimalaj jininem chicaj jas ri re jun nimalaj quiakik' ri cäjumumic. Xunojisaj ronojel ri ja ri e c'o wi." 
Acts2:3 Xquic'utuxtaj quib ak'aj ri e je ta ne e rech k'ak' chquiwäch, ri quijachalan tak quib paquiwi'." 
Acts2:4 Conojel c'ut xenojisax che ri Ruxlabal ri Dios, xquichaplej tzijonic pa jule' tak ch'abal chic, jas ri xuya' ri Uxlabaxel chque chi quech'aw wi." 
Acts2:5 E c'o c'u aj judeyib pa Jerusalen pa tak ri k'ij ri' ri queniman che u k'ijilaxic ri Dios, ri e petinak pa tak conojel tinimit re ri uwächulew." 
Acts2:6 Aretak xtataj wa', xquimulij quib ri q'uialaj winak. Xquimayo rumal rech chi chquijujunal cäquito chi quetzijon pa tak ri kas qui ch'abal." 
Acts2:7 Conojel xsach qui c'u'x, xquimayo, xquibij: “Chiwilampe'. ¿La ma ta aj galileyib conojel we winak ri' ri quetzijonic?" 
Acts2:8 ¿Jas c'u che quekata' chi quech'aw pa tak ri ka ch'abal ri xujtijox wi ulok kas pa ri ch'utinal? 
Acts2:9 E c'o aj Partiy chkaxo'l, e c'o aj Med, e c'o aj Elam, aj Mesopotam, aj Judey, aj Capados, aj Pont, xukuje' aj Asiy," 
Acts2:9 E c'o aj Partiy chkaxo'l, e c'o aj Med, e c'o aj Elam, aj Mesopotam, aj Judey, aj Capados, aj Pont, xukuje' aj Asiy," 
Acts2:10 e c'o aj Prij, aj Panpil, xukuje' aj Ejipt. E c'o ri quepe pa tak c'olbal pa Aprica ch'käp che ri Siren. E c'o jujun aj Rom ri e petinak waral," 
Acts2:11 jujun chque e are' aj judeyib, jujun chque qui c'amom ri qui cojonic ri aj judeyib. E c'o aj Cret xukuje' aj Arab. Konojel c'ut quekato chi cäquitzijoj pa tak ka ch'abal ri nimak tak mayibal ri e u banom ri Dios.”" 
Acts2:12 Conojel xquimayo, xsach qui c'u'x, xquibila' chquibil quib: “¿Jas quel wa'?”" 
Acts2:13 Niq'uiaj winak chic cäquitze'j qui wäch, xquibij: “¡Xa' e k'abarelab!”" 
Acts2:14 Are c'u ri Lu' xtaq'ui' cuc' ri e julajuj takomxenlab, co xch'awic, xebuch'abej ri winak, xubij chque: “Aj judeyib, xukuje' conojel ri e jekel pa Jerusalen, chetamaj alak wa', chtatabej alak ri nu tzij." 
Acts2:15 We achijab ri' man e k'abarelab taj, jas ri cachomaj alak. C'äte u chaplem ri ubelej jok'otaj." 
Acts2:16 Xane' are wa' ri bim can rumal ri Joel ri k'axal tzij, aretak xubij:" 
Acts2:17 ‘Cac'ulmataj na chi pa ri q'uisbal tak k'ij, cächa ri Dios, quinjamij na ri Wuxlabal paquiwi' conojel ri winak. Ri e i c'ojol xukuje' ri e i mia'l quequik'axej na ri nu tzij chque ri winak, ri c'a e ac'alab quequil na c'utwächinic, ri e ri'jab quebichic' tak na." 
Acts2:18 Xukuje' quinjamij na ri Wuxlabal paquiwi' ri e pataninel tak wech chi achijab chi ixokib, pa tak ri k'ij ri', quequik'axej na ri nu tzij." 
Acts2:19 Quebenc'ut na mayibal ajsic pa ri caj, xukuje' quebenc'ut na etal iquim cho ri uwächulew, quic' ruc' k'ak' xukuje' sutz' re sib." 
Acts2:20 Ri k'ij cäk'ekumar na, ri ic' cux na quic'. C'ä maja' c'ut cäpe ri u k'ij ri Ajawaxel, nimalaj k'ij ri cajuluwic." 
Acts2:21 Conojel c'ut ri cäquinataj ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel, quecolotaj na.’" 
Acts2:22 Alak aj israelib, chtatabej alak we tzij ri': Ri Jesus aj Nazaret, are jun achi c'utum chwäch alak rumal ri Dios. Ri Dios xebuban mayibal, cajmajibal xukuje' etal chxo'l alak rumal ri Jesus, jas ri eta'm alak." 
Acts2:23 Ri are' xjach pa k'ab alak je jas ri u chomam ulok ri Dios, rumal ri u bim ulok ojer chi rajawaxic cäbantaj na. Ri alak xk'at alak tzij puwi', xcämisaj alak, xrip cho jun ripibal cumal itzel tak winak." 
Acts2:24 Are c'u ri Dios xuc'astajisaj, xutzokopij chupam ri k'oxowem re ri cämical. Rumal rech chi ri cämical man xcuin taj xuchap canok." 
Acts2:25 Je jas ri xubij ulok ri David chrij ri Jesus: ‘In quinwil amak'el ri Ajawaxel c'o chnuwäch. C'o pa ri nu wiquiak'ab, rech man c'o ta jas quinslabenic." 
Acts2:26 Rumal wa' ri wanima' xquicotic, sibalaj xquicot ri wak', xukuje' ri nu cuerp c'o na cu'lbal u c'u'x." 
Acts2:27 Man quinya' ta c'u can chupam ri mukbal, man cäya' ta la c'olbal chi cäk'ay ri u cuerp ri suc'alaj pataninel ech la." 
Acts2:28 Xintijoj la che ri be re c'aslemal, quinnojisaj na la che quicotemal, rumal ri c'olem la wuc'.’" 
Acts2:29 Wachalal, cuya' quinbij chech alak chi sakil chi ri David ri ka mam ojer, xcämic xukuje' xmukic ri xmuk wi c'ä c'o camic chkaxo'l." 
Acts2:30 Are c'u ri David k'axal tzij, xukuje' reta'm chi ri Dios u banom ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na pa ri u bi' chi jun chque ri e rija'lil cucoj na che ajawinel." 
Acts2:31 Ri David nabe canok xrilo jas ri cäc'ulmataj na. Xubij chi ri Crist cäc'astaj na. Xubij chi man cäcanaj ta wa' chupam ri mukbal mawi cäk'ay na ri u cuerp. 
Acts2:32 We Jesus ri' xc'astajisax rumal ri Dios. Konojel c'u uj xkilo chi xc'astajic. 
Acts2:33 Ri Jesus xwalijisaxic rech quet'uyul pa ri u wiquiak'ab ri Dios, xuc'am c'u che ri Tataxel ri Ruxlabal ri Dios ri chi'm ulok, ri xujachala' ri are'. Are' wa' ri ilom alak xukuje' e tatabem alak." 
Acts2:34 Man are' ta c'ut ri David ri xpaki' chicaj are' c'ut xbinic: ‘Xubij ri Ajawaxel che ri Wajaw: Chatt'uyul pa nu wiquiak'ab," 
Acts2:35 c'ä quinban na chi ri qui banom qui c'ulel chawe quebux e u tac'alibal ri e awakan.’ 
Acts2:36 Chretamaj ba' ronojel ri tinimit Israel, ruc' jicomal chi kas are we Jesus ri', ri xrip alak, ri Dios u banom Ajawaxel che xukuje' Crist.”" 
Acts2:37 Aretak xquita' wa', xk'oxow canima', xquibij c'u che ri Lu' xukuje' chque ri e niq'uiaj takom chic: “Kachalal tak, ¿jas c'u ri rajawaxic cäkaban na?”" 
Acts2:38 Ri Lu' xutzelej u bixic chque: “Chq'uexa' c'u'x alak, chban c'ut ri bautism alak pa ri u bi' ri Jesucrist chjujunal alak, chuc'utic chi e cuyutajinak chic ri mac alak, cäc'am c'u alak ri cochinic ri are' ri Ruxlabal ri Dios." 
Acts2:39 We chi'nic ri' chech alak xchi'x wi xukuje' chque ri e alc'ual alak, xukuje' chque conojel ri e c'o naj ri u bixic, chque conojel jachin tak ri quebusiq'uij ri Ajawaxel ri ka Dios.”" 
Acts2:40 Ri Lu' xubij niq'uiaj tzij chic chque ri winak. Naj xtzijon cuc'. Xebupixbej, xubij: “¡Tasa' ib alak chquij we itzel tak winak ri'!”" 
Acts2:41 Je c'u ri' ri xquic'amowaj ri u tijonic, xban c'ut ri bautism; craj c'u ne e c'o oxib mil winak xetikitaj chque ri cojonelab pa ri k'ij ri'." 
Acts2:42 Co c'u xec'oji' conojel chupam ri qui tijonic ri takomxenlab, xukuje' xec'oji' pa ri comonic chquixo'l, cäquipir c'u ri caxlanwa junam, xukuje' cäquimulij quib cäquiban ch'awem." 
Acts2:43 Conojel ri winak xquixe'j quib. Xeban q'ui mayibal xukuje' etal cumal ri takomxenlab. 
Acts2:44 Ri xecojonic kas qui junam quib quequijachala' c'ut ri jastak quech chquixo'l. 
Acts2:45 Quequic'ayila' tak ri culew xukuje' ri c'o cuc' caquijach c'u ri rajil chquiwäch jas ri u cholajil ri rajawaxic chque chquijujunal. 
Acts2:46 Ronojel k'ij quequimulij quib pa ri rachoch Dios, xa' junam qui chomanic, cäquipirila' ri caxlanwa cho tak cachoch, junam cäquic'amala' quech ri wa ruc' quicotemal, ruc' ch'ajch'ojalaj canima'." 
Acts2:47 Cäquinimarisaj u k'ij ri Dios. Utz quebil wi cumal conojel ri winak; k'ij c'ut chi k'ij ri Ajawaxel quebutik che ri comon cojonelab ri quecolotajic. 
Acts3:1 C'o c'u jun k'ij, ri Lu', rachil ri Xuan junam cätajin quebopan pa ri rachoch Dios pa ri urox jok'otaj benak'ij, are jok'otaj wa' ri cäban ch'awem ruc' Dios." 
Acts3:2 Catelex ulok jun achi ri ch'oco'j ulok kas pa ri u c'u'x ri u nan. Ronojel k'ij quelyok can chuchi' ri rachoch Dios, chuchi' ri oquibal ri cäbix “Je'lic” che. Cutz'onoj u cochinic chque ri winak ri quebopan pa ri rachoch Dios." 
Acts3:3 Aretak xeril ri Lu' xukuje' ri Xuan chi oquem cäquiban chupam ri rachoch Dios, xutz'onoj u cochinic chque." 
Acts3:4 Ri Lu' xukuje' ri Xuan xeca'y che. Xubij c'u ri Lu' che: “Chatca'y chke.” 
Acts3:5 Ri achi xca'y chque, are pa u c'u'x chi c'o caya' che." 
Acts3:6 Ri Lu' xubij che: “Sak puak, k'an puak man c'o ta wuc'. Are c'u ri c'o wuc' quinya' chawe: pa ri u bi' ri Jesucrist aj Nazaret, chatwalijok, chatbinok.”" 
Acts3:7 Ri Lu' xuchap che ri u k'ab re u wiquiak'ab, xuwalijisaj. Chanim xecowir ri rakan xukuje' ri u kul tak rakan." 
Acts3:8 Ri ch'oco'j xtaq'ui'c, xch'oplenic, xbinic. Junam xoc cuc' pa ri rachoch Dios. Cätajin cäbinic ruc' ri kas rakan, cäch'oplenic, cunimarisaj u k'ij ri Dios." 
Acts3:9 Conojel ri winak ri xquilo chi ri achi cäbinic, xquilo chi cunimarisaj u k'ij ri Dios." 
Acts3:10 Cäquich'ob c'u u wäch chi are wa' ri cät'uyi' che u tz'onoxic u cochinic chuchi' ri oquibal pa ri rachoch Dios, ri u binam Je'lic. Sibalaj xquimayo, xsach qui c'u'x rumal rech ri xbantajic." 
Acts3:11 Ri ch'oco'j ri xcunaxic e u chapom ri Lu' xukuje' ri Xuan. Conojel ri winak xexiq'uinic, xebe cuc' pa ri u rakan ja ri Salomon. Conojel xemayinic." 
Acts3:12 Ri Lu', aretak xril wa', xebuch'abej ri winak: “Achijab aj israelib, ¿jasche camay alak wa'? ¿Jasche caca'y alak chke, je ta ne ri rumal ta ri ka chuk'ab uj o rumal ta ri ka nimanic che ri Dios xkabano chi cäbin we achi ri'?"
