1Corinthians4:17 Rumal wa' xintak bic ri Timotey iwuc', ri lok'alaj nu c'ojol, jic chrij ri Ajawaxel. Ri are' cunataj na chiwe jas ri nu banom pa ri nu c'aslemal pa ri cojonic che ri Crist Jesus, jas ri nu tijonic chquixo'l conojel ri comon cojonelab pa tak conojel c'olbal." 
1Corinthians4:18 E c'o jujun quetzelam quib, je ta ne ri ma ta quinopan chi na iwuc'." 
1Corinthians4:19 Quinbe chanim iwuc', we jeri' ri u rayibal ri Ajawaxel. Quinwetamaj c'u na jas quecuin che u banic ri quetzelam quib, man xuwi ta ri qui tzij." 
1Corinthians4:20 Ri rajawibal c'ut ri Dios man xak ta tzijtzotem, xane' cuinem." 
1Corinthians4:21 ¿Jas ri quiwaj? ¿La quinbe iwuc' ruc' xic'ay pa nu k'ab o ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj xukuje' ch'uch'ujalaj uxlabal? 
1Corinthians5:1 Kastzij xtatajic chi c'o jun chiwe cuban macunic cuc' ixokib, c'o c'u ri rixokil ri u tat ruc'. Ri mac ri' mawi ne cäquiban ri man aj judeyib taj." 
1Corinthians5:2 Ri ix c'ut i nimarisam iwib. Ri are ta ne quixbisonic, iwesam ta c'u ne chixo'l ri xbanow we etzelal ri' chixo'l." 
1Corinthians5:3 Are c'u ri in, pune' man in c'o iwuc' pa ri cuerp, in c'o c'u iwuc' pa ri wuxlabal. Je ta ne ri in c'o iwuc' nu k'atom chi tzij puwi' ri jun ri je u banom wa'." 
1Corinthians5:4 Chimulij ba' iwib pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel Jesus, ri in quinc'oji' na iwuc' pa ri wuxlabal, xukuje' ri u cuinem ri Kajaw Jesus cäc'oji' na iwuc'." 
1Corinthians5:5 Chijacha ba' ri achi ri' pa u k'ab ri Satanas rech cäsach u wäch ri u cuerp, cäcolotaj c'u na ri ruxlabal pa ri u k'ij ri Ajawaxel Jesus." 
1Corinthians5:6 Man utz ta ri u nimarisaxic iwib. ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi ri jubik' ch'am cuch'amarisaj ronojel ri k'or? 
1Corinthians5:7 Chiwesaj ba' ri ojer ch'am, rech quixux c'ac' k'or, ri man c'o ta ch'am ruc', je jas ri i banic. Ri ka chij re ri oc'owem are ri Crist, ri xcäm che tabal tok'ob cho ri Dios rumal kech." 
1Corinthians5:8 Je c'u ri', chkabana' ri nimak'ij re ri oc'owem, man ruc' ta ri ojer ch'am, mawi ruc' ri ch'am re etzelal, re u banic itzel tak jastak. Xane' chkabana' ruc' caxlanwa ri man c'o ta ch'am ruc'. Man ruc' ta quieb kanima', xane' ruc' kastzij." 
1Corinthians5:9 Xintz'ibaj bic chiwe pa ri wuj chi rajawaxic quitas iwib chquij ri quemacun cuc' ixokib achijab. 
1Corinthians5:10 Man quinbij ta c'ut chi quitas iwib chquij ri winak aj uwächulew ri quemacun cuc' ixokib achijab, o ri cäquirayij ri jastak que niq'uiaj winak chic, o ri eläk'omab, o ri quequik'ijilaj tak diosib. We ta jeri', rajawaxic ta ri' quixel bic cho ri uwächulew." 
1Corinthians5:11 Ri nu tz'ibam bic chiwe, chi rajawaxic quitas iwib chrij ri jun ri ruc'am ri bi'aj aj achalal, we c'u cuban macunic cuc' ixokib achijab, o we curayij ri jastak que niq'uiaj winak chic, o we quebuk'ijilaj tak diosib, o we cäyok'onic, o we cäk'abaric, o we eläk'om. Ri je u banic wa', mixwa' ne ruc'." 
1Corinthians5:12 ¿La quink'at lo tzij in paquiwi' ri man e cojonelab taj? ¿La ma ta rajawaxic are quik'at tzij paquiwi' ri e cojonelab chic? 
1Corinthians5:13 Are c'u ri winak ri man e cojonelab taj, are ri Dios ri' cäk'atow na tzij paquiwi'. Chiwesaj ba' ri ajmac ri' chixo'l." 
1Corinthians6:1 We c'o jun chiwe, c'o u ch'o'j ruc' jun chic, ¿la cucoch' lo cäbe chquiwäch ri man e cojonelab taj che u ta'ic k'atbal tzij? ¿La ma ta are utz cäbe chquiwäch ri winak re ri u tinimit ri Dios che u ta'ic k'atbal tzij?" 
1Corinthians6:2 O ¿la ma ta iweta'm chi ri winak aj Dios cäquik'at na tzij paquiwi' ri winak re ri uwächulew? We cäk'at na tzij paquiwi' ri winak re ri uwächulew iwumal, ¿la ma ta quixcuin che u k'atic tzij paquiwi' ri jastak ri man nimak ta qui banic?" 
1Corinthians6:3 ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi cäkak'at na tzij paquiwi' ri tako'n aj chicaj? ¡E ta c'u lo ri jastak re we c'aslemal ri'! 
1Corinthians6:4 We c'o i ch'o'j chquij ri jastak re we c'aslemal ri', ¿jasche quita' k'atbal tzij chque ri winak ri man e jun ta chquixo'l ri cojonelab?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Quinbij wa' rech quixq'uixic. ¿La ma ta c'o jun ri c'o u no'j chixo'l, ri cäcuin che u k'atic tzij chquixo'l ri kachalal?" 
1Corinthians6:6 ¡Man xuwi ta quech'ojin jujun achalaxelab cuc' jujun chic xane' caquic'am bic ri qui ch'o'j chquiwäch ri e man cojonelab taj! 
1Corinthians6:7 Are jun tzakmajic wa' chiwe we quic'am bic ri i ch'o'j chquiwäch ri k'atal tak tzij. ¿La ma ta utz na quich'ij ri c'ax ri cäban chiwe? ¿La ma ta utz na quicuyu' pune' ta queläk'ax ri jastak iwe? 
1Corinthians6:8 Ri ix c'ut man utz ta ri quibano, rumal rech chi ix iwachalal iwib quiban c'ax xukuje' quiban eläk' chbil tak iwib." 
1Corinthians6:9 ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi ri winak man e suc' taj man cäquechbej ta ri rajawibal ri Dios? Mixsubutajic. Ri quebanow macunic cuc' ixokib achijab, mawi ri quequik'ijilaj tak diosib, mawi ri quekaj pa mac cuc' niq'uiaj chic, mawi ri achijab ri cäquiban quib chi e ixokib, mawi ri achijab ri cäquiban ixok che jun cach achi," 
1Corinthians6:10 mawi ri eläk'omab, mawi ri cäquirayij ri jastak que niq'uiaj winak chic, mawi ri quek'abaric, mawi ri queyok'onic, mawi ri cäquimaj jastak que niq'uiaj winak chic, conojel wa' man cäquechbej ta ri rajawibal ri Dios." 
1Corinthians6:11 E c'o c'u jujun chiwe e je tak wa' nabe canok. Camic c'ut ix ch'ajtajinak chic, banom chi tastalic tak winak chiwe, ix k'alajisam chic chi ix suc' chuwäch ri Dios pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist, rumal ri Uxlabal re ri ka Dios." 
1Corinthians6:12 Ronojel ya'tal chwe quinbano, man ronojel ta c'ut c'o quechbex che. Ronojel ya'tal chwe quinbano, man c'o ta c'u jun jasach quinya' ta wib pa u k'ab." 
1Corinthians6:13 Ri ka wa, che ri ka pam; ri ka pam, che ri ka wa. We quieb jasach ri' cäsach na qui wäch rumal ri Dios. Man ya'tal ta c'u chque ri winak chi cäquicoj ri qui cuerp che u banic macunic cuc' ixokib achijab. Ri ka cuerp c'o u patan che ri Ajawaxel, ri Ajawaxel c'o u patan che ri ka cuerp." 
1Corinthians6:14 Ri Dios ri xc'astajisan ri Ajawaxel, xukuje' are cujc'astajisan na uj ruc' ri u cuinem." 
1Corinthians6:15 ¿La ma ta iweta'm ix chi ri i cuerp u tz'akatil ri u cuerp ri Crist? ¿La quinc'am ta c'ut in we ri u tz'akatil we cuerp ri' ri rech ri Crist quinban ta c'u u tz'akatil ri u cuerp ri jun ixok quech nim ch'utin? Man je ta ri'. 
1Corinthians6:16 O ¿la ma ta iweta'm chi apachin ri cätuni' ruc' jun ixok quech nim ch'utin, xa e jun cuerp chic? Cubij ri Tz'ibatalic: “Ri e quieb xa e jun cuerp chic.”" 
1Corinthians6:17 Apachin c'u ri cätuni' ruc' ri Ajawaxel, xa e jun chic ruc' pa ri ranima'." 
1Corinthians6:18 Chixanimaj chuwäch ri quibanic macunic cuc' ixokib achijab. Apachique chi jun mac ri camacun wi ri winak, man cunak ta ri u cuerp; apachin c'ut ri cumacuj cuc' ixokib achijab, cunak ri kas u cuerp che macaj." 
1Corinthians6:19 ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi ri i cuerp are rachoch ri Ruxlabal ri Dios ri c'o pa ri iwanima', ri yo'm chiwe rumal ri Dios? Ri ix man iwech ta iwib." 
1Corinthians6:20 Pakal c'u lok'obem iwech. Chinimarisaj ba' u k'ij ri Dios ruc' ri i cuerp. 
1Corinthians7:1 Chrij ri i tz'ibam ulok wuc': Utz ta na ri' we jun achi man cäc'uli' taj. 
1Corinthians7:2 Xa' c'u ne, u mac rech ri quibanic macunic cuc' ixokib achijab, chquijujunal c'ut ri achijab rajawaxic cac'oji' ri kas ri quixokil, chquijujunal c'ut ri ixokib rajawaxic cac'oji' ri kas cachajil." 
1Corinthians7:3 Ri achi chutz'akatisaj ri utz u banic che ri rixokil. Xukuje' ri ixok chutz'akatisaj ri utz u banic che ri rachajil. 
1Corinthians7:4 Mawi ri ixokilaxel xuwi ta ri are' are' ta ajchak'e ri kas u cuerp, c'o c'u rech ri rachajil che. Mawi ri achajilaxel xuwi ta ri are' are ta ajchak'e ri kas u cuerp, c'o c'u rech ri rixokil che." 
1Corinthians7:5 Miya' can ri u rikic iwib we man i chomam ix quieb. We ne quichomaj quiya' na can joropa' k'ij ri u rikic iwib rech quiban ch'awem ruc' Dios. Chirika' chi c'u iwib, rech man quixutakchi'j ta ri Satanas che mac, we man quixcuinic quik'il iwib." 
1Corinthians7:6 Are wa' quinbij chiwe xa' che u ya'ic jun i no'j, man are ta c'u jun takomal." 
1Corinthians7:7 Quinwaj ta ne chi conojel quec'oji' jas ri in. Chquijujunal c'ut yo'm jalajoj tak cuinem chque rumal ri Dios, jun wi ri jun, ri jun chic jun chi wi." 
1Corinthians7:8 Quinbij chque ri man e c'ulan taj, xukuje' chque ri malca'nib, chi utz we quecanaj canok jas ri in." 
1Corinthians7:9 We c'u man quecuinic cäquik'il quib, chec'ulanok. Utz na we quec'uli'c chuwäch ri cäquiq'uis quib che rayinic." 
1Corinthians7:10 Quintakan chque ri e c'ulanic, chi ri ixok cojonel mujach can ri rachajil. We takanic ri' man xa ta wech in, xane' rech ri Ajawaxel." 
1Corinthians7:11 We c'u ri ixok cuya' can ri rachajil, chcanaj can chi jeri', mäc'uli' chic, o chutzir chi jumul ruc' ri rachajil. Xukuje' ri achi mujach can ri rixokil." 
1Corinthians7:12 Quinbij in chque ri niq'uiaj chic, man are ta c'u ri Ajawaxel cäbinic: We c'o jun kachalal ri c'o rixokil ri man cojonel taj, we cäraj ri rixokil cäc'oji' ruc', mujach bic." 
1Corinthians7:13 We jun ixok c'o rachajil ri man cojonel taj, we cäraj ri rachajil cäc'oji' ruc', mujach bic." 
1Corinthians7:14 Ri achajilaxel ri man cojonel taj, cux tastalic winak rumal ri rixokil. Ri ixokilaxel ri man cojonel taj, cux tastalic winak rumal ri rachajil. We ta ma ta jeri', e tz'il ta ri' ri iwalc'ual. Man e tz'il ta c'ut, xane' e tastalic." 
1Corinthians7:15 We ri ixokilaxel o ri achajilaxel, ri man e cojonelab taj, cäquicoj qui chuk'ab che u jachanic quib, chquibana'. We je cäban wa', ri achalaxel ri achi o ri achalaxel ixok cätzokopitajic, ix siq'uim c'ut ri ix rech quixjeki' pa jamaril." 
1Corinthians7:16 ¿Jas aweta'm, ixok, we ne cacol na ri awachajil; o jas aweta'm, achi, we ne cacol na ri awixokil?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Chijujunal ba' chibana' jas ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel chiwe, jas ri i banic aretak xixsiq'uix rumal ri Dios. Are je nu takanic wa' pa tak conojel ri comon cojonelab." 
1Corinthians7:18 We c'o jun kopin ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri achi wi che retal aretak xsiq'uixic, märetzelaj u wäch ri retal ri cojom. We jun chic man cojom ta retal re kopixic aretak xsiq'uixic, mucoj retal." 
1Corinthians7:19 We jun achi kopim ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri achi wi, o man kopim taj, man c'o ta u banic wa'. Xane' ri u nimaxic ri u takanic ri Dios, are ri' c'o u banic." 
1Corinthians7:20 Chijujunal jas ri i banic aretak xixsiq'uixic, je chixcanajok." 
1Corinthians7:21 ¿La at lok'om pataninel aretak xatsiq'uixic? matoc il che wa'; we c'u cuya' cattzokopitajic, are wa' chatzucuj." 
1Corinthians7:22 We c'o jun, lok'om pataninel aretak xsiq'uix rumal ri Ajawaxel, jun tzokopital wa' rech ri Ajawaxel. We c'o c'u jun, ri tzokopitalic aretak xsiq'uixic, lok'om pataninel chi wa' re ri Crist." 
1Corinthians7:23 Pakal c'u lok'obem iwe. Mixux c'u qui lok'om tak pataninelab ri winak. 
1Corinthians7:24 Wachalal, chijujunal jas ri i banic aretak xixsiq'uixic, jewa' chixcanaj wi chuwäch ri Dios." 
1Corinthians7:25 Chquij ri k'apojib, man c'o ta u takanic ri Ajawaxel wuc'. Xuwi quinya' pixbenic chque jas jun jicalaj winak, rumal rech chi xel u c'u'x ri Ajawaxel chwe." 
1Corinthians7:26 Quinchomaj chi utz we ri achi cäcanaj canok jas ri c'olic rumal rech ri c'ax ri quekil pa tak we k'ij ri'. 
1Corinthians7:27 We c'o awixokil, matzucuj u jachic bic. We c'u man c'o ta awixokil, matzucuj awixokil." 
1Corinthians7:28 We c'u catc'uli'c, man mac ta ri'. We c'u ri ali cäc'uli'c, xukuje' man mac taj. Are c'u ri quec'uli'c cäquirik na c'ax pa ri qui c'aslemal. Quinwaj c'ut chi ma ta quirik c'ax." 
1Corinthians7:29 Are c'u wa' quinbij, wachalal, chi ri k'ij xak k'atatal chic; ri c'o c'u chkawäch camic. Rumal c'u ri', ri c'o quixokil, chquibana' chi je ta ne ri man c'o ta quixokil." 
1Corinthians7:30 Ri quebok'ic, chquibana' chi je ta ne ri man quebok' taj. Ri quequicotic, chquibana' chi je ta ne ri man quequicot taj. Ri cäquilok' jun jasach, chquibana' chi je ta ne ri man quech taj." 
1Corinthians7:31 Ri que cojow ri re we uwächulew ri', chquibana' jacha' ri ma ta quecojowic; rumal rech chi xak cäsach u wäch we uwächulew ri' ri quilitajic." 
1Corinthians7:32 Quinwaj c'ut chi ma ta c'o jas quixoc wi il. Ri achi ri man c'ulan taj, querilij ri jastak re ri Ajawaxel, jas ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
1Corinthians7:33 Are' c'u ri achi ri c'ulanic, querilij ri jastak re ri uwächulew, are cäraj cubano jas ri cäkaj chuwäch ri rixokil." 
1Corinthians7:34 Xukuje' man junam ta ri ixok ri c'ulanic ruc' ri ali ri man c'ulan taj. Ri man c'ulan taj, are querilij ri jastak re ri Ajawaxel, rech cux tastalic winak pa ri u cuerp xukuje' pa ri ranima'. Ri ixok ri c'ulanic, are querilij ri jastak re ri uwächulew, are cäraj cubano jas ri cäkaj chuwäch ri rachajil." 
1Corinthians7:35 Quinbij c'u wa' chiwe rech c'o quiwechbej che, man che ta u ya'ic latz' chiwe, rech are quiban ri utz quilitajic, rech man c'o ta jun jasach chic quiwilij, xane' xak xuwi quipatanij ri Ajawaxel." 
1Corinthians7:36 We c'o jun cuchomaj chi cac'uli' ruc' ri u yo'm chi u tzij che, rumal rech chi c'o chic u junab che ri c'ulanem, we c'u cuchomaj chi are wa' ri utz na, chubana' ri cuchomaj are takalic; c'ulanok, man macunic taj." 
1Corinthians7:37 We c'u c'o jun ri cuna' rib chi man c'o ta catakchinic, ri ya'tal che jachique ri craj cubano cuch'äc c'u ri ranima' cubij chi man cac'uli' taj, utz ri cubano." 
1Corinthians7:38 Je c'u ri' we cac'uli' ruc' ri u yo'm chi u tzij che, utz ri cubano; we c'u ne man cac'uli'c, sibalaj utz na ri cubano." 
1Corinthians7:39 Ri ixok ri c'ulanic rajawaxic cäc'oji' ruc' ri rachajil joropa' junab ri cäc'asi ri achi. We c'u cäcäm ri rachajil, cuya' ri' cäc'uli' ruc' jachin ri cäraj wi, xak xuwi we cojonel che ri Ajawaxel." 
1Corinthians7:40 Quinchomaj chi are cäquicot na ri ixok malca'n we cäcanaj can chi jeri'. Quinchomaj c'ut chi c'o ri Uxlabal re ri Dios wuc', aretak je quinbij wa'." 
1Corinthians8:1 Camic are quinoc chic che u bix ri tabal tok'ob ri cäcoj chquiwäch ri diosib. Kastzij ri cabixic: chi konojel c'o ketamanic; are c'u ri etamanic cuban chke chi cakaban nimal, are c'u ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj cuban chke chi cuq'uiyisaj ri ka cojonic aj uxlabal." 
1Corinthians8:2 We c'o jun cuchomaj chi c'o retamabal, c'ä maja' reta'm ri' jas ri rajawaxic cäretamaj." 
1Corinthians8:3 Are c'u ri cälok'ok'en ri Dios, are ri' etamatal u wäch rumal ri Dios." 
1Corinthians8:4 Chrij c'u ri wa ri cojom chquiwäch tak ri diosib, keta'm ri' chi jun dios man c'o ta u banic cho ri uwächulew, keta'm c'ut chi xuwi jun Dios c'olic." 
1Corinthians8:5 Pune' e c'o jujun chic ri cäbix diosib chque, we pa ri caj, we cho ri uwächulew, (je ta ne ri e c'o q'ui diosib xukuje' q'ui ajawinelab)," 
1Corinthians8:6 chke c'u uj xa' jun Dios c'olic, are ri Tataxel, ri quepe wi conojel ri jastak. Ri uj c'o che u patanixic ri are'. Xukuje' chi xa' jun Ajawaxel c'olic, are ri Jesucrist. Rumal ri are' e c'o conojel ri jastak. Xukuje' ri uj rumal ri are' uj c'olic." 
1Corinthians8:7 Man conojel ta c'ut queta'm wa'. Jujun ri e nak'atal can che qui k'ijilaxic ri diosib, c'ä caquitij we tzukbal ib ri' c'o c'u pa qui jolom chi xchi'x chque ri diosib; tukar c'u ne ri retamabal qui c'u'x, cuban c'u chque chi quech'äctaj cumal ri dios." 
1Corinthians8:8 Man rumal ta c'u rech ri ka wa cujc'amowax rumal ri Dios. We man cäkatijo, man rumal ta ri' ma ta uj utz. We c'u cäkatijo, man rumal ta ri' sibalaj ta uj utz." 
1Corinthians8:9 Miya' c'u c'olbal chi rumal ri etamanic ri c'o iwuc' qui bano chi ri e tukar pa ri qui cojonic quekaj pa ri macunic. 
1Corinthians8:10 We c'u ri at ri e aweta'm we jastak ri', catt'uyi' che wa'im pa jun c'olbal ri tasom chque ri diosib, we c'u ne c'o jun achalaxic ri c'ä maja' co pa ri u cojonic catrilo, we c'u ne cac'ulmatajic chi ri are' cuchajij anima' che u tijic rech we sipanic ri' ri cojom chquiwäch ri diosib." 
1Corinthians8:11 We je cäban ri', rumal ri awetamabal, cäsach u wäch ri awachalal ri maja' co pa ri u cojonic. Rumal c'u ri are' xcäm ri Crist." 
1Corinthians8:12 Aretak ri ix quebisoc ri quetamabal c'uxaj ri achalaxelab ri c'ä maja' e co pa ri qui cojonic, kas chrij ri Crist quixmacun wi." 
1Corinthians8:13 Rumal ri', we ri quintijo cuban che ri wachalal chi cätzakic, mawi jumul quintij chi ti'j, rech man quinux ta jun tzakibal che ri wachalal." 
1Corinthians9:1 Kastzij in ya'tal chwe ri ya'tal che jun takom, wilom c'ut u wäch ri Jesus ri Kajaw, kas ix c'ut ri ix u wächinic ri nu chac pa ri u chac ri Ajawaxel." 
1Corinthians9:2 We man in takom chque niq'uiaj chic, are c'u ri ix iweta'm chi in takom, ix ri' ix c'utbal chi in u takom ri Ajawaxel." 
1Corinthians9:3 Are wa' quinbij che u to'ic wib chquiwäch ri cäquiban tzij chwij: 
1Corinthians9:4 ¿La ma ta ya'tal chke chi cujwa'ic, chi cujuq'uianic?" 
1Corinthians9:5 Takal chwe xukuje' chi quinc'am bic jun ixokilaxel wuc' ri cojonel rech quinrachilaj bic, je jacha' ri caquiban ri niq'uiaj chi takomxenlab, ri e rachalal ri Ajawaxel xukuje' ri Lu'." 
1Corinthians9:6 O ¿la xak xuwi ri in wachil ri Bernabe cujchacun na cuc' ri ka k'ab che u ch'äquic ri cajwataj chke? 
1Corinthians9:7 ¿La c'o ta lo jun ajch'o'j ri ma ta cätojic? ¿La c'o ta lo jun cutic uva, ri ma ta cutij re ri u wächinic? ¿La c'o lo jun ri quebuyuk'uj ri q'uisic', ri ma ta cutij re ri leche ri cäquiya'o?" 
1Corinthians9:8 Man quinbij ta wa' chi xa ta ne qui chomanic winak, xane' xukuje' je cubij ri u pixab ri Moises." 
1Corinthians9:9 Tz'ibatal c'u pa ri pixab: “Mach'uk u tza'm ri wacax aretak cuban yak'oj.” ¿La cubij wa' rumal chi coc il ri Dios chque ri wacax? 
1Corinthians9:10 O ¿la rumal kech uj cubij wi? Rumal kech uj xtz'ibax canok. Keta'm chi ri jun ri cätajinic, cu'l u c'u'x ri' chrij ri u wächinic ri ulew, xukuje' ri cuban yak'oj, cu'l u c'u'x ri' chi cuc'am na re ri cäyak'ic." 
1Corinthians9:11 We uj ka ticom jastak aj uxlabal pa ri iwanima', ¿la nim lo ri' we cäkac'am ke ri jastak re ri cuerp iwuc'?" 
1Corinthians9:12 We jule' winak chic ya'tal chque chi cäquic'am que ri jastak iwe, e ta c'u lo ri uj, ¿la ma ta ya'tal chke? Pune' ya'tal chke, man ka cojom ta chuk'ab chiwe, xane' ka coch'om ronojel, rech man cäkak'atij ta u wäch ri utzalaj tak u tzij ri Crist." 
1Corinthians9:13 ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi ri quechacun pa ri tastalicalaj tak jastak re ri rachoch Dios, cäquitij que ri jastak re ri rachoch Dios? ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi ri quepatanin chuwäch ri porobal, cäquitij que ri ti'j re ri awaj ri cäya' puwi' ri porobal?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Jewa' xukuje' xtakan wi ri Ajawaxel chi ri cäquitzijoj ri utzalaj tak tzij, rajawaxic cäquitzuk quib rumal ri u tzijoxic ri utzalaj tak tzij." 
1Corinthians9:15 Are c'u ri in mawi c'o wechben che wa'. Mawi ta ne quintz'ibaj ta ba' wa' chiwe camic che u tz'onoxic chiwe chi c'o chiya' chwe. ¡Chwe in are utz na chi quincämic chi, je quinban wa'! Man c'o ta jun quesan chwe chi nu rikom ri u banic nimal wumal cumal we jastak ri'." 
1Corinthians9:16 Man quinnimarisaj ta wib rumal ri u tzijoxic ri utzalaj tak tzij. Rajawaxic c'ut chi quintzijoj. ¡Tok'ob nu wäch we man quintzijoj ri utzalaj tak tzij! 
1Corinthians9:17 We ruc' ri nu rayinic, quintzijoj ri colobal ib, c'o na ri tojbal wech. We c'u man quintzijoj ri colobal ib ruc' ri kas nu rayibal, xa ba in takchi'm ri' che u banic." 
1Corinthians9:18 Je c'u ri', ¿jachique ri tojbal wech? Ri tojbal wech are wa' chi chintzijoj ri tzij re colobal ib, xak chi jeri' man c'o ta quintok'ij, man quintz'onoj ta c'ut ri takal chwe aretak quintzijoj ri tzij re colobal ib." 
1Corinthians9:19 Pune' man c'o jun winak cätakan panuwi', xinya' c'u wib che qui patanixic conojel ri winak, rech quebench'äc q'ui winak che ri Crist." 
1Corinthians9:20 Chquixo'l ri aj judeyib quinc'ut wib chi in aj judey, rech quebench'äc che ri Crist. Chquixo'l ri e c'o chuxe' ri u pixab ri Moises, xinbano chi in c'o chuxe' ri pixab, rech quebench'äc ri e c'o chuxe' ri pixab, pune' man in c'o ta chuxe' ri pixab." 
1Corinthians9:21 Che qui ch'äquic ri man e c'o ta chuxe' ri u pixab ri Moises, quinjunamaj wib ruc' jun chque, in c'o c'u ne chuxe' ri u pixab ri Dios, in c'o c'u chuxe' ri u pixab ri Crist." 
1Corinthians9:22 Chquixo'l ri man c'o ta qui chuk'ab, xinbano chi man c'o ta nu chuk'ab, rech quebench'äc ri man c'o ta qui chuk'ab. Ronojel nu banom chquixo'l conojel ri winak, rech jeri' quecolotaj jujun chque." 
1Corinthians9:23 Ronojel wa' quinbano rumal rech ri tzij re colobal ib, rech quinrik ri utzil ri cuya' ri utzalaj tak tzij." 
1Corinthians9:24 ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi ri cäquic'am canim, conojel ri' cäquic'am canim, xa c'u jun chque cärikow ri tojbal? Je c'u ri' ri ix chicojo' i chuk'ab rech quirik na ri tojbal." 
1Corinthians9:25 Ri caquisuc'umaj quib che u tijic qui chuk'ab che ch'äcanic pa jun nak'atisanic, caquik'il quib che ronojel ri cuban c'ax chque. Ri e are' caquiban wa' xa che u ch'äquic jun tojbal ri xa' cäsach u wäch. Are c'u ri uj cakaban wa' che u ch'äquic jun tojbal ri man cäsach ta u wäch chbe k'ij sak." 
1Corinthians9:26 Ri in jewa' quinbano: man quinc'am ta wanim ri je ta ne ma ta quinwilo jawije' quinbe wi. Ri in jewa' quinch'ojinic, man quinch'ojin taj je ta ne quinch'ay ri quiakik'." 
1Corinthians9:27 Xane' quinban c'ax che ri nu cuerp, quintakan puwi'. Jewa' quinbano rech man quinriktaj taj chi ma ta utz nu banom, nu bim c'u chque niq'uiaj chic chi utz chquibana'." 
1Corinthians10:1 Wachalal, quinwaj quiwetamaj chi conojel ri e ka mam xec'oji' chuxe' ri sutz', xukuje' conojel xeboc'ow pa ri Quiäk' Plo." 
1Corinthians10:2 Conojel xejunataj ruc' ri Moises aretak xejunataj chuxe' ri sutz' xukuje' pa ri plo. 
1Corinthians10:3 Conojel xa jun u wäch wa xquitijo, ri wa aj uxlabal." 
1Corinthians10:4 Conojel xcuq'uiaj que ri xa junam uq'uia' aj uxlabal. Rumal rech chi xcuq'uiaj que ri ja' ri xpe pa ri abaj aj uxlabal ri junam benak cuc'. Ri abaj ri' are ri Crist. 
1Corinthians10:5 E q'ui c'u chque ri man xquiban ta ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Dios. Rumal ri' xecäm can pa ri chaki'j uwo sak. 
1Corinthians10:6 Ronojel wa' xc'ulmaxic rech cux jun c'utbal chkawäch uj, rech man cäkarayij ta ri itzel tak jastak jas ri xquirayij ri e are'." 
1Corinthians10:7 Mik'ijilaj tak e diosib, jas xquiban jujun chque ri e are'. Cubij c'u ri tz'ibatalic: “Xet'uyi' ri winak, xewa'ic, xebuq'uianic. Xewalij c'u che u banic etz'enem.”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Mixmacun cuc' ixokib achijab, jas ri xquiban jujun chque ri e are'. Rumal c'u ri' xecäm juwinak oxib mil (23,000) xa pa jun k'ij." 
1Corinthians10:9 Mäkac'ambejej ri Ajawaxel, jas ri xquiban jujun chque ri e are'. Xecämisax c'u cumal ri cumätz." 
1Corinthians10:10 Mawi mixch'ach'atic, jacha' jujun chque xech'ach'atic, rumal ri' xecämisax rumal ri tako'n ajcämisanel." 
1Corinthians10:11 Xquic'ulmaj ronojel wa' rech cux jun c'utbal chkawäch uj. Xtz'ibax c'u che ka pixbexic uj ri uj c'o pa tak we q'uisbal tak k'ij junab ri'. 
1Corinthians10:12 Je c'u ri', apachin ri cuchomaj chi co tac'alic, chrila' rib rech mätzakic." 
1Corinthians10:13 Man i rikom ta c'u jun c'ambejenic ri ma ta aj winak; jic c'ut ri Dios chi man cuya' taj quixc'ambejexic xane' xak xuwi ri quixcuin che u k'atixic u wäch, cuya' c'u xukuje' junam ruc' ri c'ambejebal ri elebal." 
1Corinthians10:14 Rumal ri', lok'alaj tak wachalal, chixanimaj chuwäch ri qui k'ijilaxic tak ri diosib." 
1Corinthians10:15 Quinbij wa' chiwe rumal rech chi quixcuin che u ch'obic. Kas ba' chichomaj rij ri u tzij. 
1Corinthians10:16 Aretak cakuq'uiaj ke che ri tewichimalaj kumubal ri rumal cakaya' maltioxinic che ri Dios cakajunaj kib ruc' ri Crist pa ri u cämical; aretak cäkatij ri caxlanwa ri cakapiro, cakajunaj kib ruc' ri Crist pa ri u cuerp." 
1Corinthians10:17 Xa' c'u jun ri caxlanwa. Ri uj pune' uj q'ui, xa c'u uj jun cuerp, rumal rech chi konojel cäkatij ke ri caxlanwa ri'." 
1Corinthians10:18 Kas chebiwila' ri aj israelib; ri quequitij quech ri awaj ri e chi'm che tabal tok'ob ri' caquic'am quech ri tabal tok'ob. 
1Corinthians10:19 ¿Jas c'u ri quinbij? ¿La quinbij lo chi c'o qui banic ri diosib? ¿La quinbij lo chi c'o qui banic ri jastak ri e yo'm chquiwäch ri diosib ri'? 
1Corinthians10:20 Man je ta c'u ri'. Xane' quinbij chi ri tabal tok'ob ri cäquiya' ri winak chquiwäch ri qui diosib, chquiwäch ri itzel tak uxlabal cäquiya' wi, man chuwäch ta ri Dios. Man quinwaj ta c'ut chi ri ix quic'am iwe cuc' ri itzel tak uxlabal." 
1Corinthians10:21 Man cuya' taj quiwuq'uiaj ta iwe che ri ruq'uiabal ri Ajawaxel, xukuje' quiwuq'uiaj iwe che ri cuq'uiabal ri itzel tak uxlabal. Mawi cuya' quic'am ta iwe pa ri u mexa ri Ajawaxel, xukuje' quic'am iwe pa ri qui mexa ri itzel tak uxlabal." 
1Corinthians10:22 O ¿la cäkayac royowal ri Ajawaxel? ¿La are ta c'u lo c'o na ka chuk'ab uj chuwäch ri are'? 
1Corinthians10:23 Ronojel ya'tal u banic wumal, man ronojel ta c'ut c'o quechbex che. Ronojel cuya' quinbano, man ronojel ta c'ut cuya' ka chuk'ab pa ri ka cojonic." 
1Corinthians10:24 C'o jun mutzucuj ri utz che chbil rib, xane' chutzucuj ri utz che ri jun chic." 
1Corinthians10:25 Chilok'o' chitija' ronojel ri cac'ayix chupam ri c'ayibal ti'j, miban c'otoj chi'aj rumal rech ri etamabal c'uxaj." 
1Corinthians10:26 Rumal chi ri Ajawaxel are ajchak'e ri ulew, xukuje' ronojel ri c'o cho ri uwächulew." 
1Corinthians10:27 We c'o jun ri man cojonel taj quixusiq'uij che jun wa'im, we c'u quiwaj quixbec, ronojel ri cäya' chiwäch chitija'. Mixc'otow chi'aj rumal rech ri etamabal c'uxaj." 
1Corinthians10:28 We c'o jun cubij chiwe chi yo'm che u k'ijilaxic jun dios, mitijo, rumal ri jun ri xuk'alajisaj chiwäch, xukuje' rumal rech ri etamabal c'uxaj." 
1Corinthians10:29 Man quinbij ta rumal rech ri retamabal i c'u'x ix, xane' rumal rech ri re ri jun chic. ¿Jas c'u che cäk'at na tzij puwi' ri tzokopitalic rumal ri retamabal u c'u'x jun winak chic?" 
1Corinthians10:30 We c'u quinmaltioxin che ri Dios rumal ri quintijo, ¿jas c'u che quinyok' rumal rech ri quintijo?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Je c'u ri', we quixwa'ic, we quixuq'uianic, o we c'o jun jasach chic quibano, chibana' ronojel che u nimarisaxic u k'ij ri Dios." 
1Corinthians10:32 Mixux ya'l tzakibal chque ri aj judeyib, mawi chque ri man aj judeyib taj, mawi che ri comon cojonelab aj Dios." 
1Corinthians10:33 Ri in, pa wech wi, quintij nu k'ij quinban ri cäkaj chquiwäch conojel pa ronojel, man are' ta quintzucuj ri kas utz na chwe xane' are ri quech ri niq'uiaj chic, rech caquirik ri colobal ib." 
1Corinthians11:1 Chibana' iwe ri quinban in, je jas ri in quinban we ri xuban ri Crist." 
1Corinthians11:2 Quinya' i k'ij chi amak'el quinnataj chiwe e i takem c'ut ri tijonic ri e nu k'axem chiwe. 
1Corinthians11:3 Quinwaj c'ut quiwetamaj chi ri Crist are' ri qui jolom ri achijab chquijujunal, ri achi are' u jolom ri rixokil, ri Dios c'ut are' u jolom ri Crist." 
1Corinthians11:4 Ronojel achi ri cuban ch'awem ruc' Dios, o cuk'axej tzij chque ri winak ri yo'm che rumal ri Dios, we ch'ukutal ri u jolom, cäresaj u q'uixbal ri u jolom." 
1Corinthians11:5 Ronojel c'u ixok ri cuban ch'awem ruc' Dios, o cuk'axej tzij chque ri winak ri yo'm che rumal ri Dios, we man ch'ukutal ri u jolom, cäresaj u q'uixbal ri u jolom. Xa junam ri' we ta cäsocax ri u wi'." 
1Corinthians11:6 We ri ixok man cuch'uk ta ri u jolom, chresaj ba' ri u wi'. We q'uixbal c'u che ri ixok chi cukopij ri u wi' o cäresaj ronojel ri u wi', chuch'uku' ba' ri u jolom." 
1Corinthians11:7 Man takal taj che ri achi cuch'uk ri u jolom, rumal rech chi are u wächbal ri Dios, xukuje' are yabal u k'ij ri Dios. Are c'u ri ixok are yabal u k'ij ri achi." 
1Corinthians11:8 Aretak xeban ri winak, man are ta ri achi xesax che ri ixok, xane' are' ri ixok xesax che ri achi." 
1Corinthians11:9 Xukuje' man xban ta ri achi rumal rech ri ixok, xane' are ri ixok xban u mac rech ri achi." 
1Corinthians11:10 Rumal ri', rajawaxic chi ri ixok cäc'oji' jun etal che ri u jolom chi c'o chuxe' takanic, rumal quech ri tako'nib aj chicaj." 
1Corinthians11:11 Are c'ut, ri pa ri c'aslemal aj Crist, mawi c'o ri achi we man c'o ri ixok, mawi c'o ixok we man c'o achi." 
1Corinthians11:12 Je jas ri ixok esam che ri achi, jeri' xukuje' ri achi calax rumal ri ixok. Ronojel c'u wa' ruc' ri Dios petinak wi." 
1Corinthians11:13 Chichomaj ba' ix, we takal che ri ixok cuban ch'awem ruc' Dios we man ch'ukutal ri u jolom." 
1Corinthians11:14 Ri ka c'olem cujutijoj chi jun q'uixbal ri' we ri achi xak ja'e che caq'uiy ri u wi'; 
1Corinthians11:15 are c'u ri ixok, we nimak ri u wi', cänimarisax ri u k'ij ri'. Yo'm c'u ri u wi' che ch'ukubal re ri u jolom." 
1Corinthians11:16 We c'o jun cäraj cuban ch'o'j chrij wa', chretamaj chi ri uj xukuje' conojel ri comon cojonelab aj Dios, man uj c'o ta chuxe' jun nak'atisabal chic." 
1Corinthians11:17 Quinbij chiwe jun jasach man utz taj ri cätajin quibano. Aretak quimulij iwib, c'ax quiban chbil iwib, man are ta c'u ri utz." 
1Corinthians11:18 Ri nabe are wa', nu tom chi aretak quimulij iwib ri ix comon cojonelab, c'o tasoj tak ib chixo'l. Quincoj c'u jubik' chi kastzij ri'." 
1Corinthians11:19 ¡Man c'o ta quieblan c'uxaj chi ri ix quitasala' iwib pa tak k'at, man e utz ta c'u wa' ri tasow ib ri'; quek'alajin c'ut e jachin tak ri e utz chiwe cho ri Dios!" 
1Corinthians11:20 Ri ix, aretak quimulij iwib che u tijic ri wa'im, man chutijic ta chic ri u Wa'im ri Ajawaxel." 
1Corinthians11:21 Rumal rech chi aretak quixwa'ic, chijujunal quixnabej chquiwäch ri niq'uiaj chic che u tijic ri u wa. Ri jun cäcanaj pa numic, ri jun chic cak'abaric." 
1Corinthians11:22 ¿La ma ta c'o iwachoch jawije' quixwa' wi xukuje' quixuq'uian wi? ¿La ma ta nim quiwil wi ri u comon cojonelab ri Dios? ¿Jasche quiwesaj qui q'uixbal ri man c'o ta que? ¿Jas c'u quinbij chiwe? ¿La quinbij lo chi utz ri cätajin quibano? Jayi', kastzij chi man utz taj." 
1Corinthians11:23 Che c'u ri Ajawaxel xinc'am wi ri tijonic ri xinya' chiwe: Chi ri Ajawaxel Jesus, pa ri chak'ab aretak xjachic, xuc'am ri caxlanwa," 
1Corinthians11:24 aretak ya'tajinak chic ri maltioxinic rumal che ri Dios, xupiro je c'u xubij wa': “Are' nu cuerp wa', ri jachom che cämical che u banic utzil chiwe. Chibana' wa' che nu nataxic.”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Xukuje', aretak xbantaj ri wa'im, xuc'am ri kumubal, je xubij wa': “We kumubal ri', are' c'ac' c'ulwächinic wa' rumal ri nu quiq'uel. Joropa' mul ri quixuq'uianic, chibana' wa' che natabal we.”" 
1Corinthians11:26 Joropa' mul quitij ri caxlanwa ri', xukuje' quiwuq'uiaj iwe che we uq'uiabal ri', are' cätajin quiya' u bixic ri u cämical ri Ajawaxel c'ä cäpe na." 
1Corinthians11:27 Je c'u ri' apachin ri cutij ri caxlanwa o cäruq'uiaj re che ri ruq'uiabal ri Ajawaxel, we c'u man cubano jas ri takal u banic, cämacun ri' chrij ri u cuerp xukuje' ri u quiq'uel ri Ajawaxel." 
1Corinthians11:28 Rajawaxic chijujunal quinic'oj ri iwanima'. Te c'u ri' cuya' quitij ri caxlanwa, xukuje' chixuq'uian che ri uq'uiabal." 
1Corinthians11:29 Apachin c'u ri cutij ri caxlanwa xukuje' caruq'uiaj re che ri uq'uiabal, we man cuchomaj taj chi are' ri u cuerp ri Ajawaxel, che u c'äjisaxic u wäch cutij wi xukuje' caruq'uiaj wi." 
1Corinthians11:30 Rumal wa' e c'o q'ui yawabib chixo'l, e q'ui ri man c'o ta qui chuk'ab, xukuje' e jujun e cäminak chic." 
1Corinthians11:31 We ta kas utzalaj u nic'oxic kib cakabano, ri Ajawaxel ma ta cuc'äjisaj na ka wäch ri'," 
1Corinthians11:32 pune' c'u cäc'äjisax ka wäch rumal ri Ajawaxel xa' rech cujetamanic, rech man cäc'äjisax ta ka wäch junam cuc' ri e aj uwächulew." 
1Corinthians11:33 Je c'u ri', wachalal, aretak quimulij iwib che u tijic ri wa'im, chiweyela' na iwib." 
1Corinthians11:34 We c'o jachin cänumic, chwok ulok cho rachoch, rech man cac'äjisax ta u wäch rumal ri Dios rumal rech ri cuban pa we mulin ib ri'. Quinsuc'umaj na ri niq'uiaj jastak chic aretak quinopanic." 
1Corinthians12:1 Wachalal, quinwaj chi c'o quiwetamaj chquij ri sipanic aj uxlabal." 
1Corinthians12:2 Iweta'm chi aretak c'ä majok chixcojonok i sachom i be, xixc'am bic chquij ri memalaj tak diosib." 
1Corinthians12:3 Rumal ri' quinya' retamaxic chiwe, chi man c'o ta jun cuc'okoj ri Jesus ruc' ri u tzij we cätzijon rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios. Xukuje' man c'o ta jun cäcuin che u bixic Ajawaxel che ri Jesus, xane' xak xuwi rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios." 
1Corinthians12:4 Q'ui qui wäch tak u sipanic ri Uxlabaxel chke. Xa c'u jun ri Uxlabaxel ri cäyowic. 
1Corinthians12:5 Q'ui qui wäch ri pataninic ri quebanic. Xa c'u jun Ajawaxel cäkapatanij. 
1Corinthians12:6 Q'ui qui wäch tak ri chac. Xa c'u jun Dios cächacun pa ka c'aslemal konojel. 
1Corinthians12:7 Ri Dios u yo'm chke chkajujunal ri u k'alajisaxic ri Uxlabaxel pa ri ka c'aslemal, rech c'o quechbexic." 
1Corinthians12:8 Jun yo'm che, tzij re no'j rumal ri Uxlabaxel. Ri jun chic yo'm che, tzij re etamabal. Xa c'u jun ri Uxlabaxel ri cayowic." 
1Corinthians12:9 Jun yo'm cojonic che, ri jun chic yo'm ri u banic cunanic che. Xa' c'u jun ri Uxlabaxel ri cäyowic." 
1Corinthians12:10 Jun yo'm che ri u banic tak mayibal. Ri jun chic yo'm che ri u k'axexic u tzij ri Dios. Jujun chic cuya' ri Dios chque ri retamaxic u wäch ri uxlabal ri e subunelab xukuje' ri kas Ruxlabal ri Dios. Jujun chic cäya' chque chi quech'aw pa tak ch'abal. Cäya' chi c'u na chque jujun chic ri u k'alajisaxic ri bim pa tak we ch'abal ri'. 
1Corinthians12:11 Xa c'u jun ri Uxlabaxel c'olic, ri cäbanow conojel we jastak ri'. Cujach chke chkajujunal jas ri cäraj ri are'." 
1Corinthians12:12 Je jas ri cuerp, pune' e q'ui ri u tz'akatil xa c'u jun cuerp. Jeri' xukuje' ri Crist." 
1Corinthians12:13 Xak c'u junam chke konojel, chi aj judeyib chi man aj judeyib taj, lok'om pataninelab o e torotalic, xujjunatajic rech cujux xa' jun cuerp rumal xa' jun Uxlabal; chke c'ut konojel xya' wi ruq'uiaxic ke che we kas Uxlabal ri'." 
1Corinthians12:14 Xukuje' ri cuerp man xa' ta jun ri u tz'akatil, xane' e q'ui." 
1Corinthians12:15 We ta c'u cubij ri akanaj: “Man in ta rech ri cuerp, rumal rech chi man in ta k'abaj”, man rumal ta ri' ma ta u tz'akatil ri cuerp." 
1Corinthians12:16 We ta cubij ri xiquinaj: “Man in ta rech ri cuerp, rumal rech chi man in ta bak'wächaj”, ma ta u tz'akatil ri cuerp." 
1Corinthians12:17 We ta ronojel ri cuerp bak'wächaj, ¿jawije' ta c'o wi ri' ri ka tanibal? We ta ronojel xiquinaj, ¿jawije' ta c'o wi ri' ri ka sikbal?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Ri Dios c'ut e u cojom chquijujunal ri u tz'akatil ri ka cuerp, jas ri xraj ri are'." 
1Corinthians12:19 We ta conojel xa' jun tz'akatil, ¿jawije' ta c'o wi ri cuerp?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Pune' e q'ui ri u tz'akatil, xa' c'u jun ri cuerp." 
1Corinthians12:21 Ri bak'wächaj man cuya' taj cubij che ri k'abaj: “Man at rajawaxic ta chwe.” Xukuje' ri jolomaj man cuya' taj cubij chque ri akanaj: “Man ix rajawaxic ta chwe.” 
1Corinthians12:22 Xane' ri tz'akatil ri cäkachomaj chi man c'o ta qui chuk'ab, are ne sibalaj e rajawaxic che ri cuerp." 
1Corinthians12:23 Ri e u tz'akatil ri cuerp ri cäkachomaj chi sibalaj man nim ta queilic, e are wa' ri sibalaj nim quekilo; ri e ka tz'akatil ri man kas ta utz queilic, c'o na ri qui wikic cäbanic." 
1Corinthians12:24 Ri man rajawaxic ta u banic chque ri tz'akatil ri nimak na qui banic. Ri Dios je u cholajixic wa' ri cuerp xubano chi ri e tz'akatil ri man kas ta e nimak qui banic caya' na qui k'ij. 
1Corinthians12:25 Jeri' man cäquetzelaj ta quib ri u tz'akatil ri cuerp, xane' junam cäquilila' quib." 
1Corinthians12:26 We jun u tz'akatil ri cuerp curik c'ax, conojel ri' junam cäquirik c'ax ruc'. We c'u jun chque cänimarisax u k'ij, conojel ri' junam quequicot ruc'." 
1Corinthians12:27 Ri ix c'ut ix u cuerp ri Crist, chijujunal ix u tz'akatil ri u cuerp." 
1Corinthians12:28 Ri xebucoj ri Dios pa ri comon cojonelab e are wa': nabe xebucoj ri takomxenlab, chucab xebucoj ri e k'axal tak tzij, churox xebucoj ri quetijonic, c'äte ri' ri quequiban tak mayibal, ri quecunanic, ri cäquiban tok'ob, ri cäquic'am qui be niq'uiaj chic xukuje' ri quetzijon pa tak ch'abal." 
1Corinthians12:29 Man conojel taj e takomxenlab, mawi conojel e k'axal tak tzij. Man conojel taj quetijonic; mawi conojel e banal tak mayibal." 
1Corinthians12:30 Man conojel taj yo'm chque quecunanic, mawi conojel quecuinic quetzijon pa tak ch'abal, mawi conojel quecuinic cäquik'axej pa ka ch'abal ri cäbix pa tak ch'abal." 
1Corinthians12:31 Are c'u sibalaj chebitzucuj ri nimak tak u sipanic ri Dios. Quinc'ut c'u na jun be chiwäch ri sibalaj utz na chquiwäch conojel wa'. 
1Corinthians13:1 We ta quinch'aw pa ri qui ch'abal ri winak, xukuje' ta c'u ne pa ri quech ri tako'nib aj chicaj, ma ta c'u c'o lok'ok'ebal nu c'u'x, quinux ri' jas jun quiäk ch'ich' ri cätzilnajic, o jun quetequic ch'ich' ri cäch'arnajic." 
1Corinthians13:2 We ta quink'axej tzij chque ri winak ri yo'm chwe rumal ri Dios, we ta weta'm conojel ri jastak ri man esam ta chi sak xukuje' ronojel etamabal, we ta sibalaj nim ri nu cojonic jeri' chi quincuinic quebenwesaj ri juyub pa tak ri qui c'olbal, ma ta c'u c'o lok'ok'ebal nu c'u'x, man c'o ta nu banic ri'." 
1Corinthians13:3 We ta quebenya' conojel ri jastak we che qui tzukic ri mebayib, we ta quinjach ri nu cuerp rech cäporoxic, ma ta c'u c'o lok'ok'ebal nu c'u'x, man c'o ta quinwechbej ri'." 
1Corinthians13:4 Ri c'o lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x are ri' cuk'i' ri c'ax, ch'uch'uj, man cäpe ta royowal che jun chic we curik utzil, man cärak'anisaj ta u k'ij, man cunimarisaj ta rib," 
1Corinthians13:5 man cuban ta jastak ri q'uixbal qui banic, man cutzucuj ta ri utz che chbil rib, man cäpe ta royowal, man cuc'ol ta oyowal pa ranima'." 
1Corinthians13:6 Man cäquicot ta che ri man suq'uil taj, xane' cäquicot che ri kastzij." 
1Corinthians13:7 Ronojel cucoch'o, ronojel cucojo. Ronojel cucu'ba' wi u c'u'x, ronojel cuch'ijo." 
1Corinthians13:8 Ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj mawi ta jumul casach u wäch. Cäpe jun k'ij aretak ri winak man cäquik'axej ta chic ri u tzij ri Dios, quetani' tak na ri ch'abal, ri etamanic cäsach na u wäch." 
1Corinthians13:9 E are tak c'ut ri e etamanic xukuje' ri e u k'axexic tak ri e u tzij ri Dios man e uxinak taj tz'akat. 
1Corinthians13:10 Quebopan c'u na pa ri qui q'uisbalil aretak chpe ri tz'akatil. 
1Corinthians13:11 Aretak c'ä in ac'al, xintzijonic, xinchomanic xukuje' xinno'jinic jas jun ac'al. Aretak c'u xinux achi, xebenya' can ri jastak quech ri ac'al." 
1Corinthians13:12 Camic je ta ne cujca'y pa jun ilbal ib ri man kas ta k'alaj. Cäpe c'u na ri k'ij aretak kas quel na ronojel chi sak chkawäch. Camic weta'm jubik', c'äte c'u kas quinwetamaj na ronojel, jas ri retamaxic nu wäch rumal ri Dios." 
1Corinthians13:13 E oxib jastak e c'olic ri kas e jekejoj wi: ri cojonic, ri eyebal c'uxaj, xukuje' ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj. Ri nim c'u na u k'ij chquixo'l we oxib ri', are ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj." 
1Corinthians14:1 Chicojo' i chuk'ab rech cäc'oji' lok'ok'ebal i c'u'x. Sibalaj chebirayij ri jastak ri cuya' ri Uxlabaxel chiwe. Are c'u sibalaj chirayij ri u k'axexic ri u tzij ri Dios. 
1Corinthians14:2 Ri jun ri cätzijon pa jalan tak ch'abal, man e are' ta quebuch'abej ri winak, xane' are' cuch'abej ri Dios, rumal rech chi man c'o ta jun cäch'obowic. Pa ri uxlabal c'ut cutzijoj wi ri awatalic." 
1Corinthians14:3 Are c'u ri jun ri cuk'axej tzij chque ri winak ri yo'm che rumal ri Dios, are quebuch'abej ri winak. Jeri' cuya' u chuk'ab ri qui cojonic, quebupixbej xukuje' cucu'bisaj qui c'u'x." 
1Corinthians14:4 Ri jun ri cätzijon pa tak ch'abal, are cuya' u chuk'ab chbil rib. Are c'u ri jun ri cuk'axej ri u tzij ri Dios chque ri winak, are cuya' qui chuk'ab ri e re ri comon cojonelab." 
1Corinthians14:5 Je c'u ri' quinwaj ta ne chi iwonojel quixtzijon pa tak ch'abal. Are c'u sibalaj quinwaj chi quik'axej tzij chque ri winak ri yo'm chiwe rumal ri Dios. Ri jun ri cuk'axej ri u tzij ri Dios chque ri winak, are nim na u banic chuwäch ri cätzijon pa tak ch'abal, we man cuk'axej pa ka ch'abal jas ri tzij ri cubij pa tak ch'abal, rech cuya' qui chuk'ab ri e re ri comon cojonelab." 
1Corinthians14:6 Rumal c'u ri', wachalal, we quinopan iwuc', quintzijon ta pa tak ch'abal, ¿jas ta lo quiwechbej ri' che, we man quink'alajisaj jun jasach chiwäch, o quinbij jun jasach chiwe re etamabal, o quink'axej ri u tzij ri Dios chiwe, o quixintijoj?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Ri jastak ri man c'o ta qui c'aslemal ri quecoj che k'ojom, je jas ri trompet o ri arp, we ta xa' jun u wäch ri u ch'abal cäbanic ¿jas ta cäban ri' che u ch'obic ri quel pa ri k'ojom?" 
1Corinthians14:8 We ta ri trompet ma ta k'alaj ri rok'ebal, ¿jachin ta lo cusuc'umaj rib ri' che ri ch'o'j?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Jeri' ri ix xukuje', we ta ma ta quibij tzij ri kas cäch'obotajic, ¿jas ta cäquiban ri niq'uiaj chic che retamaxic ri quitzijoj? Je ta ne quixtzijon ri' ruc' ri quiakik'." 
1Corinthians14:10 E q'ui qui wäch tak ch'abal c'o cho ri uwächulew. Man c'o ta c'u jun ri ma ta cäch'obotajic. 
1Corinthians14:11 We man quinch'ob ri cäquibij ri tzij, man in u winakil ta ri' ri cätzijon wuc', are c'u ri are' jun man nu winakil ta ri' chwe." 
1Corinthians14:12 Jeri' xukuje' ri ix, ri sibalaj quirayij ri sipanic aj uxlabal, chicojo' i chuk'ab rech queq'uiyir iwuc' ri jastak ri cuya' ri Uxlabaxel chiwe, che u ya'ic qui chuk'ab ri e rech ri comon cojonelab." 
1Corinthians14:13 Rumal ri' ri jun ri cätzijon pa jun ch'abal chic, chuta' che ri Dios rech cäcuinic cuk'axej pa ka ch'abal." 
1Corinthians14:14 We quinban ch'awem ruc' Dios pa jun ch'abal chic, ri wanima' cäch'aw ruc' ri Dios, are c'u ri nu chomanic man c'o ta cärechbej." 
1Corinthians14:15 ¿Jas c'u ri quinbano? Quinban na ch'awem ruc' Dios man xuwi ta ruc' ri wanima', xane' xukuje' ruc' ri nu chomanic. Quinbixon na che ri Dios ruc' ri wanima', xukuje' ruc' ri nu chomanic." 
1Corinthians14:16 We canimarisaj u k'ij ri Dios xak xuwi ruc' ri awanima', ri jun ri cäto'w ri a ch'awem ri man cuch'ob taj ri cabij, ¿la cubij lo je chbanok che ri a maltioxinic, man cuch'ob ta c'u ri cabij?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Pune' utz ri a maltioxinic cabano, man caya' ta c'u u chuk'ab ri jun chic." 
1Corinthians14:18 Quinmaltioxij che ri Dios rumal rech chi e q'ui na ri jalan tak ch'abal ri quinch'aw wi chiwäch ix iwonojel; 
1Corinthians14:19 pa ri comon cojonelab, utz na pune' xa job tzij quinbij ri cäch'obotajic rech quetijotaj niq'uiaj chic, chuwäch ri quinbij lajuj mil tzij pa jun ch'abal ri man cäch'obotaj taj." 
1Corinthians14:20 Wachalal je mixchomanic jacha' ac'alab. Chixux ac'alab che ri etzelal; chixux c'u ri'jab aretak quixchomanic. 
1Corinthians14:21 Tz'ibatal c'u pa ri pixab: “Quebench'abej na we winak ri' pa niq'uiaj tak ch'abal chic xukuje' cumal jule' tak winak chic. Mawi c'u jeri' quinquitatabej na, cächa' ri Ajawaxel.”" 
1Corinthians14:22 Je ba' ri' chi ri tzijonem pa tak ch'abal, jun etal wa' chque ri man e cojonelab taj; man chque taj ri e cojonelab. Are' c'u ri u k'axexic ri tijonic ri cuya' ri Dios, jun etal wa' chque ri cojonelab; man chque taj ri man e cojonelab taj." 
1Corinthians14:23 Rumal ri', we conojel ri cojonelab cäquimulij quib, conojel c'ut quetzijon pa jule' tak ch'abal, queboc c'u ri man c'o ta queta'm o ri man cojonelab taj, ¿la ma ta cäquibij ri' chi ix conirinak?" 
1Corinthians14:24 We c'u cätajin cäquik'axej ri u tzij ri Dios chque ri winak aretak coc bic jun ri man cojonel taj o ri man c'o ta reta'm, aretak cuta' ri qui tzij conojel, cuch'ob c'u na ri' chi c'o u mac xukuje' cuchomaj na jas ri c'o pa ranima'," 
1Corinthians14:25 quel na chi sak ri jastak ri e c'o pa ranima'. Je c'u ri' chi cutzak na rib cho ri ulew, cuk'ijilaj na ri Dios xukuje' cubij c'ut chi kastzij c'o ri Dios iwuc'." 
1Corinthians14:26 Chuq'uisbalil, wachalal, aretak ri ix qui mulij iwib, jujun cuya' caquibixoj salm, jujun chic cuya' caquiya' tijonic, o caquiya' u bixic ri u k'alajisam ri Dios chque, o quech'aw pa jule' tak ch'abal chic, o quequik'alajisaj. Ronojel c'ut chux xak xuwi che qui q'uiyibal ri cojonelab." 
1Corinthians14:27 Aretak c'u chban tzijonem pa jalan tak ch'abal, chquibana' xak xuwi' quieb winak o e oxib we e c'o na, chquijujunal c'ut; rajawaxic chi c'o jun quebuk'alajisaj tak we ch'abal ri'." 
1Corinthians14:28 We man c'o jun pa ri comon cojonelab ri cäcuin che u k'alajisaxic ri cubij ri winak pa ri jalan ch'abal, mach'aw ba' we winak ri'. Chäch'aw chbil rib ruc' ri Dios." 
1Corinthians14:29 We caquiya' u bixic ri yo'm chque rumal ri Dios, e quieb o e oxib chech'awok, ri niq'uiaj chic chquichomaj rij ri cäbixic." 
1Corinthians14:30 We c'u c'o jun ri t'uyulic cäk'alajisax jun jasach chuwäch rumal ri Dios, ri nabe mäch'aw chic." 
1Corinthians14:31 We je cäban wa', conojel ri' quek'ax pa ri jok'otaj ri yo'm chque, cuya' ri' caquiya' tijonic ri cuya' ri Dios chque rech conojel quebetamanic quechajin c'u anima'." 
1Corinthians14:32 Ri u ya'ic qui tzijol ri cubij Dios rajawaxic cu na ri cubij ruc' ri cubano, rajawaxic cätakan puwi'." 
1Corinthians14:33 Ri Dios man are ta jun Dios re tuquin ib, xane' re jamaril. Je chbanok jas ri banom pa conojel tak ri comon cojonelab." 
1Corinthians14:34 Xak cheyinil ri ixokib pa tak ri comon cojonelab, rumal rech chi man ya'tal ta chque quech'awic. Xane' chquiya' quib pa takic jas ri cubij ri pixab." 
1Corinthians14:35 We c'o jun jasach cäcaj cäquetamaj, chquita' chque ri kas cachajil cho cachoch. Man utz taj we ri ixok cätzijon pa ri k'ijilanic." 
1Corinthians14:36 Chnataj chiwe chi ri u tzij ri Dios man xchapletaj ta ulok iwuc' ix, mawi ne xak xuwi ta ri ix ix c'amowinak." 
1Corinthians14:37 We c'o jun cuchomaj rib chi k'axal u tzij ri Dios, o cuchomaj rib chi uxlabisam rumal ri Uxlabaxel, cuch'ob na wa' we cätajin quintz'ibaj u takanic ri Ajawaxel." 
1Corinthians14:38 Ri man cuch'ob taj, much'ob ba' wa'." 
1Corinthians14:39 Je ba' ri', wachalal, sibalaj chirayij ri u k'alajisaxic ri tijonic ri yo'm chiwe rumal ri Dios. Mebik'atij c'u qui wäch ri quetzijon pa niq'uiaj tak ch'abal chic." 
1Corinthians14:40 Chban c'u ronojel ruc' colomal xukuje' ruc' cholajil. 
1Corinthians15:1 Wachalal, quinwaj chi cänataj chiwe jas ri xintzijoj canok. Are ri utzalaj tak tzij wa' ri xic'amowaj, man i yo'm ta c'u canok." 
1Corinthians15:2 Rumal c'u wa' ix colotajinak chic, we man quiya' can ri xintzijoj chiwe, we man xak lok' ix cojoninak." 
1Corinthians15:3 Are c'ut ri kas in xinc'amowic are' wa' xinya' u bixic chiwe, are' c'u wa' ri sibalaj nim na u k'ij: chi ri Crist xcäm qui mac quech ri e ka mac, je jacha' ri caquibij ri e Tz'ibatalic," 
1Corinthians15:4 chi xmukic, xc'astaj churox k'ij, jas cubij ri Tz'ibatalic," 
1Corinthians15:5 chi xuc'ut rib chuwäch ri Lu', c'äte ri' xuc'ut rib chquiwäch ri cablajuj." 
1Corinthians15:6 C'äte ri' xuc'ut chi rib chquiwäch niq'uiaj kachalal chic ri e c'o na chuwäch job sient. Conojel junam xquil ri Jesus. E q'ui c'u chque e c'asal na camic, e c'o c'u ne jujun e cäminak chic." 
1Corinthians15:7 C'äte c'u ri' xuc'ut rib chuwäch ri Santiag, xukuje' xuc'ut rib chquiwäch conojel ri takomxenlab." 
1Corinthians15:8 Chuq'uisbalil xuc'ut c'u na rib chnuwäch jacha' ta ne chuwäch jun ne' ri calaxic aretak c'ä majok copan u k'ijol. 
1Corinthians15:9 Ri in c'ut man c'o ta nu banic chquixo'l ri takomxenlab. Man takal taj cäbix takom chwe, rumal rech chi xinban na c'ax chque ri e rech ri u comon cojonelab ri Dios." 
1Corinthians15:10 Rumal c'ut ri u tok'ob ri Dios ri in je nu banic wa' camic; are c'u ri u tok'ob ma ta c'o xubej chwe. Xane' sibalaj in chacuninak na chquiwäch conojel e are'; pune' c'u man in taj, xane' are' ri Dios, ri chupam ri rutzil in u to'm." 
1Corinthians15:11 We in o ri e are', are wa' ri cäkatzijoj, are wa' xukuje' ri xicojo." 
1Corinthians15:12 We c'u cäkatzijoj chi ri Crist c'astajinak chic chquixo'l ri cäminakib, ¿jas c'u che cäquibij jujun chixo'l chi man quec'astaj ta ri cäminakib?" 
1Corinthians15:13 We c'u man quec'astaj ri cäminakib, man c'astajinak ta ba ri' ri Crist." 
1Corinthians15:14 We c'u man xc'astaj ri Crist, xak ba' lok' ri' ri ka tzijonic, xukuje' xak lok' ri' ri i cojonic." 
1Corinthians15:15 We ta jeri', xa ba' uj banal tak tzij ri' chrij ri Dios, rumal rech chi xäkak'alajisaj chi ri Dios xuc'astajisaj ri Crist; we ri cäminakib man quec'astaj taj mawi ri Crist xc'astajic." 
1Corinthians15:16 We c'u man quec'astaj ri cäminakib, ma ta xc'astaj ri' ri Crist." 
1Corinthians15:17 We man xc'astaj ri Crist, man c'o ta u patan ri' ri i cojonic, c'ä ix c'o ri' pa ri i mac." 
1Corinthians15:18 Xukuje' ba' ri' ri xecojon che ri Crist ri xecämic, sachinak ba' qui wäch ri'." 
1Corinthians15:19 We xak xuwi pa we c'aslemal ri' cu'l wi ka c'u'x chrij ri Crist, ya'tal ba' na ri tok'obisabal wächaj chke uj chquixo'l conojel ri winak." 
1Corinthians15:20 Are' c'u ri Crist c'astajinak chic chquixo'l ri cäminakib. Ri are' are' nabe wächinic chquixo'l ri cäminakib ri quec'astaj na. 
1Corinthians15:21 Rumal c'u jun winak, xpe ri cämical. Xukuje' rumal jun winak, quec'astaj na ri cäminakib." 
1Corinthians15:22 Je c'u ri' jacha' conojel quecäm na ruc' ri Adan, je c'u ri xukuje' conojel caquirik na ri c'aslemal ruc' ri Crist." 
1Corinthians15:23 Quec'astaj c'u chquijujunal pa ri qui cholajil: Ri Crist are nabe wächinic chquixo'l, c'äte ri' quec'astaj na ri e rech ri Crist aretak ri are' cäpetic." 
1Corinthians15:24 Chuq'uisbalil, ri Crist cujach na ri ajawibal che ri Dios Tataxel, cusach c'u qui wäch conojel ri e c'o paquiwi' niq'uiaj chic, conojel ri c'o qui takanic xukuje' conojel ri c'o qui cuinem." 
1Corinthians15:25 Rajawaxic cätakan na ri are' puwi' ronojel, c'ä quebuya' na conojel ri u c'ulel chuxe' ri rakan." 
1Corinthians15:26 Ri q'uisbal c'ulel ri cusach na u wäch, are ri cämical." 
1Corinthians15:27 Ri Dios xebuya' conojel ri jastak pa takic chuxe' ri rakan. Aretak ri Tz'ibatalic cubij: “Conojel ri jastak e yo'm pa takic che”, k'alaj chi man are' ta jun ri Dios, are c'u ya' ri are' xeyo'w conojel ri jastak pa takic che." 
1Corinthians15:28 Aretak conojel ri jastak queyataj na pa takic che, c'äte ri' xukuje' ri C'ojolaxel cuya' na rib pa takic che ri Tataxel ri xeyo'w conojel ri jastak pa takic che ri are', rech ri Dios cux na ronojel, puwi' ronojel." 
1Corinthians15:29 We man jeri', ri caquijunaj quib cuc' ri cäminakib, ¿jasche caquibano? We ri cäminakib man quec'astaj taj, ¿jasche caban junatajic cuc'?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Xukuje', ¿jasche ri uj amak'el xa quieb cubij pakawi' ronojel k'ij?" 
1Corinthians15:31 Quinjiquiba' chiwe, tak wachalal, rumal ri juluwem ri nu rikom rumal iwech pa ri Kajaw Jesucrist, chi k'ij chi k'ij quincämic." 
1Corinthians15:32 We jas ri u beya'l ri winak xinch'ojin cuc' ri c'analaj tak awaj pa Epes, ¿jas ta quinwechbej? We man quec'astaj ri cäminakib, “chujwokok, chujuq'uianok, chwek c'ut cujcämic.”" 
1Corinthians15:33 Miya' iwib pa subic. Jacha' ri xubij jachin jun: “Ri e itzel tak achilanic que quetzelaj ri e utzalaj tak nak'atisabal.” 
1Corinthians15:34 Kas chichomaj na jas ri quibano, chibana' ri suq'uil, mixmacunic. E c'o jujun chiwe ri c'ämaja' caquetamaj u wäch ri Dios. Quinbij wa' chiwe rech quixq'uixic." 
1Corinthians15:35 Cäraj ne c'o jun cubij: “¿Jas lo ri qui c'astajic ri cäminakib? ¿Jas lo ri qui cuerp aretak quewalijic?” 
1Corinthians15:36 Ri je cubij wa', xa man cäraj ta ri' cäch'obonic. Aretak cätic jun ija', rajawaxic chi cäcäm na rech cätuxic." 
1Corinthians15:37 Ri ija' ri cätiquic, man are ta ri' quel ulok, xane' are ri u tux, we trico o jun ija' chic." 
1Corinthians15:38 Ri Dios c'ut cäyo'w ri u banic ri tico'n, jas ri xraj. Cuya' chque ri ija' chquijujunal ri qui banic ri qui cuerp." 
1Corinthians15:39 Conojel ri c'o qui ti'jal, man xa ta junam u wäch ri qui ti'jal. Xane' jun wi ri qui ti'jal ri winak, jun chi wi ri qui ti'jal ri awaj cajcaj cakan, jun chi wi ri que ri chicop ri c'o qui xic', jun chi wi ri qui ti'jal ri cär." 
1Corinthians15:40 E c'o jastak e je'lic pa ri caj jacha' ri k'ij, ri ch'imil tak, ri ic' ri cätununic. Xukuje' e c'o jastak cho ri uwächulew ri e je'lic, e are' c'u ri jastak ri e c'o pa ri caj man c'u quejunamataj taj ri qui je'lical cuc' ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew." 
1Corinthians15:41 Jun wi ri u juluwem ri k'ij, jun chi wi ri u juluwem ri ic', jun chi wi ri qui juluwem ri ch'imil. Xukuje' ri ch'imil jalajoj ri qui juluwem." 
1Corinthians15:42 Jeri' xukuje' ri qui c'astajic ri cäminakib. Cämuk can jun cuerp ri cäk'ayic, cäc'astaj na jun cuerp ri man cäk'ay ta chic." 
1Corinthians15:43 Ri cämukic man c'o ta chic u patan, ri cac'astajic cajuluw chic. Ri cämukic tukar, ri cac'astajic c'o chic u cuinem." 
1Corinthians15:44 Cämuk can jun cuerp aj uwächulew, cäc'astaj na jun cuerp aj uxlabal. We c'o cuerp aj uwächulew, xukuje' c'o cuerp aj uxlabal." 
1Corinthians15:45 Jewa' xukuje' tz'ibatalic: “Xban ri nabe achi, Adan, are jun winak ri xya' u c'aslemal.” Are c'u ri q'uisbal Adan, are jun uxlabal ri cuya' c'aslemal." 
1Corinthians15:46 Man are ta c'u nabe ri aj uxlabal, xane' ri aj k'alaj wachil; c'äte chic xpe ri aj uxlabal." 
1Corinthians15:47 Ri nabe achi ri xesax che ri ulew, are aj uwächulew. Ri ucab achi, are aj chicaj." 
1Corinthians15:48 Je jas ri nabe achi re ulew, e je xukuje' conojel ri winak e aj ulew. Je jas ri achi aj chicaj, e je xukuje' ri e aj chicaj." 
1Corinthians15:49 Camic je ka banic jas ri nabe achi re ulew, c'äte c'u ri' je cujpe na jas ri achi aj chicaj." 
1Corinthians15:50 Are c'u quinbij wa', wachalal, chi ri cuerp re ti'j, re quic', man cäcuin ta che rechbexic ri rajawibal ri Dios, rumal rech chi ri cuerp ri cäk'ayic man cäcuin ta che quechbexic ri jastak ri man cäq'uis ta qui wäch." 
1Corinthians15:51 Chiwilampe', quinbij jun jasach chiwe ri man etamatal ta can nabe: Man konojel taj cujcäm na, konojel c'ut cujq'uextaj na." 
1Corinthians15:52 Pa jun aninakil, pa jun jakow bak'wächaj, aretak cok' ri q'uisbal trompet, cok'esax c'u na ri trompet, te c'u ri' quec'astajisax na ri cäminakib ruc' jun cuerp ri man cäcäm ta chic. Ri uj c'ut cujq'uextaj na." 
1Corinthians15:53 We ka banic ri' ri cäk'ayic, rajawaxic cätz'iakix c'u na ruc' ri man cäk'ay taj. Xukuje' we cuerp ri' ri cäcämic, rajawaxic cätz'iakix na ruc' ri man cäcäm taj." 
1Corinthians15:54 Aretak we ka banic ri' ri cäk'ayic atz'iakim chi ruc' ri man cäk'ay taj, aretak we cuerp ri' ri cäcämic atz'iakim chi ruc' ri man cäcäm taj, c'äte ri' cäc'ulmataj na ri tz'ibam canok: “Xbik'taj c'u ri cämical rumal ri ch'äcanic." 
1Corinthians15:55 Cämical, ¿jawije' c'o wi ri a cuinem che u banic c'ax chke? Cämical, ¿jawije' c'o wi ri a ch'äcanic?”" 
1Corinthians15:56 Are c'u ri mac cäbanow che ri cämical chi cuban c'ax chke, xukuje' ri pixab are cäyo'w ri u chuk'ab ri mac." 
1Corinthians15:57 ¡Maltiox ba' che ri Dios ri cäyo'w chke chi cujch'äcan rumal ri Kajaw Jesucrist! 
1Corinthians15:58 Je c'u ri', lok'alaj tak wachalal, kas co chixtac'alok, man c'o ta quixslabsanic. Amak'el chixoc il che ri u chac ri Ajawaxel. Iweta'm chi ri i chac pa ri Ajawaxel man xak ta lok'." 
1Corinthians16:1 Chrij c'u ri cuchuj chque ri kachalal ri ajcristib, jas ri xebentak wi conojel ri comon cojonelab pa Galas, je chibana' ix xukuje'." 
1Corinthians16:2 Ronojel nabe tak k'ij re ri seman, chijujunal chitasa' jubik' ri i ch'äcom, chimulij apanok, rech aretak quinopanic, man c'äte ta ri' quemol ri cuchuj." 
1Corinthians16:3 Aretak quinopanic, quebentak na bic ri kachalal ri quebicha' chixo'l, quinya' c'u na bic wuj pa qui k'ab, rech cäquic'am bic ri i cuchuj pa Jerusalen." 
1Corinthians16:4 We c'u cuya' quinbe in xukuje', quincachilaj na bic." 
1Corinthians16:5 Quinbe na iwuc' aretak chinoc'ow pa Masedon. Nabe quebensolij na can ri c'olbal re Masedon. 
1Corinthians16:6 Cäraj ne quincanaj can iwuc', o we ne quinwoc'owisaj ri k'ij re tew chila', rech quiniwachilaj bic ri' jawije' ri quinbe chi wi na." 
1Corinthians16:7 Man quinwaj taj chi xak ta xuwi quixinca'yej canok, weye'm c'ut chi quincanaj jun k'ijol iwuc', we cuya' ri Ajawaxel Jesus chwe;" 
1Corinthians16:8 quinc'oji' na can pa Epes c'ä pa ri nimak'ij re cawinak lajuj k'ij. 
1Corinthians16:9 Rumal rech chi yo'm chwe rumal ri Ajawaxel ri u banic jun nimalaj chac, ri utz quel na. E q'ui c'u ri cäquiban qui c'ulel chwe." 
1Corinthians16:10 We copan ri Timotey, chiwila' chi c'o u q'ueyowal muriko, chc'ol c'u iwuc', rumal rech chi ri are' cuban ri u chac ri Ajawaxel jacha' ri in." 
1Corinthians16:11 C'o ba' jun chiwe metzelan u wäch. Xane' chijacha' ulok ruc' jamaril, aretak cäpe wuc'. Quinweyej c'u cuc' ri kachalal." 
1Corinthians16:12 Are ri kachalal Apols, sibalaj xinbochi'j rech copan iwuc' querachilaj bic ri kachalal. Man xraj ta c'ut xbe camic. Cäbe c'u na aretak cäcuinic." 
1Corinthians16:13 Chixc'asc'atok. Co chixc'ol pa ri i cojonic. Chc'ol nimalaj i chuk'ab, xukuje' co chixc'olok." 
1Corinthians16:14 Ronojel ri jastak ri quibano, chibana' ruc' lok'ok'ebal i c'u'x." 
1Corinthians16:15 Wachalal, iweta'm chi ri e aj uwo rachoch ri Stepns, are e nabe tak cojonelab chquixo'l ri winak ri e c'o pa Acay, qui yo'm c'u quib che qui patanixic ri kachalal pa ri cojonic." 
1Corinthians16:16 Quixinbochi'j chi quiya' iwib pa takic chque ri kachalal ri e je tak jas ri e are', xukuje' chque conojel ri quetobanic ri cäquicos quib pa ri chac." 
1Corinthians16:17 Quinquicotic chi xepe ri Stepns, ri Portunat xukuje' ri Acaic, rumal rech chi e are' xebanow ri man xiban ta ix chwe." 
1Corinthians16:18 Xquiya' u chuk'ab ri wanima', xukuje' ri iwe ix. Nim ba chebiwila' wi ri jewa' cäquibano." 
1Corinthians16:19 Ri e comon cojonelab ri e c'o pa Asiy cäquiya' rutzil i wäch. Ri Aquil xukuje' ri Prisil, xukuje' conojel ri cojonelab ri cäquimulij quib pa ri cachoch, cäquiya' nimalaj rutzil i wäch." 
1Corinthians16:20 Conojel ri kachalal cäquiya' rutzil i wäch. Chiyala' rutzil i wäch ruc' nimalaj rutzil wächaj, che u c'utic chi sibalaj nim quiwil wi iwib ix tastalic tak winak." 
1Corinthians16:21 Ri in Pawl, quinya' rutzil i wäch, kas quintz'ibaj ruc' ri nu k'ab." 
1Corinthians16:22 We c'o jun ri man culok'ok'ej ta ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist, chäkaj ba' chuxe' c'okonic. ¡Chpet ba' la, Ajawaxel!" 
1Corinthians16:23 Ri u tok'ob ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist chc'ol iwuc'. 
1Corinthians16:24 Ri nu lok'ok'ebal c'u'x pa ri Crist Jesus chc'ol iwuc' iwonojel. 
2Corinthians1:1 Ri in Pawl, in takom rech ri Jesucrist rumal ri u rayibal ri Dios. In xukuje' ri kachalal Timotey cäkatz'ibaj we wuj ri' chque ri e re ri u comon cojonelab ri Dios ri c'o pa Corint, xukuje' chque conojel ri winak ri e rech ri Dios ri e c'o pa Acay." 
2Corinthians1:2 Tok'ob xukuje' jamaril chc'ol ta iwuc' rumal ri Dios ka Tat, xukuje' rumal ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist." 
2Corinthians1:3 Cäkanimarisaj u k'ij ri u Dios xukuje' ri u Tat ri Kajaw Jesucrist. Are Tataxel wa' ri cutok'obisaj ka wäch, are Dios wa' ri cucu'bisaj ka c'u'x pa ronojel." 
2Corinthians1:4 Ri are' cucu'bisaj ka c'u'x pa conojel ri ka c'axc'olil, rech cujcuin che u cu'bisaxic qui c'u'x niq'uiaj chic ri e c'o pa ronojel u wäch c'axc'olil. Jas ri u cu'bisaxic ka c'u'x uj rumal ri Dios, je cäkaban uj che u cu'bisaxic qui c'u'x niq'uiaj chic." 
2Corinthians1:5 Je c'ut jacha' ri qui q'uiyal ri e rikoj tak c'ax aj Crist kumal, jeri' xukuje' ri qui q'uiyiric ri e u cu'bisaxic ka c'u'x rumal ri Jesucrist." 
2Corinthians1:6 We cäkarik c'axc'olil uj, are wa' che u cu'bisaxic i c'u'x ix xukuje' rech quixcolotajic. We c'u cäcu'bisax ka c'u'x uj, are wa' che u cu'bisaxic i c'u'x ix. Jeri' quixcuinic quik'i' ri c'axc'olil jas ri c'axc'olil ri cäkarik uj." 
2Corinthians1:7 Sibalaj cu'l c'u ka c'u'x chiwij. Keta'm chi jas ri u rikic iwe ri c'axc'olil, jeri' xukuje' quirik iwe ri cu'bisabal c'uxaj." 
2Corinthians1:8 Cäkaj c'ut, wachalal, chi quiwetamaj jas ri c'ax ri xkarik pa Asiy. Sibalaj nim ri c'ax xkariko, ri man c'o ta chi ka chuk'ab che u ch'ijic. Jeri' chi man c'o ta chi cu'lbal ka c'u'x chrij chi cujc'asi'c." 
2Corinthians1:9 Xkabij c'u pa kanima' chi cujc'okox che cämical. Je c'u xkac'ulmaj wa rech man cakajiquiba' ta ka c'u'x chkij chbil kib, xane' chrij ri Dios, ri quebuc'astajisaj ri cäminakib." 
2Corinthians1:10 Ri are' xujuto' chuwäch jun c'axalaj cämical, xukuje' cätajin cujuto'o. Cu'l c'u ka c'u'x chrij ri are' chi cujuto' na," 
2Corinthians1:11 we ri ix cujito' pa ri i ch'awem ruc' Dios, we e q'ui cäquiban ch'awem ruc' Dios pakawi', e q'ui c'ut quemaltioxinic rumal rech ri tewichibal ri yo'm chke rumal ri Dios." 
2Corinthians1:12 Sibalaj cujquicot rumal wa', chi cäkana' pa ri canima' chi uj tastalic tak winak che u patanixic ri Dios xukuje' man xa ta quieb kanima' pa ronojel ri ka banom cuc' conojel ri winak kas c'u are na chixo'l ix. Are ri Dios yowinak wa' chke rumal ri u tok'ob, man are ta rumal quetamabal winak." 
2Corinthians1:13 Xak xuwi quekatz'ibaj bic ri jastak chiwe ri quixcuin che qui ch'obic aretak quisiq'uij u wäch. Cu'l c'u nu c'u'x chi kas quich'ob na ronojel," 
2Corinthians1:14 je jas ri iwetamam chi jubik', chi cäquicot ri iwanima' rumal kech uj aretak cäpe ri u k'ij ri Kajaw Jesucrist, ri uj xukuje' cäquicot na ri kanima' rumal iwech." 
2Corinthians1:15 Nu cuban nu c'u'x che wa', in nu chomam chi nabe quinbe che iwilic, quinban c'u ri tok'ob chiwe chi camul quixinsolij." 
2Corinthians1:16 Nu chomam c'ut i solixic nabe aretak quinoc'owic pa ri nu bic pa Masedon, aretak c'u quintzelej ulok, quixinsolij chi jumul. Jeri' ri ix quixcuin ri' che nu to'ic chanim che ri nu bic pa Juda." 
2Corinthians1:17 We are nu chomanic wa', ¿la xa lo man utz ta ri nu chomanic ri xinbano? O ¿la xa lo quinban ri u rayibal ri nu ti'jal, rech pa ri junam k'ijol quinbij: “je je, jayi' jayi'”?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Ri Dios are' k'alajisanel chi man kabin ta chiwe “je” xukuje' “jayi'” pa ri k'ijol ri'. 
2Corinthians1:19 Rumal rech chi ri u C'ojol ri Dios, ri Jesucrist, ri xkatzijoj chiwe cuc' ri Silban xukuje' ri Timotey, ri tzij ri xkabij man are ta “je” xukuje' ta “jayi'”. Xane' ri tzij are “je” rumal ri Crist." 
2Corinthians1:20 Conojel ri jastak ri u bim ri Dios chi cuya' chke, queyataj chke rumal ri Jesucrist. Rumal ri', aretak cäkanimarisaj u k'ij ri Dios, cäkabij “je chbanok” rumal ri Jesucrist." 
2Corinthians1:21 Ri Dios cujtiquiban che ri Crist junam iwuc', xukuje' uj u cha'om c'ut." 
2Corinthians1:22 Ri are' u cojom ketal che u c'utic chi uj rech. Xukuje' u yo'm ri Uxlabaxel pa ri kanima', c'utbal wa' chi cäyataj na ri jastak chke ri u bim ri Dios." 
2Corinthians1:23 Quincoj ri Dios che k'alajisanel puwi' ri wanima', chi man in benak ta pa Corint, rumal rech chi quintok'obisaj i wäch." 
2Corinthians1:24 Man cujtakan ta puwi' ri i cojonic. Xane' quixkato' rech c'o i quicotemal. Co chi c'u ix tac'al pa ri i cojonic. 
2Corinthians2:1 Are c'u xinchomaj chi man quinbe ta chi jumul iwuc' che i ch'abexic ri quixuc'axc'obisaj. 
2Corinthians2:2 We quixinya' pa bis, ¿jachin ta c'u ri cabanow chwe chi quinquicotic? ¿La ma ta ix ri' ri quixbison wumal?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Are c'u xintz'ibaj bic wa' chiwe, rech aretak quinopanic, ma ta quinbison iwumal. Rajawaxic c'ut chi cäquicot ri wanima' rumal iwech. Cu'l c'u nu c'u'x chiwij iwonojel, chi iwonojel c'o quicotemal pa iwanima', jas ri quicotemal ri c'o pa ri wanima' in." 
2Corinthians2:4 Aretak xintz'ibaj bic we wuj ri' chiwe, sibalaj cäbison ri wanima' ruc' nimalaj bis chiwe, sibalaj quinok'ic. Man xintz'ibaj ta wa' chiwe rech quixbisonic, xane' rech quich'obo chi sibalaj quixinlok'ok'ej." 
2Corinthians2:5 We c'o jun u yo'm bis, man xuwi ta chwe in u yo'm wi, xane' kas u yo'm chiwe iwonojel. Je quinbij wa' rech man sibalaj ta c'ax ri nu tzij." 
2Corinthians2:6 Ruc' wa' we yajanic ri' che ri achi ri', e q'ui chiwe e yajowinak chic." 
2Corinthians2:7 Miban chi c'u che camic. Xane' chisacha' u mac, chicu'bisaj u c'u'x, rech man cäc'axc'ob ta rumal ri nimalaj bis." 
2Corinthians2:8 Rumal ri' quixinbochi'j chi jumul quiban utzil che, rech cuch'obo chi quilok'ok'ej na." 
2Corinthians2:9 Rumal c'u ri' xintz'ibam chiwe, rech kas quinwetamaj jas ri quibano, we quinimaj ronojel ri nu tzij." 
2Corinthians2:10 We ri ix quisach u mac jun, xukuje' ri in quinsach u mac. We c'o jun mac nu sachom, nu banom rumal iwech, chuwäch ri Crist." 
2Corinthians2:11 Jewa' rech man c'o ta jas cuch'äc ri Satanas chkij. Kas cäkach'ob c'ut ri u nawinic. 
2Corinthians2:12 Aretak xinopan pa Troas ri nimalaj tinimit che u tzijoxic ri u tijonic ri Crist, xinch'obo chi sibalaj ya'talic quinban ri u chac ri Ajawaxel Jesus." 
2Corinthians2:13 Man xuxlan ta c'u ri wanima', rumal rech chi man xinrik ta ri Tit ri kachalal. Rumal wa', xinbij can chque chi quinbe na pa Masedon." 
2Corinthians2:14 Maltiox ba' che ri Dios, chi amak'el cujuc'am bic pa ri ch'äcanic pa ri Crist Jesus chi rumal c'u kech cuya' retamaxic ri u tijonic ri cäjabun, pa conojel c'olbal jacha' jun c'oc'alaj uxlab." 
2Corinthians2:15 Uj je ta ne ri c'oc'alaj ruxlab jun c'oc'al ri cuya' ri Crist chuwäch ri Dios; we uxlab ri' c'o chquixo'l ri winak ri quecolotajic xukuje' chquixo'l ri winak ri cäsach qui wäch. 
2Corinthians2:16 Chque ri cäsach qui wäch, are ruxlab cämical ri quebucämisaj. Chque c'u ri quecolotajic, are ruxlab c'aslemal ri cuya' qui c'aslemal. Chque c'u we jastak ri', ¿jachin ta c'u lo ri ticarel?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Uj man uj ta junam cuc' e q'ui ri cäquesaj qui ch'äcoj che ri tijonic ri cuya' ri Dios, xane' ruc' ronojel kanima', uj takom rumal ri Dios, xukuje' chuwäch ri Dios cujtzijon pa ri Crist." 
2Corinthians3:1 ¿La cäkabij lo jumul chic chiwe chi sibalaj utz ka banic? ¿La rajawaxic chi cäkaya' bic wuj chiwe rech quiwetamaj chi uj utz, je jas ri cäquiban jujun? O ¿la rajawaxic chi ri ix quiya' wuj chke?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Ix c'u ri' ri ix ka wuj, tz'ibatal pa ri kanima'. Etamatal cumal conojel ri winak, xukuje' qui siq'uim u wäch ri wuj ri'." 
2Corinthians3:3 K'alajisam chi c'ut chi ix u wuj ri Crist, jachom kumal uj, man tz'ibatal ta ruc' xak, xane' ruc' ri Uxlabaxel re ri c'aslic Dios. Man tz'ibatal ta cho tz'alam tak abaj, xane' cho tak canima' winak." 
2Corinthians3:4 Are cu'lbal ka c'u'x wa' chrij ri Dios rumal ri Crist. 
2Corinthians3:5 Man cäkachomaj taj chi cujcuin che u banic jun jasach xa' ka tuquiel. Xane' are ri Dios cäyo'w ka chuk'ab che u banic ri cäkabano. 
2Corinthians3:6 Ri Dios xuya' chke chi cäkatzijoj ri c'ac' u c'ulwächinic. Man rech ta ri pixab ri tz'ibatalic, xane' rech ri Uxlabaxel. Ri tz'ibatalic cäcämisanic, are c'u ri Uxlabaxel cuya' c'aslemal." 
2Corinthians3:7 Ri pixab tz'ibam cho tak abaj. Ruc' c'u juluwem xpetic, jeri' chi ri winak aj Israel man xecuin taj xquica'yej ri u palaj ri Moises, rumal rech chi xjuluwic. Are c'u we juluwem ri' xsach u wäch. We c'u ri pixab ri cuya' cämical xpe ruc' juluwem," 
2Corinthians3:8 ¡sibalaj nim c'u na ri u juluwem ri c'ac' c'ulwächinic ri yo'm chke rumal ri Uxlabaxel! 
2Corinthians3:9 We c'o u juluwem ri pixab ri cuban chke chi cäc'äjisax ka wäch, ¡sibalaj nim c'u na ri u juluwem ri u tzijoxic chque ri winak chi ri Dios cujuk'alajisaj chi uj suc'!" 
2Corinthians3:10 C'o u juluwem ri pixab nabe. Camic c'ut man c'o ta chic, chuwäch ri jun ri sibalaj nim na u juluwem." 
2Corinthians3:11 We c'o u juluwem ri jun jasach ri cäsach u wäch, sibalaj nim ba' na ri u juluwem ri jun jasach ri man q'uisel taj." 
2Corinthians3:12 Cu'l ka c'u'x chrij wa'. Rumal ri' cäkatzijoj ronojel, man cäkaxe'j ta kib." 
2Corinthians3:13 Man je taj jas ri Moises, ri xuya' jun ch'ukubal cho ri u palaj, rech ri winak aj israelib man cäquil taj aretak cäbe u chupic ri juluwem ri cäsach u wäch." 
2Corinthians3:14 Ri qui ch'obobal c'ut e abajirinak; c'ä pa ri k'ij camic jekelinak ri junam ch'ukubal aretak cäsiq'uix u wäch ri ojer c'ulwächinic. Man esam ta ri ch'ukubal chque, rumal rech chi xak xuwi ri Crist cäcuin che resaxic." 
2Corinthians3:15 C'ä pa ri k'ij camic, aretak cäquisiq'uij u wäch ri u wuj ri Moises, yo'm ri jun ch'ukubal puwi' ri canima', jeri' man cäquich'ob taj." 
2Corinthians3:16 Aretak cäquiya' can ri ojer c'aslemal xukuje' quecojon che ri Ajawaxel, quesax c'u na ri ch'ukubal." 
2Corinthians3:17 Are' c'ut ri Ajawaxel are ri Uxlabaxel. Jawije' c'ut ri c'o wi ri Ruxlabal ri Ajawaxel chi c'o wi torotajic. 
2Corinthians3:18 Ri uj c'ut konojel man ch'ukutal ta chic ri ka palaj. Cäkak'alajisaj ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel jas jun ilbal ib. Je c'u ri' cujq'uextajic, ronojel k'ij nim na ri u juluwem c'o kuc', rech cujux na jacha' ri Crist. Are ri Uxlabaxel re ri Ajawaxel cäbanow wa'." 
2Corinthians4:1 Je c'u ri' man cäq'uistaj ta ka c'u'x, rumal rech chi ri Dios yowinak ri chac ri' pa ka k'ab rumal ri u tok'ob." 
2Corinthians4:2 Man cäkaban ta q'uixbalalaj tak jastak chi c'uyal; man quixkasub taj, mawi cäkayujaj niq'uiaj jastak chic ruc' ri u tzij ri Dios. Xane' rumal ri u c'utic ri kastzij, cäkak'alajisaj kib chuwäch ri retamabal u c'u'x ronojel winak chi uj utz, chuwäch ri Dios." 
2Corinthians4:3 We c'u ri tzij re colobal ib ri cäkatzijoj ch'ukutalic, chquiwäch ri cäsach qui wäch ch'ukutal wi." 
2Corinthians4:4 E are' c'u wa' ri man e cojonelab taj, ri dios quech we k'ij junab ri' xumoyirisaj ri qui ch'obobal, rech man cäquil ta ri u chaj ri c'ac' tzijol ri canicowic ri xuc'am ulok ri juluwemalaj Crist, c'aslicalaj u wächbal ri Dios." 
2Corinthians4:5 Man cäkatzijoj ta kib, xane' are cäkatzijoj ri Jesucrist jacha' Ajawaxel, xukuje' chi ri uj uj pataninel iwe rumal ri Jesus." 
2Corinthians4:6 Ri Dios, ri xubij: “Chtunun ri sakil pa ri k'eku'm”, are ri' ri xtunun pa ri kanima', rech cäketamaj ri u juluwem ri Dios ri cäjuluw che ri u palaj ri Jesucrist." 
2Corinthians4:7 We k'inomal ri' pa tak ri ka cuerp c'o wi, are je jas ri lak re ulew. Jeri' cäk'alajinic chi ri nimalaj cuinem, ruc' ri Dios cäpe wi, man kuc' ta uj." 
2Corinthians4:8 Pune' cäkarik c'axc'olil pa tak ronojel c'olbal, cujel c'u na chupam. Pune' cäsach ka c'u'x, keta'm c'ut chi cäkarik na jas ri cäkabano." 
2Corinthians4:9 Cujokataxic, man uj yo'm ta c'u canok. Cujtzakisaxic, man cäsach ta c'u ka wäch." 
2Corinthians4:10 Apawije' ri cujbe wi, kuc'am bic ri u cämic ri Jesus pa ri ka cuerp, rech xukuje' cäk'alajin ri u c'aslemal ri Jesus pa ri ka cuerp." 
2Corinthians4:11 Ri uj ri uj c'asc'oj, amak'el ka jachom kib pa ri cämical rumal ri Jesus, rech ri u c'aslemal ri Jesus cäk'alajin pa ri ka cuerp ri cämel." 
2Corinthians4:12 Je c'u ri', ri uj c'o ri cämical pakawi', are c'u ri ix c'o ri c'aslemal." 
2Corinthians4:13 Xa' junam ri cojonic c'o pa ri kanima', jas ri cubij ri Tz'ibatalic: “Xincojonic, rumal c'u ri', xintzijonic.” Xukuje' ri uj cujcojonic, rumal ri' cujtzijonic." 
2Corinthians4:14 Keta'm c'ut chi ri Dios, ri xc'astajisan ri Ajawaxel Jesus chquixo'l ri cäminakib, ri are' xukuje' ri uj cujuc'astajisaj na ruc' ri Jesus, cujutac'aba' na chuwäch, junam iwuc'." 
2Corinthians4:15 Ronojel wa' ka c'ulmam rumal iwech. Rech jeri', aretak e q'ui cäquic'am ri u tok'ob ri Dios, sibalaj e q'ui quemaltioxinic, rech cänimarisax u k'ij ri Dios." 
2Corinthians4:16 Rumal wa' man cäq'uistaj ta c'u ka c'u'x. Pune' ta ne cätajin cuban k'e'l ri ka cuerp, are c'u ri kanima' cäc'ac'arisaxic k'ij chi k'ij." 
2Corinthians4:17 Ri c'axc'olil ri cäkarik waral man al taj, ri xak oc'owel, cuban chke chi cäkarik na jun junalic juluwem ri sibalaj nim u banic, ri sibalaj c'o na chuwäch ri c'axc'olil." 
2Corinthians4:18 Man are ta cäkacu'ba' ka c'u'x chquij ri jastak ri quebilitajic, xane' chquij ri man quebilitaj taj. Ri jastak ri quebilitajic queq'uis na. Are c'u ri jastak ri man quebilitaj taj e junalic." 
2Corinthians5:1 Ri uj uj junam ruc' jun ja aj uwächulew, jacha' jun lic'om cäbal. Keta'm c'ut chi we cäsach u wäch wa', c'o jun kachoch ri junalic ruc' ri Dios pa ri caj, ri man k'abaj ta banowinak." 
2Corinthians5:2 Aretak uj c'o pa ri ka cuerp, cujbik'bitic, sibalaj cäkarayij cujk'ax pa ri kachoch chicaj," 
2Corinthians5:3 ri cujuch'uk na jacha' jun atz'iak, rech jeri' man cujch'ani taj." 
2Corinthians5:4 Joropa' c'u k'ijol cujjeki' chupam we lic'om ja ri' cujbik'bitic cäkarik c'ax man cakaj ta c'ut chi cujch'anabaxic, xane' chi chcamulix katz'iakixic jeri' chi ri cämel camojcolitaj rumal ri c'ac' c'aslemal." 
2Corinthians5:5 Ri xujsuc'uman che wa', are ri Dios. Ri are' u yo'm ri Ruxlabaxel chke, are c'utbal chi c'o cäkechbej na." 
2Corinthians5:6 Je c'u ri' ka jiquibam ka c'u'x amak'el. Keta'm c'ut chi aretak c'ä uj c'o pa ri cuerp, man uj c'o taj ruc' ri Ajawaxel." 
2Corinthians5:7 Cujbinic rumal ri cojonic, man rumal ta ri cayenic." 
2Corinthians5:8 Ka jiquibam ka c'u'x, cäkaj ta c'ut chi ma ta uj c'o chic pa ri cuerp, rech cujec'ol ruc' ri Ajawaxel." 
2Corinthians5:9 Rumal ri', cäkacoj ka chuk'ab rech utz cujril ri Ajawaxel, we uj c'o pa ri cuerp o we man uj c'o ta chic." 
2Corinthians5:10 Rajawaxic c'ut chi konojel cäkatac'aba' na kib chuwäch ri u k'atbal tzij ri Crist, rech chkajujunal cäkac'am na ri tojbal re ri ka banom aretak c'ä uj c'o pa ri ka cuerp, we utz, we man utz taj." 
2Corinthians5:11 Rumal c'u rech chi keta'm ri xe'n ib chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, quekaya' ri winak pa sak, uj c'u k'alajininak chuwäch ri Dios; cu'l nu c'u'x xukuje' chi uj k'alajininak chuwäch ri retamabal i c'u'x." 
2Corinthians5:12 Man cakak'alajisaj ta chi c'u kib jumul pa kech wi chiwäch chi uj ta utz, xane' cakaya' chiwe ri u nimarisaxic i k'ij chkij, rech c'o qui tzelej na u bixic chi quech ri caquinimarisaj qui k'ij chrij ri wächaj, man chrij ta c'ut ri c'o chupam ri anima'." 
2Corinthians5:13 We uj conirinak, che ri Dios ri'. We c'u utz ri ka chomanic, chiwe ix ri'." 
2Corinthians5:14 Ri lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x ri Crist cucoj u chuk'ab chke. Rumal rech, keta'm chi ri Jun xcäm che qui q'uexwäch conojel, rumal c'u ri' conojel xecäm pa ri are'." 
2Corinthians5:15 Xcäm c'u ri Crist che qui q'uexwäch conojel, rech ri e c'asc'oj man quec'asi' ta chic chque e are' chbil quib, xane' che ri Jun ri xcämic xukuje' xc'astajisaxic che qui q'uexwäch." 
2Corinthians5:16 Rumal ri' man cäkachomaj ta chi uj camic, jas ri cäquichomaj ri winak aj uwächulew camic; pune' xkachomaj ri Crist jas ri qui chomanic ri winak aj uwächulew, man je ta chi c'u u chomaxic wa camic cäkabano." 
2Corinthians5:17 Je c'u ri', we c'o jun c'o pa Crist, c'ac' winakirisam chic: ri ojer tak jastak xeboc'owic; chiwilampe', e c'ac' conojel ri e c'o chic." 
2Corinthians5:18 Ronojel wa' are u banoj ri Dios, ri rumal ri Crist xujuya' pa jamaril kas ruc' are', xubij c'u chke chi chkabana' tok'ob chekaya' conojel ri winak pa jamaril ruc' ri Dios." 
2Corinthians5:19 Ri u bixic wa' chi, pa ri Crist, ri Dios cätajin querutzirisaj ri ajmaquib ruc' are', man querajilaj ta c'ut ri e qui mac ri winak; are c'u ri chke uj xutz'onoj tok'ob chi chkaya' retamaxic we etamanic ri'." 
2Corinthians5:20 Je ba' ri' chi uj u q'uexwäch ri Crist, ri je ta ne are' ta ri kas Dios quixbochi'n kumal. Je ba' ri', pa ri u bi' ri Crist quixkabochi'j chi, chirika' ri jamaril ruc' ri Dios." 
2Corinthians5:21 Ri Crist man c'o ta jun macaj xubano; xa' c'u u mac kech uj, ri Dios xuban che jacha' ri cuban che ri kas macaj, rech jeri', rumal ri Crist, cujel chupam ri chak'maquil." 
2Corinthians6:1 Ri uj uj rajchaquib ri Dios junam iwuc'. Rumal ri' quixkabochi'j chi xak lok' mic'am ri u tok'ob ri Dios. 
2Corinthians6:2 Cubij c'ut ri are' chquipam ri e tz'ibatalic: “Chupam ri jok'otaj ri takalic xatintatabej; chupam ri k'ij rech ri colobal ib xatinto'o.” Camic c'ut are wa' ri k'ij utz chiwe, are wa' ri k'ij rech quixcolotajic." 
2Corinthians6:3 Man c'o ta ri cäkaya' ta wi itzel c'utbal che jachin jun, rech man cäyok' ta ri ka chac ri cätajin cäkabano." 
2Corinthians6:4 Man je ta c'u ri' pa ronojel cäkaya' c'utbal chi uj pataninel rech ri Dios, cätajin c'u cäkach'ijijej ruc' nimalaj coch'onic ri e rikoj tak c'ax, ri q'uetetem, ri e q'ueyowal tak." 
2Corinthians6:5 Aretak cujch'ayic, aretak cujcoj pa che', aretak cäquimulij quib ri ka c'ulel chkij, aretak cäkarik c'axalaj tak chac, aretak cujc'asc'atic, xukuje' aretak cäkarik numic." 
2Corinthians6:6 Pa ronojel wa': ch'ajch'oj ri ka c'aslemal, keta'm ri kastzij c'o ka coch'onic, cäkaban tak tok'ob, c'o ri Ruxlabal ri Dios kuc', kastzij quekalok'ok'ej ri winak," 
2Corinthians6:7 rumal ri ka tijonic aj kastzij xukuje' rumal ri u cuinem ri Dios pa ri uj. Quekacoj tak ri ch'ojibal aj suq'uilal, rumal ri iquiak'ab che ch'ojinic rumal ri ka mox k'ab che u to'ic ib." 
2Corinthians6:8 C'o jutak mul nim cujilic, jutak mul chic cujyok'ic; c'o chi jutak mul utz ka tzijol, c'o chi jutak mul cäbix itzel tzij chkij. Cujk'abaxic chi uj banal tak tzij, are c'u ne cäkabij ri kastzij." 
2Corinthians6:9 Cäban chke chi je ta ne ri ma ta etamatal ka wäch, sibalaj c'u ne etamatal ka wäch. Camic cäkabano, ka takem c'u ne c'aslem; cäquic'äjisaj ka wäch man c'u cuj qui cämisaj taj." 
2Corinthians6:10 Je ta ne ri cujbisonic, cujquicot c'u ne amak'el; je ta ne ri uj ta mebayib, e q'ui c'u ne ri e ka k'inomarisam; je ta ne ri ma ta c'o jas c'o kuc', c'o c'u ne ronojel kuc'." 
2Corinthians6:11 Ix aj corintib, ka bim ronojel chiwe. Quixkalok'ok'ej ruc' ronojel kanima'." 
2Corinthians6:12 Ronojel ka banom chiwe ruc' ronojel kanima'. Ix ri' man i banom ta ronojel chke ruc' ronojel iwanima'. 
2Corinthians6:13 Quixinpixbej jas cuban jun tataxel chque ri ralc'ual: Chinilok'ok'ej jas ri in quixinlok'ok'ej. 
2Corinthians6:14 Miwuc'aj iwib cuc' ri man e cojonelab taj. We je quiban wa', quixc'oji' chuxe' jun eka'bal ri man junam taj. ¿La cuya' lo caruc'aj rib ri suq'uil ruc' ri man suq'uilal taj? ¿La cuya' lo curik rib ri sakil ruc' ri k'ekumalil?" 
2Corinthians6:15 Man cuya' taj u wäch ri Crist ruc' ri itzel, mawi ri cuc'ulaj ta u wäch ri cojonel ruc' ri man cojonel taj." 
2Corinthians6:16 Man c'o ta ri cajunamataj ta wi ri rachoch Dios cuc' tak ri diosib. Rumal rech chi ri uj uj rachoch ri c'aslic Dios, jacha' ri kas u bim ri are': “Quinjeki' na xukuje' quinbin na chquixo'l ri e are': ri in quinux na qui Dios e are' c'ut ri e are' quebux na nu tinimit.”" 
2Corinthians6:17 Rumal ri' xukuje' cubij ri Ajawaxel: “Chixel chquixo'l, chitasa' iwib chquij, minak jun jasach tz'il. Ri in c'ut quixinc'am na," 
2Corinthians6:18 quinux c'u na i Tat, ri ix quixux na nu c'ojol xukuje' nu mia'l, cächa' ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem.”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Lok'alaj tak wachalal, are wa' ri u bim ri Dios chi cuya' na chke. Rumal ri' chkesaj ba' pa ri ka c'aslemal conojel ri jastak ri e tz'il ri e c'o pa ri ka cuerp xukuje' pa ri kanima'. Chkaxe'j kib chuwäch ri Dios, rech cujux tastalic tak winak pa ronojel." 
2Corinthians7:2 ¡Chujic'ama' ba' pa iwanima'! Man c'o ta etzelal ka banom che jachin jun; man c'o ta c'ax ka banom che jachin jun; man ka subum ta jachin jun. 
2Corinthians7:3 Man quinbij ta wa' che u ya'ic mac chiwij. Nu bim c'ut chi ix c'o pa ri kanima', rech cujc'asi' junam xukuje' cujcäm junam." 
2Corinthians7:4 Sibalaj nim ri cu'lbal nu c'u'x chiwij, xukuje' quinquicot iwuc'. Sibalaj cu'bisam nu c'u'x xukuje' nim ri nu quicotemal pa ronojel ri ka c'axc'olil." 
2Corinthians7:5 Aretak xujopan pa Masedon, man c'o ta uxlanem xkaya' che ri ka cuerp, xane' xekarik ronojel u wäch c'axc'olil. Xepe tak u q'ueyowal pakawi' xe'n tak ib pa ri kanima'." 
2Corinthians7:6 Are' c'u ri Dios ri cucu'bisaj qui c'u'x ri sachinak qui c'u'x, xucu'bisaj ka c'u'x ruc' ri ropanem ri Tit." 
2Corinthians7:7 Man xuwi ta rumal ri u petic xcu'bisax ka c'u'x, xane' xukuje' rumal rech chi ri are' xucu'bisaj u c'u'x chiwij. Xutzijoj c'u chke chi sibalaj quiwaj quiwil ka wäch, chi quixbison chke, chi quiwaj quiwetamaj we c'o c'ax nu rikom. Rumal ri' sibalaj xinquicotic." 
2Corinthians7:8 Pune' xixinya' pa bis rumal ri wuj, man quinbison ta c'ut chi xintz'ibaj bic chiwe. Pune' xinbison can nabe rumal rech chi ri wuj xuya' bis chiwe, xa c'u quieb oxib k'ij xixbisonic." 
2Corinthians7:9 Camic c'ut quinquicotic, man rumal ta rech chi xixbisonic, xane' rumal rech chi ri i bis xuban chiwe chi xiq'uex i c'u'x. Xixbison c'ut jas ri utz xril wi ri Dios. Jeri' man c'o ta c'ax quirik kumal." 
2Corinthians7:10 Ri bis ri cuya' ri Dios cuban che jun chi cuq'uex u c'u'x rech cäcolotajic. Man c'o ta c'u bis rumal wa'. Are c'u ri bis re ri uwächulew cuya' cämical. 
2Corinthians7:11 Ri ix xicoch' ri bis jacha' ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Dios, ¡chebiwila' c'ut ri xel wi! Xixoc il che ri xc'ulmatajic xito' c'u nu wi'; xuban chiwe chi xpe iwoyowal, xukuje' xina' xe'n ib. Chuwi' chi c'u wa' xpe i rayinic che wilic, xichomaj c'ut u c'äjisaxic u wäch ri ajchak'mac. Ruc' c'u ronojel wa' i c'utum ix chi man i nimon ta iwib chupam wa'." 
2Corinthians7:12 Je c'u ri', aretak xintz'ibaj bic ri wuj chiwe, man xintz'ibaj taj rumal rech ri jun ri xbanow ri etzelal, mawi rumal rech ri jun ri xban etzelal che. Xane' xintz'ibaj rech cäc'ut chiwäch chi sibalaj cujilok'ok'ej chuwäch ri Dios." 
2Corinthians7:13 Rumal c'u ri', ka cu'bisam ka c'u'x. Man xuwi ta wa' ri cu'bisabal ka c'u'x, xane' xukuje' xujquicot rumal ri u quicotemal ri Tit, chi xuxlan ri ranima' rumal iwech iwonojel."
