2Corinthians7:14 Aretak xinbij che ri Tit chi sibalaj quinquicot iwuc', man xel ta nu q'uixbal. Ronojel c'u ri xkatzijoj chiwe, are kastzij, je xukuje' ronojel ri utz ri xkabij chiwij che ri Tit, kas je xelic." 
2Corinthians7:15 Are c'u ri are' sibalaj ix lok' chuwäch aretak cänataj che chi iwonojel ix xixniman che, ruc' c'u ne nimalaj oquem il xic'amowaj." 
2Corinthians7:16 ¡Quinquicotic, rumal rech chi nu cu'bisam nu c'u'x chiwij pa ronojel!" 
2Corinthians8:1 Kachalal, cäkabij chiwe ri u tok'ob ri Dios ri yo'm chque ri e comon cojonelab pa Masedon." 
2Corinthians8:2 Pune' c'o nimalaj c'axc'olil paquiwi', nim ri qui quicotemal; pune' sibalaj e mebayib, qui yo'm c'u q'ui sipanic chque niq'uiaj chic, je ta ne e k'inomab." 
2Corinthians8:3 Quinbij jas ri xinwilo, chi xquiya' ronojel ri xecuin che u ya'ic xoc'ow chi c'u ne na jubik' u wi' ri xecuin che, ruc' ronojel qui rayibal." 
2Corinthians8:4 Sibalaj xquita' tok'ob chke rech cäkaya' chque chi quequito' ri u tinimit ri Dios. 
2Corinthians8:5 Man xiquiban ta c'ut jas ri keye'm, xane' nabe xquijach quib che ri Ajawaxel, te c'u ri' xquijach quib chke uj, jas ri u rayibal ri Dios." 
2Corinthians8:6 Rumal ri' ka bochi'm ri Tit chi chutakej u mulixic ri cuchuj ri quiya' ri xuchaplej u mulixic nabe. 
2Corinthians8:7 Ri ix sibalaj utz quiban pa ronojel: utz ri i cojonic, utz ri i tzij, xukuje' utz ri iwetamabal. Sibalaj quicoj i chuk'ab che ri chac xukuje' ri ka lok'exic iwumal. Jeri', xukuje' utz chibana' pa we tok'ob ri'." 
2Corinthians8:8 Man quinbij ta wa' chiwe jas jun takanic chi je quibana'. Xak xuwi quinwaj chi quiwetamaj jas cäquiban ri niq'uiaj chic, cäquicoj qui chuk'ab, rech ri ix quic'utu we kastzij c'o lok'ok'ebal i c'u'x." 
2Corinthians8:9 Iweta'm c'ut ri u tok'ob ri Kajaw Jesucrist. Ri are' k'inom, xux c'u meba' rumal iwech, rech quixux k'inom rumal ri u mebayil." 
2Corinthians8:10 Quinya' c'u ri nu chomanic chrij wa', chi utz chiwe. Junabir xichaplej ulok u banic we sipanic ri'. Xiban wa' ruc' ronojel iwanima'." 
2Corinthians8:11 Are c'u ri camic jas kas ri quixcuin che, chiq'uisa' u banic ri i chaplem, ruc' ri kas sac'äjil ri xic'ut pa ri chaplebal." 
2Corinthians8:12 We c'u c'o jachin jun kastzij che cäyanic, ri Dios cuc'amowaj ri sipanic ri cuyao jas kas ri c'o ruc'. Ri Dios man cutz'onoj taj chke ri man c'o ta kuc'." 
2Corinthians8:13 Man quinwaj taj chi quixcanaj can pa mebayil rumal ri u banic utzil chque niq'uiaj chic. 
2Corinthians8:14 Xane' chix chc'ol junam. Camic ri ix, c'o iwuc' ri man c'o ta cuc' ri e are', pa jun chi c'u k'ijol ri e are' cäc'oji' na cuc' ri man c'o ta iwuc' ix, je c'u ri' cac'oji' na junamil." 
2Corinthians8:15 Jacha' ri cubij ri Tz'ibatalic: “Mawi c'o ta xto'taj ruc' ri xumol q'ui, mawi c'o ta xeraj che ri man nim ta xumolo.”" 
2Corinthians8:16 Maltiox che ri Dios chi xuya' pa ranima' ri Tit ri junam oquem il ri c'o wuc' chiwe. 
2Corinthians8:17 Ri Tit xuc'amowaj ri nu pixbenic, xukuje' sibalaj quel u c'u'x chiwe. Rumal ri', ruc' ronojel ranima' xel bic rech cäbe iwuc'." 
2Corinthians8:18 Xkatak c'u bic jun kachalal che rachilaxic bic. Conojel ri e comon cojonelab utz cäquil ri chac ri u banom pa ri utzalaj tak tzij. 
2Corinthians8:19 Man xuwi ta c'u wa', xane' xcha' cumal ri e comon cojonelab chi cäbe kuc' che u mulixic ri cuchuj. Are wa' cäkabano che u nimarisaxic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel xukuje' che u c'utic chi c'o i rayibal che u banic." 
2Corinthians8:20 Je xkaban wa', rech man c'o ta jun cubij tzij chkij rumal rech ri q'uialaj cuchuj ri cätajin cäkamulij." 
2Corinthians8:21 Cäkachomaj c'u u banic ri utz, man xuwi ta chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, xane' xukuje' chquiwäch ri winak." 
2Corinthians8:22 Junam cuc' we niq'uiaj ri', xintak chi bic jun chque ri kachalal, ri q'ui mul e u c'utum chkawäch ri utzalaj tak u chomanic, are' c'u ne c'o na ri camic, rumal ri nimalaj u jiquibam c'uxaj ri c'o ruc' chiwij." 
2Corinthians8:23 We c'o jun cäc'otow i chi', chibij chi ri Tit are wachil xukuje' wajchac chixo'l; xukuje' ri e niq'uiaj kachalal chic, are e qui takom ri e comon cojonelab chi cäquinimarisaj u k'ij ri Crist." 
2Corinthians8:24 Rech c'u cäquetamaj ri e comon tak cojonelab, chebic'utu chquiwäch ix chi sibalaj quebiwaj chi c'o c'u rumal ka cuban ka c'u'x chiwij." 
2Corinthians9:1 Man rajawaxic taj quintz'ibaj bic chiwe chrij ri qui to'ic ri cojonelab," 
2Corinthians9:2 rumal rech chi weta'm chi ri ix sibalaj quiwaj quiban ruc' ronojel iwanima'. Nu bim chque ri e aj Masedon chi quinquicot iwuc', rumal rech chi ri ix aj Acay i chomam ulok u banic wa' junabir, xa' c'u co'l man conojel ri aj Masedon quichajim anima' che u banic quech ri quiban ix rumal ri utzalaj i chomanic." 
2Corinthians9:3 Xebentak c'u bic ri kachalal rech man xak ta lok' ri nu tzij chi utz i banom che we cuchuj ri', rech quisuc'umaj iwib je jas ri nu bim." 
2Corinthians9:4 We ne e c'o jujun chque ri aj Masedon quebe wuc', quixelquirika' c'ut man i suc'umam ta iwib. We jeri', quel na ka q'uixbal, rumal rech chi ka jiquibam ka c'u'x chiwij, xukuje' ri ix quel na i q'uixbal." 
2Corinthians9:5 Rumal ri' xinchomaj chi rajawaxic xebenbochi'j ri kachalal chi quebopan iwuc' nabe, rech quixquito' che u suc'umaxic apan ri i cuchuj ri i bim chi quiya'o. Rech jeri' suc'umatal chi apanok, jas jun cuchuj ri i yo'm ruc' ronojel iwanima', ma ta je jun cuchuj ri quiya' ruc' xu'yal." 
2Corinthians9:6 Chnataj wa' chiwe: Apachin ri xa' jubik' cäticonijic, xa' jubik' ri' ri u wächinic ri tico'n cuyac na. Apachin c'u ri nim cäticonijic, nim ri' ri u wächinic ri tico'n cuyac na." 
2Corinthians9:7 Chijujunal ba' chiya' jas ri cäpe pa iwanima', man ruc' ta bis, mawi rumal ta rech chi xa' ta cäcoj chuk'ab chiwe. Ri Dios c'ut culok'ok'ej ri cäyan ruc' quicotemal." 
2Corinthians9:8 Ri Dios cäcuinic cäyan chiwe ix ruc' telechinic ronojel qui wäch tak tewichibal, rech cac'oji' iwuc' ronojel ri cajwataj chiwe c'o c'u chto'taj iwuc' che to'banic pa conojel qui wäch utzalaj tak chac." 
2Corinthians9:9 Jas ri Tz'ibatalic: “Xuya' q'ui jastak chque ri mebayib, cäjeki' ri u suq'uil amak'el chbe k'ij sak.”" 
2Corinthians9:10 Ri Dios, ri cuya' ri ija' ri cätiquic xukuje' ri tzukbal ib, cuya' na chiwe ronojel ri cajwatajic che ri i tico'n, cuban c'u na chi caq'uiy ri i tico'n, cuban c'u na chi rumal ri man i q'ueq'uetem taj sibalaj cuya' jun nim wächinic." 
2Corinthians9:11 Jeri' ri ix quec'oji' na ronojel qui wäch k'inomal iwuc' quixcuin c'u ri' quixyan ruc' telechinic. Are c'u ri cuchuj ri quitak bic ix, cux na wa' chi rumal kech uj chi ri achalaxic tak quequiya' na maltioxinic che ri Dios." 
2Corinthians9:12 Aretak xc'am bic we to'banic, man xuwi ta quiya' ri rajawaxic chque, xane' xukuje' quiban chque chi sibalaj cäquimaltioxij che ri Dios." 
2Corinthians9:13 Ri e are' xek'ijilan che ri Dios, are c'u we to'banic ri' cuc'ut na chquiwäch chi ri ix quixniman che ri utzalaj tzijol ri xuc'am ulok ri Crist xukuje' ri e are' nim cäquil wi na ri Dios rumal ri telechimalaj i cuchuj chque xukuje' chque conojel." 
2Corinthians9:14 Cäquiban c'u na ch'awem ruc' Dios piwi'. Quixquilok'ok'ej rumal ri nimalaj u tok'ob ri Dios ri c'o iwuc'. 
2Corinthians9:15 Cäkamaltioxij ba' che ri Dios, rumal ri nimalaj u sipanic chke, ri man e c'o ta ka tzij che u ya'ic u bixic." 
2Corinthians10:1 In Pawl quixinbochi'j pa ri u bi' ri Crist, ri ch'uch'uj ranima', ri man cunimarisaj ta rib. Cäbixic chi aretak in c'o iwuc' quinna' wib, aretak c'u man in c'o ta iwuc' quinbij ronojel chiwe, man quinxe'j ta wib." 
2Corinthians10:2 Quixinbochi'j c'ut chi aretak quinopan iwuc', man rajawaxic taj quinbij c'axalaj tak tzij chque jujun chiwe. E c'o jujun ri cäquibij chi ri uj are cäkaban ri xa' u rayibal ri ka ti'jal. Quebench'abej c'u na ri e are' we rajawaxic." 
2Corinthians10:3 Kastzij chi ri uj uj winak re ri uwächulew. Man cujch'ojin ta c'ut e jacha' ri e rech we uwächulew ri'. 
2Corinthians10:4 E are c'ut ri e ka chacubal ri que ka coj pa ri ch'o'j man e aj uwächulew taj, xane' c'o qui cuinem rumal ri Dios che qui kasaxic chuk'ab;" 
2Corinthians10:5 xukuje' ronojel banoj nimal ri cucoj u chuk'ab chi ma ta quetamax u wäch ri Dios. Ronojel chomanic aj winak cäkaya' xe' rakan u k'ab ri Crist, rech caniman che are'." 
2Corinthians10:6 Aretak quixniman chi che ri Crist pa ronojel, uj c'o che u c'äjisaxic qui wäch ri jujun ri man queniman taj." 
2Corinthians10:7 Ri ix xuwi quiya' i wäch chque tak ri wächbalil. We c'o jun cuchomaj pa ranima' chi ri are' rech ri Crist, chuchomaj ba pa ranima' chi jas ri are' rech ri Crist, jeri' ri uj xukuje' uj rech ri Crist." 
2Corinthians10:8 Pune' quinnimarisaj jubik' nu k'ij rumal ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel pa ka k'ab, man quel ta nu q'uixbal, rumal rech chi yo'm ri takanic pa ka k'ab che i yaquic, man che ta u sachic i wäch." 
2Corinthians10:9 Man quinwaj ta c'ut quichomaj chi xak quixinxibij cumal tak ri e nu wuj. 
2Corinthians10:10 Cäquibij jujun chi ri tzij ri quintz'ibaj cho ri e nu wuj, c'ax xukuje' c'o qui chuk'ab, aretak c'u in c'o iwuc', man c'o ta nu chuk'ab, man c'o ta u patan ri nu tzij." 
2Corinthians10:11 Ri je cubij wa' rajawaxic cäretamaj chi jas ri ka banic pa ri ka tzij xukuje' cho ri ka wuj aretak man uj c'o ta iwuc', uj jewa' xukuje' pa ri ka chac aretak uj c'o iwuc'." 
2Corinthians10:12 Ri uj c'ut man cakarayij ta rajilaxic kib chquixo'l o che ta u junamaxic kib cuc' jujun ri caquik'alajisaj quib pa quibil tak quib chi e utz; e are' c'ut caquetala' tak quib cuc' jule' chic chquixo'l, man c'o ta qui no'j wa'." 
2Corinthians10:13 Man cäkaya' ta ka k'ij ri man ya'tal ta wi chke. Are ri Dios c'utuwinak ri c'olbal jawije' rajawaxic cujchacun wi, u yo'm c'u chke chi xujopan c'ä iwuc'." 
2Corinthians10:14 Rumal ri', man cätajin ta cojoc'ow puwi' ri c'ulbatil, je ta ne ri' chi ma ta uj c'olinak chixo'l. Uj ri' ri xujc'amow bic nabe chiwe ri utzalaj tzijol ri xuc'am ulok ri Crist." 
2Corinthians10:15 Man cäkanimarisaj ta ka k'ij ri man ya'tal ta wi chke, pa ri u chac jun chic. Cu'l c'u ka c'u'x chi cäq'uiy na ri i cojonic rech cujchacun na chixo'l. Man cujel ta c'u bic chupam ri c'ulbat ri yo'm chke rumal ri Dios." 
2Corinthians10:16 Jeri' cäkatzijoj na ri colobal ib pa tak ri tinimit ri e c'o apan jela' chiwe. Man cäkanimarisaj ta kib chupam jun chac ri banom rumal jun chic. 
2Corinthians10:17 Apachin ri cäraj cunimarisaj rib, are chunimarisaj u k'ij ri Ajawaxel." 
2Corinthians10:18 Man are' ta cäya' u k'ij ri cuya' u k'ij chbil rib, xane' are' cäya' u k'ij ri rumal ri Ajawaxel." 
2Corinthians11:1 C'o ta banom wi quicuy ta jubik' ri nu conil. Weta'm c'ut chi quicuyu'. 
2Corinthians11:2 Quixinwachixomaj c'ut ruc' jun achixomanic aj Dios, xixinc'uluba' c'ut xa ruc' jun achajilaxel, ix tac'abam c'ut chuwäch jacha' jun jicalaj k'apoj, che ri Crist." 
2Corinthians11:3 Quinxe'j c'u wib chi je jacha' ri cumätz xusub ri Eva ruc' ri u nawinic, xukuje' ri ix quiya' iwib pa subic, quequitas ta c'u quib ri e i chomanic che ri ch'ajch'oj xukuje' ri jicalaj u k'ijilaxic ri Crist." 
2Corinthians11:4 Ri ix quicoch' ruc' quicotemal apachin ta ne ri copan iwuc' cutzijoj jun Jesus chiwe ri man cajunamataj ta ruc' ri ka yo'm u bixic chiwe; quic'amowaj c'ut ruc' ronojel iwanima' jun uxlabal ri man junam ta ruc' ri Uxlabal ri i c'amowam chic xukuje' jun tijonic aj colobal ib ri man junam ta ruc' ri i c'amowam chic. 
2Corinthians11:5 Quinchomaj c'ut chi man quinjunamataj ta cuc' ri qui quijuluj quib chi e nimak tak takomxenlab. 
2Corinthians11:6 Pune' man quinna'w taj quintzijonic, man in je ta wa' pa ri wetamabal. Kas ka c'utum wa' chiwäch pa ronojel ri ka banom." 
2Corinthians11:7 Aretak xintzijoj ri tzij re colobal ib re ri Dios chixo'l, man xinta' ta puak chiwe, man xinnimarisaj ta wib, are xwaj chi ri ix cänimar i k'ij. ¿La are lo mac ri' aretak je xinbano?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Xinc'am puak chque ri niq'uiaj comon cojonelab chic, aretak xquiya' tojbal wech rech quixinpatanij." 
2Corinthians11:9 Aretak xinc'oji' iwuc', man xinux ta eka'n che jachin jun, c'o c'u rajawaxic chwe. Xane' e are ri kachalal ri xepe' pa Masedon e are' xeyo'w ri rajawaxic chwe. Kas xinchajij wib pa ronojel, rech man xinux ta eka'n chiwe. Xukuje' camic quinchajij na wib." 
2Corinthians11:10 Sibalaj jic in c'olic chi wetamam ri u kastzij ri Crist, xukuje' chi man c'o ta jun catokin ta ri nimarisabal nu k'ij pa ronojel ri ulew re Acay." 
2Corinthians11:11 ¿Jasche je quinbij wa'? ¿La xa' lo man quixinlok'ok'ej taj? Ri Dios reta'm chi quixinlok'ok'ej. 
2Corinthians11:12 E c'o c'u jujun ri cäquibij chi utz ri qui chac je jas ri ka banom uj. Ri in c'ut are quinbano jas ri nu banom ulok, rech man quinya' ta chque chi je cäquibij." 
2Corinthians11:13 E are c'u wa' ri man kas takomxenlab taj. E subunelab tak ajchaquib, ri cäquijaluj quib chi takomxenlab aj ri Crist." 
2Corinthians11:14 Man jalan ta c'u wa'. Are c'u ya' ri Satanas cujaluj rib che jun tako'n aj chicaj re sakil. 
2Corinthians11:15 Je ba' ri', chi man mayijibal taj we xukuje' ri e pataninel tak rech ri Satanas caquijaluj quib chi e jacha' pataninel tak rech ri suq'uilal; ri q'uisbal c'u u tza'm je cux na e jacha' ri e qui chac." 
2Corinthians11:16 Quinbij chi jumul: C'o jun muchomaj chi in con. We jeri' quichomaj, chibana' ba' chi in jun conalaj achi, rech quinnimarisaj na jubik' wib." 
2Corinthians11:17 Pune' we nimarisan ib ri' are jun ch'ujilal man e tzij ta c'ut ri quekaj ta chuwäch ri Ajawaxel Jesus xane' cätajin quinch'awic jacha' jun con. 
2Corinthians11:18 ¡E q'ui c'u ne ri cäquinimarisaj quib rumal rech ri qui banom waral cho ri uwächulew, xukuje' c'u ri in quinnimarisaj na wib!" 
2Corinthians11:19 Aretak quebopan conalaj tak winak iwuc', ruc' ronojel iwanima' quebic'ulaj. ¿La utzalaj chomanic wa' re no'j ri quibano?" 
2Corinthians11:20 Aretak quebopan winak iwuc' ri cäcaj quetakan piwi', o cäqueläk'aj ri jastak iwe, o cäquiban quech chiwe, o cäquinimarisaj quib, o quixquich'ay chipalaj, ri ix xak quebicuyu'." 
2Corinthians11:21 Pune' quel nu q'uixbal che u bixic, ¡ri uj sibalaj xujux tukar chi je xkaban wa'!" 
2Corinthians11:22 ¿La e hebreyib ri e are'? Xukuje' ri in. ¿La e aj Israel? Xukuje' ri in. ¿La e rija'l ri Abraham? Xukuje' ri in. 
2Corinthians11:23 ¿La e pataninel re ri Crist? Ri in sibalaj quinpatanij na ri Crist chquiwäch ri e are'. (Cätajin quintzijon je ta ne jun conalaj winak.) Sibalaj nu banom c'axalaj tak chac chquiwäch ri e are'. Q'ui mul in ch'ayo'm, q'ui mul in cojom pa che', are c'u ri e are' xa jubik'. Q'ui mul ri winak cäcaj quinquicämisaj." 
2Corinthians11:24 Job mul ri aj judeyib xinquich'ay che juwinak belejlajuj (39) rapubal. 
2Corinthians11:25 Oxmul xink'osix che che'. Jumul xinbuc' che abaj. Oxmul xyojyob can ri jucub chinuxe'. Xinban jun k'ij ruc' jun ak'ab puwi' ri plo. 
2Corinthians11:26 Q'ui mul nu banom tak binem. Xak quieb xubij panuwi' pa tak nima', pa tak qui k'ab eläk'omab, pa tak qui k'ab ri nu winakil, pa tak qui k'ab ri man aj judeyib taj, pa tak tinimit, pa chaki'j uwo sak, pa ri plo, xukuje' chquixo'l ri cäquijaluj quib chi e kachalal." 
2Corinthians11:27 Nu banom c'axalaj tak chac, nu rikom tak c'ax. Q'ui mul man xinrik ta quintijo, nu rikom wi'jal, nu rikom chaki'j chi', q'ui mul man ximwataj, xinc'oji' pa tew, quint'unuwic." 
2Corinthians11:28 Chwi chi c'u conojel we jastak ri' k'ij chi k'ij c'o panuwi' ri oquem il chque conojel ri comon cojonelab. 
2Corinthians11:29 Jachin jun tukar ri ma ta xukuje' ri in in tukarinak xukuje'. Aretak takchi'm jun che macunic, ri in nu no'm nimalaj bis chupam ri wanima'." 
2Corinthians11:30 We rajawaxic chi quinnimarisaj nu k'ij, quinnimarisaj nu k'ij pa ri in tukar wi." 
2Corinthians11:31 Ri u Dios xukuje' ri u Tat ri Kajaw Jesus, ri cänimarisax u k'ij amak'el chbe k'ij sak, reta'm chi man quinban ta tzij." 
2Corinthians11:32 Aretak in c'o pa Damasc, ri k'atal tzij ri c'o chuxe' ri u takanic ri ajawinel Arets xebucoj chajinelab pa tak ri roquibal ri tinimit che nu chapic." 
2Corinthians11:33 Xinesax c'u ulok pa jun wenta'n, xinkasax ulok chrij ri tapia chupam jun chicäch, jeri' man xinkaj ta pa qui k'ab." 
2Corinthians12:1 Rajawaxic quinnimarisaj wib, pune' man c'o ta quechbex che. Quinchaplej c'u qui tzijoxic ri c'utwächinic xukuje' ri niq'uiaj jastak chic ri e c'utum chnuwäch rumal ri Ajawaxel." 
2Corinthians12:2 Weta'm u wäch jun achi cojonel che ri Crist, c'o chi cajlajuj junab wa' camic, xc'am bic c'ä pa ri urox caj. Man weta'm taj we xc'am bic pa ri cuerp, we man pa ri cuerp taj. Ri Dios reta'm." 
2Corinthians12:3 Man weta'm ta c'ut we xc'am bic pa ri cuerp, we man pa ri cuerp taj. Ri Dios reta'm. Weta'm c'ut chi ri achi ri'" 
2Corinthians12:4 Xc'am c'u bic ajsic c'ä pa ri je'lalaj c'olbal pa ri caj, jawije' ri xebuta' wi mayibalalaj tak tzij ri man cäbix ta rumal winak." 
2Corinthians12:5 Quinnimarisaj u k'ij jun achi ri jewa' u banom. Man quinnimarisaj ta c'u wib in, xane' xak xuwi chquij tak ri nu tukaril." 
2Corinthians12:6 We ta quinwaj quinnimarisaj wib, ma ta in con ri', kastzij c'u ri' ri quinbij. Man quinban ta c'ut, rech c'o jun muchomaj chi nim na nu banic chuwäch ri nu chac ri cärilo, o ri nu tzij ri cuto." 
2Corinthians12:7 Sibalaj mayibal c'u ri jastak ri e u c'utum ri Dios chnuwäch. Rumal ri' yo'm jun c'ax chwe je ta ne jun q'uix pa ri nu cuerp, rech man sibalaj quinnimarisaj ta wib. Are takom ulok wuc' rumal ri Satanas, ri je ta ne quinuch'ayo, rech man sibalaj quinnimarisaj ta wib." 
2Corinthians12:8 Oxmul xinbochi'j ri Ajawaxel chi cäresaj we c'ax ri' chwe. 
2Corinthians12:9 U bim c'u chwe: “Chubana' ri nu tok'ob chawe. Are c'u ri nu cuinem cac'utun na pa ri tukaril.” Quinquicotic chi in tukar, rech wuc' in cac'utun wi ri u cuinem ri Crist." 
2Corinthians12:10 Rumal ri' quinquicotic aretak man c'o ta nu chuk'ab, aretak quinyok'ic, aretak man c'o ta ri cajwataj chwe, aretak quinokataxic, xukuje' aretak quinrik c'ax rumal rech ri Crist. Aretak c'u in tukar, c'äte ri' sibalaj c'o nu chuk'ab." 
2Corinthians12:11 In uxinak con, ix c'ut xinitakchi'j che wa'. Ix ta ri' ri utz ta nu tzijol iwumal, rumal rech chi ri in ma ta are nim na nu k'ij chquiwäch ri takomxenlab ri nimak na qui k'ij, pune' man c'o ta nu banic." 
2Corinthians12:12 Ri e retal jun takom e bantajinak chiwäch pa ronojel ch'ijonic, pa tak etal, mayibal, xukuje' cajmajibal." 
2Corinthians12:13 Chinicuyu' we nu banom ri man utz taj chiwe, xa' c'u jun jasach ri man ix junamatajinak ta wi cuc' ri niq'uiaj comon cojonelab chic: ¡chi ri in man xinux ta jun eka'n chiwe!" 
2Corinthians12:14 Camic c'ut, nu suc'umam chi wib rech quinbe iwuc' churoxmul. Man quinya' ta na jun eka'n chiwij. Man are ta quebentzucuj ri jastak iwech, xane' ix quixentzucuj. Man e are ta c'u ri alc'ualaxelab cäquimulij k'inomal che ri qui tat, xane' ri tataxel cumulij k'inomal chque ri e ralc'ual." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ri in ruc' ronojel ri nu rayibal quinsach na ronojel ri c'o wuc', xukuje' c'u ne ri in quinjarisaj na wib che u banic ri utzil chiwe; quinwil c'ut chi aretak sibalaj ix nu lok', xa' man sibalaj utz ta quiniwilo." 
2Corinthians12:16 Pune' man xinux ta jun eka'n chiwe, e c'o c'u jujun cäquibij, chi quinna'w che ri itzel no'j, rumal ri' xixinsubu." 
2Corinthians12:17 ¿La xixinsub lo rumal jun chque ri xebentak bic iwuc'? 
2Corinthians12:18 Xinbochi'j ri Tit chi cäbe iwuc', xintak c'u bic ri jun kachalal chic che rachil. ¿La xixusub lo ri Tit? ¿La ma ta kastzij chi kacabichal junam i to'ic ka banom ruc' c'ut ri kas junam uxlabal?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Cäraj ne cätajin quichomaj chi cätajin cakatz'onoj chi cujicuyu', man je ta c'u quelic. Man je taj ri quibij, cätajin c'u cujtzijon chuwäch ri Dios uj c'u ajcristib xukuje'. Ronojel c'u wa' lok'alaj tak kachalal, rech ri ix quixq'uiy chupam ri uxlabal." 
2Corinthians12:20 Quinxe'j wib, we ne aretak quinopanic, man quixenrika' taj je jas ri quinwaj, xukuje' ri ix man quinirik taj je jas ri quiwaj. We ne c'o ch'o'j chixo'l, we ne quixquiäk rayinic, we ne c'o iwoyowal, qui c'ulelala' iwib, quiyac tak tzij, quixwixwitic, quinimarisaj iwib, xukuje' quituquij iwib." 
2Corinthians12:21 Quinxe'j c'u wib xukuje' chi, pa ri wopanem iwuc' pa quieb oxib k'ij ri nu Dios cuban chwe chi quinna' q'uixbal rumal iwech, cuban c'u na chwe chi quinwok'ej i wäch ix q'ui chiwe ri kas xc'ori' qui takem ulok macunic, man qui yo'm ta c'u can ri tz'ilol, ri e macunic cuc' ixokib achijab xukuje' ri e itzel tak nak'atisabal ri quequibano." 
2Corinthians13:1 Are urox mul wa' ri quinbe iwuc'. Rajawaxic cächomax na ronojel c'ulmatajic rumal ri qui tzij e quieb o e oxib k'alajisanelab. 
2Corinthians13:2 Nu bim canok quinbij chi c'u jumul je ta ne ri in c'o ta iwuc' chucamul, xukuje' quinbij chi na camic aretak man in c'o ta iwuc': Quinbij bic chque ri e macuninak can nabe xukuje' chque conojel ri niq'uiaj chic, chi we quinbe chi jumul, man c'o ta jun quintok'obisaj na u wäch," 
2Corinthians13:3 cätajin c'u ya' quitzucuj jun c'utbal chi we are' ri Crist catzijon wumal. Ri Crist man tukar taj che ri cuban iwuc', xane' cucoj ri u cuinem chupam ri iwanima'." 
2Corinthians13:4 Kastzij xrip ri are' cho jun ripibal ruc' tukaril. C'asal c'ut rumal ri u chuk'ab ri Dios. Jeri' ri uj, uj tukar ruc' are'. Cujc'asi' c'u na junam ruc' chiwe rumal ri u chuk'ab ri Dios." 
2Corinthians13:5 Chinic'oj ri iwanima' ix, che rilic we ix co pa ri cojonic. Chic'ambejej iwib ix. ¿La ma ta iweta'm iwib ix, chi c'o ri Jesucrist pa iwanima'? We man ix c'ambejem chic man ix c'amowam taj." 
2Corinthians13:6 Quinwaj c'ut quiwetamaj chi man uj sachinak taj. 
2Corinthians13:7 Cäkaban ch'awem ruc' Dios, rech miban jun etzelal. Cäkaban wa' man che ta u c'utic chi ma ta uj c'ambejebem chic xane' rech ri ix are quiban ri utzilal je ta c'u ne ri quelic chi uj ta ri u tzakinak." 
2Corinthians13:8 Man c'o ta jas cujcuin wi chuyojixic ri kastzij, xane' chuto'ic ri kastzij." 
2Corinthians13:9 Cujquicotic aretak uj tukar, ri ix c'ut c'o i chuk'ab. Cäkaban ch'awem ruc' Dios rech quixtz'akatic." 
2Corinthians13:10 Rumal ri' quebentz'ibaj bic we jastak ri' chiwe aretak man in c'o ta iwuc', rech aretak quinopan iwuc', man in c'a'n ta chic chiwe, jas ri ya'tal chwe rumal ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel pa nu k'ab. U yo'm chwe che u ya'ic i chuk'ab, man che ta u sachic i wäch." 
2Corinthians13:11 Chuq'uisbalil, wachalal: Chixquicotok. Chitz'akatisaj jas ri cäraj ri Dios pa ri i c'aslemal. Chicu'bisala' i c'u'x. Chux junam i chomanic. Chixjekel pa jamaril. Are c'u ri Dios ri re lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj, aj jamaril, cäc'oji' na iwuc'." 
2Corinthians13:12 Chiyala' rutzil tak i wäch ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj. 
2Corinthians13:13 Conojel ri cojonelab cäquiya' rutzil i wäch. 
2Corinthians13:14 Ri u tok'ob ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist, ri lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x ri Dios, xukuje' ri u wächbal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios cäc'oji' iwuc' chnimalaj iwonojel." 
Galatians1:1 In, Pawl, in jun takom, man cumal ta winak, mawi xa' in takom rumal jun winak, xane' rumal ri Jesucrist xukuje' rumal ri Dios Tataxel, ri xc'astajisan ri Jesus chquixo'l ri cäminakib." 
Galatians1:2 In xukuje' conojel ri kachalal ri e c'o wuc' cäkatz'ibaj we wuj ri' chque tak ri comon cojonelab ri e c'o pa Galas. 
Galatians1:3 Tok'ob xukuje' jamaril chc'ol ta iwuc' rumal ri Dios ka Tat xukuje' rumal ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist; 
Galatians1:4 ri are' xuya' ri u c'aslemal rumal rech ri ka mac, che kesaxic pa ri etzelal re we uwächulew ri', jas ri u rayibal ri Dios ka Tat." 
Galatians1:5 ¡Che c'u chyok wi ri juluwem amak'el chbe k'ij sak! Je chbanok. 
Galatians1:6 Quinmayij chi sibalaj chanim xiya' can ri Dios, ri xixsiq'uin rumal ri u tok'ob ri Crist, xiterenej c'u jun tzijol chic." 
Galatians1:7 Kastzij man c'o ta jun tzijol chic re colobal ib. E c'o c'u jujun ri quixquisacho, are cäcaj cäquiq'uex ri utzalaj tak u tzij ri Crist." 
Galatians1:8 Pune' ta uj o jun tako'n aj caj cätzijon na jun tzijol re colobal ib chic chiwe, ri man je taj jas ri ka tzijom canok, chk'aj chuxe c'okonic." 
Galatians1:9 Jas ri ka bim canok, xukuje' camic quinbij chi jumul: We c'o jun cutzijoj jun tzijol chic re colobal ib chiwe, ri man je taj jas ri i c'amom, chk'aj chuxe c'okonic." 
Galatians1:10 Ri in man quintzucuj ta ri utz wilic cumal ri winak, xane' are ri utz wilic rumal ri Dios. ¡We ta c'ä are quinban ri cakaj chquiwäch ri winak, ma ta in u lok'om pataninel chi ri' ri Crist!" 
Galatians1:11 Quinya' retamaxic chiwe, wachalal, chi ri tzij re colobal ib ri nu tzijom, man are' ta qui chomanic ri winak." 
Galatians1:12 Man xinc'am ta ri utzalaj tak tzij che jun winak, mawi xintijox rumal jachin jun, xane' are ri Jesucrist xk'alajisan chnuwäch." 
Galatians1:13 I tom chi c'ut jas ri xinban ojer aretak junam nu wäch cuc' ri aj judeyib. Sibalaj xinban c'ax che ri u comon cojonelab ri Dios, are ta ximwaj xinsach u wäch." 
Galatians1:14 Pa ri qui cojonic ri aj judeyib, sibalaj utz na xinban in chquiwäch q'ui nu winakil ri xa' junam qui junab wuc'. Sibalaj xinoc na il chque ri qui nak'atisabal can ri e nu mam." 
Galatians1:15 Are c'u ri Dios xinucha' ulok aretak c'ä majok quinalaxic, xinusiq'uij rumal ri u tok'ob. Aretak xkaj chuwäch," 
Galatians1:16 xuk'alajisaj ri u C'ojol chnuwäch, rech quintzijoj chquixo'l ri man aj judeyib taj. Aretak xc'ulmataj wa' man xinta' ta nu no'j che jun winak." 
Galatians1:17 Mawi xinpaki' pa Jerusalen cuc' ri nabe xeboc che takom chnuwäch in. Xane' xinbe pa Arab, c'äte ri' xintzelej ulok pa Damasc." 
Galatians1:18 E oc'owinak chi oxib junab, xinpaki' pa Jerusalen, che retamaxic u wäch ri Lu'. Olajuj k'ij xinc'oji' ruc'." 
Galatians1:19 Man c'o ta chi jun xinwil u wäch chque ri takomxenlab, xane' xuwi ri Santiag ri rachalal ri Ajawaxel." 
Galatians1:20 Ri quintz'ibaj bic chiwe, ri Dios quilowic chi kastzij ri quinbij." 
Galatians1:21 Te c'u ri' xinbe pa tak ri ulew re Sir xukuje' re Silisiy. 
Galatians1:22 Man etamatal ta c'u ne nu wäch cumal ri comon cojonelab re ri Crist ri e c'o pa Judey. 
Galatians1:22 Man etamatal ta c'u ne nu wäch cumal ri comon cojonelab re ri Crist ri e c'o pa Judey. 
Galatians1:23 Xak xuwi qui tom u bixic: “Ri jun ri xuban c'ax chke nabe canok, camic cutzijoj chi ri cojonic ri xraj xusach u wäch.”" 
Galatians1:24 Xquinimarisaj c'u u k'ij ri Dios rumal wech. 
Galatians2:1 E oc'owinak chi cajlajuj junab, xinbe chi jumul pa Jerusalen wachil ri Bernabe, xukuje' xinc'am bic ri Tit." 
Galatians2:2 Xinbec rumal rech chi ri Dios xuc'ut chnuwäch chi rajawaxic jeri' quinbano. Xebench'abej ri quechomaxic chi e c'amal tak be xa' pa qui tuquiel wi, xink'alajisaj ri tzij re colobal ib chquiwäch ri quintzijoj chquixo'l ri man aj judeyib taj. Jewa' xinbano rech man xak ta lok' ri chac ri nu banom xukuje' ri quinban na." 
Galatians2:3 Mawi ri Tit ri c'o wuc', pune' are aj grieg, man xcoj ta c'u chuk'ab che chi cäkopix ri u tz'umal ri u wi' ri achi wi che retal." 
Galatians2:4 Jujun tak subunelab tak achalaxelab quinimom quib chkaxo'l chic'uyal, che u nic'oxic ri ka tzokopixic ri c'o kuc' rumal ri Crist Jesus are ta c'u cäcaj chi cujux ta chi u lok'om pataninelab ri pixab." 
Galatians2:5 Mawi c'u jun jok'otaj xkaya' ta kib pa qui k'ab, rech cäjeki' ri kastzij re ri tzij re colobal ib iwuc'." 
Galatians2:6 Man xequiya' ta c'u c'ac' tak tijonic chwe ri etamatal qui wäch chi e c'amal tak be (ri in man cajwataj ta c'u chwe ri e qui banic ulok, ri Dios man are ta cuya' qui k'ij tak ri e wächbalil.)" 
Galatians2:7 Man xquibij ta c'u jun c'ac' takanic chwe, xane' xquilo chi kastzij yo'm pa nu k'ab ri u tzijoxic ri tzij re colobal ib chque ri man aj judeyib taj, je jas ri Lu' yo'm pa u k'ab chi cutzijoj ri utzalaj tak tzij re colobal ib chque ri aj judeyib." 
Galatians2:8 Are c'u ri Dios ri xuban che ri Lu' chi xoc che takom chque ri aj judeyib, are' xukuje' xbanow chwe in chi xinoc che takom chque ri man aj judeyib taj." 
Galatians2:9 Ri Santiag, ri Lu' xukuje' ri Xuan, are ri xechomaxic chi nimak qui banic pa ri comon cojonelab, aretak xquich'ob ri tok'ob ri yo'm chwe, xquiya' ri qui k'ab chwe in ruc' ri Bernabe, che u c'utic chi xa' junam ri canima' kuc'. Utz c'u xquil wi chi ri uj cujbe cuc' ri man aj judeyib taj, ri e are' quebe cuc' ri aj judeyib." 
Galatians2:10 Xak xuwi xujquibochi'j chi quenataj ri mebayib chke. Are c'u wa' nu cojom nu chuk'ab in che u banic. 
Galatians2:11 Aretak c'u xopan ri Lu' pa Antioquiy, xinc'ulelaj chupalaj, takal c'u u c'okoxic." 
Galatians2:12 Aretak majok quebopan jujun ri takom ulok rumal ri Santiag, ri Lu' cawa' cuc' ri man aj judeyib taj. Aretak c'u xebopan ri, e u takom ri Santiag, xutas rib chquij ri man aj judeyib taj, man xwa' ta chi cuc', rumal rech chi xuxe'j rib chquiwäch ri aj judeyib." 
Galatians2:13 Xukuje' ne ri niq'uiaj aj judeyib chic xquijunamaj qui wäch ruc' ri Lu', xquiban quieb qui wäch. Jeri' chi xukuje' ri Bernabe xuban re." 
Galatians2:14 Aretak c'u xinwilo chi man suc' taj quebinic jas ri kastzij re ri tzijol re colobal ib, xinbij che ri Lu' chquiwäch conojel: “We ri at, at aj judey, cäban ri cäquiban ri man aj judeyib taj, man je ta c'ut jas ri aj judeyib, ¿jasche cacoj chuk'ab chque ri man aj judeyib taj rech cäquiban que ri qui nak'atisabal ri aj judeyib?”" 
Galatians2:15 Ri uj uj aj judeyib uj alam, man uj ta ajmaquib chquixo'l ri man aj judeyib taj." 
Galatians2:16 Keta'm chi man c'o ta jun winak cäk'alajisaxic chi suc' chuwäch ri Dios rumal ri u nimaxic ri pixab; xane' rumal ri qui cojonic che ri Jesucrist. Ri uj xukuje' xujcojon che ri Crist Jesus, rech cäk'alajisaxic chi uj suc' rumal ri cojonic, man rumal ta ri u nimaxic ri pixab. Man c'o ta c'u jun winak cäk'alajisaxic suc' rumal ri u nimaxic ri pixab." 
Galatians2:17 We c'u ri uj, ri cäkatzucuj chi cäk'alajisaxic chi uj suc' chic chuwäch ri Dios rumal ri Crist, cujriktajic chi uj ajmaquib na, ¿la are lo ri Crist cäbanow ajmaquib chke? Man are taj." 
Galatians2:18 We c'u ri xinwulij, quinyac chi na, cäk'alajinic chi c'o ri nu mac." 
Galatians2:19 Ri in c'ut xincäm chuwäch ri pixab. Are ri pixab xbanow chwe chi xincämic, rech quinc'asi' che ri Dios." 
Galatians2:20 Junam xinrip ruc' ri Crist cho ri ripibal. Man in ta chic in c'aslic, xane' are ri Crist c'asal pa ri wanima'. Ri nu c'aslemal pa ri nu cuerp camic, quinwoc'owisaj pa ri cojonic che ri u C'ojol ri Dios, ri xinulok'ok'ej xukuje' xuya' ri u c'aslemal rumal wech." 
Galatians2:21 Man quinwetzelaj ta u wäch ri u tok'ob ri Dios; we ta c'u cacuyutaj ri u mac jun rumal ri u nimaxic ri pixab, xak ba lok' ri' xcäm ri Crist." 
Galatians3:1 ¡Ay, ri ix aj Galas, xa' man quiwaj taj quixch'obonic! ¿Jachin xixsubuwic, rech man quixniman ta che ri kastzij? Xkatzijoj chiwe, xkac'ut chiwäch chi ri Jesucrist xrip cho ri ripibal." 
Galatians3:2 Xak xuwi quinwaj quinta' chiwe: ¿La xic'am ri Uxlabaxel rumal ri u nimaxic ri pixab, o rumal rech chi xicoj ri tzijol ri xito?" 
Galatians3:3 ¿La xa' man quiwaj taj quixch'obonic? i chaplem ulok rumal ri Uxlabaxel. Camic c'ut, ¿la quiq'uis lo ruc' ri i chuk'ab aj winak?" 
Galatians3:4 ¿La xak ta c'u lok' i rikom sibalaj c'ax? Man ya'tal taj chi xak ta lok'. 
Galatians3:5 Ri Dios ri u yo'm ri Ruxlabal chiwe, xukuje' cuban mayibal chixo'l, ¿jasche cuban we jastak ri'? Man cuban ta lo rumal rech chi i nimam ri pixab, xane' rumal rech chi xicoj ri tzijol ri xito." 
Galatians3:6 Are ri Abraham xcojon che ri Dios, rumal c'u ri u cojonic xk'alajisax rumal ri Dios chi suc'." 
Galatians3:7 Chich'obo' ba' chi ri quecojonic, are ri' kas e rija'lil ri Abraham." 
Galatians3:8 Ri Tz'ibatalic cubij c'u ulok chi ri Dios cuk'alajisaj chi e suc' ri man aj judeyib taj rumal ri cojonic. Xutzijoj ulok ri utzalaj tak tzijol che ri Abraham aretak xubij: “Conojel ri nimak tak tinimit quetewichitaj na rumal awech.” 
Galatians3:9 Jeri' chi ri quecojonic, quetewichi'xic junam ruc' ri Abraham, ri xcojonic." 
Galatians3:10 Conojel ri qui jiquibam qui c'u'x chrij ri pixab, e c'o chuxe' c'okonic. Tz'ibatal c'ut: “C'okotajinak ronojel jachin ri man cäjeki' ta pa conojel ri jastak ri e tz'ibatal pa ri wuj re ri pixab, che qui banic.”" 
Galatians3:11 Quel c'u chi sak chi man c'o ta jun cäk'alajisaxic chi suc' chuwäch ri Dios rumal ri pixab. Tz'ibatal c'ut: “Ri suc'alaj winak cäc'asi' na rumal ri cojonic.” 
Galatians3:12 Are c'u ri pixab man c'o ta re che ri cojonic, rumal rech chi cubij: “Ri quebanow we jastak ri', quec'asi' na cumal.”" 
Galatians3:13 Are ri Crist xujcoloben chuxe' ri u c'okonic ri pixab, xux c'u c'okotajinak che ka q'uexwäch. Tz'ibatal c'ut: “C'okotajinak ronojel ri cätzayabax cho jun che'.”" 
Galatians3:14 Je xuban wa' rech cäpe ri u tewichibal ri Abraham paquiwi' ri man aj judeyib taj rumal ri Crist Jesus, xukuje' rech rumal ri cojonic, cäkac'am ri Uxlabaxel ri u bim ulok ri Dios chi cuya' na." 
Galatians3:15 Wachalal, quinbij na jun jasach ri cäquiban ri winak, are jun c'ambal no'j chiwe: We jun winak cubij jas ri cuban na ruc' jun chic, cutz'ibaj cho jun wuj, aretak u yo'm chi ri u bi' chuxe', man c'o ta jun cubij chi ma ta kastzij, mawi cuya' u wi'." 
Galatians3:16 Ri Dios xubij ri chi'm che ri Abraham xukuje' chque ri rija'l. Ri Tz'ibatalic man cubij taj: “Chque ri e awija'lil”, je ta ne chquij q'ui, xane' cubij che jun: “Che ri awija'lil”. Are' ri Crist." 
Galatians3:17 Quinbij c'u wa': Ri Dios xuya' che ri Abraham jun c'ulwächinic, xuc'ut chuwäch chi kastzij cuban na jas ri u bim. Rumal wa, oc'owinak chi quiejeb sient ruc' juwinak lajuj (430) junab, aretak xya' ri pixab che ri Moises, ri pixab man cuya' taj cusach u wäch ri chi'm." 
Galatians3:18 We ta cäc'am ri echbal ri cuya' ri Dios rumal ri u nimaxic ri pixab, ma ta cäc'am ri' rumal ri chi'm. Are c'u ri xubij ri Dios pa ri u chi'm chi cuya' na che ri Abraham, xak xusipaj che." 
Galatians3:19 ¿Jas c'u cupatanij ri pixab? Xya'taj che u c'utic jas ri mac cäquiban ri winak, c'ä xpe na we Rija'l ri', ri u bim wi ri u chi'm ri Dios che. Ri pixab yo'm cumal ri tako'nib re ri caj pa u k'ab jun ch'awenel, are ri Moises." 
Galatians3:20 Jun ch'awenel man xa ta re jun, are c'u ri Dios xa jun." 
Galatians3:21 ¿La cubij lo wa' chi ri pixab quebuc'ulelaj ri e u chi'nic ri Dios? Man je taj. We ta xya' jun pixab ri cäcuin che u ya'ic c'aslemal, cäban ta suc' ri' chke rumal ri u nimaxic ri pixab." 
Galatians3:22 Ri Tz'ibatalic cuc'utu chi conojel e tz'apital rumal ri mac. Jeri' ri chi'm cäya' chque ri cojonelab rumal ri cojonic che ri Jesucrist. 
Galatians3:23 Aretak c'ä majok cäpe ri cojonic, uj tz'apital rumal ri u pixab ri Moises, je ta ne uj c'o pa che', c'ä xk'alajisax na ri cojonic." 
Galatians3:24 Jeri' ri pixab xujuchajij, je jas jun winak cuchajij jun ac'al, che ka c'amic bic ruc' ri Crist, rech cäk'alajisaxic chi uj suc' rumal ri cojonic." 
Galatians3:25 Are c'u ri camic ri ulinak chic ri cojonic, man uj c'o ta chic chuxe' ri u takanic ri chajil kech." 
Galatians3:26 Iwonojel c'ut ix ralc'ual ri Dios rumal ri cojonic che ri Crist Jesus. 
Galatians3:27 Iwonojel c'ut ix junatajinak pa ri Crist, i cojom c'ut ri Crist che iwatz'iak." 
Galatians3:28 Man c'o ta c'u aj judeyib, mawi man aj judeyib taj; man c'o ta lok'om pataninel, mawi tzokopitalic; mawi achi, mawi ixok; iwonojel xa' ix jun pa Crist Jesus." 
Galatians3:29 We ix rech ri Crist, kas ix rija'lil ri Abraham ri', xukuje' echbenelab jas ri u bim ri Dios pa ri u chi'm ulok che ri Abraham." 
Galatians4:1 Quinbij c'ut: Aretak c'ä ac'al na ri echbenel, are xak junam ruc' jun lok'om pataninel, pune' c'u are' rajaw ronojel." 
Galatians4:2 C'o c'u pa qui k'ab chajinelab ri quetakan puwi' c'ä pa ri k'ij ri bim canok rumal ri u tat. 
Galatians4:3 Jeri' xukuje' ri uj, aretak c'ä uj ch'utik, uj c'o pa qui k'ab ri nabe tak u tijobal ri uwächulew." 
Galatians4:4 C'ä pa ri k'ij aretak xesuc'umataj ronojel, ri Dios xutak ulok ri u C'ojol, ri xalax rumal jun ixok, xc'oji' chuxe' ri u pixab ri Moises," 
Galatians4:5 rumal kech uj ri uj c'o chuxe' ri pixab, che kesaxic chuxe', rech cujux ralc'ual ri Dios." 
Galatians4:6 Rumal rech chi ix alc'ualaxelab, ri Dios xutak ulok ri Ruxlabal re ri u C'ojol pa ri iwanima'. Ri Ruxlabal curak u chi', cubij: “¡Nu Tat!”" 
Galatians4:7 Rumal ri' man at lok'om pataninel ta chic, xane' at alc'ualaxel. We c'u at alc'ualaxel, cawechbej na jas ri cuya' ri Dios." 
Galatians4:8 Ri ix ojer, aretak man iweta'm ta u wäch ri Dios, ix lok'om pataninelab ri chque ri diosib ri man kas e je taj." 
Galatians4:9 Camic c'ut, i ch'obom chi u wäch ri Dios, o ri kas suc' u bixic wa', chi ch'obom chi i wäch rumal ri Dios. ¿Jas c'u che quixtzelej chi jumul pa ri tijonic ri man c'o ta qui chuk'ab xukuje' ri man c'o ta quechbex che? ¿Jasche quiwaj quebipatanij chi jumul?" 
Galatians4:10 Quebichajij ri k'ij, ri ic', ri rajilabal ri ic', xukuje' ri junab…" 
Galatians4:11 ¡Quinxe'j wib rumal iwech, we ne xak lok' nu banom ri nimalaj chac iwuc'!" 
Galatians4:12 Wachalal, quixinbochi'j chi quixux je jas ri in. Ri in c'ut in je jas ri ix. Man c'o ta jun c'ax i banom chwe." 
Galatians4:13 Iweta'm c'ut chi xintzijoj ri tzij re colobal ib chiwe nabe mul rumal jun yabil ri xinrik pa ri nu cuerp. 
Galatians4:14 We yabil ri' jun c'ambejebal wa' chiwe, chi man xiwetzelaj ta nu wäch mawi xinipakchi'j rumal rech, xa' c'u ne man je ta wa', xane' xinic'amowaj jacha' jun aj cajalaj u tako'n ri Dios, ¡je ta ne ri kas are' ri Jesucrist!" 
Galatians4:15 ¿Jawije' c'o wi ri i quicotemal? Quink'alajisaj c'u chiwäch xixcuin ta ri' are ta xiwesaj ri e i bak'wäch che quiya'ic ta chwe. 
Galatians4:16 ¿La rumal rech chi xinbij ri kastzij chiwe, xiban i c'ulel chwe?" 
Galatians4:17 E c'o c'u jujun ri sibalaj quixcaj, man are ta c'u utzil cäcaj chiwe, xane' are cäcaj quixquesaj bic chkaxo'l, rech sibalaj quebiwaj na ri e are'." 
Galatians4:18 Kastzij chi utz we cujoc il chque niq'uiaj chic, cuc' c'u utzalaj tak chomanic; je c'u chux amak'el, ma ta xak xuwi aretak in c'o chixo'l." 
Galatians4:19 Alaj tak walc'ual, jumul chic quebencoch' k'oxomal u mac iwech, jacha' jun nanaxel ri quebucoch' k'oxomal aj alc'ualanic; quintakej c'u na qui coch'ic c'ä cawinikir na ri Crist pa ri ix." 
Galatians4:20 ¡C'o ta banom wi in c'o ta apan chila' kas camic rech jun ta chi wi ri i ch'abexic quinbano, man weta'm ta c'ut jas ri i chomaxic quinbano!" 
Galatians4:21 Ix ri quiwaj quixc'oji' chuxe' ri pixab, chibij chwe, ¿la ma ta i tom jas cubij ri pixab?" 
Galatians4:22 Tz'ibatal c'ut chi ri Abraham xec'oji' quieb u c'ojol, jun ruc' ri lok'om pataninel, ri jun chic ruc' ri kas rixokil ri tzokopitalic." 
Galatians4:23 Ri u c'ojol ri xalax rumal ri ixok lok'om pataninel, are xalax xak pa ri ti'jal. Are c'u ri u c'ojol ri xalax rumal ri ixok tzokopitalic, xalax ri are' rumal ri u chi'm ri Dios." 
Galatians4:24 Are wa' jun c'ambal no'j; we quieb ixokib ri' cäquiq'uexwächij ri quieb c'ulwächinic: Ri jun are u q'uexwäch ri juyub Sinai, are wa' ri Agar; ri quebalax rumal ri are', e c'o chuxe' patanijic." 
Galatians4:25 Ri Agar are je jas ri juyub Sinai pa Arab, are u q'uexwäch ri Jerusalen ri c'o camic, rumal rech chi c'o c'ut che lok'om pataninel e rachilam ri ral." 
Galatians4:26 Are c'u ri Jerusalen ri aj chicaj, tzokopitalic; are ka nan uj." 
Galatians4:27 Tz'ibatal c'ut: “Chatquicotok, ri man catalan taj, ri man c'o ta awal. Charaka' a chi' ruc' quicotemal, ri man c'o ta a k'oxowem re alanic. E q'ui c'u na ri ral ri ixok ri yo'm canok, chquiwäch ri ral ri ixok ri c'o rachajil.”" 
Galatians4:28 Wachalal, ix je jas ri Isaac, ix alc'ualaxelab rumal ri u chi'm ri Dios." 
Galatians4:29 Ojer, ri jun ri xalax xa' pa ri ti'jal xuban c'ax che ri jun ri xalax rumal ri u cuinem ri Uxlabaxel. Jas ri ojer, jewa' xukuje' camic." 
Galatians4:30 ¿Jas c'u cubij ri Tz'ibatalic? Cubij: “Chawesaj bic ri lok'om pataninel ruc' ri ral. Man quechben ta c'u ri ral ri lok'om pataninel ruc' ri ral ri ixokil tzokopitalic.” 
Galatians4:31 Rumal ri', wachalal, man uj taj jas ri ral ri lok'om pataninel, xane' uj je jas ri ral ri ixokilaxel ri man xa' ta c'o chuxe' u takanic jun chic." 
Galatians5:1 Ri Crist xuya' tzokopinic chke rech cujux tzokopitalic. Rumal c'u ri' co chixtac'al chupam we tzokopitajic ri' minim chi iwib jumul chuxe' ri eka'bal ri c'o paquiwi' ri lok'om tak pataninelab. 
Galatians5:2 In Pawl quinbij chiwe achijab we cakopix ri u tz'umal ri u wi' ri ix achijab wi che iwetal che i suq'uirisaxic chuwäch ri Dios, man c'o ta cupatanij ri' ri Crist chiwe." 
Galatians5:3 Quink'alajisaj chi jumul, apachique achi ri cäkopix ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri achi wi, rajawaxic cunimaj ronojel ri u pixab ri Moises." 
Galatians5:4 Ix ri quichomaj quik'alajisaj chi ix suc' rumal ri u nimaxic ri pixab, i tasom iwib naj ix c'o c'u wi che ri Crist. Tasom iwib che ri u tok'ob." 
Galatians5:5 Are c'u ri uj, rumal ri Uxlabaxel xukuje' rumal ri cojonic, c'o ri keyebal c'u'x chi cujsuq'uiritaj na." 
Galatians5:6 We ix jun ruc' ri Crist, pune' cojom ri u kopixic ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri ix achijab wi che iwetal, o man cojom taj, man are ta ri' ri c'o u banic, xane' are ri cojonic cächacun rumal ri lok'ok'ebal c'u'x." 
Galatians5:7 Ri ix utz i banom can nabe. ¿Jachin xixk'atinic rech man quinimaj ta chi ri kastzij? 
Galatians5:8 Ri Dios ri xixsiq'uinic, man are ta xbanow chiwe." 
Galatians5:9 We c'o jubik' ch'am ruc' ri k'or, cuch'amarisaj ronojel ri k'or." 
Galatians5:10 Cu'l nu c'u'x chiwij pa ri Ajawaxel, chi man jun ta chi wi ri qui chomaj. Apachin c'u ri cäsachow ri i chomanic, cäc'äjisax na u wäch, apachin ta ne." 
Galatians5:11 Wachalalib, we ta quintakej u bixic chiwe ri cojonelab chi quekopix ri u wi' ri qui tz'umal ri achijab wi che retal ri qui cuerp, ri aj judeyib ma ta cäcan c'ax ri chwe. Jeri' ri u tzijoxic ri u ripibal ri Crist ma ta cuya' latz' ri' chque." 
Galatians5:12 E are' tak c'ut ri queyo'w latz' chiwe, quinwaj ta ne chi kas e are' chi xa' ta jumul caquik'at quib." 
Galatians5:13 Ri ix c'ut, wachalal, xixsiq'uix che tzokopitajem. Xuwi micoj ri tzokopitajic che u banic ri i rayibal aj winak re mac. Xane' chipatanila' iwib ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'u'x." 
Galatians5:14 Ronojel ri pixab xa' jupaj tzij cäc'amow bic, are wa': “Chalok'ok'ej ri awajil a tz'akat je jas ri u lok'ok'exic awib at.”" 
Galatians5:15 We quiti'la' iwib, we quitijila' iwib, chichajij ba iwib misach ne i wäch chbil tak iwib." 
Galatians5:16 Are wa' quinbij chiwe: Chibana' ri u rayibal ri Uxlabaxel, rech miban c'ut ri i rayibal re mac." 
Galatians5:17 Cumal c'ut ri e aj macalaj tak qui rayinic ri winak, are cäcaj ri man cäraj taj ri Uxlabaxel; are c'u ri Uxlabaxel are cäraj ri man cäcaj taj ri winak cumal ri e itzel tak qui rayinic. C'o jun c'ulelanib chquixo'l, rumal ri' ri ix man quixcuin taj ix are ta quibano jachique ri quiwaj quibano." 
Galatians5:18 We c'u are' ri Uxlabaxel cäc'amow i be, man ix c'o ta chi ri' chuxe' ri pixab." 
Galatians5:19 K'alaj ri qui chac ri cäquiban ri qui rayibal aj winak re mac: Quemacun cuc' ixokib achijab, cäquiban tz'il tak jastak, cäquiban q'uixbal tak jastak," 
Galatians5:20 quequik'ijilaj tak diosib, cäquiban itzinic, cäquic'ulelaj quib, cäquiyac ch'o'j, cäpe coyowal we jun chic curik utzil. Chanim cäpe coyowal, xak xuwi cäquiban ri utz cäquil wi ri e are', cäquitas quib chquij niq'uiaj chic, cäquic'am jalajoj tak no'jibal." 
Galatians5:21 Man cäcaj taj cäquirik utzil niq'uiaj chic, quek'abaric, cäquiban nimalaj mac aretak cäquimulij quib che nimak tak wa'im. Xukuje' cäquiban niq'uiaj jastak chic ri man e utz taj. Quinbij apan chiwe, jas ri nu bim canok, chi ri je caquitakej u banic wa' man cäquechbej taj ri rajawibal ri Dios." 
Galatians5:22 Are c'u wa' ri u wächinic ri Uxlabaxel: c'o lok'ok'ebal qui c'u'x ri winak, quequicotic, c'o jamaril chquixo'l cuc' niq'uiaj chic, c'o qui coch'onic, ch'uch'uj ri canima', cäquibanala' tok'ob, e jic pa ri qui tzij," 
Galatians5:23 man cäquinimarisaj ta quib, xukuje' quetakan paquiwi' chbil quib. Man c'o ta pixab ri cubij chi ma ta queban we jastak ri'." 
Galatians5:24 Ri e rech ri Crist Jesus qui ripom chic ri qui banic aj winak re mac, ruc' ronojel ri man utz taj ri cäraj xukuje' ruc' ri itzel u rayinic." 
Galatians5:25 We uj c'asc'oj rumal ri Uxlabaxel, chäkaya' ba' chi ri Uxlabaxel cäc'amow ka be." 
Galatians5:26 Mäkanimarisaj kib, mäkaq'uiakala' tzij chbil tak kib, mäpe koyowal che jun chic we curik utzil." 
Galatians6:1 Wachalalib, we c'o jun quiriko chi c'o pa jun mac, ix ri utz ri i c'aslemal aj Uxlabaxel, chito' ri je u banom wa' ruc' u ch'uch'ujil iwanima' rech cätzelej pa suq'uil. Chawila' awib, mattakchi'x ne at che mac xukuje'." 
Galatians6:2 Chito'la' iwib chuxe' tak ri e iweka'n, jeri' quibano jas ri cubij ri u pixab ri Crist." 
Galatians6:3 We c'o jun cuchomaj chi c'o u banic, we man c'o ta c'u u banic, xak cusub rib." 
Galatians6:4 Chquijujunal rajawaxic chunic'oj ri u c'aslemal; c'äte c'u ri' cuna' rib chi cäquicotic, mujunamataj c'u rib cuc' jule' chic." 
Galatians6:5 Chquijujunal c'ut cäcuc'aj na bic ri kas queka'n. 
Galatians6:6 Ri jun ri cätijox che ri u tzij ri Dios, rajawaxic cuya' re ri cätijonic re ri e jastak re ri e utz." 
Galatians6:7 Misub iwib, ri Dios man cuya' taj quetz'bex u wäch. Jas ri u tico'n ri winak, are je u wächinic cuyac na." 
Galatians6:8 Ri jun cutic ri cäraj ri u rayibal aj winak re mac, cuyac na che ri rayibal re mac ri cämical. Are c'u ri jun ri cutic ri cäraj ri Uxlabaxel, cuyac na che ri Uxlabaxel ri junalic c'aslemal." 
Galatians6:9 Mäq'uistaj ba ka c'u'x che u banic ri utzil. Cäpe c'u na ri k'ij aretak cäkayac na ri wächinic, we man cujtukaric." 
Galatians6:10 Jeri', joropa' mul ri cujcuin che u banic utzil, chkabana' ba' chque conojel, kas c'u are na chque ri kachalal pa ri cojonic." 
Galatians6:11 Chiwilampe' sibalaj nimak tak tz'ib nu tz'ibam bic chiwe ruc' ri nu k'ab. 
Galatians6:12 Ri cäquicoj chuk'ab chiwe che u kopixic ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri ix achijab wi che iwetal, xuwi cäcaj utz quebil wi cumal ri winak, rech man cäquirik ta c'ax rumal rech ri u ripibal ri Crist." 
Galatians6:13 Mawi ne ri qui cojom ri u kopixic ri u wi' ri qui tz'umal ri e achijab wi che quetal, mawi cäquinimaj ronojel ri pixab. Are c'u cäcaj chi cäcoj ri etal re kopinic che ri i cuerp, rech cäquinimarisaj c'u quib." 
Galatians6:14 Ri in c'ut man quinwaj taj quinnimarisaj wib, xane' xak xuwi rumal ri u cämical ri Kajaw Jesucrist cho ri ripibal. Rumal c'u ri u cämical cho ri ripibal, cäminak chi ri uwächulew chwe in, xukuje' ri in in cäminak chi che ri uwächulew." 
Galatians6:15 Ri winak ri e jun ruc' ri Crist Jesus, man c'o ta u banic we kopim ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri e achijab wi che quetal, o man kopim taj. Ri c'o u banic are ri c'ac' winakirisam." 
Galatians6:16 Conojel ri cäquibano jas we takanic ri', xukuje' conojel ri e re ri kas u tinimit ri Dios are ri Dios cuya' jamaril chquixo'l xukuje' quel u c'u'x chque." 
Galatians6:17 Chuq'uisbalil c'ut, wachalal, c'o chi jun mäyo'w latz' chwe. C'o che ri nu cuerp ri retal tak ri c'ax ri nu rikom rumal rech ri Ajawaxel Jesus." 
Galatians6:18 Wachalalib, ri u tok'ob ri Kajaw Jesucrist chc'ol ta pa ri iwanima'. Je chbanok." 
Ephesians1:1 In Pawl, u takomaxel ri Jesucrist rumal ri u rayibal ri Dios, quintz'ibaj we wuj ri' chque ri winak ri e rech ri Dios ri e c'o pa Epes ri e cojonelab che ri Crist Jesus." 
Ephesians1:2 Tok'ob xukuje' jamaril chc'ol ta iwuc' rumal ri Dios ka Tat, xukuje' rumal ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist." 
Ephesians1:3 Ka k'ijilaj ri Dios ri u Tat ri Kajaw Jesucrist, chupam c'ut ri ka junaxic ruc' ri Crist uj u tewichi'm pa ri caj cuc' tak conojel qui wäch tak tewichibal e aj uxlabal." 
Ephesians1:4 Ri Dios xujucha' pa ri Crist aretak c'ä majok cätiquitaj ulok ri uwächulew, rech cujux tastalic tak winak, cujc'oji' chuwäch ri are', man c'o ta ka mac." 
Ephesians1:5 Ri Dios cujulok'ok'ej, u chomam c'u ulok ojer chi cujoc che ralc'ual ri are' rumal ri Jesucrist, are wa' ri u rayibal, xkaj c'u chuwäch chi je cubano." 
Ephesians1:6 Rumal wa' cäkak'ijilaj amak'el rumal ri juluwemalaj rutzil, ri xujutewichibej rumal rech ri lok'alaj u C'ojol." 
Ephesians1:7 Chupam c'ut ri nimalaj u lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj uj u torom ri Dios rumal ri quic' ri xutix ri u C'ojol, e sachtajinak c'ut ri e ka mac." 
Ephesians1:8 Ri Dios u c'utunisam chkawäch ri nimalaj u lok'ok'ebal c'u'x ri xuya' chke ruc' ronojel no'jinic, ruc' ronojel ch'obonic." 
Ephesians1:9 Xuya' retamaxic chke ri u rayibal ri man etamatal ta can nabe, ri utzalaj u rayibal ri u chomam ulok pa re wi chi je cuban na." 
Ephesians1:10 Pa ri k'ij aretak cäsuc'umataj na ronojel, ri Dios u chomam chi quebumulij na conojel ri jastak, ri e c'o pa ri caj xukuje' ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew, quebuya' na xe' u takanic ri Crist." 
Ephesians1:11 Pa ri are' c'ut uj uxinak echbenelab, uj c'utum ulok jas ri u cholajil ri u chomanic ri quebuban conojel ri jastak jas ri kas u beya'l ri u rayibal." 
Ephesians1:12 Je xuban wa' rech cujc'asi' che u nimarisaxic u k'ij ri Dios, ri sibalaj nim ri u juluwem. Uj ri nabe ri cu'l ulok ka c'u'x chrij ri Crist." 
Ephesians1:13 Xukuje' c'u ri ix, aretak xoc ri tijonic aj kastzij pa i jolom, ri u ya'ic ri u bixic ri colobal ib, xixcojon c'u che ri Crist, xixjunax c'u ruc' xukuje' xixt'ikic ix jacha' che rechbal ri Dios rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios ri xuchi'j ulok ojer." 
Ephesians1:14 Ri Ruxlabal ri Dios are' ri u cu'lbal ka c'u'x chi cäkac'am na ri echbal ri cuya' na ri Dios chke aretak u tz'akatisam chic ri qui torotajic ri e rech, rech cak'ijilaxic rumal ri u nimalil." 
Ephesians1:15 Rumal ri', aretak ri in xinta' u tzijol ri i cojonic che ri Ajawaxel Jesus xukuje' ri lok'ok'ebal i c'u'x chque conojel ri winak ri e rech ri Dios," 
Ephesians1:16 ronojel k'ij quinmaltioxin che ri Dios rumal iwech, amak'el quixnataj chwe aretak quinban ch'awem ruc' Dios." 
Ephesians1:17 Quintz'onoj che ri u Dios ri Kajaw Jesucrist, ri juluwemalaj Tataxel Dios, chi chuya' ri no'j aj uxlabal chiwe che u ch'obic ri cuc'utunisaj xukuje' che ri utzalaj retamaxic u wäch." 
Ephesians1:18 Quintz'onoj che ri Dios chi cuya' ri i chomanic pa sak, rech kas quiwetamaj jachique ri cu'lbal c'uxaj re ri i siq'uixic rumal, xukuje' quiwetamaj ri u k'inomal ri u juluwem ri echbal ri cuya' chque ri winak ri e rech ri Dios," 
Ephesians1:19 chi sibalaj nim ri u cuinem chke ri uj cojonelab, jas ri nimalaj chuk'ab xukuje' cuinem ri xucoj ri Dios," 
Ephesians1:20 aretak xuc'astajisaj ri Crist chquixo'l ri cäminakib, xut'uyuba' c'u pa ri u wiquiak'ab chicaj," 
Ephesians1:21 paquiwi' conojel ri e c'o paquiwi' niq'uiaj chic, conojel ri c'o qui takanic, ronojel cuinem xukuje' ronojel ajawibal, xukuje' paquiwi' conojel bi'aj, man xuwi ta pa tak we k'ij junab ri', xane' xukuje' pa ronojel k'ij ri cäpe na." 
Ephesians1:22 Xebucoj conojel ri jastak chquixe' ri rakan ri Crist, kas are' c'ut ri Crist xuya' che ri comon cojonelab jacha' che u jolom ronojel." 
Ephesians1:23 Are' c'u ri comon cojonelab are' ri u cuerp ri Crist, ri are' u tz'akatil ri Crist; are' c'u ri Crist are' ri qui tz'akatil conojel ri jastak." 
Ephesians2:1 Ri ix nabe ix cäminak pa tak ri iwetzelal xukuje' pa tak ri i mac. 
Ephesians2:2 Xiban ri mac jas ri u beya'l we uwächulew ri', xinimaj ri nim u banic ri c'o u takanic pa ri quiakik', ri uxlabal ri cätakan paquiwi' ri man queniman ta che ri Dios." 
Ephesians2:3 Jas ri e are', ojer konojel xkaban can ri ka rayinic aj winak re mac, xkaban ri u rayibal ri ka ti'jal, jas ri xkachomaj. Rumal c'u ri' takal chke we ta xpe ri royowal ri Dios pakawi', je jas ri niq'uiaj chic." 
Ephesians2:4 Are c'u ri Dios sibalaj xel u c'u'x chke, xujulok'ok'ej ruc' ri nimalaj lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x." 
Ephesians2:5 Jeri' chi, aretak uj cäminak can cumal ri ka mac nabe, xuya' ka c'aslemal ruc' ri Crist. Rumal c'u ri u tok'ob ri Dios ix colotajinak chic." 
Ephesians2:6 Ri Dios xujuc'astajisaj junam ruc' ri Crist Jesus, xukuje' xuban chke chi xujut'uyuba' ruc' pa ri caj." 
Ephesians2:7 Jewa' xubano che u c'utic pa tak ri k'ij junab ri quepe na, ri nimalaj u tok'ob chke xukuje' ri rutzil chke rumal ri Crist Jesus." 
Ephesians2:8 Rumal ri u tok'ob ri Dios ix colotajinak chic, rumal ri i cojonic. Man ix taj xixbanowic pa iwe wi, xane' xak sipam chiwe rumal ri Dios." 
Ephesians2:9 Man cumal ta jastak ri quibano, rech jeri' man c'o ta jun cuya' cunimarisaj rib." 
Ephesians2:10 Ri Dios are' xujbanowic, xuban c'ac' tak winak chke rumal ri Crist Jesus, rech cäkaban utzalaj tak chac, ri xebusuc'umaj ulok ri Dios ojer, rech je cäkabano." 
Ephesians2:11 Rumal c'u ri', chnataj chiwe ri man ix aj judeyib taj: cäquibij c'u ri aj judeyib chiwe chi man ix kopim taj, cäquibij c'ut ri e are' chi e kopim. E kopim c'ut ri e u wi' ri u tz'umal ri e achijab wi cuc' k'abaj che quetal." 
Ephesians2:12 Chnataj chiwe chi ojer canok man c'o ta ri Crist iwuc', man c'o ta iwe chque ri winak aj Israel, man c'o ta iwe che ri e u c'ulwächinic ri Dios mawi che ri e u chi'm. Xak ix c'o cho ri uwächulew, man c'o ta can ri Dios pa iwanima' mawi c'o cu'bisabal i c'u'x." 
Ephesians2:13 Camic c'ut ix jun chi ruc' ri Crist Jesus. Nabe canok sibalaj naj ix c'o wi che ri Dios, xixkebisax c'u ulok rumal ri u quiq'uel ri Crist." 
Ephesians2:14 Ri Crist are ka jamaril. Ri quieb tinimit xuban jun chque, xuwulij ri tapia ri c'o chquixo'l, ri e tasowinak." 
Ephesians2:15 Pa ri u cuerp xusach u wäch ri pixab xukuje' tak ri e u takomal xukuje' tak ri e colomibal. Ri u chomanic are ri qui winakirisaxic kas pa ri are' chque ri quieb jun c'ac' winak, je c'u wa' ri u banic ri jamaril rumal." 
Ephesians2:16 Jeri' ri Crist xutanaba' ri ch'o'j ri c'o chquixo'l ri quieb tinimit rumal ri u cämical cho ri ripibal, xuya' jamaril chquixo'l ruc' ri Dios. Xuban chque ri quieb chi xa' e jun cuerp chic." 
Ephesians2:17 Ri Crist xpe c'ut, xutzijoj jamaril chiwe ri ix c'o naj, xukuje' chque ri e c'o nakaj." 
Ephesians2:18 Rumal c'u ri Crist, ri uj quieb ka wäch cuya' cujoc ruc' ri Tataxel rumal ri xa' jun Uxlabaxel." 
Ephesians2:19 Rumal c'u ri' man ix tastal ta chic che ri u tinimit ri Dios, mawi ix ta chi jalan winak; ri xak ta ix oc'owel ix junam chic cuc' ri winak ri e rech ri Dios, ix jun cuc' ri e aj uwo rachoch ri Dios." 
Ephesians2:20 Ix je ta ne jun ja, ri yacom puwi' ri tac'alibal ri e cojom wi ri takomxenlab xukuje' ri k'axal tak tzij. Ri Jesucrist are' ri nabe abaj re ri u ch'u'c ja." 
Ephesians2:21 Che c'u wa' ri Crist u nuc'um wi rib ronojel ri ja caq'uiy c'ut rech cux tastalicalaj rachoch ri Ajawaxel Dios. 
Ephesians2:22 Jeri' xukuje' ri ix junam cuc' ri niq'uiaj chic, ix jun ruc' ri Crist rech iwonojel quixux xa' jun ja jawije' cäjeki' wi ri Dios pa ri Uxlabaxel." 
Ephesians3:1 Rumal ri', in Pawl, in c'o pa che' rumal rech ri Crist Jesus che iwutzil ix ri man ix aj judeyib taj." 
Ephesians3:2 Rajawaxic c'ut chi iweta'm chic chi ri Dios, chupam ri rutzil, in u takom che u banic we patanijic ri' chiwe che i to'ic." 
Ephesians3:3 Ri Dios xuc'ut jastak chnuwäch ri man etamatal ta can nabe, xuya' retamaxic chwe, jas ri xintz'ibaj chiwe pa quieb oxib tzij." 
Ephesians3:4 Aretak quisiq'uij u wäch ri wuj ri', quiwetamaj chi ri in weta'm ri jastak re ri Crist ri man etamatal ta can nabe." 
Ephesians3:5 Nabe canok man yo'm ta retamaxic we jastak ri' chque ri winak. C'äte camic ri Dios u c'utum chquiwäch ri u tastalic takomxenlab xukuje' ri e k'axal tak re ri u tzij rumal ri Uxlabaxel," 
Ephesians3:6 che u bixic wa': chi rumal ri tijonic aj colobal ib, ri man aj judeyib taj cäquic'am na ri junam echbal cuc' ri aj judeyib, e u tz'akatil c'ut ri junam cuerp, junam c'ut cäquic'am que ri chi'nic ri xuban ri Dios rumal ri Crist Jesus." 
Ephesians3:7 Ri Dios xuya' ri u tok'ob ri man takal ta wa' chwe, xinucoj che pataninel rech ri u tzij re colobal ib. Je xuban wa' chwe rumal ri u cuinem." 
Ephesians3:8 In ri man nim ta nu banic chuwäch ri man nim ta u banic chquixo'l ri e aj u tinimit ri Dios, are' c'ut ri are' yowinak we nimarisabal ib ri' chwe chi quinya' u tzijoxic chque ri man aj judeyib taj ri utzalaj tzijol che qui k'alajisaxic tak ri e u k'inomal ri Crist ri man e ch'obel taj." 
Ephesians3:9 Yo'm pa nu k'ab chi quink'alajisaj chquiwäch conojel, ri jastak re ri Dios ri e c'u'tal ulok kas aretak xtiquiritaj ri uwächulew. Je u chomanic ri Dios wa' ri xebanow conojel ri jastak." 
Ephesians3:10 Xbantaj wa' rech camic ri c'o qui takanic xukuje' ri c'o qui cuinem pa ri caj cäquetamaj rumal ri comon cojonelab ri q'ui u wäch tak u no'j ri Dios. 
Ephesians3:11 Jas ri u chomam ulok ojer aretak c'ä majok cätiquiritaj ri uwächulew, xuban wa' ronojel rumal ri Kajaw Crist Jesus." 
Ephesians3:12 Rumal ri are', cuya' cäkaban ch'awem ruc' Dios, cuya' cäkabij ronojel che, man cäkaxe'j ta kib. Rumal ri are' cuya' cujoc chuwäch ri Dios, cäkajiquiba' ka c'u'x rumal ri ka cojonic." 
Ephesians3:13 Rumal ri' quixinbochi'j chi mäq'uistaj i c'u'x rumal rech ri c'axc'olil ri in c'o wi rumal iwech, ri e are i juluwibal." 
Ephesians3:14 Rumal c'u ri', quinxuqui' chuwäch ri Tataxel." 
Ephesians3:15 Ri u c'amom wi ri u bi' ronojel alaxic, ri c'o pa ri caj xukuje' ri c'o cho ri uwächulew." 
Ephesians3:16 Quinta' che ri Tataxel chi jas ri u k'inomal ri u juluwem, cuya' i chuk'ab xukuje' cuinem pa ri iwanima' rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios," 
Ephesians3:17 rech ri Crist cäjeki' pa ri iwanima' rumal ri cojonic. Jeri' co ix tiquil pa ri lok'ok'ebal c'u'x, je ta ne jun tico'n ri benak u c'amal pa ulew," 
Ephesians3:18 rech quixcuin che u ch'obic cuc' conojel ri cojonelab chi ri nimalaj u lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x ri Crist, ri sibalaj nim u wäch, nim u rabic, naj u kajbem xukuje' naj elinak chicaj." 
Ephesians3:19 Quintz'onoj che ri Dios chi quiwetamaj ri lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x ri Crist, ri coc'ow na chuwäch apachique etamabal, rech cänojisax ri iwanima' che ri Dios." 
Ephesians3:20 Are c'u ri camic chkanimarisaj ba' u k'ij ri Dios, ri sibalaj nim na ri cäcuin che u banic chuwäch ri cäkata' che, nim na chuwäch ri cäkachomaj chi cubano. Je cubano rumal ri cuinem ri cächacun pa kanima'." 
Ephesians3:21 ¡Yok ba' juluwem che ri Dios pa ri comon cojonelab xukuje' che ri Crist Jesus, pa conojel ri k'ij junab xukuje' re chbe k'ij sak! Je chbanok." 
Ephesians4:1 In c'ut, in ajpache' rumal ri Ajawaxel, quixinbochi'j chi quibano jas ri takal chque ri winak ri e siq'uim rumal ri Dios, jas ri ix xixsiq'uixic." 
Ephesians4:2 Chixux mach'alic xukuje' chi lok'ok'ela' iwib; chc'ol i coch'onic chicoch'ola' c'u tak iwib ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj," 
Ephesians4:3 chicojo' i chuk'ab rech amak'el ix nuc'utalic, rumal ri u to'banic ri Uxlabaxel xukuje' rumal ri jamaril ri cuban xa jun chiwe." 
Ephesians4:4 Xa' jun ri cuerp ri c'olic, xukuje' xa' jun ri Uxlabaxel. Jeri' xukuje' ri Dios xixusiq'uij che xa' jun cu'lbal c'uxaj." 
Ephesians4:5 C'o jun Ajawaxel, c'o jun cojonic, xukuje' c'o jun oquem ruc' ri Crist." 
Ephesians4:6 C'o jun Dios, ri xukuje' qui Tat conojel. Ri are' c'o paquiwi' conojel. Ri are' cächacun pa conojel, xukuje' ri are' c'o pa conojel." 
Ephesians4:7 Yo'm c'u chke chkajujunal jas ri cujcuin che u banic, jas ri u tok'ob ri Crist ri yo'm chke." 
Ephesians4:8 Rumal ri' cubij ri Tz'ibatalic: “Xpaki' chicaj, xuban u bic rech chque ri e c'o ajchak'e, xuya' sipanic chque ri winak.”" 
Ephesians4:9 ¿Jas quel cubij wa' chi xpaki'c? Quel cubij chi nabe xkaj ulok cho ri uwächulew. 
Ephesians4:10 Ri Jun ri xkajic, are ri' xukuje' xpaki' paquiwi' conojel ri caj rech quebunojisaj conojel ri jastak." 
Ephesians4:11 Jujun xebucoj che takomxenlab, niq'uiaj chic che k'axal tak u tzij ri Dios, jujun chic xuya' chque chi cäquitzijoj ri tzij re colobal ib, niq'uiaj chic xebucoj che ajyuk'ab xukuje' che tijonelab." 
Ephesians4:12 Jeri' xuya' chque ri cojonelab ronojel ri rajawaxic chque rech quechacunic xukuje' quepataninic, rech cäq'uiy ri u cuerp ri Crist." 
Ephesians4:13 C'ä konojel cakarik na ri junamil pa ri cojonic xukuje' che ri u c'oxomaxic ri u C'ojol ri Dios cujopan c'ut pa ri tz'akatil cakarik c'ut ri tz'akatalaj etabalil re ri tz'akatil ri cakarik pa ri Crist Jesus. 
Ephesians4:14 Rech man uj ac'alab ta chic. Man cujc'am ta chi bic apawije' rumal ronojel tijonic ri je cäpe quiakik'. Man cujkaj ta chic pa ri qui subunic ri winak ri quena'w che u bixic je'lalaj tak tzij, ri cäcaj cujquic'am bic pa jun be jalan chi wi." 
Ephesians4:15 Xane' chkabij ri kastzij ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'u'x, jeri' chujq'uiy ba pa ronojel, pa ri Crist, ri are' ri jolomaj." 
Ephesians4:16 Rumal c'ut ri Crist, ronojel ri cuerp, nuc'utalic xukuje' conojel ri e u tz'akatil xak jun c'o wi junam; aretak c'u ri jujun u tz'akatil utz que chacunic, ronojel cätajin caq'uiyic cätajin catz'akat pa lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj." 
Ephesians4:17 Are c'u wa' quinbij, quixinbochi'j pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel: chi miban chic jas ri cäquiban ri winak ri man e rech ta ri Dios. Ri e are' are cäquiban ri qui chomanic, ri man c'o ta u patan." 
Ephesians4:18 Ri qui chomanic c'o pa ri k'eku'm. Man c'o ta qui c'aslemal aj Dios, rumal rech chi man c'o ta quetamabal, rumal rech chi co ri canima'." 
Ephesians4:19 Ri e are' xquiban co che ri canima'. Xquijach quib che u banic ri itzel qui rayinic. Cäquitij qui k'ij che u banic ronojel u wäch tz'ilalaj tak jastak. 
Ephesians4:20 Ri ix man je ta retamaxic u wäch wa' ri Crist xibano rech je i c'aslemal wa' 
Ephesians4:21 we kas i tom ri u tzijol ri are'; we xixtijox c'ut pa ri are' jas ri u cholajil ri kastzij ri c'o pa ri Jesus. 
Ephesians4:22 Ri nabe i c'aslemal ri iwuc'am ulok, chiwesaj ri ojer ri k'ayinak cumal ri e subunelabalaj tak e i rayinic." 
Ephesians4:23 Ri ix rajawaxic cac'oji' jun c'ac' i chomanic. 
Ephesians4:24 Are' chiwatz'iakij ri c'ac' c'aslemal, jas ri cakaj chuwäch ri Dios, kas pa suq'uilal xukuje' kas pa ri ch'ajch'ojil, ri catakan wi ri u kastzij." 
Ephesians4:25 Rumal ri', miban chi ri banoj tzij, xane' chitzijola' ri kastzij chijujunal cuc' ri e iwajil i tz'akat, rumal rech chi xa' uj jun cuerp." 
Ephesians4:26 We cäpe iwoyowal, chiwila' mixmacunic. Mabeytaj jun k'ij ri iwoyowal." 
Ephesians4:27 Miya' u c'olbal ri itzel. 
Ephesians4:28 Ri queläk'anic, meläk'an chic, xane' chucojo' u chuk'ab che qui banic utzalaj tak chac cuc' ri u k'ab, rech c'o cuya' chque ri c'o qui rajawaxic." 
Ephesians4:29 Mel ulok pa i chi' jun itzel tzij, xane' xuwi chibij tzij ri utz ri cuya' qui chuk'ab xukuje' cuya' utzil chque ri queto'wic." 
Ephesians4:30 Miya' bis che ri Tastalicalaj Ruxlabal re ri Dios, rumal rech chi are iwetal, che u c'utic chi ix rech chic ri Dios c'ä pa ri k'ij aretak kas catz'akat ri i colotajic." 
Ephesians4:31 Mitakej c'anal pa ri iwanima', mäpe chi iwoyowal, mibij chi tzij re oyowal, mixyok'on chic, miwetz'bej chi qui wäch niq'uiaj winak chic, miban chi ronojel u wäch etzelal." 
Ephesians4:32 Xane' chibana' utzil xukuje' chel i c'u'x chbil tak iwib. Chisachala' i mac, jacha' ri Dios xusach i mac rumal ri Crist." 
Ephesians5:1 Chibana' ba' iwe ri cuban ri Dios, jacha' chi ix alc'ualaxelab ri ix lok'ok'em;" 
Ephesians5:2 chiwuc'aj ri c'aslemal aj lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj, jas ri Crist xujulok'ok'ej. Xuya' ri u c'aslemal rumal kech, jacha' sipanic, tabal tok'ob cho ri Dios, are jun c'oc'alaj uxlab ri cäkaj chuwäch." 
Ephesians5:3 Chibana' jas ri takal chiwe ix tastalic tak winak che u patanixic ri Dios. Miban c'ut macunic cuc' ixokib achijab, miban tz'ilalaj tak jastak, mirayij q'uialaj jastak. Tz'ilol c'u wa' che ri tastalicalaj u tinimit ri Dios." 
Ephesians5:4 Mibij q'uixbalalaj tak tzij, mawi conalaj tak tzij. Miwetz'bej qui wäch niq'uiaj winak chic. Are jastak wa' man takal ta chiwe. Xane' quixmaltioxin che ri Dios." 
Ephesians5:5 Iweta'm chic chi conojel ri quemacun cuc' ixokib achijab, o cäquiban tz'ilalaj tak jastak, o cäquirayij q'uialaj tak jastak (xa junam wa' ruc' ri qui k'ijilaxic tak diosib), conojel wa' man c'o ta quechbal pa ri rajawibal ri Crist ri xukuje' rech ri Dios." 
Ephesians5:6 C'o jun mixsubuw ruc' tak tzij ri man c'o ta qui patan. Cumal c'u we jastak ri' cäpe ri royowal ri Dios paquiwi' ri man queniman taj. 
Ephesians5:7 Miban ba' iwe cuc' jas ri cäquiban ri e are'. 
Ephesians5:8 Ri i c'aslemal ojer c'o pa ri k'eku'm. Are c'u ri camic c'o chic pa ri sakil rumal rech chi ix jun chic ruc' ri Ajawaxel. Chibana' ba' iwech ri caquiban ri e aj sakilal. 
Ephesians5:9 Ri u wächinic c'u ri sakilal are ronojel utzil, suq'uil xukuje' kastzij." 
Ephesians5:10 Chiwetamaj ba' jachique jastak ri quekaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. 
Ephesians5:11 Miban iwe ri jastak ri man c'o ta quechbex chque; ri cäquiban ri winak ri e c'o pa ri k'eku'm, xane' chebiya' chi sak." 
Ephesians5:12 Q'uixbal c'ut qui tzijoxic ri jastak ri cäquiban ri e are' chi c'uyal. 
Ephesians5:13 Conojel ri jastak quek'alajisax rumal ri chäj. 
Ephesians5:14 Ri sakil cuk'alajisaj ronojel. Rumal ri' cäbixic: “Chatc'astajok, at ri catwaric, chatwalij chquixo'l ri cäminakib. Ri Crist catuya' na pa sak.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Kas chiwila' na jas ri quibano. Miban iwe jas ri man c'o ta qui no'j, xane' chibana' iwe jas ri c'o qui no'j." 
Ephesians5:16 Chiwechbej tak ri k'ij che u banic ri utz, rumal rech chi itzel tak k'ij uj c'olic." 
Ephesians5:17 Mäsach ri i chomanic, xane' chiwetamaj jas ri u rayibal ri Ajawaxel." 
Ephesians5:18 Mixk'abaric. Chupam c'u wa' c'o c'axc'olil. Xane' chnojisax ri iwanima' che ri Ruxlabal ri Dios. 
Ephesians5:19 Chitzijobela' iwib cuc' tak salm, bix, xukuje' bixonic aj uxlabal. Chixbixonok, chinimarisaj u k'ij ri Ajawaxel ruc' ronojel iwanima'." 
Ephesians5:20 Amak'el chimaltioxij ronojel che ri Dios ri Tataxel pa ri u bi' ri Kajaw Jesucrist. 
Ephesians5:21 Chiyala' iwib pa takic chbil tak iwib, rumal rech chi nim quiwil wi ri Crist." 
Ephesians5:22 Ri ix ixokib, chiyala' iwib pa takic chque ri iwachajil, jas ri i nimanic che ri Ajawaxel." 
Ephesians5:23 Rumal rech chi ri achi are' u jolom ri rixokil, jacha' ri Crist are' u jolom ri comon cojonelab. Xukuje' ri Crist are Colol re ri comon cojonelab, are wa' ri u cuerp." 
Ephesians5:24 Rajawaxic chi ri ixokib cäquiya' quib pa takic chque ri cachajil pa ronojel, jas ri comon cojonelab cuya' rib pa takic che ri Crist." 
Ephesians5:25 Achijab, chebilok'ok'ej ri e iwixokil, jas ri Crist xulok'ok'ej ri comon cojonelab. Xuya' c'u ri u c'aslemal rumal rech." 
Ephesians5:26 Jeri' xuban che rech cux jun tastalic comon cojonelab. Je ta ne xuch'aj ruc' ja' aretak xujosk'ij rumal ri tzij," 
Ephesians5:27 rech cutac'aba' ri comon cojonelab chuwäch are', jun comon cojonelab ri nim u k'ij, man tz'ajtajinak taj, mawi c'o bach'uy che, mawi jun jasach jewa' xane' jun tastalic comon cojonelab, utz ronojel." 
Ephesians5:28 Jeri' xukuje' ri achi rajawaxic culok'ok'ej ri rixokil, jas ri u lok'ok'exic ri u cuerp ri are' chbil rib. Apachin ri culok'ok'ej ri rixokil, culok'ok'ej rib ri'." 
Ephesians5:29 Man c'o ta jun cäretzelaj u wäch ri u cuerp chbil rib, xane' cutzuku, cuchajij. Je xukuje' cuban ri Crist che ri comon cojonelab." 
Ephesians5:30 Uj c'ut u tz'akatil ri u cuerp. Ri uj rech ri cuerp ri'. 
Ephesians5:31 Rumal ri', ri achi quebuya' can ri u tat u nan, cätuni' na ruc' ri rixokil. Ri e quieb quebux na xa' jun." 
Ephesians5:32 Are jun jasach wa' ri man etamatal ta can nabe, ri nim u banic. Ri in c'ut quinbij c'u wa' chrij ri Crist xukuje' ri comon cojonelab." 
Ephesians5:33 Ri ix c'ut chijujunal chi lok'ok'ej ri iwixokil jas ri u lok'ok'exic iwib. Ri ixok xukuje' rajawaxic nim cäril wi ri rachajil. 
Ephesians6:1 Alc'ualaxelab, rumal rech chi ix cojoninak che ri Ajawaxel, chebinimaj ri i tat i nan. Are c'u wa' ri suc'." 
Ephesians6:2 Are wa' nabe takomal ri rachilam jun chi'nic: “Nim chawila' wi ri a tat xukuje' ri a nan," 
Ephesians6:3 rech utz catelic, naj c'ut catc'asi' na cho ri uwächulew.”" 
Ephesians6:4 Ri ix c'ut tataxelab, miyac coyowal ri e iwalc'ual, xane' chebiq'uiyisaj ruc' pixbenic, chebitijoj che ri u tzij ri Ajawaxel." 
Ephesians6:5 Ri ix lok'om pataninelab, chebinimaj ri e iwajaw waral cho ri uwächulew. Nim chebiwila' wi, china' iwib chquiwäch, chebinimaj ruc' ronojel iwanima', je ta ne are ri Crist quipatanij." 
Ephesians6:6 Chixpataninok, man xuwi ta aretak cätajin quixcalawächij rech utz quixil wi. Xane' jacha' chixpataninok chi ix u pataninelab ri Crist, ruc' ronojel iwanima' chibana' jas ri cäraj ri Dios." 
Ephesians6:7 Chixpataninok ruc' ronojel iwanima', je ta ne are quipatanij ri Ajawaxel, man are ta ri winak." 
Ephesians6:8 Iweta'm c'ut we ix lok'om pataninelab, o man ix lok'om pataninelab taj, ri utzil ri quiban chi jujunal qui c'amowaj na che ri Ajawaxel Dios." 
Ephesians6:9 Xukuje' ri ix ajawib, xa' junam chibana' chque ri e i pataninelab. Chiya' can ri u cojic qui xibriquil. Iweta'm chi ri ix cuc' ri e are', xa' junam ix c'o pa u k'ab ri Iwajaw ri c'o chicaj. Ri are' man are ta cäril qui wäch ri winak we nim o man nim ta qui banic." 
Ephesians6:10 Are c'u ri camic, wachalal tak, chicowirisaj iwib pa ri Ajawaxel Jesus, xukuje' pa ri u cuinem ri u chuk'ab." 
Ephesians6:11 Chito' iwib ruc' conojel ri ch'ojibal ri cuya' ri Dios chiwe. Jeri' quixcuinic co quixtaq'ui' chuwäch ri itzel, ri cäraj quixusubu ruc' ri itzel tak u no'j." 
Ephesians6:12 Man cujch'ojin ta cuc' winak, xane' cuc' itzel tak uxlabal ri e c'o pa ri caj, ri c'o qui takanic xukuje' qui cuinem puwi' we uwächulew ri' re ri k'eku'm, xukuje' quetakan puwi'." 
Ephesians6:13 Rumal c'u ri' chebic'ama' conojel ri chacubal re ch'o'j ri cuya' ri Dios, rech quixcuin che u to'ic iwib pa ri itzel k'ij. Aretak c'ut coc'ow ronojel, co quixtaq'ui' canok." 
Ephesians6:14 Co ba' chixtac'alok. Chicojo' ri kastzij, je jas jun pas ximibal re ri u xe' i pam. Chicojo' ri suq'uil, je jas jun ajch'o'j cucoj ch'ich' cho uwo u c'u'x che u to'ic rib." 
Ephesians6:15 Chisuc'umaj iwib che u tzijoxic ri jamaril, jas jun ajch'o'j cucoj ri u xajäb." 
Ephesians6:16 Paquiwi' c'u conojel, ri i cojonic are chicojo' che i quetequic ch'ich' ri quebelpoc'naj wi conojel tak ri e u ch'ab ri itzel ri quenicowic." 
Ephesians6:17 Chicojo' ri colobal iwib je jas jun ajch'o'j cucoj to'bal u jolom. Chic'ama' ri u ch'ich' re ch'o'j ri Uxlabaxel, are wa' ri u tzij ri Dios." 
Ephesians6:18 Mitanaba' ri u banic ch'awem ruc' Dios: chixbochi'nok xukuje' chixtz'onom che ri Dios amak'el, pa ri Uxlabaxel. Chixc'asc'atok, mixtuktubic, chibana' c'u ch'awem puwi' ronojel ri u tinimit ri Dios." 
Ephesians6:19 Xukuje' chibana' ch'awem panuwi' in, rech aretak quinch'awic, ri Dios cuya' ri tzij chwe, rech man quinxe'j ta wib aretak quintzijoj ri tzij re colobal ib ri man etamatal ta can nabe." 
Ephesians6:20 Ri Dios in u takom che u tzijoxic we utzalaj tzij ri'. Rumal c'u wa' in c'o pa che'. Chibana' ch'awem panuwi' rech man quinxe'j ta wib, quintzijoj jas ri takal u banic wumal." 
Ephesians6:21 Ri Tiquico cubij na ronojel chiwe jas ri nu banom xukuje' jas ri cätajin quinbano rech quiwetamaj. Ri Tiquico are' lok'alaj kachalal xukuje' jicalaj pataninel pa ri u chac ri Ajawaxel. 
Ephesians6:22 Rumal c'u ri' xintak bic iwuc' rech quiwetamaj jas ri ka banom, rech cucu'bisaj na i c'u'x." 
Ephesians6:23 Are' ri Dios ri Tataxel, xukuje' ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist, chuya' chque ri achalaxelab jamaril xukuje' lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj, rachilam cojonic." 
Ephesians6:24 Tok'ob chque conojel ri quelok'ok'en ri Kajaw Jesucrist, ruc' jun lok'ok'ebal c'u'x ri man cajalc'at taj." 
Philippians1:1 In Pawl xukuje' ri Timotey, uj u lok'om tak pataninelab ri Jesucrist, cäkatz'ibaj bic we wuj ri' chque conojel ri cojonelab pa Crist Jesus ri e c'o chila' pa Pilips, xukuje' chque ri cojonelab ri quesolin conojel ri ajcristib xukuje' chque ri cojonelab ri quepataninic." 
Philippians1:2 Are ri Dios ka Tat xukuje' ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist cuban tok'ob chiwe xukuje' cuya' jamaril chixo'l. 
Philippians1:3 Amak'el aretak quixnataj chwe, quinmaltioxin che ri nu Dios." 
Philippians1:4 Amak'el aretak quinban ch'awem ruc' quicotemal quinbochi'j ri Dios piwi' iwonojel," 
Philippians1:5 rumal rech chi junam ix chacuninak wuc' che u tzijoxic ri utzalaj tak tzij, kas pa ri nabe k'ij c'ä camic." 
Philippians1:6 Cu'l nu c'u'x chi ri Dios, ri xuchaplej ri utzalaj chac pa ri i c'aslemal, cutz'akatisaj na c'ä pa ri k'ij aretak cätzelej na ulok ri Jesucrist." 
Philippians1:7 Suc' ri nu chomanic chiwe iwonojel, rumal rech chi ix c'o pa wanima'. Aretak in c'o pa che', aretak quintzijoj chque ri winak jasche quincojon che ri tzij re colobal ib xukuje' quink'alajisaj chquiwäch chi are' ri kastzij, ix wachil pa ri u tok'ob ri Dios." 
Philippians1:8 Ri Dios reta'm, chi sibalaj quixinwaj iwonojel ruc' ri lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x ri Jesucrist." 
Philippians1:9 Quinban ch'awem ruc' Dios piwi' rech sibalaj caq'uiyir na ri i lok'ok'ebal c'u'x, xukuje' ri i no'jinic xukuje' ri i ch'obonic pa ronojel." 
Philippians1:10 Jeri' quixcuin che u ch'obic jas ri kas utz na u banic, rech man xa' ta quieb iwanima' xukuje' ma ta c'o k'atbal cäriktaj chiwij aretak cäpe ri Crist." 
Philippians1:11 Ix nojinak chque tak wächinic re suq'uilal, ri e rumal ri Jesucrist che u juluwem xukuje' che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Dios." 
Philippians1:12 Wachalal, quinwaj quiwetamaj chi ri c'ax ri nu rikom, rumal wa' sibalaj xtzijox ri tzij re colobal ib." 
Philippians1:13 Jeri' conojel ri ajch'ojab ri e c'o pa ri rachoch ri ajawinel, cuc' ri niq'uiaj chic, queta'm chi in c'o pa che' rumal rech ri Crist." 
Philippians1:14 E q'ui chque ri kachalal, aretak xquito chi in c'o pa che', sibalaj xquichajij anima' che u tzijoxic ri u tzij ri Dios man ruc' ta xe'n ib." 
Philippians1:15 Jujun cäquitzijoj ri Crist rumal quiäk rayinic xukuje' nimarisabal ib, jujun chi c'ut xukuje' rumal utzalaj rayinic." 
Philippians1:16 Ri jujun cäquitzijoj ri Crist ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'u'x. Queta'm c'ut chi in c'o waral che u to'ic u wi' ri u tzijoxic chi kastzij ri tzij re colobal ib. 
Philippians1:17 Ri niq'uiaj chic caquitzijoj ri Crist xa' rumal u banic c'ax, man ruc' ta u ch'ajch'ojil ri canima'. Xane' are cäcaj chi sibalaj quinrik na c'ax waral pa che'." 
Philippians1:18 ¿Jas lo we in che ronojel ri cäquiban ri winak? Ruc' ronojel ri cäquibano, we che esbal ib, we ruc' kastzij, are cätzijox ri Crist. Quicotemal c'ut cuc'am ulok chwe in, quinquicot c'u na." 
Philippians1:19 Weta'm chi ronojel wa' utz quel na chwe in, rumal ri i ch'awem ruc' Dios panuwi' xukuje' ri Uxlabaxel re ri Jesucrist ri quinuto'o." 
Philippians1:20 Je c'u quel na jas ri quinwaj. Cu'l nu c'u'x chi man quel ta nu q'uixbal, xane' quintzijon na camic jas ri amak'el nu banom, man quinxe'j ta wib. Jeri' cänimarisax na u k'ij ri Crist rumal ri quinban pa ri nu cuerp, we quinc'asi'c o we quincämic." 
Philippians1:21 Ri c'aslemal chwe in are ri Crist. We c'u quincämic, xa' ch'äcanic ri' chwe in." 
Philippians1:22 We c'u quinc'asi' na pa ri nu cuerp, utz ri' rumal rech chi quinchacun na pa ri u chac ri Ajawaxel. Man weta'm taj jachique ri utz na, we utz quincämic, o are utz quinc'asi' na." 
Philippians1:23 Man quinrik taj jachique we quieb ri' quincha'o. Quinwaj quincämic, quinel cho we uwächulew rech quinec'ol ruc' ri Crist. Are wa' sibalaj utz na." 
Philippians1:24 Are c'u rajawaxic chiwe ix, chi quinc'asi' na waral pa ri nu cuerp." 
Philippians1:25 Cu'l nu c'u'x chrij wa', weta'm chi quinc'asi' na, quinc'oji' na iwuc' iwonojel, rech quixcowiric xukuje' quixquicot na pa ri i cojonic." 
Philippians1:26 Jeri' sibalaj quixquicot na pa ri u bi' ri Crist Jesus rumal ri nu c'olem jumul chic iwuc'. 
Philippians1:27 Xak xuwi chibana' pa ri i c'aslemal jas ri takal che ri tzij re colobal ib ri u bim ri Crist. Jeri' we quinbe che iwilic o man quinbe taj, quinta' i tzijol chi co ix tac'alic, xa' jun iwanima', xa' jun i chomanic, junam quixchacun che u tzijoxic ri cojonic re ri tzij re colobal ib." 
Philippians1:28 Man c'o ta quixe'j wi iwib chquiwäch ri cäquiban qui c'ulel chiwe. Are c'utbal wa' chi ri e are' cäsach na qui wäch, are c'u ri ix quixcolotaj na. Are wa' rumal ri Dios." 
Philippians1:29 Rumal c'u rech ri Crist, man xuwi ta ya'tal chiwe chi quixcojon che, xane' xukuje' chi quirik c'ax rumal rech." 
Philippians1:30 Ri ix xukuje' ri in, uj c'o pa ri kas junam tijow chuk'ab ri iwilom chi in c'o wi, xukuje' ri i tom chi in c'o wi." 
Philippians2:1 We ri Crist cuya' i chuk'ab, we ri lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x cucu'bisaj i c'u'x, we c'o u comonixic ri Uxlabaxel iwuc', we c'o jun ja'laj c'uxaj iwuc' xukuje' we quel i c'u'x chque niq'uiaj chic," 
Philippians2:2 chitz'akatisaj ba' ri nu quicotemal: xa' junam chixchomanok, chilok'ok'ela' iwib, xa jun iwanima', xa' jun i chomanic." 
Philippians2:3 C'o jas mibano ri xa' ta che u nimarisaxic i k'ij, o rech quixux ta nimak i banic, xane' chi mach'arisaj iwib chich'obo' chi ri niq'uiaj chic e are' nimak na qui k'ij chiwäch ix." 
Philippians2:4 C'o jun mutzucuj xuwi ri kas utz che, xane' xukuje' ri utz na chque ri jule' chic." 
Philippians2:5 Chc'ol ta ba' iwuc' we chomanic ri' ri xc'oji' ruc' ri Crist Jesus. 
Philippians2:6 Ri pune' junam u wächbal ruc' ri Dios man xuna' ta rib chi junam ta ruc' ri Dios ri xucoj ta pa u tzij. 
Philippians2:7 Xuya' c'u can ri u c'olbal ri nim u k'ij ruc' ri Dios, are' xuc'am ri u wächbal jun lok'om pataninel, xalaxic jacha' winak." 
Philippians2:8 Aretak xuna' rib chi je u banic jas jun winak, xumach' rib, xniman c'ä pa ri cämical, jun cämic c'ut re ripibal." 
Philippians2:9 Rumal c'u ri' ri Dios sibalaj xunimarisaj na u k'ij chquiwäch conojel, xuya' jun u bi' ri c'o na paquiwi' conojel ri bi'aj," 
Philippians2:10 rech pa u bi' ri Jesus caquimej wi na ri qui ch'ec ri e c'o pa ri caj ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew xukuje' ri e c'o chuxe' uwächulew. 
Philippians2:11 Rech conojel cäquich'obo xukuje' cäquibij chi ri Jesucrist are Ajawaxel, jeri' cänimarisax u k'ij ri Dios Tataxel." 
Philippians2:12 Je c'u ri', lok'alaj tak wachalal, jas ri i nimanic amak'el aretak in c'o iwuc' nabe, camic xukuje' sibalaj chixniman na pune' man in c'o ta chi iwuc'. Chicojo' i chuk'ab chi utz ri i c'aslemal ix colotajinak chi c'u ne', nim chi wila' wi ri Dios, china' iwib chuwäch." 
Philippians2:13 Are c'u ri Dios cayo'w pa ri iwanima' ri u rayixic u banic ri cakaj chuwäch. 
Philippians2:14 Pa ronojel ri quibano, xak mixch'ach'atic, mixch'ojinic." 
Philippians2:15 Rech jeri' man c'o ta etzelal cäriktaj chiwij, ix ralc'ual ri Dios, man c'o ta mac pa ri i c'aslemal, ix je ta ne chäj quixjuluw chquixo'l ri itzel tak winak ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew camic, ri man e suc' taj," 
Philippians2:16 pa ri u k'alajisaxic ri tzij re c'aslemal chquiwäch. Jeri' quinquicot na iwumal pa ri k'ij aretak cäpe ri Crist, weta'm chi man xak ta lok' xinc'am wanim pa ri binem, man xak ta lok' xintij nu chuk'ab pa ri nu chac." 
Philippians2:17 Pune' cäpil na ri kas nu c'aslemal che u tz'akatil ri sipanic ri quiya' ix che ri Dios rumal ri i cojonic, in quinequicotok, ix c'u joch'ob quixquicot wuc'." 
Philippians2:18 Jeri' chixquicotok, xukuje' chixquicot ba' wuc' in." 
Philippians2:19 We are u rayibal ri Ajawaxel Jesus, pa quieb oxib k'ij quinwaj quintak bic ri Timotey iwuc', rech quinto jas ri i banom, quinquicot c'u na." 
Philippians2:20 Man c'o ta chi c'u jun ri junam ta u chomanic wuc' in, ri kas coc il chiwe." 
Philippians2:21 Conojel c'ut cäquitzucuj ri xa' quech ri e are', man are ta c'u ri rech ri Crist Jesus cäquitzucuj." 
Philippians2:22 Iweta'm chic chi ri Timotey utzalaj chac u banom, cächacun wuc' in che u tzijoxic ri tzij jas jun c'ojolaxel cuto' ri u tat." 
Philippians2:23 Quinwaj c'ut chi are' quintak bic iwuc' chanim, aretak quinwetamaj jas cuban ri jastak chnuwäch in." 
Philippians2:24 Cu'l nu c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel, chi pa quieb oxib k'ij xukuje' ri in quinbe na iwuc'." 
Philippians2:25 Quinchomaj chi rajawaxic xukuje' quintak na bic ri kachalal Epaprodit iwuc', are wäch ajchac, je ta ne wäch ajch'o'j, ri xitak ulok che nu to'ic aretak c'o rajawaxic chwe." 
Philippians2:26 Ri are' sibalaj cäraj cäril i wäch iwonojel. Sibalaj c'u xbisonic rumal rech chi xito chi u rikom yabil. 
Philippians2:27 Kastzij xurik yabil, xa' jubik' xraj man xcämic. Are c'u ri Dios xel u c'u'x che, man xuwi ta che ri are', xane' xukuje' chwe in, rech man quinrik ta nimalaj bis chuwäch ri bis ri nu rikom." 
Philippians2:28 Rumal ri' sibalaj quinwaj quintak bic ri Epaprodit iwuc', rech quixquicotic aretak quiwil chi jumul u wäch, rech ri in man kas ta quinbison chic." 
Philippians2:29 Chic'ulaj ba' pa ri Ajawaxel ruc' nimalaj quicotemal. Nim chebiwila wi ri je qui banic jas ri are'. 
Philippians2:30 Rumal c'u rech ri u chac ri Crist, xa' jubik' xraj man xcämic. Man xoc ta c'u il che ri u c'aslemal, xa' rumal ri u banic tok'ob chwe. Xubano jachique ri man xixcuin ta ix che u banic." 
Philippians3:1 Che ri u q'uisbalil c'ut, wachalal, chixquicot pa ri Ajawaxel. Chwe in man c'ax ta chwe ri e qui tz'ibaxic bic chiwe jumul chic ri e junam jastak, cajwataj c'u wa' chiwe che i jiquibaxic."
