Philippians3:2 Chichajij iwib chquiwäch ri winak ri e je ta ne tz'i'. Chichajij iwib chquiwäch ri cäquiban itzel tak chac, xukuje' ri cäcaj cäquik'at ri i cuerp, che u cojic iwetal re ri kopinic." 
Philippians3:3 Uj c'u ri' ri kas cojom ketal re kopinic, ri uj ri cäkak'ijilaj ri Dios pa ri Uxlabal, ri cujquicotic rumal chi uj rech ri Crist Jesus, ri man cäkajiquiba' ta c'u ka c'u'x chrij ri cuerp." 
Philippians3:4 Pune' ri in c'o quinjiquiba' wi nu c'u'x chrij ri cuerp. We c'o jun chic cuchomaj chi c'o cujiquiba' wi u c'u'x chrij ri cuerp, kas are' na ri in;" 
Philippians3:5 xkopix ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri in achi wi chuwajxak k'ij che wetal re kopinic chi in jun aj israel, pa ri ramak' ri Benjamin xinalax wi, ri in kas in hebrey rumal rech chi ri nu tat xukuje' ri nu nan e aj hebreyib; xintijox che ri pixab cuc' ri pariseyib." 
Philippians3:6 Nabe sibalaj xincoj nu chuk'ab che u banic c'ax che ri comon cojonelab; in suc' chuwäch ri pixab, man c'o ta etzelal cäriktaj chwij." 
Philippians3:7 Ronojel c'u wa' nim u banic chnuwäch nabe canok, camic chic man c'o ta chi u patan chwe, rumal ri Crist." 
Philippians3:8 C'o chi c'u na jubik', in nu ch'obom chi conojel we jastak ri' man c'o ta chi qui patan chwe, aretak quinchomaj chi sibalaj nim u banic ri retamaxic u wäch ri Crist Jesus ri Wajaw. Rumal rech ri Crist nu tzakom can ronojel, ronojel c'ut xa' mes chic chnuwäch che u q'uexwäch ri nu ch'äcom ri are' ri Crist." 
Philippians3:9 Xukuje' rech quinriktaj pa ri are'. Jeri' in suc' chic man rumal ta ri u nimaxic ri pixab, xane' rumal rech chi xincojon che ri Crist. Are suq'uil wa' cuya' ri Dios rumal ri cojonic." 
Philippians3:10 Quinwaj kas quinwetamaj u wäch ri Crist xukuje' ri u chuk'ab ri u c'astajic. Xukuje' quinwaj quinrik c'ax junam ruc', nu c'amom chic ri u banic ri u cämical," 
Philippians3:11 we apachique ta ne rumal quinrik na ri nu c'astajic chquixo'l ri cäminakib. 
Philippians3:12 Man cätajin ta quinbij chi nu rikom chi ronojel, mawi chi in tz'akatarinak chic; quintaken c'ut ruc' eyebal c'uxaj che u rikic are', are c'u ne ri Crist Jesus xinrikow nabe." 
Philippians3:13 Wachalal, man quinbij taj in chi kas nu rikom ta chic; are c'ut ri quinbano are ri man u nataxic ta chic ri canajinak canok, are c'u quincoj nu chuk'ab che u rikic ri ri c'o chnuwäch," 
Philippians3:14 che ri opanem jawije' c'o wi ri etal quinch'äc c'ut ri tojbal ri quinusiq'uij ri Dios che u c'amic jun c'ac' c'aslemal rumal ri Crist Jesus. 
Philippians3:15 Jewa' ri uj co chic pa ri ka cojonic che u ternexic ri Crist, je chujchomam wa', we jun chi c'u wi ri i chomanic, ri Dios cuc'utunisaj na wa' xukuje' chiwäch." 
Philippians3:16 Rajawaxic c'ut cajunamataj ri ka c'aslemal ruc' ri ka rikom chic. 
Philippians3:17 Wachalal, chibana' iwe jas ri quinban in. Are chebiwila' ri cäquiban que jas ri ka banom uj chiwäch." 
Philippians3:18 C'o jun jasach q'ui mul nu bim can chiwe. Quinbij chi na jumul camic, sibalaj c'u cuya' ok'ej chwe, chi e c'o q'ui winak ri qui banom qui c'ulel che ri u ripibal ri Crist." 
Philippians3:19 Cäpe c'u na jun k'ij aretak cäsach na qui wäch ri winak ri'. Ri are' qui dios ri itzel tak u rayinic ri qui ti'jal, cäquinimarisaj qui k'ij chrij q'uixbalalaj tak jastak. Cäquichomaj xuwi ri jastak aj uwächulew." 
Philippians3:20 Are' c'u ri ka tinimit pa ri caj c'o wi'; ri xukuje' cakeyej wi jun Colonel, ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist." 
Philippians3:21 Ri cujal wachij na ri ka cuerp ri man nim ta u k'ij, cux na xak junam ruc' ri juluwemalaj u cuerp, jas ri u cholajil ri cuinelalaj u cuinem ri rumal wa' xukuje' cäcuinic quebucoj conojel ri jastak chuxe' ri u takanic." 
Philippians4:1 Je c'u ri', lok'alaj tak wachalal, ri sibalaj quinwaj quinwil i wäch, ix nu quicotemal, ix nu ch'äcoj, chijiquiba' ba' i c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel, lok'alaj tak wachalal." 
Philippians4:2 Quinta' jun tok'ob che ri Ebod, quinta' jun tok'ob che ri Sint, chi xak junam che choman pa ri Ajawaxel." 
Philippians4:3 Xukuje' quinta' jun tok'ob chawe at, jicalaj wäch ajchac, chebato' ri ixokib ri'. Ri e are' xinquito' che u tzijoxic ri tzij re colobal ib, xukuje' ri Clement xukuje' ri e niq'uiaj wäch tak ajchaquib chic. C'o c'u ri qui bi' pa ri wuj re c'aslemal." 
Philippians4:4 Ronojel k'ij chixquicot pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel. Jumul chic quinbij: ¡Chixquicotok! 
Philippians4:5 Ri i ch'uch'ujil chetamax cumal conojel ri winak. Ri Ajawaxel cänakajinic. 
Philippians4:6 C'o jun jasach mixoc wi il, xane' chiya' ronojel chuwäch ri Dios pa ch'awem ruc' Dios; chixtz'onom che, chiya' c'u maltioxinic che xukuje'." 
Philippians4:7 Are c'u ri u jamaril ri Dios, ri nim na chuwäch ronojel no'j, cächajin na ri iwanima' xukuje' ri i ch'obobal pa ri Crist Jesus." 
Philippians4:8 Chuq'uisbalil, wachalalib, e joropa' jastak ri kas e je, e joropa' jastak ri ya'tal u ya'ic qui k'ij, e joropa' jastak ri e suc', e joropa' jastak ri e ch'ajch'oj, e joropa' jastak ri ya'tal qui lok'ok'exic, e joropa' jastak ri e utz qui tzijol, we c'o c'u apachique utzil, o apachique ak'anasibal k'ij, e are' wa' chebino'jij." 
Philippians4:9 Ronojel ri nu c'utum can chiwäch, ri nu bim can chiwe, ri nu tzij ri i tom, xukuje' ri iwilom chi quinbano, ronojel wa' chibana'; are c'u ri Dios aj jamaril cäc'oji' na iwuc'." 
Philippians4:10 Sibalaj quinquicot pa ri Ajawaxel, rumal rech chi c'äte chi wa' xinnataj chi jumul chiwe. Man quinbij taj chi xinsach pa i jolom. Weta'm chi xa' man ix cuininak ta che nu to'ic." 
Philippians4:11 Man rumal ta rech chi c'o rajawaxic chwe quinbij wa'. Ri in quinquicotic pune' man nim ri c'o wuc', wetamam chi cubana' chwe." 
Philippians4:12 Wetamam ri c'olem pa ri mebayil xukuje' ri c'olem pa ri k'inomal. In wetamam ronojel u wäch c'aslemal, we in nojinak o we quinnumic, we q'ui ri jastak wech o we man c'o taj." 
Philippians4:13 Ronojel quincuin chubanic are' c'u Crist ri cäyo'w nu chuk'ab. 
Philippians4:14 Utz c'ut ri xibano aretak xinito' pa ri nu c'axc'olil. 
Philippians4:15 Iweta'm, ix aj Pilipsib, chi aretak xinchap u tzijoxic ri tzij re colobal ib, aretak xinel bic pa Masedon, man c'o ta jun comon cojonelab, xane' xuwi ri ix, xitak ulok ri i sipanic chwe, rumal rech ri to'banic pa ri utzalaj tak tzij ri xinya' can chiwe." 
Philippians4:16 Xukuje' aretak xinc'oji' pa Tesalon, quieb oxib mul ri i sipanic xitak bic che nu to'ic." 
Philippians4:17 Man quinbij ta wa' xa' rech cäya' jun sipanic chwe. Xane' are quinwaj chi quiban q'ui utzalaj tak chac rech c'o na cajilax chiwij. 
Philippians4:18 Ronojel c'o wuc', q'ui ri jastak we c'olic. Xinc'am ri xitak ulok rumal ri Epaprodit, c'o ronojel ri rajawaxic chwe ruc' u wi'. Ri xiya' chwe, are je ta ne jun c'oc'alaj c'oc'al sipam cho ri Dios, ri cäc'am rumal ri Dios ri cäkaj chuwäch." 
Philippians4:19 Ri nu Dios cuya' na ronojel ri rajawaxic chiwe, jas ri juluwemalaj u k'inomal rumal ri Crist Jesus." 
Philippians4:20 ¡Chnimarisax ba' u k'ij ri Dios ka Tat amak'el chbe k'ij sak! Je chbanok. 
Philippians4:21 Chiya' rutzil qui wäch ri e tastal che u patanixic ri Dios ri c'o pa Crist Jesus. Xukuje' ri kachalal ri e c'o wuc' cäquiya' bic rutzil i wäch. 
Philippians4:22 Conojel tak ri e tastalic cäquiya' rutzil i wäch. Xukuje' ri e aj uwo rachoch ri Sesar sibalaj cäquiya' rutzil i wäch. 
Philippians4:23 Ri u tok'ob ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist chc'ol ta pa ri iwanima'. Je chbanok. 
Colossians1:1 Ri in Pawl, takom re ri Jesucrist je c'u wa' ri u rayibal ri Dios, xukuje' ri kachalal Timotey," 
Colossians1:2 quintz'ibaj we wuj ri' chque ri cojonelab ri e c'o pa Colos, chque ri tastalic jicalaj tak kachalal pa ri Jesucrist. Are' ri Dios ka Tat cuban tok'ob chiwe xukuje' cuya' jamaril chixo'l." 
Colossians1:3 Amak'el cujmaltioxin che ri Dios ri u Tat ri Kajaw Jesucrist, aretak cäkaban ch'awem ruc' Dios piwi'." 
Colossians1:4 Ka tom i tzijol chi c'o i cojonic che ri Crist Jesus, chi quebilok'ok'ej conojel ri tastalic tak cojonelab," 
Colossians1:5 rumal rech ri eyebal c'uxaj chrij ri c'olom chiwe pa ri caj. I tom chi c'u wa' rumal ri tzij re kastzij, are wa' ri kastzij re colobal ib." 
Colossians1:6 We tzij ri' ri xtzijox chiwe, are' wa' tzijom pa tak conojel ri c'olbal cho ri uwächulew. Cätajin cäq'uiyic xukuje' cuya' u wächinic jas ri u banom ulok iwuc' pa ri k'ij aretak xita' ri u tok'ob ri Dios xukuje' kas c'u xiwetamaj chi are' kastzij." 
Colossians1:7 Are wa' ri xitijoj wi iwib ruc' ri Epapras, ri lok'alaj kach ajchac. Are jun jicalaj pataninel re ri Crist c'o chixo'l." 
Colossians1:8 Ri are' xubij chke ri lok'ok'ebal i c'u'x ri yo'm rumal ri Uxlabaxel. 
Colossians1:9 Rumal wa' ri uj, kas pa ri k'ij ri xketamaj, man ka tanabam ta u banic ch'awem ruc' Dios piwi', xukuje' che u tz'onoxic che ri Dios chi chubana' chiwe chi ruc' tz'akatil quiwetamaj ri u rayibal chuya' c'u ronojel u wäch no'j chiwe xukuje' ch'obonic aj uxlabal." 
Colossians1:10 Jeri' quibano jas ri takal chiwe ri ix rech ri Ajawaxel, rech ronojel ri quibano cäkaj chuwäch. Quiya' c'u conojel wächinic que conojel utzalaj tak chac, sibalaj c'u quiwetamaj na u wäch ri Dios." 
Colossians1:11 Cäkata' che ri Dios chi cuya' i chuk'ab ruc' ri nimalaj u cuinem ri u juluwem. Jeri' quixcuin che u ch'ijic ronojel c'ax, quicuy ronojel ri cäban chiwe." 
Colossians1:12 Ruc' quicotemal quinmaltioxin che ri Tataxel, rumal rech chi u yo'm chke chi cäkac'am ke ri echbal ri cuya' chque ri tastalic tak cojonelab ri e c'o pa ri sakil." 
Colossians1:13 Xujresaj pa ri u cuinem ri k'eku'm, xujuk'axej c'u pa ri rajawibal ri lok'alaj u C'ojol," 
Colossians1:14 ri xujresaj pa u k'ab ri ka c'ulel rumal ri u quiq'uel xukuje' xusach ri ka mac. 
Colossians1:15 Ri Crist ri quilatajic are' wa' ri u wächbal ri Dios, ri man quilitaj taj; are' ri u c'ojol are' ri c'o nabe chuwäch ronojel ri banom." 
Colossians1:16 Rumal c'ut are' xeban conojel ri jastak ri e c'o pa ri caj xukuje' ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew, ri queilitajic xukuje' ri man queilitaj taj, we ajawibal, we takanic, we e camal be, xukuje' we aj cuinem; conojel wa' xebantaj rumal ri are' xukuje' che u nimarisaxic u k'ij." 
Colossians1:17 Ri Crist kas c'o ulok nabe c'ä majok cheban conojel ri jastak, rumal c'ut ri are' e jekel conojel ri jastak." 
Colossians1:18 Xukuje' are' ri jolomaj ri catakan puwi' ri cuerp, ri are' ri comon cojonelab. Are' ri tiquiritajic, are' ri nabe ri xc'astajisax chquixo'l ri cäminakib, rech jeri' ri are' nabe c'o paquiwi' conojel ri jastak." 
Colossians1:19 Xraj c'ut ri Dios chi cajeki' ronojel ri are' pa ri Crist," 
Colossians1:20 rumal c'ut ri Crist are' xraj chi cac'oji' jamaril chuxo'l cuc' conojel ri jastak, ruc' ronojel e aj uwächulew o we aj caj. Xuban c'u ri jamaril rumal ri u quiq'uel ri Crist ri xtix cho ri ripibal." 
Colossians1:21 Ri ix nabe naj ix c'o wi che ri Dios, i c'ulel ri Dios pa ri iwanima', rumal ri itzel tak chac ri xibano." 
Colossians1:22 Camic c'ut ri Dios u yo'm chi jamaril chixo'l ruc' are', rumal ri u cämical ri Crist, aretak xurik cämical pa ri u cuerp aj winak. Xuban wa' che i tac'abaxic chuwäch are', ix tastalic tak winak chic, man ix tz'ajtajinak taj, man c'o ta chi i mac," 
Colossians1:23 we kas co ix tac'al pa ri i cojonic, man quiya' ta canok, we kas cu'l i c'u'x chrij ri tzij re colobal ib ri i tom, man cuban ta quieb i c'u'x. Are utzalaj tak tzij wa' cätzijox pa tak ronojel c'olbal cho ri uwächulew. Ri in, in Pawl in cojom che patanijic." 
Colossians1:24 Quinquicot c'u pa tak ri c'axc'olil ri nu rikom rumal iwech, c'ä c'ax c'u que che ri Crist rumal ri qui c'axc'olil ri comon cojonelab, are wa' ri u cuerp. Quinc'am c'u we we c'axc'olil ri' pa ri nu cuerp. Quinrik c'u c'ax rumal quech ri comon cojonelab." 
Colossians1:25 Ri in in cojom che pataninel re ri comon cojonelab. Ri Dios u yo'm pa nu k'ab ri i patanixic, rech kas cätz'akat u tzijoxic ronojel ri u tzij." 
Colossians1:26 Are jun jasach ri man etamatal ta can nabe, c'u'm ulok rumal ri Dios kas pa tak ri k'ij junab chquiwäch conojel ri winak ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew. Camic c'ut k'alajisam chi chquiwäch ri winak ri e tastalic." 
Colossians1:27 Ri xraj wi ri Dios u ya'ic retamaxic ri u k'inomal ri u juluwem we awatalic ri' chquixo'l ri man aj judeyib taj; are Crist wa' pa ri ix, ri cu'lbal i c'u'x che ri juluwem." 
Colossians1:28 Are Crist wa' ri cäkatzijoj uj. Quekapixbej conojel winak chquila' quib, quekatijoj rech kas cäquich'obo, jeri' chquijujunal quebux tz'akat pa ri Crist." 
Colossians1:29 Rumal ri' sibalaj quinchacunic, quintij nu chuk'ab. Ri cuinem ri cuya' ri Crist chwe, are cächacun pa ri wanima' ruc' chuk'ab." 
Colossians2:1 Quinwaj c'ut chi quiwetamaj chi sibalaj cätajin quintij nu k'ij che i to'ic, xukuje' ri e aj laodiseyib xukuje' che quito'ic conojel ri man in quilom taj chiwinakil." 
Colossians2:2 Quintij nu k'ij rech ri e are' caquic'am chajin anima' chupam ri canima', rech quejunataj chupam ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj quek'inomar c'ut ruc' jun tz'akatalaj etamanic ri cuya' chque chi cäquich'ob ri awatalic rech ri Dios, ri kas are' ri Crist," 
Colossians2:3 ri e c'utal wi conojel ri k'inomal rech ri no'j xukuje' ri etamanic. 
Colossians2:4 Quinbij wa' chiwe rech c'o jun mixsubuw ruc' je'lalaj tak tzij. 
Colossians2:5 Pune' man in c'o ta chi winakil chixo'l, in c'o c'ut pa ri uxlabal, quinquicot c'ut che rilic ri utzalaj i cholajil ri c'olic xukuje' chi amak'el co ix tac'al chupam ri i cojonic pa ri Crist." 
Colossians2:6 Je c'ut jas ri u c'amic ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist i banom, je chixbin ruc' are':" 
Colossians2:7 benak ri i xeal pa ri are', co ix tiquitoj pa ri are' rumal ri cojonic, je jacha' ri xixtijox wi, quiya' c'u maltioxinic amak'el che ri Dios." 
Colossians2:8 Chiwila' iwib: miya' iwib chi quixc'am bic cumal ri cäcaj quixquisub cumal tak no'jinic xukuje' tak ch'äcabal ri xak e cawäch, we winak ri' man e tiquitoj taj pa ri Crist, xane' chquipam tak ri xak e qui no'jibal tak winak xukuje' chquipam ri cuinem ri quetakan puwi' we uwächulew ri'." 
Colossians2:9 Rumal rech chi ruc' ri Crist jekel wi ronojel ri u nojiquil ri Dios chi winakil. 
Colossians2:10 Are c'u ri ix ix nojinak rumal rech chi ix junatal pa ri Crist, ri are' ri c'o u takanic paquiwi' conojel ri c'o qui cuinem xukuje' qui takanic." 
Colossians2:11 Ri ix man xic'amtaj ri etal re ri u kopixic ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri ix achijab wi je jacha' ri cäquiban ri achijab aj judeyib. Ri ix man xixkopix taj cumal k'abaj, are c'u ri ix xic'am ri etal rumal ri Crist aretak ri are' xebukopij ri e itzel tak e i rayibal aj winak re mac;" 
Colossians2:12 aretak xban ri i bautism, jun c'utbal chi xa ix jun chic ruc' ri Crist, ri ix xixmuk junam ruc' ri are', xukuje' xixc'astaj junam ruc' rumal rech chi xixcojon che ri u cuinem ri Dios, ri xc'astajisan ri Crist chquixo'l ri cäminakib." 
Colossians2:13 Ri pa jun k'ijol canok ix cäminak pa mac, xukuje' man e kopim taj ri e itzel tak e i rayibal aj winak re mac, are c'u ri camic ri Dios e u yo'm i c'aslemal junam ruc' ri Crist. Ri are' e u cuyum conojel ri e ka mac." 
Colossians2:14 Xusach u wäch ri tz'ibatal wi ri takanic re ri pixab, ri cujuc'ulelaj. Xresaj chkaxo'l, xubajij cho ri ripibal." 
Colossians2:15 Rumal ri Crist, ri Dios xukasaj qui k'ij ri c'o qui takanic xukuje' ri c'o qui cuinem, xresaj qui q'uixbal chquiwäch conojel, xch'äcan paquiwi' cho ri ripibal." 
Colossians2:16 C'o ba jun mäk'atow tzij piwi' chquij ri jastak ri quitijo o ri quiwuq'uiaj, o chquij jastak re nimak'ij, o re ri c'ac' ic', o quech tak k'ij re uxlanem." 
Colossians2:17 Ri e are' xa' u mu'jal ri cäpe na. Are c'u ri kastzij cäriktaj pa ri Crist. 
Colossians2:18 Miya' c'olbal chi quixc'okox cumal ri caquiban quib chi sibalaj e mach'alic quequik'ijilaj c'ut ri e tako'nib aj caj, ri caquibij quib chi quequil tak c'utwächinic caquisipojisaj c'u quib rumal nimarisanib, rumal quech tak ri e qui chomanic aj winak." 
Colossians2:19 Qui tasom quib chrij ri Crist, ri u Jolom ri cuerp. Rumal ri Crist cäq'uiy ronojel ri cuerp, jas ri u chomanic ri Dios, chi conojel ri u tz'akatil ri cuerp cäquito' quib, junam quechacunic." 
Colossians2:20 Ri ix ix cäminak chi junam ruc' ri Crist, rech man quebipatanij ta chic ri quebajawin puwi' ri uwächulew. ¿Jas c'u che quiya' iwib chuxe' ri qui takanic je ta ne ix c'asal na che u banic ri jastak aj uwächulew? Ri qui takanic e are wa':" 
Colossians2:21 manak wa', matij wa', machap wa'." 
Colossians2:22 Ri takanic ri' xa' chquij jastak ri cäsach qui wäch aretak quecojic, e are xa' qui takanic xukuje' qui tijonic winak." 
Colossians2:23 Kastzij we jastak ri' je ta ne ri queilic chi e rech no'jibal, quetakan c'u che cojonic xukuje' mach'ibalil xukuje' u c'axc'obisaxic ri cuerp; man c'o ta c'u cupatanij che qui k'atixic tak rayibal aj winak re mac." 
Colossians3:1 We ix c'astajinak chi ruc' ri Crist, chebitzucuj ba' ri jastak aj chicaj, jawije' ri t'uyul wi ri Crist pa ri u wiquiak'ab ri Dios." 
Colossians3:2 Chebichomaj ba' ri jastak ri e aj chicaj, man are ta ri e re ri uwächulew." 
Colossians3:3 Ix cäminak chi c'ut, are' c'u ri i c'aslemal c'u'tal ruc' ri Crist pa ri Dios." 
Colossians3:4 Ri Crist are' ri i c'aslemal. Aretak cäpetic, c'äte ri' ri ix xukuje' quixc'oji' na ruc' pa juluwem." 
Colossians3:5 Chibana' ba' chi cäcäm ronojel ri quech ri e u tz'akatil ri e itzel tak e i rayinic ri e rech ri uwächulew: chi c'o jun mamacun cuc' ixokib achijab, mawi muban tz'ilalaj tak jastak, mawi mac'oji' u rayinic che u macurisaxic ri u cuerp, mawi mec'oji' itzel tak u rayinic, mawi mebuya' c'olbal chi ri ranima' queburayij tak k'inomal (are c'u wa' ri qui k'ijilaxic ri e diosib)." 
Colossians3:6 Cumal c'u we jastak ri' cäpe ri royowal ri Dios paquiwi' ri winak ri man queniman taj. 
Colossians3:7 Ri ix xiban ronojel wa' nabe canok pa ri ojer i c'aslemal. 
Colossians3:8 Camic c'ut, miban chi conojel we jastak ri': Mäpe iwoyowal, miban i c'anal, miban etzelal, miwetz'bej qui wäch niq'uiaj winak chic, mixyok'onic, mibij q'uixbalalaj tak tzij," 
Colossians3:9 mibila' ri man kastzij taj chixo'l. Iwesam chi c'u bic ri ojer i c'aslemal xukuje' ri jastak ri xiban nabe canok. 
Colossians3:10 Iwatz'iakim chi iwib ruc' ri c'ac' i c'aslemal. Cätajin c'u cuq'uex rib rech cajunamataj ruc' ri u wächbal ri Dios ri xixwinakirisanic, rech kas quiwetamaj u wäch." 
Colossians3:11 Man c'o ta chi cubij we aj judey o we man aj judey taj, we kopim ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri ix achijab wi o man kopim taj, we naj cäpe wi, we man c'o ta retamanic, we lok'om pataninel o tzokopitalic; ri c'o cubij chi ri Crist are' ronojel pa conojel." 
Colossians3:12 Ri Dios quixulok'ok'ej, ix u cha'om, u banom tastalic tak winak chiwe. Chc'ol tok'obisan wächaj pa ri iwanima', chel i c'u'x chque niq'uiaj winak chic, minimarisaj iwib chquiwäch niq'uiaj chic, mibanala' c'ax chbil iwib, chc'ol i coch'onic," 
Colossians3:13 chisachala' i mac chbil tak iwib we c'o jun c'o royowal chrij ri jun chic. Jas ri Ajawaxel xusach ri i mac ix, je chibana' ix xukuje'." 
Colossians3:14 Puwi' c'u ronojel wa', chc'ol lok'ok'ebal i c'u'x. Are c'u wa' quixuc'an pa jun tz'akatalaj chomanic." 
Colossians3:15 Chiya' ba' che ri u jamaril ri Crist chajawin pa tak ri iwanima', xukuje' xixusiq'uij c'ut rech quiban xa' jun cuerp; xukuje' chiya' ta c'u xmaltioxinic." 
Colossians3:16 Are ta ri u tzij ri Crist cäjeki' iwuc', kas cunojisaj ri iwanima'. Chitijola' iwib, chipixbela' iwib ruc' utzalaj tak no'j; chibixoj salm che ri Dios, bix, xukuje' bixonic aj uxlabal ruc' maltioxic che ri Dios pa ri iwanima'." 
Colossians3:17 Apachique ri quibano o ri quibij, chibana' ronojel pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel Jesus, ruc' maltioxinic che ri Dios rumal ri are'." 
Colossians3:18 Ix ixokib ri ix c'ulanic, chixniman chque ri iwachajil. Are wa' ri rajawaxic quibano pa ri i cojonic che ri Ajawaxel." 
Colossians3:19 Ix achijab ri ix c'ulanic, chebilok'ok'ej ri iwixokil, macoji' c'anil xukuje' c'ayil pa iwanima' chquij ri iwixokilal." 
Colossians3:20 Alc'ualaxelab, chebinimaj ri i tat i nan pa ronojel. Are c'u wa' ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Colossians3:21 Tataxelab mebitzur ri e iwalc'ual rech man caqueblaj ta qui c'u'x. 
Colossians3:22 Ix lok'om tak pataninelab, chebinimaj ri iwajaw waral cho ri uwächulew pa ronojel. Chebipatanij, man xuwi ta c'ut aretak quixquilo rech quixkaj chquiwäch, xane' ruc' ronojel iwanima', chixe'j iwib chuwäch ri Dios." 
Colossians3:23 Apachique ri quibano, chibana' ruc' ronojel iwanima', je ta ne are quipatanij ri Ajawaxel, man are ta ri winak." 
Colossians3:24 Iweta'm c'ut chi ri Ajawaxel cuya' na ri echbal che tojbal iwe, rumal rech chi are' quipatanij ri Crist ri Ajawaxel." 
Colossians3:25 Apachin c'u ri cuban ri etzelal cuc'am na ri tojbal re ri etzelal ri cubano. Ri Dios man jalan ta cäril wi jun winak chuwäch jun chic. 
Colossians4:1 Ix ri ix ajawib, chibana' ri suc' xukuje' ri tz'akat cuc' ri iwajchaquib. Iweta'm c'ut chi xukuje' ri ix c'o jun iwajaw pa ri caj." 
Colossians4:2 Amak'el chibana' ch'awem ruc' Dios. Chixc'asc'at che u banic, chixmaltioxin che ri Dios." 
Colossians4:3 Xukuje' chibana' ch'awem pakawi' uj, rech ri Dios cujak jun ka be che u tzijoxic ri tzij, rech cuya' cäkatzijoj ri Crist, ri man etamatal ta can nabe. Rumal c'u rech ri are' in c'o pa che'." 
Colossians4:4 Chita' che ri Dios chi quink'alajisaj ri tzij ri' jas ri kas rajawaxic quinbano. 
Colossians4:5 Chc'ol utzalaj i no'j che u banic ri quiban chquixo'l ri man e cojonelab taj, utz u cojic ri k'ijol chibana'." 
Colossians4:6 Utz chixtzijon cuc' conojel ri winak, kas china' na ri quixch'awic, rajawaxic quiwetamaj jas quiban che u tzelexic u wäch qui tzij ri winak chquijujunal." 
Colossians4:7 Ri lok'alaj kachalal Tiquico cubij na chiwe ronojel jas ri nu banom, ri are' jun jicalaj pataninel, xukuje' are' wäch ajchac pa ri Ajawaxel." 
Colossians4:8 Nu takom bic iwuc' rech quiwetamaj jas ri ka banom, xukuje' rech cucu'bisaj i c'u'x." 
Colossians4:9 Ri Tiquico achilatal bic rumal ri Onesimo ri lok' xukuje' jicalaj kachalal, ri cojonel che ri Crist chixo'l che u bixic ri cätajin cac'ulmataj waral." 
Colossians4:10 Ri Aristarc ri wachil pa che' cuya' rutzil i wäch, xukuje' ri Marcux, ri rachalaxic ri Bernabe. Yo'm chic u tzijol ri Marcux chiwe. We copan iwuc', utz u c'ulaxic chibana'." 
Colossians4:11 Xukuje' ri Jesus ri cäbix Just che, cuya' rutzil i wäch. Chquixo'l ri aj judeyib, xak xuwi ri e are' e chacuninak wuc' che u tzijoxic ri rajawibal ri Dios. Ri e are' qui cu'bisam nu c'u'x." 
Colossians4:12 Ri i winakil Epapras cuya' rutzil i wäch, are rajchac ri Crist Jesus. Ri are' amak'el cutij u k'ij che ch'awem ruc' Dios piwi', rech co quixtaq'ui'c, ix tz'akat, xukuje' che ri kas i cojonic, kas quiwetamaj ronojel jachique ri u rayibal ri Dios." 
Colossians4:13 In wilom ri Epapras, chi sibalaj cächacun che u banic utzil chiwe, xukuje' ri e c'o pa Laodisey xukuje' ri e c'o pa Yerapols." 
Colossians4:14 Ri Lucax, ri lok'alaj ajcun, xukuje' ri Dems cuya' rutzil i wäch." 
Colossians4:15 Chiya' rutzil qui wäch ri kachalal ri e c'o pa Laodisey, xukuje' ri Nimp xukuje' conojel ri e re ri comon cojonelab ri cäquimulij quib cho rachoch." 
Colossians4:16 Aretak cäsiq'uitaj u wäch we wuj ri' chixo'l, chitaka' chi bic che ri comon cojonelab pa Laodisey rech cäsiq'uix u wäch chila'. Xukuje' ri ix quisiq'uij u wäch ri wuj ri c'o pa Laodisey, ri copan na iwuc'." 
Colossians4:17 Chibij che ri Arquip: “Chatz'akatisaj u banic ri u jachom ri Ajawaxel pa ak'ab.” 
Colossians4:18 In wa' in Pawl xintz'ibaj chiwe ruc' ri nu k'ab, quinya' rutzil i wäch. Chnataj ba' chiwe chi in c'o pa che'. Ri Dios cuban tok'ob chiwe." 
1Thessalonians1:1 In Pawl, wachil ri Silban xukuje' ri Timotey, quintz'ibaj we wuj ri' chque ri comon cojonelab aj tesaloniquib, ri e c'o pa u k'ab ri Dios Tataxel xukuje' xa' e jun ruc' ri Ajaw Jesucrist. Ri Dios ka Tat xukuje' ri Ajaw Jesucrist cuban tok'ob chiwe xukuje' cuya' jamaril chixo'l." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Amak'el cujmaltioxin che ri Dios rumal iwech iwonojel. Quixkanataj pa tak ri ka ch'awem ruc' Dios. 
1Thessalonians1:3 Chuwäch ri Dios ka Tat, cänataj chke chi ix chacuninak ruc' cojonic, i banom c'axalaj chac ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'u'x. Cänataj chke chi man quiya' ta can ri cu'lbal i c'u'x chrij ri Kajaw Jesucrist, pune' quirik c'ax." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Kachalal ix lok'ok'em rumal ri Dios, keta'm chi xixcha'taj rumal." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Rumal rech chi ri tzij re colobal ib ri cäkatzijoj man xopan ta iwuc' xuwi ta ruc' tzij, xane' xukuje' ruc' chuk'ab rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios. Keta'm chi kastzij jas ri xkabij chiwe. Ri ix c'ut iweta'm jas ri ka banom rumal iwech aretak xujc'oji' chixo'l." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Ri ix c'ut xiban iwe jas ri xkaban uj xukuje' jas ri xuban ri Ajawaxel. Xic'am ri tzij ruc' c'axc'olil xukuje' ruc' quicotemal ri yo'm chiwe rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios. 
1Thessalonians1:7 Jewa' ix i c'utum chquiwäch conojel ri cojonelab pa Masedon xukuje' pa Acay jas rajawaxic cäquiban ri e are'. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Iwumal c'ut xel u tzijol ri u tzij ri Ajawaxel man xuwi ta pa Masedon xukuje' pa Acay, xane' xukuje' pa ronojel c'olbal elinak wi bic u tzijoxic ri i cojonic che ri Dios. Je c'u ri' man rajawaxic ta chic c'o jas cäkatzijoj ri uj." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Kas e are' c'ut quetzijon ri solinic ri xkaban chiwe, ri utzalaj ka c'ulaxic xibano xukuje' ri e qui ya'ic tak can ri e diosib che u ternexic ri kas c'aslic Dios xukuje' ri u chaplexic u patanixic." 
1Thessalonians1:10 Rech quiweyej ri u C'ojol, ri cäpe na chicaj, ri xc'astajisax rumal chquixo'l ri cäminakib. Are' ri Jesus, ri xujresaj chuwäch ri royowal ri Dios ri cäpe na paquiwi' ri winak." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Ri ix c'ut, wachalal, iweta'm chi man xak ta lok' xujopan iwuc'." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Pune' ka rikom chi c'ax nabe, pune' uj yok'om chic pa Pilips, jas ri iweta'm chic, ri ka Dios xujuto' che u tzijoxic ri u tzij re colobal ib chiwe, man xkaxe'j ta kib. Je xkabano pune' xkarik c'ax rumal ri u tzijoxic." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Aretak xixkapixbej, man xkabij ta jastak chiwe ri man e tzij taj. Man xkabij ta tz'ilalaj tak jastak, man xixkasub taj." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Ri Dios utz cujril wi rech cujutak bic che u tzijoxic ri u tzij re colobal ib, je cujtzijon wa'. Man cäkabij taj ri cäkaj chquiwäch ri winak, xane' ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Dios, ri reta'm ri kanima'." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Mawi jumul xkabij tzij chiwe xak rech utz quito, jas ri iweta'm. Mawi c'o jas xkabij chiwe xak rech cäkach'äc puak chiwij. Ri Dios xujrilo xukuje' reta'm." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Man xkatzucuj taj chi cänimarisax ka k'ij cumal ri winak, mawi iwumal ix, mawi cumal ri niq'uiaj chic," 
1Thessalonians2:7 pune' takal chke chi c'o ka takanic piwi' rumal rech chi uj takom re ri Crist. Xane' uj utz iwuc', jas jun chuchu' quebulok'ok'ej ri ral, quebuchajij." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Ri uj c'ut quixkalok'ok'ej. Xkaj chkawäch ri u ya'ic chiwe man xuwi ta ri tzij re colobal ib ri u yo'm Dios, xane' xukuje' ri kanima'. Rumal rech chi sibalaj ix lok' chkawäch." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Kachalal, cänataj chiwe ri c'axalaj ka chac. Xujcos ruc' ri ka chac. Xujchacun chi chak'ab chi pa k'ij, rech man cäkaya' ta jun eka'n chrij jachin jun chiwe, xkatzijoj ri utzalaj tak u tzij ri Dios chiwe." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Ix xiwilo, xukuje' ri Dios xrilo, chi uj tastalic tak winak chixo'l ix cojonelab. Xkaban ri suc', man c'o ta etzelal xriktaj chkij." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Jas ri iweta'm chic, xixkapixbej chijujunal xukuje' xkacu'bisaj i c'u'x, jas cuban jun tata' chque ri ralc'ual." 
1Thessalonians2:12 Xixkabochi'j chi quixbinic jas ri takal che jun ri terenel ri Dios. Are' ri Dios xixsiq'uinic rech ix jun pa ri rajawibal xukuje' pa ri u juluwem. 
1Thessalonians2:13 Rumal ri' xukuje' ri uj man cäkatanaba' ta ri ka maltioxinic che ri Dios, rumal chi aretak xic'am ri u tzij ri Dios ri xkatzijoj chiwe, man xic'am taj jas ri u tzij winak. Xane' xic'amo jas ri kastzij, are ri u tzij ri Dios, ri xukuje' cächacun pa ri i c'aslemal ri quixcojonic." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Ri ix c'ut, kachalal, xiban iwe jas ri xquiban ri e u comon cojonelab ri Dios ri e c'o pa Judey, ri e re ri Crist Jesus. Xukuje' ri ix xa' junam xirik c'ax cumal ri e i winakil, jas ri e are' xquirik c'ax cumal ri aj judeyib." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Ri ix c'ut, kachalal, xiban iwe jas ri xquiban ri e u comon cojonelab ri Dios ri e c'o pa Judey, ri e re ri Crist Jesus. Xukuje' ri ix xa' junam xirik c'ax cumal ri e i winakil, jas ri e are' xquirik c'ax cumal ri aj judeyib." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Are ri aj judeyib ri xecämisan ri Ajaw Jesus, ri xecämisan ri k'axal tak u tzij ri Dios. Are c'u ri uj xukuje' xujquesaj ulok. Man cäquiban ta ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Dios, cäquiban qui c'ulel chque conojel ri winak." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Cujquik'atij che qui tzijobexic ri man aj judeyib taj rech quecolotajic. Je cäquiban ri aj judeyib rech cäquitz'akatisaj ri qui mac. Chuq'uisbalil c'ut xpe ri royowal ri Dios paquiwi'. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Kachalal, c'o chi quieb oxib k'ij xujel ulok pa ri i tinimit. Pune' c'u man kilom ta i wäch, ix c'o pa kanima', sibalaj cäkaj cäkil i wäch." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Rumal ri' xkatzucuj jas xkabano rech cujopan iwuc' che i solixic. In wa', ri Pawl, q'ui mul xintzucuj jas quinbano rech cujopan iwuc'. Are c'u ri Satanas xujuk'atij." 
1Thessalonians2:19 ¿Jas chrij cu'l wi ka c'u'x? ¿Jas ri ka quicotemal? ¿Jas ri tojbal ke rumal ri chac ri ka banom? Ix ri' aretak cäpe ri Kajaw Jesus. 
1Thessalonians2:20 Ix c'ut ri ka juluwem xukuje' ri ka quicotemal. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Man c'u xintakej ta chi na coch'onic, xinya' nu tzij chi quincanaj na can nu tuquiel, pa Atens;" 
1Thessalonians3:2 xintak c'u bic ri Timotey ri kachalal. Are pataninel re ri Dios, are kach ajchac pa ri utzalaj tak tzij re ri Crist. Xkatak bic iwuc' che i pixbexic xukuje' che u ya'ic i chuk'ab pa ri i cojonic," 
1Thessalonians3:3 rech c'o jun muban quieb u c'u'x rumal we c'axc'olil ri'. Ix c'ut iweta'm chi che wa' uj yo'm wi. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Aretak c'ä uj c'o iwuc', ka bim ulok chiwe chi cäkarik na c'axc'olil; jas ri xc'ulmaxic, jas ri iweta'm." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Rumal ri', xukuje' ri in man xink'i' ta chic ma ta quinwil i wäch. Xintakan c'ut rech quetamax ri i cojonic, we ne xixtakchi'x che mac rumal ri takchinel, man c'o ta c'u u patan ri' ri c'axalaj ka chac." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Camic c'ut ri Timotey tzelejinak chi ulok iwuc', ulinak kuc'. Xutzijoj ri i cojonic xukuje' ri lok'ok'ebal i c'u'x. Xubij chke chi ri uj cujnataj chiwe ruc' utzil, xukuje' chi sibalaj quiwaj quiwil ka wäch, jas ri uj xukuje' cäkaj cäkil i wäch." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Rumal ri', kachalal, pune' cäkarik c'ax, pune' uj c'o pa c'axc'olil, xcu'bi ka c'u'x rumal ri i cojonic." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Aretak xketamaj chi co ix c'o pa ri i cojonic che ri Ajawaxel, xpe na chuk'ab pa ri ka c'aslemal." 
1Thessalonians3:9 ¿Jas lo cäkabano rech cäkamaltioxij che ri Dios ri nimalaj quicotemal ri c'o pa kanima' chuwäch ri Dios rumal iwech? 
1Thessalonians3:10 Sibalaj cäkata' c'u che ri Dios, chi chak'ab chi pa k'ij, chi cäkil i wäch, rech cäkaya' ri rajawaxic chiwe che u tz'akatisaxic ri i cojonic." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Are' ri Dios ka Tat xukuje' ri Kajaw Jesus cuc'am ka be, rech cujopan na iwuc'." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Ri Ajawaxel chunimarisaj ri lok'ok'ebal i c'u'x, rech sibalaj quilok'ok'ela' na iwib, rech sibalaj quebilok'ok'ej na conojel ri winak, jas ri uj quixkalok'ok'ej." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Jeri' sibalaj c'o u chuk'ab ri iwanima', man c'o ta etzelal cäriktaj chiwij, ix tastalic tak winak chuwäch ri Dios ka Tat, aretak cäpe ri Kajaw Jesus e rachilam conojel ri tastalic tak winak ri e rech." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Xuwi chi c'u wa' quinbij, kachalal: Quixkabochi'j, quixkapixbej chi jas ri xkabij chiwe chi quiban na pa ri i c'aslemal, chi quiban na ri jastak ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Dios, je chibana'. Je cätajin quiban camic. Sibalaj chibana' ba' amak'el." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Iweta'm c'ut jachique tak takanic xkaya' chiwe rumal ri Ajaw Jesus. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Are wa' cäraj ri Dios, chi quixux tastalic tak winak, chi man quiban ta macunic cuc' ixokib achijab." 
1Thessalonians4:4 Chi chijujunal chc'ol u tij puwi' ri kas u cuerp pa tastaliquil xukuje' pa nim ilic," 
1Thessalonians4:5 mabe i c'u'x che qui banic e itzel tak rayinic, jacha' ri caquiban ri winak ri man queta'm ta u wäch ri Dios." 
1Thessalonians4:6 C'o jun muban c'ax mawi musub ri rachalal pa we jasach ri'. Are' c'u ri Ajawaxel cätojow u q'uexel ronojel wa' che, jas ri ka bim chi ulok, jas ri xkak'alajisaj chiwäch." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Ri Dios c'ut man uj u siq'uim taj rech cäkaban tz'ilalaj tak jastak, xane' rech cujux tastalic tak winak." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Je c'u ri' xa apachin ri man nim ta cäril wi we tzij ri', man are' ta ri winak ri man nim ta cärilo, xane' are' man nim ta cäril wi ri Dios ri yowinak ri Ruxlabal chke." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Man rajawaxic taj chi quintz'ibaj chiwe jas quiban ix kachalal che ri u lok'ok'exic iwib. Ix tijom c'u rumal ri Dios jas quibano quilok'ok'ela' iwib. 
1Thessalonians4:10 Je c'u quiban cuc' conojel ri achalaxelab ri e c'o pa ronojel Masedon. Quixkabochi'j c'ut, kachalal, chi quitakej na telechinic;" 
1Thessalonians4:11 c'o jas mixel wi ch'u'j are chixoc il chque ri jastak iwech, chixchacun cuc' tak ri e i k'ab jas ri ka chilibem chiwe." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Jeri' utz quixbin chquiwäch ri niq'uiaj winak chic, utz quixil cumal. Jeri' man c'o ta jas rajawaxic chiwe." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Wachalal, quinwaj quiwetamaj jas cäquic'ulmaj na ri cäminakib, rech man quixbison taj, jas ri quebison ri jule' chic ri man c'o ta cu'lbal qui c'u'x." 
1Thessalonians4:14 We cäkacojo chi ri Jesus xcämic xukuje' xc'astajic, jeri' ri Dios xukuje' quebuc'am na bic ri cäminakib ruc', ri xecojon che ri Jesus." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Are c'u wa' cäkabij chiwe pa ri u tzij ri Ajawaxel: chi ri uj ri uj c'asc'oj, ri cujcanaj na can c'ä pa ri u petic ri Ajawaxel, man cujnabej ta na chquiwäch ri e cäminakib." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Are ri Ajawaxel cäkaj na ulok chicaj, ruc' takanic, ruc' ri u ch'abal jun qui nimal ri tako'n aj caj, ruc' ri rok'ibal ri u trompet ri Dios. Are c'u nabe quec'astaj na ri cäminakib ri xecojon che ri Crist." 
1Thessalonians4:17 C'äte ri' ri uj, ri uj c'asc'oj ri uj canajinak canok, cujc'am na bic junam cuc' ri cäminakib pa tak ri sutz' che u rikic ri Ajawaxel pa ri quiakik'. Jeri' cujc'oji' na ruc' ri Ajawaxel chbe k'ij sak." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Je c'u ri', chicu'bisala' i c'u'x ruc' we tzij ri'." 
1Thessalonians5:1 Man rajawaxic ta c'ut, wachalal, chi c'o jas quintz'ibaj bic chiwe che jachique k'ij cäbantaj ronojel wa'." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Ix c'ut kas iweta'm chi ri u k'ij ri Ajawaxel, je u petic jas ri eläk'om chak'ab." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Aretak cäquibij ri winak: “Utz uj c'olic, man c'o ta cäkac'ulmaj”, c'äte ri' cäpe na ri sachbal wächaj paquiwi' jas ri u k'oxowem ri ixok ri yawab winak. Man cato'taj ta c'ut." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Are c'u ri ix wachalal, man ix c'o ta chupam ri k'ekumalil, rech quixukajbej we k'ij ri' jacha' jun eläk'om." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Iwonojel ix ralc'ual ri sakil, jas ri jun cäbin pa k'ij. Man uj ta re ri chak'ab, man uj ta re ri k'eku'm." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Mujwar ba' jas ri e jule' chic, xane' chujc'asc'atok, chkachomaj jas cäkabano." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Are c'u ri quewaric, chak'ab quewaric. Ri quek'abaric, chak'ab quek'abaric." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Ri uj c'ut ri uj re ri sakil, chkachomaj jas cäkabano. Chkacojo' ri ka cojonic xukuje' ri lok'ok'ebal ka c'u'x jas ri ajch'o'j cucoj atz'iak re ch'ich' pa ri ch'o'j, che u to'ic ri uwo u c'u'x. Chkacu'bisaj ka c'u'x chi cujcolotaj na, chkacojo' ba' jas ri ajch'o'j cucoj to'bal u jolom." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Man u chomam ta ri Dios chke chi cäpe ri royowal chkij, xane' chi cujcolotaj rumal ri Kajaw Jesucrist." 
1Thessalonians5:10 Ri are' xcäm rumal kech, rech we cujc'asc'atic, we cujwaric, cujc'asi' junam ruc'." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Rumal ri', chicu'bisala' i c'u'x, chiyala' i chuk'ab, jas ri cätajin quibano." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Wachalal, quixkabochi'j chi nimak chebiwila' wi ri quechacun tak chixo'l, ri quec'amow i be xukuje' queyo'w i no'j pa ri Ajawaxel." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Sibalaj chebilok'ok'ej, rumal rech ri qui chac. Chc'ol ta jamaril chixo'l." 
1Thessalonians5:14 Quixkabochi'j, kachalal, chi chiya' qui no'j ri man cäcaj taj quechacunic. Chicu'bisaj qui c'u'x ri cuban quieb qui c'u'x. Chebito' ri man c'o ta qui chuk'ab. Mäq'uistaj i c'u'x che qui to'ic conojel." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Chiwila' iwib chi ma ta c'o jun cutoj che jun chic etzelal che u q'uexel etzelal. Xane', are chichuk'ubej ri u banic ri utzil amak'el, jacha' ri quiban chixo'l ix je chibana' cuc' conojel." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Chixquicot amak'el. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Mitanaba' ri i ch'awem ruc' Dios. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Ronojel chimaltioxij che ri Dios. Are c'u wa' ri cäraj ri Dios chiwe ri ix cojoninak che ri Crist Jesus. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Michup ri u k'ak' ri Uxlabaxel. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Miwetzelaj u wäch ri qui tzij ri cäquik'axej tzij chque ri winak ri yo'm chque rumal ri Dios. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Chitijtobej ronojel; chic'olo' ri utz. 
1Thessalonians5:22 Chitasa' iwib che apachique jasach ri man utz taj. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Are ri Dios ri cäyo'w jamaril chixo'l, cuban tastalic tak winak chiwe pa ronojel, cuchajij ri iwuxlabal, ri i c'aslibal, xukuje' ri i cuerp rech mata c'u jun quetzelal che ri u petibal ri Kajaw Jesucrist." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Ri Dios ri xixusiq'uij are jic, cubano jas ri cubij." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Kachalal, chibana' ch'awem ruc' Dios pakawi'." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Chiya' rutzil qui wäch conojel che u c'utic ri lok'ok'ebal c'u'x. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Quixinbochi'j chuwäch ri Ajawaxel chi quisiq'uij u wäch we wuj ri' chquiwäch conojel ri kachalal. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Are ta ri Kajaw Jesucrist cuban tok'ob chiwe. 
2Thessalonians1:1 In Pawl, wachil ri Silban xukuje' ri Timotey, quintz'ibaj we wuj ri' chque ri comon cojonelab aj tesaloniquib, ri xa' ix jun ruc' ri Dios ri ka Tat xukuje' ri Kajaw Jesucrist." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Ri Dios ka Tat xukuje' ri Ajaw Jesucrist cuban tok'ob chiwe xukuje' cuya' jamaril chixo'l. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Kachalal, rajawaxic chi amak'el cujmaltioxin che ri Dios rumal iwech. Rumal rech chi cätajin cäq'uiy ri i cojonic xukuje' cätajin cänimar ri lok'ok'ebal i c'u'x chbil tak iwib." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Jeri' chi cäkabij chque ri e u comon cojonelab ri Dios chi sibalaj cujquicotic rumal rech ri i banom. Rumal rech chi quich'ij ri c'ax ri cäban chiwe, xukuje' co ix tac'al pa ri i cojonic aretak quirik ri c'axc'olil." 
2Thessalonians1:5 C'utbal wa' chi ri Dios suc' cubano cuk'at tzij paquiwi' ri winak. Cäril ri Dios chi ya'tal ri rajawibal chiwe. Rumal wa' quirik c'ax. 
2Thessalonians1:6 Suc' chuwäch ri Dios chi cuya' c'axc'olil paquiwi' ri winak ri cäquiban c'ax chiwe. 
2Thessalonians1:7 Are' c'u ri chiwe ix ri i rikom c'axc'olil, cuya' na uxlanem chiwe junam kuc', aretak ri Ajaw Jesus cäpe ulok chicaj, cuc'ut rib chkawäch e rachilam ri u tako'nib aj caj ri c'o qui chuk'ab. Cäpe na pa u xak k'ak'," 
2Thessalonians1:8 cutoj na u q'uexel chque ri man queta'm ta u wäch ri Dios, ri man queniman ta che ri u tzij ri Kajaw Jesus re colobal ib." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Ri e are' cäquirik na ri u tojbalil ri qui mac. Cäsach na qui wäch chbe k'ij sak, quetastaj na chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, naj queya' wi na che ri u juluwem xukuje' ri u chuk'ab." 
2Thessalonians1:10 Jewa' cäquic'ulmaj na aretak cäpe ri Jesus rech cänimarisax u k'ij cumal ri e tastalicalaj tak winak ri e rech, rech cäya' u k'ij cumal conojel ri xecojonic, rumal rech chi xquicojo jas ri xkak'alajisaj chquiwäch pa ri k'ij ri'." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Rumal ri' amak'el cäkaban ch'awem ruc' Dios piwi', rech takal chiwe jas ri xixsiq'uix wi rumal ri ka Dios, rech quiban ronojel ri utz ri cäraj ri Dios chiwe, xukuje' quiban ruc' chuk'ab ronojel chac re ri i cojonic." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Jeri' quinimarisaj ri u bi' ri Kajaw Jesucrist, xukuje' cänimarisax i k'ij rumal ri are', jas ri u beya'l ri u tok'ob ri ka Dios xukuje' ri Ajaw Jesucrist." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Chrij c'u ri cäbantaj na aretak cäpe ri Kajaw Jesucrist xukuje' aretak cäkamulij kib ruc', quixkabochi'j, kachalal," 
2Thessalonians2:2 chi muban quieb i c'u'x pa ri i chomanic. Mixsach rumal jun uxlabal, o rumal tzij, o rumal wuj je ta ne chi kech uj. Misach i c'u'x we quito chi petinak chic ri u k'ij ri Ajawaxel." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Mixsub rumal jachin jun. C'ä majok c'ut we k'ij ri' cäpe na ri u c'ulelaxic ri Dios, aretak cuc'utunisaj rib ri itzel winak, ri c'okotajinak che ri sachbal wächaj." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Ri are' cuc'ulelaj xukuje' cuwalijisaj rib chrij ronojel ri re ri Dios xukuje' chrij ronojel ri cäk'ijilaxic. Je cubano rech cät'uyi' na pa ri rachoch Dios, je ta ne Dios, cuc'ut na rib chi are Dios." 
2Thessalonians2:5 ¿La ma ta cänataj chiwe chi aretak xinc'oji' iwuc', xinbij wa' chiwe?" 
2Thessalonians2:6 Camic c'ut iweta'm ri cäk'ilow ri u petic ri itzel winak, kas cäk'alajisax c'u na pa ri u k'ijol." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Cächacun chi c'u ri c'utalic re ri etzelal; xak xuwi c'ä maja quesax na ri k'atininak camic; 
2Thessalonians2:8 cuc'utunisaj c'u na rib ri itzel ri', ri cäsachisax na u wäch rumal ri Ajaw Jesus rumal ri ruxlab ri u chi', cuyojyobisaj c'u na rumal ri u ruc'upinic ri rulem." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Ri achi re etzelal ri', rumal ri u chac ri Satanas cäpe na. Cäpe ruc' nimalaj chuk'ab, cuban tak etal xukuje' mayibal ri man e kastzij taj." 
2Thessalonians2:10 Cuban ronojel u wäch etzelal che qui subic ri winak ri cäsach qui wäch, rumal rech chi man xquilok'ok'ej ta ri kastzij rech quecolotajic." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Rumal ri' ri Dios cuya' chque chi quesubutaj rumal ri man kastzij taj, rech quecojon che ri banoj tzij," 
2Thessalonians2:12 rech cäc'äjisax qui wäch conojel ri man cäquicoj ta ri kastzij, ri xkaj chquiwäch ri u banic ri etzelal." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Kachalal ix lok'ok'em rumal ri Ajawaxel, rajawaxic chi amak'el cujmaltioxin che ri Dios rumal iwech. Rumal rech chi pa ri u tiquiritajic, ri Dios xixucha' rech quixcolotajic rumal ri Uxlabaxel ri cuban tastalic tak winak chiwe, rumal ri i cojonic che ri kastzij." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Ri Dios xixusiq'uij rumal ri tzij re colobal ib ri cäkatzijoj, rech quirik ri u juluwem ri Kajaw Jesucrist." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Je c'u ri', kachalal, co chixtac'alok, mitzokopij ri tijonic ri xya' chiwe rumal ri ka tzij xukuje' rumal ri ka wuj." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Ri Kajaw Jesucrist xukuje' ri Dios ka Tat xujulok'ok'ej, xuya' cu'bisabal ka c'u'x ri man cäq'uis taj, xuya' utzalaj cu'lbal ka c'u'x rumal ri u tok'ob." 
2Thessalonians2:17 Are' ri are' cucu'bisaj i c'u'x, xukuje' cuya' i chuk'ab che u bixic ronojel utzalaj tak tzij xukuje' che u banic ronojel utzalaj tak chac." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Xuwi chi c'u wa' quinbij, kachalal: Chibana' ch'awem ruc' Dios pakawi', rech ri u tzij ri Ajawaxel cäjabun aninak pa ronojel c'olbal, chyok' u k'ij jas ri xc'ulmataj chixo'l." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Chibana' ch'awem rech cujto'taj chquiwäch ri itzel tak winak ri e lawalo. Man conojel ta c'ut cäquechbej ri cojonic. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Ri Ajawaxel are jic. Ri are' cuya' na i chuk'ab, quixuchajij na chuwäch ri itzel." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Cu'l ka c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel chi ri ix quibano xukuje' quiban na jas ri xixkatak wi. 
2Thessalonians3:5 Chixuto' ba' ri Ajawaxel che ri lok'ok'enic jacha' ri calok'ok'en ri Dios chc'ol i chuk'ab pa ri Crist aretak cäpe ri rikoj c'ax. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Kachalal, quintakan chiwe pa ri u bi' ri Kajaw Jesucrist, chi quitas iwib chrij apachin jun kachalal ri cubano xa jachique ri craj, man cächacun taj," 
2Thessalonians3:7 ri ix iweta'm chi rajawaxic quiban iwe jas ri cäkaban uj. Ri uj c'ut, aretak xujc'oji' chixo'l, xkach'obo jas ri cäkabano, xujchacunic." 
2Thessalonians3:8 Man xkatij ta ri u wa jun ri xak ta xusipaj chke. Xane' xujchacun ruc' c'axalaj chac c'ä aretak xujcosic. Xujchacun chi chak'ab chi pa k'ij, rech man xkaya' ta eka'n chrij jun chiwe." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Man xkaban ta wa' rumal rech chi ma ta c'o takanic pa ka k'ab. Xane' jewa' xkabano che u c'utic chiwäch jas rajawaxic quiban ix. 
2Thessalonians3:10 Aretak xujc'oji' iwuc', je xujtakan wa' chiwe, chi we c'o jun man cäraj taj cächacunic, mawa'ba'." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Ka tom c'ut chi jujun chixo'l man c'o ta u beya'l ri qui c'aslemal, man quechacun taj, xane' cäquinim quib pa ri jastak que ri niq'uiaj chic." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Cujtakan chque ri winak ri je cäquibano, xukuje' quekapixbej pa ri u bi' ri Ajaw Jesucrist chi chechacun ruc' quicotemal, xa' jun chec'ol wi, chquitija' ri kas qui wa." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Ri ix c'ut, kachalal, mäq'uistaj i c'u'x che u banic ri utzil." 
2Thessalonians3:14 We c'o jun man cunimaj ta ri ka tzij pa we wuj ri', chicojo' retal wa', miwachilaj, rech cäq'uixic." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Miban c'u i c'ulel che, xane' chipixbej je jas ri quiban che jun iwachalal." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Are ba' ri Ajawaxel re jamaril chuya' jamaril chixo'l amak'el pa ronojel. Chc'ol ri Ajawaxel iwuc' chi nimalaj iwonojel. 
2Thessalonians3:17 In Pawl quinya' rutzil i wäch ruc' ri nu k'ab. Are wetal wa' pa ronojel wuj ri quintz'ibaj chiwe. Je quintz'ibam wa'. 
2Thessalonians3:18 Are ri Kajaw Jesucrist cuban tok'ob chiwe chi nimalaj iwonojel. 
1Timothy1:1 Ri in Pawl, in u takom ri Jesucrist, jas ri xtakan wi ri Dios ri ka Colonel xukuje' ri Kajaw Jesucrist. Chrij c'u ri are cu'l wi ka c'u'x." 
1Timothy1:2 Quintz'ibaj we wuj ri' chawe, Timotey, kas at nu c'ojol pa ri cojonic. Ri Dios Tataxel xukuje' ri Crist Jesus ri Kajaw cuban tok'ob chawe, quel u c'u'x chawe, xukuje' cuya' jamaril chawe." 
1Timothy1:3 Xatinbochi'j chi catcanaj can pa Epes aretak xinbe pa Masedon, rech cattakan chque jujun chi mäquiya' jule' tak tijonic chic, chi mäquiya' qui k'ij ri jo'sanic" 
1Timothy1:4 o qui cholajil ri qui bi' ri e qui mam ri winak ri man c'o ta qui q'uisic. We jastak ri' xak quequiyac tak chomanic ri man c'o ta u patan, man quequito' ta che u banic ri chac ri u yo'm ri Dios chque rumal ri cojonic." 
1Timothy1:5 Ri q'uisbal c'u u tza'm ri takomal are ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj ri q'uiyinak pa jun josok'alaj c'uxaj, pa jun utzalaj etamabal c'uxaj, xukuje' pa jun cojonic ri man xak ta quieb u wäch." 
1Timothy1:6 Jujun c'ut xquijal qui be chrij wa', xquiya' canok, xquiya' qui k'ij tak ri tzij ri man c'o ta qui patan." 
1Timothy1:7 Are ta cäcaj quebux ajtijab che ri pixab, man cäquich'ob ta c'u ri cäquibij. Pune' co cäquibij chi kastzij, man cäquich'ob taj." 
1Timothy1:8 Keta'm chi ri pixab utz, we colom u cojic." 
1Timothy1:9 Keta'm c'u wa', chi man yo'm ta ri pixab chque ri suc' tak winak, xane' chque ri itzel tak winak, ri man cäquiya' ta quib pa takic, ri man e k'ijilal ta Dios, ri e ajmaquib, ri winak ri man e tastalic taj, ri man cäquiya' ta u k'ij ri Dios, ri e cämisal tak qui tat qui nan, ri e cämisal achijab," 
1Timothy1:10 ri cäquiban macunic cuc' ixokib achijab, ri achijab ri cäquiban ixok che jun cach' achi, ri eläk'al tak winak, ri e banal tak tzij, ri man cäquiban ta ri qui bim ruc' kastzij, xukuje' chque conojel ri cäquiban apachique jasach chic ri man je taj cubij ri utzalaj tijonic ri man c'o ta etzelal che," 
1Timothy1:11 jas ri cubij ri tzij re colobal ib ri nim u k'ij, ri u tzij ri Dios ri cänimarisax u k'ij. Are utzalaj tak tzij wa' ri in takom che u tzijoxic." 
1Timothy1:12 Quinmaltioxin che ri Crist Jesus ri Kajaw, ri xyo'w nu chuk'ab, rumal rech chi jic xinrilo, xinucoj c'u che pataninel re." 
1Timothy1:13 Nabe in xinwetz'bej u wäch ri Dios, xinyok'o, xukuje' xinban c'ax chque ri e rech. Ri Dios c'ut xel u c'u'x chwe, rumal rech chi majok quincojonic, rumal ri' man xinch'ob taj jas ri xinbano." 
1Timothy1:14 Sibalaj xtz'ebex c'ut ri u tok'ob ri Kajaw, xukuje' ri cojonic xukuje' ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj ri e c'o pa Crist Jesus." 
1Timothy1:15 C'o jun tzij ri cuya' cäcu'bi ka c'u'x chrij, takal c'u che ri tzij chi cäcoj cumal conojel: chi ri Crist Jesus xpe cho ri uwächulew che qui colic ajmaquib, in c'u ri' nim na ri nu mac chquiwäch conojel." 
1Timothy1:16 Rumal c'u ri', xel u c'u'x chwe, rech nabe cuc'utu chi xucuy ri nu mac. Jeri' xinil cumal niq'uiaj winak chic, rech cäquiban que jas ri xinban in, quecojon na che, rech cäc'oji' junalic qui c'aslemal." 
1Timothy1:17 Ri Dios are ri Ajawinel chbe k'ij sak, man cäsach ta u wäch, man quilitaj ta u wäch. Ri are xa' jun Dios, man c'o ta chi jun. Chnimarisax u k'ij, chyok juluwem che amak'el chbe k'ij sak. Je chbanok." 
1Timothy1:18 Nu c'ojol Timotey, quinjach we takanic ri' pa a k'ab, rech cacoj a chuk'ab che ri utzalaj ch'o'j, jas ri bim ulok chawij cumal ri xquik'axej ri u tzij ri Dios chke." 
1Timothy1:19 Chajiquiba' ri a cojonic, chabana' ronojel rech cana' pa awanima' chi man c'o ta etzelal a banom. E c'o jujun man xcaj taj xquiban wa', xetzak c'ut, xquiya' can ri qui cojonic." 
1Timothy1:20 Jujun chque wa' are ri Imeney xukuje' ri Alejandr. Xebenjach ri e are pa u k'ab ri Satanas, rech cäquetamaj chi mäquetz'bej u wäch ri Dios." 
1Timothy2:1 Nabe, catinpixbej chi quiban ch'awem ruc' Dios. Quiban bochi'nic, tz'ononic xukuje' maltioxinic paquiwi' conojel ri winak." 
1Timothy2:2 Chibana' ch'awem ruc' Dios paquiwi' ri ajawinelab paquiwi' conojel ri e k'atal tak tzij rech cujcuinic cujc'oji' pa utzil xukuje' pa jamaril nim kila' wi ri Dios ruc' jun c'aslemal ri kas utz quilic. 
1Timothy2:3 Are c'u utz wa' xukuje' cäkaj chuwäch ri ka Colonel Dios; 
1Timothy2:4 ri Dios cäraj chi quecolotaj ri winak chi nimalaj conojel, xukuje' chi cäquetamaj ri kastzij." 
1Timothy2:5 Xa' c'u jun Dios c'olic, xukuje' xa' jun ch'awenel paquiwi' ri winak chuwäch ri Dios, are jun achi, ri Crist Jesus." 
1Timothy2:6 Rumal rech chi xujach rib ri Jesucrist pa u k'ab ri cämical che u tojic ri rajil ri colobal ib chque conojel, jas ri u cholajil ri k'alajisanic ri xya' pa ri kas u k'ijol." 
1Timothy2:7 In cojom che tzijonel xukuje' takom. In cojom che qui tijoxic ri man aj judeyib taj che ri cojonic xukuje' che ri kastzij. Quinbij ri kastzij, man quinban ta tzij." 
1Timothy2:8 Quinwaj c'ut chi ri winak pa conojel c'olbal cäquiban ch'awem ruc' Dios chequiwalijisaj ri qui k'ab ruc' jun ch'ajch'ojalaj canima', man c'o ta oyowal mawi c'ulelam tak ib." 
1Timothy2:9 Xukuje' quinwaj chi ri ixokib utz catz'iakixic quib caquibano, ruc' jicomal, xukuje' cuc' atz'iak ri man nimak ta cajil. Chi ri ixokib macoc'owisaj u suc'umaxic ri qui wi', mequicoj wikbal ri pakal cajil jacha' ri k'an puak xukuje' ri tak perl, mawi chequicoj ta atz'iak ri sibalaj pakal cajil." 
1Timothy2:10 Xane' ruc' utzalaj tak chac, jas ri ya'tal chque ri ixokib ri cäquik'ijilaj ri Dios." 
1Timothy2:11 Rajawaxic chi ri ixokib cäquita' ri tijonic ruc' nimanic pa ronojel, mech'awic." 
1Timothy2:12 Ri in man quinya' ta che jun ixok chi quebutijoj achijab, mawi cätakan paquiwi', xane' rajawaxic xak jun quec'oji' wi." 
1Timothy2:13 Rumal rech chi are nabe xban ri Adan, c'äte ri' ri Eva." 
1Timothy2:14 Xukuje' ri Adan man are ta ri xsubutajic, xane' are ri ixok xsubutajic, xtzak pa mac." 
1Timothy2:15 Ri ixok cacolotaj c'u na cumal ri ralanic xukuje' we caken chupam ri cojonic, chupam ri lok'ok'enic, xukuje' chupam ri u tasic rib man cutakej ta chi c'u ri macunic, c'o c'u u tij puwi' chbil rib." 
1Timothy3:1 Kastzij wa' ri quinbij: We c'o jun ri cäraj cäcoj che solinel que ri comon cojonelab, utzalaj chac ri' cäraj." 
1Timothy3:2 Rajawaxic ba' chi ri solinel man c'o ta cätzujux wi, xa' jun ri rixokil, cuchomaj jas ri cubano, utz ri u chomanic, suc'umam, cuya' okxanibal chque ri winak, cäna'w che qui tijoxic ri winak," 
1Timothy3:3 man u nak'atisam ta rib che k'abaric mawi yacal ch'o'j, xane' banal utzil, aj jamaril xukuje' man benak ta ranima' che u lok'oxic puak." 
1Timothy3:4 Utz cubano cätakan paquiwi' ri e aj uwo rachoch, cänimax cumal ri e ralc'ual, nim quil wi cumal." 
1Timothy3:5 We c'u c'o jun man reta'm ta ruc'axic ri rachoch, ¿jas ta c'u lo cuban che rilixic ri u comon cojonelab ri Dios?" 
1Timothy3:6 Rajawaxic chi man c'ac' cojonel taj, rech munimarisaj rib, makaj ne ri c'okonic puwi' jas ri xkaj puwi' ri itzel." 
1Timothy3:7 Xukuje' rajawaxic chi utz quil wi cumal ri winak rech man c'o ta yok'bal re, rech man cächap ta rumal ri itzel." 
1Timothy3:8 Jeri' xukuje' ri pataninelab, rajawaxic chi nim quebil wi, xa' quieb metzijonic, man quek'abar taj, man cäquitzucuj ta q'uixbalalaj ch'äcoj." 
1Timothy3:9 Rajawaxic kas jicom ri canima' chrij ri kastzij ri uj cojoninak wi, ri k'alajisam chkawäch. Xukuje' rajawaxic cäquina' pa canima' chi man c'o ta etzelal qui banom." 
1Timothy3:10 Xukuje' ri quecoj che pataninelab nabe chiwetamaj we utz cäquibano o man utz taj. C'äte ri' chebicojo che pataninelab we man c'o tzij tom chquij. 
1Timothy3:11 Jeri' xukuje' ri ixokib, rajawaxic caquirik ri'jobalil, man cäquiban ta tzijtal, cäquichomaj jas cäquibano, e jic pa ronojel." 
1Timothy3:12 Rajawaxic chi ri pataninelab chquijujunal xa' jun ri quixokil, utzalaj cuc'axic ri calc'ual xukuje' chi utz cuban che quilixic conojel ri e c'o pa rachoch." 
1Timothy3:13 Ri pataninelab ri utz cäquiban che ri qui chac, nim quebil wi na pa ri comon cojonelab xukuje' cäquetamaj u tzijoxic ri qui cojonic che ri Crist Jesus, man cäquixe'j ta quib." 
1Timothy3:14 Cu'l nu c'u'x chi chanim quinbe awuc'. Quintz'ibaj c'u bic we jastak ri' chawe," 
1Timothy3:15 we ne quinbeytajic, rech cawetamaj jas caban pa ri rachoch ri Dios, are wa' ri e u comon cojonelab ri c'aslic Dios, ri rakan ja xukuje' ri to'bal re ri kastzij." 
1Timothy3:16 K'alaj chquiwäch conojel chi nim qui banic ri jastak re ri ka k'ijilanic che ri Dios: Ri Dios xc'utun chupam jun cuerp aj winak, xk'alajisaxic chi suc' rumal ri Uxlabaxel, xilitaj cumal ri tako'n aj caj, xtzijox chque tak ri tinimit, xecojon ri winak che ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew, c'ulam pa ri juluwem." 
1Timothy4:1 K'alaj cubij ri Uxlabaxel chi pa ri q'uisbal tak k'ij, e c'o jujun cäquitas na quib chrij ri cojonic, quequitatabej na ri uxlabal ri e subunelab, xukuje' ri qui tijonic ri itzel tak uxlabal." 
1Timothy4:2 Quequitatabej na achijab xa quieb qui wäch ri xak e banal tak tzij. We winak ri' man cäquina' ta chic pa canima' ri etzelal ri cäquibano, je ta ne chi abajirinak chi ri canima'." 
1Timothy4:3 Ri e are quetakan chque ri winak chi man quec'uli' taj xukuje' chi jujun tak u wäch wa man cäquitij taj. Je cäquibij wa' pune' ri Dios u banom ri wa rech ri cojonelab xukuje' ri queta'm ri kastzij cäquitij que ruc' maltioxinic. 
1Timothy4:4 Utz c'u ronojel ri u banom ri Dios. Man c'o ta jun jasach ri utz cätijic ri ma ta ya'tal chke, we cäkac'am ruc' maltioxinic che ri Dios," 
1Timothy4:5 rumal rech chi cätewichitaj c'u wa' rumal ri u tzij ri Dios xukuje' rumal ri ch'awem ruc' Dios. 
1Timothy4:6 We quebatijoj we jastak ri' chque tak ri kachalal queq'uiy c'ut cumal tak ri tzij re ri cojonic xukuje' cumal tak ri e utzalaj tak tijonic ri e a takem, at jun utzalaj pataninel rech ri' Jesucrist." 
1Timothy4:7 Mabe awanima' cuc' tak ri puquinic ri man c'o ta qui patan ri cäquitzijoj ri winak. Are chacojo' a chuk'ab chupatanixic ri Dios. 
1Timothy4:8 Ri u cojic ka chuk'ab ruc' ri ka cuerp xak jubik' cujuto' wi. Are c'u ri u patanixic ri Dios cujuto' na pa ronojel. C'o utzil cäkarik rumal wa' pa we c'aslemal ri' cho ri uwächulew, xukuje' pa ri c'aslemal ri cäpe na." 
1Timothy4:9 Jic ri tzij xukuje' takalic chi cac'amowax cumal conojel. 
1Timothy4:10 Rumal ri' cujchacunic xukuje' cujyok'ic, rumal rech chi cu'l ka c'u'x chrij ri c'aslic Dios, ri qui Colonel conojel ri winak, sibalaj are c'u na chque ri quecojonic." 
1Timothy4:11 Chattakanok xukuje' chac'utu' we jastak ri'. 
1Timothy4:12 Maya' chque ri winak chi cäquetzelaj a wäch xa' rumal rech chi at ac'al achi na. Xane' chatux jun c'utbal pa ronojel chquiwäch ri cojonelab, rech ri e are catquilo, cäquiban que jas ri caban at. Jeri' cäquita' ri utzalaj a tzij, cäquilo chi utz catbin pa ri a c'aslemal, chi quebalok'ok'ej niq'uiaj chic, chi c'o a cojonic, chi ch'ajch'oj ri a c'aslemal, cäquiban c'u que jas ri caban at." 
1Timothy4:13 Are chasiq'uij ri Tz'ibatalic chquiwäch ri winak, chebapixbej xukuje' chebatijoj ri winak c'ä quinbe na awuc'." 
1Timothy4:14 Chatoc il che ri xsipax chawe rumal ri Dios. Are yo'm chawe rumal ri u tzij ri Dios ri xk'axex chawe aretak ri tatayib ri quetakan chque ri cojonelab xquiya' qui k'ab pawi'. 
1Timothy4:15 Chebawilij we jastak ri', chajacha' awib che qui banic; rech cäc'ut taj ri a q'uiyic chquiwäch conojel." 
1Timothy4:16 Chawila' awib, xukuje' chawilij ri a tijonic, maya' canok. We caban c'u wa', cacol na awib, xukuje' quebacol ri catquitatabej." 
1Timothy5:1 Co mach'abej jun nim tata', xane' chapixbej je jas ri a tat. Chebapixbej ri alabom je jas ri e awachalal." 
1Timothy5:2 Chebapixbej ri nimak tak chuchuyib e jacha' ri a nan. Chebapixbej ri alitomab je jas ri e awana'b ruc' ch'ajch'ojil. 
1Timothy5:3 Chebato' ri malca'nib ri kastzij c'o qui rajawaxic. 
1Timothy5:4 We c'u c'o jun malca'n ri e c'o ral o u wi' tak u mam, rajawaxic chi nabe ri e are cäquetamaj nim cäquil wi ri malca'n aj uwo rachoch xukuje' chiquiya' rajil u q'uexel che ri qui nan qui tat qui mam. Are c'u wa' utz cäril wi ri Dios, are cäkaj chuwäch." 
1Timothy5:5 Are ri kas malca'n, ri canajinak u tuquiel, are ri' cu'l u c'u'x chrij ri Dios, cubochi'j ri Dios xukuje' cuban ch'awem ruc' Dios chi pa k'ij chi chak'ab." 
1Timothy5:6 Are c'u ri cutzucuj u quicotisaxic rib, cäminak wa' pune' c'aslic." 
1Timothy5:7 Chattakan chque ri cojonelab chi chquibana' we jastak ri', rech man c'o ta etzelal cäriktaj chquij." 
1Timothy5:8 Are c'ut ri man coc ta il chque ri e rech, kas c'u e are na ri e ralaxic, resam rib chupam ri cojonic, canimataj c'u na ri u mac chuwäch ri man cojonel taj." 
1Timothy5:9 Xuwi chitz'ibaj ri u bi' jun malca'n ri tz'akatinak chi oxc'al (60) u junab, ri uxinak xa' jun rachajil c'olinak," 
1Timothy5:10 ri quesax u tzijol chi utzalaj chac u banom, ri e u q'uiyisan ral, ri u yo'm okxanibal chque ri winak, ri u ch'ajom ri cakan ri cojonelab, ri e u to'm ri e c'o pa c'axc'olil, ri u banom ronojel u wäch utzalaj tak chac." 
1Timothy5:11 Mebato' c'u ri malca'nib ri c'ä e alitomab na. Aretak c'u ri kas e qui rayibal quebutas chrij ri Crist, cäcaj quec'uli'c." 
1Timothy5:12 Quemacun c'u ri', rumal rech chi man xca'n taj jas ri xquichi'j u banic, xquiya' c'u can ri qui cojonic." 
1Timothy5:13 Xukuje' cäquetamaj sak'orinic, xak quebin chi' tak ja. Man xuwi ta c'u e sak'orib, xane' xukuje' e yacal tak tzijtal, cäquinim quib pa ronojel, xukuje' cäquitzijoj jastak ri man takal ta u bixic." 
1Timothy5:14 Quinwaj ba' chi ri malca'nib ri c'ä e alitomab na chec'ulanok, chequiq'uiyisaj cal, chechacun pa ri cachoch. Jeri' man c'o ta rumal rech queyok' wi cumal ri qui c'ulel." 
1Timothy5:15 E c'o c'u jujun malca'nib ri xquitas quib, xquiterenej ri Satanas." 
1Timothy5:16 We c'o jun cojonel, ri e c'o malca'nib ixokib ruc', rajawaxic cuya' ri cajwataj chque, man cuya' ta wa' chquij ri niq'uiaj cojonelab chic, rech ri comon cojonelab quecuinic quequito' ri malca'nib ixokib ri kastzij c'o rajawaxic chque." 
1Timothy5:17 Ri tatayib ri quetakan pa ri comon cojonelab ri utz ruc'axic ri qui chac cäquibano, takal chque chi sibalaj nim quebiwil wi, puwi' ronojel ri cäquitzijoj ri u tzij ri Dios xukuje' ri quetijonic." 
1Timothy5:18 Are c'u ri Tz'ibatalic cubij: “Mach'uk ri u tza'm ri wacax ri cätajin cuban ri yak'oj.” Xukuje' cubij: “Takal che ri aj chac ri tojbal rech.” 
1Timothy5:19 Macojo we cäban tzij chrij jun chque ri tatayib ri quetakan chque ri cojonelab, we man xilitaj ri xubano cumal quieb oxib winak." 
1Timothy5:20 Ri man cäquiya' ta can ri mac, chak'alajisaj ri qui mac chquiwäch conojel, rech xukuje' ri niq'uiaj chic cäquixe'j quib." 
1Timothy5:21 Catinbochi'j chuwäch ri Dios, chuwäch ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist xukuje' chquiwäch ri tako'n aj caj ri e cha'talic, chi chatakej we jastak ri', maban c'u jalan tak wächaj maya' c'u u k'ij jachin jun." 
1Timothy5:22 Aretak caya' ri a k'ab puwi' jun ri coc che c'amal qui be ri cojonelab, maban wa' xak ruc' aninakil. Maban awe ri mac ri cuban jun chic. Chabana' ronojel rech ch'ajch'oj ri a c'aslemal." 
1Timothy5:23 Xak c'u ne amak'el cayitz' ri a pam, xuwi mawuq'uiaj xuwi ri joron, xane' chawuq'uiaj jubik' u wa'l uva." 
1Timothy5:24 E c'o jujun ri kas k'alaj chic ri qui mac c'ä mäjok quebe pa k'atbal tzij. E c'o jujun chic ri man k'alaj ta ri qui mac chanim, xane' c'äte cäk'alajin wa'." 
1Timothy5:25 Je c'u wa' ri u banic ri utzil. K'alaj wa' chanim chquiwäch conojel. Pune' ta ne man k'alaj chanim ri utzil ri cäkabano, kas copan na ri k'ij ri cäk'alajinic." 
1Timothy6:1 Conojel ri e c'o chuxe' takanic, takal chque chi nim quequil wi ri cajaw pa ronojel, rech man cayok' ta ri u bi' ri Dios mawi ri ka tijonic." 
1Timothy6:2 E are c'u ri e c'o cajaw cojonelab, mäquetzelaj qui wäch xa' rumal rech chi cachalal quib. Xane' utz na qui patanixic chquibana', rumal rech chi ri quepatanix rumal ri utzalaj qui chac, are lok'alaj tak cojonelab wa'. Chebatijoj che we jastak ri', chebapixbej che u banic wa':" 
1Timothy6:3 We c'o jun ri jun chi wi u tijonic, ri man cucoj ta ri u tzij ri Kajaw Jesucrist, are wa' ri utzalaj tzij ri man c'o ta etzelal che, man cucoj ta ri tijonic re nimanic che ri Dios," 
1Timothy6:4 ri are cunimarisaj rib, man c'o ta reta'm. Xane' benak u c'u'x chquij tak ri chomanic xukuje' ri tzij ri cäquichomaj ri winak. Chupam tak wa' queq'uiy wi ulok niq'uiaj etzelal ri cäquiban ri winak, je jas we jastak ri': cäpe coyowal aretak jun chic curik utzil, cäquiyac ch'o'j, cäquetz'bej u wäch ri Dios, cäquichomaj itzel tak jastak," 
1Timothy6:5 amak'el cäquic'ulelaj quib rumal rech chi sachinak qui no'j xukuje' man c'o ta ri kastzij cuc', pa qui c'u'x chi cäquich'äc puak chrij ri nimanic che ri Dios." 
1Timothy6:6 Nim c'ut ri cuch'äc jun we cäniman che ri Dios xukuje' cäquicot che ri c'o ruc'. 
1Timothy6:7 Man c'o ta ka c'amom ulok cho ri uwächulew, man c'o ta c'u cujcuin che u c'amic bic." 
1Timothy6:8 We c'u c'o ri ka wa ri katz'iak chujquicot che wa'. 
1Timothy6:9 Are c'u ri cäcaj quek'inomaric, are ri' quetakchi'x pa mac, quetzak chupam. Quetzak pa chapbal, pa q'ui conalaj tak rayinic ri cäquiban c'ax, ri cäquiban chque ri winak chi man c'o ta chi u patan ri qui c'aslemal xukuje' cäsach qui wäch." 
1Timothy6:10 Ruc' ri u lok'ok'exic ri puak cäq'uiy wi ulok ronojel etzelal. E c'o jujun ri sibalaj xquirayij ri puak, xesach c'ut, xquiya' can ri cojonic, xquiban q'uialaj c'ax chbil quib." 
1Timothy6:11 At c'ut, ri at winak re Dios, chatanimaj chquiwäch we jastak ri'. Chawila' awib rech caban ri suc', catniman che ri Dios xukuje' catcojon che, quebalok'ok'ej niq'uiaj chic, cach'ij ri c'ax, manimarisaj awib." 
1Timothy6:12 Chatija' a k'ij che ri utzalaj ch'o'j re ri cojonic. Chachapa' ri c'aslemal ri man cäq'uis taj. Che c'u wa' xatsiq'uix wi aretak xak'alajisaj ri utzalaj a cojonic chquiwäch e q'ui winak ri xquita' ri a tzij. 
1Timothy6:13 Chuwäch ri Dios ri cuya' qui c'aslemal conojel ri jastak, xukuje' chuwäch ri Jesucrist ri xuk'alajisaj ri utzalaj u k'alajisaxic rib chuwäch ri Pons Pilat, quintakan chawe" 
1Timothy6:14 chi chanimaj we takanic ri'. Maq'uex ri takanic, chabana' ronojel rech man c'o ta etzelal cäriktaj chawij c'ä cäpe na ri Kajaw Jesucrist." 
1Timothy6:15 Ri are cäc'ut na pa tak ri u k'ijol rumal ri Jun ri nimarisam u k'ij ri tewichi'm, ri xa' jun Ajawinel paquiwi' ri ajawinelab, ri Cajaw ri ajawib," 
1Timothy6:16 ri xa' Jun ri man cäcäm taj, ri cäc'oji' pa ri sakil, ri man c'o ta jun cäcuinic cänakajin ruc', ri mawi ne jun winak ilowinak mawi cäcuinic cärilo. ¡Che ri are chyok wi ri nim ilic cumal conojel! ¡Ri are c'o u takanic ri man cäq'uis taj! Je chbanok." 
1Timothy6:17 Ri e k'inomab ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew camic, chebataka' chi mäquinimarisaj quib, chi mäquicu'ba qui c'u'x chrij ri k'inomal ri man kastzij taj chi c'olic. Xane' chquicu'ba qui c'u'x chrij ri c'aslic Dios, ri yowinak ronojel ri jastak chke, sibalaj nim u yo'm chke, rech cujquicot ruc'." 
1Timothy6:18 Chebataka' chi chquibana' utzil, chebux e k'inom pa utzalaj tak chac, chebux utzalaj tak sipanelab, mäquibij chi quech ri c'o cuc' chquijacha' chque ri niq'uiaj chic." 
1Timothy6:19 Jeri' cäquimulij k'inomal chbil quib xukuje' cäquiyac jun utzalaj tac'alibal chque ri k'ij ri quepe na, rech cäquichap ri kastzij c'aslemal." 
1Timothy6:20 Timotey, chachajij ri yo'm pa a k'ab. Maya' qui k'ij ri tz'ilalaj tak tzijonic ri man c'o ta qui patan. Maya' qui k'ij tak ri tijonic ri man je taj jas ri caya' at, ri xak cäbix che chi utzalaj no'j." 
1Timothy6:21 E c'o jujun ri xquibij chi c'o qui cojonic, xesach c'ut, xquicoj jule' tijonic chic, xquiya' can ri cojonic. Chc'ol ta ri u tok'ob ri Dios iwuc'." 
2Timothy1:1 Ri in Pawl, u takom ri Crist Jesus rumal ri u rayibal ri Dios, jas ri u beya'l ri chi'm, ri u junaxic ib ruc' ri Crist Jesus," 
2Timothy1:2 quintz'ibaj we wuj ri' chawe, Timotey, lok'alaj nu c'ojol: are ta ri Dios Tataxel xukuje' ri Kajaw Jesucrist cuban tok'ob chawe, quel u c'u'x chawe, xukuje' cuya' jamaril chawe." 
2Timothy1:3 Quinpatanij ri Dios, jas ri xinwetamaj ulok cuc' ri e nu mam, quinna' c'u pa ri wanima' chi man c'o ta etzelal nu banom che u patanixic. Quinmaltioxin che ri Dios rumal rech chi amak'el catnataj chwe aretak quinban ch'awem ruc' Dios chi pa k'ij chi chak'ab." 
2Timothy1:4 Cänataj chwe ri u wa'l a wäch. Sibalaj quinwaj c'ut quinwil a wäch, rech cänojisax ri wanima' che quicotemal." 
2Timothy1:5 Cänataj chwe chi kastzij c'o a cojonic, man xa' ta quieb u wäch. Ri cojonic ri' nabe xc'oji' ruc' ri awati't Loid, xukuje' ruc' ri a nan Eunis. Elinak chi sak chnuwäch chi xukuje' c'o awuc'." 
2Timothy1:6 Rumal c'u ri' quinnataj chawe chi chac'astajisaj u wäch ri sipam chawe rumal ri Dios aretak xebenya' ri nu k'ab pawi'. 
2Timothy1:7 Man u yo'm ta c'ut ri Dios chke jun uxlabal re xibriquil, xane' jun uxlabal re cuinem, re lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj, xukuje' u jiq'uic kib." 
2Timothy1:8 Matq'uix ba' che u k'alajisaxic jas ri u banom ri Kajaw o jas nu banom in ri in c'o pa che' rumal rech ri Are'. Xane' chach'ija' awe ri c'ax wuc' in rumal rech ri tzij re colobal ib, ruc' ri chuk'ab ri yo'm rumal ri Dios," 
2Timothy1:9 ri xujucolo ri xujusiq'uij xukuje' xutas ri ka c'aslemal che ri are', man rumal ta c'u ri ka banom, xane' rumal ri u rayinic ri u tok'ob ri u yo'm chke pa Crist Jesus, c'ä majok tak ri e k'ij junab," 
2Timothy1:10 camic c'ut xk'alajisax ri u tok'ob chke rumal ri u petbal ri ka Colonel ri Crist Jesus. Ri are' xusach u wäch ri cämical, xuc'am ulok ri c'aslemal chi sak ri man cäq'uis ta u wäch rumal ri tzij re colobal ib." 
2Timothy1:11 Ri Dios in u tasom rech quinya' u bixic we tzijol ri', jacha' jun takom xukuje' jun ajtij." 
2Timothy1:12 Xukuje' rumal rech wa' quinrik we c'ax ri'. Man quinq'uix ta c'ut, rumal rech chi weta'm jachin che in cojoninak wi. Elinak chi sak chnuwäch chi c'o u cuinem che u chajixic ri nu yo'm pa u k'ab c'ä pa ri k'ij ri'." 
2Timothy1:13 Chabij ri tzij jacha' ri xata' wuc', ri utzalaj tzij ri man c'o ta etzelal che. Chac'olo' ronojel ruc' ri cojonic xukuje' ri lok'ok'ebal c'u'x ri cäya' chke rumal ri Crist Jesus." 
2Timothy1:14 Chachajij ri utzalaj tijonic ri yo'm pa a k'ab, ruc' ri u to'banic ri Ruxlabal ri Dios ri c'o pa kanima'." 
2Timothy1:15 Aweta'm ba' chi conojel ri e c'o pa Asiy xinquiya' can nu tuquiel. Jujun c'ut chque are' ri Pijel xukuje' ri Hermojenes. 
2Timothy1:16 Chel ta u c'u'x ri Ajawaxel chque ri e aj uwo rachoch ri Onesipor. Q'ui mul c'ut ri are' xuya' uxlanem chwe, man xq'uix ta c'u chwe chi ri in, in c'o pa che', in ximom ruc' tikom ch'ich'." 
2Timothy1:17 Xane' aretak c'o ri are' pa Rom, xucoj u chuk'ab che nu tzucuxic, xinurika' c'ut." 
2Timothy1:18 Chel ta u c'u'x ri Ajawaxel che pa ri k'ij ri'. Aweta'm ronojel ri chac ri xuban pa ri tinimit re Epes. 
2Timothy2:1 Ri at, nu c'ojol, chatux co pa ri tok'ob ri c'o pa ri Crist Jesus." 
2Timothy2:2 Ri nu bim chawe chquiwäch e q'ui k'alajisanelab, are ri' chajacha' chque ri e jicalaj tak winak ri xukuje' quecuin che qui tijoxic niq'uiaj chic." 
2Timothy2:3 At c'ut chach'ija' ri c'ax junam wuc' je jas jun utzalaj rajch'o'j ri Jesucrist. 
2Timothy2:4 Man c'o ta jun ajch'o'j ri cuputzcuyij ta rib chupam ri jastak quech ri winak; rajawaxic c'ut chi are cuban cakaj chuwäch ri xcojow che ch'o'j. 
2Timothy2:5 Xukuje' we c'o jachin cutij u k'ij pa ri aninem, man cuch'äc ta ri tojbal ri nim u banic we ta ma ta cubano jas ri u beya'l ri aninem." 
2Timothy2:6 Ri caticow ri ulew takal che chi are' nabe cuc'am rech ri u wächinic ri cutico. 
2Timothy2:7 Chachomaj ri quinbij. Are c'u ri Ajawaxel catto'w na che u ch'obic ronojel. 
2Timothy2:8 Chnataj ri Jesucrist chawe, ri rija'l ri David, ri xc'astaj chquixo'l ri cäminakib, jas ri cubij ri tzij re colobal ib ri quintzijoj." 
2Timothy2:9 Rumal ri utzalaj tzij ri' quinrik c'ax, c'ä xinximitaj na pa che' jas jun banal etzelal. Are c'u ri u tzij ri Dios man ximom taj." 
2Timothy2:10 Rumal ri' quinch'ij conojel ri rikoj c'ax che cutzil ri e cha'om, rech xukuje' ri e are' cäquirik ri colobal ib ri c'o pa Crist Jesus ruc' ri junalicalaj juluwem." 
2Timothy2:11 Kastzij wa' we tzij ri': We cujcäm ruc' are', xukuje' cujc'asi' na ruc'." 
2Timothy2:12 We cäkach'ij ri c'ax, cäya' na takanic pa ka k'ab ruc' ri are'. We man cäkak'alajisaj taj chi uj cojoninak che, xukuje' ri are' man cujuk'alajisaj taj chi uj cojonelab." 
2Timothy2:13 We ri uj cätukar ri ka cojonic, ri Are' kas jic wi. Man cäcuin ta c'ut chi ma ta cuk'alajisaj rib chi are Dios." 
2Timothy2:14 Chanataj wa chque. Pa ri u bi' ri Dios chata' chque chquitanaba' u yajic quib puwi' jujun tak tzij. Ri c'ulelam ib man c'o ta u patan; xane' quequiyojtajisaj ri quetatabenic. 
2Timothy2:15 Chawila' awib rech catac'aba' awib chuwäch ri Dios, jas jun ri utz u banom che ri chac, jas jun ajchac ri man c'o ta caq'uix wi, ri suc' u banom che u ya'ic ri tijonic aj kastzij." 
2Timothy2:16 Chak'ila' awib che ri tzijonem re we uwächulew ri' ri man c'o ta quechbex che xane' catquinim chupam ri etzelal. 
2Timothy2:17 Ri tzijonem ri' chanim cujabuj rib chquixo'l ri winak, jas jun ch'a'c ri cutij ri cuerp. Jujun chque ri jewa' xquibano, are' ri Imeney xukuje' ri Pilet." 
2Timothy2:18 Ri e are' xesachic, xquiya' can ri kastzij, cäquibij chi bantajinak chic ri c'astajibal, cäquituquij ri qui cojonic jujun." 
2Timothy2:19 Pune' ba jewa' tajin caquibano, are c'u ri u tac'alibal ri Dios co tac'alic, keta'm chi kastzij rumal we tzij ri': “Ri Ajawaxel cuch'ob qui wäch ri e rech”, xukuje' ri jun tzij chic: “Ronojel winak ri cubij chi cojoninak che ri Ajawaxel, chutasa' rib chrij ri etzelal.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Pa jun nimalaj ja man xuwi ta e c'o jastak re k'an puak xukuje' re sak puak, xane' xukuje' e c'o jastak re che' xukuje' re ulew. Jujun chque ri jastak nim quebil wi, jujun chic man kas ta nim quebil wi." 
2Timothy2:21 Jeri' xukuje' we jun cujosk'ij rib, xukuje' man cuban ta ri etzelal, are ri' nim quil wi, tastalic winak, c'o c'u u patan che ri Ajawaxel, suc'umam che ronojel u wäch utzalaj tak chac." 
2Timothy2:22 Chatanimaj chquiwäch ri e itzelalaj tak rayinic aj c'ojolal, are chaterenej ri suq'uil, ri cojobal, ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj, ri jamaril, cuc' ri winak ri caquiban ch'awem ruc' Dios ri ch'ajch'oj ri canima'." 
2Timothy2:23 Maya' c'olbal chque tak ri tzij, xukuje' ri chomanic ri man c'o ta qui patan, o ri xak cabixic. Aweta'm c'ut chi ri u banic wa' xa cuwalijisaj ch'o'j." 
2Timothy2:24 Man takal ta che ri jun pataninel re ri Ajawaxel chi cäch'ojinic, xane' rajawaxic chi are utz chque conojel, cäna'w che ri tijonic, xukuje' cucuy ri qui mac ri winak," 
2Timothy2:25 xukuje' ruc' manxoyil quebutijoj ri winak ri cäquic'ulelaj ri u tzij. We ne ri Dios cuya' na chque chi cäquiq'uex qui c'u'x rech cäquetamaj ri kastzij. 
2Timothy2:26 Rech quetzelej chupam ri utzalaj qui chomanic, quebel c'u chupam ri u cämibal ri itzel, e chaptajinak c'u rumal rech cäquiban ri u rayinic." 
2Timothy3:1 Xukuje' chawetamaj chi pa ri q'uisbal tak k'ijol, quepe na c'axalaj tak k'ij." 
2Timothy3:2 Quec'oji' na winak ri cäquilok'ok'ej quib chquibil quib, ri cäquilok'ok'ej ri puak, ri nimak qui banic cäquiban chi quib, ri cäquiban nimal; ri itzel tak tzij u pa qui chi', ri man queniman ta chque ri qui tat qui nan, ri man cäquiya' ta maltioxinic, man ch'ajch'oj ta ri qui c'aslemal," 
2Timothy3:3 man c'o ta lok'ok'ebal qui c'u'x, man e cuyenelab taj, e bil tak tzijtal, man cäquijic' ta quib, e c'analaj tak winak ri cäquiban qui c'ulel che ri utz," 
2Timothy3:4 cäquijach tak cachil pa qui k'ab ri qui c'ulel, man cäquichomaj ta ri cäquibano, cäquichomaj chi nim qui banic, je'l caquina' u banic ri qui rayibal; are c'u ri u rayibal ri Dios, man cäcaj taj." 
2Timothy3:5 Je ta ne ri c'o ri nimanic che ri Dios cuc', man cäquik'alajisaj ta c'u ri u chuk'ab: chatasa' awib mat be cuc'." 
2Timothy3:6 Jujun c'ut chque wa' e are ri queboc pa tak ja, quequisub jujun ixokib, ri sachinak qui c'u'x ruc' ri qui mac, ri e c'amom bic rumal ronojel u wäch rayibal," 
2Timothy3:7 ri amak'el tajin cäquetamaj tak jastak, mawi c'u quecuin che retamaxic ri kastzij." 
2Timothy3:8 Jacha' ri xquiban ri Jans xukuje' ri Jambres aretak xquik'atij u wäch ri Moises, jeri' xukuje' ri winak ri cäquiban ri jastak ri' cäquik'atij u wäch ri kastzij. Itzelalaj tak no'j ri c'o cuc'. Rumal c'u wa' man e c'o ta pa ri cojonic." 
2Timothy3:9 Man utz taj quel na ri qui chac. Quel na chi sak chquiwäch conojel chi man utz ta ri quechomanic, jas ri xquic'ulmaj ri e quieb ri xquik'atij u wäch ri Moises." 
2Timothy3:10 Are c'u ri at chaterenej ri nu tijonic, ri u cholajil ri nu c'aslemal, ri nu chomam u banic, ri nu cojonic, ri nu coch'onic, ri nu lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj xukuje' ri nu chuk'ab che takanic," 
2Timothy3:11 ri e c'axalaj tak nu c'ulelaxic xukuje' ri e nu rikoj tak c'ax. E aweta'm conojel ri xinc'ulmaj pa Antioquiy, pa Icon xukuje' pa Listr, xukuje' conojel ri e c'axalaj tak nu c'ulelaxic ri xebencoch'o; xinresaj c'ut ri Ajawaxel pa conojel wa'." 
2Timothy3:12 Kas tzij ba' chi conojel ri winak ri kas cäcaj cäcan ri u rayinic ri Crist Jesus, cäban na c'ax chque ri e are' xukuje'." 
2Timothy3:13 E are c'u ri e itzel tak winak, ri e subunelab, quenimataj na, cäquitakej na subunic, e subutajinak c'ut." 
2Timothy3:14 Chabana' ba at jas ri awetamam xukuje' ri a cojom. Aweta'm c'ut jachin ruc' a tijom wi awib. 
2Timothy3:15 Aweta'm c'ut chi aretak at ch'utin na xawetamaj ri tastalic tak Tz'ibatalic, ri cäcuin chuyic a no'j chrij ri a colic rumal ri cojonic che ri Crist Jesus." 
2Timothy3:16 Ronojel ri Tz'ibatalic petinak ruc' ri Dios: utz che tijonic, che pixbenic, che jic'onic, che nak'atisanic che ri suq'uilal." 
2Timothy3:17 Jeri' ri ralc'ual ri Dios yo'm ronojel ri rajawaxic che chubanic ronojel u wäch utzalaj tak chac. 
2Timothy4:1 Chuwäch ri Dios xukuje' ri Kajaw Jesucrist, ri cuk'at na tzij paquiwi' ri c'asc'oj xukuje' ri cäminakib, cuc'ut c'u na rib cajawin na, quinya' we pixbenic ri' chawe:" 
2Timothy4:2 chak'alajisaj ri u tzij ri Dios aretak cuya' cätzijoxic xukuje' aretak man cuya' taj. Chatyajonak, chatk'ilonok xukuje' chaya' chuk'ab, chattijon ba' ruc' ronojel coch'onic." 
2Timothy4:3 Cäpe c'u na k'ij aretak ri winak man cäquich'ij ta na ri suc'alaj tijonic. Xane' quequitzucuj na q'ui cajtij ri cäquic'ut chquiwäch jas ri cäcaj cäquito, jas ri u beya'l ri xa' qui rayibal." 
2Timothy4:4 Cäquijech'obisaj c'u na ri qui tanibal chrij ri kastzij, are' quequitakej ri puquebal." 
2Timothy4:5 Ri at c'ut chachomaj jas ri caban pa ronojel, chach'ija' ri c'ax, chatzijoj ri tzij re colobal ib chque ri winak, chaq'uisa' ri a chac." 
2Timothy4:6 Ri in c'ut, xak weyem chic ri nu cämisaxic, ri jok'otaj re ri welic bic nakaj c'o wi." 
2Timothy4:7 Nu cojom nu chuk'ab pa ri utzalaj ch'o'j, xinq'uis ri nu chac, xinchajij wib pa ri nu cojonic." 
2Timothy4:8 Kas camic c'ut c'olotal chi apan chwe ri corona re suq'uil, ri tojbal ri cuya' na ri Ajawaxel, ri suc'alaj k'atal tzij pa ri k'ij ri'; man xak xuwi ta c'u chwe in, xane' xukuje' chque conojel ri quelok'ok'en ri u petibal." 
2Timothy4:9 Chanim chatpe wuc' che wilic. 
2Timothy4:10 Xinuya' c'u can ri Dems. Ri are' utz xeril na ri jastak re ri uwächulew, benak pa Tesalon. Ri Cresent benak pa Galas, xukuje' ri Tito pa Dalmas." 
2Timothy4:11 Xuwi ri Lucax c'o wuc'. Chatzucuj ulok ri Marcux, chac'ama' ulok awuc'. Kas cajwataj c'u chwe che ri patan." 
2Timothy4:12 Xintak bic ri Tiquico pa Epes. 
2Timothy4:13 Aretak catpetic, chac'ama' ulok ri nu k'u' ri xinya' can pa Troas cho rachoch ri Carp. Xukuje' chebac'ama' ulok ri wuj xukuje' ri tz'um ri tz'ibam qui wäch." 
2Timothy4:14 Ri Alejandr ri ch'ayal ch'ich', u banom q'ui etzelal chwe. Ri Ajawaxel chtojow che jas ri u chac u banom." 
2Timothy4:15 Ri at chachajij awib chuwäch, xukuje' rumal rech chi sibalaj xuc'ulelaj u wäch ri ka tzij." 
2Timothy4:16 Pa ri nabe to'bal wib chquiwäch ri k'atal tak tzij, mawi jun xc'oji' wuc', xane' conojel xinquiya' canok. Man quinwaj ta c'ut chi cäya' we mac ri' chquij." 
2Timothy4:17 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel xc'oji' wuc', xuya' nu chuk'ab, rech xincuin che u tzijoxic ri tzij re colobal ib, jeri' chi xquita' conojel ri winak. Xinesax c'u pa u chi' ri coj." 
2Timothy4:18 Xukuje' quinresaj na ri Ajawaxel pa ronojel itzelalaj chac ri cäbantaj na, quinucol na, quinuc'am c'u na bic pa ri rajawibal chicaj. ¡Chnimarisax ta u k'ij ri are' amak'el chbe k'ij sak! Je chbanok." 
2Timothy4:19 Chaya' rutzil qui wäch ri Prisil xukuje' ri Aquil, xukuje' ri e aj uwo rachoch ri Onesipor." 
2Timothy4:20 Ri Erast xcanaj can pa Corint. Ri Tropim yawab xinya' can pa Milet. 
2Timothy4:21 Chatpetok chanim rech c'amajok ri nimalaj tew. Ri Eubul, ri Pudent, ri Lin, ri Claud xukuje' conojel ri kachalal cäquiya' rutzil a wäch." 
2Timothy4:22 Ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist chc'ol ta ruc' ri awanima'. Are' ta ri Dios cuban tok'ob chiwe. 
Titus1:1 Ri in Pawl, in rajchac ri Dios xukuje' takom re ri Jesucrist, rech quecojon na ri winak ri e cha'tal rumal ri Dios, rech cäquetamaj ri kas k'ijilanic che ri Dios," 
Titus1:2 rech cu'l qui c'u'x chi c'o junalic qui c'aslemal, ri u bim ulok ri Dios chi cuya' na. Are ri Dios man banal ta tzij, u bim c'u ulok wa' c'ä majok cätiquitaj ulok ri uwächulew." 
Titus1:3 Xuchomaj jun k'ij, xuk'alajisaj ri u tzij. Xya' ri tzij pa nu k'ab rumal ri u takanic ri ka Colonel Dios." 
Titus1:4 Quintz'ibaj we wuj ri' chawe, Tit, kas at nu c'ojol pa ri cojonic, xa' junam c'ut ri ka cojonic uj quieb. Are ta ri Dios Tataxel xukuje' ri ka Colonel Jesucrist cuban tok'ob chawe, cuya' jamaril chixo'l ruc'." 
Titus1:5 Xatinya' can pa Cret rech casuc'umaj ri c'ä cäraj na, rech quebacoj ri tatayib ri quetakan pa ri comon cojonelab re tak ri tinimit, jas ri xatintak wi." 
Titus1:6 Rajawaxic chi ri jun ri catakan pa ri comon cojonelab, man c'o ta etzelal cäriktaj chrij xukuje' xa' jun rixokil. Rajawaxic chi ri e ralc'ual e cojonelab, ri man cätataj ta etzelal chquij, xukuje' man quewalij ta chquij ri e c'o paquiwi'." 
Titus1:7 Rajawaxic chi ri solinel quech ri comon cojonelab: jicom ri u c'aslemal, rumal rech chi cächacun pa ri jastak re ri Dios. Rajawaxic man xuwi ta cuban jas ri cäkaj chuwäch, man coyowar taj chanim, man cäk'abar taj, man ch'ayanel taj, man curayij ta qui banic t'orinel tak ch'äcoj," 
Titus1:8 xane' cuya' okxanibal chque niq'uiaj chic, culok'ok'ej ronojel ri utz, utz u chomanic, cuban ri suc', are tastalic winak, cätakan puwi' ri u c'aslemal." 
Titus1:9 Rajawaxic chi cunimaj ri jicalaj tzij, jas ri cubij ri tijonic, rech cäcuinic quebupixbej ri winak ruc' ri utzalaj tijonic ri man c'o ta etzelal che, xukuje' cäcuin che qui ch'äquic ri winak ri cäquiban qui c'ulel che ri tijonic." 
Titus1:10 E q'ui ri man cäquiya' ta quib pa takic, ri cäquibij tzij ri man c'o ta qui patan, ri quequisub niq'uiaj winak chic. E are' wa' ri aj judeyib ri cäquibij chi rajawaxic ri u kopixic ri u wi' ri qui tz'umal ri e achijab wi che quetal." 
Titus1:11 Rajawaxic chi cätz'apix ri u pa qui chi'. Quequitijoj ri winak che jastak ri man ya'tal taj xa' rech cäquich'äc puak rumal. Quequituquij jujun tak ja winak. 
Titus1:12 C'o jun chque ri e aj Cret, are' jun k'axal u tzij ri qui dios, ri xubij: “Ri e aj Cret conojel e banal tak tzij, e itzel tak awaj, xa' e sak'oralaj tak winak ri xak xuwi qui chomanic ri wa'im.”" 
Titus1:13 Ri xubij ri achi ri' are' ri kas tzij. Rumal wa' rajawaxic chi co quebe a pixbej, chebak'ila' rech kas tzij quecojonic, jicom ri canima'." 
Titus1:14 Mäquiya' u k'ij ri qui jo'sanic ri aj judeyib ri man c'o ta u patan, o ri qui takanic ri winak ri cäquitas quib chrij ri kastzij."
