Titus1:15 Chque ri e ch'ajch'oj ri qui chomanic, conojel ri jastak e ch'ajch'oj; chque c'ut ri man e ch'ajch'oj taj, man ch'ajch'oj taj ri qui chomanic mawi ri qui cojonic, man c'o ta jun jasach ch'ajch'oj; xukuje' ne ri qui no'jinic xukuje' ri quetamabal c'uxaj e tz'ilotajinak." 
Titus1:16 Cäquibij chi queta'm u wäch ri Dios, ruc' c'u ri qui chac cäquik'alajisaj chi man je taj. Itzel quebil wi, man e nimanelab taj. Man quecuin ta c'ut cäcan ta jubik' ri utzil." 
Titus2:1 Ri at c'ut, chatzijoj jastak ri takal che ri utzalaj tijonic ri man c'o ta etzelal che:" 
Titus2:2 chi ri nimak tatayib meyojcoric, chquirika' ri'jobic, utz chechomanok, chi c'o qui chuk'ab pa qui cojonic, pa ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj, pa ri ch'ijonic." 
Titus2:3 Junam ri chuchuyib ri e nimak tak winak chquirika' ri'jobic, mebux banal tak tzijtal, mawi quek'abaric. Rajawaxic caquiya' utzalaj c'utbal," 
Titus2:4 cäquic'am qui be ri alitomab che qui lok'ok'exic ri cachajil xukuje' ri cal," 
Titus2:5 utz qui chomanic, e ch'ajch'oj pa ri qui c'aslemal, cäquiban ri qui chac cho tak cachoch, e utz, qui yo'm quib pa takic chque ri cachajilal, rech man cäyok' ta ri u tzij ri Dios." 
Titus2:6 Chebapixbej xukuje' ri c'ä e alabom na rech utz quechoman pa ronojel. 
Titus2:7 Kas at chatyo'w jun utzalaj c'utbal chquiwäch pa conojel ri jastak. Aretak chebatijoj, chabana' ruc' ronojel ch'ajch'ojil xukuje' ruc' ri'jobic." 
Titus2:8 Utz chabana' che ri a tzijonic, rech man c'o ta etzelal cäriktaj chawij. Jeri' queq'uix ri i c'ulel, man quecuin taj cäquibij jun etzelal chkij." 
Titus2:9 Chebapixbej ri pataninelab rech cäquiya' quib pa takic chque ri cajaw pa ronojel, chekaj chquiwäch, mec'ulelanic," 
Titus2:10 c'o mebeläk' chque, cäquic'utu chi e jic pa ronojel, rech pa ronojel cäquic'utu chi sibalaj je'lic ri u tijonic ri Dios ri ka Colonel." 
Titus2:11 Rumal rech chi ri Dios u c'utum ri u tok'ob chquiwäch conojel ri winak rech quecolotajic. 
Titus2:12 Cujutijoj chi cäkatas kib chrij ri rayibal aj uwächulew xukuje' ri jastak ri man cäquiya' ta u k'ij ri Dios. Cujutijoj chi utz ri ka chomanic cäkabano, cäkaban ri suc', xukuje' cujniman che ri Dios pa ri ka c'aslemal waral cho ri uwächulew," 
Titus2:13 chi cäkeyej na ri juluwemalaj u petic ri nimalaj ka Dios xukuje' ri ka Colonel Jesucrist, nim u k'ij cäpetic. Are wa' ri ka quicotemal xukuje' ri cu'lbal ka c'u'x." 
Titus2:14 Ri Jesucrist xuya' ri u c'aslemal rumal kech, che kesaxic pa u k'ab ronojel etzelal xukuje' che ka josk'ixic, rech cujux rech are' xukuje' cäkacoj ka chuk'ab che u banic utzalaj tak chac." 
Titus2:15 Chatzijoj we jastak ri'. Chebapixbej ri winak, chak'alajisaj chquiwäch jas ri man utz taj ri cäquibano. Chabana' wa' ruc' ronojel takanic, c'o c'u jun metzelan a wäch." 
Titus3:1 Chanataj chque ri cojonelab chi cäquiya' quib pa takic chque ri k'atal tak tzij xukuje' ri c'o qui takanic, chi queniman chque ri e c'o paquiwi'. Chanataj chque chi chquisuc'umaj quib che ronojel utzalaj chac;" 
Titus3:2 man quequiyok' ta niq'uiaj chic, man caquiyac ta ch'o'j ruc' ri qui tzij xukuje' e banal tak utzil, chiquic'utu' quib chi e mach'ol ruc' canima' chque conojel." 
Titus3:3 Xukuje' ri uj man c'o ta ka no'j nabe canok, man uj nimanelab taj, uj subutajnak, ka yo'm kib pa u k'ab ri xa' ka rayibal xukuje' ronojel u wäch jastak ri xkaj chkawäch. Xkaban etzelal, xpe koyowal we jun chic xurik utzil. Itzel xekil niq'uiaj winak chic, xukuje' itzel xujquil uj ri e are'." 
Titus3:4 Aretak c'ut xpe ri ka Colonel Dios, xuc'ut chkawäch chi cuban utzil chke xukuje' quebulok'ok'ej ri winak," 
Titus3:5 xujucolo, man rumal ta suc'alaj chac ri ka banom, xane' rumal rech chi xel u c'u'x chke. Xujuch'ajo, xuban c'ac' tak winak chke, jas jun alaj ne' c'äte xalaxic. Jewa' xubano rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios," 
Titus3:6 ri xutak ulok pa kanima' rumal ri Jesucrist ri ka Colonel, ri pa u q'uiyal xuya' ri Uxlabaxel chke." 
Titus3:7 Jeri' k'alajisam chic chi uj suc' chuwäch rumal ri u tok'ob, cu'l c'u ka c'u'x chi cäkechbej na ri junalic c'aslemal." 
Titus3:8 Kastzij we tzij ri'. Quinwaj c'ut chi cabij we jastak ri', muban quieb a c'u'x, rech ri e cojoninak che ri Dios queboc il che qui banic utzalaj tak chac. We jastak ri' e utz chque ri winak, c'o cäquechbej chque." 
Titus3:9 Maya' c'u qui k'ij ri conalaj tak chomanic xukuje' ri jo'sanic ri cabix chquij ri e i mam, mayac ch'o'j cuc' ri winak, miban ch'o'j chrij ri pixab. Man c'o ta c'u quechbex chque we jastak ri', man c'o ta qui patan." 
Titus3:10 We c'o jun ri cuban chque ri cojonelab chi cäquitasala' quib, chaya' u no'j jumul camul. Mawuc'aj chic awib ruc'." 
Titus3:11 Aweta'm c'ut chi ri je u banic wa' sachinak, u yo'm can ri suc'alaj be, cämacunic. Ri mac ri cubano, are cac'utuwic chi c'okotajinak." 
Titus3:12 Aretak quintak bic ri Artems awuc', o ri Tiquico, chanim chatpet wuc' pa Nicopolis. Quinchomaj chi quinwoc'owisaj ri ic' re tew chila'." 
Titus3:13 Chebajacha' bic ruc' utzil ri Zens ri aj pixab xukuje' ri Apols chaya' bic ri cajwataj chque. 
Titus3:14 Xukuje' rajawaxic chi ri e c'o kuc' cäquetamaj queboc il che utzalaj tak chac rech cäquirik ri rajawaxic, rech c'o u patan ri qui c'aslemal, je ta ne jun tico'n cuya' u wächinic." 
Titus3:15 Conojel ri e c'o wuc' cäquiya' apan rutzil a wäch. Chaya' rutzil qui wäch ri lok'alaj tak kachalal pa ri cojonic. Ri Dios chubana' tok'ob chiwe chi nimalaj iwonojel. 
Philemon1:1 In Pawl, in c'o pa che' rumal rech ri Crist Jesus, junam ruc' ri kachalal Timotey quintz'ibaj we wuj ri' chawe, lok'alaj Pilemon, at kach ajchac," 
Philemon1:2 xukuje' che ri lok'alaj kachalal chuchu' Apia, che ri Arquip ri kachil pa ri ch'o'j, xukuje' chque ri e rech ri comon cojonelab ri cäquimulij quib cho awachoch." 
Philemon1:3 Are ta ri Dios ka Tat xukuje' ri Ajaw Jesucrist cuban tok'ob chiwe xukuje' cuya' jamaril chiwe. 
Philemon1:4 Quinmaltioxin che ri nu Dios, aretak catnataj chwe amak'el pa ri nu ch'awem ruc' Dios." 
Philemon1:5 Nu tom a tzijol chi calok'ok'ej xukuje' c'o a cojonic che ri Ajaw Jesus. Xukuje' nu tom a tzijol chi quebalok'ok'ej conojel ri tastalic tak winak xukuje' cak'alajisaj ri a cojonic chque. 
Philemon1:6 Quintz'onoj c'u che ri Dios chi ri at, ri a c'amom awech ri ka cojonic, chatcuin che utzalaj qui ch'obic conojel tak ri tewichibal ri e ka rikom rumal ri Crist Jesus." 
Philemon1:7 Cu'l ka c'u'x xukuje' cujquicotic rumal ri lok'ok'ebal a c'u'x, rumal rech chi a yo'm uxlanem che ri canima' ri cojonelab, wachalal." 
Philemon1:8 Rumal ri', pune' man quinxe'j ta wib catintak che u banic jas ri rajawaxic cabano rumal rech chi in takom re ri Crist," 
Philemon1:9 xak c'u quitz'onoj tok'ob chawe, rumal rech chi catinlok'ok'ej. In wa' in, Pawl, in nim winak chic, camic in c'o pa che' rumal rech ri Crist Jesus," 
Philemon1:10 quinta' jun tok'ob puwi' ri nu c'ojol Onesimo, ri xux je ta ne nu c'ojol waral pa che'." 
Philemon1:11 Ri are' man c'o ta u patan chawe nabe. Camic c'ut c'o chi u patan chawe, xukuje' chwe in." 
Philemon1:12 Quintak bic awuc'. Chac'ulaj ba', je ta ne ri kas are' ri wanima'." 
Philemon1:13 Man quinwaj taj quintzokopij bic, quinwaj ta ne chi cäcanaj can wuc', rech quinupatanij che a q'uexwäch aretak in c'o pa che' rumal rech ri utzalaj tak tzij." 
Philemon1:14 Man c'o ta jas quinwaj quinbano ri ma ta xinta' na ri a no'j, rech ri tok'ob ri caban na chwe man xa' ta at ch'ijom che u banic, xane' caban na ruc' ronojel awanima'." 
Philemon1:15 Cäraj ne rumal rech wa' ri Onesimo xutas rib chawij quieb oxib k'ij, rech cäc'oji' awuc' amak'el chbe k'ij sak," 
Philemon1:16 cäc'oji' na awuc' man jacha' ta chic jun lok'om pataninel, xane' c'o na chuwäch jun lok'om pataninel, jun lok'alaj awachalal. Ri are' lok' chnuwäch in, sibalaj lok' c'u na chawäch at, man xuwi ta jas jun winak, xane' xukuje' jas jun awachalal pa ri Ajawaxel." 
Philemon1:17 Je c'u ri', we cachomaj chi in awachalal, chac'ulaj ri Onesimo je ta ne ri in." 
Philemon1:18 We c'o c'u jun c'ax u banom chawe, o c'o u c'as awuc', chatok'ij chwe in." 
Philemon1:19 In, Pawl quintz'ibaj ruc' ri nu k'ab: in quintojow na, ¡cuya' ta c'u ne ri' quinbij chawe chi a c'as awib pa nu k'ab!" 
Philemon1:20 Je, wachalal, chabana' jun tok'ob chwe pa ri Ajawaxel. Chaya' uxlanem che ri wanima' pa ri Crist." 
Philemon1:21 Quinjiquiba' nu c'u'x chawij, chi canimaj ri nu tzij. Rumal ri' xintz'ibam bic awuc'. Weta'm c'ut chi coc'ow u wi' ri caban na chuwäch ri quintz'onoj chawe." 
Philemon1:22 Chasuc'umaj c'u apan ri wokxanibal. Cu'l c'u nu c'u'x chi rumal ri i ch'awem ruc' Dios, ri Dios cuya' na chiwe chi quinopan iwuc'." 
Philemon1:23 Ri Epapras cuya' rutzil a wäch, are wachil pa che' rumal rech ri Crist Jesus." 
Philemon1:24 Xukuje' ri Marcux, ri Aristarc, ri Dems xukuje' ri Lucax, ri e wäch tak ajchaquib, cäquiya' rutzil a wäch." 
Philemon1:25 Ri u tok'ob ri Ajaw Jesucrist chc'ol ta ruc' ri iwanima'. 
Hebrews1:1 Ri Dios q'ui mul xebuch'abej can ri e ka mam ojer, q'ui qui ch'abexic xubano cumal ri k'axal tak tzij." 
Hebrews1:2 Pa we q'uisbal tak k'ij ri' xujuch'abej rumal ri C'ojolaxel. Ri xucojo chi are' quechben conojel ri jastak, rumal c'u ri are' xebantaj ronojel ri uwächulew xukuje' ronojel ri c'olic." 
Hebrews1:3 Rumal ri are' cäjuluw ri u juluwem ri Dios. Are u wächbal ri kas u ca'yebal ri Dios. Ri are' ruc'am ronojel ri jastak rumal ri tzij re ri u cuinem. Aretak xujujosk'ij pa ri ka mac, xt'uyi' pa ri u wiquiak'ab ri Dios ri nim u k'ij chicaj." 
Hebrews1:4 Sibalaj xnimarisax na u k'ij chquiwäch ri tako'nib aj caj. Jeri' chi xrechbej jun bi'aj sibalaj utz na chquiwäch ri e are'. 
Hebrews1:5 Mawi jumul xubij ta ri Dios che jun tako'nib aj caj: “At ri' ri nu C'ojol, in xatinwalc'ualaj camic;” mawi xubij ta che jun tako'n aj caj: “In quinux na jun Tataxel che, ri are' c'ut cux na jun C'ojolaxel chwe.”" 
Hebrews1:6 Xukuje', aretak xucoj ri u nabeal cho ri uwächulew, xubij: “Chi conojel ri e u tako'nib ri Dios ri e aj caj, chk'ijilax cumal.”" 
Hebrews1:7 Cubij c'u ri Dios chquij ri e tako'nib aj caj: “Cubano chi ri e u tako'n aj caj quebux je ta ne quiakik', xukuje' chi ri e pataninel rech quebux je ta ne rak' k'ak'.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Che c'u ri C'ojolaxel cubij wi: “Ri a tem re ajawibal, oh Dios, amak'el chbe k'ij sak man q'uisel taj. Bara' re suq'uil ri u bara' ri awajawinic." 
Hebrews1:9 Alok'ok'em ri suq'uil, awetzelam c'u u wäch ri etzelal. Rumal wa' ri Dios, ri a Dios, sibalaj xuya' na quicotemal chawe at chquiwäch ri awachil, je ta ne xuya' aseit pawi'.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Xukuje' cubij ri Dios: “Ri at, Wajaw pa ri u tiquiritajic xaban ri uwächulew, xukuje' ri caj are u chac ri a k'ab." 
Hebrews1:11 E are wa' cäsach na qui wäch, ri at c'ut cätc'oji' na. Conojel quek'elob na je jas jun atz'iak." 
Hebrews1:12 Quebabot na je ta ne jun c'ul, quejal na je jas jun atz'iak. Ri at c'ut xak at je wi, ri a junab man e q'uisel taj.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Mawi c'u jumul xubij ta ri Dios che jun tako'n aj caj: “Chatt'uyul pa ri nu wiquiak'ab, c'ä quebenya' na ri a c'ulel che qui tac'alibal ri e awakan.”" 
Hebrews1:14 Conojel c'ut ri tako'nib aj caj, e uxlabal ri e c'o pa ri patanijic cho ri Dios e takom ulok che qui patanixic ri winak ri caquechbej ri colotajic." 
Hebrews2:1 Rumal ri', rajawaxic chi sibalaj quekanimaj na ri jastak ri ka tom, mäkatas kib chrij." 
Hebrews2:2 Co xtiqui can ri tzij ri tzijom ojer cumal ri tako'nib aj caj. Jachin c'ut ri man xucoj taj o man xunimaj taj xc'äjisax u wäch, jas ri takal che." 
Hebrews2:3 E ta c'u lo ri uj, ¿jas ta cäkabano cujto'tajic, we man cujoc il che ri nimalaj tok'ob ri xuban ri Dios che ka colic? Nabe xtzijox wa' rumal ri Ajawaxel, te c'u ri' xbix chke chi kastzij cumal ri xeto'wic." 
Hebrews2:4 Jeri' ri Dios xuk'alajisaj chi kastzij, xebuban etal, mayibal, xukuje' ronojel u wäch nimak tak chac rumal, xujach ri Uxlabaxel chque ri winak jas ri u rayibal." 
Hebrews2:5 Man chque ta ri tako'nib aj caj ri Dios u yo'm wi takanic puwi' ri uwächulew ri cäpe na, ri cäkatzijoj." 
Hebrews2:6 Pa jun c'olbal chupam ri Tz'ibatalic, c'o jun ri xuk'alajisaj ri u tzij ri Dios xubij: “¿Jas lo qui banic ri winak, chi canataj che la? ¿Jas lo u banic ri rija'l winak chi cachajij la?" 
Hebrews2:7 Xa' jubik' xban la che chi ch'utin na u k'ij chquiwäch ri tako'nib aj caj. Xban c'u la che chi nim u k'ij, xukuje' nim quilic, je ta ne jun corona ri xcoj la che." 
Hebrews2:8 Ronojel xcoj la chquixe' ri rakan.” Aretak c'ut xuya' ronojel ri jastak pa takic che, man c'o ta xuya' canok ri ma ta c'o chuxe' ri u takanic, c'ä maja' c'u cäkilo chi conojel ri jastak e c'o chuxe' ri u takanic." 
Hebrews2:9 Are c'u ri Jesus, ri xban che chi ch'utin na jubik' ri u k'ij chquiwäch ri tako'nib aj caj, cäkilo chi nim u k'ij xukuje' nim quilic, je ta ne jun corona ri cojom che. Jewa' banom che rumal rech chi xurik cämical rumal quech conojel, jas ri tok'ob ri xuban ri Dios chque." 
Hebrews2:10 Rumal ri Dios e c'o conojel ri jastak, xukuje' conojel ri jastak e rech are'. Cäraj chi e q'ui queboc che ralc'ual xukuje' quebopan pa ri u juluwem. Rumal ri' rajawaxic xutz'akatisaj ri Crist ri qui Colonel rumal c'axc'olil." 
Hebrews2:11 Are ri Jun ri cäbanow tastalic tak winak chque, xukuje' ri e rech ri cäban tastalic tak winak chque, ruc' ri Tataxel e elinak wi conojel. Rumal ri' ri Jesus man cäq'uix ta che u bixic chi e rachalal." 
Hebrews2:12 Cubij c'ut: “Quintzijoj na ri bi' la chque ri wachalal, quinbixoj na pa ri u mulixic quib.”" 
Hebrews2:13 Xukuje' cubij: “Quinjiquiba' ri nu c'u'x chrij ri Dios.” Xukuje' cubij: “Chiwilampe', ri in cuc' ri alc'ualaxelab ri xebuya' ri Dios chwe.”" 
Hebrews2:14 Jas ri alc'ualaxelab c'o qui ti'jal xukuje' c'o qui quiq'uel, xukuje' ri Jesus junam xuc'am re cuc'. Je xubano, rech rumal ri u cämical, cusach u wäch ri jun ri c'o u takanic puwi' ri cämical, are wa' ri itzel." 
Hebrews2:15 Jeri' xebutzokopij bic conojel ri e c'o pa u k'ab ri cämical pa ronojel ri qui c'aslemal xa' rumal rech chi cäquixe'j quib chuwäch ri cämical. 
Hebrews2:16 Kastzij man are ta xebuto' ri tako'nib aj caj, xane' are xebuto' ri e rija'l ri Abraham." 
Hebrews2:17 Rumal c'u rech wa', rajawaxic chi cajunamataj na pa ronojel cuc' ri e rachalal. Jewa' xubano rech cux qui nimal ri cojol tak tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Dios, jic, ri quil u c'u'x chque ri winak, rech cäcäm che qui q'uexwäch che u sachic ri qui mac." 
Hebrews2:18 Rumal c'u rech chi ri are' xurik c'ax aretak xtakchi'x che mac, cäcuin che qui to'ic ri quetakchi'x che mac." 
Hebrews3:1 Je c'u ri', tastalic tak wachalal, ix siq'uim cuc' niq'uiaj chic chi quixux rech ri Dios. Kas chichomaj ba' ri Crist Jesus, are takom xukuje' qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob re ri ka cojonic." 
Hebrews3:2 Ri are' jic chuwäch ri Dios, ri xcojow che qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob, jas xukuje' ri Moises are jic chuwäch ronojel ri rachoch Dios." 
Hebrews3:3 Takal che ri Jesus chi nim na u k'ij chuwäch ri Moises, jas ri nim quil wi na ri xbanow ri ja chuwäch ri ja." 
Hebrews3:4 Ronojel ja cäban rumal jachin jun. Are c'u ri xebanow conojel ri jastak, are' ri Dios." 
Hebrews3:5 Ri Moises kastzij jic pa ronojel ri rachoch Dios, je jas jun pataninel, che u k'alajisaxic jas ri cätzijox na." 
Hebrews3:6 Are c'u ri Crist jacha' jun c'ojolaxel, puwi' ri rachoch Dios; uj c'u ri' we ja ri', we co ka tiquibam ri jiquibam c'uxaj xukuje' ri u nimarisaxic ka k'ij che ri cu'lbal c'uxaj." 
Hebrews3:7 Rumal ri', jas ri cubij ri Ruxlabal ri Dios pa ri Tz'ibatalic: “We quito jas cubij ri Dios camic," 
Hebrews3:8 micowirisaj ri iwanima', jas ri xquiban ri winak aretak xetzak pa takchibal mac pa ri chaki'j uwo sak, xquiyac c'u woyowal." 
Hebrews3:9 Are chi' ri e i mam xquiban jastak chnuwäch xa' che rilic jas quinbano, pune' xquilo cawinak junab jas ri xinban cuc'." 
Hebrews3:10 Rumal c'u ri' xpe woyowal chque ri winak ri', xinbij c'ut: ‘Amak'el e sachinak pa canima', man e qui ch'obom ta c'u ri nu be.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Xinbij c'u pa ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na pa ri woyowal jas ri quinban na, xinbij: ‘Man queboc ta na pa ri wuxlanem.’ ”" 
Hebrews3:12 Chiwila', wachalal, c'o jun chiwe mäc'oji' itzelalaj ranima' ri man cäcojon taj, ri cutas rib cuya' can ri Dios c'aslic." 
Hebrews3:13 Xane' chipixbela' iwib ronojel k'ij, aretak c'ä c'o ri k'ij camic, rech c'o jun chiwe mucowirisaj ri ranima' rumal ri u subunic ri mac." 
Hebrews3:14 Je c'ut e jacha' ri alc'ualaxelab re jun ja winak e re xa' junam ti'j xukuje' junam quic', jeri' xukuje' ri Jesus aj ti'j xukuje' aj quic' aj winak, ruc' ri u cämical xuch'äc ri cuinelalaj cämisanel, ri u bixic wa' are' ri itzel." 
Hebrews3:15 Chkajiquiba' ka c'u'x chrij aretak c'ä cäbixic: “We quito jas cubij ri Dios camic, micowirisaj ri iwanima', jas ri xquiban ri winak aretak xquiyac woyowal.”" 
Hebrews3:16 ¿Jachin tak ri xquiyac royowal ri Dios pune' xquita' ri u tzij? Are' conojel ri xebesax ulok pa Ejipt rumal ri Moises. 
Hebrews3:17 ¿Jachin tak chquij xc'oji' wi ri royowal ri Dios pa cawinak junab? Are' chquij ri xemacunic, ri are' xecäm can pa ri chaki'j uwo sak." 
Hebrews3:18 ¿Jachin chque tak xubij wi ri Dios ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na, chi man queboc ta na ruc' pa ri uxlanem? Are' chquij ri man xeniman taj." 
Hebrews3:19 Cäkil c'ut chi man xecuin taj xeboquic rumal rech chi man xecojon taj. 
Hebrews4:1 Xbix chke rumal ri Dios chi cujoc na pa ri uxlanem. Chkaxe'j ba kib, we ne c'o jun chiwe muc'ulmaj chi man coc ta pa ri uxlanem." 
Hebrews4:2 Ri uj xukuje' ka tom ri tzij re colobal ib junam jas ri e are'. Ri e are' c'ut man c'o ta xquechbej che ri u tatabexic ri tzij rumal rech chi man xecojon taj aretak xquitatabej. 
Hebrews4:3 Are c'u ri uj cujoc ruc' pa ri uxlanem, ri uj cojoninak chic, jas ri xubij ri Dios: “Xinbij pa ri woyowal ruc' ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na chi man queboc ta na wuc' pa ri c'olbal ri quinuxlan wi.” Xuq'uis c'u ne ri Dios ri u chac aretak xtiquiritaj ri uwächulew." 
Hebrews4:4 Pa jun c'olbal c'ut je cubij wa' ri Tz'ibatalic chrij ri uwuk k'ij: “Xuxlan ri Dios che ronojel ri u chac pa ri uwuk k'ij.” 
Hebrews4:5 Jumul chic cubij ri Tz'ibatalic: “Man queboc ta na wuc' pa ri uxlanem.” 
Hebrews4:6 Cäraj c'u na jujun ri queboc na pa ri uxlanem. Are c'u ri qui tom ri tzij re colobal ib nabe man xeboc taj rumal rech chi man xeniman taj. 
Hebrews4:7 Rumal ri', jumul chic ri Dios xuchomaj jun k'ij, are ri camic. Oc'owinak chi q'ui junab, xubij rumal ri David, jas ri bim canok: “We quito jas cubij ri Dios camic, micowirisaj ri iwanima'.”" 
Hebrews4:8 We ta ri Josue xuya' ta ri uxlanem chque ri e aj israelib, ri Dios ma ta xutzijoj chi jun k'ij ri' ri cäpe na." 
Hebrews4:9 Rumal ri' c'o na jun uxlanem che ri u tinimit ri Dios. 
Hebrews4:10 Apachin c'ut ri coc pa ri ruxlanem ri Dios, are' xukuje' uxlaninak che ri u chac, jas ri Dios xuxlan che ri rech." 
Hebrews4:11 Chkacojo' ba' ka chuk'ab rech cujoc pa ri uxlanem ri', rech man c'o ta jun cätzakic cutakej ta c'ut ri c'utbal que ri man xeniman taj." 
Hebrews4:12 Ri u tzij ri Dios c'aslic xukuje' c'o u cuinem. C'o na u ware chuwäch apachique ch'ich' ri quieb u pa u chi'. Cuban quieb chque ri anima' ruc' ri uxlabal, cuban quieb chque ri u wiki'b ri bak ruc' ri u pa bak. Reta'm ri u chomanic xukuje' ri u rayibal ri canima' ri winak, we utz o man utz taj." 
Hebrews4:13 Man c'o ta jun jasach banom ta cho ri uwächulew c'u'm ta chuwäch ri Dios. Conojel ri jastak e ch'anach'oj xukuje' e k'alaj chuwäch ri u bak'wäch ri Jun ri cäkabij wi na jas ri ka banom. 
Hebrews4:14 C'o jun nimalaj qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob kech uj, ri xroc'owisaj ri caj, ri Jesus u C'ojol ri Dios. Rumal ri', chkak'alajisaj ri ka cojonic, co chujtac'alok." 
Hebrews4:15 Ri qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri c'o kuc', cäcuinic quil u c'u'x che ri ka tukaril, rumal rech chi xtakchi'x che ronojel u wäch c'ambejenic je jas ri uj, man xmacun ta c'ut." 
Hebrews4:16 Mäkaxe'j ba' kib, chujkeb chuwäch ri tem re ajawibal rech ri u tok'ob ri Dios, rech ri are' quil u c'u'x chke, cuban tok'ob chke che ka to'ic pa ri k'ij ri rajawaxic na chke." 
Hebrews5:1 Ronojel qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri cha'om chquixo'l ri winak, are' cojom chuwäch ri Dios che qui q'uexwäch ri winak, rech cuya' sipanic cho ri Dios xukuje' quebucämisaj tak awaj che tabal tok'ob cho ri Dios rumal quech ri mac." 
Hebrews5:2 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cäcuinic quil u c'u'x chque ri man c'o ta queta'm xukuje' ri e subutajinak, rumal rech chi xukuje' ri are' tukar." 
Hebrews5:3 Rajawaxic c'ut chi cuya' tabal tok'ob cho ri Dios man xuwi ta rumal quech ri qui mac ri winak, xane' xukuje' rumal quech ri u mac are'." 
Hebrews5:4 Man c'o ta jun ri xak ta pa re wi coc ta pa we chac ri' ri nim u k'ij, xane' are coc ri cäsiq'uix rumal ri Dios, jas ri Aaron." 
Hebrews5:5 Jeri' xukuje' ri Crist man xunimarisaj ta u k'ij chbil rib, che u banic rib che qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob, xane' are' ri Dios, ri xbin che: “At ri' ri nu C'ojol, in xatinwalc'ualaj camic.”" 
Hebrews5:6 Jas xukuje' cubij ri Tz'ibatalic pa jun c'olbal chic: “At cojol tabal tok'ob amak'el chbe k'ij sak, jas ri u cholajil ri u beya'l ri Melquisedec.”" 
Hebrews5:7 Ri Crist, aretak xc'oji' waral cho ri uwächulew, xurak u chi', xok'ic aretak xuban ch'awem ruc' Dios. Xuban bochi'nic xukuje' tz'ononic che ri Dios, ri cäcuin che u to'ic chuwäch ri cämical. Xtataj c'ut rumal ri u nimanic." 
Hebrews5:8 Pune' C'ojolaxel, xretamaj ri nimanic rumal ri c'ax ri xuriko." 
Hebrews5:9 Tz'akatirinak chi c'ut, xux junalic colol quech conojel ri queniman che." 
Hebrews5:10 Xcoj che qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob rumal ri Dios, jas ri u banic ri Melquisedec." 
Hebrews5:11 Sibalaj c'o na ri cäkabij che wa'. Sibalaj c'ax c'u u bixic, rumal rech chi ri ix beyowinak che ch'obonic." 
Hebrews5:12 Takal chi chiwe we ta quixoc che ajtijab, rumal rech chi ojer chic ix cojoninak. Man je ta c'u wa' i banom, xane' c'ä rajawaxic quixtijox chi na jumul chque ri nabe tak takanic re ri chaplebal re ri u tzij ri Dios chi rajawaxic chi na ri leche' chiwe, man are ta ri wa." 
Hebrews5:13 Ronojel jachin ri cutij leche', c'ä maja' cäresaj u no'j chrij ri tzij re suq'uil, rumal rech chi c'ä ch'utin na." 
Hebrews5:14 Ri wa ri' are quech ri tz'akatinak chic qui junab. Rumal rech chi amak'el qui tijom quib, c'o chic qui no'j, quecuin che u ch'obic jas ri utz xukuje' jas ri man utz taj." 
Hebrews6:1 Katakej ba' takenic c'ä catz'akat na ri ka junab, c'o na ri chketamaj chquiwäch ri nabe tak etamanic aj Crist. Makatakej quetamaxic ri nabe tak jastak ri e ketamam nabe jacha' ri q'uexoj c'uxaj che qui takexic ri qui banic ri chac ri quec'aman bic pa ri cämical, ri cojonic che ri Dios," 
Hebrews6:2 ri tijonic chrij tak ri kajem pa tak ri ja', ri nak'atisabal ib che quich'ajic k'abaj, ri quic'astajic ri cäminakib xukuje' ri q'uisbal k'atan tzij." 
Hebrews6:3 Quekaban c'u wa', we je cuya' ri Dios." 
Hebrews6:4 Chque c'ut ri c'o jumul xquic'am ri sakilal, quinaom c'ut ri cochinic ri u yo'm ri Dios, xquita' c'ut u tzijol ri Ruxlabal ri Dios," 
Hebrews6:5 xquina' c'ut ri u tijonic ri Dios xukuje' ri u cuinem ri k'ijol aretak cäpe ri rajawinic ri Dios," 
Hebrews6:6 xquijech'obisaj c'u quib, man cäban ta chi cuinic chque quetzelex ruc' ri Dios, rumal rech chi cäquirip chi jumul pa que wi ri u C'ojol ri Dios, cäquesaj u q'uixbal." 
Hebrews6:7 Ri ulew q'ui mul cäkaj ri jäb puwi'. We ri ulew cuya' jun tico'n ri c'o u patan chque ri quetajinic, c'o ri u tewichibal ri Dios puwi'." 
Hebrews6:8 We c'u ri ulew cuya' q'uix xukuje' tzacam, ruc' ri u wächinic k'alaj chi man utz taj, c'o c'u chuxe' c'okonic. Chuq'uisbalil cäporox na." 
Hebrews6:9 Pune' je cujtzijon wa', ka jiquibam ka c'u'x chiwij, lok'alaj tak kachalal, chi ronojel ri quiban na ix sibalaj utz na, jas ri takal chiwe ix ri ix colotajinak chic." 
Hebrews6:10 Suc' ri Dios, man cäsach ta pa u jolom ri chac ri i banom chi xilok'ok'ej ri u bi' aretak xebipatanij ri cojonelab, xukuje' ne c'ä camic." 
Hebrews6:11 Sibalaj cäkaj chi chijujunal quicoj i chuk'ab c'ä pa ri q'uisbal junam ruc' ri xiban nabe, rech quiwetamaj chi kastzij c'o ri cu'lbal i c'u'x," 
Hebrews6:12 rech man quixux ta sak'orib, xane' chi quiban iwe jas ri cäquiban ri winak ri c'o qui cojonic, cäquich'ij c'u ri c'ax, cäquechbej c'u ri u bim ri Dios chi cuya' na chque." 
Hebrews6:13 Aretak ri Dios xuban ri chi'nic che ri Abraham, man c'o ta chi jun ri nim ta na u banic cucoj ri u c'aslemal che kastzij. Rumal ri' xucoj rib che u bixic ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na." 
Hebrews6:14 Xubij: “Kastzij sibalaj catintewichi'j na xukuje' quinya' na q'ui e awija'l.” 
Hebrews6:15 Ri Abraham c'ut xreyej na ruc' coch'onic, c'äte ri' xurik ri xbix che." 
Hebrews6:16 Aretak ri winak cuban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na, cäquicoj ri u bi' jun ri nim na chquiwäch, aretak caquijiquiba' jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na, man c'o ta chi u c'ulelaxic." 
Hebrews6:17 Rumal ri' ri Dios xch'aw ruc' ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na, che u c'utic chquiwäch ri quechben na ri u bim, chi man cuq'uex ta na ri u chomanic." 
Hebrews6:18 Ri Dios xuya' ri u tzij xukuje' ri jicalaj tzij ri man e q'uexel taj, ri Dios man cäcuin taj cuban tzij, rumal ri' sibalaj co cucu'bisaj ka c'u'x ri uj ri cäkatzucuj ri to'bal kib xukuje' ka chapom ri eyebal ka c'u'x ri yo'm chke." 
Hebrews6:19 Are wa' ri c'o pa ri kanima'. Co tac'alic je jas ri cätac'aban jun nim jucub, cuya' cäcu'bi ka c'u'x chrij. Are wa' coc bic c'ä chrij ri tasbal u pam ri rachoch Dios," 
Hebrews6:20 jawije' xoc wi ri Jesus rumal kech, aretak xux c'amal ka be xukuje' qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob amak'el chbe k'ij sak ri cäjunamataj ruc' ri Melquisedec." 
Hebrews7:1 Are c'u we Melquisedec ri', rajawinel ri Salem xukuje' cojol tabal tok'ob rech ri Dios ri c'o pa ri caj. Xel ulok che u c'ulaxic ri Abraham, aretak tzelejinak chi ulok che qui ch'äquic ri ajawinelab. Xutewichi'j c'u ri Abraham." 
Hebrews7:2 Ri Abraham xujach ri u lajujil ronojel che ri are'. Ri u bi' ri Melquisedec je quil cubij wa': “Ajawinel re suq'uil.” Are c'u ri tzij rajawinel ri Salem je quil cubij wa': “Ajawinel re jamaril.” 
Hebrews7:3 Man c'o ta u tzijol ri u tat mawi ri u nan, mawi ri e u mam, mawi catzijox ri ralaxic, mawi ri u cämical. Junam c'ut ruc' ri u C'ojol ri Dios, cojol tabal tok'ob chbe k'ij sak." 
Hebrews7:4 Chichomaj ba', sibalaj nim u banic ri Melquisedec. Che ri are' xuya' wi ri ka mam Abraham ojer ri u lajujil conojel ri jastak ri xumaj ulok pa ri ch'o'j." 
Hebrews7:5 Kastzij ri e rija'l ri Levi ri queboc che cojol tabal tok'ob, yo'm takanic chque chi cäquic'am ri u lajujil ronojel pa qui k'ab ri winak, jas cubij ri pixab. Ya'tal wa' chque pune' e cachalal xukuje' e cach rija'l ri Abraham." 
Hebrews7:6 Are c'u ri Melquisedec, pune' man rija'l ta ri Levi, xuc'am ri lajujil che ri Abraham. Xutewichi'j c'u ri Abraham ri u c'amom ri chi'nic che ri Dios." 
Hebrews7:7 Man c'o ta jachin cac'ulelanic chi ri cayo'w ri tewichi'nic are' nim na u k'ij chuwäch ri cac'amow ri tewichi'nic. 
Hebrews7:8 Waral ri cäquic'am ri lajujil, e winak ri e cämel. Are c'u ri tz'ibatalic cubij chi ri Melquisedec ri xuc'am ri lajujil c'ä c'aslic." 
Hebrews7:9 Cuya' c'ut cäkabij chi ri aj levitib ri cäquic'am ri lajujil camic, kas are' xeyo'w ri lajujil che ri Melquisedec rumal rech chi ri Abraham are' ri u mam ri Levi." 
Hebrews7:10 Ri Levi xa' c'u jun ruc' ri u mam Abraham, c'ä majok calc'ualax rumal, aretak ri Melquisedec xel ulok che u c'ulaxic ri Abraham." 
Hebrews7:11 Ri e aj Israel xquic'am ri pixab chuxe' ri qui takanic ri levitib ri e cojol tabal tok'ob, e are' rija'l ri Aaron. We ta ba' ronojel xuban tz'akat cuc' ri e are', ma ta rajawaxic ri' chi cäwalij ta jun cojol tabal tok'ob chic jas ri cäjunamataj ruc' ri Melquisedec, ri man cäjunamataj taj ruc' ri Aaron." 
Hebrews7:12 We queq'uextaj c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob, rajawaxic xukuje' u q'uexic ri pixab." 
Hebrews7:13 Are c'u ri Kajaw ri je cäbix wa' chrij, jun chi wi ri ramak' aj Israel ojer, ri man c'o ta jun chque ri ramak' oquinak che cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Hebrews7:14 K'alaj c'ut chi ri Kajaw, ri ramak' ojer are ri Juda. Man c'o ta c'u jas xubij ri Moises chque ri e ramak' ri Juda chi queboc che cojol tabal tok'ob." 
Hebrews7:15 Are c'u sibalaj k'alaj na, we cäwalij jun cojol tabal tok'ob chic jas ri Melquisedec," 
Hebrews7:16 ri man cojom ta rumal ri pixab ri cubij jachique ija'lil rajawaxic cäpe wi, xane' rumal ri u cuinem ri c'aslemal ri man q'uisel taj." 
Hebrews7:17 Cäk'alajisax c'u chrij rumal ri Dios: “At cojol tabal tok'ob amak'el chbe k'ij sak, ri cäjunamataj ruc' ri Melquisedec.”" 
Hebrews7:18 Kastzij ri ojer takanic xchup rumal rech ri u tukaril, man c'o ta u patan." 
Hebrews7:19 Man c'o ta xtz'akatisax rumal ri u pixab ri Moises. Xpe c'u jun cu'lbal ka c'u'x ri sibalaj utz na, rumal wa' cujkeb ruc' ri Dios." 
Hebrews7:20 Ri Dios xujiquiba' u bixic wa' ruc' jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na. Ri niq'uiaj e cojol tabal tok'ob man ruc' ta qui bixic jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na xeboc che cojol tabal tok'ob. 
Hebrews7:21 Aretak xcoj ri Ajawaxel, xban jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na. Ri Dios xubij che: “Xubij ri Ajawaxel ruc' chi'nic ri kas cäban na, man cuq'uex ta c'u ri u chomanic: ‘At cojol tabal tok'ob chbe k'ij sak.’ ”" 
Hebrews7:22 Je c'u ri' ri Jesus are' ri cajiquiban jun c'ulwächinic ri utz na chuwäch ri nabe. 
Hebrews7:23 Sibalaj e q'ui e oquinak can che cojol tabal tok'ob, xak xeboc'owic, rumal rech chi chquijujunal xecämic, man xec'oji' ta q'ui junab." 
Hebrews7:24 Are c'u ri Jesus, rumal rech chi cäc'oji' amak'el chbe k'ij sak, oquinak che cojol tabal tok'ob, ri man k'axal taj." 
Hebrews7:25 Jeri' cäcuin che qui colic chbe k'ij sak ri winak ri quekeb ruc' ri Dios rumal are', rumal rech chi c'asal amak'el rech cubochi'j ri Dios paquiwi'." 
Hebrews7:26 Je qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob wa' ri rajawaxic chke: tastalic man c'o ta retzelal, ch'ajch'oj, u tasom rib chquij ri e ajmaquib, walijisam sibalaj c'u chicaj na c'o wi che ri caj." 
Hebrews7:27 Man rajawaxic ta che chi ronojel k'ij cucämisaj ta jun awaj che tabal tok'ob cho ri Dios nabe paquiwi' ri u mac ri are', te c'u ri' paquiwi' ri qui mac ri winak, jas cäquiban ri niq'uiaj e cojol tabal tok'ob. Xa' c'u jumul chbe k'ij sak ri Jesus xuya' tabal tok'ob, aretak xuya' ri u c'aslemal cho ri ripibal." 
Hebrews7:28 Ri u pixab ri Moises quebucoj jacha' che qui nimal cojol tabal tok'ob achijab ri man e tz'akat taj, are c'u ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na ri xuban ri Dios, ri c'äte xbanic aretak bantajinak chic ri pixab, cucoj che qui nimal cojol tabal tok'ob ri u C'ojol, ri bantajinak che chi tz'akatinak che chbe k'ij sak." 
Hebrews8:1 Ri u c'u'x ri ka bim are wa': Chi je u beya'l wa' ri qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri kech uj xt'uyi' chicaj pa ri u wiquiak'ab ri u tem ri Dios re ajawibal, ri nim u k'ij ri c'o pa ri caj," 
Hebrews8:2 are c'u cojol tabal tok'ob ri cäpatanin pa ri kas k'ijilabal ri xban rumal ri Ajawaxel, man rumal ta winak." 
Hebrews8:3 Ronojel qui nimal ri e cojol tak tabal tok'ob cojom che qui ya'ic sipanic xukuje' tabal tak tok'ob. Je c'u ri' ri Jesucrist rajawaxic chi xukuje' ri are' c'o jas cuya'o. 
Hebrews8:4 We ta c'o ri Jesucrist cho ri uwächulew, ma ta cojol tabal tok'ob ri'. C'ä e c'o c'u na cojol tabal tok'ob ri cäquiya' sipanic jas ri cubij ri pixab." 
Hebrews8:5 E are c'u wa' quepatanin pa jun k'ijilabal ri xa' e u wächbal xukuje' e u mu'jal ri c'o chicaj. Jas ri xbix che ri Moises aretak xa' co'l man cuchaplej u banic ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re Rikoj ib: “Chawila', chabana' ronojel jas ri u wächbal ri xc'ut chawäch pa ri juyub.”" 
Hebrews8:6 Are c'u ri camic ri Jesus u c'amom jun chac ri sibalaj nim na u k'ij chuwäch ri qui chac ri e cojol tabal tok'ob. Are' ri cojol tzij re jun c'ulwächinic ri utz na chuwäch ri c'ulwächinic ri xc'oji' can cuc'. Ri c'ulwächinic re camic tiquibam paquiwi' chi'nic ri e utz na chuwäch ri c'ulwächinic re nabe. 
Hebrews8:7 We ta ri nabe c'ulwächinic junam ta xel ruc' ri u chomanic ri Dios, ma ta xajwataj ta chi ri' ri ucab c'ulwächinic." 
Hebrews8:8 Xubij c'u ri Dios aretak xuk'alajisaj ri qui mac ri winak: “Cächa' ri Ajawaxel: ‘Chiwilampe', quepe na ri k'ij, aretak quinban na jun c'ac' c'ulwächinic ruc' ri Israel xukuje' ruc' ri Juda." 
Hebrews8:9 We c'ulwächinic' man je taj jas ri xinban cuc' ri e qui mam pa ri k'ij aretak xebenc'am che ri qui k'ab che quesaxic ulok pa Ejipt; rumal c'u rech chi ri e are' man xquitz'akatisaj taj ri nu c'ulwächinic, ri in xebenya' canok,’ cächa' ri Ajawaxel." 
Hebrews8:10 ‘Oc'owinak chic ri k'ij ri', are' wa' ri c'ulwächinic ri quinban na cuc' ri e aj Israel,’ cächa' ri Ajawaxel: ‘Quebenya' na ri nu pixab pa ri qui chomanic, pa ri canima' quintz'ibaj wi na. In quinux qui Dios are c'u ri e are' quebux na nu tinimit." 
Hebrews8:11 Man quequitijola' ta chi na chquijujunal ri cachalal rech cäquich'ob u wäch ri Ajawaxel. Rumal rech chi conojel cäquich'ob na nu wäch, chi e ch'utik chi e nimak." 
Hebrews8:12 Ri in c'ut man quinc'äjisaj ta na qui wäch rumal rech ri etzelal ri qui banom, man quenataj ta chic ri qui mac xukuje' ri quetzelal chwe.’ ”" 
Hebrews8:13 Aretak ri Dios cubij chi c'o jun c'ac' c'ulwächinic, cuban k'e'l che ri nabe. Are c'u ri cabixic chi k'e'l chic, cutakej c'u k'elobic, chanim cäsach na u wäch." 
Hebrews9:1 Ri nabe c'ulwächinic xec'oji' u cholajil che ri k'ijilanic, pa jun k'ijilabal c'ut aj uwächulew." 
Hebrews9:2 Jewa' ri u suc'umaxic ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re Rikoj ib. Pa ri nabe u tasbal ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios xec'oji' wi ri tzuc'ulibal, ri mexa xukuje' ri caxlanwa ri e cojom cho ri Dios. Ri nabe u tasbal ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios cäbix Tastalic C'olbal che." 
Hebrews9:3 Chrij ri ucab tasbal, xc'oji' wi jun k'ijilabal ri cäbix Sibalaj Tastalicalaj C'olbal che." 
Hebrews9:4 Chila' xc'oji' wi jun porobal coc'al re k'an puak, xukuje' ri u caxa ri c'ulwächinic. Ri u caxa ri c'ulwächinic ronojel ch'ukutal rij che k'an puak. Chupam c'u wa' xc'oji' wi jun tzima re k'an puak ri xc'oji' wi ri jaswa', ri u ch'imiy ri Aaron ri xtuxic, xukuje' ri tz'alam tak abaj ri tz'ibam wi ri c'ulwächinic." 
Hebrews9:5 Puwi' ri u caxa ri c'ulwächinic e c'o wi ri qui wächbal ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic' ri xemujisan puwi' ri tz'apibal. We jastak ri' man cuya' taj quetzijox camic chquijujunal. 
Hebrews9:6 Je c'u banom chque we jastak ri', amak'el queboc ri cojol tabal tok'ob pa ri nabe u pam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios rech catz'akat ri k'ijilanic cho ri Dios." 
Hebrews9:7 Pa ri ucab c'u u pam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios, xa' jumul pa ri jun junab coc ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob chupam. Aretak coc bic, rajawaxic chi ruc'am quic' ri cuya' chuwäch ri Dios rumal quech ri u mac ri are' xukuje' rumal quech ri qui mac ri winak." 
Hebrews9:8 Jeri' ri Ruxlabal ri Dios cuc'utu' chi, aretak c'ä cäc'oji' na ri nabe u tasbal ri k'ijilabal, ri be ri coc chupam ri Sibalaj Tastalicalaj C'olbal c'ä maja' catortajic." 
Hebrews9:9 Are c'u ri' c'ambal no'j pa ri k'ij camic. Ri winak ri cäquiya' sipanic xukuje' quequicämisaj awaj che tabal tok'ob cho ri Dios, man cuya' ta rumal ri qui k'ijilanic cäquina' pa ri canima' chi ma ta c'o qui mac," 
Hebrews9:10 rumal rech chi xak takanic wa' chquij jastak ri quebilitajic, chrij ri wa, ja' xukuje' q'ui qui wäch ch'ajanic. Ri xuwi c'o qui patan aretak c'ämajok chuban ri Dios ri q'uextajem." 
Hebrews9:11 Aretak c'u petinak chic ri Crist, ri qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob, ri cojom paquiwi' ri utzalaj tak jastak ri quepe na. Cäpatanin pa ri k'ijilabal ri nim na u banic, ri sibalaj tz'akat, ri man banom ta rumal qui k'ab ri winak; quel cubij wa' chi man aj uwächulew taj." 
Hebrews9:12 Ri Crist xoc pa ri Sibalaj Tastalicalaj C'olbal man rumal ta qui quiq'uel ama'ib tak q'uisic' mawi ri quech ri alaj ama'ib tak wacax, xane' rumal ri u quiq'uel ri are'. Xa' jumul oquinak chbe k'ij sak, bantajinak chic ri junalic kacolotajic." 
Hebrews9:13 Kastzij chi ri qui quiq'uel ri ama'ib tak wacax xukuje' tak q'uisic, xukuje' ri e u chajil ri ati't wacax ri canicowisax puwi' ri porobal, ri e chicom paquiwi' ri e tz'ilobitajinak, e c'o qui cuinem che qui tasic xukuje' che qui ch'ajch'ojisaxic chquij," 
Hebrews9:14 ¡e ta c'u lo ri u quiq'uel ri Crist, ri xuya' rib rumal ri junalic Uxlabaxel, man tz'ajtajinak taj chuwäch ri Dios, quebujosk'ij na ri retamabal ka c'u'x ruc' ri quesaxic ri cäminak tak chac, rech cäkak'ijilaj ri c'aslic Dios!" 
Hebrews9:15 Rumal ri' ri Crist are ri ch'awenel aj jun c'ac' c'ulwächinic, rech ri e siq'uitalic caquic'am ri junalic echbal ri chi'talic, camic c'ut cäminak ri are' che quesaxic ri macaj ri e ban tajinak chuxe' ri nabe c'ulwächinic." 
Hebrews9:16 Jawije' c'u ri c'o wi jun c'ulwächinic, rajawaxic cäk'alajisaxic chi xcäm ri jun ri xbanow ri c'ulwächinic." 
Hebrews9:17 Rumal ri cämical co cätiquibax ri c'ulwächinic. Man c'o ta c'u u patan aretak c'ä c'asal ri xbanow ri c'ulwächinic. 
Hebrews9:18 Rumal ri' ri nabe c'ulwächinic xukuje' xjekebax ruc' quic'. 
Hebrews9:19 Ri Moises, xebutzijoj conojel ri takanic re ri pixab chque conojel ri winak, xuc'am ri qui quiq'uel ri alaj tak ama'ib wacax xukuje' ri ama'ib tak q'uisic', xarachilaj ja', quiäk rismal chij ruc' u k'ab juwi' mesbal re hisop, xuchiquicha' ri u wujil ri pixab xukuje' conojel ri winak." 
Hebrews9:20 Xubij c'u chque: “Are' wa' ri u quiq'uel ri c'ulwächinic ri u yo'm wi takanic ri Dios chiwe.” 
Hebrews9:21 Junam xukuje' cuchiquicha' ri quic' puwi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios xukuje' paquiwi' conojel ri chacubal ri cäcoj che k'ijilanic che ri Dios. 
Hebrews9:22 Xa' co'l man conojel ri jastak rajawaxic quejosk'ix ruc' quic', jas ri cubij ri pixab, we man cäturuwisax quic', man cäsachtaj ta ri macaj." 
Hebrews9:23 Rajawaxic c'ut chi ri qui wächbal ri jastak aj chicaj quejosk'ix rumal ri qui cämisaxic awaj che tabal tok'ob cho ri Dios. Are' c'u ri jastak aj chicaj quejosk'ix rumal jun tabal tok'ob ri utz na chuwäch ri qui cämisaxic tak awaj. 
Hebrews9:24 Man xoc ta ri Crist pa ri k'ijilabal ri banom che qui k'ab ri winak, u wächbal ri kas k'ijilabal. Xane' xoc pa ri caj, camic c'ut cutac'aba' rib chuwäch ri Dios che ka q'uexwäch." 
Hebrews9:25 Ri qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob coc pa ri Sibalaj Tastalicalaj C'olbal chujunab ruc' quic', ri man u quiq'uel ta ri are'. Are c'u ri Crist man cuya' ta ri u c'aslemal q'ui mul che tabal tok'ob." 
Hebrews9:26 We ta jeri', ri Crist xajwataj ta ri' chi u rikom ta c'ax q'ui mul kas pa ri u tiquiritajic ri uwächulew. Man je ta c'ut, xane' camic xa' jumul xutac'aba' rib aretak cätajin cäq'uis ri k'ij junab, ri Crist xuya' ri u c'aslemal che tabal tok'ob che u sachic ri macaj." 
Hebrews9:27 K'atom c'ut paquiwi' ri winak chi xa' jumul quecämic, chwi chi c'u wa' ri k'atan tzij," 
Hebrews9:28 jeri' xukuje' ri Crist xa' jumul xya' che tabal tok'ob che resaxic ri qui mac ri e q'ui. Chucamul cäpe na, man che ta quesaxic ri macaj, xane' che qui colic ri winak ri queyem ri are'." 
Hebrews10:1 Are c'u ri pixab, ri xa' qui mu'jal ri utzalaj tak jastak ri quepe na, man are ta ri kas qui ca'yebal. Rumal ri', ri pixab mawi jumul cäcuin che u banic tz'akat chque ri winak ri quekeb chuwäch ri Dios cumal ri tabal tak tok'ob ri queya' chujunab." 
Hebrews10:2 We ta ri pixab xcuintaj che u banic tz'akat chque, xquitanaba' ta qui ya'ic tabal tak tok'ob, rumal rech chi e josk'im ta chic xukuje' cäquina' ta ri' pa ri canima' chi man c'o ta chi qui mac." 
Hebrews10:3 Rumal c'u ri qui ya'ic ri tabal tak tok'ob quenataj ri mac tak chque chujunab. 
Hebrews10:4 Man cäcuin ta ri qui quiq'uel ri alaj tak ama' wacax xukuje' ri ama' tak q'uisic' che quesaxic tak ri macaj. 
Hebrews10:5 Rumal ri', aretak ri Crist xpe cho ri uwächulew, xubij che ri Dios: “Man caj ta la tabal tok'ob, mawi sipanic, xane' xsuc'umaj la jun cuerp chwe." 
Hebrews10:6 Man quekaj ta chwäch la ri quichajirisaxic tak ri awaj xukuje' ri quicämisaxic tak ri awaj che tabal tok'ob che resaxic ri macaj. 
Hebrews10:7 Te c'u ri' xinbij: ‘Chilampe la, quinpe che u banic ri rayibal la, oh Dios, jas ri tz'ibatal chwij pa ri wuj.’ ”" 
Hebrews10:8 Nabe cubij chi ri Dios: “Man cäraj taj ri tabal tok'ob o ri qui ya'ic tak awaj o ri qui poroxic tak awaj che resaxic ri mac, mawi quekaj chuwäch. Jewa' cubij pune' ri pixab cätakanic chi queya' we jastak ri'.”" 
Hebrews10:9 Te c'u ri' cubij: “Chilampe la, quinpe che u banic ri rayibal la, oh Dios.” Aretak jewa' cubij, cuchup ri tabal tok'ob que awaj che u tac'abaxic jun jasach chic." 
Hebrews10:10 Rumal ri u rayibal ri Dios, banom tastalic tak winak chke, rumal rech chi ri Jesucrist xuya' ri u cuerp xa' jumul chbe k'ij sak." 
Hebrews10:11 Ronojel cojol tabal tok'ob cutac'aba' rib ronojel k'ij che k'ijilanic, jewa' cubano q'ui mul quebucämisaj tak awaj che tabal tok'ob cho ri Dios. Ri cubano mawi jumul cäcuin che quesaxic tak ri mac." 
Hebrews10:12 Aretak c'u we cojol tabal tok'ob ri' u chi'm chic re chbe k'ij sak jun xa' tabal tok'ob ri cäyo'w ri cuyubal macaj, xut'uyuba' c'u rib pa ri u wiquiak'ab ri Dios." 
Hebrews10:13 Te c'u ri' cäreyej na, c'ä queya' na ri u c'ulel chuxe' ri rakan." 
Hebrews10:14 Xa' ruc' jun sipanic, xebutz'akatisaj chbe k'ij sak ri banom tastalic tak winak chque." 
Hebrews10:15 Xukuje' ri Ruxlabal ri Dios cujiquiba' u bixic wa chke, aretak cubij:" 
Hebrews10:16 “Cächa' ri Ajawaxel: ‘Oc'owinak chic ri k'ij ri', are wa' ri nu c'ulwächinic ri quinban na cuc' ri winak, quebenya' na ri nu pixab pa ri canima', pa ri qui chomanic quintz'ibaj wi na." 
Hebrews10:17 Man quenataj ta chi na ri qui mac mawi ri quetzelal.’ ” 
Hebrews10:18 Jeri' aretak e sachtajinak chi ri macaj, man queya' ta chi tabal tok'ob che ri macaj." 
Hebrews10:19 Je c'u ri', wachalal, man cäkaxe'j ta kib che koquic pa ri Sibalaj Tastalicalaj C'olbal rumal ri u quiq'uel ri Jesucrist." 
Hebrews10:20 Ri are' xuban jun c'ac' be chke ri c'aslic, aretak xroc'owisaj ri tasbal u pam ri rachoch Dios, ri quel cubij wa' are ri u cuerp." 
Hebrews10:21 C'o c'u jun nimalaj ka cojol tabal tok'ob c'o chuwäch ri rachoch Dios. 
Hebrews10:22 Jeri' chujkeb chuwäch ri Dios, man ruc' ta quieb kanima', kas ruc' nimalaj ka cojonic, rumal rech chi chiquicham chi quic' pa ri kanima' rech cäkana' pa ri kanima' chi man c'o ta chi ka mac, xukuje' ch'ajtajinak chic ri ka cuerp ruc' ch'ajch'ojalaj ja'." 
Hebrews10:23 Co chujtac'al pa ri cu'lbal ka c'u'x, chkak'alajisaj chquiwäch ri winak, muban quieb ka c'u'x, rumal rech chi ri Dios cuya' chke jas ri u bim." 
Hebrews10:24 Kas chkilila' kib, chkapixbela kib che ri lok'ok'ebal ka c'u'x xukuje' ri utzalaj tak chac." 
Hebrews10:25 Mäkaya' can ri u mulixic kib, jas ri qui nak'atisabal jujun, xane' chkapixbela kib. Kas c'u chujoc na il rumal rech chi cakilo chi canakajin ri k'ij re ri Ajawaxel." 
Hebrews10:26 We cäkatakej u banic ri mac aretak ketamam chic ri kastzij, man c'o ta chi tabal tok'ob ri cäcanaj ta cho ri Dios che qui sachic ri mac." 
Hebrews10:27 Xane' xak cäkeyej ri k'atoj tzij xukuje' ri c'axalaj k'ak' ri cäsachow na qui wäch ri cäquiban qui c'ulel che ri Dios. 
Hebrews10:28 Apachin ri man cunimaj ta ri u pixab ri Moises, ruc' ri qui tzij quieb oxib ri queyo'w k'alajisanic chrij, cäcäm na, man cätok'obisax ta u wäch." 
Hebrews10:29 ¡E ta c'u lo ri jun ri cäretzelaj u wäch ri u C'ojol ri Dios, man nim ta cäril wi ri quic' ri xbanow tastalic winak che are', are ri quic' re ri u c'ulwächinic ri Dios cuc' ri winak, o cuyok' ri Uxlabaxel ri cäbanow tok'ob chke, sibalaj c'ax na ri c'äjisabal u wäch ri jun ri jewa' cubano!" 
Hebrews10:30 Keta'm jachin ri xbinic: “Wech in ri tojow q'uexel, in quintojow na,” cächa' ri Ajawaxel. Xukuje' cubij: “Ri Ajawaxel cuk'at na tzij paquiwi' ri winak re ri u tinimit.”" 
Hebrews10:31 Xibibal wa' we cäkaj jun pa ri u k'ab ri c'aslic Dios. 
Hebrews10:32 Chenataj ba' chiwe ri k'ij ri e oc'owinak, aretak ic'amowam chic ri chäj, xitij i chuk'ab xukuje' xich'ij q'ui c'axc'olil." 
Hebrews10:33 E c'o jujun chiwe xpe c'axc'olil paquiwi' aretak xeyok'ic xukuje' xquirik c'ax chquiwäch ri winak. E c'o jujun chic ri xquic'am que cuc' ri e c'o pa ri c'axc'olil ri'. 
Hebrews10:34 Xel c'u i c'u'x chque ri xec'oji' pa che'. Aretak xec'am bic ri jastak iwe, man xebicha' taj, xane' xc'oji' i quicotemal. Xich'obo chi c'o jun iwechbal chicaj ri utz na, ri man cäq'uis taj." 
Hebrews10:35 Mitzak ba' ri i jiquibam c'uxaj, we jiquibam c'uxaj ri' cuc'am na ulok jun nimalaj rajil c'axelal." 
Hebrews10:36 Ri ix rajawaxic chuk'ab chiwe pa ri c'axc'olil, aretak i banom ri u rayibal ri Dios, quic'am na jas ri u bim chi cuya' na." 
Hebrews10:37 “Xa' jubik' cäraj na, ri cäpe na cäpetic, man cäbeytaj taj." 
Hebrews10:38 Ri suc'alaj winak cäc'asi rumal ri cojonic. We c'u cätzelej chrij, man cäkaj ta chuwäch ri wanima'.”" 
Hebrews10:39 Ri uj c'ut man uj ta jun cuc' ri quetzelej chquij che u sachic qui wäch. Xane' uj jun cuc' ri c'o qui cojonic che u colic ri canima'. 
Hebrews11:1 Are wa' ri u banic ri ka cojonic: cäkacu'ba' ka c'u'x chi je quebel na ri jastak ri cäkaye'j, xukuje' keta'm pa kanima' chi kastzij e c'o ri jastak ri man queilitaj taj." 
Hebrews11:2 Xek'alajisax ri e ka mam chi utz xquibano rumal rech chi xc'oji' qui cojonic. 
Hebrews11:3 Rumal ri cojonic cäkach'obo chi xtiquiritaj ri uwächulew xukuje' ronojel ri c'olic rumal ri u tzij ri Dios, jeri' chi ri jastak ri man queilitaj taj, xbanbex que ri jastak ri quebilitajic." 
Hebrews11:4 Rumal ri cojonic, ri Abel xuya' jun tabal tok'ob cho ri Dios ri utz na chuwäch ri re ri Cain. Rumal ri' ri Dios xuk'alajisaj chi suc' xuc'am c'ut ri u sipanic ri xebuya'o. Jeri' ri Abel, pune' cäminak chic, c'ä c'o cubij chke camic rumal ri u cojonic." 
Hebrews11:5 Rumal ri cojonic, ri Enoc xk'axex chicaj, man xcäm taj. Man xriktaj ta chic, are c'u ri Dios xk'axenic. Aretak c'ä majok cäk'axexic, xk'alajisaxic chi xkaj chuwäch ri Dios." 
Hebrews11:6 We c'u man c'o cojonic, jun man cuya' taj cäkaj chuwäch ri Dios. Rajawaxic c'ut chi apachin ri cäkeb chuwäch ri Dios, chucojo' chi c'olic, xukuje' chi cuya' tojbal que ri winak ri cäquitzucuj ri are'." 
Hebrews11:7 Rumal ri cojonic, ri Noe aretak ri Dios xubij apan jastak che ri c'ä majok quebilitajic, xniman che ri Dios, xuban c'u ri jucub che qui colic ri e aj uwo rachoch. Rumal ri cojonic, xuk'alajisaj chi c'o qui mac ri winak ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew, xrechbej c'u ri suq'uil ri cäpe rumal ri cojonic." 
Hebrews11:8 Rumal ri cojonic, ri Abraham aretak xsiq'uixic, xnimanic xbe pa ri c'olbal ri cuc'am na che rechbal. Xel bic, pune' man reta'm ta c'ut jawije' cäbe wi." 
Hebrews11:9 Rumal ri cojonic, xc'oji' pa ri ulew ri u bim ri Dios chi cuya' na che, xc'oji' chila' pa tak lic'om ja, je jas pa jun ulew man rech taj. Je xukuje' xquiban ri Isaac xukuje' ri Jacob, ri xa' junam ruc' ri Abraham ri xbix ri chi'nic chque." 
Hebrews11:10 Ri Abraham reyem c'u jun tinimit ri e c'o cowilaj tak u tac'alibal, ri u banom ri Dios ruc' ri u chomanic xukuje' yacom rumal ri are'." 
Hebrews11:11 Xukuje' rumal ri cojonic, xya' che ri Sara chi cäc'oji' ri ral. Xalanic pune' nim winak chic xukuje' ri Abraham, rumal rech chi xucojo chi ri Dios cuya' na che jas ri u bim." 
Hebrews11:12 Rumal ri', che ri jun, ri xa' jubik' cäraj man cäcämic, xeq'uiy wi ulok e q'ui winak, ri man cuya' taj cajilaxic, je jas ri ch'imil re ri caj, je jas ri sanyeb chuchi' ri plo." 
Hebrews11:13 Conojel we winak ri' xecämic man xequic'amowaj ta c'ut ri jastak ri u chi'm ri Dios; rumal c'u rech chi c'o qui cojonic, xequil apan chi naj, utz c'u qui c'ulaxic xequibano, xquich'ob c'u quib chi man e aj waral taj chi xak e oc'owenelab cho we uwächulew ri'." 
Hebrews11:14 Are c'u ri je cäquibij wa', cäquic'utu chi cäquitzucuj jun qui tinimit chic." 
Hebrews11:15 We ta c'o pa qui jolom ri c'olbal ri xebel wi ulok, xecuin ta ri' xetzelejic." 
Hebrews11:16 Ri e are' c'ut sibalaj cäcaj jun c'olbal ri utz na, are wa' ri aj chicaj. Rumal ri' ri Dios man cäq'uix taj chi cäbinax qui Dios. U suc'umam chi c'u jun tinimit chque." 
Hebrews11:17 Rumal ri cojonic, aretak ri Abraham xtijtobex rumal ri Dios, ri are' xujach ri Isaac che ri Dios. Ri Abraham ri u c'amom ri chi'nic, xusuc'umaj ri u chi'xic ri Isaac ri u c'ojol ri xa' jun c'olic, jacha' che tabal tok'ob." 
Hebrews11:18 Pune' ri Dios xubij che ri Abraham: “Che ri Isaac queq'uiy wi na ri e awija'l.” 
Hebrews11:19 Ri Abraham reta'm chi ri Dios c'o u cuinem che qui c'astajisaxic ri cäminakib; rumal ri' ri Abraham xuc'am chi jumul ri u c'ojol jacha' pa ri cämical, je xux jun c'ambal no'j." 
Hebrews11:20 Rumal ri cojonic, ri Isaac xebutewichi'j ri Jacob xukuje' ri Esau, xubij chque ri jastak ri quepe na." 
Hebrews11:21 Rumal ri cojonic, ri Jacob aretak xa' co'lman cäcämic, xebutewichi'j ri ralc'ual ri Jose chquijujunal. Xuya' ri u k'ab puwi' ri u jolom ri ch'imiy, xuk'ijilaj ri Dios." 
Hebrews11:22 Rumal ri cojonic, ri Jose aretak xa' jubik' cäraj man cäcämic, xuchomaj apan ri quelic bic ri e ralc'ual ri Israel pa ri ulew re Ejipt, xukuje' xuya' takanic jas cäban na chque ri u bakil." 
Hebrews11:23 Rumal ri cojonic, aretak xalax ri Moises, cumal ri u tat u nan xcawaj oxib ic', rumal rech chi xquilo chi je'lalaj ac'al. Man xquixe'j ta quib chuwäch ri takanic ri yo'm rumal ri ajawinel." 
Hebrews11:24 Rumal ri cojonic, ri Moises aretak nim chic, man xraj ta chic cäc'oji' che ral ri u mia'l ri ajawinel aj Ejipt." 
Hebrews11:25 Xane' xucha' ri u rikic c'ax junam cuc' ri winak re ri u tinimit ri Dios, chuwäch ri u rikic quicotemal pa ri mac, ri xak rech quieb oxib k'ij." 
Hebrews11:26 Xuchomaj chi are nimalaj k'inomal na chi cäyok' rumal rech ri Crist, chuwäch ri k'inomal re Ejipt. Are xril apan ri tojbal re." 
Hebrews11:27 Rumal ri cojonic, xuya' can ri Ejipt, man xuxe'j ta rib chuwäch ri royowal ri ajawinel, xane' co tac'alic je ta ne chi cäril ri Dios ri man quilitaj taj." 
Hebrews11:28 Rumal ri cojonic, ri Moises xuban ri nimak'ij re Oc'owem xukuje' xuchiquicha' ri quic', rech ri tako'n aj caj ri quebucämisaj ri e nabeal man copan ta cuc' ri aj israelib." 
Hebrews11:29 Rumal ri cojonic, ri aj israelib xek'ax pa ri Quiäk Plo, je ta ne pa chaki'jalaj ulew. Aretak c'u ri e aj Ejipt, xcaj xek'ax chupam, xebik'tajic." 
Hebrews11:30 Rumal ri cojonic, xtzak ri tapia ri c'o chrij ri Jerico, aretak sutim chi rij wukub k'ij cumal ri aj israelib." 
Hebrews11:31 Rumal ri cojonic, ri Rahab, ri ixok quech nim ch'utin, man xcämisax ta junam cuc' ri man xeniman taj, rumal rech chi xebuc'ulaj ri achijab pa jamaril e solinel ri cäquil ri tinimit." 
Hebrews11:32 ¿Jas ta chi c'u ri quinbij? Man cätzijotaj ta ri Jedeon, ri Barac, ri Sanson, ri Jepte, ri David, ri Samuel, xukuje' tak ri e k'axal tak tzij." 
Hebrews11:33 Ri rumal ri cojonic jujun xequich'äc ajawibal, xquichacuj suq'uil, xequirik ri chi'm, xequitz'apij u pa qui chi' coj," 
Hebrews11:34 xquichup nimak tak k'ak', xquito' quib chuwäch ri qui ch'ich' ri quecämisanic, xya' chuk'ab chque pa ri qui tukaril, xc'oji' qui chuk'ab pa ri ch'o'j, xequich'äc tak ri cajch'ojab ri qui c'ulel." 
Hebrews11:35 Jujun ixokib xequic'am ri qui cäminakib rumal chi xec'astajic. E c'o jujun chic xquirik c'ax, man xcaj ta c'ut chi quecol chuwäch ri c'ax, churikic jun c'astajibal ri sibalaj utz na." 
Hebrews11:36 Jujun chic xetz'bex qui wäch, xech'ayic. Niq'uiaj chic xeximic, xeya' pa che'," 
Hebrews11:37 xecämisax che abaj, xek'at che jos; xecämisax che ch'ich'. Xak xebinicat pa tak ri c'olbal, qui cojom qui tz'umal chij xukuje' qui tz'umal q'uisic', sibalaj e mebayib, xquirik c'axc'olil, xeban c'ax chque." 
Hebrews11:38 Ri winak re ri uwächulew man takal ta chque quec'oji' ri winak ri' cuc'. Xebinicat pa tak chaki'j uwo sak, pa tak ri juyub, pa tak ri pec, xukuje' pa tak jul chupam ri ulew." 
Hebrews11:39 Conojel wa' rumal ri qui cojonic xek'alajisaxic chi utz qui banom. Man xquirik ta c'u ri u bim ri Dios chi cuya' na," 
Hebrews11:40 rumal rech chi ri Dios xuchomaj ulok jun jasach ri utz na chke ri uj, jeri' chi ri e are' quetz'akatisax na junam kuc' uj." 
Hebrews12:1 Jeri' xukuje' ri uj, ri sutim kij cumal e q'ui k'alajisanelab ri qui c'utum ri qui cojonic, chkesaj ronojel alal, chkesaj ri mac ri c'o chkij che ka chapic. Chkac'ama' kanim, chkach'ija' ruc' coch'onic ri xiq'uinem ri yo'm chkawäch." 
Hebrews12:2 Xuwi chkila' ri Jesus, ri xutiquirisaj xukuje' cutz'akatisaj na ri ka cojonic. Are xuch'ij ri ripibal man xuya' ta c'u u wäch che ri u q'uixbal ri xelic, rumal rech chi reta'm chi curik na quicotemal. Xt'uyi' c'u pa ri u wiquiak'ab ri u tem ri Dios re ajawibal." 
Hebrews12:3 Chichomaj rij ri jun ri xuch'ij ronojel ri c'ax ri xban che cumal ajmaquib, rech man quixcos taj, man quixk'itaj ta pa ri iwanima'." 
Hebrews12:4 Maja' quitij i chuk'ab c'ä ruc' ri i quiq'uel, aretak quitij i chuk'ab chrij ri mac." 
Hebrews12:5 Sachinak chic pa i jolom ri pixbenic ri cuya' ri Dios chiwe, jas ri cuya' jun tataxel chque ri e ralc'ual, ri cubij pa ri Tz'ibatalic: “Walc'ual, nim cawil wi ri c'äjisabal a wäch rumal ri Ajawaxel, matk'itajic aretak cäk'alajisax ri a mac rumal." 
Hebrews12:6 Ri Ajawaxel cuc'äjisaj u wäch apachin ri culok'ok'ej, ronojel ri cuc'am che ralc'ual, curapuj.”" 
Hebrews12:7 Aretak cäc'äjisax i wäch, chich'ija' wa'. Ri Dios cuban chiwe jas cuban jun tataxel chque ri e ralc'ual. ¿Jachin lo ri alc'ualaxel ri ma ta cäc'äjisax u wäch rumal ri u tat?" 
Hebrews12:8 Conojel alc'ualaxelab cäquic'am que ri c'äjisabal qui wäch. We man cäc'äjisax i wäch, ix ba' ri' ri man k'alaj ta u wäch i tat, man ix ta kas alc'ualaxelab." 
Hebrews12:9 Xukuje' ri ka tat cho ri uwächulew xquic'äjisaj ka wäch, nim c'u xekil wi. ¿La ma ta are utz na cäkaya' na kib pa takic che ri ka Tat ri c'o chicaj, rech cujc'asi' na?" 
Hebrews12:10 E are ri ka tat xa' quieb oxib k'ij xquic'äjisaj ka wäch jas ri xquichomaj chi utz. Are c'u ri Dios cuc'äjisaj ka wäch rech c'o cäkechbej che xukuje' rech cuban tastalic tak winak chke, jas ri are' tastalic Dios." 
Hebrews12:11 Man c'o ta jun, aretak cäc'äjisax u wäch, ri cuchomaj chi quicotemal pa ri k'ij ri', xane' bisobal. C'äte chi c'ut cuya' na jamaril xukuje' suq'uil pa ri u c'aslemal ri xc'äjisax u wäch, jas jun tico'n cuya' wächinic." 
Hebrews12:12 Rumal rech wa', chicojo' qui chuk'ab ri i k'ab ri man c'o ta qui chuk'ab xukuje' ri i ch'ec ri man quechacun ta chic." 
Hebrews12:13 Chebibana' suc'alaj tak qui be ri iwakan, rech ri ch'oco'j man cujal ta u be, xane' cäcunatajic." 
Hebrews12:14 Chicojo' ri chuk'ab che ri c'olem pa jamaril cuc' conojel xukuje' ri ruc'axic jun tastalic c'aslemal; we c'u man jewa', man c'o ta jun cäcuinic querila' u wäch ri Ajawaxel." 
Hebrews12:15 Chiwila' c'o jun chiwe muya' can ri tok'ob ri cäban chiwe rumal ri Dios, o muban je ta ne jun c'ayalaj k'ayes ri cuban c'ax chque ri niq'uiaj chic xukuje' quebuchuwirisaj," 
Hebrews12:16 c'o jun muban macunic cuc' ixokib achijab, o märetzelaj u wäch ri jastak re ri Dios, jas xuban ri Esau, ri xuc'ayij ri u nabealil che u q'uexwäch jun lak riquil." 
Hebrews12:17 Iweta'm c'ut, aretak are ta xraj xuc'am ri u tewichibal ri u tat, man xya' ta chi che. Man xya' ta c'u che chi cuq'uex ri u banom canok, pune' sibalaj xok'ic." 
Hebrews12:18 Man ix opaninak taj chunakaj ri juyub ri cuya' cämakamaxic, ri cänicow pa k'ak', chunakaj ri k'ekmuj, ri k'eku'm xukuje' ri nimalaj quiakik'." 
Hebrews12:19 Man i tom ta ri rok'ebal ri trompet xukuje' ri u ch'abal ri Dios ri xtzijonic. Ri winak ri xquito xquibochi'j chi c'o chi jun tzij mäbix chque," 
Hebrews12:20 rumal rech chi man quecuin ta che u ch'ijic jas ri xetakan wi: “We c'o jun ri cänakajin cho ri juyub, pune' jun awaj, chäcämisax che abaj.”" 
Hebrews12:21 Sibalaj xibibal ri xquilo, jeri' chi xubij ri Moises: “Quinxe'j wib, quinbirbitic.”" 
Hebrews12:22 Are c'u ri ix ix opaninak chunakaj ri juyub Sion, chunakaj ri u tinimit ri c'aslic Dios, ri Jerusalen aj chicaj, chquiwäch e q'uialaj mil tako'n aj caj ri qui mulin quib." 
Hebrews12:23 Ix opaninak cuc' ri nabeal tak winak re ri comon cojonelab, ri qui mulin quib, ri e tz'ibam qui bi' pa ri caj. Ix opaninak chunakaj ri Dios, ri qui K'atal Tzij conojel, chquiwäch ri cuxlabal ri suc'alaj tak winak ri e tz'akatisam chic." 
Hebrews12:24 Ix opaninak chunakaj ri Jesus, ri ch'awenel re ri c'ac' u c'ulwächinic, xukuje' chunakaj ri u quiq'uel ri xchiquichaxic, ri c'o na ri cubij chuwäch ri u quiq'uel ri Abel." 
Hebrews12:25 Rumal ri' chixoc il mixutuj ri cujch'abenic. E are' tak c'ut ri xquixutuj ri Dios aretak xepixbex rumal waral cho ri uwächulew, man xeto'tajtaj. Mawi c'u ne ri uj man cujto'tajtaj, we are cakaya' ri uwo kachak chuwäch ri cujpixben kas pa ri caj." 
Hebrews12:26 Are' ri u ch'abal ri Dios xslabesan ri uwächulew ojer. Camic c'ut cubij: “Jumul chi na quinslabesaj man xuwi ta ri uwächulew xane' xukuje' ri caj.” 
Hebrews12:27 Ri tzij ri', “Jumul chi na”, cubij chi quebesax na ri jastak ri queslabesaxic, are ri e bantajinak, rech quec'oji' na ri jastak ri man queslab taj." 
Hebrews12:28 Ri ajawibal ri cäkac'am che ri Dios, are man slabel taj. Chujmaltioxin ba' che ri Dios, chkak'ijilaj ri Dios jas ri cäkaj chuwäch, nim chkila' wi, chujmach'al chwäch." 
Hebrews12:29 Rumal rech chi ri ka Dios are je ta ne jun k'ak' ri ronojel cuporoj canok. 
Hebrews13:1 Chäjekel ri lok'ok'enic aj achalaxic chixo'l. 
Hebrews13:2 Mäsach pa i jolom ri u ya'ic okxanibal chque ri winak. Rumal c'u wa' jujun man xquich'ob taj chi xquiya' okxanibal chque ri tako'nib aj caj. 
Hebrews13:3 Chenataj ri e c'o pa che' chiwe, je ta ne ri ix jun cuc'. Chenataj chiwe ri winak ri cäban c'ax chque, je ta ne ri quina' pa ri i cuerp ix ri c'ax ri qui rikom." 
Hebrews13:4 Iwonojel nim chiwila' wi ri c'ulanem. Mitz'iloj ri c'ulanem, ri Dios cuk'ata' c'u na tzij paquiwi' ri quemacun cuc' ixokib achijab, xukuje' ri quekaj pa mac cuc' niq'uiaj chic." 
Hebrews13:5 Milok'ok'ej ri puak, chubana' chiwe ri c'o iwuc'. U bim c'u ri Dios: Man catintzokopij ta canok mawi catinya' canok." 
Hebrews13:6 Je c'u ri' cäcu'bi ka c'u'x, cuya' cäkabij: “Ri Ajawaxel are to'l wech, man quinxe'j ta wib chuwäch ri cäquiban na ri winak chwe.”" 
Hebrews13:7 Chenataj ri c'amal tak i be chiwe, ri xquitzijoj ri u tzij ri Dios chiwe. Chiwila' jas ri elinak wi ri qui c'aslemal. Chc'ol iwuc' ri cojonic ri c'o cuc'." 
Hebrews13:8 Ri Jesucrist kas xak jewi iwir, camic, xukuje' amak'el chbe k'ij sak." 
Hebrews13:9 Mixc'amalax bic cumal jule' tak tijonic chic ri e jalan chi wi. Are c'u utz na chi co quitiquiba' ri iwanima' chrij ri u tok'ob ri Dios, man chrij ta ri wa ja'. Ri je qui banom wa' man c'o ta xquechbej." 
Hebrews13:10 Jun chi wi ri tabal tok'ob kech uj, ri man ya'tal ta chque ri cojol tak tabal tok'ob re ri k'ijilabal chi cäquitij ta quech." 
Hebrews13:11 Ri awaj ri cäcoj ri qui quiq'uel pa ri Sibalaj Tastalicalaj C'olbal rumal ri qui nimal ri cojol ri tabal tok'ob rumal rech ri mac. Ri qui cuerp ri awaj ri' queporox tza'm ja. 
Hebrews13:12 Rumal ri', xukuje' ri Jesus xurik c'ax chrij ri tinimit, che u banic tastalic tak winak rumal ri u quiq'uel." 
Hebrews13:13 Chujel ba' apan ruc' ri Jesus tza'm ja. Chujyok' cumal ri winak, jas ri are' xyok'ic." 
Hebrews13:14 Man c'o ta c'u ka tinimit waral ri cojc'oji' ta wi na amak'el, xane' are sibalaj cäkatzucuj ri cäpe na." 
Hebrews13:15 Rumal ri' amak'el chujk'ijilan che ri Dios rumal ri Jesucrist. We k'ijilanic ri' are' ri tabal tok'ob ri rajawaxic cakachi'j. ¡Kak'ijilaj ba', cuc' tak ri e ka chi'!" 
Hebrews13:16 Chibana' utzil. Chijachala' ri jastak iwech chbil iwib. Mäsach wa' pa i jolom. Je tak sipanic wa' quekaj chuwäch ri Dios. 
Hebrews13:17 Chixniman chque ri c'amal tak i be, chiya' iwib pa takic chque. Ri e are' quequichajij ri iwanima', queta'm c'ut chi rajawaxic cäquibij na che ri Dios jas ri qui banom. Chixniman chque rech cäquiban ri qui chac ruc' quicotemal, man ruc' ta bis. We ta c'u ruc' bis cäquibano, ma ta c'o quiwechbej ri' che." 
Hebrews13:18 Chibana' ch'awem ruc' Dios pakawi'. Kas cäkana' pa ri kanima' chi man c'o ta etzelal ka banom. Cäkaj c'ut chi utz cujbin pa ronojel. 
Hebrews13:19 Sibalaj quixinbochi'j chi chibana' ch'awem ruc' Dios panuwi', rech sibalaj chanim quintzelej chi na bic iwuc'." 
Hebrews13:20 Are ba' ri Dios ri cäyo'w jamaril chixo'l, ri xc'astajisan ri Kajaw Jesucrist chquixo'l ri cäminakib, are wa' ri nimalaj Cajyuk' ri chij rumal ri quic' re ri junalic c'ulwächinic," 
Hebrews13:21 are chixutz'akatisaj che u banic ronojel u wäch utzalaj tak chac, xukuje' che u banic ri u rayibal. Ri are' chubana' pa ri i c'aslemal jas ri cäkaj chuwäch rumal ri Jesucrist. Che c'u ri are' chyok wi juluwem amak'el chbe k'ij sak. Je chbanok." 
Hebrews13:22 Quixinbochi'j, wachalal, chicoch'o ri tzij re pixbenic. Xa' c'u jubik' ri nu tz'ibam bic iwuc'." 
Hebrews13:23 Quinwaj chi quiwetamaj chi ri kachalal Timotey xtzokopixic. We cäpe chanim, quinbe che iwilic junam ruc'." 
Hebrews13:24 Chiya' rutzil qui wäch conojel ri c'amal tak i be xukuje' conojel ri tastalic tak winak. Ri e aj Ital cäquiya' rutzil i wäch. 
Hebrews13:25 Are ta ri Dios cuban tok'ob chiwe chi nimalaj iwonojel. 
James1:1 In Santiag, u lok'om pataninel ri Dios xukuje' rech ri Ajaw Jesucrist, quinya' rutzil qui wäch ri cablajuj ramak' ri Israel ri qui jabum quib pa ronojel ri uwächulew." 
James1:2 Wachalal, chichomaj chi are ronojel i quicotemal wa' aretak quepe ronojel qui wäch c'ambejenic piwi'." 
James1:3 Iweta'm c'ut chi aretak quepe jastak chiwij che u k'alajisaxic ri i cojonic, jeri' quiwetamaj chich'ija' ri c'ax." 
James1:4 Chiya' ba' chi quiwetamaj quich'ij ronojel u wäch c'ax, rech quixux tz'akat xukuje' xak are', man c'o ta jas cäraj na chiwe." 
James1:5 We c'u c'o jun chiwe c'ä c'o cäraj ri u no'j, chuta' che ri Dios, cäyataj c'u na. Ri Dios cuya' chque conojel, man xak ta jubik' cuya'o, xukuje' aretak cäyataj rumal, man cäyok'on taj." 
James1:6 Chuta' ba' ruc' cojonic, c'o jas muban wi quieb u c'u'x che. Apachin c'u ri cuban quieb u c'u'x, xa' junam ruc' ri u k'et ri plo, ri cäslabesax rumal ri quiakik', cäq'uiak jeri', cäq'uiak jela'." 
James1:7 Muchomaj ba' ri winak ri' chi c'o cuc'am che ri Ajawaxel. 
James1:8 Ri winak ri quieb ranima' xak cäbak'otic pa conojel ri u be. 
James1:9 Ri achalaxel ri mach'alic rajawaxic cuna' rib chi nim u banic we ri Dios cunimarisaj u k'ij. 
James1:10 Are c'ut ri k'inom rajawaxic chi cuna' rib chi utz c'olic we camach'irisax rumal ri Dios. Ri k'inom xak junam ruc' ri u cotz'ijal ri k'ayes ri man cäbeytaj taj. 
James1:11 Aretak c'u quel ulok ri k'ij ruc' ri u k'ak'al, cuchaki'jarisaj ri k'ayes, ri u cotz'ijal cätzakic, cäsach u wäch ri je'lalaj u ca'yebal. Jewa' xukuje' ri k'inom coc'ow na pa tak ri cubano." 
James1:12 Caquirik ri quicotemal ri winak ri cucoch' ri c'ambejenic ruc' nimalaj chuk'ab, aretak c'u quilitajic chi ch'äcaninak cuc'am na ri c'aslemal che tojbal rech, are c'u corona wa' ri u chi'm ri Dios chque ri quelok'ok'en che." 
James1:13 Aretak cätakchi'x jun che mac, mubij ba': “Xintakchi'x che mac rumal ri Dios.” Are c'u ri Dios man cuya' taj cätakchi'x che mac, mawi cuya' cätakchi'n che mac." 
James1:14 Xane' ri winak chquijujunal quetakchi'x che mac, aretak benak qui c'u'x chrij ri qui rayibal ri e are', quec'am bic rumal." 
James1:15 Ri qui rayibal ri winak cäralc'ualaj ri mac. Ri mac c'ut, aretak tz'akatinak chic, cäralc'ualaj ri cämical." 
James1:16 Lok'alaj tak wachalal, mixsubutajic." 
James1:17 Ronojel utzalaj sipanic, ronojel tz'akatalaj sipanic chicaj cäpe wi. Cäkaj ulok ruc' ri Dios ri xebuban ri sakil chicaj. Ri are' man cäq'uextaj taj. Ruc' ri are' man c'o ta u nanoch' ri q'uextajic." 
James1:18 Ri are' xuchomaj jas cuban na, xuya' ka c'aslemal rumal ri tzij re kastzij, rech cujux jujun nabe tak qui wächinic ri jastak ri e banom rumal." 
James1:19 Rumal wa', lok'alaj tak wachalal, chijujunal chanim chitatabej ri u tzij ri jun chic, chixbeytaj che tzijonic, chixbeytaj che oyowal," 
James1:20 are' c'u ri winak ri coyowaric man are' ta cuban ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Dios. 
James1:21 Rumal rech wa' chiwesaj bic ronojel ri tz'ilol xukuje' ronojel ri sibalaj iwetzelal. Minimarisaj i k'ij, chic'ama' ri tzij ri ticom, ri cäcuin che u colic ri iwanima'." 
James1:22 Chinimaj ri tzij, chibana' jas ri cubij, man xuwi ta quita' ri tzij. We ta xak je quibano, quisub iwib." 
James1:23 We c'o c'u jun ri xak cuta' ri tzij, man cunimaj taj, are ri' xa' junam ruc' jun achi ri cuca'yej ri u palaj pa jun ca'yebal ib." 
James1:24 Kas cuca'yej bi rib, cäbe c'ut, chanim cäsach pa u jolom jas ri u banic." 
James1:25 Apachin ri cäretamaj jas cubij ri tz'akatalaj pixab ri quebutzokopij ri winak, ri man cuya' ta can ri pixab, ri man xuwi ta cuto xukuje' cusach ta ri u tom, xane' cubano jas cubij ri pixab, utz c'u re wa' pa ri chac ri cubano." 
James1:26 We c'o jun chixo'l ri cuchomaj chi cuk'ijilaj ri Dios, ri man cätakan ta c'u puwi' ri rak' xane' cusub ri ranima', ri u k'ijilanic ri are' che ri Dios man c'o ta u patan." 
James1:27 Ri k'ijilanic che ri Dios ri kas ch'ajch'oj, ri man tz'ajtal ta chuwäch ri Dios Tataxel are wa': Chi quekilij ri malca'nib xukuje' ri man c'o ta chic qui tat qui nan, ri e c'o pa c'axc'olil, xukuje' chi cäkachajij kib man cakatz'aj ta kib, man cakaban ta ri etzelal re ri uwächulew." 
James2:1 Wachalal, pa ri i cojonic che ri juluwemalaj Kajaw Jesucrist, jalan mebiwil wi tak ri winak, xane' junam chebiwila wi conojel." 
James2:2 We coc bic pa ri i mulin ib jun achi ri e u cojom tak mulk'ab re k'an puak xukuje' je'lalaj ratz'iak, we xukuje' coc bic jun meba' ri u cojom k'e'l ratz'iak," 
James2:3 we c'u nim quiwil wi ri u cojom je'lalaj ratz'iak quibij c'u che: “Chatt'uyul waral ri utz wi”, quibij c'u che ri meba': “Chattac'al chila', o chatt'uyul waral puwi' ri qui tac'alibal ri wakan”," 
James2:4 ¿la ma ta quiya' na u k'ij jun winak chuwäch jun chic? ¿La ma ta quik'at tzij paquiwi' ri winak ruc' itzel tak i chomanic? 
James2:5 Lok'alaj tak wachalal, chitatabej ri nu tzij: Ri Dios e u cha'om ri mebayib re we uwächulew ri', chi e are' ri k'inomab che cojonic, cäquechbej na ri ajawibal ri u bim ri Dios chi cuya' na chque ri winak ri cäquilok'ok'ej ri are'." 
James2:6 Ri ix c'ut man nim ta quiwil wi ri meba'. ¿La ma ta e are ri k'inomab ri e c'analaj tak winak ri e c'o piwi', ri quixquicharchatej bic pa ri k'atbal tzij?" 
James2:7 ¿La ma ta e are' ri cäquetz'bej u wäch ri utzalaj u bi' ri Crist ri cänatax piwi'? 
James2:8 Utz quibano we kastzij quibano jas ri cubij ri pixab ri nim u banic, jas ri cubij ri Tz'ibatalic: “Chalok'ok'ej ri awajil a tz'akat jas ri u lok'ok'exic awib chbil awib”. Utzqui bano." 
James2:9 We c'u sibalaj quiya' na u k'ij jun winak chuwäch jun chic, quixmacunic. Ri pixab cuk'alajisaj chi man quinimaj taj." 
James2:10 Apachin ta' ne ri cunimaj ronojel ri pixab, cämacun c'u ne chrij xa' jun u tz'akatil, c'o u mac chquij conojel ri pixab." 
James2:11 Rumal rech chi are ri xbinic: “Matkaj pa mac cuc' niq'uiaj chic”, xubij xukuje': “Matcämisanic.” We man at kajinak pa mac cuc' niq'uiaj chic, we c'u ne at cämisaninak, man a nimam ta ri' ri pixab." 
James2:12 Je chixtzijonok, je chibana', je jas ri cäk'at na tzij piwi' rumal ri pixab ri cujutoro." 
James2:13 Ri jun ri man elinak ta u c'u'x chque niq'uiaj chic, ri Dios man quel ta u c'u'x che ri are' aretak cuk'at na tzij puwi'. Nim na ri elebal c'u'x chuwäch ri k'atoj tzij." 
James2:14 Wachalal, ¿jas lo ri quechbexic we c'o jun cubij chi c'o u cojonic, man c'o ta c'u ne utzalaj tak chac cubano? ¿La cäcuin lo we cojonic ri' che u colic?" 
James2:15 We ri awachalal achi o ixok cat'unuwic o cuna' wi'jal," 
James2:16 c'o ta c'u jun chiwe cubij che: “Jät pa utzil, chamik'a' awib, chatnojok”, ma ta c'u quiya' che ri rajawaxic che ri u cuerp, ¿jas ta lo ri carechbej chiwe?" 
James2:17 Je c'u wa' xukuje' ri i cojonic, we man e c'o chac quibano, ri cojonic ri xak u tuquiel cäminak." 
James2:18 C'o c'u jun cubij na: “At c'o a cojonic, ri in c'ut c'o chac quinbano.” Chac'utu' chnuwäch ri a cojonic ri man e rachilam ta chac. Ri in c'ut quinc'ut chawäch ri nu cojonic rumal ri chac ri quinbano." 
James2:19 At cacojo chi xa' jun ri Dios. ¡Utz cabano! Xukuje' ri itzel tak uxlabal quecojonic, xukuje' quebirbit rumal xe'n ib." 
James2:20 Matux con. Chach'obo' chi we ri cojonic ri c'o ruc' jun winak man e rachilam ta chac, jun cojonic wa' ri man cuyao taj." 
James2:21 Ri Abraham ri ka mam, ¿la ma ta xk'alajisaxic chi suc' rumal ri u chac, aretak xuya' ri Isaac ri u c'ojol puwi' ri porobal?" 
James2:22 Cawilo chi xchacun ri u cojonic ruc' ri u chac, chi ri u chac xutz'akatisaj ri u cojonic." 
James2:23 Je xbantajic jas ri cubij ri Tz'ibatalic, ri cubij: “Ri Abraham xcojon che ri Dios, rumal wa' xuc'ämawaj ri Dios jacha' jun suc'.” Xbix che ri Abraham chi are rachil ri Dios." 
James2:24 Quinwil c'ut chi ri winak cäk'alajisaxic rumal ri u chac chi suc' chic, man xuwi ta rumal ri cojonic." 
James2:25 Jewa' xuban ri ixok Rahab ri ixok quech nim ch'utin, xk'alajisaxic chi suc' rumal ri xubano, aretak xebuc'ulaj ri tako'nib, xeresaj c'u bic pa jun be chic." 
James2:26 Jas ri cuerp ri man rachil ta uxlabal, are cäminak, jeri' xukuje' cäminak ri cojonic ri man e rachilam ta chac." 
James3:1 E q'ui ri maquiban quib chi e ajtijab chixo'l, wachalal. Etamatal c'ut chi konojel cäk'at na tzij pakawi' e are' tak c'ut ri uj ri cujtijonic sibalaj c'ax na ri k'atoj tzij pa ka wi'." 
James3:2 Uj cujkaj pa q'ui qui wäch sachinakil. Je c'u ri' we c'o jun man cakaj ta pa jun sachinakil pa ri cubij are ri' tz'akatalaj winak, ri cäcuinic ruc' jiq'uibal rij wi'aj cätakan puwi' ronojel ri u cuerp." 
James3:3 Chiwilampe', aretak cäkacoj jic'abal rij qui wi' ri quiej rech queniman chke, jeri' cäkac'am u be ronojel ri qui cuerp." 
James3:4 Chebiwila tak ri jucub xukuje': pune' sibalaj e nimak, xukuje' quec'am bic cumal nimalaj tak quiakik', cäc'am qui be wa' rumal jun ch'utin c'ambal be xa' apawije' ta ne ri cäraj cuc'am wi bic ri cäc'amow u be." 
James3:5 Jewa' xukuje' ri rak' jun winak jun jasach ri ch'utin, cunimarisaj c'u u k'ij rumal rech chi cäcuin che u banic nimak tak jastak. ¡Jun xil k'ak' sibalaj nimalaj c'ache'laj cuporoj!" 
James3:6 Xukuje' ri ak'aj are' jun k'ak'; junam ruc' jumulaj etzelal ri c'o chquixo'l ri e u tz'akatil ri ka cuerp. Tz'akat cäretzelaj ronojel ri winak, cut'ik k'ak' che ronojel ri u cholajil ri u c'aslemal, kas are' c'ut t'iktajinak rumal ri xibalba." 
James3:7 Ronojel u wäch awaj, chicop aj uwo caj, cumätz, o awaj re ri plo, are' ri winak quetakan paquiwi' xukuje' qui banom ulok takanic paquiwi'." 
James3:8 Are c'u ri ak'aj man c'o ta jun winak cäcuinic cätakan puwi'. Are jun itzelalaj jasach ri man cuya' ta rib pa takic, nojinak che k'inob cämisanel." 
James3:9 Ruc' ri ak'aj cäkanimarisaj wi u k'ij ri Ajawaxel xukuje' ri Tataxel. Xukuje' ruc' wa' quekac'okoj wi ri winak, ri e banom je jas ri u banic ri Dios." 
James3:10 Xa' pa jun chi'aj quel wi ulok ri k'ijilanic che ri Dios xukuje' ri c'okonic. Wachalal, man utz taj chi que ka ban we jastak ri'." 
James3:11 ¿La quebel ulok qui'laj ja' xukuje' c'ayalaj ja' xa' pa jun q'uiyibal ja'? 
James3:12 Wachalal, ¿la cäcuin ri u che'al higo che qui ya'ic aseitun? ¿La cäcuin lo ri juwi' uva che qui ya'ic higo? mawi cäcuin jun u q'uiyibal tzayalaj ja' che u ya'ic qui'laj ja'." 
James3:13 ¿Jachin chixo'l c'o u no'j, cuch'ob q'ui jastak? Chebuc'utu ri u chac cumal ri utzalaj jastak ri cuban pa ri u c'aslemal, ri cuban ruc' ri u no'j, munimarisaj rib." 
James3:14 We c'u ri ix quiya' c'olbal chi ri ti'titem cuc'ayirisaj ri iwanima', quebiban c'ut ri jastak che u c'ulelaxic iwib, man c'o ta ba' jasche ri' chquiban ta nimal man are ta cätajin quiban ri' ri kastzij." 
James3:15 Man are ta no'j wa' ri cuya' ri Dios, xane' aj uwächulew, xak qui chomanic ri winak, xukuje' aj itzel." 
James3:16 Jawije' tak e c'o wi ti'titem, xukuje' c'ulelam tak ib, c'o tuquin tak ib ronojel u wäch etzelal." 
James3:17 Are c'u ri winak ri cäya' qui no'j rumal ri Dios, nabe e ch'ajch'oj, c'äte ri' cäquiya' jamaril, e utz cuc' ri winak, are' e nimanelab, e nojinak che elebal c'uxaj xukuje' che utzalaj tak wächinic, man cuban ta quieb qui c'u'x, man c'o ta quieb qui wäch." 
James3:18 Ri e jamarisanelab ri queticonij pa jamaril caquiyac jun wächinic aj suq'uilal. 
James4:1 ¿Jawije' quepe wi ri ch'o'j xukuje' ri c'ulelanic chixo'l? ¿La ma ta pa ri itzel tak i rayinic, ri quech'ojin pa tak ri i tz'akatil?" 
James4:2 Quebirayij jasach, man quebirik taj; quixcämisan c'ut. Itzel quiwilo aretak jun chic curik utzil, man quixcuin ta c'u che u rikic jas ri quitzucuj. Quiban i c'ulel chbil tak iwib, quixch'ojinic. Man quirik ta c'u ri quirayij, rumal rech chi man quita' ta che ri Dios." 
James4:3 Quita' ri quiwaj, man quic'am ta c'ut, rumal rech chi man utz ta ri quito. Xak quita' jastak che u sachic pa tak i quicotemal." 
James4:4 ¡Ix ri man ix jic taj chrij ri Dios! ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi jun ri carachilaj ri uwächulew, are ri' u c'ulel ri Dios? Jachin c'u ri cäraj cärachilaj rib ruc' ri uwächulew, cucoj rib che u c'ulel ri Dios." 
James4:5 ¿La quichomaj chi xak lok' cubij ri Tz'ibatalic: “Ri Uxlabaxel ri u banom ri Dios chi jekel pa ri uj sibalaj cujurayij ruc' achixomanic?” 
James4:6 Are c'u ri Dios cuban jun tok'ob ri sibalaj nim na. Rumal ri' cubij ri Tz'ibatalic: “Ri Dios cuk'atij qui wäch ri winak ri cäquinimarisaj quib; chque c'u ri e mach'alic cuya' tok'ob.” 
James4:7 Chijacha' ba' iwib pa u k'ab ri Dios. Chik'atij u wäch ri itzel, canimaj c'u na chiwäch." 
James4:8 Chixkeb ruc' ri Dios, ri are' xukuje' cäkeb na iwuc'. Ajmaquib, chiya' can ri u banic etzelal rech e ch'ajch'oj ri i k'ab. Ix ri quieb i c'u'x, chijosk'ij ri iwanima'." 
James4:9 Chk'oxow ri iwanima', chixbisonok, chixok'ok. Ri i tze' chq'uextaj pa ok'ej, ri i quicotemal chq'uextaj pa bis." 
James4:10 China' pa iwanima' chi man c'o ta i banic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel, ri are' c'ut cunimarisaj na i k'ij." 
James4:11 Wachalal, miyacala' tzij chiwij. Apachin ri cuyac tzij chrij ri rachalal o cuk'at tzij puwi' ri rachalal, chrij ri pixab cuyac wi tzij xukuje' cuk'at tzij puwi' ri pixab. We cak'at tzij puwi' ri pixab, man at ta ba' nimanel ri' che ri pixab, xane' at k'atal tzij." 
James4:12 Xa' jun ri cäyo'w ri pixab, xa' jun ri cäcuin che qui colic o che u sachic qui wäch ri winak. ¿At jachinok chi cak'at tzij puwi' jun chic?" 
James4:13 Chiwila' ba' ix, ri quibij camic: “Camic o chwek cujbe na pa ri tinimit ri', quekabana' jun junab chila', cujc'ayin na, cäkach'äc na puak.”" 
James4:14 Man iweta'm ta c'u ri chwek, jas quel wi na ri i c'aslemal. Kastzij ri i c'aslemal je jas ri mayul, ri xa' jubik' cuc'ut rib, c'äte ri' man quilitaj ta chic." 
James4:15 Mibij ba' ri tzij ri' che ri quiban na. Are ta ne quibij wa': “We cäraj ri Ajawaxel, cujc'asi' na rech cäkaban ri' o cäkaban wa'.”" 
James4:16 Camic c'ut quichomaj chi nim i banic, quinimarisaj iwib. Ronojel nimarisan k'ij jewa' rech ri itzel." 
James4:17 Apachin c'u ri reta'm u banic utzil, we c'u man cubano, are ri' c'o u mac." 
James5:1 ¡Chitatabej ba' wa', ix ri ix k'inomab! ¡Chixok'ok ruc' nimalaj bis, chiwok'ej ri c'axc'olil ri quepe na piwi'!" 
James5:2 K'ayinak ri i k'inomal, ri iwatz'iak e chicopirinak chic." 
James5:3 Ri i k'an puak xukuje' ri i sak puak qui chulum chi quib. Ri qui pusil cuk'alajisaj na jas ri i banom, cusach c'u na i wäch jacha' ri k'ak'. I mulin i k'inomal chque ri q'uisbal tak k'ij." 
James5:4 Chiwilampe', ri puak, ri man tz'akat taj ri i yo'm chque ri ajchaquib ri xeyicow qui wäch ri e iwulew. We puak ri' cätajin quixuc'okoj; are' c'u ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem u tom ri qui tzujunic we ajchaquib ri'." 
James5:5 Ix c'olinak pa k'inomal cho ri uwächulew, i jachom iwib pa tak quicotemal. I k'obisam ri i c'u'x je jas che ri k'ij re cämisanic." 
James5:6 I k'atom tzij paquiwi' xukuje' e i cämisam ri e suc'ab. Ri e are' c'ut man xquiya' ta u q'uexel ri c'ax chiwe. 
James5:7 Are c'u ri ix wachalal, chiweyej na c'ä cäpe na ri Ajawaxel. Je jas ri ajchac cäreyej na ri u wächinic ri u tico'n. Cäreyej na c'ä cäpe na ri nabe tak jäb xukuje' ri q'uisbal tak jäb." 
James5:8 Xukuje' ri ix chiweyej na. Co chicanajisaj ri iwanima'. Cäpe c'u na ri k'ij aretak cäpe ri Ajawaxel. 
James5:9 Wachalal, mixch'ach'atalob chixo'l rech man cäk'at ta tzij piwi'. Are ri Dios, ri k'atal tzij, tac'al chi' ri uchi'ja." 
James5:10 Wachalal, ri k'axal tak u tzij ri Dios ri xetzijon pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel xquirik c'ax, xqueyej c'ä xoc'ow na ri c'axc'olil. Chebic'ama' che c'utbal, chibana' iwe jas ri xquiban ri e are'." 
James5:11 Ri uj c'ut cäkabij chi tewichital ri winak ri cäquich'ij ri c'ax. I tom ri u ch'ijonic ri Job, iwilom jas xuban ri Ajawaxel che aretak xoc'ow ri u c'axc'olil. Iwilom chi ri Ajawaxel cutok'obisaj qui wäch ri winak, quel u c'u'x chque." 
James5:12 Ri sibalaj rajawaxic, wachalal, micoj ri caj o micoj ri ulew pa i tzij che u bixic ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na. Micoj apachique jasach pa i tzij che u bixic ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na. Xane' aretak quibij “je'”, xuwi “je'” chibij. Aretak quibij “man je taj”, xuwi “man je taj” chibij. Chibana' wa' rech man cäk'at ta tzij piwi'." 
James5:13 ¿La c'o jun chixo'l curik c'ax? Rajawaxic cuban ch'awem ruc' Dios. ¿La c'o jun cäquicotic? Chubixoj bix che u nimarisaxic u k'ij ri Dios. 
James5:14 ¿La c'o jun yawab chixo'l? Chebusiq'uij ri tatayib ri quetakan paquiwi' ri comon cojonelab, chquibana' ch'awem ruc' Dios puwi', chquicojo' aseit puwi' pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel." 
James5:15 Are ri ch'awem ruc' Dios ruc' cojonic querutzirisaj na ri yawab, ri Ajawaxel cuwalijisaj c'u na. We c'o mac u banom, quesachtaj na ri u mac." 
James5:16 Chik'alajisala' ri i mac chiwäch. Chibanala' ch'awem ruc' Dios piwi', rech quixcunatajic. Sibalaj nim na u cuinem ri u bochi'nic jun suc'alaj winak." 
James5:17 Ri k'axal tzij Eliy are jun achi junam u banic kuc' uj. Ri are' xuban ch'awem ruc' Dios, xutz'onoj chi man cäpe ta jäb. Man xpe ta c'u ri jäb puwi' ri uwächulew oxib junab ruc' wakib ic'." 
James5:18 Xch'aw chi jumul ruc' Dios, ri caj xuya' ulok ri jäb xukuje' ri ulew xuya' u wächinic." 
James5:19 Wachalal, we c'o jun chixo'l u yo'm can ri kastzij, c'o chi c'u jun cabanow che chi catzelej pa ri utzalaj be," 
James5:20 chich'obo' chi ri jun ri cäresaj ri ajmac pa ri be jawije' ri sachinak wi, cuto' na ri ranima' wa' chuwäch ri cämical, xukuje' cubano chi quesachtaj ri q'ui mac." 
1Peter1:1 Ri in Lu', in takom re ri Jesucrist, quintz'ibaj we wuj ri' chque ri e jabuninak pa Pont, pa Galas, pa Capados, pa Asiy, xukuje' pa Bitin, ri man chila' taj ri qui tinimit," 
1Peter1:2 ri e cha'tal jas ri xuchomaj ulok ojer ri Dios Tataxel. Ri are' u banom tastalic tak winak chiwe rumal ri Uxlabaxel, rech quixniman che xukuje' quixchiquichax ruc' ri u quiq'uel ri Crist: are ta ri Dios sibalaj cuban tok'ob chiwe xukuje' sibalaj cuya' jamaril chixo'l." 
1Peter1:3 Chnimarisax u k'ij ri u Dios xukuje' ri u Tat ri Kajaw Jesucrist, rumal rech chi ri are' sibalaj xel u c'u'x chke, xuya' jun c'ac' ka c'aslemal je ta ne jun alaj ne' c'äte xalaxic, rech c'o c'aslic cu'lbal ka c'u'x rumal ri u c'astajic ri Jesucrist chquixo'l ri cäminakib," 
1Peter1:4 rech cuya' jun kechbal ri man cäsach ta u wäch, man tz'ajtajinak taj, ri man cächaki'jar taj, ri c'olom chiwe pa ri caj." 
1Peter1:5 C'olom chiwe ix, ri ix chajin rumal ri u cuinem ri Dios rumal ri cojonic, rech quixcolotajic. Ronojel suc'umam ulok rech quixcolotajic, ri Dios cuk'alajisaj na pa ri q'uisbal tak k'ij." 
1Peter1:6 Rumal rech wa' ix nojinak che quicotemal, craj c'u ne rajawaxic na quixoc'ow chquipam q'ui tak c'ambejebal quieb oxib k'ij." 
1Peter1:7 Are c'u ri i cojonic ix xak junam ruc' ri k'an puak: ri cätijtobex rumal ri k'ak'. Ri cojonic ri cuch'ijo cac'ambejexic pakal na rajil chuwäch ri k'an puak, ri cäsach u wäch. Je c'u ri' we ri i cojonic ix, we je u tijtobexic wa' curik na juluwem xukuje' cäya' na u k'ij aretak cuc'utunisaj rib ri Jesucrist." 
1Peter1:8 Quilok'ok'ej ri Jesucrist pune' man iwilom ta u wäch, quixcojon che pune' man quiwil ta camic. Sibalaj quixquicot ruc' ri Jesucrist, ruc' jun quicotemal ri man quixcuin ta che u bixic, c'o i quicotemal ri nim u k'ij." 
1Peter1:9 Ri i cojonic c'ut u banom chiwe chi quecolotaj ri iwanima'. 
1Peter1:10 Ri e k'axal tak tzij xquitzijoj ri u tok'ob ri Dios ri cuya' na chiwe, xquitzucuj xquitatabela' u tzijol we colobal ib ri'." 
1Peter1:11 Are ta xcaj xquetamaj jachinok xukuje' jachique k'ij cäc'ulmataj na ri xc'ut ulok chquiwäch rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Crist ri c'o pa canima', aretak xuk'alajisaj ulok chi ri Crist curik na c'ax, xukuje' chi cänimarisax na u k'ij aretak coc'ow ri c'ax." 
1Peter1:12 Xk'alajisax c'u chquiwäch ri k'axal tak tzij, chi aretak cäquibij we jastak ri', man chquetaj e are quebajwataj wi, xane' chiwe ix.
